Title: Minim Minyak, Tetap Garing Krispi! Resep PANCAKE JAMUR TIRAM [Praktis & Ekonomis]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JB3fE3wQcSs

Oyster Mushroom Pancake Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g oyster mushroom
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
5 tbsp cornstarch
2 tbsp oil

Dipping Sauce ingredients:
1 stalk green onion
3 pc red Thai chili
1 clove garlic
1 tbsp hot oil
2 tbsp soy sauce
1/2 tbsp rice vinegar
1/2 tsp sesame oil
1/2 tsp sugar

Steps:
1. Tear the mushrooms into shreds. Rinse with water, then squeeze dry. Add mushroom bouillon and cornstarch, mix well.
2. Heat oil, then add oyster mushrooms. Cook until crisp and browned on both sides. Set aside.
3. Slice the green onions and red Thai chili, then transfer to a bowl. Add minced garlic, then pour it with hot oil.
4. Add soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, and sugar. Mix well.
5. Oyster Mushroom Pancake is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Wangi & Renyah Berlapis! Resep PIA KEJU [Oleh-Oleh Khas Bali]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V_Y5Z4o2ZoI

Cheese Pia (yield 9 pcs)

Dough ingredients:
110 g cake flour/all-purpose flour
30 g unsalted butter (room temperature)
7.5 g milk powder
20 g icing sugar
30 g beaten egg
35 g water
1/8 tsp baking powder

Lamination:
90 g margarine

Filling:
70 g all-purpose flour, toasted
35 g icing sugar
60 g baked cheddar cheese
30 g grated cheddar cheese
20 g milk powder
50 g margarine
50 g condensed milk

Egg Wash:
1 pc egg yolk
1 drop orange food coloring (optional)
1 tsp oil

Topping:
Cheddar cheese

Steps:
1. Place the lamination fat in a plastic bag, flatten it, and cut it into small cubes. Freeze until solid.
2. In a bowl, combine flour, milk powder, baking powder, butter, icing sugar, beaten egg, and water. Mix well, then add the frozen margarine and mix briefly.
3. Place the dough on baking paper and flatten it using a rolling pin. Freeze for 15–20 minutes.
4. Dust both sides with flour. Roll, then fold and roll again. Repeat 5 times.
5. Roll the dough into a rectangle about 5–6 mm thick. Freeze for at least 30 minutes or overnight.
6. Grate the cheese, then bake at 130°C for 20 minutes or until golden. Crush and weigh again to get 60 g for the filling.
7. For the filling, combine toasted flour, icing sugar, milk powder, baked cheese, grated cheese, margarine, and condensed milk. Mix well. Divide into 9 portions (about 30–35 g each) and shape into balls.
8. Divide the dough into 9 portions. Dust with flour and flatten the edges. Fill and shape into balls, sealing tightly.
9. Mix the egg yolk, orange food coloring, and oil.
10. Brush the dough with egg wash, then sprinkle grated cheese on top. Bake at 160°C for 35–40 minutes.
11. Cheese Pia is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Gurih, Wangi & Praktis! Resep SUP BOLA UDANG [Favorit Keluarga]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hAErKyAoAKI

Shrimp Ball Soup Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Shrimp Ball ingredients:
250 g peeled shrimp
1 stalk green onion
1–2 clove garlic
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
2 tsp soy sauce
1 tsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper
1/2 tsp sesame oil
2 tbsp cornstarch
1 pc small egg

Other ingredients:
2 clove garlic
1/4 pc onion
1 stalk green onion
5 leaf napa cabbage
600 ml water
1 tsp salt
1 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
1/4 tsp pepper
1 tsp sugar
100 ml plain soy milk

Condiments:
Soy sauce + sliced Thai chili
Steamed white rice

Steps:
1. Mince the shrimp and transfer to a bowl. Slice the green onions and add to the shrimp.
2. Add grated garlic, soy sauce, mushroom bouillon, sugar, pepper, sesame oil, cornstarch, and egg, Mix well.
3. Heat oil. Shape the shrimp mixture into small balls using a spoon and fry until golden. Set aside.
4. Slice the garlic and onion. Cut the napa cabbage and green onions into large pieces.
5. Heat a little oil. Add garlic and onion, sauté until fragrant.
6. Add water, napa cabbage, green onions, salt, chicken powder, mushroom bouillon, pepper, and sugar. Cook briefly, then add the shrimp balls and soy milk. Stir.
7. Shrimp Ball Soup is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Tekstur Lembut & Bumbu Meresap! Resep AYAM KUKUS OYONG
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yTLlAhZMsas

Steamed Chicken with Chinese Okra Recipe(yield 3 portions)

Marinade:
200 g boneless chicken thigh
1/2 tsp mushroom bouillon
1/2 tsp chicken powder
1/4 tsp pepper
1 tsp sugar
1/2 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
1/2 tsp sesame oil
1 tbsp tapioca starch

Other ingredients:
1 pc large Chinese okra
20 g glass noodles, soaked
2 clove garlic
3 pc red Thai chili
1/2 tbsp soy sauce
1/2 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp water

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken lengthwise, then marinate with all marinade ingredients. Mix well.
2. Peel and cut the Chinese okra. In a heatproof dish, arrange glass noodles, Chinese okra, and marinated chicken.
3. Finely chop garlic and chili, then place on top. Steam for 15 minutes.
4. Mix oyster sauce, soy sauce, and water. Pour over the chicken and steam again briefly.
5. Steamed Chicken with Chinese Okra is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Garing di Luar, Kenyal & Lembut di Dalam: Resep SIOMAY AYAM KOTAK [Bisa Goreng & Kukus]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UrOswTwJ0ng

Chicken Shumai Cubes Recipe (yield 4 servings)
 
Shumai Dough ingredients:
300 g ground chicken thigh
120 ml water
2 tsp salt
1½ tbsp sugar
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
1/2 tsp pepper
2 tbsp oyster sauce
2-3 clove garlic
1 stalk green onion
150 g cabbage
2 tbsp oil
1 tsp sesame oil
1 pc egg white
75 g tapioca starch
 
Tauco Sambal ingredients:
5 clove garlic
3 pc shallot
3 pc Thai chili
3 pc curly red chili
200 ml water
5 tbsp chili sauce
2 tbsp sweet tauco
1 tsp vinegar
2 tbsp sugar
1/2 tsp mushroom bouillon
 
Steps:
1. In a bowl, add ground chicken thigh, water, salt, sugar, mushroom bouillon, pepper, and oyster sauce. Mix until sticky, then add grated garlic.
2. Chop the cabbage and slice the green onions, then add to the dough. Add oil, sesame oil, egg whites, and tapioca starch. Mix well.
3. Prepare a heatproof container lined with baking paper. Pour the dough and spread evenly. Steam for 20–25 minutes. Let cool.
4. In a blender, add garlic, shallot, Thai chili, curly red chili, and some of the water. Blend, then transfer to a saucepan.
5. Add the remaining water, chili sauce, tauco, vinegar, sugar, and mushroom bouillon. Cook over low-medium heat until boiling for 5 minutes.
6. Slice the shumai and fry until crisp and golden brown. Drain.
7. Chicken Shumai Cubes are ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Kuahnya Segar, Dagingnya Lembut! Resep SOP SENGKEL [Cocok Untuk Lebaran]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UXfavkVsso4

Beef Shank Soup (yield 6 servings)
 
Ingredients:
1 kg beef shank
1½ liter water
4 cm ginger, bruised
6 clove garlic
3 stalk celery
1/2 pc nutmeg
3 pc clove
2 tsp salt
1 tsp chicken powder
2 tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tbsp sugar
1/4 tsp pepper
 
Other ingredients:
5 pc shallot
4 clove garlic
2-3 tbsp oil
2 stalk celery
2 stalk green onion
 
Sambal:
25 g green Thai chili
1/8 tsp salt
1/8 tsp mushroom bouillon
 
To serve:
White rice
Tomato
Lime
 
Steps:
1. In a pressure cooker, add all ingredients and cook for 45 minutes.
2. Slice the shallot and garlic.
3. Heat the oil. Fry the shallots, then the garlic until fragrant.
4. Slice celery and green onions. Grind chili with salt and mushroom bouillon.
5. Remove the beef and slice. Remove aromatics from the broth.
6. Add the beef, fried aromatics, celery, and green onions. Stir.
7. Beef Shank Soup is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Praktis Istimewa! Resep KUE KACANG KLASIK / PEANUT COOKIES [Renyah & Lumer]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RKBPaIa4IZ8

Peanut Cookies Recipe (yield 100 pcs)

Ingredients:
150 g peeled peanuts
170 g oil (or 100 g oil + 80 g melted margarine)
260 g all-purpose flour
16 g milk powder
130 g icing sugar
4 g baking powder
1 tsp salt
 
Egg wash:
1 pc egg yolk
1 tsp oil
2-3 drop orange food coloring (optional)
 
Topping:
Roasted peanuts, chopped
 
Steps:
1. Roast peanuts in an air fryer at 150°C for 15 minutes.
2. In a food chopper, add roasted peanuts, oil, baking powder, and salt. Blend until smooth.
3. In a bowl, mix flour, icing sugar, and milk powder, then add the blended peanuts. Mix well.
4. Flatten the dough using baking paper to A4 size. Cut with a cookie cutter as desired.
5. Mix the egg yolk, food coloring, and oil.
6. Brush the cookies and sprinkle the chopped peanuts. Bake at 130–140°C for 14 minutes. Rotate the tray at the 7-minute mark.
7. Peanut Cookies are ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Versi Ekonomis, Tetap Spesial! Resep KASTENGEL [Pakai Keju Cheddar]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=adamVdIpiHo

Kastengel (yield 100 pcs)

Ingredients:
90 g margarine
90 g unsalted butter
10 g icing sugar
2 g salt
4 g baking powder
2 pc egg yolk
200 g cake flour
50 g cornstarch
15 g milk powder
65 g grated cheese
75 g baked grated cheese
 
Egg wash:
1 pc egg yolk
1/2 tsp milk
 
Steps:
1. Grate the cheese and place on a baking tray lined with baking paper. Bake at 130°C for 20–25 minutes. Crumble slightly.
2. In a bowl, add butter, margarine, icing sugar, salt, and baking powder. Mix evenly.
3. Add egg yolks. Mix until pale and fluffy, then sift in flour, cornstarch, and milk powder. Add baked cheese and grated cheese, then mix with a spatula.
4. Flatten the dough using baking paper to A4 size.
5. Mix egg yolk and milk. Brush over dough, then sprinkle the cheese.
6. Cut into ~1 cm pieces or as desired. Arrange the cookies on a tray lined with baking paper. Bake at 135–140°C for 25–30 minutes.
7. Kastengel is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Tanpa Cetakan & Tinggi Protein! Resep MIE TELUR DADA AYAM HOMEMADE
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Wa8lSouoApU

Homemade Chicken Breast Egg Noodles Recipe (yield 8-10 servings)

Ingredients:
150 g chicken breast fillet, diced
2 pc egg
250 g bread flour
50 g tapioca starch
1/2 tbsp salt
 
Steps:
1. In a blender, add chicken breast fillet and eggs. Blend until smooth, then transfer to a bowl.
2. Add bread flour, tapioca starch, and salt. Knead until the dough is smooth.
3. Cover the dough with plastic. Rest for at least 1 hour or overnight in the fridge.
4. Dust with a little tapioca starch. Divide into 2 portions and flatten using a rolling pin. Slice noodles as desired.
5. Chicken Breast Egg Noodles are ready to use for various dishes.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Wangi, Gurih & Manis! Resep UDANG SAUS BALADO [Dijamin Nambah Nasi!]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r-xJOLBhaao

Balado Shrimp Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Shrimp Marinade ingredients:
350 g shrimp
½ tbsp lime juice
1 tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper

Spices:
50 g shallot
5 clove garlic
70 g curly red chili
130 g large red chili

Other ingredients:
200 g potato
100 ml oil
50 g shallot
8 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 stalk lemongrass
½ tbsp salt
½ tbsp MSG
2 tsp sugar
1 tsp lime juice
50 g peeled stinky bean
20 pc green Thai chili
50 ml water

To serve:
White rice

Steps:
1. Trim the sharp part of the shrimp, split the back, then clean it.
2. Marinate the shrimp with lime juice, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
3. Cut the potato. Fry the shrimp briefly and drain. Then, fry the potato until browned. Drain.
4. Boil the large red chili and curly red chili briefly, then drain.
5. In a food chopper, add garlic, shallot, boiled large red chili, and boiled curly red chili. Blend until smooth.
6. Slice the shallot and bruise the lemongrass.
7. Heat the oil. Add shallot, lemongrass, and kaffir lime leaf. Sauté until fragrant, then add the spice paste and sauté again until fragrant.
8. Add salt, MSG, sugar, lime juice, shrimp, fried potato, stinky bean, and green Thai chili. Mix well. Add a little water and cook until absorbed.
9. Balado Shrimp is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Bumbu Meresap Sempurna! Resep PEPES UDANG [Cocok Untuk Stok Sahur]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KCFwjRBDMok

Shrimp Pepes Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Ingredients:
300 g peeled shrimp
1/3 tsp baking powder
1 tbsp sugar
1½ tsp salt
1/2 tsp MSG
1 tsp chicken powder
1 pc egg
2 tbsp coconut milk
3 stalk green onion
35 g lemon basil

Spices:
5 clove garlic
8 pc shallot
6 pc red curly chili
3 pc candlenut
5 cm turmeric
1 tsp coriander
1 tsp white peppercorn
70 ml oil

Other ingredients:
1 stalk lemongrass, sliced
8 pc bay leaf
12 pc red Thai chili
Banana leaf + toothpick

Serving:
Steamed white rice

Steps:
1. In a blender, add garlic, shallot, candlenut, turmeric, coriander, white peppercorn, red curly chili, and oil. Blend until smooth.
2. Heat a pan. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant and oily. Set aside and let cool.
3. Slice the green onion. Slit the back of the shrimp, then marinate with baking powder. Mix well.
4. Add the sautéed spices, salt, chicken powder, sugar, MSG, egg, and coconut milk. Mix well, then add green onion and lemon basil. Mix well.
5. Prepare the banana leaves. Place bay leaf, lemongrass, red Thai chili, and shrimp. Wrap and secure with a toothpick. Steam for 12–15 minutes.
6. Shrimp Pepes is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Bumbu Ayam Bawang Serbaguna! Resep MIE INSTAN HOMEMADE [Favorit Keluarga]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MnTbimsfaG4

Homemade Instant Noodles Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Chicken Seasoning ingredients (1 jar):
60 g chicken powder
20 g mushroom bouillon
20 g sugar
1 g pepper

Noodle Soup ingredients:
1 tsp aromatic oil
1 tsp chicken seasoning
¼ tsp salt
170 ml boiling water
1 portion dried instant noodle
Fried shallot
Dried green onion

Fried Noodles ingredients:
1 tsp aromatic oil
1 tsp chicken seasoning
½ tsp sweet soy sauce
¼ tsp soy sauce
½ tsp chili sauce
1 portion dried instant noodle
Fried shallot

Steps:
1. In a blender, add chicken powder, mushroom bouillon, sugar, and pepper. Blend until fine.
2. Cut the green onion, then pan-roast over low heat until dry. Or, use an air fryer at 110 °C for 10–15 minutes.
3. Put the dried green onion into a plastic bag, then crush it until crumbled.
4. For the fried noodle mix, add aromatic oil, chicken seasoning, sweet soy sauce, soy sauce, and chili sauce on a serving plate.
5. For the noodle soup mix, add aromatic oil, chicken seasoning, salt, and dried green onion in a bowl.
6. Bring water to a boil. Cook the noodles until done, then drain. Add the noodles to the fried noodle mix and noodle soup mix, then stir well.
7. Homemade Instant Noodles are ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Sahur Praktis, 5 Menit Jadi! Resep NASI GORENG BULGOGI [Gurih & Wangi]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Xvi-y0QPTJc

Bulgogi Fried Rice (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
300 g white rice
4 clove garlic
1 stalk green onion
1 tbsp oil
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tbsp margarine
1 pc egg
1 tbsp bulgogi sauce
1 tsp sesame oil

Marinade:
80 g sliced beef
2 tbsp bulgogi sauce

Steps:
1. Cut the beef into small pieces and marinate with bulgogi sauce. Mix well.
2. Mince the garlic and slice the green onion. Heat oil. Sauté garlic until slightly yellowed. Set aside some garlic for topping.
3. Add beef to the pan. Stir-fry briefly, then add rice, green onion, and mushroom bouillon. Cook on high heat until fragrant.
4. Push rice to the side of the pan. Add margarine and egg. Stir well.
5. Add sesame oil and bulgogi sauce. Cook briefly.
6. Bulgogi Fried Rice is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: 5 Menit Jadi! Resep OSENG TAHU TELUR KUCAI [Praktis Tetap Istimewa]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LIODrrukpYU

Tofu & Egg Stir-Fry with Chives Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)
Ingredients:
6 pc white tofu
1 pc egg
80 g garlic chive
1 tsp sugar
½ tsp salt
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
50 ml water
Oil for sautéing

Spices:
1 tbsp dried shrimp, soaked in hot water
5 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
5 pc red Thai chili
5 pc curly red chili

To serve:
Steamed rice

Steps:
1. In a food chopper, add shallot, garlic, curly red chili, red Thai chili, and dried shrimp. Chop until smooth.
2. Cut the tofu into pieces. Beat the egg, then add to the tofu and mix well.
3. Heat a little oil. Add the tofu and egg mixture. Cook until lightly browned and set aside.
4. Heat a little oil. Sauté the spices until fragrant, then add the tofu, water, salt, mushroom bouillon, sugar, and oyster sauce. Cook briefly.
5. Slice the garlic chives into pieces, then add to the pan and cook briefly.
6. Tofu & Egg Stir-Fry with Chives is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Resep AYAM GORENG KAILAN KRISPI: Garing Renyah di Luar, Gurih Juicy di Dalam!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=p1mEA3qQmPQ

Crispy Chicken with Gai Lan Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Chicken Marinade ingredients:
350 g boneless chicken thigh
2 clove garlic
1 tsp ginger
1 pc lime
½ tsp baking soda
½ tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
½ tsp pepper
½ tbsp sugar
1 tbsp soy sauce
3 tbsp tapioca starch
1 tbsp all-purpose flour

Dry Coating:
Tapioca starch

Crispy Gai Lan ingredients:
100 g gai lan
45 g garlic
8 pc red Thai chili
½ tsp MSG
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
½ tbsp sugar
2 tbsp oil

To serve:
Steamed rice

Steps:
1. Cut the chicken into pieces, then marinate with grated garlic, grated ginger, lime juice, baking soda, salt, mushroom bouillon, pepper, and soy sauce. Mix well.
2. Add sugar, tapioca starch, and all-purpose flour. Mix until well combined. Let rest for 15–30 minutes at room temperature or 2 hours in the refrigerator.
3. Slice the gai lan and red Thai chili.
4. Coat the chicken with tapioca starch. Fry the chicken over high heat until cooked. Drain, then briefly fry the gai lain. Drain.
5. Heat a little oil. Sauté the garlic over medium-low heat until fragrant, then add the red Thai chili and sauté briefly.
6. Add the crispy gai lan, MSG, mushroom bouillon, sugar, and the fried chicken. Mix well.
7. Crispy Chicken with Gai Lan is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Sahur Praktis Cuma 5 Menit! Resep TELUR ASAM MANIS [Gurih Manis Spesial]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gUTViRmCD8E

Sweet & Sour Eggs Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Ingredients:
6 pc egg
Salt, to taste
2 clove garlic
½ pc onion
1 pc large red chili
1 tbsp oil
1 tbsp margarine

Sweet & Sour Sauce ingredients:
2 tbsp ketchup
2 tbsp chili sauce
½ tsp vinegar
½ tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp cornstarch
2 tsp sugar
150 ml water

Others:
Rice

Steps:
1. Heat oil. Add eggs and sprinkle with salt. Cook through.
2. Remove the seeds from the chili, then slice diagonally. Slice the onion and chop the garlic.
3. For the Sweet & Sour Sauce, mix water, ketchup, chili sauce, oyster sauce, sugar, vinegar, and cornstarch. Mix well.
4. Heat a little oil. Add garlic and sauté until fragrant. Then, add onion and chili. Stir-fry briefly.
5. Add the Sweet & Sour sauce, margarine, and fried eggs. Cook for a moment until the sauce is absorbed.
6. Sweet & Sour Eggs are ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Bikin Nagih! Resep SIOMAY AYAM UDANG JUMBO & SAMBAL BAWANG TAUCO [Gurih, Kenyal & Bertekstur]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZnDUCUoCWoU

Jumbo Chicken & Shrimp Shumai Recipe (yield 40-50 pcs)

Shumai Filling ingredients:
1 kg ground chicken thigh
350 g ground chicken breast
350 g coarsely chopped shrimp
300 g boiled chicken skin, ground
80 g garlic
250 g onion
250 ml water
30 g salt
100 g sugar
15 g mushroom bouillon
1 tsp pepper
70 g oyster sauce
40 g fish sauce
70 g cooking oil
2 tbsp sesame oil
600 g tapioca flour

Tauco Sambal ingredients:
10 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
6 pc red Thai chili
6 pc curly red chili
300 ml water
170 g chili sauce
4 tbsp sweet tauco
2 tsp vinegar
60 g sugar
1 tsp mushroom bouillon

Others:
Grated carrot
Wonton skin

Steps:
1. Blend garlic with water until smooth, then add onion and blend again until smooth.
2. In a bowl, add ground chicken thigh, ground chicken breast, shrimp, ground chicken skin, salt, mushroom bouillon, sugar, pepper, oyster sauce, fish sauce, sesame oil, cooking oil, and the blended spices. Mix until evenly combined.
3. Add tapioca flour and mix until evenly combined. Let the shumai mixture rest for 1-2 hours at room temperature or refrigerate overnight.
4. In a blender, add garlic, shallot, curly red chili, Thai chili, and part of the water. Blend until smooth.
5. Transfer to a saucepan, add chili sauce, sweet tauco, sugar, mushroom bouillon, vinegar, and the remaining water. Cook over medium-low heat for 10 minutes.
6. Flatten the wonton skin, then shape the Shumai with about 70-75 g of filling each. Place grated carrot on top of the Shumai and steam for 30 minutes.
7. Jumbo Chicken & Shrimp Shumai is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Gurih Manis Cocok Dengan Sambal Segar! Resep IKAN PANGGANG MADU SAMBAL DABU-DABU
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GTVxOB8OV-E

Honey-Glazed Fish with Dabu-Dabu Recipe (yield 5 porsi)

Fish Marinade ingredients:
1 kg yellowtail fish
3 clove garlic
1/2 tsp turmeric powder
1 tsp coriander
2 cm ginger
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tsp salt
1/4 tsp pepper
1-2 tbsp oil

Honey Glaze ingredients:
2 tbsp chili sauce
2 tbsp ketchup
2 tbsp oyster sauce
3 tbsp honey
2 tbsp margarine

Dabu-Dabu ingredients:
1½ pc red tomato
2 pc green tomato
8 pc shallot
5 pc red Thai chili
12 pc green Thai chili
1-2 pc lime
1 tsp salt
1/2 tbsp sugar
1/2 tsp mushroom bouillon
2 tbsp oil

To serve:
Steamed white rice

Steps:
1. In a mortar, add garlic, ginger, salt, mushroom bouillon, and pepper. Grind until smooth. Add coriander and turmeric powder. Grind again until smooth.
2. Clean and score the fish. Marinate with the ground spices and oil. Mix well. Let it rest briefly.
3. In a bowl, combine chili sauce, ketchup, honey, oyster sauce, and margarine. Mix well.
4. Air fry at 200°C for 7-8 minutes until half cooked.
5. Remove tomato cores. Dice the red tomato and green tomato. Slice the shallots, red Thai chili, and green Thai chili. Transfer to a bowl.
6. Add salt, sugar, mushroom bouillon, and lime juice. Mix well. Pour hot oil over the Dabu-dabu and mix again.
7. Brush the honey glaze on both sides of the fish. Air fry again for 5-6 minutes or until fully cooked.
8. Honey-Glazed Fish with Dabu-Dabu is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Kenyal & Ekonomis! Resep PENTOL MERCON [Lengkap Dengan Saus dan Kuah]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=93NglM86fY0

Volcano Pentol Recipe (yield 35-40 pcs)

Pentol Dough ingredients:
400 g ground beef
1 tbsp salt
1 tsp MSG
1 tbsp beef powder
1½ tbsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
200 ml ice water
1 pc egg white
1 tbsp grated garlic
1 tsp baking powder
200 g tapioca flour
30 g all-purpose flour
Some Volcano Sambal

Volcano Sambal ingredients:
160 g red Thai chili
80 g shallot
40 g garlic
2 tbsp oil

Volcano Soup ingredients:
1 stalk green onion, sliced
1½ tbsp ketchup
2 tbsp chili sauce
1-2 tbsp chicken powder
1 tbsp Volcano Sambal
750 ml water
Oil for sautéing

Pentol condiments:
Volcano Sambal
Chili sauce
Sweet soy sauce
Fried shallot
Celery, sliced

Add-ons (Pentol Soup):
Vermicelli, soak in water
Celery, sliced
Fried shallot
Lime

Steps:
1. Slice shallot and garlic. Heat oil, then add shallot and sauté until fragrant.
2. Add garlic and red Thai chili. Sauté until fragrant and slightly browned. Let cool briefly, then blend in a food chopper until smooth.
3. In a bowl, add ground beef, salt, MSG, beef powder, sugar, pepper, and water. Mix until sticky.
4. Add baking powder, egg white, and minced garlic. Mix until combined, then add flour and tapioca. Mix until fully incorporated.
5. Add some Volcano Sambal and mix well. Heat the water, then lower the heat and drop the pentol shaped into balls with a fork. Cook until done.
6. For Pentol with condiments, combine pentol with Volcano Sambal, chili sauce, sweet soy sauce, fried shallot, and celery.
7. Prepare a saucepan. Heat a little oil, then sauté the green onion until fragrant. Then, add Volcano Sambal and cook briefly.
8. Add water, ketchup, chili sauce, and chicken powder. Bring to a boil, then add pentol into the soup.
9. Volcano Pentol is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Bumbu Rempah Meresap! Resep SATE AYAM KHAS SINGAPURA
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XAylylZ5Zl8

Singaporean Chicken Satay (yield 4 servings)

Satay Marinade ingredients:
500 g chicken thigh fillet
2 tbsp instant marinade powder
¼ pc onion
3 cm galangal
2 tbsp coconut milk
1 tbsp oil
1 tsp sugar

Peanut Sauce ingredients:
3 cm galangal
6 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
3 pc large red chili, deseeded
50 ml oil
100 g fried peanut
3 pc kaffir lime leaf
325 ml water
1 tbsp palm sugar
1 tbsp white sugar
2 tbsp coconut milk
1 tsp salt
¾ tsp mushroom bouillon

Accompaniments:
Rice cake, sliced
Red onion, sliced
Cucumber, sliced
Pineapple, blended

Steps:
1. Cut the chicken lengthwise, then marinate it with grated galangal, grated onion, instant marinade powder, sugar, oil, and coconut milk. Mix well, then skewer the chicken while pressing firmly.
2. Slice the galangal. Add galangal, large red chili, shallots, garlic, and oil into a chopper. Blend until smooth and sauté until fragrant.
3. Add fried peanuts into the chopper. Blend coarsely, then add into the pan and sauté briefly.
4. Add water, kaffir lime leaf, palm sugar, white sugar, salt, mushroom bouillon, and coconut milk. Cook over low heat until reduced.
5. Brush the grill with oil. Grill the satay until cooked through and browned on both sides.
6. Singaporean Chicken Satay is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Lembut, Wangi & Praktis! Resep FRENCH CREPES [Tips Stok Awet Tahan Lama]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MmyfgJ-meE0

French Crepes Recipe (yield 10 servings)

Crepe Batter ingredients:
160 g all-purpose flour
2 pc egg
350 ml milk
2 tbsp unsalted butter, melted
2 tsp sugar
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp vanilla extract (optional)
¼ tsp baking powder

Topping:
Salted butter
Honey
Icing sugar
Banana
Chocolate spread

Steps:
1. In a bowl, gradually mix the flour, salt, sugar, baking powder, and milk while stirring.
2. Add the eggs, melted butter, and vanilla extract. Mix well then strain. Let rest for at least 30 minutes.
3. Heat a pan. Grease with butter, and pour ¾–1 ladle of crepes batter. Spread it evenly and cook until slightly dry. Repeat until finished.
4. For freezer storage, fold the crepes and place them in an airtight container. Use baking paper between each crepe layer to prevent sticking.
5. Fold the crepes and serve with icing sugar, honey, and salted butter or toppings as desired.
6. French Crepes are ready to be served.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Renyah di Luar, Kenyal di Dalam! Resep CIRENG MINI [Lengkap Dengan Saus Siraman Jadul]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=92Cvr1HQ-Yc

Mini Cireng Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Cireng Dough ingredients:
100 g tapioca flour
25 g all-purpose flour
1 clove garlic
1 stalk green onion
75 g boiling water
½ tsp salt
½ tsp chicken powder
1/8 tsp pepper

Classic Sauce ingredients:
30 g fried peanut
3 clove garlic
3 pc shallot
5 tbsp chili sauce
4 pc kaffir lime leaf
350 ml water
2 tsp tapioca flour + 1 tbsp water
2 tsp sugar
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp vinegar
½ tbsp sweet soy sauce

Coating:
Tapioca flour

Add-on:
Green Thai chili

Steps:
1. In a blender, add shallot, garlic, and a little water. Blend until smooth, then add fried peanuts and grind coarsely.
2. Prepare a saucepan. Add the blended mixture, remaining water, chili sauce, and kaffir lime leaf. Cook until boiling, then add sugar, salt, vinegar, tapioca slurry, and sweet soy sauce. Cook until slightly thickened.
3. In a bowl, combine tapioca flour, AP flour, salt, chicken powder, pepper, grated garlic, and chopped green onion. Mix well, then add boiling water and knead until combined.
4. Prepare boiling water. Tear the cireng dough into small pieces. Boil until cooked, drain, and let cool.
5. Coat the Cireng with tapioca flour, then fry over medium-low heat until crisp. Set aside.
6. Mini Cireng is ready to serve.

Eggs with Green Chili Slices Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:

8 pc shallot
9 pc green chili
10 pc green Thai chili
4 pc egg
4 g shrimp paste, roasted
1 tbsp oyster sauce

Oil for stir-frying

To serve:
Steamed white rice

Steps:
1. Slice the garlic, shallot, green chili, and green Thai chili.
2. Heat a little oil. Add the egg, cook until crispy. Set aside and slice into pieces.
3. Heat a little oil. Sauté the garlic, shallot, and shrimp paste while crushing it. Cook until fragrant.

Title: Dagingnya Lembut & Saus Meresap! Resep SAPI SAUS LADA HITAM / BLACK PEPPER BEEF
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9GYfddzT8pA

Black Pepper Beef Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
200 g sliced beef
2 tbsp cornstarch
2 tbsp water
1 tbsp soy sauce

Other ingredients:
3 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
4 pc red curly chili
½ pc onion
1–2 tbsp oil
½ tbsp coarse black pepper
2 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp ketchup
½ tbsp chili sauce (optional)
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp margarine
225 ml water
1 tbsp cornstarch

Serving:
Steamed rice
Fried egg

Steps:
1. In a bowl, combine cornstarch, soy sauce, and water. Mix well, then add sliced beef. Gently mix until evenly coated and marinate for 10 minutes.
2. Chop garlic and shallots. Slice onion and red curly chili.
3. Heat a little oil. Sauté shallot and garlic until fragrant. Add onion, red curly chili, and sliced beef, then mix well.
4. Add black pepper and sauté briefly, then add oyster sauce, sweet soy sauce, chili sauce, ketchup, and margarine. Cook briefly.
5. Mix water with cornstarch until smooth, then pour into the pan. Cook until boiling and thickened.
6. Black Pepper Beef is ready to serve.

Title: Cuma 5 Bahan! Resep SAYAP AYAM KECAP INGGRIS [Favorit Keluarga]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aUlhLSKKHKw

Worcestershire Chicken Wings Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)
Ingredients:
600 g chicken wings, chopped in half
1½ tbsp garlic powder / 3 clove garlic
1 tbsp chicken powder
2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1½ tbsp sweet soy sauce

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with garlic powder, chicken powder, Worcestershire sauce, and sweet soy sauce. Mix well and marinate for 30 minutes or overnight in the fridge.
2. Add the wings into the air fryer. Glaze with the leftover marinade. Bake at 170°C for 15 minutes.
3. Halfway through, flip the wings and glaze them again with the leftover marinade. Continue baking until done.
4. Worcestershire Chicken Wings are ready to serve.

Terasi Fried Rice Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
350 g white rice
12 pc shallot
3 clove garlic
9 pc red Thai chili
4 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 stalk lemongrass
5 pc Soy Liver and Gizzard
6 g shrimp paste powder
¼ tsp turmeric powder (optional)
½ tsp mushroom bouillon
½ tsp sugar
1 pc kaffir lime (optional)

To Serve:
Fried egg
Emping
Fried shallot

Steps:

Title: Lembut, Wangi & Istimewa! Resep BOLU BAKAR KEJU PREMIUM [Anti Gagal!]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gBrCxMVBScU

Cheesy Bolu Bakar Recipe (yield 12 servings)

Pan size: 2 pans, sized 20 x 10 x 7cm

Bread dough ingredients:
255 g bread flour
110 g all-purpose flour
110 g sugar
10 g yeast
65 g cold water
65 g milk
15 g condensed milk
85 g egg, whisked
85 g margarine
1 g salt

Buttercream ingredients:
200 g unsalted butter
200 g margarine
200 g icing sugar
1 pc egg
2 g Blossom Paste Butter & Milk
4 g Blossom Paste Butter & Cheese

Glaze ingredients:
Blossom Paste Butter & Cheese
Melted margarine

Topping:
Cheese

Steps:
1. Mix bread flour, all-purpose flour, sugar, & yeast. Mixer at low speed, then add water, milk, egg, and condensed milk. Mixer at medium speed for 10 minutes.
2. Add margarine and salt. Mixer at high speed for a short time, then reduce to medium speed. Mixer for 10 minutes or until elastic. Let the dough rest for 30-40 minutes.
3. For the buttercream, bain marie the egg until 60°C. Let cool to room temperature.
4. Beat unsalted butter with margarine until slightly fluffy, then sift in icing sugar. Mixer again.
5. Add egg. Mixer until combined, then add Blossom Paste and mixer briefly.
6. Grease the pan with margarine, then line with baking paper.
7. Remove air from the dough, then divide into two. Flatten into a rectangular shape. Press the bottom of the dough then roll.
8. Place the dough in the pan. Cover with plastic wrap and let rest for 30-40 minutes.
9. If the pan has no lid, cover the top of the dough with baking paper. Then, place another pan and weights (such as pestles). Bake at 175–180°C for 35 minutes.
10. Remove the bread from the pan and let cool.
11. Mix melted margarine with Blossom Paste Butter & Cheese. Stir until combined.
12. Slice the bread in half, then slice it in half again without cutting through. Spread the buttercream & add grated cheese. Glaze the outside with the margarine mixture. Grill on a pan until golden brown.
13. Bolu Bakar is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: MINYAK AYAM BAWANG HOMEMADE: Serbaguna Untuk Mie, Nasi & Sup! [Tahan Lama]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZOMDdwvfc04

Aromatic Chicken Oil Recipe (yield 350 ml)

Ingredients:
100 g chicken skin
80 g shallot
25 g garlic
250 ml oil

Steps:
1. Bring water to a boil. Boil the chicken skin for a few seconds. Set aside.
2. Slice the garlic and shallots.
3. In a blender, add garlic, shallots, chicken skin, and some of the oil. Blend until smooth.
4. Cook the oil mix and add the rest of the oil. Cook on low heat until browned. Turn the heat off and let cool.
5. Aromatic Chicken Oil is ready to use.

Title: Kuah Kental Berempah Khas RM Padang! Resep GULAI AYAM PADANG
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xp0o9TRFciE

Chicken Gulai Recipe (yield 16 servings)

Ingredients:
2 kg rooster, skin removed, cut into 4

Spice Paste:
120 g large red chili, seeds removed
20 g green Thai chili
35 g galangal
15 g ginger
15 g turmeric
15 pc stinky bean, peeled, halved
30 g candlenut
60 g garlic
75 g shallot
150 g oil
200 ml water

Other ingredients:
2 tbsp Sari Minang seasoning
5 pc asam kandis
4 stalk lemongrass
8 pc bay leaf
8 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 pc turmeric leaf
350 ml coconut milk
1.2 liter water
1½ tbsp salt
2 tsp MSG
1 tbsp sugar (optional)

To serve:
Steamed white rice
Boiled cassava leaf
Cucumber
Green chili sambal

Steps:
1. Slice galangal and ginger.
2. Heat some of the oil. Add galangal, ginger, candlenut, turmeric, large red chili, green Thai chili, and stinky beans. Sauté until lightly browned. Set aside to cool.
3. Transfer the sautéed spices to a blender. Add garlic, shallot, remaining oil, and water. Blend until very smooth.
4. Sauté the spice paste, then add bruised lemongrass, turmeric leaf, bay leaf, kaffir lime leaf, Sari Minang seasoning, and asam kandis. Cook until fragrant and fully cooked.
5. Add water, coconut milk, salt, MSG, and sugar. Cook until boiling.
6. Add chicken, stir, and cover. Cook for 45–60 minutes over low heat.
7. Chicken Gulai is ready to serve.

Title: Kenyal, Juicy & Topping Serbaguna! Resep CHICKEN LUNCHEON / MEATLOAF / SPAM AYAM [Tips Stok Frozen]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jXjRsAYNR1U

Chicken Luncheon Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Scallion Oil ingredients:
12 g spring onion (white part)
30 g oil

Chicken Luncheon ingredients:
275 g chicken thigh fillet
75 g ground beef
100 g chicken skin
1 tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
2 tsp mushroom bouillon
½ tbsp chicken powder
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp baking powder
2 tsp garlic powder
1 tsp red yeast rice powder
100 g ice cube/ice water
1 egg white
1½ tbsp soy sauce
25 g tapioca flour/potato starch
2 tbsp white breadcrumb

Serving:
Steamed white rice
Sunny-side-up egg

Steps:
1. Bring water to a boil. Boil the skin briefly, then drain.
2. Slice the white part of the spring onions and sauté briefly, then set aside.
3. In a food processor, add chicken thigh fillet, ground beef, boiled skin, salt, sugar, pepper, mushroom bouillon, chicken powder, baking powder, garlic powder, red yeast rice powder, and ice. Blend until sticky.
4. Add the scallion oil, egg white, soy sauce, tapioca flour, and breadcrumb. Blend again until smooth.
5. Prepare a pan lined with baking paper. Pour the mixture into the pan, level it, and tap the pan on the counter. Cover with aluminum foil.
6. Steam for 40 minutes over medium-low heat. Let cool, then slice.
7. Heat a little oil and cook the Chicken Luncheon until lightly browned.
8. Chicken Luncheon is ready to serve.

Prawn Paste Chicken Wings Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
500 g chicken wings, halved
2 clove garlic
8 g shrimp paste, roasted
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp lemon juice
1 tsp sesame oil
1 tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper

Batter ingredients:
60 g all-purpose flour
30 g tapioca flour
1 pc egg yolk
150 ml water
½ tsp baking powder

Steps:
1. In a mortar, add garlic, shrimp paste, and salt. Mash until smooth.
2. Marinate the chicken with the spices, sugar, mushroom bouillon, pepper, lemon juice, oyster sauce, and sesame oil. Mix well and marinate for 1 hour.
3. In a bowl, mix flour, tapioca, baking powder, egg yolk, and water.
4. Dip the chicken into the batter, then fry until cooked through and golden brown.
5. Prawn Paste Chicken Wings are ready to serve.

Title: Praktis Tanpa Cetakan & Kenyal! Resep BAKSO UNYIL / BAKSO MUTIARA [Anti Gagal]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7WTW975htxc

Pearly Meatballs Recipe (yield 10 servings)

Aromatics:
2 tbsp oil
6 pc shallot
6 clove garlic

Meatball Dough ingredients:
250 g beef tenderloin (half frozen)
250 g chicken breast filet (half frozen)
2 tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
1/4 tsp pepper
2 tsp mushroom bouillon
2 tsp baking powder
1-2 clove garlic
2 pc egg
2 tsp sweet soy sauce
1 tsp dark soy sauce (optional)
80 g ice cube
50 g tapioca

Meatball Broth ingredients:
1 liter water
1 tbsp chicken powder
1/2 tbsp mushroom bouillon
1/2 tbsp salt
1/4 tsp pepper
1 tbsp sugar
1 stalk green onion, sliced
1 stalk celery, sliced
1 tbsp aromatic chicken oil

Sides:
Thai chili sambal
Fried shallot
Lime
White rice

Steps:
1. Slice the shallots and garlic. Heat oil. Fry the shallots for a few moments then add garlic. Cook over low-medium heat until slightly crisp.
2. Slice the beef and chicken breast fillet.
3. In a food processor, add beef, chicken breast fillet, salt, sugar, pepper, mushroom bouillon, and baking powder. Blend until sticky.
4. Add the fried aromatics, chopped garlic, eggs, sweet soy sauce, dark soy sauce, and ice cubes. Blend until completely smooth, then add tapioca and blend again.
5. Chill the meatball dough in the fridge for 1-2 hours, then put into a piping bag.
6. Prepare hot water. Wet hands with cold water. Shape the meatballs, then cook over low heat until done. Then, soak them in cold drinking water and set aside.
7. In a pot, add water, chicken powder, mushroom bouillon, salt, pepper, sugar, green onions, celery, and aromatic chicken oil. Bring to a boil.
8. Add the meatballs and cook briefly.
9. Pearly Meatballs are ready to serve.

Title: Praktis 1 Menu Untuk MPASI + Lauk Keluarga: Resep GADON SAPI [Lembut & Wangi!]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V0Q6vtEKRiA

Beef Gadon Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g sliced beef
40 g beef liver, boiled
2 pc egg
90 ml coconut milk
60 ml water
1½  tbsp cornstarch (optional)
1½ tsp mushroom bouillon
1½ tbsp coconut sugar
1½ tsp salt

Spices:
2 tbsp coconut oil
2 pc candlenut
6 pc shallot
4 clove garlic

Other ingredients:
Lemongrass
Bay leaf
Shallot
Red Thai chili
Green Thai chili
Banana leaf for wrapping

To serve:
White rice

Steps:
1. Slice the garlic and shallots. Pound and chop the candlenuts.
2. Heat coconut oil. Sauté the shallots until half-crisp, then add garlic and candlenuts. Sauté until crisp and set aside.
3. In a chopper, add the fried spices, beef, salt, coconut sugar, mushroom bouillon, and boiled beef liver. Blend.
4. Add eggs, coconut milk, water, and cornstarch. Blend again.
5. Slice the lemongrass, shallots, and Thai chili. Prepare banana leaves. Place the bay leaf, lemongrass, and Gadon mix. Wrap and secure with a toothpick.
6. Prepare a heatproof bowl. Place the banana leaves as the base. Arrange bay leaf, lemongrass, shallots, Thai chili, and the Gadon mix. Cover with a banana leaf. Steam for 25 minutes.
7. Beef Gadon is ready to serve.

Chili Oil Boiled Chicken Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Chicken Marinade:
300 g chicken breast fillet

1 tbsp egg white
1 tsp chicken powder
1/8 tsp pepper
1 tsp sugar
1/2 tsp salt

Chili Oil:
2 tbsp oil
1 clove garlic
1 stalk green onion
3 pc red Thai chili
1½ tbsp coarse chili flakes
2 tsp soy sauce
2 tsp oyster sauce
1 tsp sugar
25 ml water
1/2 tsp sesame oil
1 slice lime

Others:
Ginger

To serve:
White rice

Steps:

2. Slice the green onion and red Thai chili.
3. Heat oil. Add chopped garlic. Sauté over medium heat until slightly yellow, then add coarse chili flakes, red Thai chili, and green onion. Sauté until fragrant.
4. Add soy sauce, oyster sauce, sugar, and water. Cook briefly, then turn off heat and add sesame oil. Mix well.
5. Bring water to a boil, add sliced ginger and marinated chicken. Boil for 1-2 minutes, then drain.

Seasoned flour

Homemade Seasoned Flour Recipe (for 300 g)

1 tsp paprika powder (optional)
1/2 tsp turmeric powder (optional)
1 tbsp fried shallot
1 tbsp fried garlic
14 leaf celery
1/2 tbsp dried oregano
1 tsp baking powder
1 tbsp chicken powder
1/2 tbsp salt
1 tsp pepper
1 tsp sugar

Steps:

Rice

Crispy Dory with Creamy Sauce Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
150 g dory fillet
5 tbsp seasoned flour
3 tbsp water
1 stalk green onion (optional)

Garlic Butter Rice ingredients:
250 g white rice
70 g boiled carrot, diced (optional)
1 tbsp margarine
2 clove garlic, minced
1 pc egg
½ tsp chicken powder
1/8 tsp pepper
½ tbsp soy sauce

Creamy sauce ingredients:
1 tbsp margarine
1½ tbsp seasoned flour
100 ml water

Other ingredients:
Grated mozzarella
Seasoned flour
Oil for frying

Steps:

Steamed Tofu with Minced Chicken Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g silken tofu block
1 thumb ginger (optional)
Sesame oil (optional)

Chicken marinade ingredients:
300 g minced chicken thigh
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp tapioca flour
1 pc egg white
2 clove garlic
3/4 tsp salt
1/2 tsp MSG
1/2 tbsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper

Sauce ingredients:
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 stalk green onion
120 ml water
1/2 tbsp sugar
1 tbsp oil

To serve:
White rice

Steps:
1. In a bowl, combine minced chicken thigh, salt, pepper, MSG, sugar, oyster sauce, egg white, tapioca flour, and grated garlic. Mix until sticky. Let it rest for 15 minutes.
2. Cut the tofu in half and arrange it in a heatproof container, then add the marinated chicken and ginger slices. Steam for 12–15 minutes.
3. Slice the green onions, then stir-fry with a bit of oil until fragrant and slightly crisp. Add water, soy sauce, and sugar, then cook briefly.
4. Pour the sauce and sesame oil over the steamed tofu.

Title: Resep NASI GURIH AYAM PEDAS RICE COOKER: Bumbunya Meresap, Gurih & Wangi! [Bisa Jadi Nasi Bakar]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=up56O5fI5aI

Spicy Savory Chicken Rice Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Savory Rice ingredients:
300 g rice
400 ml water
3 cm galangal
2 pc bay leaf
1 stalk lemongrass
2 pc pandan leaf
8 pc red Thai chili
8 pc green Thai chili
1 tbsp margarine
1 tsp salt
1 tsp chicken powder

Chicken ingredients:
250 g chicken thigh fillet
½ pc lime
2 tsp cornstarch
2 tbsp coconut milk
1/2 tsp salt
1/2 tsp chicken powder
1/8 tsp pepper
1 tsp sugar

Sambal ingredients:
3 tbsp oil
12 pc red curly chili
2 pc red Thai chili (optional)
3 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
5 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 g roasted shrimp paste

Other ingredients:
Banana leaf
Lemon basil

Steps:
1. Heat oil. Add garlic, shallot, red Thai chili, red curly chili, kaffir lime leaf, and shrimp paste. Cook until slightly brown. Let cool for a moment, then put in a chopper and blend until smooth.
2. Slice chicken thigh fillet lengthwise, then marinate with salt, chicken powder, pepper, sugar, lime juice, cornstarch, coconut milk, and Sambal. Mix well.
3. In a rice cooker, add rice, water, salt, and chicken powder. Mix well, then add galangal and lemongrass (pounded), bay leaf, pandan leaf, red Thai chili, green Thai chili, marinated chicken, and margarine. Cook until done.
4. For Grilled Rice, prepare banana leaf. Place the lemon basil, rice, and chicken. Wrap and secure with a toothpick. Grill until browned.
5. Spicy Savory Chicken Rice is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: 100% Empuk & Bumbu Meresap! Resep SEMUR DAGING SAPI PANGGANG [Tips Simpan Frozen]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JkjEOQCdWe0

Grilled Braised Beef Recipe (yield 10-12 servings)

Ingredients:
2 kg beef brisket
700 ml water
1/2 tbsp salt
2 tsp mushroom bouillon
2 tbsp oyster sauce
3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp coconut sugar
2 pc bay leaf
4 pc clove

Spices:
3 pc red tomato
8 pc shallot
7 clove garlic
1 pc nutmeg
3 cm ginger
3 pc candlenut
1/2 tsp white peppercorn
30 ml oil

Grilled Braised Beef:
1 pc onion
1 tbsp unsalted butter
1 tbsp honey
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce

Sides:
White rice
Fried shallot

Steps:
1. Boil water then cook the beef for 15 minutes.
2. Pound the nutmeg and candlenuts. Slice the ginger. In a blender, add halved red tomato, nutmeg, ginger, candlenut, shallot, garlic, white peppercorn, and oil. Blend until smooth.
3. Set the beef aside and slice against the grain.
4. Sauté the blended spice until fragrant, then add bay leaf and clove. Sauté until oily.
5. Add the beef, water, oyster sauce, sweet soy sauce, mushroom bouillon, and salt. Pressure cook for 20 minutes.
6. Add coconut sugar. Cook until slightly reduced.
7. Slice the onion. Heat the pan. Add butter, onion, beef, and a bit of broth. Cook until reduced, then add honey and sweet soy sauce. Cook briefly.
8. Grilled Braised Beef is ready to serve.

Title: Gurih Pedas Manis! Resep AYAM SAUS SINGAPORE [Dijamin Nambah Nasi!]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=T9PAEp9oPHk

Singapore Chili Chicken Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
350 g chicken thigh fillet
½ pc lime
1 tbsp instant marinade
2 tbsp tapioca flour

Spices:
4 cm ginger
4 cm galangal
3 pc large red chili
3 pc red Thai chili
5 clove garlic
7 pc shallot
1 tbsp soybean paste / 1 tsp shrimp paste
80 ml water

Other ingredients:
100 ml oil
½ pc onion
1 pc green onion
500 ml water
1 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp ketchup
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp chicken powder
2 tsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper
1 tbsp tapioca flour + 2 tbsp water
1 pc egg

Sides:
White rice
Mantou

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken, then marinate with lime juice, instant marinade, and tapioca flour. Mix well.
2. Slice the ginger, galangal, and large red chili. In a blender, add ginger, galangal, large red chili, red Thai chili, shallot, garlic, soybean paste, and water. Blend until smooth.
3. Heat oil and fry the chicken until browned. Drain.
4. Set aside some oil to sauté the blended spice until fragrant.
5. Slice the onion and green onions, then add into the pan. Stir briefly.
6. Add chicken, water, chili sauce, ketchup, oyster sauce, chicken powder, pepper, and sugar. Cook on low heat until absorbed.
7. Heat oil and fry the mantou until golden brown. Set aside.
8. Mix tapioca flour with a little water, then add into the pan.
9. Beat the egg and add it into the pan. Cook briefly.
10. Singapore Chili Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Gurih Wangi! Resep NASI GORENG KORNET [Praktis 6 Menit]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2asj6C1ATFA

Corned Beef Fried Rice Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
400 g rice
100 g corned beef
5 pc shallot
3 clove garlic
4 pc red Thai chili
3 pc red curly chili
1 stalk green onion
1 tbsp margarine
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1-2 tbsp oil
2 pc egg
½ tbsp sugar
½ tsp MSG

Sides:
Cucumber
Tomato
Cracker
Dried shallot

Steps:
1. Mince the garlic. Slice the shallot, red curly chili, red Thai chili, and green onions.
2. Heat a bit of oil. Add the garlic and sauté briefly until fragrant. Then, add the corned beef and margarine. Cook until the corned beef is slightly crisp.
3. Add the shallots, red Thai chili, red curly chili, and the white part of the green onions. Cook until crisp, then move to the side of the pan.
4. Add the eggs. Stir, then add the rice, oyster sauce, soy sauce, sugar, MSG, and the remaining green onions. Cook briefly over high heat.
5. Corned Beef Fried Rice is ready to serve.

Title: Manis, Gurih & Ekonomis! Resep EMPAL / GEPUK AYAM [Lengkap Dengan Sambal Terasi]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j3wamDRV-_g

Empal Ayam Recipe (yield 10 servings)

Ingredients:
1 kg chicken breast fillet
1 tsp tamarind
65 ml coconut milk
4 tbsp palm sugar
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tbsp oil
700 ml water
2 tsp salt
2 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp MSG
1 tbsp sugar
1/4 tsp pepper

Aromatic ingredients:
12 pc shallot
2 pc bay leaf
3 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 stalk lemongrass

Spices:
8-10 clove garlic
5 pc candlenut
3 cm ginger
8 cm galangal
1 tbsp coriander
50 ml water
50 ml oil

Sambal ingredients:
45 g green Thai chili
5 pc red Thai chili
8 pc shallot
1 pc red tomato
4 g shrimp paste, roasted
1-2 pc lime
1/2 tsp salt
1/3 tsp MSG
2 tsp sugar

To serve:
White rice
Cucumber
Lemon basil

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken breast fillet, then skewer with small skewers.
2. Pound the candlenut. Halve the garlic. Slice the galangal and ginger, then put them into a blender with coriander, oil, and water. Blend until smooth.
3. Slice the shallots and pound the lemongrass.
4. Heat a little oil. Fry the shallots until crisp, then add kaffir lime leaf, lemongrass, and bay leaf. Stir-fry until fragrant.
5. Add the blended spices. Sauté until fragrant and oily, then add water, coconut milk, palm sugar, sweet soy sauce, tamarind, salt, pepper, chicken powder, MSG, and sugar. Stir well.
6. Add the chicken. Cook for 15 minutes. Set aside, then lightly pound chicken with a pestle. Cook again on medium-low heat until reduced. Set aside.
7. Heat oil. Fry the chicken until browned and set aside.
8. Strain a little leftover frying oil, then add shallot, halved red Thai chili, green Thai chili, and shrimp paste. Cook briefly.
9. Slice the tomato and add to the pan. Cook until wilted and browned. Transfer to a mortar, then add salt, MSG, and sugar. Grind until smooth, then add lime juice and mix well.
10. For shredded Empal, shred the chicken and cook on low heat until browned.
11. Empal Ayam is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Renyah Gurih! Resep KEMBANG KOL KRISPI PEDAS MANIS
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SzRp15hR--w

Sweet & Spicy Crispy Cauliflower Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g cauliflower
700 ml water
1 tbsp salt

Batter ingredients:
80 g seasoned flour
1/2 tsp paprika powder (optional)
1/2 tsp dried oregano (optional)
1 pc egg
50 ml water

Sauce ingredients:
3 tbsp unsalted butter/margarine
3 tbsp chili sauce
3 tbsp Bangkok sambal
2 clove garlic
1-2 tsp lemon juice
1 tsp sugar

Dip ingredients:
3 tbsp plain yogurt
50 g mayonnaise
1-2 tsp lemon juice (optional)
1/4 tsp dried parsley
1 tbsp chopped onion
1/4 tsp salt
1/2 tsp sugar
1 tbsp water

Coating:
White breadcrumb

Steps:
1. Slice the cauliflower and soak in salted water for 10-15 minutes. Drain.
2. In a bowl, combine egg, water, seasoned flour, dried oregano, and paprika powder. Mix well, then add cauliflower and mix evenly.
3. Coat the cauliflower in breadcrumbs, then arrange some of them in the air fryer and brush with oil. Bake at 180°C for 15-18 minutes.
4. Heat oil and fry the remaining cauliflower until golden, then drain.
5. In a bowl, mix mayonnaise, plain yogurt, salt, sugar, chopped onion, dried parsley, and lemon juice. Stir well, then add water and mix evenly.
6. Heat a pan. Add margarine and chopped garlic. Sauté until fragrant, then add chili sauce, Bangkok sambal, lemon juice, and sugar. Cook briefly.
7. Add cauliflower to the pan and cook until evenly coated.
8. Sweet & Spicy Crispy Cauliflower is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Tanpa Oven & Anti Gagal! Resep BOLU KUKUS KETAN COKELAT KEJU LUMER [Gluten Free]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UqmN24qojH4

Molten Choco-Cheese Sticky Rice Cake Recipe (yield 8 servings)

19 cm pan diameter

Ingredients:
3 pc egg
120 g sugar
80 g palm sugar (optional, can be replaced with white sugar)
½ tsp SP
1 tsp vanilla extract
1/3 tsp salt
170 g milk
120 g melted butter
15 ml coffee (optional)
½ tsp baking powder (optional)
50 g cocoa powder
185 g BOLA Deli Glutinous Rice Flour

Filling:
160 g cheese spread
3 tbsp condensed milk
1-2 tsp lime juice

Steps:
1. In a bowl, add egg, sugar, palm sugar, SP, vanilla extract, and salt. Mix with a mixer until pale and fluffy for 5 minutes.
2. Sift BOLA Deli Glutinous Rice Flour, cocoa powder, and baking powder into the mixture. Mix at low speed while adding milk, melted butter, and coffee. Mix briefly until combined.
3. Grease a pan with oil and heat for 2 minutes. Pour the batter into the pan until ¾ full. Steam over medium-high heat for 15-20 minutes.
4. In a bowl, mix cheese spread, lime juice, and condensed milk until smooth. Transfer into a piping bag.
5. Make a circular hole in the center of the cake, pipe the filling in, and pour the remaining batter. Steam over medium-high heat for 15-20 minutes.
6. Molten Choco-Cheese Sticky Rice Cake is ready to serve.

Title: Resep KROKET KENTANG KARI: Renyah di Luar, Lumer Keju di Dalam!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vEr0CYN8wXI

Potato Curry Croquette Recipe (yield 6 pcs)

Ingredients:
400 g peeled potato
1 block curry roux (35 g)
70 g sausage
1 tsp sugar

Coating:
2 pc egg
1/8 tsp salt
1/8 tsp pepper
All-purpose flour
White breadcrumb

Filling:
160 g cheese spread

Add-on:
mustard

Steps:
1. Slice the potato lengthwise, then boil with a pinch of salt for 13-15 minutes. Drain until the steam disappears.
2. Slice the sausage and curry roux into small pieces.
3. In a bowl, combine the still-warm potato and curry roux. Mash the potato and mix until even.
4. Add sausage and sugar. Mix well, then divide into 6 portions.
5. Coat the cheese spread in all-purpose flour, then slice into 6 portions.
6. Flatten and fill the croquette mixture with cheese, then shape into a long oval.
7. Whisk the eggs with salt and pepper and mix well.
8. Coat the croquette in flour, egg, and breadcrumbs, then fry until golden brown. Drain.
9. Potato Curry Croquette is ready to serve.

Egg and Green Bean Stir-Fry Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
65 g green bean
5 clove garlic
8 pc shallot
7 pc red Thai chili
4 g shrimp paste, roasted
2 pc egg
2 tbsp oil
1 tsp stock powder
1 tsp oyster sauce
½ tsp sugar

To Serve:
Rice
Crackers

Steps:
1. Slice the garlic, shallots, red Thai chili, and green bean into large pieces.
2. Heat a little oil. Add shallots and garlic. Stir-fry briefly until fragrant.
3. Add shrimp paste, red Thai chili, and green beans. Mash the shrimp paste and stir-fry briefly, then add stock powder. Mix well.
4. Add the eggs. Let them cook briefly, then stir, then add oyster sauce and sugar. Cook briefly.
5. Egg and Green Bean Stir-Fry is ready to serve.

Title: Praktis Untuk Bekal! Resep CREAMY GARLIC CHICKEN [Gurihnya Meresap]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Wbvtco_lV14

Creamy Garlic Chicken Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
300 g chicken thigh fillet
1 tsp worcestershire sauce
½ tsp dried oregano
¼ tsp salt
1 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp sugar
1½ tbsp cornstarch

Other ingredients:
6 clove garlic
25 g horenso
200 ml milk
50 ml cream
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp unsalted butter

Side:
White rice

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with salt, sugar, chicken powder, worcestershire sauce, dried oregano, and cornstarch. Mix well.
2. Heat a little oil. Sear the chicken over high heat until both sides are browned. Set aside.
3. In the same pan, add finely chopped garlic (or use a garlic press to mince) and unsalted butter. Stir-fry until fragrant.
4. Add milk and cream, then lower the heat. Cut chicken into pieces and add into the pan.
5. Add horenso, pepper, and salt. Cook for a while until the sauce is absorbed.
6. Creamy Garlic Chicken is ready to serve.

Tomato Stir-Fried Shrimp Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Shrimp Marinade ingredients:
275 g peeled frozen shrimp
3 tbsp cornstarch
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp stock powder

Other ingredients:
¾ pc onion
3 clove garlic
1 cm ginger
1 tbsp oyster sauce
3 tbsp ketchup
1 tbsp chili sauce (optional)
75 ml water
1 tsp sugar

To serve:
White rice
Iceberg lettuce, sliced

Steps:
1. Marinate shrimp with cornstarch, pepper, and stock powder. Mix well and let sit for a while.
2. Dice the onion. Chop the garlic and ginger.
3. Heat a little oil. Fry the shrimp on high heat for a few moments, then drain.
4. Keep some of the oil. Stir-fry the onion, garlic, and ginger until fragrant. Add oyster sauce, ketchup, chili sauce, sugar, and water. Cook briefly.
5. Add the fried shrimp and cook until flavors are absorbed.
6. Tomato Stir-Fried Shrimp is ready to serve.

Char Kway Teow Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:

2 pc duck egg
6 clove garlic

1 tbsp shrimp paste sambal / chili sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp Maggi sauce

30 g chive

MSG (optional)

Add-ons:
Cucumber

Steps:

3. Add shrimp, green onions, chicken lap cheong, and duck eggs. Cook briefly over high heat.

Title: Sambal Serbaguna & Nikmat! Resep PECEL LELE KHAS LAMONGAN [Anti Gagal]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PrXm-wFmPoc

Lamongan Pecel Lele Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
1 kg catfish
5 clove garlic
4 cm turmeric
4 cm ginger
½ tbsp white peppercorn
1 tbsp coriander
150 ml water
1 tbsp salt
½ tbsp MSG

Lamongan Sambal ingredients:
2 clove garlic
12 pc shallot
2 pc candlenut
13 pc red Thai chili
12 g shrimp paste, roasted
2½ pc red tomato
2-3 tbsp oil
1 tsp salt
¾ tsp MSG
1 tbsp sugar

To serve:
Tempeh
Tofu
White rice
Cucumber
Lemon basil
Kaffir lime

Steps:
1. Slice the ginger and garlic. In a blender, add ginger, garlic, turmeric, white peppercorn, coriander, MSG, salt, and water. Blend until smooth.
2. Slice the tempeh and score the catfish, then marinate them with the blended spice. Mix well and marinate for 10 minutes.
3. Heat oil. Fry the catfish until crispy. Set aside, then fry the tempeh and tofu until cooked. Set aside.
4. Heat a little oil. Fry the shallots briefly, then add candlenuts, garlic, and Thai chili. Fry until browned, then transfer to mortar.
5. Cut the tomatoes and fry until browned.
6. In the mortar, add salt, MSG, sugar, and shrimp paste. Grind until smooth, then add the tomatoes and a little hot oil. Grind until smooth.
7. Lamongan Pecel Lele is ready to serve.

Title: Istimewa Bikin Nagih! Resep IKAN ARSIK KHAS BATAK [Lengkap & Anti Gagal]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yQ62qbSEMEQ

Ikan Arsik Recipe (yield 10 servings)

Ingredients:
2 kg tilapia
150 gr chive
250 gr yardlong bean
3 pc asam gelugur
14 pc kaffir lime leaf
6 stalk lemongrass
6 pc torch ginger fruit
1 pc torch ginger flower
700 ml water
2 tbsp salt
1 tbsp mushroom bouillon

Spices:
10 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
4 pc candlenut
2-3 tbsp andaliman
3 cm ginger
4 cm galangal
10 cm turmeric
20 g green Thai chili
15 pc red curly chili
300 ml water

Andaliman Sambal ingredients:
4 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
5 pc red Thai chili
40 g green Thai chili
1 tbsp andaliman
3 pc candlenut
1 pc green tomato
1 pc kaffir lime
½ tbsp salt
½ tsp mushroom bouillon

To serve:
Rice

Steps:
1. In a blender, add sliced garlic, shallot, candlenut, turmeric, galangal, ginger, curly red chili, green Thai chili, andaliman, and water. Blend until smooth.
2. Halve the torch ginger fruit. Slice the flower and yardlong bean. Pound the lemongrass.
3. In a pan, layer the lemongrass, some yardlong bean, some chives, tilapia, torch ginger flower, torch ginger fruit, asam gelugur, kaffir lime leaf, more yardlong bean, chives, tilapia, yardlong bean, chives, torch ginger flower, kaffir lime leaf, salt, mushroom bouillon, the blended spices, and water. Cook over low heat for 1 hour or until reduced.
4. Heat a little oil. Fry the andaliman and candlenut until browned. Transfer to a mortar.
5. Fry garlic, shallot, green Thai chili, red Thai chili, and chopped green tomato until lightly browned.
6. Add salt and mushroom bouillon to the mortar and grind until smooth. Then, add the fried sambal ingredients and grind again until smooth.
7. Add squeezed kaffir lime juice and mix well.
8. Heat oil and fry the fish, chives, and yardlong bean until golden and crisp. Drain.
9. Ikan Arsik is ready to serve.

2 thumb ginger

Nasi Tutug Tempeh Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Ingredients:
200 g tempeh
6 pc shallot
4 clove garlic
6 cm aromatic ginger
6 pc red Thai chili
3 pc curly red chili
15 g lemon basil
2-3 tbsp oil
1 tsp salt
½ tbsp sugar
¾ tsp MSG

To serve:
White rice
Fried chicken
Fried tofu
Fried vegetable
Cucumber
Sambal

Steps:
1. Slice the tempeh, then grill in a pan until browned. Set aside.

Title: Praktis Jadi Bekal! Resep KEBAB AYAM FROZEN [Favorit Keluarga]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Yvegkmn2DJM

Frozen Chicken Kebab Recipe (yield 10-12 pcs)

Chicken Marinade ingredients:
500 g chicken thigh fillet
1 tsp lime juice
2 tbsp plain yogurt
2 tsp curry powder
1 tsp dried oregano
¼ tsp nutmeg powder (optional)
1 tsp paprika powder (optional)
3 clove garlic
½ tbsp ginger
2 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp salt
1 tsp sugar

Other ingredients:
1 tbsp butter
1 tbsp oil
1-2 pc onion
1/8 tsp salt
1/8 tsp pepper

Add-ons:
Mayonnaise
Chili sauce (optional)
Ketchup
Mozzarella cheese, grated
Kebab wrap
Iceberg lettuce
Cherry tomato

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with grated garlic, grated ginger, lime juice, yogurt, dried oregano, curry powder, paprika powder, nutmeg powder, chicken powder, salt, and sugar. Mix well and let sit for 10–15 minutes.
2. Slice the onion into thick strips. Heat a little oil and butter. Add the onion, salt, and pepper. Stir-fry until fragrant and browned, then set aside.
3. Cook the chicken until done, then cut into pieces and return to the pan.
4. Add the sautéed onion. Cook over high heat, then torch. Set aside and let cool.
5. Prepare the kebab wrap. Add stir-fried chicken, grated mozzarella cheese, mayonnaise, chili sauce, and ketchup, then roll.
6. Store the kebab in a sealed container and freeze.
7. Heat margarine and grill the kebab over low heat until cooked and golden brown.
8. Chicken Kebab is ready to serve.

Title: Pedas Gurih! Resep CABE GENDOT SAMBAL REBON
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Mk6mwEVtZFM

Fiery Dried Shrimp Sambal Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Chopped ingredients:
8 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
4 cm aromatic ginger
4 pc red Thai chili
4 pc red curly chili

Other ingredients:
12 pc habanero
5 pc kaffir lime leaf
4 tbsp dried baby shrimp (rebon)
1 tsp turmeric powder (optional)
½ tbsp sweet soy sauce
4 g pc shrimp paste
1 tsp salt
½ tbsp mushroom bouillon
1 tbsp sugar
150 ml water
3 tbsp oil

To serve:
White rice
Fried purple eggplant
Fried tofu

Steps:
1. Boil dried shrimp for 1-2 minutes then drain.
2. In a food chopper, add garlic, shallot, aromatic ginger, red Thai chili, and red curly chili. Chop, then halve the habanero.
3. Heat oil. Stir-fry the chopped ingredients, dried shrimp, kaffir lime leaf, and turmeric powder until fragrant, then add shrimp paste. Mash the paste in and stir evenly.
4. Add the habanero. Stir-fry briefly then add water, sweet soy sauce, salt, sugar, and mushroom bouillon. Cook on medium-low heat until reduced.
5. Fiery Dried Shrimp Sambal is ready to serve.

Title: Praktis & Minim Minyak! Resep MARTABAK TELUR AYAM KECAP
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=T_1tol_ZnZg

Sweet Soy Chicken & Egg Martabak Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Sweet Soy Chicken Martabak

Sweet Soy Chicken ingredients:
80 g boneless chicken thigh
½ pc onion
1 clove garlic
1 tsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oil

Other ingredients:
1 stalk green onion
2 pc egg
2 pc spring roll wrapper
½ tsp stock powder

To serve:
Green Thai chili

Instructions:
1. Dice the onion, mince the garlic, and chop the chicken.
2. Heat a little oil. Sauté the onion and garlic until fragrant, then add chicken and cook until done.
3. Add oyster sauce and sweet soy sauce. Cook briefly, then set aside.
4. Slice the green onion. In a bowl, mix green onion, sweet soy chicken, egg, and stock powder. Stir lightly.
5. Heat a little oil. Place the spring roll wrapper in the pan. Pour in the egg mixture, fold, and cook over low heat until crisp and cooked through.
6. Sweet Soy Chicken & Egg Martabak is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Renyah & Praktis: Resep QUICK PUFF PASTRY PORTUGUESE EGG TART | Devina Hermawan’s Baking Class
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UznY35PoV58

Portuguese Egg Tart Recipe (yield 12-14 pcs)

Crust ingredients:
250 g all-purpose wheat flour
60 g Filma® Prestige (Butter Blend Margarine)
125 ml water
¼ tsp baking powder

To laminate:
150 g Filma® Prestige (Butter Blend Margarine)

Filling ingredients:
30 g egg white
80 g egg yolk
65 g sugar
125 g milk
250 g whipping cream
1 g vanilla extract (optional)
¼ tsp salt (optional)

Steps:
1. Prepare a plastic sheet. Place Filma® Prestige (Butter Blend Margarine) on it, then flatten and spread it evenly.
2. Cut into cubes with a knife, then place it in the freezer until frozen.
3. In a mixer, combine flour, baking powder, Filma® Prestige (Butter Blend Margarine), and water slowly while mixing on low speed until well combined.
4. Break the frozen Filma® Prestige (Butter Blend Margarine) into pieces. Add to the mixer and mix briefly on low speed.
5. Prepare a plastic sheet. Place the dough and shape it into a square. Freeze for 15-20 minutes.
6. Dust both sides of the dough with flour. Roll with a rolling pin, then fold and roll again. Repeat until the butter blend is thin, then freeze again for 15-20 minutes.
7. Flatten the dough to 0.5 cm thickness, then freeze and let rest overnight.
8. For the filling, in a bowl, add egg yolk, egg white, sugar, salt, and vanilla extract. Mix well, then add milk and whipping cream. Mix well and strain.
9. Cut the dough into circles using a 8-cm ring cutter or about 25 g.
10. Prepare the baking cups. Press the dough until it’s higher than the cup, then pour the filling until ¾ full.
11. Bake at 165°C for 30 minutes. After 20 minutes, rotate the tray. Raise the temperature to 190°C for the last 5 minutes.
12. Portuguese Egg Tart is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Juicy & Wangi! Resep CHICKEN TSUKUNE / BOLA AYAM JEPANG [Favorit Anak]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Bp_ZFHW2aOk

Chicken Tsukune Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
300 g ground chicken thigh
1 cm ginger
1 clove garlic
½ pc egg, beaten
50 g carrot
¼ pc onion
2 tbsp white breadcrumb
½ tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
½ tbsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper
Teriyaki sauce

Sides:
White rice
Toasted sesame seed

Steps:
1. Dice the onion.
2. In a bowl, add ground chicken thigh, grated garlic, grated ginger, grated carrot, onion, egg, breadcrumbs, salt, mushroom bouillon, sugar, and pepper. Mix well.
3. Heat a little oil. Scoop the meat mixture with an ice cream scoop into the pan, then flatten slightly. Cook until browned.
4. Add Teriyaki sauce and a little water. Cover and cook until absorbed.
5. Chicken Tsukune is ready to serve.

Title: 100% Lembut! Resep SUP DAGING KACANG MERAH / SUP BRENEBON SAPI
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3_7l9ccKeFU

Beef & Red Bean Soup (yield 6 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g beef shank
350 g red bean
7 pc shallot
2-3 tbsp oil
5 stalk celery
2 stalk green onion
1.5 liter water
1 tsp salt
1.5 tbsp stock powder

Spices:
5 clove garlic
1 tsp white peppercorn
¾ pc nutmeg
3 pc clove
1 tbsp oil
1 tbsp water

Sweet Soy Sambal ingredients:
½ pc red tomato
½ pc green tomato
8 pc red Thai chili
20 pc green Thai chili
2 clove garlic
1 pc lime
3-4 tbsp sweet soy sauce

Side:
White rice

Steps:
1. Slice the shallot. Add garlic, white peppercorn, nutmeg, clove, oil, and water in the blender. Blend until smooth.
2. Slice the beef. Heat oil and fry the shallots until slightly browned.
3. Add the blended spices to the pan. Sauté until fragrant, then add the beef. Stir-fry briefly.
4. Add some water, red bean, salt, stock powder, and some celery. Pressure cook for 20 minutes, then turn off heat and let sit for 30 minutes.
5. Remove the celery, then add the remaining water. Slice green onion and celery, then add to the saucepan. Cook briefly.
6. In a chopper, add green tomato, red tomato, green Thai chili, and red Thai chili. Blend coarsely, then transfer to a bowl.
7. Add smashed garlic, lime juice, and sweet soy sauce. Mix well.
8. Beef & Red Bean Soup is ready to serve.

Title: Lembut & Bumbu Meresap! Resep PEPES DADA AYAM [Tips Stok Frozen]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CeanyWSVZlQ

Chicken Breast Pepes Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g chicken breast fillet
1 tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tbsp sugar
1/4 tsp pepper
1 pc egg white
3 tbsp coconut milk
1 tbsp cornstarch

Spices:
5 pc shallot
4 clove garlic
3 cm turmeric
3 pc candlenut
3 cm galangal
5 pc curly red chili
80 ml water

Other ingredients:
1 pc red tomato
5 pc red Thai chili
5 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 stalk green onion
15 g lemon basil
1-2 tbsp oil
Bay leaf
Lemongrass
Banana leaf

To serve:
White rice

Steps:
1. Slice the garlic, shallot, and galangal. Crush the candlenuts.
2. Heat oil. Add garlic, shallot, candlenut, galangal, turmeric, and curly red chili. Sauté until fragrant and browned.
3. Blend the sautéed spices with water until smooth.
4. Slice the tomato, green onion, kaffir lime leaf, and red Thai chili.
5. Slice the chicken breast thinly, then mix with salt, mushroom bouillon, sugar, pepper, blended spices, coconut milk, and egg white.
6. Add cornstarch and mix well, then add red Thai chili, kaffir lime leaf, red tomato, green onion, and lemon basil. Mix again.
7. Prepare the banana leaf. Place sliced lemongrass, bay leaf, and chicken. Wrap and secure with a toothpick.
8. Steam chicken for 30 minutes. For freezing, let the Pepes cool completely, then wrap each one in cling film.
9. Chicken Breast Pepes is ready to serve.

Title: Tanpa Tepung Tetap Lembut & Kenyal! Resep SATE LILIT AYAM MANIS [Favorit Anak]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Nh2NLMfL1SE

Sweet Chicken Sate Lilit Recipe (yield 15 pcs)

Ingredients:
350 g ground chicken thigh
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1/2 tsp turmeric powder
1 pc egg white
1.5 tbsp coconut sugar
1/2 tsp salt
1/2 tsp chicken powder
1/8 tsp pepper

Spices:
3 clove garlic
4 pc shallot
2 cm ginger
3 cm galangal
1 tsp coriander
2 pc candlenut
3 pc kaffir lime leaf
1-2 tbsp oil
30 ml water
1 tbsp coconut milk

To serve:
White rice
Sliced Thai chili sambal
Lime

Steps:
1. Slice the garlic, shallot, ginger and galangal. Crush the candlenut.
2. Heat oil. Add garlic, shallot, candlenut, ginger, galangal, coriander, and kaffir lime leaf. Sauté until fragrant and slightly browned.
3. Blend the sautéed spices with water and coconut milk until smooth.
4. In a bowl, mix chicken, salt, pepper, chicken powder, coconut sugar, turmeric powder, egg white, sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, and blended spices until well combined.
5. Shape into balls using an ice cream scoop, then chill until firm.
6. Prepare sate lilit skewers. Place the dough on and press downward to shape into long ovals. Grill with a bit of oil until cooked and golden brown.
7. Sweet Chicken Sate Lilit is ready to serve.

Title: 100% Juicy! Resep GYOZA AYAM [Praktis Untuk Stok]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7s1YBKxw9mI

Chicken Gyoza Recipe (yield 30-35 pcs)

Gyoza Skin ingredients:
200 g all-purpose flour
1 tsp salt
100 ml boiling water

Filling ingredients:
120 g cabbage
50 g chive
200 g ground chicken thigh
1 clove garlic
1 cm ginger
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
1/2 tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper
2 tbsp water
1 tbsp oil

Dipping Sauce ingredients:
1 tbsp black vinegar
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp sugar
1 tsp toasted sesame seeds
1/2 tbsp sesame oil
2 tsp chili powder
1/2 tbsp oil

Steps:
1. In a bowl, mix flour, salt, and boiling water. Stir with chopstick, then knead until combined. Let rest for at least 2 hours.
2. Flatten the dough, then cut into circles with 8 cm diameter.
3. Slice the chives. Boil the cabbage for 2–3 minutes, then drain and chop.
4. In a bowl, add ground chicken, grated garlic, grated ginger, salt, sugar, pepper, soy sauce, oyster sauce, sesame oil, cabbage, and chives. Mix well, then add water and oil, mix again.
5. Prepare the gyoza skin. Fill with about 12–15 g filling. Wet the edges with water, then fold into 5–6 pleats.
6. Coat the bottom of gyoza with cornstarch before freezing.
7. Heat oil. Arrange the gyoza and add water. Cover the pan and cook on low heat until cooked and golden brown.
8. Heat oil and sesame oil, then pour over the chili powder.
9. In a bowl, mix soy sauce, black vinegar, and sugar. Stir until sugar dissolves, then add toasted sesame seeds and mix well.
10. Gyoza is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Kenyal & Gurih! Resep CREAMY GARLIC MAC AND CHEESE
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AOiTbEd0JSc

Creamy Garlic Mac & Cheese Recipe

Ingredients:
200 g macaroni
1 tsp salt

Sauce ingredients:
1 tbsp unsalted butter
10 clove garlic
1 tbsp all-purpose flour
¼ tsp turmeric powder
½ tsp paprika powder / gochugaru
550 ml milk
170 g quick melt cheese
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp sugar
Mozzarella, grated
Parmesan cheese powder (optional)

Dry Chili Sambal ingredients:
15-20 pc red Thai chili
4 clove garlic
3 tbsp oil
½ tsp mushroom bouillon
¼ tsp salt

Steps:
1. Boil macaroni with salt for 8 minutes. Drain.
2. Heat butter. Add garlic and cook over low heat until fragrant and golden. Turn off heat, then grate the quick melt cheese.
3. Add flour, turmeric powder, and paprika powder. Stir well and mash the garlic roughly. Sauté until fragrant.
4. Slowly add milk while stirring, then add quick melt cheese, salt, pepper, and sugar. Mix well.
5. Add macaroni. Cook briefly until thickened, then pour half into a heatproof dish.
6. Add grated mozzarella, the remaining macaroni, more mozzarella, and parmesan cheese powder on top. Bake at 185°C for 15 minutes.
7. In a food chopper, add red Thai chili and garlic. Coarsely chop.
8. Heat oil. Add the chili mixture. Cook briefly then add salt and mushroom bouillon. Cook on low heat. Set aside.
9. Creamy Garlic Mac & Cheese is ready to serve.

Title: Lembut & Praktis! Resep SHABU-SHABU DADA AYAM [Cocok Untuk Diet]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pcPEJAKFdAM

Chicken Shabu-Shabu Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Chicken Marinade ingredients:
500 g chicken breast fillet (half frozen)
1 tsp chicken powder
¼ tsp pepper
2 tbsp cornstarch
3 tbsp egg white

Other ingredients:
3 clove garlic
1 stalk green onion
1.2 liter water
2 tbsp creamer
1 tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp sugar (optional)
1 tsp chicken powder
Napa cabbage
Enoki mushroom
Horenso
Firm white tofu, sliced

Sides:
Toasted sesame sauce
Cilantro
Red Thai chili
Fried garlic

Steps:
1. Thinly slice the chicken breast, then marinate with chicken powder, pepper, cornstarch, and egg white. Mix well.
2.Slice the Napa cabbage and green onion.
3. Heat pan. Add whole garlic and green onion. Cook until browned, then add water and cabbage stem. Boil for 5-8 minutes.
4. Add chicken powder, salt, sugar, pepper, and creamer. Bring to a boil.
5. Add tofu, enoki, horenso, Napa cabbage, and marinated chicken. Cook the chicken briefly, then remove and set aside.
6. Slice cilantro and red Thai chili. In a bowl, mix toasted sesame sauce, cilantro, chili, and fried garlic.
7. Chicken Shabu-Shabu is ready to serve.

Title: Rendah Kalori & Serbaguna! Resep SAUS WIJEN SANGRAI / ROASTED SESAME DRESSING
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7oWFn3hQT1g

Toasted Sesame Sauce Recipe (784 calories for 10 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pc boiled egg
3 clove garlic
1 tbsp oil
1 tbsp soy sauce
30 g white sesame
2½ tbsp sugar
½ tsp salt
½ tsp MSG
½ tsp dashi powder / chicken powder
4 tbsp water
1-2 tbsp lime juice
1 tbsp sesame oil

Serve with:
Chicken shabu-shabu
Vegetable salad

Steps:
1. Toast sesame seeds over low heat until browned. Set aside.
2. Slice 2 clove garlic and fry with a bit of oil until browned.
3. In a blender, add boiled egg, fried garlic and oil, remaining raw garlic, toasted sesame, salt, MSG, sugar, dashi powder, soy sauce, lime juice, sesame oil, and water. Blend until smooth.
4. Add the remaining toasted sesame. Blend briefly.
5. Toasted Sesame Sauce is ready to use.

Chicken & Egg Rice Recipe (yield 1-2 servings)

Chicken Marinade:
