1 tsp chicken powder
1/8 tsp pepper
1 slice lime

Other ingredients:
2 clove garlic
1/4 pc onion
2 pc egg
3 pc red Thai chili
2 tsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
150 ml water
1 tbsp oil
1 stalk green onion

To serve:
White rice
Fried shallots

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken, then marinate with chicken powder, pepper, and lime juice.
2. Slice the garlic. Cut the onion into large pieces. Chop the chili and whisk the egg.
3. Heat a bit of oil. Sauté the garlic until fragrant, then add the chicken and cook briefly over high heat.

Title: Tips Menghilangkan Bau Prengus! Resep KAMBING BAKAR KECAP [Menu Idul Adha]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W0_K8Ib2ljw

Soy-Glazed Goat Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Ingredients:
1 kg goat thigh meat, sliced
1 pc lime
Ginger

Spices:
5 pc shallot
3 clove garlic
3 pc candlenut
1 tsp whole pepper (black and white)
3 cm turmeric
3 cm ginger
3 cm galangal
1/3 pc nutmeg
1 tsp cumin
1 tsp coriander
50 ml oil
25 ml water

Other ingredients:
2 pc bay leaf
6 pc kaffir lime leaf
½ tbsp tamarind
700 ml water
2 tsp sugar
½ tbsp salt
2½ tsp stock powder

Soy Glaze ingredients (for 1/3 of the meat):
7 pc shallot
5 pc red Thai chili
1 pc red tomato
1-2 tbsp margarine
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce

Add-ons:
Pickle
Emping
Fried shallot
White rice
Thai chili sambal

Steps:
1. Marinate the goat with lime juice. Mix well, then boil the goat meat with ginger for 5-10 minutes. Rinse clean.
2. In a blender, add all the spices. Blend, then sauté until fragrant and oily.
3. Add kaffir lime leaves and bay leaf. Sauté briefly, then add goat meat. Stir-fry briefly.
4. Add water, tamarind, salt, sugar, and stock powder. Cook for 30-45 minutes.
5. Slice the tomato, shallots, and red Thai chili.
6. Heat the margarine, then stir-fry the shallots and red Thai chili until fragrant.
7. Add meat and a bit of the broth. Cook briefly, then add sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, tomato, and a bit more broth. Cook briefly.
8. Soy-Glazed Goat is ready to serve.

Fried Fish & Eggplant Pecak Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Fish marinade ingredients:
175 g dory fillet
1 tsp instant marinade powder
2 tbsp cornstarch

Pecak Sambal ingredients:
6 pc shallot
6 clove garlic
10 pc red Thai chili
10 pc green Thai chili
1 tsp shrimp paste, roasted
3 pc candlenut
2 tbsp coconut milk
4 g aromatic ginger
6 tbsp hot water
1 tsp salt
1 tsp MSG
2 tsp sugar

Add-ons:
1 pc eggplant
1 pc kaffir lime
Lemon basil
White rice

Steps:
1. Slice the fish. Marinate with instant marinade powder. Mix well, then add cornstarch and mix evenly.
2. Heat a bit of oil. Fry the fish and sliced eggplant until cooked, then set aside.
3. Set aside some of the oil, then cook the crushed candlenut, red Thai chili, green Thai chili, garlic, shallots, and shrimp paste briefly. Transfer to a mortar.
4. Add aromatic ginger, salt, MSG, and sugar. Grind, then add coconut milk and hot water. Mix well.
5. Add eggplant and fish, then mash together.
6. Fried Fish & Eggplant Pecak is ready to serve.

Mini Tofu Cireng (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:

Sweet Soy Sambal ingredients:

Coating:
Tapioca

Sides:
Green Thai chili

Title: Spesial! Resep CREAMY BEEF MUSHROOM [Tips Daging Empuk & Lembut]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ze5RbX3kO6Y

Creamy Mushroom Beef Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Beef Marinade ingredients:
300 g sliced beef
2 tbsp all-purpose flour
1 tbsp tapioca
1 tbsp soy sauce
4 tbsp water
¼ tsp pepper

Other ingredients:
90 g Champignon mushroom
½ pc onion
2 clove garlic
1 stalk celery
½ tsp dried oregano
1 tbsp unsalted butter
1.5 tbsp ketchup
400 ml water
300 ml milk
2 tbsp gravy powder / demi glace powder + 2 tbsp water
2 tbsp oil
½ tsp salt
½ tsp sugar
1 ½ tsp chicken powder
¼ tsp pepper

Coleslaw ingredients:
40 g cabbage
40 g carrot
¼ tsp salt
½ pc lime
½ tbsp condensed milk
2 tbsp mayonnaise

Sides:
White rice

Steps:
1. Slice the cabbage and coarsely grate the carrot, then transfer to a bowl.
2. Add salt, lime juice, mayonnaise, and condensed milk. Mix well.
3. In a bowl, combine flour, tapioca, soy sauce, water, and pepper. Mix well, then add sliced beef. Mix until absorbed.
4. Slice the mushroom. Chop the onion and garlic, then dissolve gravy powder with a little water.
5. Heat a little oil. Sauté garlic and onion until fragrant, then add mushroom. Cook until browned.
6. Push mushroom to the side of the pan, then add beef and cook on high heat until done.
7. Add celery, oregano, unsalted butter, and ketchup. Mix well, then add water, salt, chicken powder, pepper, sugar, milk, and gravy slurry. Cook until thickened.
8. Creamy Mushroom Beef is ready to serve.

Spicy Glass Noodles Egg Soup Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Title: Spesial & Gurih! Resep UDANG KEJU ALA GACOAN [Tips Stok Frozen]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gy-i-QXJsVs

Cheesy Shrimp Recipe (yield 20 pcs)

Ingredients:
300 g chicken thigh fillet
150 g shrimp
2 clove garlic
15 g white breadcrumbs
1 tsp baking powder
1 tbsp fried shallots
1 tbsp cornstarch
30 ml water
1 pc egg
1 tsp sesame oil
2 tbsp oil
2 tsp oyster sauce
1.5 tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
1.5 tsp chicken powder
¼ tsp pepper

Filling:
Cheese spread

Batter ingredients:
6 tbsp all-purpose flour
60 ml water
1 pc egg
¼ tsp salt
1/8 tsp pepper

Dry Coating ingredients:
White breadcrumbs
Cornstarch

Steps:
1. In a food chopper, add garlic. Chop, then add chicken thigh fillet, salt, sugar, chicken powder, oyster sauce, and pepper. Blend until sticky.
2. Add shrimp, white breadcrumbs, cornstarch, baking powder, fried shallots, water, egg, sesame oil, and oil. Blend. Let it sit in the fridge.
3. Coat the cheese with cornstarch, then slice and coat it again with cornstarch while shaping.
4. Scoop the dough with an ice cream scoop and coat them in cornstarch. Fill with cheese, then shape into an elongated ball.
5. For frozen food, steam the Cheesy Shrimp for 10 minutes over low heat with the lid slightly open.
6. In a bowl, mix all-purpose flour, salt, pepper, water, and egg, stir well.
7. Coat the Cheesy Shrimp in the batter, then coat in breadcrumbs. Smooth it out.
8. Heat oil. Fry the Cheesy Shrimp over medium heat until slightly golden. Drain.
9. Cheesy Shrimp is ready to serve.

No-Fry Ayam Geprek Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Marinade ingredients:

To serve:

Head of lettuce

Title: Cocok Buat Diet! Resep DIMSUM DADA AYAM (Rendah Kalori)
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uPFoB-LCC2g

Chicken Breast Dim Sum Recipe (yield 20 pcs)

Dim Sum ingredients:
300 g ground chicken breast
150 g white button mushroom
50 g carrot (optional)
1 stalk green onion
2 clove garlic
2 pc egg white
1 tbsp water
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
½ tbsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tsp MSG (optional)
1 tsp baking powder
3 tbsp tapioca flour

Other ingredients:
Napa cabbage
Shumai/wonton wrapper
Grated carrot

Dipping:
Chili oil
Soy sauce

Steps:
1. Dice the white button mushrooms into large cubes and sauté with a little oil until wilted.
2. In a bowl, mix ground chicken breast, salt, sugar, mushroom bouillon, MSG, and pepper until sticky.
3. Add grated garlic, carrot, chopped green onions, egg white, water, oyster sauce, sesame oil, and sautéed mushrooms, then mix well.
4. Add tapioca flour and baking powder. Mix well and place in the fridge.
5. Steam the napa cabbage for 3 minutes, then remove the white stems and cut in half.
6. Place the filling on the napa cabbage and roll it into a Shumai shape, then top each with grated carrot. Steam for 8 minutes.
7. Chicken Breast Dim Sum is ready to serve.

Title: Anti Gagal & Praktis! Resep SUP AYAM KRIM / CREAMY CHICKEN SOUP
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WH33vKaQJug

Creamy Chicken Soup Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Chicken Marinade ingredients:
200 g chicken thigh fillet
¾ tsp salt
1/8 tsp pepper

Other ingredients:
2 clove garlic
½ pc onion
1 tbsp celery (optional)
1 pc carrot
50 g corn kernel
2 tbsp unsalted butter
3 tbsp all-purpose flour
350 ml water
350 ml milk
1 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp sugar
½ tsp dried parsley

Sesame Stick ingredients:
1 sheet Danish pastry
¼ tsp salt
1/8 tsp pepper
Beaten egg
White sesame seeds
Black sesame seeds

Steps:
1. Brush the Danish pastry with egg, then sprinkle with salt, pepper, white sesame seeds, and black sesame seeds.
2. Cut Danish pastry into pieces, then stretch and place on a baking tray lined with baking paper.
3. Make slits in the center of each Danish pastry with the back of a knife. Proof for 1 hour, then bake for 7 minutes at 190°C.
4. Marinate the chicken with salt and pepper. Mix well, then dice the onion into cubes, mince the garlic, slice the celery, and dice the carrot.
5. Heat a little oil. Fry the chicken until browned, drain, and cut into pieces.
6. In the same pan, add butter, onion, and garlic. Sauté until fragrant, then add flour. Sauté again until fragrant and lightly browned.
7. Slowly add water while stirring, then add celery, carrot, corn kernels, chicken, milk, chicken powder, dried parsley, and sugar. Bring to a boil.
8. Creamy Chicken Soup is ready to serve.

Title: Lembut Gurih! Resep AYAM CINCANG KUKUS [Bisa Untuk MPASI]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DbnBzEjj1R4

Steamed Minced Chicken Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g minced chicken thigh
1 pc egg
2 tsp tapioca flour
2 tsp fish sauce
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp fried shallots
½ tsp ginger (optional)
1 tbsp garlic oil
80 ml water
1 tsp chicken powder
¼ tsp pepper

Sides:
Soy sauce + sliced red Thai chili
Rice
Sliced green onion

Steps:
1. In a heatproof bowl, add minced chicken thigh, chicken powder, pepper, fish sauce, oyster sauce, sweet soy sauce, egg, fried shallots, garlic oil, grated ginger, tapioca, and water. Mix well.
2. Steam for 20-30 minutes or until cooked.
3. Steamed Minced Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Praktis, Bikin Nambah Nasi! Resep AYAM OSENG BUMBU PEPES: Gurih Lembut & Wangi
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xt0TvdETQbw

Chicken Pepes Stir-Fry Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
350 g chicken thigh fillet
1 tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
1 wedge lime
1 tbsp coconut milk

Spices:
4 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
3 pc candlenut
5 cm turmeric
5 pc curly red chili
2 tbsp oil
2 tbsp water

Other ingredients:
1 stalk green onion
1 pc red tomato
2 pc bay leaf
2 stalk lemongrass
10 pc Thai chili
150 ml water
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
2 tsp sugar
Lemon basil

Sides:
Rice

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken into pieces, then marinate with salt, pepper, lime juice, and coconut milk. Mix well.
2. Pound the candlenut. Slice the garlic and shallot.
3. In a blender, add candlenut, garlic, shallot, curly red chili, turmeric, oil, and water. Blend until smooth.
4. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant and oily, then add bay leaf and lemongrass. Sauté again until fragrant.
5. Add chicken and sauté until cooked, then slice green onion and red tomato.
6. Add water, red tomato, green onion, whole Thai chili, sugar, and mushroom bouillon. Cook until absorbed, then add lemon basil and cook briefly.
7. Chicken Pepes Stir-Fry is ready to serve.

Title: 3 Bahan, 10 Menit Jadi! Resep TIM TELUR LEMBUT
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=u7BJLNj4q3M

Steamed Egg Recipe (yield 1-2 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pc chicken egg
200 ml hot water
1 tsp chicken powder

Other ingredients:
1 tbsp soy sauce
2 tsp simple syrup
1 tbsp garlic oil
Sliced green onions (optional)

Steps:
1. Prepare a heatproof bowl. Whisk the eggs and chicken powder together.
2. Gradually pour the hot water in while whisking, then steam the eggs for 8-10 minutes. Steam with the lid slightly ajar.
3. Add soy sauce, simple sugar, and garlic oil.
4. Steamed Egg is ready to serve.

Title: Chili Oil Serbaguna! Resep PANGSIT / WONTON CHILI OIL [Awet Tahan Lama]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y2WYZXkQTfQ

Chili Oil Wontons Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Chili Oil ingredients:
15 pc red curly chili
8 pc red Thai chili
5 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
3 pc lime leaf (optional)
100 ml oil
1/2 tbsp mushroom bouillon
2 tsp sugar
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp sesame oil

Other ingredients:
15 pc chicken wonton
Fried garlic
White sesame seeds
Sliced scallion

Serving:
3 tbsp chili oil
1/2 tbsp chili sauce (optional)
1-2 tbsp black vinegar (optional)

Steps:
1. Into a chopper, add garlic, shallot, red Thai chili, red curly chili, and lime leaf. Chop.
2. Heat oil. Add the chopped ingredients, then sauté on low heat until slightly crisp.
3. Add soy sauce, mushroom bouillon, sugar, and sesame oil. Stir briefly and set aside.
4. Boil the chicken wontons for 4-5 minutes.
5. In a bowl, mix chili oil, chili sauce, and black vinegar. Stir well, then add the cooked wontons and mix evenly.
6. Chili Oil Wontons are ready to serve.

Title: Gurih Istimewa! Resep GULAI NANGKA TAHU [Cocok Untuk Ketupat Lebaran]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EQ029QVZcj0

Gulai Nangka Tahu Recipe (yield 7 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g unripe jackfruit
8 pc yellow tofu, fried
4 pc boiled egg
10 pc curly green chili

Spices:
5 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
3 pc candlenut
1 tsp whole white pepper
1.5 tsp coriander
6 cm turmeric
10 pc curly red chili
50 ml oil
2 tbsp water

Other ingredients:
5 pc shallot
1 stalk lemongrass
2 pc bay leaf
4 cm galangal
1 liter water
100 ml coconut milk
1 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp MSG
2 tsp salt
2 tbsp sugar

Add-ons:
Ketupat
Rendang
Fried shallot

Steps:
1. In a blender, add shallot, garlic, candlenut, white pepper, coriander, turmeric, red chili, oil, and water. Blend until smooth.
2. Slice the shallots. Pound the galangal and lemongrass. Slice the green chili and jackfruit, then wash the jackfruit.
3. Heat a little oil. Sauté shallots, lemongrass, and galangal until fragrant, then add the spice paste and bay leaves. Sauté until fragrant and oily.
4. Add water, jackfruit, fried tofu, egg, green chili, salt, sugar, chicken powder, and MSG. Cook for 10 minutes.
5. Add coconut milk. Cook for another 5 minutes.
6. Gulai Nangka Tahu is ready to serve.

Title: Gurih Pedas Manis! Resep OSENG CUMI PETE
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nMgTI2VRkTI

Squid Stir-Fry with Petai Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Ingredients:
300 g salted baby squid
50 g red Thai chili
90 g curly red chili
8 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
5 pc kaffir lime leaf
80 g peeled petai, halved
1 stalk lemongrass
1 tsp salt
1 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp MSG
2 tbsp sugar
75 ml water

Sides:
White rice
Crackers

Steps:
1. Soak the salted squid in hot water for 10–30 minutes, then rinse and dry.
2. In a food chopper, add garlic, shallot, red Thai chili, and curly red chili. Blend until smooth.
3. Heat oil. Sauté salted squid until fragrant. Add the chopped spices, kaffir lime leaf, and pounded lemongrass. Stir-fry over medium-high heat until cooked.
4. Add water, salt, chicken powder, sugar, MSG, and petai. Cook briefly.
5. Squid Stir-Fry with Petai is ready to serve.

Title: Cocok Untuk Stok! Resep SAMBAL BAWANG & TAHU TELUR CEPLOK
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TrPcTUX6-MA

Sambal Bawang Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
100 g shallot
150 g red Thai chili
200 ml oil
3 pc kaffir lime leaf
50 ml water
1/2 tsp MSG
1 tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tsp sugar

Fried Tofu & Egg:
1 pc egg
1 pc tofu
1/8 tsp salt
1/8 tsp stock powder

Steps:
1. In a food chopper, add red Thai chili. Chop briefly and set aside. Then, add shallots into the chopper and chop until smooth.
2. Heat oil. Add shallots, chili, and kaffir lime leaf. Sauté over medium-high heat until fragrant, then add salt, mushroom bouillon, MSG, sugar, and water. Lower the heat and cook until slightly reduced.
3. Heat a little oil. Fry the tofu until slightly crisp, then split and add egg, salt, and stock powder. Cook until done.
4. Sambal Bawang is ready to serve.

Title: Sarapan Praktis! Resep AYAM CINCANG KEMANGI [Gurih Manis]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2GcN_tnA0Lo

Lemon Basil Chicken Stir-Fry Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
350 g ground chicken thigh
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1.5 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp Maggi sauce / fish sauce

Other ingredients:
4 clove garlic
4 pc shallot
5 pc red curly chili
8 pc green Thai chili
1 stalk lemongrass (white part)
4 g shrimp paste, roasted
2 tbsp oil
2 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
½ tsp stock powder
½ tbsp oyster sauce
25 g lemon basil
10 pc small shallot

To serve:
White rice
Sunny-side up egg
Kaffir lime

Steps:
1. In a bowl, mix ground chicken thigh, sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, and Maggi sauce. Stir well.
2. Finely chop garlic, shallot, and lemongrass. Slice red curly chili and green Thai chili.
3. Heat a little oil. Sauté garlic and shallot until fragrant. Add shrimp paste, lemongrass, red curly chili, and green Thai chili. Sauté until fragrant.
4. Add marinated chicken and cook until done. Add whole small shallots, sugar, pepper, stock powder, and oyster sauce. Cook briefly.
5. Add lemon basil and cook briefly.
6. Lemon Basil Chicken Stir-Fry is ready to serve.

Title: Dijamin Nambah Nasi! Resep TONGSENG AYAM [Gurih Manis]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q2TJT42GWTk

Chicken Tongseng Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
500 g Olagud boneless chicken thigh
1 wedge lime
3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tsp soy sauce
1 tsp chicken powder
½ tsp pepper

Spices:
5 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
8 pc curly red chili
2 pc candlenut
2 cm ginger
2 cm turmeric
3 cm galangal
1.5 tsp coriander, toasted
1 tsp cumin, toasted
4 tbsp oil
2 tbsp water

Sliced ingredients:
5 pc shallot
1 pc red tomato
6 pc cabbage leaf
1 stalk green onion

Other ingredients:
1 stalk lemongrass
3 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 pc bay leaf
15 pc red Thai chili
500 ml water
3 tbsp coconut milk
1 tsp chicken powder
2 tsp salt
1 tsp MSG
1 tbsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper

Add-ons:
White rice
Pickles
Emping/melinjo crackers
Fried shallots

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken, then marinate with sweet soy sauce, soy sauce, chicken powder, pepper, and lime juice. Mix well and let sit for a while.
2. Slice the garlic and shallot. Pound the candlenut, and slice the ginger, galangal, and curly red chili.
3. In a blender, add garlic, shallot, candlenut, ginger, galangal, turmeric, curly red chili, coriander, cumin, oil, and water. Blend until smooth.
4. Slice the shallot and pound the lemongrass.
5. Heat oil. Sauté the shallot, lemongrass, kaffir lime leaf, and bay leaf until fragrant, then add the blended spices. Sauté until oily.
6. Add chicken and stir-fry until cooked, then slice the tomato, cabbage, and green onion.
7. Add Thai chili, green onion, cabbage, salt, chicken powder, MSG, sugar, and pepper. Stir-fry briefly over high heat.
8. Pour in water and coconut milk. Stir well, then add tomato. Cook briefly.
9. Chicken Tongseng is ready to serve.

Title: Renyah Tahan Lama! Resep REMPEYEK KACANG TERI [100% Sukses]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q0RWTfbGHYI

Rempeyek Recipe (yield 12 servings)

Ingredients:
275 g rice flour
80 g tapioca flour
2 pc egg
50 ml coconut milk
20 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 tbsp salt
2 tsp mushroom bouillon
½ tsp pepper
1 tbsp sugar
400 ml water
200 g peanut
60 g anchovy, small

Spices:
6 clove garlic
10 g aromatic ginger
1.5 tbsp coriander, toasted
3 pc candlenut, toasted

Steps:
1. Remove the lime leaf stems and slice. Roughly chop the peanut and crush the candlenut.
2. In a blender, add candlenut, garlic, aromatic ginger, coriander, and a little water from the recipe measurement. Blend until smooth.
3. In a bowl, mix rice flour, tapioca flour, blended spices, eggs, coconut milk, salt, mushroom bouillon, pepper, and sugar. Add water gradually. Stir well.
4. Add peanut, anchovy, and lime leaves, then mix well.
5. Heat oil. Pour a small amount of batter, then fry Rempeyek over medium-high heat until golden brown and crispy. Drain.
6. Rempeyek is ready to serve.

Title: Resep GULAI CINCANG KHAS PADANG: Empuk & Berempah! [Menu Lebaran]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GbU22ORra5Y

Padang Beef Gulai Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Ingredients:
1 kg boneless beef ribs

Blended Spices:
6 clove garlic
10 pc shallot
5 pc candlenut
4 cm galangal
4 cm ginger
6 cm turmeric
125 g boiled red chili
12 pc green Thai chili
130 ml oil
150 ml water

Kelapa Gongseng:
250 g grated coconut

Dry Spices:
½ pc nutmeg
2 tsp coriander
2 tsp cumin
2 tsp white pepper
3 pc clove
6 pc cardamom
2 pc star anise

Other ingredients:
2 tbsp kelapa gongseng
100 ml coconut milk
2 stalk lemongrass, pounded
5 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 pc turmeric leaf
2 pc asam kandis
1 tbsp beef powder
1 tsp MSG
2 tsp salt
1 liter water

Add-ons:
White rice
Sambal Ijo
Cassava leaves

Steps:
1. Heat a pan, add grated coconut. Toast until dry and browned, then blend until fine.
2. In the same pan, add nutmeg, coriander, cumin, white peppercorn, clove, star anise, and cardamom. Toast until fragrant, then grind.
3. Slice ginger and galangal.
4. In a blender, combine garlic, shallots, candlenuts, galangal, ginger, turmeric, green Thai chili, boiled red chili, oil, and water. Blend until smooth.
5. Slice the beef into pieces.
6. Sauté the blended spices until the oil separates, then add ground spices, lemongrass, turmeric leaf, and kaffir lime leaves. Sauté until fragrant.
7. Add beef, salt, beef powder, MSG, and kelapa gongseng. Stir-fry briefly.
8. Add 800 ml water and asam kandis. Pressure cook for 15-20 minutes.
9. Add the remaining water and coconut milk. Cook briefly.
10. Padang Beef Gulai is ready to serve.

Title: Anti Gagal! Resep TEMPE MENDOAN BASAH [Lengkap Dengan Sambal Kecap]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=faLhrTgIECY

Tempe Mendoan Recipe (untuk 18-20 pcs)

Ingredients:
350 g tempeh
2-3 stalk green onion

Batter ingredients:
220 g all-purpose flour
60 g rice flour
¼ tsp turmeric powder
1 pc egg
1 tsp baking powder
400 ml water
2 tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
2 tsp salt

Spices:
4 clove garlic
½ tbsp coriander, toasted

Sweet Soy Sambal ingredients:
1 clove garlic
6 pc red Thai chili
10 pc green Thai chili
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp MSG
6 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp fried shallot
1 pc kaffir lime

Add-ons:
Green Thai chili

Instructions:
1. Thinly slice the tempeh.
2. In a mortar and pestle, add garlic, coriander, and salt. Mash until smooth.
3. In a bowl, mix flour, rice flour, mashed spices, turmeric powder, mushroom bouillon, sugar, pepper, baking powder, egg, and water. Stir well.
4. Slice green onions and add to the batter. Stir well.
5. Dip tempeh into the batter, then fry over high heat for a few moments. Drain.
6. In a mortar and pestle, add garlic, green Thai chili, red Thai chili, salt, and MSG. Mash coarsely, then transfer to a bowl.
7. Add sweet soy sauce, kaffir lime juice, and fried shallots. Stir well.
8. Mendoan is ready to serve.

Title: Spesial Lebaran! Resep OPOR AYAM PUTIH [Favorit Keluarga]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-rkMW2dLCsU

White Opor Ayam Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Ingredients:
800 g free-range chicken, cut into 8 pieces
5 pc shallot
1 stalk lemongrass
2 pc bay leaf
5 cm galangal
2 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 tbsp oil

Spices:
6 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
3 pc candlenut
¾ tsp cumin, toasted (optional)
¼ pc nutmeg
1 tsp coriander, toasted
45 ml oil
2 tbsp water

Other ingredients:
150 ml coconut milk
1 liter water
1 tbsp salt
1 tbsp chicken powder
1 tsp MSG
2 tbsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper

Additional ingredients:
250ml water
50ml coconut milk

Sides:
White rice
Fried shallots
Melinjo crackers
Green Thai chili (optional)

Instructions:
1. In a blender, add garlic, shallots, candlenuts, nutmeg, coriander, cumin, and oil, then blend until smooth.
2. Slice the shallots. Pound the galangal and lemongrass.
3. Heat a little oil. Sauté the shallots, galangal, lemongrass, kaffir lime leaf, and bay leaf until browned. Then, add the blended spices and sauté until oily.
4. Add chicken. Cook briefly, then add water, coconut milk, salt, chicken powder, MSG, sugar, and pepper. Cook for 35-40 minutes over medium-low heat.
5. Add water and coconut milk, cook briefly.
6. White Opor Ayam is ready to serve.

Title: Bikin Nagih! Resep NASI GILA MENTENG (Stok Sahur Praktis)
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=G6bfRiMhIE8

Nasi Gila Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Spices:
5 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
2 pc candlenut
4 g toasted shrimp paste (optional)
1 tsp whole white pepper
80 ml oil
Other ingredients:
6 pc egg
200 g sausage
200 g beef meatballs
2-3 tbsp chili garlic sauce
2.5 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1.5 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tsp fish sauce
2-3 tbsp water
¼ tsp chicken powder
2 tsp sugar
1 tbsp margarine
Sides:
Cucumber
Sambal
Steamed rice
Crackers
Steps:
1. Thinly slice the sausage and meatballs, then slice shallots and garlic, and crush the candlenuts.
2. In a blender, add garlic, shallots, candlenuts, white pepper, shrimp paste, and oil. Blend until smooth.
3. Heat a pan and sauté the spice mix until fragrant. Add sausage, meatballs, and fish sauce, then stir-fry until aromatic.
4. Add eggs and scramble, then add chili sauce, oyster sauce, and sweet soy sauce. Stir briefly.
5. Pour in water, chicken powder, and sugar. Mix well, then add margarine and stir-fry for a while.
6. Nasi Gila is ready to serve.

Title: Anti Melempem, Garing Tahan Lama! Resep KENTANG MUSTOFA [100% Sukses]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ju87LjlwB_E

Kentang Mustofa Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Ingredients:
1 kg peeled potato
3 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
12 pc boiled curly red chili
75 ml oil
2 pc bay leaf
3 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 tbsp tamarind juice
5 tbsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
½ tbsp salt
1 tsp MSG

Instructions:
1. Slice the potatoes thinly or use a grater, then soak in water for 30 minutes. Rinse several times until clean and dry.
2. Heat oil. Fry the potato until dry and slightly brown, then drain.
3. Slice the garlic, shallot, and boiled curly red chili.
4. In a blender, add garlic, shallot, boiled curly red chili, and oil. Blend until smooth.
5. Sauté the spices, bay leaf, kaffir lime leaf, and pepper. Sauté until fragrant and oil separates.
6. Add sugar, salt, MSG, and tamarind juice. Cook briefly until sugar dissolves.
Add potato, lower the heat, and mix well.
7. Kentang Mustofa is ready to serve.

Nugget Mixed Platter Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Pilaf Rice ingredients:
375 g rice
500 ml water
2 tsp curry powder
1 tsp dried oregano
2 pc bay leaf
1 tbsp chicken powder
½ pc onion, chopped
3 clove garlic, chopped
3 tbsp oil
1 tbsp unsalted butter

Garlic Sauce ingredients:
100 g mayonnaise
100 g sour cream
2 clove garlic
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
2-3 tbsp water
1 pc lime

Toppings:
Cayenne pepper
Tortilla, grilled and sliced
Chicken nugget
Beef tomato
Lettuce head
Hot sauce/tabasco (optional)

Steps:
1. Heat oil. Sauté garlic and onion until fragrant.
2. In a rice cooker, add rice, water, chicken powder, curry powder, dried oregano, sautéed garlic and onion, and bay leaf. Stir well and cook through.
3. In a bowl, combine mayonnaise, sour cream, grated garlic, salt, pepper, lime juice, and water. Mix well.
4. Fry the chicken nuggets. Set aside, then cut the tomatoes and lettuce.
5. Add butter to the cooked rice and mix well.
6. On a serving plate, arrange the rice and other toppings.
7. Nugget Mixed Platter is ready to serve.

Spicy Salt & Pepper Nuggets Recipe (yield 3 servings)

2 stalk green onion

1 tsp sugar  
1/8 tsp pepper

Side dish:
White rice  

Instructions:
1. Cut the chicken nuggets into pieces, then fry until cooked. Set aside.

Title: Gurih Pedas Praktis! Resep TEMPE CHILI PADI
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M_fjbbgU_VQ

Chili Tempeh Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Marinated Tempeh ingredients:
330 g tempeh
1 tbsp instant tempeh spice mix
4 tbsp cornstarch
3 tbsp water

Other ingredients:
5 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
50 g red Thai chili
50 g green Thai chili
4 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 tsp mushroom bouillon
2 tsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper
100 ml water
1 tbsp tamarind juice

Add-on:
white rice

Steps:
1. Slice the tempeh lengthwise, then diagonally.
2. In a bowl, mix the instant tempeh spice mix, cornstarch, and water until well combined, then add the tempeh and coat evenly.
3. Heat oil. Fry the tempeh until golden brown, then drain.
4. In a chopper, chop the garlic, shallots, red and green Thai chilis, and kaffir lime leaves until smooth.
5. Sauté the blended spices over medium heat until fragrant. Then, add water, mushroom bouillon, sugar, pepper, tamarind juice, and tempeh. Stir-fry briefly.
6. Chili Tempeh is ready to serve.

Title: Segar Praktis Sehat! Resep ES JELI HIJAU BAYAM [Favorit Anak]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UzCjONXS4OE

Green Spinach Jelly Drink Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Jelly ingredients:
15 g plain jelly powder
5-7 g plain agar powder
4 pc pandan leaf
2 liter water
80 g sugar
50 g horenso (Japanese spinach)

Other ingredients:
Milk
Pandan sugar syrup/Stevia
Ice cubes

Steps:
1. Boil the horenso briefly, then rinse and squeeze out excess water. Blend with a little water until smooth.
2. In a saucepan, add plain jelly powder, plain agar powder, sugar, pandan leaves, and water. Bring to a boil.
3. Add the spinach juice. Stir well and cook briefly. Pour into a mold and let it cool until set.
4. In a glass, add ice cubes, jelly, pandan sugar, and milk.
5. Green Spinach Jelly Drink is ready to serve.

Salted Squid Sambal Recipe (yield 1 jar / 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
150 g salted squid
8 clove garlic
15 pc shallot
100 g curly red chili
60 g red Thai chili
5 pc kaffir lime leaf
200-250 ml oil
1 tsp salt
1 tsp MSG
1 tbsp sugar

Sides:
Steamed rice
Crackers

Steps:
1. Rinse the salted squid with hot water. Clean thoroughly, dry, and slice into pieces.
2. Heat oil. Fry the squid until slightly crispy, then drain.
3. Heat oil. Add garlic, shallots, curly red chili, Thai chili, and kaffir lime leaves. Cook briefly, then blend until smooth.
4. Sauté the sambal again, then add oil, salt, MSG, and sugar. Cook until the oil separates.
5. Add the fried squid and cook briefly.

Title: Gurih Renyah! Resep GEHU PEDAS JELETOT [Cocok Untuk Takjil]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4iQuWhfuozg

Spicy Gehu Recipe (yield 13 pcs)

Ingredients:
13 pc tahu pong

Spices:
6 clove garlic
6 pc shallots
4 pc boiled curly red chili
60 ml oil

Other ingredients:
225 g cabbage
70 g carrot
100 g bean sprouts
50 g red Thai chilies
½ tbsp chicken powder
1.5 tbsp sugar
½ tbsp salt
2 tbsp water
MSG (optional)

Batter ingredients:
75 g all-purpose flour
25 g rice flour
25 g cornstarch
½ tsp salt
½ tsp chicken powder
1/8 tsp pepper
¼ tsp baking powder
175 ml water

Steps:
1. Slice cabbage, carrot, shallots, and garlic.
2. In a blender, add shallots, garlic, boiled curly red chilies, and oil. Blend until smooth.
3. Sauté the spice paste until fragrant, then roughly chop the red Thai chili using a blender.
4. Add chopped Thai chili. Sauté briefly, then add cabbage and carrot. Stir well.
5. Add chicken powder, salt, sugar, and water. Cook briefly, then add bean sprouts. Cook briefly.
6. In a bowl, add flour, rice flour, cornstarch, baking powder, salt, chicken powder, and pepper. Mix well, then gradually add water, stirring until smooth.
7. Transfer the filling to a piping bag, then stuff the tofu with the filling and dip into the batter.
8. Heat oil. Fry the tofu over medium-high heat until golden brown. Remove.
9. Spicy Gehu is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Krispi Nagih! Resep TELUR BARENDO Khas Padang
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=128w4AQ1Lb0

Telur Barendo Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Ingredients:
3 pc chicken egg
3 pc shallot
¼ tsp chicken powder
3 tsp water
3 tsp cornstarch

Add-on:
White rice
Cucumber
Rendang spices (optional)

Steps:
1. Mix cornstarch and water. Stir well.
2. In a bowl, add eggs, chicken powder, and cornstarch slurry. Whisk lightly, then slice shallots and add them to the eggs. Whisk again.
3. Heat oil, slowly pour in the eggs while stirring. Fry until browned and crispy, then remove and set aside.
4. Place in an air fryer to reduce excess oil for 5 minutes at 180°C.
5. Telur Barendo is ready to serve.

Title: Praktis & Lembut! Resep TELUR SAUS TIRAM [Favorit Anak]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dvdkvMcgyT0

Eggs in Oyster Sauce Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Ingredients:
3 pc egg
1.5 tbsp all-purpose flour
½ tsp chicken powder
2 tbsp water

Other ingredients:
3 clove garlic
¼ pc onion
1 stalk green onion
2 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp mushroom bouillon
1.5 tbsp cornstarch
250 ml water

Add-on:
White rice

Steps:
1. In a bowl, mix flour with water. Stir well, then add eggs and chicken powder. Mix well.
2. Mince garlic. Slice onion and green onion.
3. Mix water, oyster sauce, soy sauce, sugar, and cornstarch. Stir well.
4. Heat oil. Fry eggs while stirring, then add garlic and onion. Cook until fragrant and slightly browned.
5. Pour in the sauce mixture. Bring to a boil, then add green onion, mushroom bouillon, and sesame oil. Cook briefly.
6. Eggs in Oyster Sauce are ready to serve.

Title: TANPA MIXER! CAKE KURMA DAN CREAMCHEESE FROSTING [Dates Carrot Cake]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NlHBt73GJMA

Date Cake with Cream Cheese Recipe (yield 8 servings)

For 20 cm pans

Date Paste ingredients:
150 g Tunisian dates
1 tsp baking soda
60 ml boiling water

Cake Batter ingredients:
3 pc egg
5-6 tbsp palm sugar (50-60 g)
130 ml oil
50 g unsalted butter, melted
1 tsp vanilla extract
175 g all-purpose flour
1.5 tsp baking powder
½ tsp ground cinnamon
¼ tsp ground nutmeg
¾ tsp salt

Mix-ins:
170 g carrot
60 g cashew
100 g Tunisian dates

Frosting ingredients:
150 g cream cheese (room temperature)
1.5 tbsp condensed milk
1/8 tsp salt
Cashew, roughly chopped
Tunisian dates, quartered

Instructions:
1. Remove the pits from the dates and cut them in half. Place them in a bowl, add baking soda and boiling water. Cover and let sit for 10 minutes.
2. Blend the soaked dates in a food chopper until smooth.
3. Grate the carrot, chop the dates, and chop the cashews.
4. In a bowl, whisk eggs and palm sugar with a balloon whisk, then add vanilla extract and mix until the sugar dissolves.
5. Add the blended date paste, melted butter, and oil. Mix well.
6. Sift in the flour, baking powder, ground cinnamon, ground nutmeg, and salt, then mix until combined.
7. Fold in the grated carrot, chopped dates, and cashews.
8. Line a baking pan with baking paper. Pour in the batter and bake at 160°C for 45 minutes.
9. In a bowl, whisk cream cheese until smooth, then add condensed milk and salt, mixing until combined.
10. Pipe or spread the cream cheese topping over the cooled cake, then sprinkle with chopped cashews and quartered dates.
11. Date Carrot Cake with Cream Cheese is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Tortilla Egg Sandwich Recipe (yield 1 servings)

Ingredients:

2 pc egg

1 pc cabbage leaf
1 stalk green onion
½ tsp chicken powder
¼ tsp salt
⅛ tsp pepper
Toppings:
1 tsp sugar
2 slice cheese (optional)
Ketchup
Mayonnaise (optional)
Butter
Instructions:
1. Slice the cabbage, green onion, and carrot, then place them in a bowl.
2. Add eggs, chicken powder, salt, and pepper, then mix well.
3. Heat a pan. Grease it with butter, and pour in the egg mixture. Spread it out, then place the tortilla on top while pressing gently.
4. Grease the tortilla with butter, then flip it over. Add sliced cheese, sugar, ketchup, and mayonnaise. Cook until the tortilla is fragrant and crispy.
5. The Tortilla Egg Sandwich is ready to serve.

Green Chili Fried Glass Noodles Recipe (yield 7-8 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g glass noodles
12 pc curly green chili
10 pc green Thai chili
3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
¼ tsp pepper
½ tbsp sugar
150 ml water

Blended Spices:
4 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
60 ml oil

Topping:
Fried shallots

Instructions:

4. Heat oil. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant, then add pepper and cook well.

Title: Mudah & Praktis! Resep TORI PAITAN RAMEN [Kaldu Untuk Stok]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4f9cV_aWq_Q

Tori Paitan Ramen Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Marinated Chicken ingredients:
500 g boneless chicken thigh
130 g teriyaki sauce

Ramen Broth ingredients:
1 kg chicken wings
4 cm ginger
4 clove garlic
2 liter water

Aromatic Oil ingredients:
7 pc shallot
4 clove garlic
100 ml oil

Other ingredients:
Ramen noodles
Boiled wood ear mushroom
Chopped green onion
Nori
Boiled egg

Serving:
300 ml ramen broth
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
½ tsp sugar
1/3 tsp rice vinegar (optional)
¼ tsp katsuobushi powder
1 tbsp aromatic oil

Instructions:
1. Marinate the chicken thighs with teriyaki sauce. Mix well and let sit for 2 hours or overnight in the fridge.
2. Chop the chicken wings and slice the ginger, then put them in a pressure cooker along with garlic and water. Cook for 60 minutes.
3. In a chopper, blend the shallots, garlic, and oil until smooth, then cook until golden brown. Set aside.
4. Blend the pressure-cooked chicken until smooth, then strain the broth. Let it sit in the fridge overnight.
5. Cook the Teriyaki Chicken in an air fryer at 180°C for 10-12 minutes.
6. Slice the Teriyaki Chicken, drizzle with aromatic oil, then torch it for extra flavor.
7. Heat the ramen broth. In a serving bowl, add soy sauce, katsuobushi powder, mushroom bouillon, sugar, rice vinegar, ramen broth, ramen noodles, and aromatic oil.
8. Top with Teriyaki Chicken, boiled egg, wood ear mushrooms, green onions, and nori.
9. Tori Paitan Ramen is ready to serve.

Title: Ekonomis Praktis! Resep KUE SEMPRIT [Kue Kering Lebaran]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sOD2vezqhgI

Kue Semprit Recipe (yield 70 pcs)

Ingredients:
120 g margarine (room temperature)
80 g unsalted butter (room temperature)
150 g icing sugar
2 pc egg yolk
½ tsp vanilla extract
¾ tsp salt
260 g cake flour
80 g cornstarch
30 g creamer / milk powder
½ tsp chocolate flavoring

Add-ons:
Choco chips

Steps:
1. In a bowl, add unsalted butter, margarine, and icing sugar. Mix for a moment.
2. Add yolks, salt, and vanilla extract while stirring. Then, sift in flour, cornstarch, and creamer. Mix well with a spatula.
3. Divide the dough into two. Add chocolate flavoring to one of them and mix well.
4. Pipe both the white and chocolate dough on a pan lined with baking paper.
5. Add choco chips, then bake at 130°C for 25-30 minutes.
6. Kue Semprit is ready to serve.

Title: Anti Bocor! Resep CUSTARD BUN: Roti Isi Vla Lembut & Wangi
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rniZuTtZSVQ

Custard Bun Recipe (yield 12 pcs)

Starter ingredients:
200 g bread flour
150 ml water
2 g yeast
60 g sugar

Dough ingredients:
135 g bread flour
20 g milk powder
3 g yeast
1 pc egg
40 ml milk
45 g unsalted butter
4 g salt

Vanilla Custard Filling ingredients:
2 sachets (120 g) instant vanilla custard
220 ml hot water

Chocolate Custard Filling ingredients:
2 sachets (126 g) instant chocolate custard
180 ml hot water

Topping ingredients:
1.5 all-purpose flour (for each filling)

Steps:
1. In a bowl, mix the flour, sugar, and yeast, then gradually add water. Mix well. Let it sit in the fridge for at least 4 hours or overnight.
2. Mix the instant custard with hot water and stir well. Let it chill in the fridge for 1-2 hours.
3. Weigh the filling into a bowl with cornstarch, about 30 grams each. Form into balls and refrigerate. You will have 12 fillings, 6 vanilla and 6 chocolate.
4. For the topping, add flour to the remaining filling and mix well. Place it into a piping bag and refrigerate.
5. In a mixer, combine the starter, flour, milk powder, yeast, egg, and milk. Mix for 6 minutes at medium-high speed.
6. Add butter and salt, then mix for 8-10 minutes at medium-high speed until smooth. Let the dough rest for 30 minutes.
7. Form dough balls of about 50-55 g, then fill with the custard filling. Seal them tightly.
8. Place them on a muffin tray lined with baking paper. Let them rest for 30-40 minutes.
9. Add the custard topping on top. Bake at 150°C for 15 minutes.
10. Let it cool slightly before serving. Custard Buns are ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Kenyal Gurih Lembut! Resep Ketan Ayam LO MAI GAI [Ala Resto Dimsum]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3SmsGDtQtFU

Lo Mai Gai Recipe (yield 10 servings)

Rice ingredients:
500 g white sticky rice, wash thoroughly
600 ml water
½ tbsp dried shrimp
4 pc dried shiitake mushroom
2 pc pandan leaf
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tsp sugar
3 tbsp soy sauce

Chicken Marinade ingredients:
300 g chicken thigh fillet
½ tsp grated ginger
½ tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp tapioca flour
1 tsp sesame oil
1 tsp sugar
½ tsp five-spice powder
1/8 tsp pepper
½ tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tsp dark soy sauce
40 ml oil
3 clove garlic
5 pc shallot

Others:
Chinese sausage (lap cheong)
Chili oil (optional)
Green Thai chili (optional)

Steps:
1. In a rice cooker, add sticky rice, water, dried shrimp, dried shiitake mushrooms, and pandan leaves. Cook until done.
2. Cut chicken into pieces and marinate with grated ginger, soy sauce, oyster sauce, tapioca flour, sesame oil, sugar, five-spice powder, pepper, and mushroom bouillon. Mix well.
3. Add dark soy sauce and mix well. Set aside mushrooms and pandan leaves from the rice, then chop the mushrooms.
4. Finely chop garlic and shallots, then sauté until fragrant.
5. Add chicken. Sauté briefly, then add mushrooms and cook for a few more minutes.
6. Add soy sauce, mushroom bouillon, and sugar to the rice. Mix well, then slice the Chinese sausage.
7. In aluminum cups, layer Chinese sausage, chicken stir-fry, and sticky rice. Cover with aluminum foil and steam for 15-20 minutes.
8. Prepare dried lotus leaves soaked in water, then cut into pieces.
9. Layer sticky rice, chicken topping, Chinese sausage, green Thai chili, and sticky rice. Wrap and tie with a string. Steam for 15-20 minutes.
10. Lo Mai Gai is ready to serve.

Title: Tanpa Oven & Susu! CARAMEL PUDDING [Anti Gagal]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AWkfW_FUlqg

Caramel Pudding Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Caramel ingredients:
60 g sugar
2 tbsp water

Pudding ingredients:
2 pc egg yolk
2 pc whole egg
30 g sugar
¼ tsp salt
1 tsp vanilla extract
50 g creamer powder
300 ml water
10 g cornstarch

Steps:
1. In a saucepan, heat sugar and water. Cook until golden brown, then pour into heat-proof bowls or aluminum cups.
2. In a bowl, whisk together whole eggs, egg yolks, sugar, salt, and vanilla extract until well combined.
3. In a saucepan, combine creamer powder, water, and cornstarch. Mix well and bring to a simmer.
4. Gradually pour the creamer mixture into the egg mixture while stirring, then strain and pour into the heat-proof bowls.
5. Cover with aluminum foil and steam for 30-35 minutes.
6. Caramel Pudding is ready to serve.

Title: Spesial! Resep SUKIYAKI Ala Resto Jepang [Bahan Lokal Ekonomis]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zSU8buzB5Og

Sukiyaki Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Sukiyaki Sauce ingredients:
200 ml soy sauce
150 ml sake/50 ml apple juice
5 g katsuobushi
5-6 tbsp sugar
1 tsp rice vinegar
150 ml water

Beef Marinade ingredients:
250 g sliced beef
1 tbsp cornstarch
50 ml water
80 ml sukiyaki sauce

Other ingredients:
250 ml water
250 ml sukiyaki sauce
Firm silken tofu
Onion
Shiitake mushroom
Brown shimeji mushroom
Napa cabbage
Bok choy
Shirataki noodles

Serving:
White rice
Onsen egg (optional)

Steps:
1. Heat a pot. Add sake and bring to a boil. Then, add soy sauce, sugar, water, and rice vinegar.
2. Grind katsuobushi and add it to the pot. Bring to a boil.
3. Marinate beef with sukiyaki sauce, water, and cornstarch. Mix well.
4. Prepare tofu by torching it, then slicing it into pieces.
5. Slice the onion, green onion, and napa cabbage. Score the shiitake mushrooms to form a star shape.
6. Heat a pan, then add beef fat. Cook briefly, then add onion and white part of green onion. Cook until browned.
7. Add sukiyaki sauce and water, then arrange napa cabbage, bok choy, shimeji mushrooms, shirataki, beef, tofu, and shiitake. Cook until done.
8. Sukiyaki is ready to serve.

Title: Praktis Gurih Sehat! Resep SUP BAKSO LOHUA AYAM / BAKSO RAMBUTAN
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=K8yIPDfg7Tk

Lohua Meatball Soup Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Meatball Mixture ingredients:
350 g chicken thigh fillet
2 clove garlic
1 tbsp fried shallots
1 pc egg white
1.5 tsp salt
1/8 tsp pepper
1 tbsp sugar
1.5 tsp mushroom bouillon
½ tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
100 g glass noodles (soaked in water)
60 g carrot
100 g wood ear mushroom

Soup ingredients:
3 clove garlic
2 stalk celery
1 stalk green onion
1 tbsp oil
4 pc cabbage leaf
1 pc carrot
100 g wood ear mushroom
2 slice ginger (optional)
2 tsp salt
2 tsp chicken powder
2 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
1.5 liter water

Steps:
1. Pound the garlic and ginger. Slice the cabbage.
2. Heat some oil. Sauté garlic and ginger until fragrant, then add the cabbage and sauté until fragrant.
3. Add water and sliced carrot. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat.
4. Pound the garlic. In a food processor, add chicken, garlic, salt, pepper, sugar, mushroom bouillon, fried shallots, oyster sauce, sesame oil, and egg white. Blend until sticky.
5. Transfer the mixture to a bowl. Add carrot to the food processor and chop, then add that to the mixture.
6. Add wood ear mushrooms to the food processor. Chop and add to the mixture. Cut the glass noodles into small pieces, then add them to the mixture. Mix well.
7. Shape the meatball mixture into balls and add them to the broth. Cook until cooked through.
8. Chop the green onions and celery into large pieces.
9. Add salt, chicken powder, sugar, pepper, green onions, celery, and wood ear mushrooms to the broth.
10. Lohua Meatball Soup is ready to be served.

Title: Praktis Gurih Lembut! Resep TIM IKAN GURAME
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Otgia2qpjB8

Steamed Gourami Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
1 whole gourami (650 g)
4 cm ginger
1 stalk green onion

Sauce ingredients:
5 clove garlic
2 pc red curly chili
1 stalk green onion
2 tbsp cooking oil
½ tbsp sesame oil (optional)
2 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp stock powder
1 tbsp sugar
75 ml water

Add-on:
White rice

Steps:
1. Clean and score the fish.
2. Slice the ginger. Chop part of the green onion into large pieces and some into thin pieces. Finely chop the garlic and slice the curly chili.
3. On a heatproof plate, arrange the green onion, fish, and ginger. Steam for 8-10 minutes over high heat.
4. In a bowl, mix soy sauce, oyster sauce, stock powder, sugar, and water. Stir well.
5. Heat oil. Sauté garlic until fragrant, then add red chili and green onion. Sauté until fragrant.
6. Add the sauce mixture and cook briefly.
7. Pour the sauce over the fish and drizzle with sesame oil.
8. Steamed Gourami is ready to serve.

Title: Bumbu Bakar Awet Serbaguna! Resep IKAN BAKAR TEFLON
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XcZStghIf50

Pan-Grilled Fish Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Fish Marinade ingredients:
400 g tilapia fillet
1½ tsp stock powder
1/8 tsp pepper
2 tbsp cornstarch
1-2 tbsp egg white

Spices:
8 pc candlenut, toasted
15 clove garlic
8 pc shallot
1 tbsp coriander, toasted
3 cm turmeric
2 cm ginger
2 sachet shrimp paste, roasted
80 ml oil
50 ml water

Other ingredients:
3 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 pc bay leaf
2 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp Maggi sauce
100 ml sweet soy sauce
2 tbsp margarine
2 tbsp ketchup
1 tbsp chili sauce
1 tsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper
150 ml water

Add-ons:
White rice
Tomato sambal

Steps:
1. Slice the fish, then marinate with stock powder, pepper, cornstarch, and egg white. Mix well.
2. In a blender, add candlenuts, coriander, garlic, shallots, turmeric, ginger, shrimp paste, oil, and water. Blend until smooth.
3. Heat a pan. Add the blended spices, pepper, bay leaf, and kaffir lime leaves. Sauté until fragrant and oily.
4. Add water, sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, stock powder, and Maggi sauce. Cook briefly, then add margarine and stir well.
5. Add ketchup and chili sauce. Cook briefly.
6. Heat a little oil. Add the fish and cook both sides until lightly browned. Brush with the grilling sauce. Grill until fully cooked and the flavors are absorbed.
7. Pan-Grilled Fish is ready to be served.

Title: Praktis Anti Gagal! Resep CUMI KRISPI MANIS PEDAS
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=48pJ-S5Bt3I

Sweet & Spicy Crispy Calamari Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
200 g squid
¾ tsp baking powder
½ pc lime
2 clove garlic
½ tsp ginger
2 tbsp egg
½ tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
A pinch of pepper
4 tbsp tapioca flour
3 tbsp all-purpose flour

Dry Coating ingredients:
Tapioca flour

Sweet and Spicy Sauce ingredients:
1 tbsp oil
1 tbsp margarine
½ pc onion
3 clove garlic
3 pc red Thai chili (optional)
1 stalk green onion
2 tbsp ketchup
2 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp fish sauce
2 tsp sugar

Add-ons:
White rice

Steps:
1. Slice squid thinly and place it in a bowl.
2. Marinate with grated garlic, grated ginger, lime juice, salt, mushroom bouillon, pepper, baking powder, and egg. Mix well and let it rest for at least 15 minutes or up to 1 hour.
3. Add tapioca flour and all-purpose flour. Mix well.
4. Coat with tapioca flour and mix evenly. Let it sit for 3 minutes, then sift.
5. Heat oil and fry the squid on high heat until golden brown, then drain.
6. Mince garlic, dice onion, slice red Thai chili, and chop green onion.
7. Heat margarine and a little oil, then sauté garlic, onion, and red Thai chili until fragrant.
8. Add ketchup, chili sauce, oyster sauce, fish sauce, and sugar. Sauté briefly on low heat, then add fried squid and stir well.
9. Add green onion and mix well.
10. Sweet & Spicy Crispy Calamari is ready to serve.

Title: Kenyal Gurih! Resep BAKSO AYAM BAKAR [Cocok Untuk Stok]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KlbHRcEVVtU

Grilled Chicken Meatballs Recipe (yield 45 pcs)

Meatball Dough ingredients:
300 g chicken thigh fillet (half-frozen)
150 g chicken breast fillet (half-frozen)
50 g boiled chicken skin (optional)
4 tbsp cold water
1 pc egg
4 clove garlic, halved
4 pc shallot, halved
2 tbsp oil
¼ tsp nutmeg powder
½ tbsp baking powder
1 tbsp all-purpose flour
5 tbsp tapioca flour
1.5 tsp salt
2 tsp chicken powder
1.5 tbsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper

Grill Sauce ingredients:
2 clove garlic
2 tbsp margarine
2 tbsp ketchup
1 tbsp chili sauce
2 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp Maggi sauce
3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1-2 pc kaffir lime

Add-ons:
Fried shallots
Sliced red Thai chili
Kaffir lime

Steps:
1. Heat a little oil. Fry garlic and shallots until fragrant and browned. Set aside.
2. Slice the chicken breast and chicken thighs into pieces.
3. In a food processor, add chicken thighs, chicken breast, salt, sugar, pepper, chicken powder, nutmeg powder, baking powder, and cold water. Blend until sticky.
4. Add fried garlic and shallots, boiled chicken skin, and egg. Blend until smooth.
5. Add tapioca flour and all-purpose flour. Blend until well combined. Transfer to a bowl.
6. Bring water to a boil, then reduce the heat. Shape the dough into meatballs and cook until done. Drain and let cool.
7. Skewer the meatballs with satay sticks.
8. In a bowl, add grated garlic, sweet soy sauce, chili sauce, ketchup, oyster sauce, Maggi sauce, margarine, and lime juice. Mix well.
9. Score the meatballs and grill until slightly browned. Brush with the grill sauce. Grill until fragrant and browned, then brush again and grill until the sauce is absorbed.
10. Grilled Chicken Meatballs are ready to serve.

Title: Daging Lokal Tetap Empuk! Resep STEAK SAPI GORENG
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5MAIqESDfIM

Fried Beef Steak Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
300 g beef tenderloin
½ tsp baking powder
1 pc egg
2 tbsp all-purpose flour
¼ tsp mixed herbs
½ tsp salt
1/8 tsp pepper
1 clove garlic

Coating ingredients:
1 pc egg
30 ml water
All-purpose flour

Creamy Onion Sauce ingredients:
½ pc onion
3 clove garlic
2 tbsp all-purpose flour
2 tbsp unsalted butter
2 tbsp oil
300 ml water
4 tbsp creamer powder
¼ tsp black pepper
½ tsp salt
1 tsp chicken powder

Add-ons:
Mashed potato
Baby green bean, boiled
Cherry tomato

Steps:
1. Slice the beef, then tenderize it by pounding it with the back of a knife until thin.
2. Marinate the beef with egg, all-purpose flour, baking powder, salt, pepper, mixed herbs, and grated garlic. Mix well and let it sit for 30 minutes.
3. Thinly slice the onion. Heat oil in a pan. Sauté the onion until fragrant and slightly browned.
4. Add the finely minced garlic. Sauté until fragrant, then add the butter, flour, and black pepper. Sauté for a moment.
5. Add water and mix well, then add the creamer powder, salt, and chicken powder. Cook for a while.
6. In a bowl, whisk together the egg and water.
7. Coat the beef in dry flour. Dip it into the egg mixture, then coat it again in flour. Fry until cooked through and drain the excess oil.
8. Fried Beef Steak is ready to serve.

Title: Lembut Creamy! Resep BASQUE BURNT CHEESECAKE
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4mrwqnyo4mg

Basque Burnt Cheesecake Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Ingredients:
350 g cream cheese (room temperature)
75 g mascarpone (room temperature)
100 g sugar
3 pc egg
¾ tsp salt
240 g whipping cream
½ tbsp vanilla extract
15 g cornstarch

Biscoff Spread ingredients:
20 g unsalted butter
30 g oil
100 g Biscoff cookies
½ tsp cinnamon powder
75 g white chocolate chips
½ tsp salt

Biscoff Sauce ingredients:
50 ml Biscoff spread
50 ml whipping cream
50 ml milk

Steps:
1. In a bowl, mix the cream cheese, mascarpone, sugar, salt, vanilla extract, and cornstarch until well combined. Then add the eggs one by one, mixing after each addition until smooth.
2. Add the whipping cream and stir with a spatula until fully incorporated.
3. Prepare a baking pan (diameter: 16 cm) lined with baking paper. Strain in the batter and bake at 220°C for 30-35 minutes.
4. In a bowl, combine white chocolate chips, butter, and oil. Melt them in the microwave.
5. Add the Biscoff cookies, salt, and cinnamon powder to a food processor and blend until fine. Then add the melted chocolate mixture and blend again.
6. For the sauce, combine the whipping cream, Biscoff spread, and milk in a bowl and stir well.
7. Remove the cheesecake from the oven. Let it cool to room temperature, then refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight before removing from the pan.
8. Wipe the sides of the pan with a warm cloth and remove the cheesecake from the pan.
9. Basque Burnt Cheesecake is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Resep AYAM GORENG KRISPI SAUS MENTEGA: Juicy & Lembut!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q27y3ra3MRs

Crispy Soy Butter Chicken Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
350 g chicken thigh fillet
2 clove garlic
2 cm ginger
1 pc egg
½ tsp baking powder
4 tbsp tapioca flour
½ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
1 tsp chicken powder
1/8 tsp pepper

Other ingredients:
1 pc onion
3 clove garlic
3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1½ tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp Maggi sauce
1 tbsp margarine
1 pc kaffir lime
1 tsp sugar
2 tbsp oil

Dry Coating ingredients:
Tapioca flour

For Serving:
White rice
Soy sauce + sliced red Thai chili
Fried egg

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken into pieces, then marinate with minced garlic and grated ginger.
2. Add salt, sugar, chicken powder, pepper, baking powder, tapioca flour, and egg. Mix well. Let it sit for at least 15 minutes.
3. Coat the chicken with tapioca flour. Coat well, and let it sit for a while.
4. Fry the chicken on high heat until the outer layer is crispy, then reduce the heat and fry until cooked through. Set aside.
5. Pound the garlic and slice the onion.
6. Heat a little oil. Sauté the garlic until fragrant, then add the onion. Sauté for a few moments until fragrant.
7. Reduce the heat. Add oyster sauce, Maggi sauce, sweet soy sauce, Worcestershire sauce, margarine, and sugar. Increase the heat and cook briefly.
8. Add the fried chicken and stir until well coated. Add the lime juice.
9. Crispy Soy Butter Chicken is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Gurih Lembut! Resep SAPO TAHU AYAM CINCANG
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NbekvavOUIw

Minced Chicken Claypot Tofu Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
480 g egg tofu tube
23 g salted fish (Jambal Roti)
4 cm ginger
4 clove garlic
½ pc onion
½ tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
1 stalk green onion, sliced
300 ml water
2 tbsp oil

Minced Chicken Marinade ingredients:
200 g minced chicken thigh
2 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tsp Maggi sauce
2 tsp sugar
2.5 tbsp cornstarch

Add-ons:
White rice
Soy sauce + sliced Thai chili

Steps:
1. Slice the tofu and fry until golden brown. Set aside.
2. Chop the garlic, slice the ginger, and dice the onion. Slice the salted fish and green onions.
3. Marinate minced chicken with oyster sauce, Maggi sauce, sugar, and cornstarch. Mix well.
4. Heat a little oil. Add the salted fish and ginger. Stir-fry until browned, then add garlic and onion. Stir-fry until fragrant.
5. Add minced chicken and cook until done, then add water and sweet soy sauce. Stir well.
6. Add the tofu and green onions. Cook briefly, then add sesame oil and mix well.
7. Minced Chicken Claypot Tofu is ready to serve.

Title: Versi Murah, Tetap Nagih! Resep SAMBAL TERONG GANJA
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=b9-9r7EPX4U

Ganja Eggplant Sambal Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Ingredients:
180 g purple eggplant (1 pc)
1-2 tbsp oil

Sambal ingredients:
6 pc shallot
6 pc red Thai chili
1 stalk lemongrass (white part only)
2 pc green tomato
6 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 pc kaffir lime
1 tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
2 tsp sugar

Sides:
White rice
Omelette

Steps:
1. Cut the eggplant into pieces. Transfer to a heatproof bowl, drizzle with a little oil, and mix well.
2. Place the bowl in the microwave and cook for 2 minutes. Stir the eggplant and cook for another 2 minutes or until cooked through.
3. Thinly slice the white part of lemongrass, kaffir lime leaves, shallots, and green tomatoes.
4. Using a mortar and pestle, grind the lemongrass, kaffir lime leaves, shallots, red Thai chili, salt, sugar, and mushroom bouillon until slightly smooth.
5. Add green tomatoes and kaffir lime juice, then grind again. Tear the cooked eggplant into shreds and mix it into the sambal.
6. Ganja Eggplant Sambal is ready to serve.

Title: Praktis! Resep SUP KRIM JAMUR / CREAMY MUSHROOM SOUP
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GMGiJVpIR1k

Mushroom Cream Soup Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Creamy Mushroom Soup ingredients:
100 g champignon mushroom
100 g shiitake mushroom
3 clove garlic
½ pc onion
1 pc bay leaf
1 stalk celery
¼ tsp dried thyme
120 ml cooking cream
2 tbsp unsalted butter
2 tbsp oil
1 tbsp all-purpose flour
1 tsp chicken powder
¾ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper
500 ml water

Croutons ingredients:
2 slice white bread
2 tbsp unsalted butter
2 clove garlic
1 tsp dried parsley (optional)

Steps:
1. Heat a pan and toast bread slices until golden brown. Let cool, then slice into small pieces.
2. In a pan, combine the bread, finely chopped garlic, and butter. Cook over low heat until fragrant, then add dried parsley and cook briefly.
3. Slice the champignon, shiitake, onion, and garlic.
4. Heat a little oil. Sauté the onion and garlic until fragrant and slightly golden, then add mushrooms, celery, bay leaf, and dried thyme. Sauté until browned. Set aside a portion of the mushrooms.
5. Add unsalted butter and flour to the pan. Cook briefly, then add water. Simmer for 2 minutes. Remove the celery and bay leaf, then blend until smooth.
6. Add salt, chicken powder, pepper, sugar, and cooking cream to the soup. Bring to a boil.
7. Creamy Mushroom Soup is ready to serve.

Title: Tanpa Goreng Khas Pagi Sore! Resep AYAM POP [Lengkap Dengan Sambal]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cLpDEQY6TIE

Pagi Sore Ayam Pop Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pc rooster chicken, chopped into 4 parts
6 pc garlic
3 pc bay leaf
6 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 stalk lemongrass
4 cm ginger

Other ingredients:
1 tbsp salt
½ tbsp mushroom bouillon/MSG
1/6 tsp pepper
100 ml coconut milk
600 ml coconut water
600 ml water

Sambal ingredients:
8 pc shallot
5 pc garlic
1 pc red tomato
7 pc large red chili
1 tbsp sugar
1 tsp mushroom bouillon/MSG
300 ml chicken braising liquid
2 tbsp all-purpose flour
60 ml coconut oil

Sides:
Boiled cassava leaf
Cucumber

Steps:
1. Blend garlic with a little water until smooth, then slice the ginger and crush the lemongrass.
2. In a saucepan, add the chicken, coconut water, water, blended garlic, sliced ginger, crushed lemongrass, bay leaves, kaffir lime leaves, and coconut milk.
3. Add salt, mushroom bouillon, and pepper. Stir well and cook over medium-low heat for about 30 minutes, covered.
4. For the Sambal, slice the tomato, large red chili, shallots, and garlic.
5. In a pan, heat coconut oil, then add the sliced ingredients. Cook until fragrant.
6. Add the braising liquid from the chicken to the pan and cook until the ingredients soften.
7. Transfer the cooked sambal ingredients to a blender. Add flour, sugar, and mushroom bouillon. Blend until smooth, then strain the Sambal.
8. Set aside the cooked chicken and pour a little braising liquid over it.
9. Ayam Pop is ready to serve.

Title: Mudah Praktis! Resep SAMGYETANG SLOW COOKER [Sup Ayam Korea]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jNB6KScsq9Q

Samgyetang Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Ingredients:
700 g broiler
½ tsp salt
4 clove garlic
3 pc jujube
5 tbsp white sticky rice, soaked in water

Other ingredients:
500 ml water
100 g turnip
1 pc green onion, sliced
¼ pc onion
4 pc garlic
Herbal spices

Dipping Sauce I (Cho Ganjang):
½ pc onion
3 pc red Thai chili
2 pc green chili
3 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp rice vinegar
2 tbsp sugar
120 ml water

Dipping Sauce II:
Sesame oil
Salt
Pepper

Steps:
1. Remove excess fat and blood clots from the chicken and pat it dry.
2. Rub the inside of the chicken with salt, then stuff with some sticky rice, whole garlic, ginseng stalk, jujube, and the remaining sticky rice.
3. Make a small slit in the sides of the chicken and tuck the chicken thighs crosswise.
4. Cut the turnip and onion into large pieces.
5. In a slow cooker or pot, place the chicken, turnip, onion, whole garlic, ginseng root, and water. Cook for 4 hours or until cooked through.
6. For the dipping sauce, slice the onion, green chili, and red Thai chili. Place in a bowl, then add sugar, rice vinegar, soy sauce, and water. Stir well.
7. Mix sesame oil, a pinch of salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
8. Samgyetang is ready to serve.

Title: Cuma 2 Bahan! Resep NASI GORENG BAWANG PUTIH / SINANGAG
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CDRYP60xWws

Garlic Fried Rice Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
7 pc garlic
2 tbsp oil
400 g rice
1 pc green onion
½ tbsp stock powder
1/8 tsp pepper
¼ tsp sugar

Scrambled Egg ingredients:
1 pc egg
¼ tsp stock powder

Steps:
1. Mince the garlic and slice the green onion.
2. Heat oil in a pan. Sauté the garlic until brown, then add rice, stock powder, pepper, sugar, and green onion. Cook over high heat until fragrant.
3. In a bowl, whisk the egg and stock powder. Heat oil until very hot, then add the egg and turn off the heat. Stir well.
4. Garlic Fried Rice is ready to serve.

Title: 100% Sukses! Resep SPIKOE KUNO KENARI [Lembut & Berpori]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MHykA_SQoaY

Kenari Spikoe Recipe (yield 8-10 servings)

Egg yolk batter ingredients:
15 pc egg yolk
90 g sugar
1 tsp vanilla extract
¼ tsp salt
65 g all-purpose flour
15 g cornstarch
6 g milk powder
5 g baking powder

Meringue ingredients:
4 pc egg white
80 g sugar
½ tsp cream of tartar

Others:
50 g dutch butter
50 g margarine
8 g condensed milk

Add-ons:
Kenari nut

Steps:
1. In a bowl, melt Dutch butter, margarine, and condensed milk using the au bain-marie method. Set aside and let cool slightly.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine egg yolks, sugar, vanilla extract, and salt. Whip on medium-high speed until pale and thick, about 8-10 minutes. Set aside.
3. In a separate bowl, whip the egg whites and cream of tartar. Gradually add sugar while whisking until stiff peaks form and it becomes glossy. Set aside.
4. In the egg yolk mixture, sift in cornstarch, all-purpose flour, milk powder, and baking powder. Stir gently until well combined.
5. Gradually fold the meringue into the egg yolk batter, mixing gently.
6. Finally, add the melted butter. Stir until fully incorporated.
7. Pour the batter into a greased and lined baking pan. Place in a preheated oven at 160°C.
8. Bake the Spikoe for 5 minutes, then remove from the oven and sprinkle with kenari nuts. Continue baking for another 35 minutes or until fully cooked.
9. Remove the Spikoe from the oven and let it cool in the pan. Once cooled, remove from the pan.
10. Spikoe is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=J_y9bVRGghQ

Cabbage Stir-Fry with Eggs Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
180 g cabbage
2 pc egg
3 clove garlic
2 pc red Thai chili (optional)
2 tbsp oil
1 tsp chicken powder
2 tsp soy sauce
1 tsp sugar
⅛ tsp pepper
1 tbsp cornstarch
200 ml water

Accompaniments:
White rice
Fried shallots
Green onions

Steps:
1. Chop the garlic. Slice the Thai chili and cut the cabbage.
2. Heat a little oil in a pan. Sauté the garlic over medium heat until fragrant. Add cabbage and Thai chili. Cook briefly over high heat until fragrant.
3. Add eggs. Mix well, then add chicken powder, sugar, pepper, and soy sauce.
4. Mix cornstarch and water, then pour into the pan. Cook briefly.
5. Cabbage Stir-Fry with Eggs is ready to serve.

Title: Lumer, Kenyal, Bisa Untuk Stok! Resep CIMOL KEJU Anti Alot [Lengkap Bumbu Pedas Daun Jeruk]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DLXseRQ6g6E

Cheese Cimol Recipe (yield 7 servings)

Cimol ingredients:
5 clove garlic
3 tbsp oil
375 ml water
120 g all-purpose flour
2 tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp chicken powder
1 tsp MSG
1 tbsp sugar
300 g tapioca flour

Filling ingredients:
Anchor Cheddar Cheese

Seasoning Powder ingredients:
12 pc kaffir lime leaf
3 tbsp fried garlic
3 tbsp chili powder
1 tbsp chicken powder
2 tsp MSG
2 tbsp sugar

Steps:
1. Add garlic and some of the water into a blender. Blend until smooth.
2. In a saucepan, combine all-purpose flour and the remaining water. Stir until well mixed.
3. Add the blended garlic, oil, salt, chicken powder, sugar, MSG, and pepper. Stir well. Turn on the heat and cook over medium heat until fully cooked.
4. Transfer the dough into a bowl. Let it cool down a bit.
5. For the seasoning powder, remove the stems from the kaffir lime leaves, then toast briefly until fragrant.
6. In a blender, add chili powder, fried garlic, kaffir lime leaves, sugar, MSG, and chicken powder. Blend until smooth.
7. Add tapioca flour to the dough. Stir until evenly mixed. Shape the dough into long tubes, then cut into small portions.
8. Cut the cheese into pieces, then stuff the cimol dough with the cheese. Shape them into balls.
9. Boil the cimol balls over medium heat for 4-5 minutes. Drain and add a little oil. Mix well and let cool.
10. Heat oil, then fry the cimol balls over medium heat until crisp and golden. Drain.
11. Cheese Cimol is ready to serve.

Title: Pedasnya Pas! Resep SATE TAICHAN: 100% Gurih Nampol Kesukaan Suami
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vzlwnbKk_-U

Taichan Satay Recipe (yield 50-60 skewers)

Chicken Skin Satay ingredients:
250 g chicken skin
500 ml water
1 tsp salt
⅛ tsp pepper
½ tsp MSG

Chicken Marinade ingredients:
450 g chicken breast fillet
1 clove garlic
1 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tsp salt
½ tsp mushroom bouillon
1½ tbsp oil
¼ tsp pepper
½ tsp lime juice

Taichan Sambal ingredients:
3 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
10 pc red curly chili
10 pc red Thai chili
1-2 pc candlenut
1 pc kaffir lime
2 tbsp oil
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
350 ml water

Sides:
Ketupat
Fried shallots
Kaffir lime
Mushroom bouillon

Steps:
1. Cut chicken breast fillet and transfer to a bowl. Add grated garlic, lime juice, salt, mushroom bouillon, pepper, oil, and oyster sauce. Mix well and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
2. Boil water and add salt, pepper, MSG, and chicken skin. Boil for 1 minute, then drain.
3. Slice chicken skin lengthwise, then skewer them. Each chicken skin skewer should weigh about 10-12 g.
4. Prepare skewers and skewer the marinated chicken pieces. Each chicken skewer should weigh about 15 g.
5. Grill the chicken and chicken skin satay on a preheated, lightly oiled grill. Grill until the satay is cooked and browned.
6. For crispy chicken skin satay, heat oil in a pan and fry the chicken skin satay until done.
7. For Taichan Sambal, pound the candlenuts. Slice the shallots, garlic, red curly chili, and red Thai chili.
8. Heat oil in a pan, then add the chopped ingredients. Cook until fragrant and fully cooked.
9. Blend the cooked ingredients with a little water until completely smooth, then cook again.
10. Add the remaining water, salt, mushroom bouillon, and sugar. Cook sambal over medium-low heat for about 3-4 minutes until done.
11. Once the sambal is cooked, pour into a bowl and add kaffir lime juice. Stir well.
12. Taichan Satay is ready to serve.

Title: Empuk Gurih Meresap! Resep TEMPE OREK KHAS SUNDA
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hpRYHLQOoSA

Sundanese Tempeh Stir-Fry Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Ingredients:
600 g tempeh
2 tbsp oil
7 pc shallot
2 cm galangal
4 pc bay leaf
3-4 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2-3 tbsp palm sugar
¼ tsp pepper
2 tbsp MAGGI oyster sauce
2 sachet MAGGI Magic Lezat
500 ml water
3 pc habanero
2 pc large red chili

Spices:
3 pc candlenut, pounded
5 clove garlic, pounded
3 tbsp oil

Sides:
Rice
Crackers

Steps:
1. Pound the candlenuts and garlic. Place in a blender and add oil. Blend until completely smooth.
2. Slice the shallots, pound the galangal, and cut the tempeh.
3. Heat oil in a pan. Add shallots along with galangal and bay leaves. Sauté until shallots are brown.
4. Add the blended spices and sauté again until fragrant.
5. Add the sliced tempeh, water, sweet soy sauce, MAGGI oyster sauce, MAGGI Magic Lezat, pepper, and palm sugar. Cook again.
6. Slice the habanero and large red chili, then add to the pan. Cook until done and the water reduces.
7. Tempeh Stir-Fry is ready to serve.

Title: Gurih Wangi Lembut! Resep AYAM KUKUS PASUNDAN [Menu Viral]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yF8aYEI0UaA

Pasundan Steamed Chicken Recipe (yield 12 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pc broiler
52 g instant fried chicken spice mix
5 clove garlic
5 pc bay leaf
2 stalk lemongrass
1 liter coconut water

Ingredients for steaming:
2 slice ginger
1 tbsp minced garlic
½ tsp mushroom bouillon

Tomato Shrimp Paste Sambal:
4 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
3 pc candlenut
4 g shrimp paste
63 g large red chili
10 pc red Thai chili
87 g cherry tomato
1 tbsp sugar
½ tsp salt
½ tsp MSG
1-2 tbsp oil
5 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 pc bay leaf
100 ml water
100 ml chicken braising liquid (optional)

Sides:
Rice
Cucumber
Lemon basil
Tofu

Steps:
1. Chop the chicken into 12 pieces and place in a pot.
2. Pound the garlic and lemongrass, then add to the pot. Add bay leaves, instant fried chicken spice mix, and coconut water.
3. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat. Simmer the chicken over low heat for about 20 minutes. Remove the chicken and drain.
4. Prepare minced garlic and sliced ginger.
5. Score the chicken, then arrange it on a steaming plate along with tofu.
6. Add mushroom bouillon, sliced ginger, and minced garlic.
7. Steam the chicken and tofu over high heat for 10-12 minutes.
8. For the Tomato Shrimp Paste Sambal, heat oil, then add garlic, shallots, candlenuts, red Thai chili, large red chili, and shrimp paste. Cook until slightly browned.
9. Add tomatoes. Cook briefly, then transfer to a food processor. Blend until smooth.
10. Return the blended mixture to the pan. Pour in water and add kaffir lime leaves, bay leaves, salt, sugar, and MSG. Cook again while stirring.
11. Add chicken braising liquid to the Sambal. Cook again until reduced.
12. Steamed Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Pedas Segar! Resep SOM TAM / SALAD PEPAYA Khas Thailand [Homemade]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Zt2QyxV6y7M

Som Tam Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
200 g green papaya
2 clove garlic
3 pc red Thai chili
2 pc green Thai chili
2 tbsp dried shrimp, toasted
50 g palm sugar
2 tsp lime juice
1 tbsp tamarind
2 tbsp fish sauce
2 pc long beans
2 tbsp peanuts
3 pc tomato, small

Sides:
White rice
Fried fish (optional)

Steps:
1. Slice the papaya and place in ice water.
2. Grind the garlic, red Thai chili, green Thai chili, and toasted dried shrimp.
3. Add palm sugar, lime juice, tamarind, fish sauce, and long beans, then grind again.
4. Add sliced tomatoes and peanuts. Mix well.
5. Drain the soaked papaya and place in a bowl.
6. Mix the papaya with the Sauce.
7. Som Tam is ready to serve.

Title: Empuk & Meresap! Resep AYAM PANGGANG SERAI / LEMONGRASS CHICKEN Air Fryer
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=B63osaWk7sg

Lemongrass Chicken Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Ingredients:
1.6 kg bone-in chicken thigh
4 stalk lemongrass
6 clove garlic
8 pc shallot
3 candlenut
2½ tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp fish sauce
4 tbsp palm sugar
2 tsp salt
2 tsp mushroom bouillon
⅛ tsp pepper
2 tsp sesame oil

Spicy Lime Dipping Sauce:
3 clove garlic
2 tbsp lime juice
5 pc green Thai chili
5 pc red Thai chili
3 tbsp sugar
3 tbsp fish sauce

Sides:
Cucumber
White rice
Fried egg
Cilantro

Steps:
1. Slice the lemongrass, garlic, and shallots.
2. Heat a little oil. Sauté the shallots, garlic, candlenuts, and lemongrass until fragrant and slightly browned.
3. Prepare a blender. Add the sautéed ingredients, then pour in oyster sauce, fish sauce, sesame oil, palm sugar, pepper, salt, and mushroom bouillon. Blend until completely smooth and all ingredients are well mixed.
4. Score the chicken, then place it in a bowl. Add the marinade and mix well.
5. Marinate the chicken in the refrigerator overnight.
6. Stir the chicken again before grilling, then grill the marinated chicken using an air fryer at 180°C for 20 minutes or until cooked through.
7. After 12 minutes, flip the chicken and continue grilling until fully cooked.
8. For the dipping sauce, chop garlic and slice the green and red Thai chili. Place in a bowl.
9. Add lime juice and sugar. Stir until the sugar dissolves. Finally, add fish sauce and stir again until combined.
10. Lemongrass Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Bikin Sendiri! IRVINS SALTED EGG: Gurih Dan Renyah Maksimal!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BE6SHptVLTQ

Salted Egg Salmon Skin Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Ingredients:
400 g salmon skin
2.5 liter water
2 tbsp salt

Other ingredients:
1 tsp baking powder
½ egg white
150 g potato starch

Salted Egg Sauce ingredients:
3 pc salted egg yolks, cooked
1 tbsp unsalted butter
15 pc curry leaf
3 clove garlic, minced
3 tbsp oil
3 pc red Thai chili
20 g Krim Kafe
1 tbsp powdered sugar
½ tsp salt
1 tsp chicken powder
1/8 tsp pepper

Steps:
1. Boil water and salt, then dip the salmon skin for a few seconds and remove.
2. Scrape the remaining meat on the salmon skin, then cut the skin into pieces and boil again for 1 minute. Let sit for about 5 minutes.
3. Transfer to a bowl, then add egg white and baking powder. Mix well.
4. Coat with potato starch, then fry until crunchy. Set aside.
5. Mash salted egg yolks with a strainer.
6. Heat a pan. Add oil, garlic, and unsalted butter. Sauté until fragrant, then add salted egg yolks and curry leaves.
7. Chop the red Thai chili, then add to the pan and mix well.
8. Add Krim Kafe, salt, chicken powder, pepper, and powdered sugar. Mix well, then add salmon skin and stir briefly.
9. Salted Egg Salmon Skin is ready to serve.

Title: Seger Bikin Nagih! Resep RUJAK ACEH MANGGA KUWENI
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8kG5BKBjF8w

Rujak Aceh Recipe (yield 10-12 servings)

Ingredients:
1-3 pc Thai chili, optional
3 pc red curly chili
500 g kweni mango
1 tbsp palm sugar
5-6 tbsp white sugar
1/8 tsp salt
150 ml water
2 sachet shrimp paste
4 pc key lime

Other ingredients:
1 pc unripe mango
¼ pc young papaya
½ pc pineapple
1 pc cucumber
4 pc rose apple
250 g sugar palm fruit, boiled
½ pc jicama

Salt Solution:
1.2 liter water
3-4 tsp salt

Steps:
1. Peel all fruits, then rinse each fruit in the salt solution. Drain.
2. Boil red curly chili and Thai chili until cooked, then roast the shrimp paste until fragrant.
3. Slice the kweni mango and place in a blender. Add the boiled chilies, shrimp paste, white sugar, palm sugar, salt, and water. Blend until smooth.
4. Slice the young papaya, unripe mango, pineapple, cucumber, rose apples, and jicama. Transfer to a bowl.
5. Pour in the Rujak Sauce and key lime juice. Stir well, then add sugar palm fruits. Stir well.
6. Let sit in the refrigerator for 4 hours before serving.
