Title: Kulit Luar Garing, Dalam Padat! Resep BAKSO GORENG PREMIUM [Bisa Frozen]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q1kjzeU4tuQ

Bakso Goreng Recipe (yield 14-20 pcs)

Fragrant Oil ingredients:
100 g chicken skin
3 tbsp water
45 ml oil
7 pc shallot, sliced

Meatball Dough ingredients:
400 g ground chicken thigh
100 g peeled shrimp
5 clove garlic
1 tsp salt
1 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp MSG
1 tbsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
100 g cold water
200 g tapioca flour
35 g all-purpose flour
1 pc egg
1 tsp baking powder
2 tsp sesame oil

Dipping Sauce ingredients:
4 pc curly red chili
2 clove garlic
2 tbsp chili sauce
½ tsp salt
¾ tbsp vinegar
2 tbsp sugar
150 ml water

Steps:
1. For the Fragrant Oil, heat a pan. Add chicken skin and water. Cook until slightly reduced, then cut into small pieces and cook until fully reduced.
2. Add oil. Cook until half-crisp, then add shallots. Cook until crisp and browned.
3. In a food processor, add Fragrant Oil, garlic, half of the ground chicken thigh, salt, chicken powder, sugar, MSG, pepper, baking powder, sesame oil, egg, and cold water. Blend until smooth and sticky.
4. Add the remaining ground chicken thigh and shrimp. Blend briefly.
5. Transfer to a bowl, then add tapioca and all-purpose flour. Mix well.
6. Heat oil. Shape the dough into round meatballs and fry for about 25-30 minutes or until cooked through. Remove and drain.
7. For the dipping sauce, add curly red chili, garlic, and water into a blender. Blend until smooth.
8. Pour into a pan, then add sugar, salt, vinegar, and chili sauce. Bring to a boil.
9. Fried Meatballs are ready to serve.

Title: Gurih dan Ngaldu: Sop Ayam Tauco ala Swike Jatiwangi
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iTQ5ot4TRcA

Tauco Chicken Soup Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Spices:
3 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
5 cm ginger

Other ingredients:
600-700 g free-range chicken
2 tbsp oil
1 pc carrot
1 pc potato
1 pc red tomato
2 stalk celery
1 pc green onion
4 tbsp tauco
2 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp salt
1/8 tsp pepper
2 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp sugar
1 liter water

Steps:
1. Slice the garlic, shallot, and ginger.
2. Heat oil. Fry the shallot until fragrant, then add garlic. Fry until crisp, then remove and set aside.
3. Cut chicken into pieces.
4. Add tauco and ginger to the pot. Sauté until fragrant, then add chicken. Cook for a moment, then add water.
5. Slice the tomato, carrot, and potato, then add to the pot.
6. Season with salt, pepper, chicken powder, sugar, sweet soy sauce, and oyster sauce. Cover the pot and cook for 15 minutes or until done.
7. Slice the spring onion and celery, then add to the pot. Add the fried shallots and garlic. Cook for a moment.
8. Tauco Chicken Soup is ready to be served.

Title: Praktis Serbaguna! Resep SAUS YAKINIKU [Tips Agar Tahan Lama]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZXWgAJFVNp8

Yakiniku Sauce Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Spice Paste ingredients:
35 g onion
4 clove garlic
4 g ginger
30 g apple
25 ml oil
25 ml water

Sauce ingredients:
2 tsp oyster sauce
60 ml soy sauce
60 ml mirin
2 tsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper
1 tsp sesame oil
½ tsp rice vinegar
2 tsp toasted sesame seeds
150 ml water

Other ingredients:
240 g egg tofu
80 g cornstarch
100 g enoki mushroom
Pepper, optional

Steps:
1. Blend garlic, ginger, onion, apple, oil, and water until smooth.
2. Sauté the spice paste until fragrant and the oil separates.
3. Add soy sauce, mirin, oyster sauce, sugar, vinegar, pepper, and water. Bring to a boil, then add sesame oil and sesame seeds. Cook briefly.
4. Pour the sauce into a jar or sealed container.
5. Heat a little oil, then add enoki mushrooms. Add a little pepper and cook until browned on both sides. Remove and arrange on a serving plate.
6. Cut the tofu, then coat with cornstarch and let it sit for a while.
7. Heat oil and fry the tofu until crispy. Drain.
8. Serve the fried tofu with enoki mushrooms and drizzle with Yakiniku Sauce.

Title: Ala Fiesta & Kanzler: Resep CHICKEN NUGGET HOMEMADE, 100 % Daging Asli [Bisa Jadi Stok Frozen]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=m5AHXAaOxqM

Chicken Nuggets Recipe (yield 30 pcs)

Fragrant Oil ingredients:
3 tbsp oil
4 pc shallot, sliced

Nugget Dough ingredients:
300 g chicken thigh fillet, chopped
150 g chicken breast fillet, chopped
2 slice / 40 g white bread
50 ml milk
1 tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
2.5 tsp chicken powder
¼ tsp pepper
¼ tsp nutmeg
8 cm celery stalk
2 clove garlic, minced
1 pc egg
1 tbsp sago flour
1 tsp baking powder

Dry Coat:
40 g flour
40 g bubble crumb
50 g white breadcrumb

Batter ingredients:
5 tbsp all-purpose flour
¼ tsp salt
⅛ tsp pepper
1 pc egg
60 ml water

Condiment:
Chili sauce

Steps:
1. For the fragrant oil, heat the oil and sauté the sliced shallots over medium heat until golden brown. Set aside and allow to cool slightly.
2. Remove the crusts from the white bread. Tear the bread into pieces and soak it in milk.
3. Finely chop the celery stalk.
4. In a food processor, combine the chicken thigh fillet, chicken breast fillet, salt, sugar, chicken powder, pepper, nutmeg, celery, minced garlic, and fragrant oil. Blend until sticky.
5. Add the soaked bread, egg, sago flour, and baking powder. Blend again until well combined.
6. Transfer some of the nugget dough into a piping bag, and pipe it onto a greased steaming tray lined with baking paper.
7. Steam for 15 minutes, then remove and let cool.
8. For the batter, prepare a bowl and mix together the flour, salt, pepper, egg, and water until well combined.
9. Take a piece of raw nugget dough, coat it in flour while shaping it, then dip it into the batter. Finally, coat it with the bubble crumb.
10. For the steamed nuggets, coat them with flour, then dip into the batter, and finally coat with breadcrumbs.
11. Fry the nuggets in hot oil over medium heat until golden brown, then drain.
12. The Chicken Nuggets are ready to serve.

Title: Tanpa Oven! Resep BOLU SUSU KUKUS VANILLA CHOCO: Lembut & Wangi
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ytWPeOEnIBY

Vanilla Chocolate Milk Sponge Cake Recipe (yield 10 pcs)

Milk Sponge Cake ingredients:
2 pc egg
80 g sugar
¼ tsp salt
1 tsp emulsifier (SP)
30 g condensed milk
120 g cake flour
½ tsp baking powder
½ tsp vanilla powder
50 ml oil
100 ml milk
30 g chocolate sprinkles

Custard Sauce ingredients:
380 ml milk
100 ml water
¼ tsp salt
2 tbsp cornstarch
80 g condensed milk
2 pc egg yolk
2 tbsp unsalted butter

Additional ingredients (for Chocolate Custard Sauce):
2 tbsp cocoa powder
50 g chocolate condensed milk

Steps:
1. In a bowl, combine eggs, sugar, salt, emulsifier, and condensed milk. Mix until pale and fluffy.
2. Sift in the flour, baking powder, and vanilla powder. Mix briefly, then add oil and milk. Mix until well combined.
3. Fold in the chocolate sprinkles with a spatula until evenly distributed.
4. Grease the mold with oil and fill it with the batter up to ¾ full. Steam for 15 minutes.
5. In a saucepan, combine milk, water, salt, cornstarch, and condensed milk. Bring to a simmer, then pour into the egg yolks. Mix well and cook again until boiling while stirring.
6. Turn off the heat and add the unsalted butter. Mix until well combined.
7. Divide the sauce in half. Add cocoa powder to one portion for the Chocolate Custard Sauce. Mix well, then stir in the chocolate condensed milk until combined.
8. Vanilla Chocolate Milk Sponge Cake is ready to serve.

Title: 100% Mekar! Resep CARABIKANG / KUE BIKANG [Lembut Kenyal]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oV2RV7SGkuk

Carabikang Recipe (yield 24 pcs)

Coconut Milk Mixture ingredients:
700 ml water
200 ml coconut milk
4 pc pandan leaf

Other ingredients:
300 g rice flour
200 g all-purpose flour
200 g sugar
2 pc egg
1 tsp salt
½ tsp vanilla
½ tbsp baking powder

Coconut Sauce ingredients:
200 ml coconut milk
50 ml water
1/8 tsp salt

Steps:
1. In a pot, add water, coconut milk, and pandan leaf. Bring to a simmer. Let it cool to lukewarm.
2. In a bowl, mix rice flour, all-purpose flour, sugar, salt, baking powder, and vanilla.
3. Pour in half of the coconut mixture while stirring, then add eggs and mix well.
4. Add the remaining coconut mixture. Mix well and let it rest for at least 1 hour.
5. In a pan, combine coconut milk, water, and salt. Bring to a simmer and set aside.
6. Set aside two portions of the batter in another bowl for green and pink colors.
7. Add a little pandan essence as well as yellow and brown colorings to the green batter. Mix well. Add a little cocopandan essence to the pink batter and mix well.
8. Heat the Carabikang mold, then pour in the white batter, followed by a little of the green and pink batter.
9. Cook until done and spongy, then drizzle with a little Coconut Sauce. Remove the Carabikang from the mold.
10. Carabikang is ready to be served.

Title: Ala Resto Versi Murah! Resep SUAN CAI YU [SUP IKAN SAYUR ASIN]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qi4-iXi8jCE

Suan Cai Yu / Fish Stew with Pickled Mustard Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Fish Marinade ingredients:
360 g gourami fish fillet
1 tbsp cornstarch
½ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper
½ tbsp egg white

Additional Marinade for Fried Fish:
3 tbsp cornstarch
2 tbsp water

Broth ingredients:
Fish bones
7 cm ginger, sliced
10 clove garlic, halved
3 stalk spring onion, sliced into large pieces
2 slice lemon, large
250 g pickled mustard, chopped
½ tbsp Sichuan pepper
15 g dried Thai chili
1.5 liter water
3 pc pickled plum
3 clove garlic, crushed
½ tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp fish sauce
1 tsp chicken powder
½ tsp salt

Add-ons:
White rice / noodles

Steps:
1. Fillet the fish and slice it into pieces. Marinate with cornstarch, salt, sugar, pepper, and egg white. Mix well.
2. Heat oil and fry the fish bones until crisp, then drain. Leave some oil in the pan, then sauté the halved garlic and ginger until fragrant.
3. Add Sichuan pepper and dried Thai chili. Cook until fragrant, then drain.
4. Sauté the pickled mustard briefly, then add water, fish bones, spring onions, crushed garlic, lemon, and pickled plums. Bring to a boil.
5. Add fish sauce, oyster sauce, chicken powder, and salt. Cook for 5-10 minutes.
6. Divide the fish into two parts. Add cornstarch and water to the portion that will be fried. Mix it well, then fry until golden brown and drain.
7. Add the remaining fish fillet to the broth. Cook for 1 minute, then add the sautéed aromatics and fried fish. Cook briefly.
8. The Fish Stew with Pickled Mustard (Suan Cai Yu) is ready to serve.

URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dTozTnKEgko

Saucy Egg Noodles Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Spice Paste ingredients:
4 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
2 pc candlenut
3 g / 1 tsp shrimp paste
2 tbsp oil

Other ingredients:
3 pc egg
1 pc red tomato
4 pc red Thai chili
500 ml water
2 tbsp chili sauce
2 tbsp Maggi oyster sauce
1 tsp Maggi sauce/soy sauce
2 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 sachet Maggi stock powder
130 g dried egg noodles
1 stalk green onion
50 g choy sum

Add-ons:
Crackers
Fried shallots

Steps:
1. Add garlic, shallots, candlenuts, shrimp paste, and oil in a blender. Blend until smooth.
2. Slice the Thai chili, choy sum, red tomato, and green onion.
3. Heat oil. Cook the eggs until crisp and set aside.
4. Sauté the spice paste until fragrant, then add tomato and red Thai chili. Sauté briefly.
5. Add water, chili sauce, oyster sauce, Maggi sauce, sweet soy sauce, and stock powder. Bring to a boil.
6. Add noodles. Slice the fried eggs and green onion. Cook until done, then add choy sum and cook briefly.
7. Saucy Egg Noodles are ready to serve.

Title: Resep MOCHI TEFLON! Daifuku Versi Praktis Untuk Ide Jualan!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nOaAAKryoc0

Chocolate Mochi Recipe (yield 18-20 pcs)

Mochi Dough ingredients:
200 g glutinous rice flour
150 g sugar
300 ml water
50 ml oil
30 g creamer
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp vanilla powder

Filling ingredients:
30 g unsalted butter/margarine
40 g all-purpose flour
150 g water
20 g cocoa powder
120 g compound milk chocolate, chopped
35 g sugar
100 g creamer
1/3 tsp salt

Add-ons:
Strawberry
Tapioca flour + pandan leaf, toasted

Steps:
1. Combine water with creamer. Stir well, then add cocoa powder and mix thoroughly.
2. In a saucepan, add butter and flour. Cook until fragrant, then gradually add the creamer mixture while stirring.
3. Add sugar and salt, stir briefly. Turn off the heat, then add the chopped chocolate and stir until melted.
4. Transfer to a heat-proof container. Cover with plastic wrap and chill for 2 hours or until set.
5. In a saucepan, combine glutinous rice flour, vanilla powder, salt, and sugar.
6. Mix water with creamer and stir well.
7. Add the creamer mixture and oil to the saucepan. Stir until well combined, then turn on the heat and cook until the mixture comes together and releases oil.
8. Transfer to a heat-proof container. Cover with plastic wrap and let it cool until it is no longer hot.
9. Shape chocolate filling into balls of about 20-25 g, then coat in tapioca flour.
10. Fill the chocolate paste with strawberries, then refrigerate.
11. Shape mochi dough into balls of about 35 g. Flatten, add chocolate filling, then shape into balls and coat in tapioca flour.
12. Chocolate Mochi is ready to serve.

Title: Praktis, Renyah dan Lembut! Resep MARTABAK TELUR DAGING KECAP [Cocok Untuk Stok]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O42AbIangxM

Soy Beef Egg Martabak Recipe (yield 12-15 pcs)

Ingredients:
125 g ground beef
1.5 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tsp tapioca flour
4 pc egg
½ pc onion
1 stalk green onion
½ tbsp chicken powder

Add-ons:
Green Thai chili
Spring roll wrappers

Steps:
1. Marinate the beef with sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, and tapioca flour. Mix well.
2. Dice the onion and slice the green onion, then transfer to a bowl.
3. Add the beef, eggs, and chicken powder. Mix thoroughly.
4. Prepare the spring roll wrappers. Place the filling on the center and fold.
5. Heat oil. Fry over medium heat until golden brown and cooked through, then drain.
6. To fry in an air fryer, brush the martabak with oil, then place it in the air fryer. Cook at 180-185°C for 15 minutes.
7. The Soy Beef Egg Martabak is ready to serve.

Title: Spesial Gurih Pedas! Resep IKAN TUNA WOKU Khas Manado
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8BHx_gXDwtA

Tuna Woku Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Tuna Marinade ingredients:
500 g tuna fillet
1 tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper

Spice Paste:
10 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
3 pc candlenut
5 cm turmeric
5 cm ginger
17 pc green Thai chili
7 pc red Thai chili
2 stalk lemongrass

Aromatic ingredients:
2 stalks green onion
1 pc red tomato
1 pc lime
8 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 pc pandan leaf
30 g lemon basil
Turmeric leaf, optional

Other ingredients:
350 ml water
½ tbsp chicken powder
½ tbsp MSG
2 tsp sugar
75 ml oil

Add-ons:
White rice

Steps:
1. Slice the tuna into pieces, then marinate with salt and pepper. Mix well.
2. Slice the white part of the lemongrass and pound the green stalk.
3. Add garlic, candlenuts, ginger, and lemongrass in a food processor. Blend until smooth, then add turmeric, shallots, red Thai chili, and green Thai chili. Blend until smooth.
4. Slice the kaffir lime leaves, pandan leaves, and red tomato.
5. Heat the oil. Add the lemongrass, pandan leaves, and kaffir lime leaves. Sauté until fragrant, then add the spice paste and sauté briefly.
6. Add the tuna, chicken powder, sugar, and MSG. Sauté briefly.
7. Add the red tomato. Mix well, then add water. Cook for 5-10 minutes.
8. Slice the green onion and add it to the pan. Cook briefly.
9. Turn off the heat. Add lemon basil and lime juice. Mix well.
10. Tuna Woku is ready to serve.

Title: 15 Menit Jadi! Resep NASI GORENG SAUS KEJU [Cocok Untuk Bekal]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ujthvpnVTmQ

Cheesy Chicken Fried Rice Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Fried Rice ingredients:
350 g rice
1 tbsp Anchor Unsalted Butter
½ tsp sesame oil
4 clove garlic
½ pc onion
1 pc green onion
60 g carrot
100 g chicken luncheon
100 g chicken thigh fillet
2 pc egg
1.5 tbsp gochujang
1 tsp chicken powder
½ tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp sugar
⅛ tsp pepper

Cheese Sauce ingredients:
1 tbsp all-purpose flour
1.5 tbsp Anchor Unsalted Butter
250 ml milk
2 slice Anchor Cheddar Cheese
¼ tsp chicken powder

Add-ons:
Anchor Cheddar Cheese
Chicken Katsu/Karaage (optional)

Steps:
1. Heat Anchor Unsalted Butter, then add flour and sauté until fragrant.
2. Gradually add milk while stirring, then add chicken powder and Anchor Cheddar Cheese Slices. Cook until slightly thickened.
3. Slice the garlic and green onions. Dice the onion, carrot, and chicken. Marinate the chicken with a bit of salt and pepper. Mix well.
4. Dice the chicken luncheon.
5. Heat a bit of oil. Sauté garlic until half-crisp, then add onion, chicken, and carrot. Sauté until the chicken is cooked.
6. Add the eggs. Mix well, then add rice, green onion, chicken luncheon, gochujang, chicken powder, soy sauce, sugar, and pepper. Stir well.
7. Add Anchor Unsalted Butter and sesame oil. Cook briefly.
8. Arrange the Fried Rice on a serving plate, then pour the Cheese Sauce over it. Add grated Anchor Cheddar Cheese and Chicken Katsu or other toppings.
9. Cheesy Chicken Fried Rice is ready to serve.

Title: Gurih, Pedas, Manis! Resep SAMBAL TERI KECOMBRANG [Tahan Lama]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oUI_m5Zn2OA

Kecombrang Anchovy Sambal Recipe (yield 10 servings)

Ingredients:
100 g Medan anchovy
12 clove garlic
18 clove shallot
1 pc red tomato
200 g red chili
50 g Thai chili
4 g shrimp paste
50 g kecombrang
10 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 stalk lemongrass
1 thumb galangal
150 ml oil
2 tsp salt
3 tbsp sugar
2 tsp MSG

Add-ons:
Rice
Crackers

Steps:
1. Soak the anchovies in hot water for a few moments, then drain.
2. Slice the kecombrang and kaffir lime leaves thinly. Pound the lemongrass and galangal.
3. Add garlic, shallots, red chili, Thai chili, and tomato to a food processor. Blend until smooth.
4. Heat the oil. Add galangal, lemongrass, kaffir lime leaves, anchovies, and shrimp paste. Fry until lightly browned.
5. Add the blended ingredients and kecombrang. Stir well, then add salt, MSG, and sugar. Cook over medium-low heat for 15-20 minutes.
6. Kecombrang Anchovy Sambal is ready to serve.

Title: Garing Renyah Lembut! Resep TERONG RAOS Khas Pandan Wangi
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bfv0kWDFEIk

Terong Raos Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
1-2 pc eggplant (250 g)
2 tbsp oil/margarine
7 pc salted squid, soaked in hot water
5 clove garlic
7 pc shallot
1 stalk green onion
4 pc curly red chili
5 pc Thai chili
1 pc lime (optional)

Other ingredients:
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tsp sugar
1 tsp mushroom bouillon/MSG

Batter ingredients:
150 g all-purpose flour
30 g rice flour
½ tbsp baking powder
¼ tsp salt
½ tbsp chicken powder
1/8 tsp pepper
250 ml water
½ tbsp vinegar

Steps:
1. In a bowl, mix the all-purpose flour, rice flour, baking powder, salt, chicken powder, and pepper.
2. Gradually add water while stirring, then add vinegar. Mix well.
3. Cut the eggplant into slices, then dip into the batter. Fry the eggplant until golden brown and crispy, then drain.
4. Chop the garlic. Slice the shallots, curly red chili, Thai chili, green onion, and squid.
5. Heat the oil/margarine. Sauté the shallots until fragrant, then add the garlic, green onion, red chili, Thai chili, and salted squid. Sauté until fragrant and crisp.
6. Add sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, sugar, stock powder, and eggplant. Stir until well mixed, then add lime juice. Mix well.
7. Terong Raos is ready to serve.

Title: Wangi Lembut Ekonomis! Resep BOLU MARMER KUKUS
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jKxMuh4NDss

Steamed Marble Cake Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Ingredients:
3 pc egg
300 g icing sugar
240 ml water
90 g Krim Kafe
300 g cake flour
¾ tsp salt
3 tsp SP
1.5 tsp vanilla powder
¾ tbsp baking powder
4 tbsp cocoa powder
30 g chocolate sprinkles

Steps:
1. In a bowl, sift together flour, icing sugar, salt, baking powder, and vanilla powder.
2. Add Krim Kafe, SP, eggs, and water, then beat with a mixer until pale and fluffy.
3. Divide the batter into two portions, then add sifted cocoa powder and chocolate sprinkles to one portion, mixing until well combined.
4. Grease the cake pan with oil and preheat the pan for 3 minutes.
5. Pour a small amount of chocolate batter into the pan, followed by the white batter. Repeat until all the batter is used, then swirl with a fork to create a marble effect.
6. Steam the cake for 35 minutes over medium heat, then remove from the pan.
7. Steamed Marble Cake is ready to serve.

Spicy Kangkong Stir-Fry with Shrimp Paste Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g kangkong
7 pc shallot
1 tsp shrimp paste powder
1 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tsp salt
½ tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tbsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper

Spices:
6 clove garlic
4 pc red Thai chili
15 pc curly red chili
1 pc red tomato

Additional ingredients:
2 pc red chili
1 pc red tomato

Steps:
1. Slice the shallots and set aside. In a food processor, blend garlic, curly red chili, red Thai chili, and tomato until smooth.
2. Heat a little oil and sauté the shallots until fragrant.
3. Add the ground spices. Sauté until fragrant, then add the shrimp paste and cook until it releases oil.
4. Slice the red tomato and red chili.

Title: Gurih Wangi! Resep SOTO BETAWI AYAM
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CmonjaL6jS0

Soto Betawi with Chicken Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Ingredients:
1 kg broiler, cut into 8 pieces
5 pair chicken liver and gizzard, boiled

Spices:
8 clove garlic
12 pc shallot
5 pc candlenut
6 cm ginger
1 tsp coriander
1 tsp whole white pepper
60 ml oil
50 ml water

Additional ingredients:
1.5 tbsp Kari Minang powder
3 pc bay leaf
5 pc kaffir lime leaf
5 cm galangal
1 stalk lemongrass
1.5 tbsp chicken powder
1.5 tbsp sugar
1.5 tbsp salt
½ tbsp MSG
100 ml Anchor Cooking Cream
2 liter water

Garnishes:
2 pc red tomato
2 stalk celery
1 stalk green onion
3 pc potato
Fried shallots
Thai chili sambal
Lime
Emping
Steamed rice

Steps:
1. In a blender, combine garlic, shallots, candlenuts, ginger, coriander, white pepper, oil, and water. Blend until smooth.
2. Heat oil in a pan. Add the spice paste and Kari Minang powder. Sauté until fragrant and the oil separates.
3. Pound the lemongrass and galangal, then add bay leaves, lemongrass, galangal, and kaffir lime leaves to the pan. Sauté until fragrant.
4. Add water, chicken, liver and gizzard, salt, chicken powder, sugar, MSG, and celery. Cook for 30 minutes.
5. Cut potatoes in half and fry over medium heat until cooked.
6. Dice the tomatoes and slice the green onions. Set the chicken, liver, gizzard, and other spices aside. Let cool.
7. Add Anchor Cooking Cream to the broth. Stir well.
8. Fry the chicken, liver and gizzard until crisp. Set aside, then shred the chicken. Slice the liver, gizzard, and potatoes.
9. Soto Betawi with Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Bisa Frozen! Resep TAKOYAKI: Garing Di Luar, Meleleh Di Mulut!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fS8G-wbr9g8

Takoyaki Recipe (yield 30 pcs)

Batter ingredients:
200 g all-purpose flour
15 g cornstarch
650 ml water
1 pc egg
1 tsp baking powder
1 tbsp dashi powder
½ tsp salt
1 tbsp aonori

Tenkasu ingredients:
100 g all-purpose flour
200 ml water
1 tsp baking powder
½ tsp salt

Sauce ingredients:
60 g ketchup
100 g Worcestershire sauce
200 g teriyaki sauce
10 g sugar
30 g oyster sauce

Add-ons:
Green onions
Octopus
Aonori
Katsuobushi

Steps:
1. In a bowl, mix all-purpose flour, salt, baking powder, and water. Stir well, then transfer to a piping bag.
2. Heat oil. Drip the batter in slowly, then fry briefly over medium-low heat. Drain.
3. In a bowl, mix all-purpose flour, cornstarch, baking powder, aonori, egg, salt, dashi powder, and water slowly. Stir until mixed well.
4. Finely chop green onions and cut the octopus into pieces.
5. Heat a takoyaki pan and add a small amount of oil, then pour in the batter.
6. Add octopus, tenkasu, and green onions, then flip the takoyaki halfway and pour more batter to shape into balls. Cook until browned.
7. For the Sauce, in a saucepan, combine teriyaki sauce, ketchup, oyster sauce, Worcestershire sauce, and sugar. Stir well, then cook until boiling. Set aside.
8. Takoyaki is ready to serve.

Title: Wangi Istimewa! Resep NASI GORENG CABE IJO Pakai Ikan Asin
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CQsITXY5-os

Green Chili Fried Rice Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Base Spices:
5 pc shallot
4 clove garlic
120 g curly green chili
20 pc green Thai chili
5 pc kaffir lime leaf

Other ingredients:
30 g jambal roti (salted fish)
2 pc green onion
2 pc egg
1 tbsp oyster sauce
600 g rice
½ tbsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
½ tbsp MSG
1/8 tsp pepper
4 tbsp oil
½ tsp baking soda for boiling green chili

Condiments:
Emping crackers
Fried shallots
Cucumber

Steps:
1. Bring water to a boil. Add curly green chili and baking soda. Boil for 3 minutes, drain, then chop.
2. Chop garlic and shallots. Slice the green onions. Chop the jambal roti into small pieces. Slice green Thai chili and kaffir lime leaves.
3. Heat a little oil. Sauté garlic and shallots until fragrant, then add salted fish and sauté briefly.
4. Add the eggs. Stir well, then add green Thai chili, kaffir lime leaves, chopped curly green chili, and rice. Stir until well mixed.
5. Add oyster sauce, salt, sugar, MSG, pepper, and green onions. Cook briefly over high heat.

Title: Kuah Kental dan Gurih! Resep LOMIE AYAM KANGKUNG [Bikin Nagih!]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lHWN1HtYNx0

Lomie Kangkung Recipe (yield 6-8 servings)

Spice Paste ingredients:
6 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
50 g shrimp

Chicken Topping ingredients:
500 g chicken thigh / 250 g fillet
3 tbsp oil
2 pc scallion
2 liter water
1.5 tbsp chicken powder
1 tbsp salt
1.5 tbsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
3 pc Shiitake mushroom (optional)

Other ingredients:
½ tsp salt
1 tsp sesame oil

Thick Soup ingredients:
3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
80 g tapioca flour
1 pc egg

Ingredients to boil:
1.5 liter water
½ tsp baking soda
½ tsp salt

Add-ons:
Fresh noodles
Kangkung
Bean sprouts
Fried shallots
Chili sauce
Kaffir lime

Steps:
1. Add garlic, shallots, and shrimp into a food processor. Blend until smooth.
2. Heat oil. Sauté the spice paste until fragrant. Slice scallions, then add to the pan. Sauté until fragrant and slightly browned.
3. Add water, chicken powder, salt, sugar, and pepper. Bring to a boil, then add chicken and sliced shiitake mushrooms. Cook for 20 minutes over low heat.
4. Set aside the chicken, then add salt and sesame oil. Mix well and cover.
5. Add sweet soy sauce, soy sauce, and oyster sauce to the pan. Mix well.
6. Dissolve tapioca in a little water, then slowly add to the pan. Cook until thickened.
7. Beat the egg, then slowly add to the pan while stirring.
8. Remove the chicken meat from the bone then chop into pieces.
9. Boil water. Add salt and baking soda, then blanch the bean sprouts and kangkung briefly. Drain.
10. Boil the noodles briefly and drain.
11. Lomie Kangkung is ready to serve.

Title: Empuk & Meresap! Resep CHICKEN TERIYAKI: Praktis Bikin di Rumah
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cu73eSCdG5k

Teriyaki Chicken Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients to marinate:
4 pc chicken thigh fillet, with skin (total 750 g)
8 tbsp teriyaki sauce
½ pc lime
¼ tsp pepper
2 tbsp cornstarch
3 clove garlic, pounded

Roasted Teriyaki Chicken ingredients:
100 ml water
50 g teriyaki sauce
½ tbsp unsalted butter (optional)

Stir-Fried Teriyaki Chicken ingredients:
3 clove garlic
½ pc onion
½ tbsp unsalted butter (optional)
50 g teriyaki sauce

Add-ons:
White rice
Boiled broccoli
White sesame seeds

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with lime juice, garlic, pepper, cornstarch, and teriyaki sauce. Mix well. Let it sit for at least 2 hours or overnight in the refrigerator.
2. For Roasted Teriyaki Chicken, heat a little oil. Add the chicken and cook until lightly browned on all sides.
3. Add water and teriyaki sauce. Cook for 5 minutes over medium heat with the lid on, then add butter and cook briefly.
4. For Stir-Fried Teriyaki Chicken, slice the garlic, cut the onion thickly, and chop the chicken.
5. Heat a little oil. Briefly sauté the garlic, then add the chicken in. Stir-fry over high heat until lightly browned.
6. Add onion and sauté briefly, then add teriyaki sauce and butter. Cook for a few moments.
7. Teriyaki Chicken is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Kenyal, Lembut, Cocok Untuk Stok! Resep PENTOL DOS [Favorit Anak]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MW-ZkJ78uyo

Pentol Dos Recipe (yield 70-80 pieces)

Starter ingredients:
5 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
50 ml oil
350 ml water
120 g rice flour
1 tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp chicken powder
1 tsp MSG
1 tbsp sugar
3 tbsp soy sauce
2-3 pc green onion

Dough ingredients:
1 pc egg
250 g tapioca flour
50 g all-purpose flour

Peanut Sauce ingredients:
4 pc shallot
2 clove garlic
1 pc candlenut
4 tbsp oil
50 g fried peanut
2 pc red Thai chili (optional)
3 pc curly red chili
2 pc kaffir lime leaf
500 ml water
1.5 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tsp salt
1.5 tbsp palm sugar
1.5 tbsp tapioca flour

Add-ons:
Lime

Steps:
1. Place garlic and shallots into a food processor. Blend until smooth.
2. Heat oil. Sauté garlic and shallots until lightly browned.
3. Mix water with rice flour, then add to the pan.
4. Add salt, seasoning, chicken powder, sugar, and pepper. Cook until thickened and cooked through, then transfer to a bowl.
5. For the Peanut Sauce, place garlic, shallots, candlenut, peanuts, curly red chili, and red Thai chili into a food processor. Blend until smooth.
6. Heat oil. Sauté the mixture until fragrant and foamy, then add water, palm sugar, sweet soy sauce, kaffir lime leaves, salt, and mushroom bouillon. Cook until the water reduces by half.
7. Set the kaffir lime leaves aside. Blend part of the Peanut Sauce until smooth. Cook again, then add the tapioca slurry. Cook until boiling and thickened.
8. Once the starter mixture is cool, add egg, soy sauce, all-purpose flour, and tapioca flour. Mix well.
9. Chop green onions and mix them into the dough. Mix well. Shape the dough into balls, then boil until they float and are cooked through. Drain and add a bit of oil.
10. Skewer the balls with satay sticks and fry until crisp, then drain.
11. Pentol Dos is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Praktis & Istimewa! Resep BIHUN KUAH SAPI IRIS [Favorit Keluarga]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uLBbdXKowSA

Sliced Beef Vermicelli Soup Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients to marinate:
300 g beef tenderloin
2 tbsp tapioca flour
2 clove garlic
2 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1/8 tsp pepper
2 tbsp water

Soup ingredients:
1.5 L water
2 tbsp oil
8 pc shallot
4 clove garlic
4 pc celery
2 pc green onion
1 tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
2 tsp chicken powder

Other ingredients:
300 g vermicelli
Fried shallots
Boiled choy sum

Steps:
1. Slice the beef into 2-3 mm thick pieces then marinate with grated garlic, pepper, soy sauce, sweet soy sauce, water, and tapioca flour. Mix gently. Let it sit for 5-10 minutes.
2. Slice the garlic, shallots, green onions, and celery.
3. Heat a little oil. Sauté garlic and shallots until fragrant then add water and bring to a boil.
4. Gradually add the beef, chicken powder, salt, sugar, green onions, and celery. Cook briefly.
5. Bring water to a boil. Add vermicelli and cook for 2 minutes, then drain.
6. Sliced Beef Vermicelli Soup is ready to serve.

Title: Resep SPICY CHICKEN WINGS: Manis Gurih! [Cocok Untuk Stok]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CBMPcTpaXbU

Spicy Chicken Wings Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Ingredients to marinate:
750 g chicken wings
½ pc lime
4 clove garlic, finely grated
2 tbsp cornstarch
½ tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp BBQ sauce
1 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp gochugaru/paprika powder
2 tbsp palm sugar
1 tbsp chicken powder
½ tsp pepper

Steps:
1. Marinate chicken wings with lime juice, garlic, pepper, chicken powder, palm sugar, oyster sauce, sweet soy sauce, chili sauce, BBQ sauce, gochugaru, and cornstarch. Mix well.
2. Let the wings marinate in the refrigerator overnight.
3. Arrange in a steamer and steam for 15-20 minutes over medium-low heat. Allow to cool.
4. Heat oil. Fry the wings briefly, then drain.
5. Spicy Chicken Wings are ready to serve.

Title: Resep AYAM GEPREK SAMBAL KOREK: Gurih, Krispi, Juicy!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bOonhPzqtnw

Ayam Geprek Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Marinade:
600 g chicken thigh fillet
1 tbsp lime juice
2 tbsp sugar
1 tbsp salt
1 tsp pepper
1 tbsp chicken powder
5 clove garlic, minced
1/3 pc onion
400 ml water
1 pc egg
80 g all-purpose flour

Dry Coat:
450 g all-purpose flour
100 g tapioca flour or cornstarch
50 g rice flour
4 tsp baking powder
2 tsp turmeric powder
2 tsp gochugaru or paprika powder

Sambal ingredients:
100 g red Thai chili
6 clove garlic
1 sachet shrimp paste, toasted
½ tsp salt
½ tsp chicken powder
½ tsp MSG
1 pc kaffir lime
2 tbsp hot oil

Add-ons:
Rice
Cucumber

Steps:
1. Blend garlic, onion, and a little water until smooth.
2. Marinate the chicken with salt, chicken powder, pepper, sugar, lime juice, egg, blended spices, all-purpose flour, and water. Mix well. Let sit for at least 2 hours at room temperature.
3. In a bowl, mix all-purpose flour, tapioca flour, rice flour, turmeric powder, gochugaru, and baking powder. Mix well.
4. Drain the chicken, then coat with the dry mixture. Dip into the batter and coat again with the dry mixture. Repeat once more if a thicker texture is desired.
5. Heat oil. Fry the chicken over high heat until a crispy outer structure forms, then reduce the heat and fry until golden brown. Drain.
6. For the Sambal, mash garlic, salt, chicken powder, MSG, and toasted shrimp paste until smooth.
7. Blend the red Thai chili in a food processor, then mix with the ground ingredients.
8. Pour hot oil over the Sambal and mix well. Transfer to a bowl and add lime juice. Mix well.
9. Ayam Geprek is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Lembut Gurih! Resep PANGSIT AYAM KUAH / WONTON SOUP [Favorit Anak & Keluarga]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wOd0We0jRug

Chicken Wonton Soup Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Ingredients:
300 g chicken thigh fillet
3 clove garlic
4 clove shallot
1 pc egg white
2 tbsp tapioca flour
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 stalk green onion
2 tbsp oil
1.5 tbsp sugar
1.5 tsp salt
1.5 tsp mushroom bouillon
1/3 tsp pepper
2 tbsp water

Soup ingredients:
1.5 liter water
1 tbsp chicken powder
1/8 tsp pepper
½ tsp salt
½ tbsp sugar

Add-ons:
White rice
Sliced green onions
Wonton wrappers
Garlic oil

Steps:
1. Chop shallots and slice green onions. Heat oil. Fry shallots until fragrant, then add green onions. Sauté briefly and set aside.
2. Slice the garlic. Place it in a food processor with some chicken, salt, sugar, mushroom bouillon, and pepper, grind until sticky.
3. Add the remaining chicken, egg white, oyster sauce, water, and tapioca flour. Blend briefly. Transfer to a bowl and add garlic oil. Mix well.
4. Prepare wonton wrappers. Place ½ tbsp of the mixture. Fold into a triangle and fold towards the center.
5. Heat water and a little oil. Add wontons and boil briefly. Drain.
6. For the Soup, cook all ingredients until boiling.
7. Chicken Wonton Soup is ready to serve.

Title: Praktis, Mudah, Enak! Resep UDANG GORENG ASAM JAWA
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mjvAs0jIAEw

Tamarind Fried Shrimp Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Marinade:
400 g shrimp
6 clove garlic
1 tbsp tamarind
1 tbsp water
½ tbsp salt
½ tbsp mushroom bouillon
1/8 tsp pepper
1-2 tbsp tapioca flour

Sweet Soy Sambal ingredients:
1 clove garlic
5 pc red Thai chili
15 pc green Thai chili
2 tbsp palm sugar
1 tbsp fried shallots
2 tbsp sweet soy sauce
½ tsp salt
½ pc red tomato, diced
½ pc lime

Add-ons:
Steamed rice

Steps:
1. Cut off the shrimp heads and slice the first three segments of the shrimp's back to remove the vein.
2. Mash the garlic with a mortar and pestle, then transfer to a bowl.
3. Add tamarind and water, mix well. Add shrimp, salt, mushroom bouillon, pepper, and tapioca flour. Mix gently. Let sit for 10 minutes.
4. In a mortar, mash garlic and salt until smooth.
5. Add green and red Thai chili. Mash coarsely, then add palm sugar and mash again. Transfer to a bowl.
6. Add sweet soy sauce, fried shallots, diced tomato, and lime juice, mix well.
7. Heat oil. Fry the shrimp over high heat briefly, then drain.
8. Tamarind Fried Shrimp is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Luar Renyah Dalam Creamy Gurih! Resep RISOLES KORNET KEJU
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=A96k9hc6xjQ

Corned Beef Cheese Rissole Recipe (yield 8-10 servings)

Skin ingredients:
150 g all-purpose flour
2 tbsp cornstarch
300 ml water
100 ml milk
1 tsp salt
1 pc egg
1 tbsp Anchor Unsalted Butter, melted

Corned Beef Filling:
½ pc small onion, diced
200 g corned beef
1 tbsp oil
2 tbsp Anchor Unsalted Butter
½ tsp chicken powder
½ tbsp sugar

Batter ingredients:
75 g all-purpose flour
1 pc egg
120 ml water
White breadcrumbs

Add-ons:
Boiled eggs
Anchor Cheddar Block Cheese
Mayonnaise
Chili sauce

Steps:
1. In a bowl, mix all-purpose flour, cornstarch, salt, egg, milk, and water until smooth. Add melted butter, mix well, and strain.
2. Heat a frying pan. Pour ¾ ladle of the skin batter while spreading evenly. Repeat until all of the batter is used.
3. Heat a little oil. Sauté diced onion until fragrant, then add butter and corned beef. Mix well.
4. Add sugar and chicken powder. Stir-fry until cooked. Set aside.
5. Grate cheese and cut boiled eggs into quarters. For the wet batter, mix flour, egg, and water until smooth.
6. Prepare the skin. Arrange the corned beef, boiled eggs, grated cheese, and mayonnaise. Fold and seal the ends of the skin with the wet batter mixture.
7. Dip the rissole into the wet batter mixture, then coat with white breadcrumbs.
8. Heat oil. Fry the rissoles over medium heat until golden brown. Drain.
9. Corned Beef Cheese Rissoles are ready to serve.

Title: Krispi Gurih! Resep AYAM GORENG OAT Ala Singapura
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uThl07I1RoI

Oat Fried Chicken Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Marinade:
300 g chicken thigh fillet
1 tsp lime juice
1 tbsp egg white
½ tsp chicken powder
1/8 tsp pepper
1 tsp sugar
½ tbsp oyster sauce
3 tbsp cornstarch

Other ingredients:
5 clove garlic
3 pc red curly chili
2 pc red Thai chili
1 tbsp oil
1 tbsp unsalted butter
2 sprig curry leaf
80 g rolled oats (coarse)
½ tsp salt
½ tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tsp sugar
1 tbsp powdered milk

Coating:
80 g rolled oat (fine)

Add-ons:
Rice
Sunny side-up egg

Steps:
1. Cut the chicken into pieces, then marinate with lime juice, chicken powder, sugar, pepper, egg white, oyster sauce, and cornstarch. Mix well. Let sit for 5-10 minutes.
2. Add rolled oats into a food processor. Divide into two textures: slightly coarse and fine.
3. Coat the chicken in finely chopped oats, then fry until golden brown. Set aside.
4. Mince the garlic. Slice the red curly chili and red Thai chili.
5. Heat oil and butter, then sauté garlic and chili until fragrant.
6. Add curry leaves and oats. Cook on low heat until fragrant, then add chicken, salt, sugar, mushroom bouillon, and powdered milk. Stir well.
7. Oat Fried Chicken is ready to serve.

Negi Shio Beef Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Ingredients:
5 clove garlic
150 g green onion

Other ingredients:
500 g sliced beef
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp sesame oil
1 tsp salt
2 tsp mushroom bouillon
½ tsp pepper
3 tbsp halal sake/mirin

Add-ons:
Rice
Sesame oil
White sesame seeds

Steps:
1. Chop the green onions and transfer to a bowl. Add salt, mushroom bouillon, sake, soy sauce, sesame oil, and pepper. Mix well.
2. Mix the green onions with the beef. Let sit for at least 30 minutes.
3. Slice the garlic. Heat the oil. Fry on low heat until browned. Drain.
4. Heat a little oil. Add the beef and cook over high heat until done.
5. Prepare a bowl. Arrange the rice, beef, and other add-ons.
6. Negi Shio is ready to be served.

Title: Praktis Cepat! Resep TELUR DADAR KRISPI / CRISPY OMELETTE
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C8g1A23QW3A

Crispy Omelette Recipe (yield 2-4 servings)

Batter:
100 ml water
2 tbsp rice flour
1 tbsp tapioca flour
1 tbsp oil
¾ tsp chicken powder
¼ tsp turmeric powder

Filling:
2 pc egg
30 g bean sprouts
1 leaf cabbage
50 g sausage
1 stalk green onion, small
½ tsp soy sauce
A pinch of pepper

Sauce:
1 clove garlic
1 tbsp ketchup
1 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp mineral water
½ tsp sugar

Steps:
1. For the sauce, grate the garlic then mix with sugar, chili sauce, ketchup, and water.
2. Mix water, rice flour, tapioca flour, turmeric powder, chicken powder, and oil.
3. Heat a pan. Pour in half the batter and spread it evenly. Cook over medium heat.
4. Slice the cabbage, green onions, and sausages.
5. Arrange the sausages and eggs on the crepe. Spread them evenly, then add cabbage, green onion, bean sprouts, soy sauce, and a bit of pepper. Cover and cook until done.
6. Crispy Omelette is ready to serve.

Title: Empuk, Manis Gurih! Resep MALBI DAGING SAPI Khas Palembang [Menu Idul Adha]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CwHsQuKvgdU

Beef Malbi Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Ingredients:
650 g beef shank
250 g grated coconut

Spices:
12 pc shallot
7 clove garlic  
3 cm ginger 
1 tsp whole white pepper
½ tsp whole black pepper
1 tbsp coriander
½ pc nutmeg
75 ml oil
50 ml water

Other ingredients:
1 stalk lemongrass, pounded  
5 pc clove
6 cm cinnamon
2 tbsp palm sugar
4-5 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 liter water
1 tsp beef powder
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp MSG

Pineapple Sambal ingredients:
150 g pineapple
2 pc shallot (optional)
6 pc curly red chili
15 pc green Thai chili
½ tsp shrimp paste, roasted
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp sugar

Add-ons:
Rice

Steps:
1. Slice the beef into pieces. Set aside.
2. Blend garlic, shallot, ginger, black pepper, white pepper, nutmeg, coriander, oil, and water in a blender until smooth.
3. Sauté the spice paste until fragrant, then add lemongrass, cinnamon, and cloves. Sauté until fragrant.
4. Add water, beef, salt, beef powder, and MSG. Cook over low heat until tender.
5. Toast the grated coconut until golden brown, then blend until smooth.
6. Add palm sugar, sweet soy sauce, and toasted coconut to the pan. Cook until reduced.
7. For the Pineapple Sambal, dice the pineapple and slice the shallot.
8. In a stone bowl, mash curly red chili, green Thai chili, roasted shrimp paste, salt, and sugar until smooth.
9. Add some pineapple, mash again, then add the remaining pineapple and shallots. Mix well.
10. Beef Malbi is ready to serve.

Title: Praktis Nagih! Resep MISOA AYAM PEDAS [Cocok Untuk Keluarga]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Y-U44qwpmSc

Spicy Chicken Misua Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
150 g ground chicken thigh  
5 clove garlic  
4 pc shallot  
3 pc red Thai chili  
1 stalk green onion  
3 leaf cabbage  
2 tbsp oil  

Other ingredients:
2 tbsp chili sauce  
1 tbsp oyster sauce  
1.5 tsp gochugaru / chili powder  
2 pc misua  
600 ml water  
½ tsp sugar  
¼ tsp salt  
2 tsp chicken powder  

Steps:
1. Mince the garlic. slice the shallot, cabbage, and green onion. Chop the Thai chili.
2. Heat the oil. Sauté the garlic over medium-low heat until fragrant and browned. Set aside some of it.
3. Add shallot and Thai chili. Stir fry until fragrant, then add the chicken, oyster sauce, chili sauce, chili powder, and chicken powder. Stir fry until cooked.
4. Add the cabbage and green onions. Cook briefly, then add water. Bring to a boil.
5. Add misua. Cook until soft, then add salt and sugar. Stir well.
6. Spicy Chicken Misua is ready to serve.

Two-Egg Spinach Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Add-ons:
Steamed rice

Title: 7 Menit! Resep MIE SIRAM AYAM Ala Resto
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LciwSdykQBs

Saucy Chicken Noodles Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Sauce ingredients:
5 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
1 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp cornstarch
400 ml water
1 pc egg (optional)
2 tsp sugar
1 tsp chicken powder

Marinade ingredients:
150 g chicken thigh fillet
1 tsp cornstarch
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper

Toppings:
30 g boiled chicken liver
3 pc beef meatballs

Other ingredients:
1 pc green onion
½ pc onion
Choy sum
1 tsp sesame oil
2-3 portion dried noodles

Condiment:
Sliced Thai chili + soy sauce

Steps:
1. Boil the noodles until cooked. Drain, then add a little oil and mix well.
2. Roughly chop the garlic and shallot. Slice the onion, green onions, and choy sum.
3. Slice the chicken fillet, then marinate with salt, sugar, pepper, and cornstarch. Mix well.
4. Slice the beef meatballs and chicken liver.
5. Stir-fry the shallot and garlic until fragrant. Add chicken and stir-fry until cooked.
6. Add chicken liver, meatballs, onion, and green onions. Cook briefly until fragrant.
7. Add water, oyster sauce, soy sauce, sugar, and chicken powder. Dissolve cornstarch with water, then add to the stir-fry.
8. Add choy sum. Stir, then slowly add beaten egg and stir briefly.
9. Add sesame oil, mix well.
10. Prepare a pan. Add the noodles and a little sesame oil. Cook until lightly browned.
11. Saucy Chicken Noodles are ready to serve.

Title: Satu Bumbu Untuk Berbagai Masakan! Resep NASI GORENG SOLARIA
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZLUhLlrkI2c

Solaria Fried Rice Recipe (yied 2 servings)

Spices:
75 g garlic
60 g shallot
7 pc peeled shrimp
3 pc green onion (white part)

Other ingredients:
4 tbsp oyster sauce
3 tbsp fish sauce
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp sesame oil
1 tbsp margarine
¾ tsp pepper
100 ml oil

Fried Rice ingredients:
400 g white rice
2 pc egg
4 pc red Thai chili
1 pc red chili
2 pc fish ball
2 pc green onion (green part)
50 g chicken thigh fillet (marinated with 1/8 tsp salt + 1/8 tsp pepper + ½ tsp cornstarch)
2 tbsp oil
2-3 tbsp spice mix
½ tsp sugar
½ tsp MSG
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce

Add-ons:
Pickled cucumber

Steps:
1. Add garlic, shallots, white part of green onion, and shrimp in a blender. Blend until smooth.
2. Heat oil. Add the spice paste. Stir, then add pepper. Sauté on medium-low heat until fragrant.
3. Add oyster sauce, fish sauce, soy sauce, and sesame oil. Sauté briefly, then add margarine. Mix well.
4. Put the spice mix in a heatproof jar or other sealed container.
5. Slice the red chili, Thai chili, remaining green onion, fish balls, and chicken.
6. Marinate the chicken with salt, pepper, and cornstarch. Mix well.
7. Heat a little oil. Add eggs and sauté briefly, then add chicken and fish balls. Sauté until cooked.
8. Add rice, red chili, green onion, spice mix, sugar, MSG, and sweet soy sauce. Cook briefly.
9. Fried Rice is ready to serve.

Title: Resep TAHU OSENG SAUS PADANG: Kenyal, Pedas & Gurih!

Tofu in Padang Sauce Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
300 g white silk tofu

Spices:
3 clove garlic
3 pc shallot
2 pc red chili, boiled
2 tbsp oil

Other ingredients:
½ pc onion
3 pc lime leaf
4 pc red Thai chili
1 pc green onion
1 pc red chili

Sauce ingredients:
1 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp ketchup
1 tbsp chili sauce
½ tbsp fish sauce / soy sauce
2 tsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp margarine
½ tsp sugar

Add-ons:
Rice

Steps:

Title: Tanpa Oven! Resep CHOCOLATE GRANOLA OAT
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0IdAdgHZBYA

Chocolate Granola Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Ingredients:
200 g rolled oat
50 g sliced almond
50 g cashew
50 g mixed seeds
100 g palm sugar
80 g unsalted butter, melted
30 g cocoa powder
3 tbsp milk powder
½ tsp salt
1 tsp vanilla extract

Steps:
1. Chop the cashew. In a pan, add rolled oats, cashew, almonds, and mixed seeds. Toast until lightly browned and set aside.
2. Into the pan, add palm sugar. Cook briefly, then add melted butter. Cook until the sugar is fully melted.
3. Add the toasted granola and mix well.
4. Add salt, vanilla extract, cocoa powder, and milk powder. Cook on low heat for 2-3 minutes.
5. Chocolate Granola is ready to serve.

Title: Komplit Khas Siantar! Resep MIE KERITING HALAL Pakai Ayam
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XCkpGFnUt60

Halal Siantar Curly Noodles Recipe (yield 6-8 servings)

Understood. Here’s the formatted text without bold or bullet points:

Sweet Soy Chicken ingredients:
250 g chicken breast fillet
250 g chicken thigh fillet
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp mushroom bouillon
¼ tsp pepper

Chicken Oil ingredients:
250 g chicken skin
100 ml water
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
50 ml oil

Spices:
7 pc shallot
10 clove garlic
2 cm ginger
50 ml water

Others:
1 liter water
3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
3 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tsp five-spice powder
1 tbsp sugar
8 pc boiled egg

Char Siu Chicken ingredients:
350 g chicken thigh fillet
65 g char siu sauce (Chinese Barbeque Sauce)
3 drop red food coloring (optional)

Pickled Chili ingredients:
23 pc green Thai chili
6 pc red curly chili
1 tbsp vinegar
3 tbsp sugar
½ tsp salt
150 ml water

Add-ons:
Beansprout, blanched
Fried shallots
Green onion, sliced
Curly noodles

Steps:
1. Marinate chicken thigh fillet with char siu sauce and red food coloring. Mix well and let sit for 2 hours at room temperature or overnight in the fridge.
2. Slice red curly chili and green Thai chili. Set aside in a bowl.
3. In a pan, add water, vinegar, sugar, and salt. Bring to a boil, then pour over the sliced chilies. Mix well.
4. Cut chicken into small cubes and marinate with soy sauce, mushroom bouillon, and pepper. Mix well and let sit briefly.
5. Slice garlic and shallots, then blend them with ginger and water until smooth.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Renyah, Kenyal, Anti Lepas! Resep TAHU ACI Khas Tegal
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OccHxtj_I3M

Starchy Tofu Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Spices:
5 clove garlic
2 pc shallot
2 tsp coriander
150 ml water

Other ingredients:
230 g tapioca starch
2 tbsp all-purpose flour
30 g chive
60 g white tofu
½ tbsp salt
½ tbsp beef powder
½ tsp MSG
½ tsp pepper
8 pc white tofu

Sweet Soy Sambal ingredients:
3 pc red Thai chili
1 clove garlic
1 tbsp palm sugar
3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp MSG

Condiment:
Green Thai chili

Steps:
1. Cut the tofu into four triangular pieces.
2. Blend garlic, shallot, coriander, and water until smooth.
3. In a bowl, mix tofu, tapioca starch, and flour. Mash the tofu while stirring until well combined.
4. Add salt, MSG, beef powder, pepper, and blended spices. Mix well.
5. Slice the chives and place them next to the dough.
6. Place the dough on the side and bottom of the tofu, then dust with tapioca.
7. Fry the tofu over medium-low heat until it expands, then reduce the heat and cook until golden brown.
8. For the sambal, in a stone bowl, mix red Thai chili, garlic, salt, MSG, and palm sugar. Mash until smooth, then combine with sweet soy sauce and mix well.
9. Starchy Tofu is ready to serve.

Title: Lembut Nyoklat! Resep BROWNIES BATIK KUKUS
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mSRY5btFCTI

Steamed Batik Brownies Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Batik Layer ingredients:
1 pc egg
40 g sugar
½ tsp SP
40 g all-purpose flour
1/8 tsp salt

Color 1:
4 drop yellow food coloring
4 drop brown food coloring
1 drop black food coloring

Color 2:
4 drop black food coloring
6 drop brown food coloring

Brownies ingredients:
3 pc egg
100 g sugar
1 tsp SP
1 tsp vanilla extract
90 g unsalted butter
60 g dark chocolate compound
40 g sweetened condensed milk (chocolate flavor)
20 g cocoa powder
65 g all-purpose flour
½ tsp salt
1 tsp baking powder

Steps:
1. For the Batik layer, mix the egg, sugar, SP, salt, and all-purpose flour. Whisk until pale and fluffy.
2. Divide into 3 portions. One portion has no color. For the first color, add yellow, brown, and black food coloring. For the second color, add brown and black food coloring. Mix each color well.
3. Transfer each color into a piping bag.
4. Prepare a Batik pattern that has been printed. Adjust it to the size of the pan, then grease the baking paper with oil and place the Batik pattern on it.
5. Pipe the dark color to outline the Batik pattern, then fill with the white color and fill the edges of the Batik pattern with yellowish-brown color.
6. Steam for 1 minute, then trim the batter that’s stuck to the edges of the pan. Place it back into the pan.
7. Melt the butter with dark chocolate. Mix well, then add sweetened condensed milk (chocolate flavor) and mix well.
8. In a bowl, add eggs, sugar, salt, and SP. Whisk until pale and fluffy.
9. Add the chocolate mixture and vanilla extract. Whisk until well-combined, then sift in all-purpose flour, cocoa powder, and baking powder. Mix well. Pour into the pan. Steam for 25-30 minutes.
10. Steamed Batik Brownies are ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OqWK30797gg

Garlic Green Beans Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
350 g baby green bean
12 clove garlic

Sauce ingredients:
2 tsp oyster sauce
2 tsp cornstarch
80 ml water
½ tsp chicken bouillon
¼ tsp MSG
½ tbsp sugar
1 tbsp cooking wine
¼ tsp salt
1/8 tsp pepper

Steps:
1. Heat oil. Fry the green beans for 1-2 minutes. Drain and soak in cold water.
2. Mix water, chicken bouillon, oyster sauce, sugar, MSG, and cornstarch. Mix well then add salt and pepper. Stir.
3. Chop the garlic using a food processor.
4. Heat oil. Fry some of the garlic over medium low heat until yellowed. Strain.
5. Sauté the remaining garlic until fragrant. Add cooking wine, stir.
6. Add the sauce mixture. Cook for a moment until thickened, then add the green beans. Cook for a moment.
7. Transfer to a serving plate, then sprinkle with fried garlic.
8. Garlic Green Beans are ready to serve.

URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1XKRmjvbYwM

Spicy Mushroom Stir-Fry with Lemon Basil Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Ingredients:
400 g oyster mushroom
1 tsp salt

Other ingredients:
½ tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tsp coriander powder
½ tsp turmeric powder
3 tbsp all-purpose flour

Spices:
5 pc shallot
3 clove garlic
3 pc red chili, boiled
1 tbsp water
2 tbsp oil

Other ingredients:
1 pc green onion
3 pc lime leaf
5 pc red Thai chili
12 g lemon basil
75 ml water
½ tsp chicken bouillon
2 tsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper

Add-on:
Rice

Steps:
1. Shred the mushrooms, then season with salt. Mix well. Leave it for a few moments, then squeeze.
2. Transfer to a bowl, then add mushroom bouillon, turmeric powder, coriander powder, and flour. Mix well.
3. Heat the oil, then fry the mushrooms until golden brown. Set aside.
4. Blend the garlic, shallots, red chili, oil, and water in a blender until smooth.
5. Slice red Thai chili and green onions.
6. Sauté the spice paste until fragrant and oily, then add the lime leaves and red Thai chili. Stir-fry until fragrant.
7. Add water, chicken bouillon, sugar, and pepper. Stir well.
8. Add the green onions and mushrooms. Stir fry for a moment, then add lemon basil. Stir well.
9. Spicy Mushroom Stir-Fry with Lemon Basil is ready to serve.

Beef Chips Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
15 g galangal
23 g garlic
25 g shallot
6 g coriander
2 pc egg

Other ingredients:
375 g sliced beef
½ tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1½ tbsp palm sugar
4 g baking powder
1 tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
1/8 tsp pepper

Coating:
Sago flour

Steps:
1. Slice the galangal. Into a blender, add the garlic, shallots, galangal, coriander, salt, palm sugar, mushroom bouillon, baking powder, and Worcestershire sauce. Blend until smooth.
2. Arrange the frozen meat on a tray, then pour in the marinade. Spread evenly. Leave in the refrigerator overnight or at room temperature for 2 hours.
3. Coat the slices in sago flour, then set them aside on a rack.
4. Fry over medium heat until half crisp, then reduce the heat to low and cook until golden brown. Remove and drain.
5. Beef Chips are ready to serve.

Title: 100% Renyah Tahan Lama! Resep BISTIK JADOEL SAUS MENTEGA
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PAOtxlN4vJg

Old-Fashioned Beef Steak Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
350 g beef fillet
½ tsp salt
½ tsp chicken bouillon
2 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
½ tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp egg white
2 tbsp water
2 tbsp tapioca flour
¾ tsp baking powder

Sauce ingredients:
5 clove garlic, pounded
1 pc onion, sliced
2 tbsp margarine
½ tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp ketchup
3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1/8 tsp pepper
½ tbsp sugar
2 pc bay leaf
200 ml water

Coating ingredients:
Egg
Tapioca flour

Potato Chips ingredients:
3 pc potato
2 tbsp rice vinegar
2 liter water
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp mushroom bouillon
½ tsp powdered sugar

Add-ons:
Carrots, boiled
Green beans, boiled
Steamed rice

Steps:
1. Slice the beef thinly, then marinate with salt, chicken bouillon, sugar, pepper, soy sauce, egg white, water, and tapioca flour. Mix well and add baking powder, stir until combined. Let it sit for 15 minutes.
2. Thinly slice the potatoes, then wash and soak in water and rice vinegar. Mix well and drain.
3. Heat oil. Fry the potatoes until golden brown. Drain, then sprinkle with salt, mushroom bouillon, and powdered sugar. Mix well.
4. Heat the pan. Add margarine, garlic, onion, and bay leaves. Sauté until fragrant.
5. Add Worcestershire sauce, soy sauce, oyster sauce, sweet soy sauce, ketchup, and water. Bring to a boil.
6. Add sugar and pepper. Mix well, then add the cornstarch slurry. Cook briefly until thickened.
7. Dip the beef in egg, then coat with tapioca flour evenly.
8. Heat oil. Fry the beef over high heat until half-cooked. Drain, then fry again until golden brown. Drain.
9. Old-Fashioned Beef Steak is ready to serve.

Title: Bikin Nagih! Resep TUMIS ATI AMPELA CABE IJO
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-gJcDrvMocU

Liver & Gizzard with Green Chili Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g chicken liver and gizzard
2 pc bay leaf
40 g ginger, sliced and pounded
1 tbsp salt
1½ liter water

Spices:
6 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
4 pc candlenut, toasted
20 pc green Thai chili
4 cm turmeric
5 cm aromatic ginger
60 ml oil

Other ingredients:
8 pc green chili, sliced large
10 pc red Thai chili, sliced
6 pc shallot, sliced
5 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 pc bay leaf
4 cm galangal
20 g palm sugar
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
250 ml water
1 tsp salt
2 tsp mushroom bouillon

Add-ons:
Rice
Crackers

Steps:
1. Bring water to a boil. Add chicken liver and gizzard, ginger, bay leaves, and salt. Boil for 15 minutes, then drain.
2. Add garlic, shallots, candlenuts, green Thai chili, turmeric, aromatic ginger, and oil into a blender. Blend until smooth.
3. Slice the shallots and pound the galangal.
4. Heat a little oil. Sauté the shallots, galangal, bay leaves, and kaffir lime leaves until fragrant, then add the blended spices. Sauté until fragrant and oily.
5. Cut chicken liver and gizzard into pieces, then add to the pan. Cook briefly.
6. Add green chili, salt, mushroom bouillon, palm sugar, pepper, sweet soy sauce, and water. Cook until reduced.
7. Add red Thai chili. Stir-fry briefly.
8. Liver & Gizzard with Green Chili is ready to be served.

Green Chili Sambal Recipe (yield 10 servings)

20 g green Thai chili
1 L water

1 tsp salt
10 pc shallot
7 clove garlic
150 ml oil

Other ingredients:

Add-ons:
Rice
Cucumber

Title: Takjil Lembut Seger! Resep Es Teler Cake Dessert Box [Ide Jualan]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y5TZvqppzG8

Es Teler Cake Dessert Box Recipe (yield 4 boxes)

Chiffon Cake ingredients:
6 pc egg yolk
65 ml oil
100 ml pandan juice
30 ml Kara coconut milk
½ tsp salt
130 g cake flour
6 g baking powder
½ tsp pandan paste
6 pc egg white
100 g sugar
½ tsp cream of tartar / 1 tsp lemon juice

Coconut Cream ingredients:
300 ml whipping cream
100 ml Kara coconut milk
50 g condensed milk
¼ tsp salt

Avocado Cream ingredients:
350 g avocado
60 g condensed milk

Toppings:
Jackfruit, diced
Coconut, sliced lengthwise

Steps:
1. In a bowl, mix egg yolks, pandan juice, oil, coconut milk, and salt. Sift in flour and baking powder. Stir with a balloon whisk.
2. Add pandan paste, mix well.
3. In another bowl, combine egg whites, sugar, and cream of tartar. Beat with a mixer until the birdbeak stage.
4. Gradually fold the egg white mixture into the egg yolk mixture. Mix gently.
5. Pour into a baking pan lined with baking paper. Tap the pan and bake at 150°C for 30 minutes.
6. Blend avocado and condensed milk until smooth, then transfer to a piping bag.
7. In a bowl, mix whipping cream, coconut milk, and salt. Mix until it sets, then add condensed milk. Mix briefly until combined.
8. Transfer the Coconut Cream to a piping bag and refrigerate.
9. Cut the cake into pieces according to the size of the dessert box to be used.
10. Layer the Chiffon Cake, Coconut Cream, jackfruit, coconut, Coconut Cream, Avocado Cream, Chiffon Cake, Coconut Cream, Avocado Cream, Coconut Cream, jackfruit, and coconut. Chill in the refrigerator before serving.
11. Es Teler Cake Dessert Box is ready to be served.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: 100% Sukses Lembut! Resep MARMER CAKE [Cocok Untuk Pemula]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FJ1jtJZ0e-E

Marble Cake Recipe (yield 16 servings)

Ingredients A:
100 g Anchor Unsalted Butter (room temperature)
100 g Anchor Tinned Salted Butter
100 g icing sugar

Ingredients B:
6 pc egg yolk
2 pc whole egg
45 g oil
165 g cake flour
15 g powdered milk
4 g baking powder
½ tsp SP (emulsifier)
½ tsp salt
130 g sugar
2 tsp vanilla extract

Ingredients C (for chocolate batter):
15 g cocoa powder
15 g chocolate paste
40 g warm water

Topping:
50 g Anchor Cheddar Cheese

Steps:
1. Mix cocoa powder with warm water and chocolate paste. Stir until smooth.
2. Cut the cheddar cheese into small cubes.
3. In a bowl, combine unsalted butter, tinned butter, and icing sugar. Whip until pale and fluffy.
4. In another bowl, mix egg yolks, whole eggs, oil, vanilla extract, SP, sugar, and salt. Sift in flour, powdered milk, and baking powder. Mix until fluffy and the sugar is dissolved.
5. Gradually add the butter mixture into the egg mixture while stirring. Set aside 1/5 of the batter and mix it with the chocolate mixture. Stir until smooth.
6. Pour some of the white batter into a buttered and floured baking pan.
7. Add the chocolate batter and the remaining white batter. Swirl the batter gently with a fork.
8. Add the cheese cubes and mix lightly. Bake at 175°C for 50-60 minutes.
9. Remove from the oven, cool, and remove from the pan.
10. Marble Cake is ready to serve.

Mock Coconut Ice Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Jelly ingredients:
1 pack plain jelly powder
1 pack plain agar powder
½ tsp salt
600 ml instant coconut milk
300 ml coconut water

Pandan Syrup ingredients:
2 pc pandan leaf
150 g sugar
150 ml water

Add-ons:
Evaporated milk
Ice cubes
Cocopandan syrup
Coconut jelly
Basil seeds

Steps:
1. In a saucepan, combine jelly powder, agar powder, salt, instant coconut milk, and coconut water. Mix well. Turn on the heat and cook until boiling while stirring.
2. Pour into molds. Allow to cool until set.
3. In a saucepan, combine sugar, water, and pandan leaves. Bring to a boil.
4. Scoop out the coconut jelly using a coconut shaver or a spoon.
5. Prepare glasses. Layer with ice cubes, 2-3 tbsp of cocopandan syrup, coconut jelly, basil seeds, ice cubes, 2-3 tbsp of Pandan Syrup, coconut jelly, and evaporated milk.
6. Mock Coconut Ice is ready to serve.

Title: Gurih Wangi! Resep AYAM LADO IJO (CABE IJO) KHAS PADANG Ala Devina Hermawan
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GbBLOvJGmpk

Green Sambal Chicken Recipe (yield 10 servings)

Marinating ingredients:
1 kg whole chicken
6 clove garlic, optional
1 tsp lime juice
2 tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom stock powder
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp pepper

Sambal ingredients:
100 g curly green chili
150 g green chili
35 g green Thai chili
1 L water
1 tsp baking soda
1 tsp salt
10 pc shallot
10 clove garlic
70 ml oil

Sliced ingredient:
6 pc shallot
1-2 pc green tomato

Aromatics:
1 pc bay leaf
1 stalk lemongrass
5 cm galangal
8 pc kaffir lime leaf

Other ingredients:
1 tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom broth
½ tbsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
100 ml water

Add-ons:
Rice
Cucumber

Steps:
1. Cut the chicken into 10 pieces. Marinate with grated garlic, lime juice, salt, pepper, mushroom powder, and sugar. Mix well. Marinate for 15-30 minutes.
2. Bring water to a boil. Add curly green chili, green chili, green Thai chili, baking soda, and salt. Cook for 5 minutes, then in the last 2 minutes add shallots and garlic.
3. Crush the boiled chilies with a mortar and pestle until slightly coarse.
4. Bruise the galangal and lemongrass. Slice the shallots and green tomatoes.
5. Heat oil. Sauté the shallots until fragrant and halfway cooked, then add lemongrass, galangal, bay leaf, kaffir lime leaf. Sauté briefly until fragrant.
6. Add the chicken. Sauté until lightly browned, then add water. Cook until reduced.
7. Add the Green Sambal, green tomatoes, salt, mushroom powder, sugar, and pepper. Cook briefly.
8. Green Sambal Chicken is ready to be served.

Title: Empuk Meresap! Resep AYAM BAKAR BUMBU PADANG
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gxDiGClUmBE

Padang Roasted Chicken Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
1 pc chicken (850-900 g)
2 tsp salt
½ tsp pepper
½ pc lime

Spices:
5 pc shallot
4 clove garlic
3 pc candlenut
5 cm turmeric
3 pc red chili
5 cm galangal
15 pc green Thai chili
100 ml cooking oil
60 ml water

Other ingredients:
1 tbsp Minang curry powder
1 pc pandan leaf
1 stalk lemongrass
1 pc bay leaf
½ pc turmeric leaf
2 pc kaffir lime leaf
500 ml water
1 tsp mushroom stock powder
1 tsp chicken powder
⅛ tsp pepper
2 tsp sugar
4 tbsp Krim Kafe

Add-ons:
Steamed rice
Cucumber
Green Chili Sambal

Steps:
1. Cut chicken into pieces. Slash the joints and thick parts.
2. Marinate the chicken with salt, pepper, and lime juice. Mix well. Marinate for 15-30 minutes.
3. Blend shallots, garlic, candlenuts, galangal, turmeric, red chili, green Thai chil, oil, and water until smooth.
4. Sauté the paste until fragrant and oily, then add bay leaf, lemongrass, pandan leaf, kaffir lime leaf, turmeric leaf, and Minang curry powder. Sauté until fragrant.
5. Add chicken, water, mushroom powder, chicken powder, pepper, sugar, and Krim Kafe. Cook over low heat until the liquid reduces.
6. Preheat the grill. Roast the chicken until browned on all sides.
7. Padang Roasted Chicken is ready to serve.

URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lEWfHQm-dJQ

Poffertjes Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Ingredients:
300 ml milk
35 g melted margarine
2 pc egg
50 g granulated sugar
200 g all-purpose flour
20 g cornstarch
½ tsp salt
½ tsp instant yeast
½ tsp baking powder
Pandan essence, optional

Add-ons:
Icing sugar
Nutella

Nutella Hot Latte ingredients:
50 ml espresso
200 ml milk
1 tbsp palm sugar syrup
½ tbsp condensed milk
Nutella
Milk foam, optional

Steps:
1. In a bowl, mix flour, cornstarch, sugar, salt, baking powder, yeast, eggs, milk, and melted margarine until smooth and lump-free.
2. Let the batter rest for 1 hour, then divide it into two portions. Add pandan flavoring to one portion, mix well.
3. Heat the pan and grease it with butter.
4. Pour a small amount of batter into the pan. Cook over medium heat until lightly browned on all sides. Repeat until the batter is finished.
5. Arrange on a serving plate, then dust with icing sugar and Nutella.
6. For Nutella Hot Latte, prepare a glass and pipe Nutella around the edges.
7. Mix espresso, palm sugar syrup, and condensed milk. Pour into the glass, then add milk and milk foam on top.
8. Poffertjes and Nutella Hot Latte are ready to serve.

Others:

Title: 100% Empuk Kenyal! Resep CUMI SAUS TIRAM Ala Resto
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=N-ub5Pp5aK8

Squid in Oyster Sauce Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Marinating ingredients:
500 g squid
1 tsp baking powder
1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp cornstarch

Sauce ingredients:
3 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp fish sauce
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp chicken powder
2 tbsp cornstarch
300 ml water
1 tsp sesame oil

Other ingredients:
½ pc onion, small
5 pc shallots
5 clove garlic
2 pc red chili
1 pc green onion
4 cm ginger
1 tbsp margarine

Steps:
1. Cut the squid into pieces, halve the head and remove the eyes.
2. Marinate with salt, pepper, Worcestershire sauce, baking powder, and cornstarch. Mix well. Let it sit for at least 15 minutes.
3. Chop the garlic and shallots. Slice the onion into thick pieces. Slice the red chili diagonally. Slice the green onions and ginger.
4. Mix water, oyster sauce, Worcestershire sauce, fish sauce, sweet soy sauce, chicken powder, sugar, and cornstarch. Mix well.
5. Heat the oil. Fry the squid briefly. Remove and set aside some of the oil.
6. Sauté garlic, shallots, and ginger until fragrant, then add margarine. Cook briefly.
7. Add onion and red chili. Sauté until fragrant.
8. Add the sauce mixture. Bring to a boil, then add the squid, green onions, and sesame oil. Stir well.
9. Squid in Oyster Sauce is ready to be served.

Title: Diet Tetap Praktis & Gurih! Resep DAGING GULUNG SAWI
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yNOqv_TqcPg

Cabbage Beef Rolls Recipe (yield 10 pcs)

Ingredients:
150 g ground beef
½ tsp AJI-NO-MOTO®
1 tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp water
2 tsp ginger juice
1 pc egg white
1 tbsp Saori® Oyster Sauce
2 clove garlic, minced
35 g carrot
50 g glass noodles
60 g wood ear mushroom
2 tbsp cornstarch
1 pc green onion
2 tbsp hot oil

Others:
500 ml water
2 tbsp cornstarch
3 tbsp Saori® Oyster Sauce
2 tsp Masako® Rasa Gurih Pas
2 tsp sugar
16 pc green Thai chili
6 clove garlic

Add-on:
Rice

Steps:
1. Trim the thick cabbage stem, then steam for 2 minutes. Set aside.
2. Small dice the carrot. Slice the wood ear mushroom, cut up the glass noodles. Slice the green onions and mix it with hot oil.
3. In a bowl, combine the beef with water, ginger juice, salt, sugar, pepper, AJI-NO-MOTO®, and Saori® Oyster Sauce. Mix until sticky.
4. Add minced garlic, green onions, egg white, cornstarch, carrot, wood ear mushroom, and glass noodles. Mix well.
5. Spread the cabbage. Add 2 tbsp of meat, then roll. Steam for 10 minutes.
6. For the Sauce, heat some oil. Sauté the minced garlic until fragrant.
7. Add water, Saori® Oyster Sauce, Masako® Rasa Gurih Pas, sugar, and cornstarch mixture while stirring.
8. Add sliced Thai chili. Cook for a moment.
9. Cabbage Beef Rolls are ready to serve.

Title: Gurih Kenyal! Resep PEMPEK ADAAN Khas Palembang [Lengkap Dengan Cuko]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P1v2Tbza8_A

Pempek Adaan Recipe (yield 50-60 pcs)

Dough ingredients:
1 kg ground Spanish Mackerel
500 g shaved ice / cold water
4 tbsp salt
5 tbsp sugar
4 tbsp mushroom stock powder / MSG
6 clove garlic, blended smoothly
2 pc egg
800 g sago flour
100 g shallot, roughly chopped
4 pc green onion, sliced
50 ml hot oil
150 ml coconut milk

Cuko ingredients:
500 g batok palm sugar
60 g green Thai chili
12 clove garlic
2 tbsp dried shrimp, soaked in warm water
2 tbsp vinegar
30 g tamarind, soaked in warm water
2 tsp salt
2 tbsp sugar
750 ml water

Steps:
1. For Cuko, combine water, palm sugar, and tamarind. Bring to a boil.
2. Blend the dried shrimp, green Thai chili, garlic, and a little water until smooth.
3. Sift the Cuko, then add the blended spices into the Cuko. Add salt, sugar, and vinegar. Bring to a boil.
4. Pour hot oil onto the green onions. Mix well.
5. For the dough, add the ground fish, salt, mushroom powder, and sugar into the mixer. Mix until sticky.
6. Add shaved ice and mix until the dough comes together. Then, add garlic, egg white, and sago flour. Mix well.
7. Add shallots, green onions, and coconut milk. Mix well.
8. Shape the dough into balls with an ice cream scoop dipped into oil. Fry until golden brown on medium heat. Set aside.
9. For a crispier texture, slice the cooked Pempek and fry them again until crispy.
10. Pempek is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Kenyal Tidak Mudah Hancur! Resep SAMBAL KRECEK [Favorit Keluarga]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RC7TounBudQ

Sambal Krecek Recipe (yield 11 servings)

Spices:
6 clove garlic
8 pc shallot
3 pc candlenut
8 pc red chili, boiled
½ tsp shrimp paste, optional
60 ml oil
50 ml water 

Others:
2 pc bay leaf
1 pc lemongrass, pounded
25 pc red Thai chili
30 pc green Thai chili
100 g tempeh
300 g krecek
50 g tolo nut
100 ml coconut milk
800 ml water
1 tbsp salt
2 tsp MSG
2 tbsp white sugar
1 tbsp palm sugar

Add-ons:
Rice

Steps:
1. Blend shallots, garlic, candlenuts, shrimp paste, red chili, oil, and water until smooth.
2. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant and oily. Add lemongrass and bay leaf. Cook until fragrant.
3. Add water and coconut milk. Slice the tempeh and some of the red Thai chili.
4. Add tolo nuts, tempeh, red Thai chili, salt, MSG, white sugar, palm sugar. Cook for about 10 minutes.
5. Add krecek, whole red and green Thai chili. Cook on low for 30 minutes or until cooked. Add water if needed.
6. Sambal Krecek is ready to serve.

Title: 100% Sukses! Resep SAPO TAHU SEAFOOD Ala Resto
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xspQpVPlpGs

Seafood Claypot Tofu Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients to marinate:
100 g peeled shrimp, tail intact
115 g squid, peeled
185 g gourami fillet
¾ tsp baking powder
3 tbsp egg white
1.5 tsp cornstarch
½ tsp salt
½ tsp white pepper

Add-ons:
1 pc carrot
4 pc Champignon mushroom
½ pc broccoli
240 g egg tofu tube

Others:
5 clove garlic
½ pc onion
15 g ginger
2 pc green onion
500 ml water
2 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp sugar
1 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp sesame oil
3-4 tbsp cornstarch
3 tbsp water to mix the cornstarch

Steps:
1. Slice the gourami fillet. Slit the back of the shrimp. Slice and score the squid. Place everything in a bowl.
2. Marinate with egg white, cornstarch, baking powder, pepper, and salt. Mix well.
3. Slice the egg tofu, then fry for a moment. Set aside.
4. In the same pan, fry the fish shortly. Set aside. Fry the shrimp and squid for 20-30 seconds. Set aside.
5. Set aside the oil. Leave some to stir-fry the garlic, ginger, and the white part of green onions until fragrant.
6. Add mushroom, onion, water, oyster sauce, soy sauce, sugar, and chicken powder. Stir well.
7. Dilute the cornstarch in water, then add to the sauce. Cook until it thickens.
8. Add broccoli, carrot, egg tofu, fish, shrimp, squid, and sesame oil. Mix well, then Seafood Claypot Tofu is ready to serve.

Title: Ide Jualan Homemade! Resep KAKI NAGA SAYUR
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4HUC0Nr-5DA

Vegetable Nugget Drumsticks Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Bahan:
200 g chicken thigh fillet
20 g spinach
½ tbsp sugar
½ tsp salt
½ tsp pepper
¾ tsp AJI-NO-MOTO®
1 tbsp fried garlic
4 tbsp breadcrumbs
1 pc egg

Coating:
Breadcrumbs
Flour
Egg

Condiment:
Chili sauce / mayonnaise

Steps:
1. Into a food processor, add chicken, spinach, sugar, salt, pepper, AJI-NO-MOTO®, and fried garlic. Blend until smooth.
2. Add breadcrumbs and egg. Blend well. Divide the dough into 8 parts. Scoop with a spoon, then coat with flour.
3. Stick the ice cream stick through the dough. Flatten it a little bit, then coat with egg and breadcrumbs.
4. Heat the oil. Fry on medium heat until golden brown.
5. Vegetable Nugget Drumsticks are ready to serve.
