Title: Resep GOHYONG VIRAL CIKINI: Lengkap Dengan Kuah Sausnya
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=87xN4duZin0

Cikini Gohyong Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Skin ingredients:
80 g all-purpose flour
40 g cornstarch
280 ml water
1 pc egg
2 tbsp oil
¾ tsp salt

Stuffing ingredients:
500 g raw chicken thigh fillet, with skin, boiled
250 g beef meatball
130 g tapioca flour
40 g all-purpose flour
2 pc egg
1 pc green onion, sliced
5 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
1 tsp baking powder
2 tsp salt
2 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp MSG
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
1 tbsp water, if needed

Sauce ingredients:
4 tbsp ketchup
2 tbsp soy sauce
1.5 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
40 g palm sugar
2 tsp MSG
4 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
1 tbsp margarine
1.5 tsp five-spice powder
800 ml chicken stock

Add-ons:
Green Thai chili, sliced

Steps:
1. For the skin, combine flour, cornstarch, egg, oil, and water. Mix well, then add salt and mix again.
2. Heat the pan. Pour a little of the batter and spread evenly. Cook until it’s dry. Repeat until the batter is finished.
3. Halve the garlic and shallots.
4. Heat the pan. Add margarine, garlic, and shallots. Sauté until fragrant.
5. Add oyster sauce, ketchup, soy sauce, Worcestershire sauce, palm sugar, five-spice powder, water, and MSG. Bring to a boil.
6. For the stuffing, blend the garlic and shallots in the food processor. Add chicken and blend again. Set aside in a bowl.
7. Add meatballs into the food processor. Blend for a moment, then place in the bowl.
8. Add tapioca flour, flour, salt, pepper, chicken powder, sugar, baking powder, and MSG. Mix well, then add eggs and green onions. Mix well again.
9. Prepare the skin. Divide the stuffing into two parts, then place it on the skin and roll.
10. Slice the Gohyong, then fry for 7 minutes or until cooked. Set aside.
11. Gohyong is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: 100% Sukses! Resep PENTOL AYAM KRIWIL: Kenyal & Gurih
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eFXjQYMSa6A

Curly Chicken Pentol Recipe (yield 80 pcs)

Ingredients:
500 g ground chicken thigh
1 tbsp beef powder
½ tbsp salt
½ tsp MSG
4 tsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
1 pc egg white
1 tbsp minced garlic
2 tbsp fried shallots
100 ml cold water
200 g tapioca flour
40 g all-purpose flour

Filling:
Cheddar, cubed
Red Thai chili, sliced

Sauce ingredients:
3 tbsp ketchup
3 tbsp chili sauce
1 sdm minced garlic
100 ml water
2 tsp flour

Steps:
1. Season the chicken with salt, beef powder, sugar, pepper, and MSG. Stir until sticky.
2. Add cold water, egg white, fried shallots, and garlic. Mix well, then add tapioca flour and flour. Mix well.
3. Bring water to a simmer, then lower the heat. To stuff the dough, spread some dough on the bowl wall. Place the cheese or chili on it, then shape into a bowl.
4. Boil the dough, then steam it for 10 minutes.
5. For the sauce, combine water with flour. Stir well, then add garlic, chili sauce, and ketchup. Cook for a moment until it boils.
6. Curly Chicken Pentol is ready to serve.

Title: 100% Renyah Tanpa Cetakan! Resep LIDAH KUCING
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wUP6rRoHabE

Cat’s Tongue Cookies Recipe (yield 100 pcs)

Ingredients:
75 g Anchor Unsalted Butter (room temperature)
75 g Anchor Tinned Salted Butter
90 g icing sugar
½ tsp salt
1 tsp vanilla essence
1 pc egg yolk
15 g milk powder
120 g all-purpose flour
½ tsp baking powder
60 g Anchor Cheddar Cheese
50 g egg white

Steps:
1. Grate the cheese. Set aside.
2. In a bowl, whip the unsalted butter, tinned salted butter, and icing sugar until pale and fluffy.
3. Add egg yolk, salt, and vanilla essence. Mix well.
4. Sift in flour, baking powder, and milk powder. Add grated cheese, mix evenly.
5. Add egg whites. Mix for a moment, then transfer the batter into a piping bag.
6. Prepare baking paper according to the pan’s size. Fold into 4 parts, then fold a 1-cm space on each section.
7. Pipe the batter on the pan, then bake at 130°C for 25 minutes.
8. Cat’s Tongue Cookies are ready to serve.

Title: Gurih Sehat: Resep TELUR TOMAT Praktis!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FJOWJbwGTts

Tomato Omelette Recipe (untuk 2 porsi)

Ingredients:
3 pc egg
½ pc onion
1 pc green onion
1 tbsp cornstarch
1/8 tsp pepper
1/3 tsp salt
1/3 tsp mushroom stock powder / MSG

Others:
2 pc red tomato
2 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
1 tbsp chili sauce, optional
2 tbsp ketchup
½ tbsp soy sauce
½ tbsp oyster sauce
250 ml water
1 tsp sugar
½ tsp mushroom stock powder / MSG

Add-ons:
Enoki mushroom
Green onion
Thai chili, sliced + soy sauce

Steps:
1. Slice the green onions and dice the onion.
2. Combine the eggs, green onions, onion, salt, pepper, and mushroom powder. Mix well, then add cornstarch. Mix again.
3. Slice the garlic, shallots, and tomatoes.
4. Heat some oil. Fry the eggs until cooked. Set it aside.
5. Heat some oil. Sauté the garlic and shallots until fragrant, then add the tomatoes. Stir.
6. Add water, ketchup, soy sauce, oyster sauce, chili sauce, sugar, and mushroom powder. Stir well.
7. Slice the enoki, green onions, and Omelette. Add them into the pan. Cook for a moment.
8. Tomato Omelette is ready to serve.

Title: Satu Jam Jadi! Resep NASI GUDEG KOMPLIT
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iYzso0Jkhks

Nasi Gudeg Recipe (yield 11 servings)

Spices:
20 clove garlic
15 pc shallot
8 pc candlenut, toasted
6 cm galangal, sliced
2 tsp coriander, toasted
1.5 tsp whole white pepper
100 ml water

Areh ingredients:
4 tbsp blended spices
1 pc lemongrass
3 pc bay leaf
500 ml coconut milk
300 ml water
½ tbsp sugar
1 tsp chicken powder
2 tsp salt
1 pc egg white
60 ml water

Boiled Jackfruit ingredients:
1 kg unripe jackfruit
1 tbsp baking soda
2 liter water
1.5 tbsp salt

Gudeg ingredients:
Blended spices
6 pc boiled egg
6 pc white tofu
1 kg chicken drumstick
165 g tempeh
8 pc bay leaf
2 pc lemongrass, pounded
800 ml water
150 g dark palm sugar
50 ml coconut milk
1 tbsp salt
½ tbsp MSG

Add-ons:
Rice
Green Thai chili
Sambal Krecek

Steps:
1. Bring water to a boil. Boil the jackfruit with salt and baking soda for 7 minutes. Set aside.
2. Blend the shallots, garlic, candlenuts, white pepper, and water until smooth.
3. Set aside 4 tbsp of the blended spices to make Areh. Add galangal and coriander into the blender and blend again.
4. For the Gudeg, heat some oil and sauté the blended spices until fragrant and oily.
5. Add bay leaf and lemongrass. Sauté until fragrant, then add water, palm sugar, coconut milk, salt, and MSG. Stir well.
6. Add the jackfruit, chicken, eggs, tofu, and tempeh. Cook on low heat for 1 hour.
7. For the Areh, heat some oil and sauté the blended spices until fragrant.
8. Add bay leaf and lemongrass. Sauté for a moment, then add coconut milk, water, sugar, chicken powder, and salt. Bring to a boil.
9. Mix egg whites with water, then add into the pan slowly. Cook for a moment, then set aside.
10. Set the chicken, tofu, eggs, and tempeh into a bowl. Continue cooking the jackfruit for 5 minutes.
11. Nasi Gudeg is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Satu Bumbu Dua Protein: Resep TUMIS SARDEN & AYAM BUMBU SARDEN
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6HRFqME_MQA

Sardine Stir-Fry Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g canned sardines in tomato sauce

Stir-Fry ingredients:
15 pc shallot
6 clove garlic
1 pc lemongrass, pounded
7 cm ginger
7 cm galangal
4 - 5 pc bay leaf
4 - 5 pc kaffir lime leaf
30 g stinky bean, peeled and halved
1 pc red tomato
2 pc red chili
25 g red Thai chili
25 g green Thai chili
1 pc green onion

Others:
200 ml water
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
2 tsp sugar
1 tsp mushroom stock powder / MSG
½ tbsp sweet soy sauce

Steps:
1. Slice the garlic and half of the shallots. Slice the tomato into large chunks. Slice the red chili, lemongrass, galangal, and ginger.
2. Heat the oil. Add sliced shallots, garlic, bay leaf, lime leaf, lemongrass, ginger, and galangal. Sauté until fragrant and a bit browned.
3. Add stinky beans, tomato, red chili, whole red and green Thai chilis, and whole shallots. Cook for a moment.
4. Add the canned sardines, water, salt, pepper, sugar, and mushroom powder. Cook until the sauce thickens.
5. Add sweet soy sauce and sliced green onions. Cook again for a moment.
6. Sardine Stir-Fry is ready to serve.

Title: Resep SPAGHETTI ORIENTAL: Praktis Gurih Ala Pizza Hut
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Acc-7Stw6jw

Oriental Spaghetti Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Chicken Marinade ingredients:
350 g chicken thigh fillet
3-4 tbsp sauce mix
1/8 tsp pepper

Sauce Mix ingredients:
3 tbsp ketchup
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tbsp oyster sauce
3 clove garlic
2 cm ginger
½ tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
½ tsp five-spice powder
2 tsp chicken powder
1 tbsp sugar

Others:
6 clove garlic
5 pc curly red chili
3 pc red Thai chili
8 pc shallot
1 pc green onion
160 g spaghetti, boiled for 6 minutes
4-5 tbsp water

Steps:
1. In a bowl, combine oyster sauce, ketchup, sweet soy sauce, Worcestershire sauce, sesame oil, five-spice powder, grated garlic, grated ginger, chicken powder, and sugar. Mix well.
2. Combine the chicken with the sauce mix and pepper. Mix well. Marinate for 30 minutes at room temperature.
3. Mince the garlic. Slice the shallots into large pieces. Slice the curly red chili, red Thai chili, and green onions.
4. Heat some oil. Pan-sear the chicken until browned on both sides. Then, add a bit of water and cook until it’s reduced. Set aside.
5. Heat a little bit of oil. Sauté the garlic and shallots until fragrant, then add curly red chili, Thai chili, and green onions. Add the rest of the sauce, the pasta, and water. Cook until reduced.
6. Oriental Spaghetti is ready to serve.

Title: Empuk, Tanpa Oven, Bumbu Meresap: Resep BRISKET BARBECUE
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pwfRhq4nYpY

Barbecue Brisket Recipe (yield 10 servings)

To pressure cook:
2.2 kg beef brisket
5 pc bay leaf
6 clove garlic, pounded
50 g ginger, pounded & sliced
3 liter water
3 tbsp salt
2 tbsp stock powder

Blended Spices:
2 pc red tomato
60 g garlic
4 cm ginger
10 pc shallot
60 ml oil

Sauce ingredients:
80 g oyster sauce
150 g ketchup
150 g BBQ sauce
5 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 liter water

Chimichurri ingredients:
5 clove garlic
¼ pc onion
7 pc curly red chili
15 pc green Thai chili
60 ml hot oil
1 tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
70 g cilantro
1 pc lemon
20 g parsley
50 ml olive oil

BBQ Sauce ingredients:
2 tbsp palm sugar
½ pc lemon
60 g ketchup
125 ml water

Sides:
French fries
Boiled corn
Shallot Sambal
Cherry tomato

Steps:
1. Into the pressure cooker, add water, ginger, garlic, bay leaf, brisket, salt, and stock powder. Cook for 70-80 minutes.
2. Into the blender, add tomatoes, garlic, ginger, and shallots. Blend, then sauté until fragrant.
3. Add ketchup, oyster sauce, BBQ sauce, sweet soy sauce, and water. Stir well, then add the brisket in. Cook for 30 minutes on medium-low heat.
4. Set the brisket aside, then place in the fridge a moment before slicing.
5. Add water, palm sugar, ketchup, and lemon juice into the sauce. Cook for a moment.
6. For the Chimichurri, add garlic, onion, curly red chili, and green Thai chili into the chopper. Chop finely, then transfer to a bowl.
7. Add hot oil, mix well. Blend the parsley, cilantro, lemon juice, salt, sugar, and pepper for a moment, then mix with the chopped chili.
8. Add olive oil. Mix well.
9. Slice the brisket, then grill on a nonstick pan until browned. Wrap in a baking paper.
10. Plate the brisket and sides.
11. Barbecue Brisket is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: 100% Sukses: Resep PALM SUGAR CHEESE COOKIES Renyah & Gurih
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mFdMvC37QjQ

Palm Sugar Cheese Cookies Recipe (yield 145 pcs)

Ingredients:
295 g all-purpose flour
110 g icing sugar
40 g egg yolk
2 g salt
50 g powdered milk
55 g cornstarch
120 g Anchor Tinned Salted Butter
120 g Anchor Unsalted Butter (room temperature)
120 g Anchor Cheddar Cheese

Others:
100 g palm sugar

Steps:
1. In a bow, combine the unsalted butter, tinned butter, salt, and sifted icing sugar. Mix with a mixer until pale and fluffy.
2. Add egg yolks. Mix evenly, then sift in powdered milk, cornstarch, and flour. Mix evenly with a spatula.
3. Add grated cheese. Mix well, then place in the fridge for 30 minutes.
4. Shape the dough into balls, each 5-6 g or 1 tsp. Coat with palm sugar.
5. Arrange the dough on a pan lined with baking paper.
6. Bake at 150°C for 30 minutes.
7. Palm Sugar Cheese Cookies are ready to serve.

Title: Gurih Praktis! Resep NASI GORENG MERAH Khas Makassar
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-Fm5NEv-m9U

Red Fried Rice Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
650 g white rice

Toppings:
100 g chicken liver, boiled
70 g kekian
5 pc beef meatball
2 pc egg

Sauces:
4 tbsp red tomato sauce
2 tsp fish sauce
1 tbsp Raja Rasa sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp sweet soy sauce
3 drop red food coloring

Others:
1 pc green onion
1 tbsp margarine
8 clove garlic
8 pc shallots
1 tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
½ tbsp sugar
½ tsp MSG

Add-ons:
Cucumber
Lime
Thai Chili Sambal

Steps:
1. Mince the garlic finely. Slice the shallots and green onions.
2. Slice the meatballs, kekian, and chicken liver.
3. Heat some oil. Fry the eggs until fragrant, then add meatballs, kekian, and chicken liver. Cook until lightly browned, then set aside.
4. Sauté the garlic and shallots until fragrant, then add rice. Stir well.
5. Add tomato sauce, fish sauce, oyster sauce, Raja Rasa sauce, salt, pepper, and sugar. Stir well.
6. Mix the food coloring with sweet soy sauce. Add into the rice, then stir well.
7. Add the toppings, green onions, and margarine. Stir, then add MSG. Cook for a moment.
8. Red Fried Rice is ready to serve.

Title: Praktis, Lembut, Kenyal! Resep FISH CAKE / ODENG / EOMUK (어묵)
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=H-qgdZiS1mc

Fish Cake Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Dough ingredients:
200 g Spanish mackerel fillet
100 g chicken thigh fillet
1 clove garlic
¼ pc onion
½ tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp mushroom stock powder / MSG (optional)
1 tbsp snakehead powder
½ tbsp baking powder
50 g sago flour
150 g ice cube
1 tsp sesame oil

Soup ingredients:
1.2 liter water
3 clove garlic
1 pc carrot
½ pc onion
12 pc dried anchovy
½ tsp seaweed powder
1 tbsp sugar
2 tbsp soy sauce
½ tbsp mushroom stock powder / MSG

Steps:
1. In a food processor, add chicken, fish, salt, sugar, pepper, snakehead powder, mushroom powder, and ice cubes. Blend until sticky.
2. Add grated onion and garlic, baking powder, sago flour, and sesame oil. Blend until mixed well.
3. Prepare a heat-proof pan and line it with baking paper. Add the dough and spread evenly.
4. Weigh the top down, then steam for 30-35 minutes on low heat.
5. Remove the gut from the dried anchovy. Halve the garlic, slice the onion and carrot into large pieces.
6. Prepare a pan. Add the onion, garlic, and dried anchovy. Toast without oil until fragrant, then add water, soy sauce, and sugar.
7. Add the sliced carrot into the pan. Add seaweed powder, then cook for 15-20 minutes on low heat.
8. Get the Fish Cake out of the steamer. Let cool, then slice.
9. Fry the Fish Cake on medium-high heat until golden brown. Set aside.
10. For the Soup version, cook the Fish Cake for a moment in the soup, then skewer them.
11. Homemade Fish Cake is ready to serve.

Title: Gurih dan Gampang Dibuat! Resep SEMPOL AYAM Kekinian
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ysr_nCGl0Bg

Chicken Sempol Recipe (yield 20 pcs)

Dough ingredients:
250 g chicken thigh filet
5 pc shallot
2 clove garlic
1 pc green onion, sliced
4 pc curly red chili, sliced
5 pc kaffir lime leaf, sliced
2 pc egg
100 g tapioca flour
40 g all-purpose flour
1 tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
2 tsp sugar
2 tsp chicken powder

Thai dipping sauce ingredients:
3 pc cilantro
4 clove garlic
20 pc green Thai chili
3 tbsp Bangkok Sambal
1 tbsp fish sauce
2-3 tbsp lime juice
2 tbsp water

Steps:
1. Into a food processor, add chicken, salt, pepper, sugar, chicken powder, garlic, and shallots. Blend until sticky.
2. Add eggs, tapioca flour, all-purpose flour, green onions, curly red chili, and lime leaf. Blend again, then transfer the dough into a piping bag.
3. Prepare skewers. Insert half of the skewer through the plastic opening. Squeeze the bag while pulling the skewer out.
4. Boil in simmering water until cooked. Set aside.
5. For the dipping sauce, blend cilantro, green Thai chili, garlic, Bangkok Sambal, and fish sauce. Transfer to a bowl.
6. Add lime juice and water. Mix well.
7. Lightly beat an egg. Dip the Sempol into the egg, then fry until golden brown. Set aside.
8. Sempol is ready to serve.

URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=knD7CwNN9kk

Sausage Stir-Fry with Shallots Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pack mini sausage
3 clove garlic
60 g whole shallot, small
1 pc green onion
20 pc green & red Thai chili
1 tbsp oyster sauce
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp sugar
½ tsp stock powder / MSG
50 ml water
2-3 tbsp oil

Sides:
Rice
Crackers

Steps:
1. Roughly chop the garlic. Slice the green onion and red Thai chili into large pieces.
2. Slice the sausages, then score them.
3. Heat a little bit of oil. Stir-fry the garlic for a moment, then add shallots, red Thai chili, whole green Thai chili, and whole shallots. Stir-fry for a moment.
4. Add sausages, salt, sugar, stock powder, oyster sauce, and water. Cook for a moment until the water is absorbed.
5. Sausage Stir-Fry with Shallots is ready to serve.

Title: Lezat, Gurih, dan Mudah Dibuat! Resep MARTABAK TAHU PEDAS
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2vR9Kc_Bhck

Spicy Tofu Martabak Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Ingredients:
370 g white tofu
½ tsp salt
½ tsp chicken powder
1 tsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper
1 pc green onion
5 clove garlic
7 pc shallot
1 pc egg
4 tbsp ABC Sambal Asli
2 tbsp oil, for stir-frying

Others:
Spring roll / lumpia skin
ABC Sambal Extra Pedas
Oil, for frying

Steps:
1. Slice the garlic and shallots. Dice the onion and slice the green onions.
2. Heat the oil. Sauté the garlic and shallots until fragrant, then add onions and green onions. Sauté until they wilt, then transfer into a bowl.
3. Add the tofu, then mash it. Season with salt, chicken powder, sugar, pepper, and egg. Mix well.
4. Add ABC Sambal Asli. Mix well.
5. Prepare the spring roll skin. Place the filling on the skin, then fold.
6. Heat the oil. On medium heat, fry the Martabak until golden brown. Set aside.
7. Spicy Tofu Martabak is ready to serve. For added heat, serve it with ABC Sambal Extra Pedas as a dip.

Title: Bisa Jadi Ide Jualan! Resep CHICKEN SHRIMP ROLL ala Hokben
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qMT1dQy551c

Chicken & Shrimp Roll Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
200 g chicken thigh filet
120 g peeled shrimp
3 clove garlic
1 tbsp fried shallots
1 pc egg white
30 ml water
1 tbsp cornstarch
1 tbsp chicken oil
1 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper

Skin ingredients:
2 pc egg
1/8 tsp salt

Batter ingredients:
100 ml milk
5 tbsp flour
3 tbsp egg white

Coating ingredients:
White breadcrumbs

Add-ons:
Salad ala HokBen

Steps:
1. Add garlic into the food processor. Blend, then add chicken, shrimp, fried shallots, salt, chicken powder, pepper, and sugar. Blend until sticky.
2. Add water, cornstarch, egg white, and chicken oil. Blend evenly.
3. Beat the eggs with a bit of salt, then cook the Omelette.
4. Prepare the Omelette. Spread half of the meat dough evenly, then roll.
5. Steam for 15-20 minutes on medium heat. Set aside to cool down, then slice to your preference.
6. For the batter, mix egg white, flour, and milk evenly.
7. Dip the Chicken & Shrimp Roll into the batter, then coat with breadcrumbs.
8. Fry until golden brown. Set aside.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Gurih Kriuk! Resep NASI TUTUG ONCOM KHAS SUNDA
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CjTcwta0rJc

Nasi Tutug Oncom Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Tutug Oncom ingredients:
3 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
8 cm aromatic ginger
2 tsp salt
1.5 tbsp sugar
1 tsp MSG
5 pc red curly chili
360 g oncom
1 pc bay leaf
1 pc kaffir lime leaf

Crispy Tutug Oncom ingredients:
35 g all-purpose flour
35 g cornstarch
½ tsp baking powder
1 pc egg
50 ml coconut milk
80 ml water
½ tsp salt
½ tsp chicken powder
⅓ tutug oncom

Others:
Rice + 2/3 tutug oncom
Fried Tempeh
Fried Tofu
Tomato Sambal
Cucumber
Lemon basil

Steps:
1. Slice the oncom, then toast it. Place in a bowl and let cool.
2. On a stone bowl, add garlic, shallots, aromatic ginger, red chili, and salt. Mash until smooth.
3. Heat some oil, then crumble the cooled oncom.
4. Sauté the spices until fragrant, then add the oncom, sugar, MSG, lime leaf, and bay leaf. Cook on medium heat until crisp. Set aside.
5. Mix ⅔ of the tutug oncom into hot rice. Mix well.
6. In a bowl, combine flour, cornstarch, chicken powder, salt, baking powder, egg, and coconut milk. Add water in slowly while stirring. Mix well.
7. Add the rest of the tutug oncom. Mix with a fork.
8. Heat the oil. Splatter the batter with a fork into the oil slowly. Fry on medium heat until crispy. Set aside.
9. Nasi Tutug Oncom is ready to serve.

Title: Khas RM Padang: Resep AYAM POP Spesial!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kt14bkDEJGY

Ayam Pop Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pc rooster, skinned and chopped into 4 pieces
6 clove garlic
3 pc bay leaf
6 pc lime leaf
1 pc lemongrass
4 cm ginger

Others:
1 tbsp salt
½ tbsp mushroom stock powder / MSG
⅙ tsp pepper
50 ml coconut milk
1 liter coconut water

Sambal ingredients:
8 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
10 pc red curly chili
1 pc red tomato
3 pc large red chili
1-2 tsp sugar
300 ml braising liquid
150 ml cold water
1 tbsp all-purpose flour
60 ml coconut oil

Sides:
150 g cassava leaf
1 tsp baking soda
1 tbsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
Water, to boil
Cucumber
Rice

Steps:
1. Slice the ginger and lemongrass, set aside. Blend the garlic with a little bit of coconut water until smooth.
2. Prepare a pan. Add the blended garlic, lemongrass, ginger, bay leaf, lime leaf, coconut water, chicken, coconut milk, salt, mushroom powder, and pepper. Cook on medium-low heat for 30 minutes.
3. After they’re cooked, turn the heat off and leave the chicken in the pan.
4. Slice the red chili, curly chili, shallots, garlic, and tomato.
5. Heat the coconut oil. Sauté the shallots and garlic until fragrant, then add the tomato and chilis. Cook until fragrant.
6. Remove the chicken, then strain the braising liquid.
7. Add the braising liquid into the chili. Boil until soft.
8. Add the chili mixture into a blender. Add cold water, flour, and sugar. Blend until smooth, then cook again for a moment.
9. Boil some water. Add salt, baking soda, sugar, and cassava leaf. Boil for 8-10 minutes, set aside.
10. Heat the coconut oil. Dip the chicken into the warm oil for a moment. Set aside.
11. Ayam Pop is ready to serve.

Title: 100% Sukses! Resep SIOMAY AYAM UDANG Kenyal & Lembut
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W4vWhSb1N1g

Chicken & Shrimp Shumai Recipe (yield 20 pcs)

Marinade ingredients:
350 g chicken thigh filet
100 g peeled shrimp
1 tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp baking powder

Others:
Grated garlic + 1 tbsp water
Grated ginger + 1 tbsp water
1 pc egg white
50 ml cold water
2 tsp oyster sauce
2 tsp sesame oil
½ tbsp soy sauce
1-2 tbsp oil
½ tbsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
1 tsp mushroom stock powder / MSG
¼ tsp pepper
Shumai skin, to wrap
Carrot, small-diced

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken and shrimp with baking powder, salt, and sugar. Mix well and marinate for 15-30 minutes.
2. Rinse the chicken and shrimp until the water is clear. Pat dry.
3. Add water into the grated ginger and garlic.
4. Add some of the chicken into the food processor along with salt, sugar, mushroom powder, and pepper. Blend until smooth.
5. Add the ginger and garlic liquid, egg white, oil, soy sauce, oyster sauce, sesame oil, and tapioca flour.
6. Slice the remaining chicken and shrimp, then add into the food processor. Chop roughly.
7. Transfer the dough into a bowl. Add cold water and mix well.
8. Shape the dough with shumai skin. Steam for 15 minutes.
9. Chicken & Shrimp Shumai is ready to serve.

URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hMDA0nyNzVQ

Tofu Hot Plate with Chicken Mushroom Sauce Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
1-2 pc tube egg tofu
200 g chicken thigh fillet
2 pc egg

Others:
3 clove garlic
½ pc onion
3 pc champignon mushroom
1 pc green onion
200 ml water
2 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tsp fish sauce
½ tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
½ tsp mushroom stock powder
1.5 tbsp cornstarch
2 tbsp oil

Add-ons:
Rice
Soy sauce + sliced red Thai chili

Steps:
1. Mince the garlic. Dice the onion and mushroom. Roughly mince the thigh fillet, then transfer to a bowl.
2. Into the chicken, add oyster sauce, sweet soy sauce, soy sauce, fish sauce, mushroom powder, and cornstarch. Mix well.
3. Heat some oil. Sauté the onion and garlic until fragrant, then add mushroom. Cook for a moment.
4. Add the chicken and continue cooking. Add water and cook until the sauce thickens.
5. Slice the tofu, then fry until golden brown. Set the oil aside.
6. Add lightly beaten eggs and Chicken Mushroom Sauce into the tofu. Cook on high heat.
7. Add sesame oil and green onions. Cook for a moment.
8. Tofu Hot Plate with Chicken Mushroom Sauce is ready to serve.

Title: Empuk! Resep SUP IGA SAPI KUAH BENING
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wpO2qn_D_nY

Beef Ribs Soup Recipe (yield 8-10 serving)

Ingredients:
1.5 kg beef ribs
1 tsp salt
3 pc bay leaf
1 liter water
4 cm ginger

Others:
5 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
3 cm ginger
½ tsp white pepper
¾ pc nutmeg
4 pc clove
3 pc cardamom
3.3 liter water
1.5 tbsp salt
1 tbsp mushroom stock powder / MSG
1 tsp sugar
1 tsp beef powder
1 pc green onion, sliced
5 pc celery, sliced
1 pc red tomato

Add-ons:
2 pc potato
3 pc carrot
2 tbsp fried shallots
Red tomato
Green Thai Chili Sambal
Lime

Steps:
1. Bring water to a boil. Add beef ribs, ginger, bay leaf, and salt into the pressure cooker. Cook on high for 10 minutes, then lower the heat and cook for 20 minutes. Let the meat rest in the pressure cooker without opening the lid.
2. Pound the garlic, ginger, and shallots. Slice the potato and carrot into large pieces.
3. Bring fresh water to a boil in a different pot.
4. Add the ribs in along with garlic, ginger, shallots, tomato, clove, nutmeg, cardamom, pepper, salt, mushroom powder, sugar, and beef powder.
5. Add the potato and carrot. Cook for 20 minutes.
6. Add green onion, celery, and fried shallots into the soup. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
7. Beef Ribs Soup is ready to serve.

Title: Favorit Keluarga! Resep AYAM KECAP [Lengkap Dengan Sayuran]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6uxcS47TQVc

Sweet Soy Chicken (yield 5 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
1 kg whole broiler
1 pc lime
1 tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper

Others:
2 pc potato
2 pc carrot
1 pc red tomato
6 pc shallot
6 clove garlic
1 pc red chili
5 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 liter water
2 tbsp oil
½ tsp pepper
1 tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom stock powder / MSG
1 tbsp sugar
1 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp Maggi sauce

Add-ons:
Rice
Fried shallots

Steps:
1. Chop the chicken. Marinate with lime juice, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
2. Slice the garlic and shallots. Halve and deseed the chili. Slice the tomato into four parts. Slice the carrot and potato into large pieces.
3. Heat the oil. Sauté the garlic and shallots until fragrant, then add the chicken. Cook until it’s slightly browned.
4. Add water, carrot, potato, chili, tomato, sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, Maggi sauce, salt, pepper, mushroom powder, and sugar. Cook on medium-low heat until soft and flavorful, about 20-30 minutes.
5. Plate the dish. Sprinkle it with fried shallots.
6. Sweet Soy Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: 100% Sukses Tanpa Ungkep! Resep AYAM GORENG REMPAH
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=--_aDtwoHHk

Spiced Fried Chicken Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Ingredients:
1 kg whole chicken thigh
1 tsp vinegar
2 tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
1 tbsp chicken powder
¾ tsp baking powder, optional
1 egg
10 tbsp cornstarch
4-5 drops red food coloring, optional

Spices:
1 stalk lemongrass
3 cm ginger
3 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 segment turmeric
1 tsp coriander, toasted
1 tsp cumin, toasted
6 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
2 pc red chili

Garnish:
Curry leaf
Rice

Steps:
1. Slice lemongrass, ginger, garlic, shallots, and red chili. Put them into a blender.
2. Add turmeric, kaffir lime leaves (stem removed), coriander, cumin, and egg into the blender. Blend until smooth.
3. Cut the chicken into 2 pieces. Transfer to a bowl, then add the blended spices, salt, sugar, pepper, chicken powder, baking powder, vinegar, red food coloring, and cornstarch. Mix well.
4. Let it marinate for 2 hours at room temperature.
5. Heat the oil. Fry the chicken until they’re cooked, then add the curry leaves. Set aside.
6. Spiced Fried Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Praktis Tahan Lama! Resep SAMBAL RAWIT IRIS
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QAb42Cm7G_s

Sliced Thai Chili Sambal Recipe (yield 10 servings)

Ingredients:
200 g red Thai chili
1 tsp sugar
½ tbsp salt
1 tsp MSG
1 tbsp shrimp paste powder
200 ml water
200 ml oil

Steps:
1. Slice the red Thai chili into large pieces.
2. Into the pan, add the sliced chili, salt, MSG, sugar, and water. Turn the heat on to medium and cook until the water is reduced and the chili is cooked.
3. Lower the heat. Add oil and shrimp paste. Stir well and continue cooking for 5-7 minutes. Turn the heat off and let cool.
4. Sliced Thai Chili Sambal is ready to serve or store in an airtight container.

Title: Resep MEATBALL & BROCCOLI CREAMY PASTA [Bisa Untuk MPASI]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WWZ5XeGmHH0

Meatball & Broccoli Creamy Pasta Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Meatball ingredients:
175 g ground beef
175 g ground chicken thigh
½ pc onion
2 tbsp oil
1 pc egg white
10 g white breadcrumb
2 tbsp grated parmesan
½ tsp baking powder
¼ tsp dried oregano
¾ tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
50 ml water

Mornay Sauce ingredients:
4 tbsp unsalted butter
4 tbsp all-purpose flour
50 g parmesan
500 ml milk
200 ml chicken stock
⅛ tsp nutmeg powder
½ tsp salt
3 clove garlic, minced
½ pc onion, minced

Other ingredients:
120 g spaghetti, boiled
1 pc broccoli, boiled

Steps:
1. Grate the cheese and set aside. Chop the onion, then sautè until fragrant and browned.
2. Place the sautéed onion in a bowl. Stir for a moment, then add breadcrumbs and egg whites. Mix well.
3. Add ground beef, ground chicken, baking powder, dried oregano, salt, sugar, and grated parmesan. Stir until sticky.
4. Add water and stir until it comes together.
5. Shape the meatballs, then heat the oil and fry the meatballs on medium heat until browned. Set aside.
6. In the same pan, add onion, garlic, and butter. Sauté until fragrant.
7. Add flour. Cook for a moment, then add nutmeg powder and cook again.
8. Add the milk in slowly while stirring, then add chicken stock and bring to a boil.
9. Add parmesan, salt, and meatballs. Stir well.
10. Into the pan, add the cooked spaghetti, broccoli, and sauce. Add milk, if needed.
11. For baby food, mash as needed.
12. Meatball & Broccoli Creamy Pasta is ready to serve

Title: Resep AYAM UNGKEP GORENG SERUNDENG BAWANG [Lengkap Sambal]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3cGGn24rYGs

Serundeng Chicken with Onions Recipe (yield 10 servings)

Ingredients:
10 pc chicken drumstick
½ pc lime
2 tsp salt

Spices:
2 tbsp coriander
10 pc candlenut
4 clove garlic
40 g galangal
5 cm turmeric
1 sachet shrimp paste, optional
60 ml oil
50 ml water

Others:
1 pc lemongrass, pounded
3 pc bay leaf
3 pc kaffir lime leaf
10 clove garlic
10 pc shallot
300 ml water
½ tbsp mushroom stock powder
⅓ tsp pepper

Sambal ingredients:
70 g green Thai chili
4 pc shallot
2 sachet shrimp paste, roasted
1 pc kaffir lime
1 pc red tomato
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp MSG
½ tbsp sugar

Add-ons:
Rice
Cucumber
Lemon basil

Steps:
1. Mix the chicken with lime juice and salt and marinate for a moment.
2. Pound the candlenuts. Slice the garlic, galangal, and turmeric into large pieces.
3. In a blender, add candlenuts, garlic, galangal, turmeric, coriander, shrimp paste, oil, and water. Blend until smooth, then sauté until fragrant.
4. Add lemongrass, bay leaf, and lime leaf. Sauté for a moment, then add chicken drumsticks. Cook for a moment.
5. Add water, mushroom powder, and pepper. Cook on medium-low heat.
6. For the Sambal, bring water to a boil. Cook tomato and shallots until the tomato skin breaks, then add green Thai chili. Boil for a moment, then transfer to a stone bowl.
7. Add salt, MSG, shrimp paste, and sugar. Mash until smooth, then add kaffir lime juice. Mix well.
8. Pound the garlic and shallots. Add into the pan and cook until the liquid is reduced.
9. Heat the oil. Fry the chicken on high heat until browned, then lower the heat and fry until golden brown.
10. Serundeng Chicken with Onions are ready to serve.

Fried Seblak Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:

3 pc egg
1 tsp soy sauce
50 ml water
Oil

Spices ingredients:
6 clove garlic
12 g aromatic ginger
45 g green Thai chili
5 pc red Thai chili
¾ tsp salt
½ tsp MSG
½ tsp sugar

Steps:
1. Into a stone bowl, add garlic, aromatic ginger, red Thai chili, green Thai chili, salt, sugar, and MSG. Mash until smooth.
2. Bring water to a boil. Cook the crackers for 3 minutes. Set aside in a bowl.
3. Add eggs and mix well. Heat oil and cook the crackers until browned. Set aside.
4. In the same pan, add more oil and sauté the spices until fragrant.
5. Add the cooked crackers in with soy sauce and water. Cook for a moment.
6. Fried Seblak is ready to serve.

Title: Tanpa Nasi! Resep OAT BEEF BULGOGI GIMBAP [Korean Seaweed Rice Rolls 김밥]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vHnPBivIpEw

Oat Gimbap Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
130 g rolled oat
250 ml hot water
1 pc egg
½ tsp sesame oil
⅛ tsp salt

Filling ingredients:
150 g sliced beef
3 tbsp bulgogi sauce
Sesame oil, as needed
Oil to cook

Others:
Yellow pickled radish (danmuji)
Cucumber
Kimchi
Horenzo, blanched and squeezed dry
Nori
Sesame seeds
Sesame oil to brush

Steps:
1. Marinate the beef with bulgogi sauce and a little bit of sesame seeds for a moment.
2. Heat the oil and cook the beef thoroughly. Set aside.
3. Slice the pickled radish and cucumber lengthwise. Set aside.
4. Soak the rolled oats with hot water for 5 minutes, then strain.
5. Add salt, sesame oil, and egg. Mix well.
6. Heat some oil. Pour half of the oats into the pan. Flatten the oats into a rectangle, as wide as the nori you will use. Cook evenly on both sides.
7. Prepare baking paper. Arrange the nori, oat sheet, pickled radish, cucumber, horenzo, kimchi, and Bulgogi. Brush the edge of the nori with water, then roll.
8. Brush the sesame oil on the roll, then slice.
9. Oat Gimbap is ready to serve.

Title: Renyah Tahan Lama! Resep CUMI GORENG TEPUNG TAPIOKA
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dxXeFhc0whc

Fried Calamari Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Batter ingredients:
350 g frozen squid tube
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp baking powder
1 pc egg
1 tsp garlic powder
120 g tapioca flour

Coating:
Tapioca flour

Dipping Sauce ingredients:
3 tbsp chili sauce
2 tbsp ketchup
2 tbsp mineral water

Steps:
1. Slice the squid, then place in a bowl. Rinse 2-3 times and drain.
2. Add the egg, chicken powder, garlic powder, salt, pepper, baking powder, and tapioca flour. Mix well.
3. Coat the squid with tapioca flour little by little. Coat gently. Let it rest for 1-2 minutes before frying.
4. Heat the oil. Fry the squid bit by bit until slightly golden brown. Set aside.
5. Place the Calamari in the air fryer for 5-7 minutes.
6. For the dipping sauce, mix the ketchup, chili sauce, and water evenly.
7. Fried Calamari is ready to serve.

Title: Juicy Menghangatkan! Resep AYAM REBUS JAHE [Pek Cam Kee]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mv4eyrPzKmY

Poached Ginger Chicken Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Marinated Chicken ingredients:
850 g whole chicken thigh
1.5 tbsp salt

Others:
2 liter water
20 g ginger, pound
1 pc green onion, sliced into large pieces
2 tsp salt
2 tsp mushroom stock powder / MSG
2 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper

Garlic Ginger Oil ingredients:
70 ml oil
30 g ginger
10 clove garlic
1 tbsp sesame oil
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp mushroom stock powder

Add-ons:
Rice
Cilantro
Cucumber

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with salt for 10 minutes, then rinse 3 times with water.
2. Heat the water in a pan until it’s simmering. Add the chicken, green onions, ginger, salt, mushroom powder, sugar, and pepper. Cook for 15-18 minutes on low heat without covering.
3. Slice the ginger. Add into the food processor and blend.
4. Add garlic and blend again. In a pan, heat oil. Then, add the chopped ginger and garlic, salt, and mushroom powder. Sauté until lightly browned.
5. Turn the heat off and add sesame oil. Stir and set aside.
6. Place the chicken into an ice bath for 3 minutes, then shred the meat.
7. Return the bones into the stock. Cook again on low heat.
8. Plate the chicken. Pour a bit of stock and add Garlic Ginger Oil on top.
9. Poached Ginger Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Nikmat! Resep NASI GORENG TELUR ASIN
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=75JILj0bfeA

Salted Egg Fried Rice Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
600 g rice
1 tbsp fish sauce
7 clove garlic
8 pc shallot
7 pc red Thai chili
2 pc egg
2 pc green onion
2 tbsp butter
4-5 tbsp salted egg powder
1 sprig curry leaf
2 tbsp oil
½ tsp salt
½ tsp mushroom stock powder / MSG
1 tsp sugar

Topping:
120 g chicken thigh filet
⅛ tsp white pepper
⅛ tsp salt

Steps:
1. Chop the garlic. Slice the shallots, green onions, and red Thai chili. Pick the curry leaves off of the stalk.
2. Slice the chicken and marinate it with salt and white pepper. Mix well.

Title: Cukup 15 Menit! Resep SUP TOMAT DAGING IRIS [Cocok Dengan Nasi]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WXUK7gzfNAM

Meaty Tomato Soup Recipe (yield 10 servings)

Marinated Beef ingredients:
250 g sliced beef
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
2 tbsp tomato paste

Others:
2 pc carrot
2 pc red tomato
½ pc onion
3 pc celery
1 pc green onion
1 pc potato
75 g red bean
120 g beef sausage
4 tbsp ketchup
1 tsp beef stock powder
1.5 L water
1 tsp salt
⅛ tsp pepper

Fried Shallots ingredients:
3 tbsp oil
8 pc shallot
4 clove garlic

Rice ingredients:
375 g rice, rinsed
500 ml water

Steps:
1. Add rice and water into the rice cooker. Cook normally.
2. Marinate the beef with tomato paste, soy sauce, and Worcestershire sauce for a moment.
3. Dice the carrot, potato, tomato, and onion. Add into the rice cooker.
4. Add red beans and water. Cook in the rice cooker for 20 minutes.
5. Slice the green onion, celery, and sausages.
6. Add sausages, beef, ketchup, beef powder, salt, and pepper. Cook for 20 minutes until done.
7. Slice the garlic and shallots. Fry the shallots on medium heat until half-cooked. Add the garlic in, then fry until yellowed. Set aside.
8. Add green onion, celery, fried shallots, and fried garlic into the soup. Continue cooking for a moment.
9. Meaty Tomato Soup is ready to serve.

Title: Praktis Nagih! Resep NASI TELUR HONG KONG Vol 2 By Devina Hermawan [Chiffon Egg]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Itq6godanT8

Hong Kong Egg Rice (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
8 pc shrimp, peeled with the tail intact
3 pc egg
⅓ tsp mushroom stock powder / MSG
⅛ tsp pepper
1 pc spring onion

Soy Garlic Sauce ingredients:
50 ml water
1 tsp sesame oil
1 tsp maggi sauce
½ tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
3 clove garlic, finely minced
1 tbsp oil

Others:
Rice

Steps:
1. In a bowl, mix oyster sauce, sweet soy sauce, maggi sauce, sesame oil, and water.
2. Heat the oil. Sauté the garlic until yellowed, then add into the sauce. Mix well.
3. Slice the spring onions. In a bowl, combine eggs, mushroom powder, pepper, and spring onions. Lightly beat the eggs.
4. Heat some oil. Stir-fry the shrimp on high heat for a moment, then add the eggs. Turn the heat off. Stir slowly until the eggs are half-cooked.
5. Plate the rice and pour the Egg on top of the rice. Pour the Sauce on top.
6. Hong Kong Egg Rice is ready to serve.

Title: Kenyal Manis Wangi! Resep WEDANG RONDE JAHE
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Vkcxj6yevhs

Ginger Wedang Ronde Recipe (yield 8-10 servings)

Ingredients:
350 g glutinous rice flour
40 g tapioca flour
½ tsp salt
320 ml hot water
Cocopandan extract
Pandan extract

Filling ingredients:
100 g fried cashew / fried peanut
3 tbsp sugar
¼ tsp salt
1.5 tbsp peanut butter

Broth ingredients:
170 g whole ginger
6 pc pandan leaf
1 pc lemongrass
2.5 liter water
300 g sugar

Ginger Extract ingredients:
60 g ginger, peeled
250 ml water

Steps:
1. Roast the ginger on medium-low flame until the surface is blackened, then pound it.
2. In a pan, add water, ginger, pandan leaves, lemongrass, and sugar. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat. Cook for 12-20 minutes.
3. In a food processor, add cashew, sugar, peanut butter, and salt. Blend, then shape into small balls.
4. For the ginger extract, blend ginger with water until smooth. Strain and boiled it.
5. In a bowl, combine glutinous rice flour, tapioca flour, salt, and hot water while stirring with chopsticks. Then, knead it by hand.
6. Divide the dough into 3 parts. Add pandan extract to color the dough green and cocopandan extract to color it pink. Knead until the color is mixed in well.
7. Shape the dough into a long cylinder, then slice it into two. Roll one of the dough, then slice it into thumb-sized pieces. Shape each piece into a bowl, fill it with the nut filling, then shape into balls. Coat the Ronde balls with tapioca flour.
8. For the small balls, roll the dough into a long cylinder, then slice to 7-8 mm pieces. Coat them with tapioca flour.
9. Repeat the same steps until the dough is finished.
10. Strain the ginger broth, then transfer it back to the pan.
11. Boil water and cook the Ronde until they float and are cooked. Set aside.
12. Wedang Ronde is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Wangi Spesial! Resep BIHUN GORENG PUTIH
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KCGaIUrww5I

White Fried Vermicelli Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g dried vermicelli
3 pc cabbage
2 pc red chili
3 pc celery
1 pc green onion
6 pc meatball
3 pc egg

Others:
2 tbsp oil to fry the eggs
2 tbsp oil to sauté the spices
½ tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp white pepper
1 tsp mushroom powder / MSG
1 tbsp fish sauce

Spices:
5 clove garlic
7 pc shallot
4 pc candlenut
½ tbsp dried shrimp
½ tsp salt

Sambal ingredients:
35 g green Thai chili
2 clove garlic
1 pc lime
50 ml cold water
½ tsp salt
2 tsp sugar

Steps:
1. Soak the vermicelli in cold water. Soak the dried shrimp in hot water. Let them soak for 10 minutes.
2. Slice the cabbage, red chili, green onions, celery, and meatball.s
3. In a stone bowl, mash the garlic, shallots, candlenuts, dried shrimp, and salt until smooth.
4. Boil the green Thai chili and garlic until cooked. Blend until smooth with cold water.
5. Transfer the Sambal into a bowl, then add lime juice, salt, and sugar. Mix well.
6. Heat the oil and scramble the eggs until cooked. Set aside.
7. Add more oil, then sauté the blended spices on medium-low heat until fragrant and cooked.
8. Turn the heat up, then add the meatballs. Cook for a moment, then add cabbage, red chili, green onions, celery, fish sauce, vermicelli, and scrambled egg. Cook for a moment.
9. Season with salt, sugar, white pepper, and mushroom powder. Stir well.
10. White Fried Vermicelli is ready to serve.

Title: Gurih Asam Manis: Resep AYAM KULUYUK KRISPI
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-we0zUhXKyI

Crispy Sweet & Sour Chicken Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Ingredients:
400 g chicken breast filet
1 pc egg
1 tsp baking powder
1 tsp chicken powder
1 tbsp soy sauce
Tapioca flour, to coat

Sweet & Sour Sauce ingredients:
½ pc onion
2 pc red chili
150 g pineapple
1 tbsp margarine
1 tbsp sugar
1 tsp vinegar
3 tbsp ketchup
2 tbsp chili sauce
275 ml water
1.5 tbsp cornstarch

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken thinly to about 3 mm thick. Marinate with chicken powder, baking powder, and soy sauce. Mix well.
2. Add egg and mix well. Coat with tapioca flour evenly, then rest for 2-3 minutes.
3. Slice the de-seeded red chili, pineapple, and onion. Set aside.
4. Heat the oil. Fry the chicken on high heat until crispy and golden brown. Set aside.
5. Heat the pan. Add margarine and onion. Sauté until fragrant, then add ketchup, chili sauce, sugar, and vinegar. Stir.
6. Dilute the cornstarch in water, then add into the pan. Stir well.
7. Add pineapple and chili. Cook until the sauce thickens.
8. Arrange the chicken on a serving plate, then pour the sauce on top.
9. Crispy Sweet & Sour Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Favorit Keluarga. Resep KUE LOBAK: Empuk & lembut!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OlYVkG6GF-0

Turnip Cake Recipe (yield 15 servings)

Turnip Cake ingredients:
3 clove garlic
2 tbsp dried shrimp, soaked in warm water
3 slice smoked beef
3 tbsp oil
1 kg white turnip, peeled
400 ml water
250 g BOLA Deli Rice Flour
3 tbsp BOLA Deli Tapioca Flour
2 tsp sesame oil
2 tsp salt
1.5 tbsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper

Salty Chicken ingredients:
150 g chicken thigh filet
½ tbsp chicken powder
2 tsp sugar

Condiments:
Chili oil
Green onion

Steps:
1. Mix the chicken with chicken powder and sugar. Marinate for a moment.
2. Chop the garlic, smoked beef, dried shrimp, and chicken. In a bowl, shred the turnip and rinse until clean.
3. Heat the oil. Add garlic and dried shrimp. Sauté until fragrant, then add chicken and smoked beef. Stir-fry until cooked.
4. Add the shredded turnip, pepper, salt, sugar, sesame oil, and chicken powder. Cook until soft.
5. In a bowl, combine BOLA Deli Rice Flour, BOLA Deli Tapioca Flour, and water. Mix well, then add into the pan. Cook on medium-low heat until it thickens.
6. Prepare a 20 cm x 20 cm pan. Brush it with oil, then line with baking paper.
7. Add the Turnip Cake dough into the pan. Even it out, then brush the surface with oil.
8. Cover it with baking paper and steam for 1 hour.
9. Once it cools down, remove the Turnip Cake from the pan and slice.
10. Heat some oil. Add the Turnip Cake in and sear until browned. Set aside.
11. For the second version, coat the Turnip Cake with cornstarch, then fry until browned. Set aside.
12. Turnip Cake is ready to serve.

Title: Empuk Meresap! Resep RENDANG DAGING BUMBU JAWA [Menu Lebaran]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fEpt5JX7nQc

Rendang Recipe (yield 40 servings)

Ingredients:
4 kg beef shank
9 pc bay leaf
6 pc lemongrass, pounded
15 pc kaffir lime leaf
130 g palm sugar
1.5 liter instant coconut milk
1.5 liter water
2 tbsp salt
2 tbsp mushroom powder / MSG

Spice ingredients:
36 clove garlic
30 pc shallot
350 g red chili, sliced
30 pc candlenut, pounded
40 g ginger
60 g galangal
1 tbsp whole white pepper
3 tbsp coriander
300 ml oil
125 ml water

Add-ons:
Rice
Fried shallot
Chicken Opor
Sambal Goreng Ati
Ketupat

Steps:
1. Slice the galangal and ginger. Add into the blender along with candlenuts, garlic, coriander, white pepper, and oil. Blend, then add water. Blend until smooth.
2. Pour the blended spices into the pan. Into the same blender, add red chili, fried shallot, oil, and water. Blend until smooth, then pour into the pan.
3. Cook the blended spices until fragrant on low heat. Slice the beef, set aside.
4. Add lemongrass, bay leaf, and lime leaf. Cook on medium heat until fragrant and cooked.
5. Add water, coconut milk, beef, palm sugar, and mushroom powder. Bring to a boil on high heat, then lower the heat. Continue cooking until the beef is tender, about 2-3 hours.
6. Rendang is ready to serve with the add-ons.

Title: Pulen & Tinggi Serat! Resep AREM-AREM OAT ISI AYAM
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MFw5egEj9kQ

Oat Arem-arem (yield 25 pcs)

Ingredients:
1 cup brown rice, soaked in water
1 cup white rice
1 cup rolled oats
3 pc bay leaf
1 tsp salt
5 cup water
1 cup instant coconut milk

Soy Chicken filling ingredients:
3 pc candlenut
5 pc shallot
3 clove garlic
150 g potato
150 g carrot
1 pc green onion
3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tbsp fried shallot
300 g ground chicken
3 tbsp oil
150 ml water
150 ml coconut milk
½ tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom powder / MSG
¼ tsp pepper
½ tbsp sugar
150 ml water

Others:
Green Thai chili, optional
Banana leaf to wrap
Small wooden skewer / toothpick

Steps:
1. Dice the carrot and potato. Slice the green onions.
2. Add garlic, shallots, candlenuts, and oil into a blender. Blend until smooth.
3. Sauté the spices until fragrant. Then, add ground chicken and cook until done.
4. Add carrot, potato, sweet soy sauce, salt, mushroom powder, pepper, sugar, and water. Stir, then add green onions and fried shallots. Cook until the water is reduced, about 10 minutes. Set aside.
5. Add brown rice and white rice into the rice cooker. Add coconut milk, bay leaf, salt, rolled oats, and water. Cook normally in the rice cooker.
6. After the rice is cooked, give it a stir. Turn off the rice cooker and leave the rice inside.
7. Run the banana leaves across fire, then add one scoop of rice. Flatten it with a rice paddle.
8. Add 1 tbsp of Soy Chicken filling and green Thai chili. Fold evenly, then roll and secure the ends.
9. Steam the Arem-arem for 60-90 minutes. Then, set aside and let cool for 1-2 hours before serving so they set well.
10. Oat Arem-arem is ready to serve.

Title: Renyah Lumer Di Mulut! Resep KUE SEMPRIT KEJU [Kue Lebaran]

Cheese Semprit Cookies Recipe (yield 75 pcs)

Ingredients:
100 g Anchor Tinned Butter (room temp)
100 g Anchor Unsalted Butter (room temp)
¾ tsp vanilla extract
⅓ tsp salt
115 g icing sugar
1 pc egg
30 g cornstarch
15 g powdered milk
220 g all-purpose flour
1 tsp baking powder
70 g Anchor Cheddar Block

Topping:
Anchor Cheddar Block, grated

Steps:
1. In a bowl, add Anchor Unsalted Butter and Anchor Tinned Butter. Sift in icing sugar, then beat the butter until pale and fluffy.
2. While mixing, add egg, salt, vanilla extract, and baking powder. Mix evenly.
3. Sift in flour, cornstarch, and powdered milk. Mix gently with a spatula.
4. Grate Anchor Cheddar Block. Add the cheese into the dough and mix well with a spatula. Transfer the dough into a piping bag.
5. Insert the piping tip into a piping bag. Add the dough piping bag in, then pipe the dough onto a pan lined with baking paper.
6. Add the cheese topping on top, then bake at 130°C for 30 minutes.
7. Cheese Semprit Cookies are ready to serve.

Chicken Mushroom Indomie Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pack instant noodles, Chicken Curry flavor
2 tbsp oil
2 clove garlic
80 g champignon
150 g chicken thigh filet
1 tbsp cornstarch
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
½ tbsp oyster sauce
250 ml water
1.5 pack instant noodle seasoning

Add-ons:
Choy sum, sliced
Red Thai chili

Steps:
1. Slice the Champignon into four. Slice the garlic and dice the chicken filet.

5. Add the cornstarch mixture. Cook for a moment until the sauce thickens.
6. Boil water and cook the Thai chili and instant noodles. Then, add choy sum. Cook shortly, then strain the ingredients.
7. On a serving plate, assemble the noodles, choy sum, and Thai chili. Pour the mushroom sauce on top.

Title: Favorit Keluarga! Resep SAYUR ASEM KHAS SUNDA
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iy4iAaUjh0A

Sayur Asem Recipe (yield 10 servings)

Blended Spices ingredients:
2 clove garlic
7 pc shallot
3 pc large red chili
50 g peanut
100 ml water

Others:
100 g kidney bean
100 g peanut
125 g baby corn
9 pc yardlong bean
80 g melinjo
1 pc sweet corn
35 g melinjo leaf
2 pc chayote
100 g tamarind
30 g galangal, pounded
100 g palm sugar
4 pc bay leaf
2.5 liter water
1 tbsp salt
1 tbsp sugar

Add-ons:
Salted fish
Shrimp paste Sambal https://youtu.be/S4497kelQxY
Rice
Corn fritter

Steps:
1. Boil water in a pan.
2. Blend red chili, shallots, garlic, peanuts, and water until smooth. Add into the boiling water.
3. Add peanuts, kidney beans, and melinjo into the pan, followed with galangal and bay leaf.
4. Mix the tamarind with hot water well, then strain into the pan.
5. Add palm sugar, white sugar, and salt. Cook for 15-20 minutes.
6. Slice the chayote, yardlong beans, baby corn, and sweet corn.
7. Add the chayote, yardlong beans, baby corn, sweet corn, and melinjo leaf into the pan. Cook until soft.
8. Slice the salted fish. Soak it in hot water, then pat dry.
9. Heat some oil. Add flour, then fry the salted fish until cooked. Set aside.
10. Sayur Asem is ready to serve.

Title: Lembut Kenyal! Resep OTAK-OTAK BAKAR IKAN TENGGIRI [Lengkap 2 Jenis Sambal]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dxjYvC9c_CQ

Otak-otak Bakar Recipe (yield 30-35 pcs)

Ingredients:
500 g Spanish Mackerel (100% pure fish)
2.5 tsp salt
2 tsp mushroom powder
1 tbsp sugar
⅓ tsp pepper
1.5 tsp baking [powder

Others:
120 ml instant coconut milk
130 ml cold water
2 pc egg whites
120 g sago / tapioca flour
1.5 tbsp all-purpose flour
2 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
1-2 pc green onion
1 pc celery
Banana leaf to wrap
Toothpick/skewer, cut into small pieces


Tauco Sambal ingredients:
4 pc red chili
3 clove garlic
3 pc Thai chili
3 tbsp fermented bean
1.5 tbsp sugar
1 tsp vinegar
150 ml water

Peanut Sambal ingredients:
80 g peanut
3 pc red chili
1 tbsp palm sugar
1 tsp salt
200 ml water

Steps:
1. For Tauco Sambal, slice red chili, garlic, and red Thai chili. Fry red chili until half-cooked.
2. Fry the red Thai chili and garlic until cooked, then add all ingredients into a heat-proof blender. Add water, fermented beans, vinegar, and sugar. Blend until smooth.
3. Transfer into a pan. Cook shortly, then set aside.
4. For the Peanut Sambal, fry the peanuts until half-cooked. Then, add red chili and fry until cooked.
5. Transfer into a blender along with water, salt, and palm sugar. Blend until smooth, then cook again shortly. Set aside.
6. In a food processor, combine Spanish Mackerel, salt, sugar, mushroom powder, pepper, and baking powder. Blend until sticky.
7. Chop the garlic, shallots, green onions, and celery. Add into the food processor.
8. Add coconut milk and egg whites. Blend, then transfer to a bowl.
9. Add flour and sago flour. Stir, then add water. Mix well
10. Prepare banana leaves about 14-15 cm in width. Add a little bit of the dough. Roll, then secure with toothpicks.
11. Heat a pan or a stone grill. Grill the Otak-otak on medium-low heat until cooked.
12. Otak-otak is ready to serve.

Vermicelli Rissole Recipe (yield 16 pcs)

Skin ingredients:
200 g all-purpose flour
3 tbsp cornstarch
600 ml water
2 pc egg
2 tsp chicken powder
2 tbsp oil
2 pc green onions, chopped

Filling ingredients:
190 g dry corn vermicelli, soaked in water
3 clove garlic
3 pc shallot
250 g carrot
2 pc celery
3 tbsp oil
¼ tsp pepper
½ tbsp salt
½ tbsp mushroom powder / MSG
1 tbsp sugar

Peanut Sambal ingredients:
2 clove garlic
8 pc curly red chili
3 pc red Thai chili
3 tbsp peanut butter
1 tbsp palm sugar
3 pc kaffir lime
½ tbsp sweet soy sauce
150 ml water

Condiment:
Green Thai chili

Steps:
1. Chop the shallots, garlic, and celery. Grate the carrot.
2. Heat the oil. Sautè the garlic and shallots until fragrant, then add pepper, celery, and carrot. Cook for a moment.
3. Add vermicelli, salt, mushroom powder, and sugar. Mix well, then cut the vermicelli.
4. Transfer to a bowl and let cool.
5. In a bowl, combine flour, cornstarch, chicken powder, eggs, water, oil, and the green part of green onions. Mix well.

9. Prepare the skin. Add the filling, then fold and roll.
10. Heat the oil. Fry the Rissoles until golden brown. Set aside.
11. Traditional Rissoles are ready to serve.

Title: Nikmat Pakai Sambal Bawang! Resep SATE AYAM MANIS [Menu Buka Puasa & Sahur]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9ORUK94qvJo

Sweet Chicken Satay Recipe (yield 13 pcs)

Marinade ingredients:
500 g chicken thigh fillet
1 pc lime, small
½ tsp salt

Blended Spices ingredients:
3 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
3 pc candlenut, toasted
5 cm galangal
2 tsp coriander, toasted
2 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tbsp palm sugar
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp fish sauce, optional
1 tsp mushroom stock powder / MSG
¼ tsp pepper
2 tbsp water

Condiment:
Sambal bawang https://youtu.be/6vv6enFEVc4 
Kaffir lime
Margarine, to spread
Skewers, soaked in water

Steps:
1. Pat the chicken dry, then slice lengthwise. Transfer to a bowl, then add lime juice and salt. Stir.
2. Slice the galangal, garlic, and shallots. Pound the candlenuts.
3. Add the garlic, shallots, candlenuts, galangal, palm sugar, coriander, oyster sauce, fish sauce, sweet soy sauce, pepper, mushroom powder, and water into the blender. Blend until smooth.
4. Add the blended spices into the chicken. Mix well. Marinate for at least 30 minutes.
5. Skewer the chicken with the zig-zag method, then brush with margarine on all sides. Grill at 190°C for 12-15 minutes.
6. After 8 minutes, flip the Satay and continue grilling until it’s cooked through.
7. Sweet Chicken Satay is ready to serve.

Chicken Mushroom Shumai Recipe (yield 15 pcs)

Ingredients:
300 g ground chicken thigh
2 tbsp sugar
½ tbsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
¼ tsp mushroom powder / MSG
80 g tapioca flour
2 tbsp all-purpose flour
60 g Shiitake
60 g Champignon
2 pc green onion
2 clove garlic
60 ml oil
1 pc egg white
2 tsp oyster sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
2 tsp soy sauce
2 tsp fish sauce
2 tbsp cold water

Others:
White dim sum skin https://youtu.be/MxkTHBTS3L0 

Dipping Sauce:
1 tbsp ketchup
1 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp water

Steps:
1. Chop the garlic, green onions, Shiitake, and Champignon. Sauté for a moment until cooked. Set aside.
2. In a bowl, combine ground chicken, salt, sugar, mushroom powder, and pepper. Stir until sticky.
3. Add soy sauce, oyster sauce, sesame oil, fish sauce, egg white, sautéed mushroom, tapioca flour, and all-purpose flour. Mix well.
4. Add a bit of water. Mix well, then rest in the fridge for at least 2 hours.
5. Prepare the dim sum skin with a 9-cm diameter. Place the dough on the skin and wrap it.

Title: Tanpa Cetakan! Resep COOKIES PUTRI SALJU PREMIUM [Kue Lebaran]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RyKCRngSwPM

Putri Salju Cookies Recipe (yield 85-90 pcs)

Ingredients:
120 g unsalted butter (room temp)
120 g dutch butter (room temp)
110 g icing sugar
1 tsp vanilla extract
⅛ tsp salt
2 pc egg yolk
270 g all-purpose flour
55 g cornstarch
100 g roasted cashew

Coating:
Donut sugar (dextrose)

Steps:
1. Mix the dutch butter, unsalted butter, and icing sugar until pale and fluffy. Add vanilla extract, salt, and egg yolks. Mix evenly.
2. Sift in flour and cornstarch. Mix well gently with a spatula.
3. Chop the cashew and add it into the dough. Mix evenly.
4. For the first method, chill the dough in the fridge for 1-2 hours. Then, get a fistful of dough and shape it to a long cylinder as big as the thumb.
5. Dust the work surface with flour so the dough doesn’t stick. Shape into half-moons, then arrange the cookies on a baking pan that’s lined with baking paper.
6. For the second method, transfer the dough into a plastic bag. Flatten to about 20 cm x 29 cm, then divide into 5 sections using a blunt object.
7. Freeze in the freezer for 1 hour. Get one section of the dough. Dust it with a bit of flour, then slice diagonally.
8. Shape the dough into half-moons, then arrange them on a baking pan that’s lined with baking paper.
9. Bake using the bottom heat on low for 30 minutes, then bake using both the top and bottom heat for 10 minutes.
10. If you use an electric oven, bake it at 130°C for 30-40 minutes using both the top and bottom elements.
11. Remove the cookies from the oven, then coat them with the donut sugar.
12. Putri Salju Cookies are ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Resep BUBUR AYAM RICE COOKER [Bisa Untuk MPASI]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=A0bXmJ-HWFU

Rice Cooker Chicken Congee Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients:
200 g rice, rinsed, soaked
1 liter chicken broth
2 pc bone-in chicken thigh
1 pc bay leaf
1 clove garlic
½ tbsp salt, optional
1 tsp mushroom powder, optional
¼ tsp pepper, optional

Topping:
Boiled egg
Green onion
Celery
Fried shallot
Crackers
Emping
Thai chili sambal
Sweet soy sauce

Baby Food Topping:
Steamed carrot
Steamed kabocha

Steps:
1. Add the rice, pounded garlic, salt, bay leaf, and chicken broth to the rice cooker.
2. Remove the skin from the chicken, then add it into the rice cooker. Cook normally.
3. Remove the chicken and bay leaf, then stir the Congee with a balloon whisk until soft.
4. Shred the chicken. Set aside.
5. For the baby food topping, mash the carrot, kabocha, and chicken. Serve the Congee and toppings in the bowl or a plate.
6. If the Congee is too thick, add a little hot water and season to taste. Mix well.
7. Assemble the Congee and toppings in a bowl.
8. Chicken Congee is ready to serve.

Title: Fudgy! Resep BROWNIE BITES [Cocok Untuk Hampers]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dZJbLSiCJLw

Fudgy Brownie Bites Recipe (2 pans size 30 cm x 10 cm yield 72 pcs)

Ingredients A:
260 g Marvel Dark Compound Chocolate Buttons
50 g unsalted butter
50 g dutch butter / margarine
50 g oil

Ingredients B:
120 g dark brown sugar
120 g white sugar
200 g egg
6 g salt
2 g espresso powder
1 tbsp warm water
1 tbsp vanilla extract

Ingredients C:
100 g all-purpose flour
5 g cocoa powder

Ingredients D (topping):
50 g Marvel Chocolate Chips (for each pan)
Coarse sea salt

Step:
1. Pre-heat the oven at 190°C. Brush a 30 cm x 10 cm baking pan with oil and line with baking paper.
2. In a pan, combine dutch butter, unsalted butter, and oil. Melt on low heat, then pour into Marvel Dark Compound Chocolate Buttons. Stir until the chocolate melts.
3. In a bowl, combine eggs, white sugar, dark brown sugar, vanilla extract, and salt.
4. Mix the espresso powder with warm water, then add to the bowl. Mix until the sugar is dissolved, about 4-5 minutes.
5. Sift in flour and cocoa powder. Mix, then add melted chocolate. Mix evenly with a spatula.
6. Divide the batter into two pans evenly.
7. Sprinkle Marvel Chocolate Chips evenly, then sprinkle a bit of sea salt.
8. Bake at 190°C for 10 minutes. Lower it to 180°C and bake for 20 minutes.
9. Pull the brownies out of the oven. Wait for it to cool down or until lukewarm, then slice into several pieces.
10. Arrange brownies sideways on a pan lined with baking paper. Bake it again for 4-5 minutes at 180°C.
11. Get the brownies out of the pan and let cool.
12. Fudgy Brownie Bites are ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Menu Buka Puasa & Sahur! Resep AYAM GORENG MADU MENTEGA [Honey Butter Chicken]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cLtucBsSfzc

Honey Butter Chicken Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
450 g chicken thigh filet
3 clove garlic
8 tbsp potato starch
1 tsp lime juice
½ tsp chicken powder
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 pc egg

Add-ons:
½ pc onion
100 g green kabocha
3 pc red chili
50 g green beans

Sauce ingredients:
1-2 tbsp honey
1-2 tbsp Anchor Salted Butter
⅓ tsp chicken powder

Others:
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Pat the chicken dry, then slice into cubes. Transfer to a bowl.
2. Add lime juice, chicken powder, soy sauce, minced garlic, egg, and potato starch. Mix well.
3. Slice carrots, kabocha, green beans, chili, and onion into large pieces. Set aside.
4. Heat the oil. Fry the chicken until golden brown. Set aside.
5. In the same pan, fry the veggies for 1-2 minutes. Set aside.
6. Transfer the chicken and veggies into a bowl, then add Anchor Salted Butter, honey, and chicken powder. Mix well.
7. Honey Butter Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Resep NASI BAKSO BAKAR [Praktis Untuk Sahur]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FizQFYCu2fg

Grilled Meatball Rice Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
15 pc beef meatball
½ pc onion

Sauce ingredients:
2 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp margarine
1 tbsp chili sauce, optional
2 clove garlic, minced

Others:
2 pc egg
1 pc green onion, sliced
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp black pepper
1 tbsp oil
Rice

Steps:
1. In a heatproof bowl, combine minced garlic, sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, chili sauce, and margarine. Mix well.
2. Slice the onion. Add into the sauce with the meatballs. Mix well.
3. Place in the air fryer. Grill at 190°C for 10 minutes. Halfway through, give it a stir.
4. For the second version, skewer onion that’s been sliced into squares and meatballs. Brush with the sauce.
5. Grill at 190°C for 10 minutes. Halfway through, brush more sauce on.
6. Heat the oil. Sauté the green onions until fragrant, then add the eggs.
7. Season with salt and pepper. Cook until over-easy or to your preference.
8. Grilled Meatball Rice is ready to serve.

Title: EMPUK SEHARIAN! Resep KUE KLEPON: Lembut, Kenyal, Lumer Di Mulut [Takjil]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M2asgYKevVU

Klepon Recipe (yield 45 pcs)

Dough ingredients:
200 g glutinous rice flour
50 g rice flour
250 ml water
30 g sugar
⅛ tsp pandan extract
1 drop yellow food coloring, optional
1 drop red food coloring, optional

Filling ingredient:
150 g palm sugar

Others:
250 g grated coconut
½ tsp salt
2 pc pandan leaf

Steps:
1. In a bowl, combine grated coconut with salt. Mix well. Transfer to a heat-proof bowl and place pandan leaves on top. Steam for 15-20 minutes. Set aside and transfer to a bowl.
2. Grate the palm sugar. Shape it into balls, about 3-4 grams each.
3. In a pan, combine water, rice flour, sugar, pandan extract, a bit of yellow food coloring and red food coloring. Mix well, then cook until thickens.
4. Add the cooked dough into glutinous rice flour, then mix well until it’s smooth.
5. Shape the dough into a long cylinder. Slice to 12-15 grams per piece.
6. Heat water in a pan. Shape the dough into a bowl and fill it with palm sugar. Shape it again into balls.
7. Boil the Klepon on medium-low heat until it floats. Once it’s cooked, set aside.
8. Coat the Klepon with grated coconut.
9. Klepon is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Coconut Milkshake Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Ingredients:

Topping:

Steps:
1. Add the frozen coconut water, coconut ice cream, water, and Wong Coco’s Dugan into the blender. Blend until smooth.
2. Transfer to a glass. Add Wong Coco’s Dugan topping on top.

Title: Lembut Aromatik! Resep IKAN STEAM BAWANG PUTIH
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AAT-dCf2N8I

Garlic Steamed Fish Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
300 g dory filet
20 g dry glass noodles, soaked
1 thumb ginger
1 pc green onion

Fried Garlic ingredients:
15 clove garlic
50 ml oil
⅛ tsp salt
¼ tsp mushroom powder
⅛ tsp pepper

Sauce ingredients:
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp sugar
150 ml hot water
¼ tsp mushroom powder

Others:
Cilantro
Green onion

Steps:
1. Slice the green onions diagonally for garnish. Slice the other green onions into large pieces.
2. Pick the cilantro leaves. Add the cilantro and green onions into cold water for garnish.
3. Chop the garlic. Heat the oil and cook the garlic with salt, mushroom powder, and pepper until yellowish. Set aside.
4. Prepare a heat-proof plate. Place the glass noodles, green onions, and ginger on it.
5. Pat dry and slice the dory. Place the fish on the plate and steam for 7 minutes.
6. For the sauce, combine hot water with sugar, soy sauce, oyster sauce, and mushroom powder. Mix well.
7. Sprinkle fried garlic on top of the fish and pour some of the sauce. Steam again for 3 minutes.
8. Place the green onions and cilantro on top of the fish, then pour hot oil on top.
9. Garlic Steamed Fish is ready to serve.

Title: Spesial TANPA Arak Masak! Resep KOREAN BBQ : Galbi [Bisa Pakai Ayam]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U32MRmVdACc

Korean Beef Galbi Recipe (yield 8-9 servings)

Ingredients:
1 kg beef short ribs (galbi)
300 g galbi sauce
 
Galbi Sauce ingredients:
200 g Century pear
120 g onion
5 cm ginger
8 clove garlic
80 ml soy sauce
2 tbsp fish sauce
30 g palm sugar
2 tbsp honey
1 tsp black pepper powder
100 ml water
 
Dipping Sauce I (Ssamjang):
1 pc green onion
3 clove garlic, small
35 g gochujang
50 gr doenjang (Korean miso)
1½ tbsp sesame oil
2 tsp rice vinegar
2 tsp sugar
 
Dipping Sauce II (Korean Sweet Sour Dipping Sauce / Cho Ganjang):
½ pc onion
5 pc red Thai chili
3 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp rice vinegar
2 tbsp palm sugar
200 ml water
 
Add-ons:
Kabocha (Japanese pumpkin)
Lettuce
Garlic, halved
Japanese rice / white rice
Kimchi

Steps:
1. Slice the pear and onion. Slice the ginger and garlic thinly, then add into the blender.
2. Add soy sauce, fish sauce, palm sugar, honey, black pepper, and water. Blend until smooth, then mix some of it with the meat. Marinate for at least 1 hour.
3. Cook the rest of the galbi sauce to store in the fridge.
4. For the Ssamjang Dip, mince the garlic finely and place in a bowl.
5. Combine the garlic with gochujang, Korean miso, sesame oil, rice vinegar, and sugar. Mix well.
6. For the second dip, slice the onion and Thai chili thinly. In a bowl, combine vinegar, soy sauce, palm sugar, water, onion, and Thai chili. Mix well.
7. Heat the grill. Add some oil, then grill the meat until cooked on both sides.
8. Grill the meat with kabocha and garlic, then cut the meat.
9. Galbi is ready to serve with the dipping sauces and add-ons.

Title: Favorit Anak-Anak! Resep BROKOLI SAUS TIRAM & TIM TELUR
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=peRYPBqYPCo

Broccoli with Oyster Sauce & Steamed Egg (yield 5-6 servings)

Steamed Egg ingredients:
2 pc egg
200 ml water
¼ tsp salt

Stir-fry ingredients:
2 pc broccoli
1 tbsp salt
800 ml water
½ pc onion
5 clove garlic
2 tbsp oil

Sauce ingredients:
2 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp sugar
1 tsp chicken powder
350 ml water
2-3 tbsp cornstarch

Steps:
1. Mix water, eggs, and salt. Loosely beat the eggs, then strain into a heat-proof bowl.
2. Cover the bowl with aluminum foil. Steam for 20-30 minutes on medium-low heat.
3. Slice the broccoli into large florets. Peel the stem and slice the core.
4. Wash the broccoli, then soak it with water and salt for 5 minutes. Rinse it.
5. Slice the onion and mince the garlic.
6. For the Sauce, mix water, oyster sauce, soy sauce, sugar, chicken powder, and cornstarch.
7. Boil the broccoli and set aside.
8. Heat the oil. Fry the garlic until a bit yellowed. Set aside.
9. In the same pan, stir-fry the onion and broccoli. Add the sauce in, stir, and cook for a moment until the sauce thickens.
10. Pour the Broccoli Stir-Fry on top of the Steamed Egg. Sprinkle Fried Garlic on top.
11. Broccoli with Oyster Sauce & Steamed Egg is ready to serve.

Title: Lengkap Berbagai Tekstur! Resep SUP BAKSO AYAM SAYURAN [Yong Tau Foo]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TF995hUk4RQ

Chicken Meatball Veggie Soup / Yong Tau Foo Recipe (yield 6-7 servings)

Chicken Meatball Dough ingredients:
400 g chicken breast filet
2 tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
2 tsp stock powder / MSG
1 pc egg white
2 tsp baking powder
100 g white tofu
2 tbsp fried shallot
1 clove garlic
50 g cornstarch / sago flour / tapioca flour
80-100 ml Le Minerale cold water
1 tbsp fish sauce, optional
¼ tsp pepper

Chicken Broth ingredients:
300 g chicken carcass, boiled for 5 minutes
3 liter Le Minerale water
2 tsp salt
⅛ tsp pepper
1 tbsp sugar
2 tsp mushroom stock / MSG

Add-ons:
Tofu puffs, sliced
Red bell pepper, sliced & deseeded
Bitter melon, sliced, soaked in salt water, boiled
Purple eggplant
Broccoli, sliced, boiled
Tofu skin
Garlic oil (https://youtu.be/1WZF2s-7D_4) 
Spring onion
Red Thai Chili Sambal
Lime

Steps:
1. Boil water, then add the carcass in. Boil for 1 hour on low heat, then add salt, pepper, sugar, and mushroom stock. Stir.
2. In a food processor, add chicken breast filet, salt, mushroom stock, sugar, pepper, garlic, and fried shallots. Blend until sticky.
3. Add white tofu, egg whites, baking powder, fish sauce, cornstarch, and cold water. Blend until smooth, then add some of the dough into a piping bag.
4. Fill the tofu puffs with the dough. Pipe the dough on the tofu skin, then fold and flatten. Next, fry everything on medium-low heat until lightly browned. Set aside.
5. Slice the eggplant diagonally. Make a slit and fill it with the dough. Fry on medium-low heat until browned. Set aside.
6. Fill the bell pepper, bitter melon, and broccoli with the dough. Smooth out the dough with water. Boil on medium-low heat for a moment until cooked. Set aside.
7. Assemble the add-ons in a bowl, then pour the broth in. Add spring onions and garlic oil.
8. Chicken Meatball Veggie Soup is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Favorit! Resep NASI KATSU AYAM KOREA [Chicken Mushroom Donkkaseu]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GvVJOVP6MGQ

Chicken Mushroom Donkkaseu Recipe (yield 3-6 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g chicken breast filet
1 tsp salt
1 tsp chicken powder
1 pc lime
¼ tsp pepper

Dry Coat ingredients:
All-purpose flour
White breadcrumbs

Batter ingredients:
2 pc egg
2 tbsp milk
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper

Sauce ingredients:
20 pc champignon
3 tbsp butter
2 tbsp oil
½ pc onion
3 clove garlic
3 tbsp demi-glace powder
1 tbsp ketchup
½ tbsp Worcestershire sauce
400-500 ml water
½ tsp sugar

Add-ons:
3 pc cabbage leaf
5 tbsp mayonnaise
2 tbsp ketchup
Rice

Steps:
1. Pat the chicken dry, then butterfly it. Sprinkle it with chicken powder, salt, pepper, and lime juice on all sides evenly.
2. Cover it with plastic wrap, then pound the chicken with a rolling pin or other blunt object.
3. Sprinkle all sides with a bit of flour evenly.
4. In a bowl, mix eggs, milk, salt, and pepper. Dip the chicken into the batter, than coat it with breadcrumbs evenly.
5. Mince the garlic. Slice the onion and mushroom.
6. Heat the oil. Sauté the onion until fragrant, then add mushroom and garlic. Sauté for a moment.
7. Lower the heat. Add butter and demi-glace powder. Cook for a moment, then add water slowly while stirring.
8. Add ketchup, Worcestershire sauce, and sugar. Cook on low heat until the sauce comes together.
9. For the Salad, slice the cabbage and soak it in cold water. Mix the mayo with ketchup.
10. Heat the oil and fry the chicken on medium-high heat until golden brown. Set aside.
11. Chicken Mushroom Donkkaseu is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Gurih Kaldunya Berasa! Resep SUP AYAM AIR KELAPA [Chinese Coconut Chicken Soup]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5RUv4EiTmw0

Coconut Chicken Soup Recipe (yield 6-7 servings)

Ingredients:
1 pc free-range chicken @900g
2 tbsp salt, to marinate
3 pc Shiitake mushroom
120 g white Shimeji mushroom
1 thumb ginger
40 g kim cam (tuberose flower)
1 tsp whole white pepper, toasted
1 tsp whole black pepper, toasted
500 ml Hydro Coco
1 liter water
½ tsp salt, optional

Dipping Sauce ingredients:
3 clove garlic
10 pc green Thai chili
4 tbsp soy sauce

Others:
Rice

Steps:
1. Chop the chicken into small pieces. Marinate it with salt for 10 minutes, then rinse.
2. Slice the ginger, Shiitake, and Shimeji. Tie the tuberose flower into knots, then rinse it and squeeze the water out.
3. Bring water to a boil, then add Hydro Coco into the pan. Add chicken, ginger, Shiitake, Shimeji, tuberose flower, black pepper, and white pepper. Cook on low heat for 1 hour.
4. For the dipping sauce, slice the garlic and green Thai chili, then mix them into the soy sauce.
5. Coconut Chicken Soup is ready to serve.

Title: Renyah! Resep LUMPIA GORENG ISI AYAM SAYUR (Spring Roll)
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CGy5_4UfvPE

Spring Roll Recipe (yield 20 pcs)

Marinade ingredients:
250 g chicken thigh filet
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp palm sugar
½ tsp mushroom powder
1 tsp sesame oil

Others:
2 tbsp Anchor Unsalted Butter
1 tbsp oil
2 pc green onion
150 g carrot
150 g turnip
100 g wood ear mushroom
2 tsp fish sauce
¼ tsp pepper

Add-ons:
Bangkok Sambal
Head lettuce
Spring roll skin to wrap

Steps:
1. Slice the carrot, turnip, wood ear mushroom, and green onions.
2. Boil water. Cook the carrot and turnip with a bit of salt for 3-5 minutes. Set aside.
3. Slice the chicken thinly, then marinate it with soy sauce, oyster sauce, palm sugar, mushroom powder, and sesame oil. Mix well.
4. Heat Anchor Unsalted Butter and oil. Stir-fry the chicken for a moment.
5. Add green onions and cook until fragrant. Then, add wood ear mushroom, fish sauce, and pepper. Cook for a moment.
6. Turn the heat off, then add the carrot and turnip. Mix well and let cool.
7. Wrap the filling with the spring roll skin, then fry until golden brown. Set aside.
8. Spring Roll is ready to serve.

Title: Takjil Praktis! Resep ES LILIN & ES SERUT ALA KOREA [Milky Popsicle & Bingsoo]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wueHlA-o7D4

Olatte Popsicle and Olatte Bingsoo Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Ingredients:
Peach Olatte
Apple Olatte
Pear Olatte
Melon
Evaporated milk
Basil seed
Jelly, sliced
Melon syrup
Cocopandan syrup
Strawberry
Apple Olatte, frozen

Steps:
1. For the Popsicles, slice the strawberries. Add into some of the mold.
2. Pour Peach, Pear, and Apple Olatte into the mold. Place in the freezer until frozen.
3. For the Bingsoo, dice the melon and jelly. Soak the basil seeds in water.
4. Blend the frozen Olatte in a blender.
