Title: Juicy Meresap Sampai Dalam! Resep AYAM PANGGANG MADU Khas Resto Chinese
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=l-AVJdfZj_Y

Honey Roasted Chicken Recipe (yield 7-8 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
1 pc broiler (1.2 kg)
1 pc lime
5 clove garlic
1 thumb ginger
2 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp palm sugar
1 tbsp chicken powder
½ tsp pepper
½ tsp five-spice powder
1 tbsp sesame oil
¼ tsp red food coloring (optional)

Sauce ingredients:
4 tbsp honey
1 tsp sesame oil
2 tsp soy sauce

Steps:
1. Slice the ginger and garlic into large pieces.
2. In a bowl, marinate the chicken with lime juice, garlic, ginger, soy sauce, oyster sauce, palm sugar, pepper, chicken powder, five-spice powder, sesame oil, and a bit of red food coloring. Mix well.
3. Cover it with plastic wrap and press it down. Marinate overnight in the fridge.
4. Pat the chicken dry, then pierce it with the rotisserie stick. Clip the chicken tightly.
5. Tie the thighs together with a twine, then roast it for 60 minutes. Use high heat at the bottom and low heat at the top. If you use an oven, set it to 180°C.
6. For the Sauce, combine honey, sesame oil, and soy sauce. Mix well.
7. After 40 minutes, brush the chicken with the sauce. Roast it again.
8. Before carving, rest the chicken for 15 minutes.
9. Honey Roasted Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Resep KUOTIE AYAM: Praktis Bisa Kukus Atau Panggang!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hh6foBgXwcY

Chicken Guotie Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
200 g minced chicken thigh
½ tbsp chicken powder
½ tsp mushroom powder / MSG
2 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp soy sauce
1 tsp oyster sauce
½ tsp fish sauce
¼ tsp sesame oil
100 g Chinese cabbage
50 g chives
1 tbsp ginger extract
25 g dry glass noodles
2 tsp cornstarch

Dipping Sauce ingredients:
1 thumb ginger
2 clove garlic, chopped finely
2 tbsp black vinegar
2 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp chili sauce

Others:
Shumai wrapper (https://youtu.be/MxkTHBTS3L0)

Steps:
1. Soak the glass noodles in water for a moment.
2. Slice the Chinese cabbage into small pieces, then stir-fry until it wilts.
3. Slice the chives and glass noodles.
4. In a bowl, combine the minced chicken with soy sauce, oyster sauce, fish sauce, chicken powder, mushroom powder, sugar, pepper, sesame oil, ginger extract, and cornstarch. Mix well.
5. Add the cabbage, chives, and glass noodles. Mix well.
6. Wet the edges of the skin with water. Add 1 tbsp of filling on the skin, then fold it close. Repeat until all the filling is finished.
7. Steam some of the Guotie for 7-8 minutes.
8. Pan-fry the rest by placing the Guotie on a hot pan, then add water and a bit of oil. Cook on medium heat until the water evaporates.
9. For the dipping sauce, slice the ginger thinly. Mix black vinegar with soy sauce, then add the ginger in.
10. Mix the garlic with chili sauce.
11. Chicken Guotie is ready to serve.

Title: Renyah Empuk! Resep AYAM GORENG PEDAS [Nashville Chicken]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2soI15Ra2nk

Nashville Chicken Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
500 g chicken breast filet
2 tsp chicken powder
⅓ tsp salt
⅓ tsp pepper
1 tsp sugar
½ tbsp garlic powder
½ tbsp chili powder / smoked paprika powder
2 tsp Tabasco Original

Dry Coat ingredients:
300 g all-purpose powder
2 tsp baking powder
3 tbsp cornstarch
1 tsp salt
1 tsp pepper

Batter ingredients:
2 pc egg
100 ml milk
2 tbsp dry coat
1 tsp paprika powder, optional

Spicy Oil ingredients:
1 tbsp paprika powder
1 tsp chili powder
1 tsp garlic powder
2 tsp mushroom powder
2 tsp palm sugar
150 ml hot oil
2 tsp Tabasco Original

Add-ons:
Thick toast
Pickled gherkins

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken into strips, then score it.
2. Place the chicken in a bowl, then marinate it with salt, pepper, chicken powder, sugar, garlic powder, chili powder, and Tabasco Original. Mix well.
3. Cover with plastic wrap. Marinate for at least 2 hours or overnight in the fridge.
4. For the dry coat, combine flour, cornstarch, salt, pepper, and baking powder. Mix well.
5. For the batter, combine eggs, milk, and some of the dry coat. Mix well.
6. Add paprika powder. Mix well.
7. Heat the oil. Dip the chicken into the dry coat, then the batter, then the dry coat. Fry on medium-high heat until golden brown. Set aside.
8. For the Spicy Oil, combine paprika powder, chili powder, mushroom powder, garlic powder, and palm sugar in a bowl. Mix well, then pour hot oil into the bowl and stir.
9. Add Tabasco Original. Mix well.
10. Dip the chicken into the Spicy Oil to coat it evenly.
11. Nashville Chicken is ready to serve with toast and pickled gherkins.

Title: Praktis Menu Tahun Baru! Resep SOSIS KARI ALA JERMAN [Currywürst]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=F2jFDlzajSs

Currywürst Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
Beef sausage

Sauce ingredients:
1 pc onion, small
3 tbsp oil
2 tbsp curry powder
200 ml ketchup
1 tbsp apple juice
2 tsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tsp lemon juice
100 ml water
½ tsp chicken powder

Bavarian Cabbage ingredients:
½ pc cabbage
4 tbsp oil
½ tsp whole cumin
2 tbsp unsalted butter
2 tsp lemon juice
150 ml water
⅓ tsp salt
⅛ tsp pepper
1 tsp sugar

Add-ons:
French fries

Steps:
1. Finely chop the onion. Heat the oil and sauté until fragrant.
2. Add curry powder and ketchup. Stir, then add apple juice, chili sauce, Worcestershire sauce, lemon juice, water, and chicken powder. Cook for a moment, then set aside.
3. Heat the oil. Add cumin and stir-fry for a moment until fragrant. Then, add sliced cabbage and cook until lightly browned.
4. Add water, salt, pepper, sugar, butter, and lemon juice. Cook well.
5. Score the Bernardi Beef Sausage. Heat some oil and pan-fry the sausage until browned and cooked. Set aside, then slice.
6. Assemble the French Fries, sausage, and cabbage. Pour the Curry Sauce on top.
7. Currywürst is ready to serve.

Title: Resep AYAM ‘PANGGANG’ RICE COOKER [Cajun Chicken Rice]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RgG3ZurK_ls

Cajun Chicken Rice Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
700 g chicken thigh
2 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp sugar
½ tbsp paprika powder
2 tsp garlic powder
½ tbsp dried oregano
½ tbsp dried thyme

Rice ingredients:
380 g Fortune Premium Rice Grains
500 g water
½ tsp turmeric powder

Stir-Fry ingredients:
½ pc onion
½ pc red bell pepper
2 tbsp raisin
50 g smoked beef
1 tbsp unsalted butter
⅓ tsp salt
⅓ tsp mushroom powder / MSG
¼ tsp pepper

Tomato Salsa ingredients:
3 pc red tomato
⅓ pc onion, small
1 clove garlic
2 tbsp cilantro
3 tbsp lime juice
4 pc red Thai chili
1 tbsp Fortune Oil
½ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with salt, chicken powder, sugar, paprika powder, garlic powder, dried oregano, and dried thyme. Mix well and marinate overnight in the fridge.
2. Rinse Fortune Premium Rice Grains, then add turmeric powder.
3. Boil the water and pour it into the rice. Place the marinated chicken on top and cook in the rice cooker.
4. Deseed the tomatoes. Blend the onion, garlic, and Thai chili with a food processor.
5. Add the tomatoes in and blend again. Transfer to a bowl, then add salt, sugar, lime juice, Fortune Oil, and cilantro.
6. Dice the bell pepper, onion, and smoked beef.
7. Remove the chicken from the rice cooker. Heat a little bit of Fortune oil and pan-sear the chicken. Set aside.
8. Set aside some of the oil, then stir-fry the red bell pepper, onion, smoked beef, salt, stock powder, pepper, raisins, and butter. Cook for a moment.
8. Add the stir-fry into the rice and mix well.
9. Cajun Chicken Rice is ready to serve.

Title: Praktis Meresap Sampai Dalam! Resep AYAM BAKAR BUMBU KACANG
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eYyp469sx1Q

Grilled Chicken with Peanut Sauce Recipe (yield 8-9 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
700 g chicken thigh fillet
½ tbsp turmeric powder
1 tbsp garlic powder
1 tsp paprika powder (optional)
1 tsp salt
½ tsp pepper
1 tsp sugar
¾ tsp MSG / stock powder
2 tbsp coconut milk

Peanut Sauce ingredients:
75 g peanut
75 g cashew
3 clove garlic
4 pc shallot
30 g palm sugar
4 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tbsp coconut milk
3 cm aromatic ginger (optional)
10 pc curly red chili (optional)
500 ml water
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp mushroom powder / MSG

Add-ons:
Japanese cucumber
Kaffir lime
Red Thai chili
Rice

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with turmeric powder, garlic powder, paprika powder, salt, pepper, sugar, MSG, and coconut milk. Mix well. Marinate at least 1 hour at room temperature.
2. Finely ground the cashew and peanut. Set aside, then blend the garlic, shallots, curly red chili, and aromatic ginger with a bit of oil.
3. Sauté the blended spices and the ground nuts until fragrant. Then, add water, sweet soy sauce, palm sugar, coconut milk, salt, mushroom powder, and lime leaf. Cook on low heat until thickened. Set aside.
4. Grill the marinated chicken.
5. Boil the Thai chili until soft. Set aside.
6. Grilled Chicken is ready to serve with the add-ons.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Favorit Keluarga! Resep BOLU MENTEGA / BUTTER CAKE [Spesial Pakai Butter New Zealand]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9JqeJ37WYaQ

Butter Cake Recipe (yield 8-9 servings)

Dry ingredients:
140 g cake flour
15 g cornstarch
20 g milk powder
½ tsp baking powder

Egg Yolk Batter ingredients:
150 g Anchor Unsalted Butter
120 g Anchor Tinned Salted Butter
130 g sugar
6 pc egg yolk
30 ml oil
40 g condensed milk
1 tsp vanilla extract

Meringue ingredients:
4 pc egg white
50 g sugar
½ tsp cream of tartar
⅛ tsp salt

Steps:
1. Blend the sugar until finely ground. In a bowl, add room-temp Anchor Unsalted Butter and Anchor Tinned Salted Butter. Beat until fluffy.
2. Add sugar. Beat the mixture again, then add the egg yolks in slowly while mixing.
3. Add condensed milk, vanilla extract, and oil. Mix for a moment.
4. Sift in baking powder, milk powder, cornstarch, and cake flour. Mix on low speed until the batter comes together.
5. Beat the egg whites until frothy, then add half of the sugar, cream of tartar, and salt. Mix again.
6. Add the rest of the sugar and mix until the bird-beak stage.
7. Add the meringue bit by bit into the yolk batter. Fold in gently with a spatula.
8. Rub the pan with butter, then pour the batter in. Bake at 175°C for 50 minutes. At the last 15 minutes, lower the heat to 150°C.
9. Remove the cake out of the pan. Wait until it cools down before slicing.
10. Butter Cake is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Creamy Gurih! Resep ZUPPA SOUP AYAM [CHICKEN POT PIE]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_yadm8Tl66Q

Chicken Pot Pie Recipe (yield 9 pcs)

Chicken Stock ingredients:
500 g drumstick
2 pc carrot
2 pc celery, large
2 pc bay leaf
3 clove garlic
1 L water
¼ tsp black pepper

Others:
6 tbsp all-purpose flour
4 tbsp unsalted butter
200 ml cooking cream
½ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
1 tsp chicken powder
⅛ tsp pepper
⅛ tsp nutmeg powder
550 ml chicken stock

Filling ingredients:
½ pc onion, large
150 g chicken sausage
195 g chicken luncheon
100 g peas

Add-ons:
Puff pastry
Egg for egg wash
White sesame seeds

Steps:
1. Boil the water. Add chicken, carrot, garlic, bay leaf, celery, and black pepper. Bring to a boil, then continue cooking on low heat for 15 minutes.
2. Dice the onion, chicken luncheon, and sausage.
3. Remove the carrot from the saucepan, then dice.
4. Heat some oil. Sautè the onion until fragrant, then add chicken luncheon and sausage. Cook for a moment.
5. Add butter, flour, and nutmeg powder. Cook for a moment, then strain in the stock.
6. Shred the chicken. Slice, then add into the soup.
7. Add carrot, peas, salt, sugar, pepper, chicken powder, and cooking cream. Cook for a moment.
8. Pour the soup into heat-proof cups, then slice the puff pastry into 4 pieces. Place on top of the cups.
9. Brush the puff pastry with egg and sprinkle sesame seeds on top. Bake on 190°C for 15 minutes.
10. Chicken Pot Pie is ready to serve.

Eggplant Omelette Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:

⅓ tsp mushroom powder / MSG

Others:
Rice

Steps:

Title: Resep NASI KRAWU KHAS GRESIK: Lengkap 2 Jenis Serundeng!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RqWZDGZVChg

Nasi Krawu Recipe (yield 10 servings)

Ingredients:
1.2 kg beef shank
2 L water

Blended Spices ingredients:
10 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
4 pc candlenut, pounded
5 cm galangal, sliced
3 cm turmeric, roasted
2 tsp coriander seed, toasted
4 cm ginger, sliced
50 ml oil
30 ml water

Others:
3 pc bay leaf
2 pc lemongrass, pounded and sliced
1 tsp beef powder
½ tsp salt
½ tsp pepper
½ tsp mushroom powder / MSG
1 tbsp sugar
4 tbsp Bango Sweet Soy Sauce
3 tbsp thick coconut milk
1 tsp tamarind
800 ml beef broth

Serundeng ingredients:
170 g grated coconut
3 cm turmeric
2 clove garlic
3 pc shallot
4 pc curly red chili, boiled
5 pc lime leaf
½ tsp salt
½ tsp mushroom powder / MSG
2 tbsp palm sugar

Add-ons:
Shrimp Paste Sambal
Rice

Steps:
1. Pressure-cook the meat for 1.5 hours. Set aside.
2. Blend the garlic, shallots, and turmeric with a bit of oil. Cook until fragrant.
3. Add lime leaves, grated coconut, palm sugar, salt, and mushroom powder. Cook on low heat until dry. Set aside half of the Serundeng.
4. Blend the curly red chili until smooth, then add into the remaining Serunding. Cook again until dry and set aside.
5. Blend the galangal, ginger, candlenuts, garlic, shallots, turmeric, and coriander seeds with oil and water until smooth.
6. Cook the blended spices until fragrant, then add lemongrass and bay leaf. Cook until fragrant.
7. Add the broth, meat, coconut milk, tamarind, salt, pepper, mushroom powder, beef powder, sugar, and Bango Sweet Soy Sauce. Cook for 15-20 minutes until flavorful.
8. Press the meat down until it disintegrates.
9. Nasi Krawu is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Gurih Renyah! Resep UDANG GORENG BIHUN
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4itAYE7hljU

Vermicelli-Wrapped Shrimp Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
16 pc shrimp, peeled with tail intact
125 g vermicelli

Batter ingredients:
2 pc egg
1 tbsp chicken powder
6 tbsp all-purpose flour

Sauce ingredients:
4 tbsp mayonnaise
1 tbsp chili sauce
3 pc red Thai chili
½ tsp lime juice
1 tsp sesame oil

Steps:
1. Boil water, then pour it into the vermicelli. Soak for 10 minutes.
2. Mince the Thai chili, then add into the mayonnaise.
3. Add lime juice, chili sauce, and sesame oil. Mix well.
4. Combine flour, chicken powder, and eggs. Mix well.
5. Slit the bottom of the shrimp. Straighten the shrimp, then dip into the batter.
6. Strain the vermicelli, then cut it. Add 4 tbsp of batter and mix well.
7. Coat the shrimp with the vermicelli evenly.
8. Heat the oil. Fry the shrimp until golden brown. Set aside.
9. Vermicelli-Wrapped Shrimp is ready to serve.

Title: Dijamin Keluarga Suka! Resep SOHUN AYAM CLAYPOT
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oNVHlUJcTeQ

Claypot Glass Noodles Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
150 g glass noodles
5 clove garlic
7 pc shallot
1 pc green onion
5 slice ginger
3 tbsp oil
300 ml water
1 tsp chicken powder

Other ingredients:
180 g ground chicken
1 tbsp oyster sauce
3 tsp soy sauce
1.5 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
1 tbsp cornstarch
¼ tsp black pepper

Add-ons (optional):
Sliced Thai chili + soy sauce

Steps:
1. Soak the glass noodles for 2-3 minutes. Set aside.
2. Marinate the chicken with oyster sauce, sweet soy sauce, soy sauce, sesame oil, cornstarch, and black pepper. Mix well.
3. Pound the garlic. Slice the shallots, green onions, and ginger.
4. Heat the oil. Add the ginger, shallots, and the white part of green onions. Stir.
5. Add the garlic in. Cook until fragrant, then add the chicken and cook for a moment.
6. Add water and chicken powder. Bring to a boil.
7. Add green onions and glass noodles. Cook for a moment until everything is absorbed.
8. Claypot Glass Noodles are ready to serve.

Title: Praktis Menghangatkan! Resep AYAM KUKUS JAHE
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rDu-YzI4Pis

Steamed Ginger Chicken Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
750 g whole chicken thigh
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp stock powder / MSG
1 tsp sugar
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tsp pepper
2 tbsp cornstarch

Others:
40 g / 8 cm ginger

Scallion Oil:
4 pc scallion
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp mushroom powder / MSG
3 tbsp oil
1 tsp sesame oil

Steps:
1. Pat the chicken dry, then chop into several pieces.
2. Marinate the chicken with soy sauce, oyster sauce, salt, stock powder, sugar, pepper, and cornstarch. Mix well, then marinate for 30 minutes.
3. Slice the scallions. Place in a bowl, then season with salt and mushroom powder.
4. Heat the oil. Pour the hot oil into the scallions, then add sesame oil. Mix well.
5. Slice the ginger. Place the chicken on stainless or heat-proof plates. Divide into 2 plates, then place the ginger on top. Steam for 25-30 minutes.
6. Steamed Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Resep SAYAP AYAM GORENG SAUS VIETNAM [Garlic Pepper Wings] : Gurih & Nagih!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RpgVK1YhOI8

Garlic Pepper Wings Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
1 kg chicken wings, halved
1 tbsp sesame oil
1 pc lime
1 tsp salt
1 tbsp stock powder / MSG
½ tsp pepper

Braise ingredients:
80 g garlic, small, unpeeled
2 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp fish sauce
1 tsp coarse black pepper
400 ml water
1 tbsp sugar
3 tbsp oil

Dipping Sauce ingredients:
3.5 tbsp fish sauce
3 tbsp sugar
5 tbsp water
2 tbsp lime juice
2 tsp rice wine vinegar
2 tbsp carrot
1 pc curly red chili
1 pc red Thai chili
1 clove garlic

Others:
Habanero
Cornstarch / tapioca flour to coat

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken wings with lime juice, salt, stock powder, pepper, and sesame oil. Mix well and marinate for 15 minutes.
2. Slice the carrot thinly. Mince the garlic finely, slice the curly red chili and red Thai chili. Place them in a bowl.
3. Add sugar, rice wine vinegar, fish sauce, lime juice, and water. Mix well.
4. Blend the garlic in a blender.
5. Heat some oil. Sauté the garlic and black pepper until fragrant and browned. Set aside some of the garlic as garnish.
6. Add the chicken wings. Stir, then add oyster sauce, fish sauce, sugar, and water. Cook on medium-low heat for 8-10 minutes. Set aside.
7. Coat the wings with cornstarch/tapioca flour. Rest for 5 minutes.
8. Heat the oil and fry the wings until crisp. Set aside, then fry the habanero. Set aside.
9. Garlic Pepper Wings are ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Favorit Keluarga! Resep SUP AYAM MAKARONI khas Amerika [Chicken Noodle Soup]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GjUI-ho-dY8

Chicken Noodle Soup Recipe (yield 8-9 servings)

Ingredients:
750 g broiler chicken, chopped into 8 pieces
5 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
½ pc onion
245 g carrot
4 pc celery
85 g green bean
100 g dry macaroni
¼ tsp nutmeg powder, optional
1 tbsp Royco Chicken Powder
1 tbsp margarine
1 tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
2.5 L water
Oil to sauté

Steps:
1. Heat some oil. Pan-sear the chicken until browned on both sides. Set aside some of the oil.
2. Slice the shallots and garlic, then sauté them until fragrant.
3. Add margarine and nutmeg powder. Sauté until fragrant, then add water and bring to a boil.
4. Slice the carrots, green beans, onion, and celery.
5. Add the carrots, green beans, onion, and macaroni. Then, add Royco Chicken Powder, sugar, salt, and pepper. Cook for 15 minutes or until soft.
6. Set the chicken aside, then shred.
7. Add the shredded chicken back into the soup. Add celery and cook for 3-5 minutes.
8. Chicken Noodle Soup is ready to serve.

Title: Ekonomis Tetap Spesial! Resep SAMBAL TEMPE GOANG Khas Sunda
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tpOwpZYZ9lE

Sambal Tempeh Goang Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
200 g tempeh
2 clove garlic
25 g red Thai chili
45 g green Thai chili
1.5 tsp sugar
1 tsp mushroom powder / MSG
1 tsp salt
3-4 tbsp hot oil

Others:
Rice
Crackers

Steps:
1. Slice the tempeh. Fry until browned and set aside.
2. Add garlic, salt, mushroom powder, and sugar to the stone bowl. Grind until smooth.
3. Add green and red Thai chili. Grind until smooth.
4. Heat the oil. Pour hot oil into the Sambal. Stir well.
5. Add the tempeh in and mash it. Stir well.
6. Sambal Tempeh Goang is ready to serve.

Title: Favorit Keluarga! Resep PUDING ALA GYU-KAKU [Panna Cotta]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QTS86nvYLuc

Gyu-Kaku Pudding Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Ingredients:
350 ml cream
200 ml water
60 ml Indomilk Plain Condensed Milk
1.5 tsp or 5 g gelatin powder
1 tsp vanilla extract

Brown Sugar Sauce ingredients:
100 ml water
50 g brown sugar
50 g white sugar

Other Toppings:
Indomilk Swiss Choco Condensed Milk
Roasted cashew

Steps:
1. Add 1-2 tbsp to the gelatin.
2. In a pan, add the cream, water, vanilla extract, and Indomilk Plain Condensed Milk. Cook on medium-low heat while stirring until it simmers.
3. Turn the heat off. Add the gelatin. Mix well, then strain it.
4. Transfer the mixture into a bowl. Let cool on room temp, then chill in the fridge for 3 hours or until it sets.
5. For the Brown Sugar Sauce, cook the white sugar with a bit of water until browned, then add the rest of the water and the brown sugar. Cook until the sugar is dissolved, then strain the sauce.
6. Grind the cashews with a blender.
7. Pour the Brown Sugar Sauce on the pudding, then sprinkle with cashew.
8. For other topping, pour the Indomilk Swiss Choco Condensed Milk, then sprinkle with cashew.
9. Gyu-Kaku Pudding is ready to serve.

Title: Murah Bukan Murahan! Resep NASI KULIT AYAM KRISPI SAMBAL GLEDEK : 100% Renyah & Gurih
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=J2E6E2TNdgA

Chicken Skin Rice with Sambal Gledek Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients:
300 g chicken skin
½ tbsp salt
½ tsp pepper
1 L water

Rice ingredients:
375 g Fortune Premium Rice Grains
500 ml water

Wet Batter ingredients:
100 g seasoned flour
1 pc egg
1 tsp onion powder
50 ml water

Dry Flour Mix:
Seasoned flour

Sambal ingredients:
100 g red Thai chili
5 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
50 ml Fortune Oil
50 ml water
¾ tsp salt
1 tsp stock powder / MSG
1 tsp sugar

Add-ons:
Egg
Sliced green onion
Salt and pepper, to taste
Fried Cabbage

Steps:
1. Rinse Fortune Premium Rice Grains, then add water. Cook with a rice cooker.
2. For the Sambal, heat Fortune Oil. Fry the garlic, shallots, and Thai chili for a moment.
3. Add the Sambal ingredients into a food processor. Blend, then cook it again.
4. Add water, salt, stock powder, and sugar. Cook until oily on medium heat. Set aside.
5. Bring water to a boil, then add salt, pepper, and chicken skin. Boil for 3-5 minutes, then rinse well.
6. Transfer the chicken skin to a bowl, then add seasoned flour, onion powder, egg, and water. Mix well.
7. Heat Fortune Oil. Coat the chicken skin with the dry flour mix evenly, then fry it until crispy on medium-low heat. Set aside.
8. Beat the egg, green onion, salt, and pepper. Fry it on a pan and set aside.
9. Fry the cabbage until crisp or to taste.
10. Chicken Skin Rice with Sambal Gledek is ready to serve.

Title: Tanpa Tepung Terigu! Resep MIE OATMEAL [100% Kenyal]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hZDPVQYm_Dw

Fried Oat Noodles (yield 3-4 servings)

Noodle Dough ingredients:
150 g Quaker Rolled Oat
100 g rice flour
100 g tapioca flour
¼ tsp salt
250 ml boiling water

Fried Noodles ingredients:
3 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
3 tbsp oil
2 pc egg
50 g beansprout
1 pc green onion
1 tbsp fish sauce / soy sauce
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
½ tsp stock powder / MSG
¼ tsp pepper

Add-ons:
Sweet soy chicken, optional (https://youtu.be/XGtpp6eGg5Y)

Steps:
1. Grind Quaker Rolled Oats with a blender. Transfer to a bowl.
2. Add rice flour, tapioca flour, and salt. Mix well, then boil some water. Pour it into the dough and stir with chopsticks.
3. After the dough can be handled safely, knead it by hand until it comes together, then flatten it to 2-3 mm thick. Dust with flour, if needed.
4. Fold the dough once, then slice it.
5. Boil some water. Cook the noodles for 2-3 minutes or until cooked. Rinse with water and set aside.
6. Chop the garlic and slice the shallots. Sauté until fragrant.
7. Add the eggs in. Stir, then add green onions, noodles, fish sauce, sweet soy sauce, stock powder, and pepper. Cook for a moment.
8. Add the beansprouts. Stir.
9. Fried Oat Noodles are ready to serve.

Spicy Sweet & Sour Chicken Recipe (yield 6-7 servings)

Bahan marinasi:
1 kg broiler chicken, chopped into 17 pieces
1 tsp stock powder
1 tsp salt
½ tsp pepper
4 tbsp cornstarch
2 tbsp lime juice
2 tsp sesame oil

Other ingredients:
1 pc onion
1 pc green onion
1 pc cucumber
5 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
8 pc red Thai chili
2 pc red chili
2 tbsp chili sauce
3 tbsp ketchup
2 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp margarine
80 ml oil
300 ml water

Steps:

2. Mince the garlic and slice the shallots, onion, green onion, red chili, and Thai chili. Peel the cucumber and slice it diagonally.
3. Heat some oil and fry the chicken until browned on both sides. Set aside.

Title: Wangi Maksimal! Resep AYAM GORENG HONG KONG ala Devina Hermawan: Cocok Untuk Stok Di Kulkas!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=72ddIqTlL84

Hong Kong Fried Chicken Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
1 kg chicken thigh
½ tbsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
½ tbsp stock powder / MSG
½ tsp pepper
½ tsp five-spice powder
1 tbsp dark soy sauce
2 tbsp Royco Oyster Sauce
2 tsp sesame oil

Others:
6 clove garlic
1 thumb ginger
2 tbsp oil
500 ml water
2 tbsp cornstarch

Sambal ingredients:
2 clove garlic
5 pc curly red chili
10 pc red Thai chili
50 ml water
¼ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
1 tsp vinegar

Add-ons:
Cilantro
Rice
Cucumber
Garlic oil

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with dark soy sauce, Royco Oyster Sauce, salt, sugar, stock powder, pepper, and five-spice powder. Mix well.
2. Add sesame oil and mix well. Marinate for 1-2 hours at room temperature.
3. For the Sambal, blend Thai chili, curly chili, garlic, and water. Cook in a pan.
4. Season with salt, sugar, and vinegar. Cook for a moment.
5. Slice the ginger and pound the garlic.
6. Heat some oil. Sauté the garlic and ginger until fragrant, then add the chicken and marinade. Cook for a moment.
7. Add water. Cook for 20-30 minutes on low heat, then set the chicken aside.
8. Remove the ginger and garlic. Add the cornstarch mixture. Cook for a moment until it thickens a bit.
9. Heat some oil. Fry the chicken on medium heat until crisp. Set aside.
10. Hong Kong Chicken is ready to serve with the add-ons.

Title: Lembut Manis Gurih! Resep ES KETAN HITAM
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hqYhmRIswJE

Black Sticky Rice Dessert Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
150 g black glutinous rice
150 g white glutinous rice
150 ml water
80 ml coconut milk
2 pc pandan leaf
40 g palm sugar
¼ tsp salt

Creamy Soup ingredients:
600 ml water
150 g Kapal Api Krim Kafe
100 g sugar
½ tsp salt
2 pc pandan leaf

Others:
Young coconut
Shaved ice
Vanilla ice cream

Steps:
1. Soak the glutinous rice overnight or for at least 3 hours. Then, rinse cleanly.
2. Steam the glutinous rice for 30 minutes.
3. Bring water, coconut milk, palm sugar, salt, and pandan leaves to a boil until the sugar is dissolved. Pour into the steamed glutinous rice. Mix well.
4. Steam it again for 20 minutes.
5. For the Creamy Soup, add Kapal Api Krim Kafe, sugar, salt, pandan leaves, and water into a saucepan. Stir well and bring to a boil. Chill.
5. Assemble the shaved ice, young coconut, glutinous rice, and vanilla ice cream. Pour the Creamy Soup in.
6. Black Sticky Rice Dessert is ready to serve.

Title: Resep PASTA DAGING ALA RUSIA: Creamy & Gurih! [Beef Stroganoff Fettuccine]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NsOJQkq94Jo

Beef Stroganoff Recipe (yield 7-8 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
500 g beef fillet
1 pc egg yolk
4 tbsp all-purpose flour
2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
½ tsp black pepper
1 tbsp oil

Other ingredients:
2 pc onion, medium
250 g swiss brown mushroom
3 clove garlic
5 pc bay leaf
3 tbsp unsalted butter
200 ml cream / sour cream
1 tbsp lemon juice or 80 ml white wine / sake
1 tbsp mustard, optional
⅓ tsp salt
¼ tsp black pepper
2 tbsp tomato sauce
2 pc pickled gherkins, optional
500 ml water
1 pc celery
2 tsp beef powder
Parsley

Mixed Vegetables ingredients:
250 g broccoli, blanched
250 g carrot, sliced, blanched
6 clove garlic, minced
2 tbsp oil
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp black pepper
1 tbsp olive oil

Add-ons:
Fettuccine

Steps:
1. Pound the beef with a rolling pin or other blunt objects. Slice diagonally.
2. Marinade with Worcestershire sauce, egg yolk, flour, black pepper, and oil. Mix well and marinade for 10 minutes.
3. Boil the pasta. Once cooked, add a bit of oil and mix well.
4. Heat some oil. Sauté the garlic until fragrant, then add carrots and broccoli. Stir.
5. Season with salt and black pepper. Cook for a moment, then add olive oil. Stir and set aside.
6. Slice the mushroom, onion, pickled gherkins, and parsley. Mince the garlic.
7. Heat some oil. Add the beef in and cook until browned. Set aside.
8. Add more oil and heat it up. Sauté the mushroom until fragrant, then add onion. Cook until fragrant.
9. Add garlic, bay leaf, celery, butter, beef, pickled gherkins, parsley, lemon juice, mustard, tomato sauce, water, beef powder, and cream. Cook for a moment.
10. Season with salt and black pepper. Cook for a moment.
11. Beef Stroganoff is ready to serve with fettuccine and vegetables.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Resep ‘PIZZA’ KRISPI JAMUR: Renyah & Gurih! [Mushroom Tart]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2ls0YERhMdU

Mushroom Tart Recipe (yield 3-6 servings)

Dough ingredients:
195 g all-purpose flour
½ tsp salt
20 g cold water
120 g Anchor Unsalted Butter

Caramelized Onions ingredients:
2 tbsp oil
4 sprig thyme
½ tbsp Anchor Unsalted Butter
1.5 pc onion
½ tsp sugar
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp black pepper

Creamy Mushroom ingredients:
75 g Oyster mushroom
50 g Button mushroom / Champignon
50 g Shiitake
100 g Shimeji
1 pc egg yolk
5 sprig thyme
1 tbsp Anchor Unsalted Butter
80 ml Anchor Cooking Cream
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper

Topping:
10 g parmesan

Steps:
1. Dice Anchor Unsalted Butter into small pieces. Transfer to a bowl.
2. Add flour and salt. Mix with hand until sandy.
3. Add cold water. Mix a bit, then wrap dough with a plastic wrap. Place in the fridge for 1 hour.
4. For the Caramelized Onions, slice the onions and sauté on high heat until fragrant and lightly browned.
5. Add salt, sugar, black pepper, and thyme. Cook until browned on low heat.
6. Turn the heat off, then add Anchor Unsalted Butter. Stir, then set aside.
7. Flatten the dough and shape into a rectangle.
8. Press the edge of the dough. Punch holes in the center with a fork, then bake it at 170°C for 15 minutes.
9. Slice the mushrooms to your preference. Heat the oil. Sauté the Oyster mushroom and Shimeji on high heat for a moment.
10. Add the rest of the mushrooms. Continue cooking until fragrant and browned.
11. Add Anchor Unsalted Butter, thyme, salt, and black pepper. Stir, then add Anchor Cooking Cream. Cook for a moment.
12. Transfer the mushroom into a bowl. Let it cool down until it’s lukewarm, then add the yolk in. Mix well.
13. Assemble the Caramelized Onions and Creamy Mushroom on top of the tart crust. Add grated Parmesan. Bake it again at 190°C for 10 minutes.
14. Mushroom Tart is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: 100% Sukses! Resep CHOCOLATE CHURROS Dengan Saus Karamel Favorit Anak & Suami.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i5Mix9Xrfkc

Chocolate Churros Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
130 ml milk
30 g white condensed milk
30 g butter
50 g all-purpose flour
10 g cocoa powder
50 g Goriorio, Chocolate flavor
1 pc egg
⅙ tsp salt

Salted Caramel Sauce:
80 ml milk
60 g sugar
40 ml water
30 g butter
60 g palm sugar
½ tsp salt
1 tsp vanilla extract

Coating:
4 tbsp sugar

Steps:
1. For the Sauce, add sugar, palm sugar, and water into a saucepan. Cook on medium heat until the sugars are dissolved and fragrant. Then, add milk, butter, salt, and vanilla extract. Continue cooking for 2 minutes, then set aside.
2. For the Churros dough, cook milk, condensed milk, butter, and salt on medium-low heat until dissolved. Then, add flour and mix evenly.
3. Transfer to a bowl. Rest until it’s cooled down or lukewarm.
4. Grind the Chocolate Goriorio using a food processor. Add it into the dough along with the egg. Mix evenly.
5. Sift the cocoa powder in and mix well.
6. Place the piping tip inside the piping bag, then add the Churro dough.
7. Heat the oil. Pipe the Churro dough into the oil and cut it with scissors. Fry the Churros until the exterior is crisp. Set aside.
8. Grind the sugar with a blender. Coat the Churros with sugar.
9. Chocolate Churros are ready to serve.

Title: Gak Alot Pasti Nagih! Resep CUMI CABAI HIJAU
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X-yecPk2qDw

Green Chili Squid Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g squid
1.5 L water
7 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 tsp salt

Other ingredients:
150 g green tanjung chili
30 g green Thai chili
6 clove garlic
9 pc shallot
4-5 tbsp oil
5 pc kaffir lime leaf
1.5 tbsp Royco Oyster Sauce
¼ tsp salt
½ tbsp sugar
¼ tsp stock powder / MSG
50 ml water

Add-ons:
Cooked rice
Kaffir lime

Steps:
1. Remove the eyes, bones, and other hard parts of the squid. Slice, then rinse with water.
2. Boil some water and add the squid, kaffir lime leaf, and salt. Boil for 10-15 minutes.
3. Chop the garlic, shallots, and green chili with a food processor.
4. Heat the oil. Stir-fry the chopped garlic, shallots, and green chili.
5. Add kaffir lime leaf and Thai chili. Cook until fragrant, then add the squid. Stir well.
6. Add Royco Oyster Sauce, salt, sugar, and stock powder. Stir well.
7. Add water and cook until water is reduced.
8. Green Chili Squid is ready to serve.

Title: Sangat Praktis & Gurih! Resep MARTABAK TELUR ROTI TAWAR
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i470sMyJWc4

Martabak Telur Bread (yield 8 servings)

Ingredients:
8 pc white bread, no crust
1 pc green onion
⅓ pc onion
200 g ground beef
3 pc egg
1 tsp curry powder
¾ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
1 tsp stock powder / MSG
¼ tsp pepper
Fortune Oil

Others:
Pickle
Fortune Premium Rice Grains

Steps:
1. Dice the onion and slice the green onions.
2. In a bowl, combine the ground meat, green onions, onion, curry powder, salt, sugar, stock powder, and pepper. Mix well.
3. Add eggs. Mix well.
4. Prepare the bread. Add the meat filling evenly. Top with another bread.
5. Slice the bread into two pieces. Clean up the edges.
6. Heat Fortune Oil. Fry the Martabak Bread on medium-low heat until it’s golden brown. Bake at 160°C for 5 minutes.
7. Martabak Telur Bread is ready to serve.

Title: Wangi Gurih Segar! Resep BIHUN AYAM KUAH LAKSA
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gIotnZALG2o

Vermicelli Laksa Recipe (yield 7-8 servings)

Ingredients:
350 g chicken breast fillet
2 pc potato
350 g vermicelli, soaked in water
200 ml coconut milk
2 L water
1 tbsp salt
½ tsp mushroom powder / MSG
½ tsp pepper
2 tbsp sugar
1 tbsp chicken powder

Laksa spices:
60 ml oil
7 clove garlic
10 pc shallot
5 pc candlenut, toasted
½ tsp coriander, toasted
½ tsp cumin, toasted (optional)
6 cm turmeric
8 pc red curly chili
3 cm ginger
5 pc bay leaf
6 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 tsp tamarind
1 pc lemongrass, pounded, sliced
1 pc tomato, medium

Others:
10 pc shallot for the Fried Shallot, optional
4 tbsp oil

Add-ons:
Beansprout
Lemon basik
Red Thai chili, boiled, blended
Kaffir lime
4 pc egg + ¼ tsp salt

Steps:
1. Slice the shallots. Heat the oil and fry the shallots until golden brown. Set aside.
2. Blend the candlenuts, garlic, shallots, ginger, turmeric, red curly chili, coriander, cumin, and oil until smooth.
3. Add water if needed. Blend again.
4. Heat the shallot oil. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant, then add lemongrass, bay leaf, lime leaf. Cook for a moment.
5. Add water, tomato, potato, chicken, chicken powder, salt, sugar, pepper, and tamarind. Cook for 10 minutes or until the chicken is cooked and the potato is soft.
6. Set aside the tomato and chicken. Shred the chicken.
7. Add coconut milk and mushroom powder into the broth. Stir.
8. Beat the eggs with salt. Fry until it’s cooked, then slice.
9. Vermicelli Laksa is ready to serve with the add-ons.

Title: Cocok Bekal Anak: Resep NASI SOSIS TELUR JEPANG ‘OYAKODON’ & NUGGET ‘NIGIRI’
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VcgWOFotuFs

Sausage Oyakodon & Nugget Nigiri Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Rice ingredients:
275 g rice
60 g glutinous rice
500 ml water

Nugget Nigiri ingredients:
Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget
350 g rice
2 tbsp mayonnaise
¼ tsp salt

Sausage Oyakodon ingredients:
Kanzler Beef Cocktail Sausage
4 pc egg
½ pc onion
1 pc green onion

Oyakodon Sauce ingredients:
45 ml soy sauce
45 ml mirin
1 tsp dashi powder / chicken powder
1.5 tsp sugar
150 ml water

Others:
Broccoli
Cherry tomato

Steps:
1. For the sauce, combine dashi powder, sugar, soy sauce, mirin, and water. Stir well.
2. Slice the green onions and onion, then make slits on Kanzler Beef Cocktail Sausage.
3. Cook the Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget in an air fryer at 180°C for 8 minutes.
4. Mix the rice with mayonnaise and salt. Mix well.
5. Cut the nori with scissors, then shape the rice to your liking.
6. Place Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget on top of the rice, then secure with nori.
7. Heat the pan. Add some Oyakodon sauce, then add Kanzler Beef Cocktail Sausage and onion. Cook for a moment.
8. Add green onions. Lightly beat the eggs, then add into the pan and cook through.
9. Add more Oyakodon sauce if needed.
10. Assemble the rice, Oyakodon, Nugget Nigiri, and other ingredients in the lunchbox.
11. Sausage Oyakodon and Nugget Nigiri are ready to serve.

Title: Praktis & Gurih! Resep NASI KUNING RICE COOKER AYAM SUWIR SERUNDENG
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0LqWNp7dHOE

Rice Cooker Turmeric Rice Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Yellow Spice Mix ingredients:
5 clove garlic
7 pc shallot
10 pc cashew
20 g turmeric
3 tbsp oil

Turmeric Rice ingredients:
500 g rice
675 ml water
50 ml coconut milk
½ of the yellow spice mix
1 pc lemongrass
1 slice ginger
1 thumb galangal
3 pc bay leaf
4 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 pc pandan leaf
1 tsp salt
2 tsp mushroom powder / MSG
¼ tsp pepper

Shredded Serundeng Chicken ingredients:
350 g chicken breast fillet
60 g grated coconut
½ of the yellow spice mix
1 thumb galangal
1 pc lemongrass
350 ml water
2 pc bay leaf
4 pc kaffir lime leaf
20 g palm sugar
½ tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom powder / MSG
¼ tsp pepper

Add-ons:
2 pc egg + ⅛ tsp salt
Cucumber
Lemon basil
Fried shallots

Steps:
1. Blend the garlic, oil, turmeric, cashew, and oil. Sauté until fragrant and a bit dark. Set aside.
2. Pound the lemongrass, galangal, and ginger.
3. Add the rice, yellow spice mix, water, and coconut milk into the rice cooker. Stir well.
4. Add lemongrass, galangal, ginger, lime leaf, bay leaf, pandan leaf, salt, mushroom powder, and pepper. Cook the rice normally.
5. Cook the rest of the yellow spice mix again. Add lemongrass, galangal, bay leaf, and lime leaf. Cook for a moment.
6. Slice the chicken and add into the spice mix. Stir.
7. Add water, salt, mushroom powder, pepper, and palm sugar. Cook until the chicken is done, about 8 minutes.
8. Set the chicken aside, then shred with forks.
9. Add grated coconut into the pan. Cook until the water is reduced, then add shredded chicken. Cook until a bit crisp. Set aside.
10. Beat the eggs with salt. Heat some oil and fry the egg until it’s cooked, then slice it.
11. Serundeng Chicken Rice is ready to serve.

Title: Murah Bukan Murahan! Resep NASI TELUR CEPLOK [Scallion Oil]

Fried Egg Rice Recipe (yield 1-2 servings)

Ingredients:

2 pc scallion

¼ tsp salt
½ tsp sugar
½ tsp stock powder / MSG
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp water
Cooked rice
Thai chili

Steps:

2. Add the garlic. Sauté for a moment until fragrant, then add salt, sugar, stock powder, pepper, and water. Mix well, then set aside.
3. Heat some oil. Fry the eggs until half cooked or to your preference.
4. Prepare the cooked rice. Place the Fried Eggs and Scallion Oil on top. Add sliced Thai chili if you like.
5. Fried Egg Rice is ready to serve.

Title: Segar Creamy! Resep PUFF PASTRY FRUIT PIE [Pai Buah]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DXG7bN9MVB0

Fruit Pie Puff Pastry Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Ingredients:
Puff pastry
Flour
Butter

Pastry Cream ingredients:
350 ml milk
75 g Kapal Api Krim Kafe
60 g sugar
2 pc egg yolk
30 g cornstarch
30 g unsalted butter
1 tsp vanilla extract
⅓ tsp salt

Topping:
Kiwi, sliced
Strawberry, sliced
Blueberry, sliced
Canned orange

Other ingredients:
2 tsp jelly powder
300 ml water

Steps:
1. For the Pastry Cream, heat the milk and Kapal Api Krim Kafe until simmering. In a separate bowl, mix the egg yolks, sugar, cornstarch, and salt well.
2. Pour the simmering milk mixture slowly into the bowl as you stir. Then, place it back in the pan and cook until thickened.
3. Add butter and vanilla extract. Mix well, then sift and transfer to a bowl. Cover with plastic wrap and chill.
4. After it’s chilled, stir the Pastry Cream with a balloon whisk until smooth.
5. For the puff pastry, dust it with flour and flatten with a rolling pin.
6. Slice the puff pastry a little bit bigger than the baking pan.
7. Spread butter on the pan and dust it with flour evenly.
8. Place the puff pastry in the pan, then poke holes in it with a fork.
9. Layer it with baking paper and a plate or weights, then bake at 190°C for 25 minutes.
10. After the pastry cools down, add the Pastry Cream and assemble the fruits on top.
11. Cook the jelly with water, then brush it on top of the fruits.
12. Fruit Pie Puff Pastry is ready to serve.

Title: Praktis Ekonomis! Resep TEMPE LADA HITAM [Menu Vegetarian]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=N-Dnhv2OsCc

Black Pepper Tempeh Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Bahan:
250 g tempeh
70 g cornstarch
1 pc egg
4 tbsp water
½ tsp mushroom stock powder / MSG
3 clove garlic

Black Pepper Sauce ingredients:
2 tbsp margarine
1 tbsp oil
4 clove garlic, minced
6 pc shallot, minced
220 ml water
20 g black pepper, toasted, ground
2 tbsp sugar
2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
½ tsp sesame oil
3 tbsp Royco Oyster Sauce
2 tsp mushroom stock powder
120 g ketchup

Others:
½ pc onion
2 pc red chili
2 pc green chili

Steps:
1. For the Sauce, heat oil. Sauté garlic and shallots for a moment until fragrant.
2. Add margarine. Stir, then add black pepper and cook for a moment.
3. Add water, ketchup, Worcestershire sauce, soy sauce, Royco Oyster Sauce, sesame oil, sugar, and mushroom stock powder. Cook for a moment. Set aside.
4. Slice the tempeh and pinch into chunks. Place in a bowl.
5. Add garlic, egg, water, cornstarch, and mushroom stock powder. Mix well.
6. Heat the oil. Fry the tempeh until golden brown and crisp. Set aside.
7. Dice the red chili, green chili, and onion. Stir-fry for a moment in the same pan.
8. Add the tempeh and half of the Black Pepper Sauce. Mix well.
9. Black Pepper Tempeh is ready to serve.

Title: Tanpa Cetakan! Resep MIE HIJAU LEBAR [Mie Goreng Terasi]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VoDuFOZ1jng

Shrimp Paste Fried Noodles Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Noodle Dough ingredients:
280 g bread flour
4 g salt
160 ml water
2 tsp Kaileaf Moringa Leaf Powder
Oil to soak the dough

Other ingredients:
4 g shrimp paste, toasted
8 pc red Thai chili, sliced
2 pc red chili, sliced
4 clove garlic, minced
7 pc shallot, sliced
2 pc egg
1 tbsp soy sauce
50 g choy sum, sliced
80 g beansprout
3 tbsp oil, to stir fry
1 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
½ tsp stock powder / MSG

Steps:
1. For the noodle dough, in a bowl, combine the flour, salt, and Kaileaf Moringa Leaf Powder. Mix well, then add water and mix again. Knead until the dough comes together.
2. Shape the dough into a long cylinder. Divide it into 8 pieces, then pull and roll each piece.
3. Soak all the dough in oil and cover in plastic wrap. Rest for at least 1-2 hours.
4. Get a piece of dough. Flatten it, then press the middle with a chopstick to form a fold.
5. Throw the dough down while pulling, then tear it down the middle.
6. Boil the water and cook the noodles for 3-4 minutes. Rinse with water and set aside.
7. Heat some oil. Add the eggs and stir. Then, add shrimp paste and cook for a moment.
8. Add garlic, shallots, and Thai chili. Cook until fragrant.
9. Add the noodles, soy sauce, sugar, pepper, stock powder, choy sum, beansprouts, and red chili. Cook for a moment.
10. Shrimp Paste Fried Noodles is ready to serve.

Title: Gurih Wangi! Resep BLACK PEPPER OAT BEEF BURGER
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ioNqrqhRbfw

Black Pepper Oat Beef Burger Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Patty ingredients:
300 g ground beef
70 g Quaker Rolled Oats
2 pc egg white
4 pc red curly chili
½ pc red bell pepper
½ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
⅛ tsp pepper

Black Pepper Sauce ingredients:
4 clove garlic
½ pc onion
60 g ketchup
3 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1.5 tbsp cornstarch
10 g black pepper, toasted, ground
200 ml water
1 tsp beef powder
1 tbsp sugar
1 tbsp unsalted butter
⅛ tsp salt

Other ingredients:
200 g champignon mushroom
Lettuce
Onion, sliced
Red tomato, sliced
Hamburger buns

Steps:
1. For the sauce, chop the onion and garlic finely. Heat some oil, then sauté the onion until fragrant.
2. Add garlic, butter, and black pepper. Stir, then add water, Worcestershire sauce, ketchup, and beef powder. Cook on low heat.
3. Add salt. Cook for about 5 minutes, then add the cornstarch mixture. Cook until it thickens, then set aside.
4. Slice the mushroom. Heat the oil and sauté for a moment. Set aside.
5. Dice the bell pepper and chili, then chop some of the sautéed mushrooms.
6. For the patty, combine the ground beef, Quaker Rolled Oats, egg whites, salt, sugar, pepper, mushroom, red bell pepper, and red chili. Mix well.
7. Divide into 4 parts, then shape into a patty. Cook both sides on a hot pan for a moment.
8. Place the patties into an air fryer or an oven. Grill at  200°C for 8 minutes.
9. Toast the buns, then arrange the lettuce, tomato, patty, mushroom, onion, and Black Pepper Sauce.
10. Black Pepper Oat Beef Burger is ready to serve.

Title: Kenyal Gurih Manis! Resep KUE LAPIS PEPE COKELAT
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FJLOLPqlFws

Chocolate Pepe Layered Cake Recipe (for 20x20 cm or 8x8” pan size)

Pepe Layered Cake ingredients:
800 ml instant coconut milk
800 ml water
6 pc pandan leaf
600 g sago flour
650 g sugar
1.5 tsp vanilla powder or 2 tsp vanilla extract
2 tsp salt

Chocolate Layer additional ingredients:
175 ml Indomilk Swiss Choco Condensed Milk
3 tbsp cocoa powder

White Layer additional ingredients:
150 ml Indomilk Plain Condensed Milk

Others:
1 tsp espresso powder
1 tbsp cocoa powder
1 tbsp sago flour
Oil to brush the pan

Steps:
1. Mix the coconut milk, water, pandan, sugar, and salt. Bring to a boil, then let cool.
2. Remove the pandan leaves, then add sago flour and vanilla powder. Mix with a balloon whisk evenly.
3. Divide the batter into two parts. Dilute the cocoa powder with the mixture. Stir evenly.
4. Add the diluted cocoa into the Chocolate batter, then add Indomilk Swiss Choco Condensed Milk. Mix well.
5. For the White batter, add Indomilk Plain Condensed Milk. Mix well.
6. For the topmost layer, set aside about 2 ladles worth of Chocolate batter. Mix it with cocoa powder, espresso powder, and sago flour. Mix well.
7. Brush the pan with oil, then heat up the steamer.
8. Pour one ladleful of the White batter. Steam for 4 minutes, then pour one ladleful of the Chocolate batter. Steam again for 4 minutes. Continue until the last White layer.
9. Pour the topmost Chocolate layer, then steam it for 20 minutes.
10. Let the Layered Cake cool down, then remove it from the pan.
11. Pepe Layered Cake is ready to serve.

Title: Luar Krispi Dalam Lembut! Resep PERKEDEL KENTANG KORNET
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Y9BcAfhpNdk

Potato Patty Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
3 pc boiled potato (550 g)
1 pc egg yolk
6 pc shallot
8 clove garlic
1 tsp curry powder
1 pc green onion, sliced
4 tbsp tapioca flour
½ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp stock powder
100 g corned beef

Steps:
1. Heat some oil, then fry the shallots and garlic on medium heat until cooked and slightly browned. Set aside.

3. Mash the fried shallots and garlic until smooth. Add into the potato.
5. Add the yolk, curry powder, green onions, tapioca flour, corned beef, salt, stock powder, sugar, and pepper. Mix well.
5. Heat the oil. Shape the Potato Patty with a fork, then fry on medium-low heat until cooked. Set aside.

Title: Wangi Berempah! Resep AYAM GORENG KARI
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eIbPSDFYpik

Curry Fried Chicken Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
800 g broiler, chopped into 14 pieces
1 pc egg
70 g curry roux or 2 tbsp curry powder + 1 tsp salt
5 clove garlic
100 g tapioca flour
1 tbsp vinegar
1 tsp chicken powder
¼ tsp pepper
 
Add-ons:
8 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
5 pc red curly chili
5 pc green curly chili
6 pc red Thai chili
20 g lemon basil
1 pc green onion

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with minced garlic, grated curry roux, chicken powder, pepper, vinegar, and egg. Mix well, then add tapioca flour. Mix well and marinate for 1 hour.
2. Pound the shallots and garlic. Halve the Thai chili. Slice the red curly chili, green curly chili, and green onions.
3. Heat the oil. Fry the chicken on medium-high heat until the outer structure is formed. Then, lower the heat and fry until they’re thoroughly cooked. Set aside.
4. Fry the shallots and garlic. Stir, then add Thai chili, red curly chili, green curly chili, green onions, and lemon basil. Set aside.
5. Curry Fried Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Gurih & Segar! Resep ES CAMPUR TAIWAN [Taiwanese Dessert]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4lf5D3xgcYg

Taiwanese Dessert Recipe (yield 6-7 servings)

Taro Ball ingredients:
150 g taro, steamed
60 g tapioca flour / glutinous rice flour
2-3 tbsp hot water
1 tbsp sugar

Sweet Potato Ball ingredients:
150 g sweet potato, steamed
45 g tapioca flour / glutinous rice flour
2-3 tbsp hot water
1 tbsp sugar

Sugar Syrup ingredients:
500 ml water
300 g sugar
3 pc pandan leaf

Milk Soup ingredients:
300 ml milk
15 tbsp Krim Kafe Kapal Api
150 ml hot water

Mung Bean ingredients:
100 g mung bean, soaked overnight
2 pc pandan leaf
3 slice ginger
1 L water
80 g sugar

Others:
Grass jelly
Shaved ice

Steps:
1. For the Sugar Syrup, add water, sugar, and pandan to a pan. Bring to a boil. Let cool.
2. For the Milk Soup, mix Krim Kafe Kapal Api with hot water. Add milk. Mix and let cool.
3. For the Mung Beans, add water, mung beans, pandan leaf, and ginger into a pot. Boil until soft, then add sugar. Cook for 5 minutes, then set aside.
4. Mash the sweet potato in a bowl. Add tapioca flour and sugar. Mix well.
5. Add hot water bit by bit. Knead until the dough comes together, then shape into a cylinder and slice.
6. Mash the taro in a bowl. Add tapioca flour and sugar. Mix well.
7. Add hot water bit by bit. Knead until the dough comes together, then shape into a cylinder and slice.
8. Boil the water. Add the Sweet Potato Balls and boil until they’re cooked, then transfer into the Sugar Syrup.
9. In the same pot, add the Taro Balls and boil until they’re cooked, then transfer into the Sugar Syrup.
10. Assemble the shaved ice, grass jelly, mung beans, Sweet Potato Balls, and Taro Balls into a bowl. Then, pour the Milk Soup.
11. Taiwanese Dessert is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Lembut Meresap! Resep CHOCOLATE MILK BATH CAKE
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UIz6BVY6hJo

Chocolate Milk Bath Cake Recipe (for 20x30 cm pan, yield 10-12 servings)

Cake ingredients:
200 g all-purpose flour
265 g sugar
60 g cocoa powder
2 tsp baking powder
½ tsp baking soda
2 tsp espresso powder
¾ tsp salt
500 ml MilkLife Fresh Milk Chocolate
120 ml oil
2 pc egg, large (a total of 120 g)
2 tsp vanilla extract

Milk Bath ingredients:
200 ml MilkLife Fresh Milk Pure
200 ml MilkLife Fresh Milk Chocolate
35 g white condensed milk

Choco Whipped Cream ingredients:
350 ml whipping cream
5-6 tbsp chocolate spread
1 tsp vanilla extract
⅛ tsp salt

Others:
Milk chocolate / dark chocolate

Steps:
1. In a bowl, sift in flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, baking powder, and espresso powder.
2. Add salt and sugar. Mix with a balloon whisk, then add MilkLife Fresh Milk Chocolate, eggs, oil, and vanilla extract. Mix well.
3. Pour into a pan. Bake at 165°C for 50 minutes.
4. For the Milk Bath, mix MilkLife Fresh Milk Chocolate, MilkLife Fresh Milk Pure, and condensed milk evenly. Chill.
5. For the Choco Whipped Cream, add whipping cream, chocolate spread, and vanilla extract into a bowl. Whip, transfer into a piping bag, and chill in the fridge.
6. After the cake is cooled, poke holes in it with a skewer. Then, pour the Milk Bath slowly until it’s absorbed.
7. Pipe the Whipped Cream on top and sprinkle shaved chocolate on top. Chill in the fridge.
8. For better taste, let the cake chill overnight before consuming.

Title: Lembut Creamy! Resep MAKARONI PANGGANG KEJU [Macaroni Schotel]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uzv3ktQ6ZmQ

Macaroni Schotel Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g dry macaroni
1 L water
½ tsp salt

White Sauce ingredients:
7 tbsp all-purpose flour
5 tbsp unsalted butter
750 ml milk
3 pc egg
¼ tsp nutmeg powder
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp salt
¾ tsp stock powder
¼ tsp black pepper
60 g cheddar cheese
70 g mozzarella / quick melt cheese
1 pc celery

Filling ingredients:
85 g corned beef
100 g beef bacon
80 g ground beef
1 pc onion, small
2 clove garlic
Oil, as needed

Steps:
1. Bring water to a boil. Add macaroni and salt. Boil for 8-10 minutes, then rinse under running water. Set aside.
2. Chop the onion and garlic. Dice the beef bacon. Set aside.
3. Heat the oil. Sauté the onion and garlic until fragrant. Then, add corned beef and cook until lightly browned.
4. Add ground beef and beef bacon. Cook thoroughly, then set aside.
5. In the same pan, add butter, flour, nutmeg powder, and pepper. Cook until lightly browned.
6. Add milk bit by bit while stirring. Then, add salt. Cook until it thickens.
7. Set aside some White Sauce into a bowl.
8. Add grated cheese into the White Sauce. Then, add macaroni, sautéed meat, eggs, celery, stock powder, and black pepper. Mix well.
9. Transfer to a baking pan. Add the White Sauce, then add grated mozzarella on top.
10. Bake at 165°C for 30 minutes.
11. Remove from the oven and let it cool down before slicing.
12. Macaroni Schotel is ready to serve.

Title: Resep LUMPIA GORENG AYAM JAMUR Favorit Keluarga!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MxppTgfY3OQ

Chicken Mushroom Spring Rolls Recipe (yield 20 pcs)

Ingredients:
20 pc Spring Roll skin, large

Filling ingredients:
350 g ground chicken
150 g Shiitake & Champignon mushroom
150 g green bean
100 g carrot
6 clove garlic
8 pc shallot
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
½ tsp sesame oil
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp sugar

Egg ingredients:
3 pc eggs
⅛ tsp salt
⅛ tsp pepper

Thick Sauce ingredients:
100 g tapioca flour
750 ml water
50 g palm sugar
⅛ tsp salt

Condiments:
Green Thai chili
Bangkok Sambal

Others:
Fortune frying oil

Steps:
1. Dice the mushroom, carrots, and green beans into small pieces. Mince the garlic and slice the shallots.
2. Whisk the eggs with salt and pepper. Heat a little Fortune Oil and cook the eggs while stirring. Set aside.
3. Heat a little Fortune Oil. Sauté the mushroom until browned, then add carrots and green beans. Stir fry well and set aside.
4. In the same pan, heat a little Fortune Oil and sauté the shallots until fragrant.
5. Add garlic and sauté until fragrant. Then, add ground chicken and cook well.
6. Add the eggs and veggies. Stir well, then add soy sauce, oyster sauce, salt, pepper, sugar, and sesame oil. Mix well.
7. For the Thick Sauce, add water, tapioca flour, and palm sugar into a pan with the heat off. Then, turn the heat on and season with salt. Cook until it thickens and becomes shiny, then place in a bowl and let cool.
8. Prepare the Spring Roll skin and spread the Thick Sauce on the bottom. Add the filling and roll.
9. Heat Fortune Oil and fry the Spring Rolls on medium heat until golden. Set aside.
10. Chicken Mushroom Spring Roll is ready to serve.

Title: Seenak Bubur Abang-Abang! Resep BUBUR AYAM OAT KUAH KUNING
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5YB8VI2ykVY

Oat Porridge with Turmeric Broth Recipe (yield 6-7 servings)

Porridge ingredients:
200 g Quaker Rolled Oats
1.2 L water / stock
4 tbsp rice flour
2 pc bay leaf
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
2 tsp chicken powder

Turmeric Broth ingredients:
350 g chicken breast fillet
7 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
3 pc candlenut
4 cm turmeric
3-4 tbsp oil
2 pc bay leaf
2 pc lemongrass, pounded
2 tsp salt
½ tbsp sugar
1 tsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper
2 tbsp coconut milk
1 L water

Condiments:
Fried shallot
Celery
Crackers
Thai Chili Sambal
Sweet soy sauce

Steps:
1. Blend the garlic, shallots, candlenuts, turmeric, and oil until smooth.
2. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant on medium-low heat. Add bay leaf and lemongrass. Stir.
3. Add water, chicken, salt, sugar, stock powder, and pepper. Bring to a boil and cook through.
4. Add coconut milk. Cook for a moment. Set the chicken aside and shred.
5. For the Porridge, add Quaker Rolled Oats and rice flour, bay leaf, water, and chicken powder to the pan. Keep stirring and bring to a boil.
6. Season with salt and pepper. Cook until it thickens.
7. Pour the Porridge into a bowl. Add toppings and pour the Turmeric Broth in.
8. Oat Porridge with Turmeric Broth is ready to serve.

Title: Gurih Pedas! Resep SAMBAL UDANG KECOMBRANG : Bikin Nambah Nasi!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oaTL1iowPs4

Shrimp with Kecombrang Sambal Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
400 g whole shrimp

Sliced ingredients:
15-20 pc red curly chili
10 pc red Thai chili
12 pc shallot
8 clove garlic
6 g toasted shrimp paste, mashed

Others:
½ pc onion
1 pc kecombrang flower
5 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 pc bay leaf
1 pc lemongrass
1 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 pc red tomato, medium
150 ml water
⅓ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
½ tsp stock powder / MSG
4 tbsp oil

Steps:
1. Add garlic, shallots, curly chili, Thai chili, and shrimp paste to a food processor and blend.
2. Chop the onion and tomato. Slice the kecombrang thinly and slice the lemongrass.
3. Heat some oil. Stir-fry the chili mixture until half-cooked. Then, add lime leaf, bay leaf, lemongrass, onion, and kecombrang. Stir and cook until fragrant.
4. Add the tomato in. Stir for a moment, then add water, oyster sauce, and chili sauce. Stir well.
5. Add salt, sugar, and stock powder. Cook on medium-low heat until fragrant. Set aside.
6. Trim the sharp parts of the shrimp head and butterfly it.
7. Heat the oil. Fry the shrimp for about 2 minutes, then mix with the Sambal well.
9. Shrimp with Kecombrang Sambal is ready to serve.

Title: Gurih Wangi! Resep MISOA AYAM KECAP Favorit Keluarga
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XGtpp6eGg5Y

Soy Chicken Misoa Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
400 g chicken thigh fillet
1 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tsp fish sauce
3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tsp dark soy sauce, optional
2 tsp sesame oil

Other ingredients:
75 ml oil
2 pc green onions
7 clove garlic
8 pc shallot
4 cm ginger
200 ml water
½ tsp stock powder / MSG
¼ tsp pepper
2 tsp sugar
4 serving misoa / fresh noodles

Condiments:
Thai Chili Sambal
Chicken stock, optional
Fried shallots

Steps:
1. Pat the chicken dry, then small dice. Set aside.
2. Pound and mince the garlic. Slice the shallots, green onions, and pound the ginger.
3. Heat the oil and stir fry the shallots until fragrant. Then, add garlic, ginger, and green onions. Cook until fragrant.
4. Add the chicken. Cook for a moment, then add fish sauce, sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, sesame oil, dark soy sauce, and water. Stir well.
5. Add stock powder, pepper, and sugar. Cook until thick and flavorful.
5. Boil water and cook the Misoa for a moment or until cooked. Rinse with mineral water.
7. Transfer Misoa into a bowl. Add chicken topping, fried shallots, green onions, and Thai Chili Sambal.
8. Serve with chicken stock for the Soupy version.
9. Soy Chicken Misoa is ready to serve.

Title: Crunchy & Kenyal! Resep CRISPY PIZZA TANPA OVEN [Gluten Free]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Cnm5yp3THwU

Crispy Pizza Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
125 g BOLA Deli Rice Flour
35 g BOLA Deli Tapioca Flour
1.5 cup water
200 ml milk
25 ml oil
¼ tsp salt
2 tsp mustard

Toppings:
Sausage
Onion
Green Thai chili
Red tomato
Canned tuna
Sambal matah (https://youtu.be/2l43lXBBJo0) 

Others:
Mayonnaise
Chili sauce
Ketchup
Sliced cheese
Black pepper, optional
Parsley, chopped, optional
Dried basil

Steps:
1. In a bowl, combine BOLA Deli Rice Flour, BOLA Deli Tapioca Flour, salt, water, milk, oil, and mustard. Mix well.
2. Slice the onion, tomato, sausage, and Thai chili.
3. Heat some oil and sauté the onion and sausage for a moment. Set aside.
4. In the same pan, add some oil. Pour the batter bit by bit evenly.
5. Lower the heat. Add the tomato, then pour some oil around the edges.
6. Spread the ketchup and chili sauce evenly, then add sausages, onion, dried basil, Thai chili, cheese, and mayonnaise. Cover the pan and cook until the edges are crisp.
7. Sprinkle some parsley and black pepper.
8. For the Sambal Matah Pizza, pour the batter in the pan, then arrange the tomato.
9. Pour some oil around the edges, then add tuna and cheese. Cook until crisp on low heat.
10. Add the Sambal Matah and sprinkle parsley on top. Set aside.
11. Crispy Pizza is ready to serve.

Title: Luar Krispi Dalam Kenyal! Resep TAHU ACI KRISPI KUAH GEJROT
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Iw_z_3KbbMs

Crispy Chewy Tofu in Chili Soy “Gejrot” Sauce Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
10 pc white tofu
250 g tapioca flour
½ tbsp salt
½ tbsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper

Gejrot Sauce ingredients:
350 ml water
80 + 40 g palm sugar, shaved
2 tbsp sweet soy sauce
5 pc tamarind
6-12 pc shallot
20-30 pc green Thai chili
1.5 tsp salt

Steps:
1. For the Sauce, add water, palm sugar, tamarind, and sweet soy sauce into the pan. Bring to a boil. Let it rest for a moment, then strain.
2. Slice the tofu, then flatten in with your palm.
3. In a bowl, combine tapioca flour with salt, pepper, and stock powder. Mix well.
4. Coat the tofu with the flour mix evenly. Let it rest for 5-10 minutes until the flour is absorbed.
5. Heat the oil. Before frying, coat the wet tofu with the flour mix again. Then, fry until they’re half-cooked and set aside.
6. Let them rest for 5 minutes, then fry them again until golden brown or crisp. Set aside.
7. In a stone bowl, add shallots, salt, Thai chili, and palm sugar. Grind roughly.
8. Add the Gejrot Sauce into the chili and mix well.
9. Crispy Tofu is ready to serve with Gejrot Sambal.

Title: Empuk Gurih! Resep EMPAL SERUNDENG KEMIRI [Menu IdulAdha]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IP30xbSCun0

Empal Serundeng Recipe (yield 8-9 servings)

Ingredients:
1.2 kg beef, topside
1.2 L water
2 tsp salt
2 tsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper

Other ingredients:
100 g candlenuts
100 g galangal, sliced
80 g palm sugar
2 tbsp tamarind juice
150 ml instant coconut milk
4 pc lemongrass, pounded, sliced
6 pc bay leaf
4 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
1 tsp stock powder
500 ml water
500 ml beef stock

Blended Spices ingredients:
15 clove garlic
18 pc shallot
3 cm ginger, sliced
2 tsp coriander
½ pc nutmeg
100 ml Fortune Oil

Add-ons:
Fortune Premium Rice
Fried shallot

Others:
Fortune Oil to fry

Steps:
1. Add the meat, water, salt, stock powder, and pepper into the pressure cooker. Cook for 30 minutes.
2. Let the meat cool down. Slice and pound slowly with a stone pestle or a rolling pin.
3. Blend the candlenuts with a food processor, then toast it until fragrant and lightly browned. Set aside.
4. Blend the galangal with a bit of water until smooth. Set aside.
5. Blend the shallots, garlic, ginger, coriander, nutmeg, and Fortune Oil until smooth.
6. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant, then add lemongrass, bay leaf, and lime leaf. Continue cooking.
7. Add the candlenuts and galangal. Stir and cook on low heat until fragrant.
8. Add water, coconut milk, tamarind juice, palm sugar, salt, sugar, stock powder, and beef stock. Stir.
9. Add the meat in. Cook on medium heat until the liquid is reduced. Set the meat aside.
10. Continue cooking the leftover spices on medium-low heat until it’s reduced and becomes oily. Set aside.
11. Heat Fortune Oil and fry the meat until browned. Set aside.
12. Fry the Serundeng on medium-low heat until browned. Set aside.
13. Empal Serundeng is ready to serve with rice and fried shallots as a topping.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Spesial! Resep RAWON KHAS JAWA TIMUR [Menu IdulAdha]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XYev1tljzUE

Rawon Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g beef shank
2 pc lemongrass, pounded, sliced
2 pc bay leaf
5 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 pc red tomato
1.5 L water
¾ tbsp salt
2 tsp stock powder / MSG
1.5 tbsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
1 pc green onion, sliced

Blended Spices ingredients:
6 clove garlic
10 pc shallot
5 pc keluak
4 pc toasted candlenut
3 cm turmeric
50 ml oil
50 ml water

Sambal ingredients:
20 pc red Thai chili
3 clove garlic
50 ml water
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp sugar
¼ tsp stock powder / MSG
Oil, as needed

Add-ons:
Salted egg
Fried shallot
Lime
Bean sprout

Steps:
1. Blend the garlic, shallots, candlenuts, keluak, turmeric, and oil. Add water and blend smoothly.
2. Sauté the blended spices on medium-low heat until oily. Then, add lemongrass, kaffir lime leaf, and bay leaf. Sauté until fragrant.
3. Add water. Bring to a boil, then transfer into the pressure cooker.
4. Add meat, red tomato, green onions, salt, stock powder, pepper, and sugar. Cook for 60 minutes.
5. For the Sambal, chop the Thai chili and garlic with a food processor.
6. Heat some oil and sauté the chopped chili for a moment. Then, add water, salt, sugar, and stock powder. Cook until the water is reduced and set aside.
7. Assemble the ingredients in a bowl. Add salted egg, bean sprouts, lime, Sambal, and fried shallots.
8. Rawon is ready to serve.

Title: Empuk Meresap! Resep SATE KAMBING [Menu Idul Adha]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EpV1yUbZQFY

Goat Satay (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g goat tenderloin
3 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
5 cm galangal, sliced
1 tbsp toasted coriander
3 tbsp tamarind juice
3 tbsp Bango Sweet Soy Sauce
1 tsp salt
1 tsp stock powder
½ tsp pepper
2 tbsp water

Sweet Soy Sambal ingredients:
5 pc shallot
6 pc red Thai chili
1 pc red tomato
1 pc lime
100 ml Bango Sweet Soy Sauce

Others:
Margarine

Steps:
1. Pat the meat dry. Trim the silver skin, then slice thinly. Transfer to a bowl.
2. Blend the galangal, coriander, garlic, shallots, and tamarind juice until smooth.
3. Add the blended spices to the meat. Add salt, stock powder, pepper, and Bango Sweet Soy Sauce.
4. Add water and mix well. Marinate for 30-60 minutes.
5. Skewer the meat with the soaked satay skewer.
6. Heat the grill. Cook the Satay until lightly browned on both sides, then brush the margarine on and grill until they’re fully cooked.
7. For the Sambal, slice the tomato, Thai chili, shallots, and lime.
8. Goat Satay is ready to serve with Sweet Soy Sambal.

Title: Favorit Anak! Resep DADAR GULUNG COKELAT ISI VLA
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KQgA-PEqIgQ

Chocolate Crepe Rolls Recipe (yield 10 pcs)

Crepe ingredients:
90 g all-purpose flour
1 tbsp cornstarch
1 tbsp cocoa powder
300 ml Ultra Mimi Kids Chocolate Milk
50 ml water
¼ tsp salt
35 ml melted margarine
1 pc egg

Custard ingredients:
2 pc egg yolk
400 ml Ultra Mimi Kids Full Cream Milk
30 g cornstarch
15 g all-purpose flour
50 g sugar
50 g unsalted butter
1.5 tsp vanilla extract
¼ tsp salt

Steps:
1. For the Custard, combine egg yolks, sugar, flour, cornstarch, salt, vanilla extract, and Ultra Mimi Kids Full Cream Milk in a pan. Mix well, then bring to a boil while stirring.
2. Add butter. Cook until it thickens, then transfer to a bowl.
3. Cover the surface with plastic wrap and chill to set.
4. Stir the Custard with a balloon whisk until it’s fluffy and even, then place in a piping bag.
5. For the Crepe, combine the flour, cornstarch, cocoa powder, salt, melted margarine, egg, Ultra Mimi Kids Chocolate Milk, and water. Mix well, then strain.
6. Heat the pan and pour the batter in. Cook until the edges are dry, then set aside. Repeat until the batter is finished.
7. Lay the crepe and pipe the filling on top, then roll.
8. Chocolate Crepe Rolls are ready to serve.

Title: Kenyal Kres! Resep BAKSO DAGING SAPI [100% Sukses]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqcRtvIFArA

Beef Meatballs Recipe (yield 30-35 pcs)

Ingredients:
500 g beef chuck (neck)
100 g beef trimming / fat
2 tbsp fried shallot
½ tbsp fried garlic
80 g sago flour
1.5 tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
1 tsp Royco Beef Powder
130 g ice cube
1 pc egg white
2 tsp baking powder

Broth ingredients:
2.5 L water
200 g beef trimming
1 tsp Royco Beef Powder
1 tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp fried garlic
1 tbsp fried shallot

Add-ons:
Choy sum
Green onion
Celery
Fried shallot

Steps:
1. Pat the beef dry. Remove the silver skin, then slice.
2. Add the beef and trimmings into the food processor, then add salt, sugar, pepper, Royco Beef Powder, baking powder, fried shallots, and fried garlic. Blend until sticky for 2-3 minutes.
3. Add the egg white. Blend, then add the ice cubes slowly and blend smoothly.
4. Add sago flour and blend again. Transfer to a bowl and place in the fridge.
5. For the broth, boil water and add the trimmings.
6. Blend the fried garlic and fried shallots, then add into the broth.
7. Add Royco Beef Powder, salt, sugar, and pepper.
8. Slice the choy sum, then boil in a separate bowl. Set aside.
9. Shape the meatballs with hands or spoons, then add into hot water and cook until they float.
10. Add the meatballs and choy sum into the broth.
11. Plate and add celery, green onions, and fried shallots toppings.
12. Beef Meatball is ready to serve.

Title: Gurih Meresap! Resep SAYAP AYAM PANGGANG ALA THAILAND
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3U4lgp6lCXo

Gai Yang Grilled Chicken Wings (yield 4 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
8 pc chicken wings @90g
3 clove garlic
2 pc coriander root
½ tsp whole white pepper
1 pc lemongrass
2 tbsp fish sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp oyster sauce
3 tbsp palm sugar
1 tsp MSG / stock powder
1 pc lime @1 tbsp
2 tbsp oil

Dipping Sauce ingredients:
3 clove garlic
40 g green Thai chili
3 tbsp lime juice
2 tbsp sugar
3 tbsp fish sauce
1 tbsp water

Other ingredients:
Cilantro

Steps:
1. Halve the wings and place in a bowl.
2. Slice the coriander root and garlic. Add into the blender.
3. Add white pepper, oil, fish sauce, and soy sauce. Blend, then mix with the wings.
4. Add palm sugar, stock powder, oyster sauce, and lime juice.
5. Pound and slice the lemongrass, then add into the wings and mix. Let it marinate for 1-2 hours at room temperature or overnight in the fridge.
6. Arrange the wings in the air fryer basket. Grill at 180°C for 15-17 minutes.
7. Halfway into the cook, flip the wings and brush them with the marinade.
8. For the dipping sauce, roughly blend the garlic. Then, add the green Thai chili and roughly blend it again.
9. Transfer it to a bowl. Add sugar, lime, and soy sauce. Mix well.
10. Add 1-2 tbsp water, if needed.
11. Grilled Chicken Wings is ready to serve.

Title: Renyah Tahan Lama! Resep UDANG KRISPI [Khas Bu Rudy Surabaya]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=utU-6c3_2nw

Crispy Shrimp Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
500 g small shrimp / “hurang”, rinsed clean
½ tbsp salt
1.5 tsp baking powder
1 tbsp mushroom stock powder / MSG
½ tsp pepper
2 tbsp vinegar

Others:
220 g tapioca flour
30 g rice flour
Fortune Oil

Condiments:
Sambal bawang (https://youtu.be/6vv6enFEVc4)
Fortune Premium Rice

Steps:
1. Marinate the shrimp with salt, mushroom stock powder, baking powder, pepper, and vinegar. Mix well and marinate for 10-15 minutes.
2. Mix the tapioca flour with rice flour evenly.
3. Add the shrimp into the flour. Mix with a fork.
4. Sift the excess flour off.
5. Heat Fortune Oil. Fry the shrimp on medium-high heat for 5 minutes. Then, lower the heat and continue frying for 20-25 minutes. Set aside.
6. If the shrimp aren’t crispy enough, bake in the oven at 110°C for 15-25 minutes.
7. Crispy Shrimp is ready to serve.

Title: Resep INDOMIE CHILI OIL ala Singapura: [Fish Ball Noodle Singapore]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xhdHZE-K_yY

Chili Oil Indomie Recipe (yield 1-2 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pack instant fried noodles + seasoning

Additional Seasoning ingredients:
1 tbsp chili flake
1 pc spring onion
½ tsp sesame oil
1 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp hot oil
1 tsp sugar

Add-ons:
1 pc egg
75 g ground chicken
1 pc cabbage, slice
5 pc fish ball (https://youtu.be/vz-_F-WKTw4)
350 ml water
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp sugar
⅛ tsp pepper
Fried shallots

Steps:
1. For the broth, boil water and add 1 pack of instant noodle seasoning, 1 pack of the fragrant oil, and ground chicken. Boil until it’s cooked and set the chicken aside.
2. Add cabbage, egg, and fish balls. Cook the egg until it’s half-boiled and set it aside.
3. Add salt, sugar, and pepper. Mix well and cook on low heat.
4. Slice the green onions finely and place in a bowl.
5. Add the chili flakes and pour the hot oil in. Mix well.
6. Add the instant noodle’s seasoning, chili, and fragrant oil. Add sugar, soy sauce, and sesame oil. Mix well and set aside.
7. Boil the noodles to taste, then mix it well with the sauce.
8. Add the chicken, egg, fish balls, green onions, and fried shallots toppings.
9. Chili Oil Indomie is ready to serve.

URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fUApmJNP2BM

Honey Grilled Shrimp Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g whole shrimp
⅓ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
1 pc lime

Honey Sauce ingredients:
3 tbsp honey
2 tbsp tomato sauce
2 tbsp garlic-infused chili sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp margarine (room temperature)
2 tbsp water

Steps:
1. Trim the head or sharp parts, then butterfly and devein the shrimp.
2. Marinate the shrimp with lime juice, salt, and pepper. Stir and marinate for a moment.
3. In a bowl, combine honey, chili sauce, tomato sauce, oyster sauce, and margarine. Mix well.
4. Add a bit of water and stir.
5. Heat some oil. Add the shrimp in and cook them halfway on both sides.
6. Add the sauce in. Stir for a moment, then plate.
7. Honey Grilled Shrimp is ready to serve.

Title: Favorit Keluarga! Resep SEMUR BOLA DAGING [MPASI Cocok]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VFJtQXhPx6c

Braised Meatballs Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
400 g beef
6 tbsp white breadcrumb
50 ml water / milk
1 pc egg
1 pc onion, chopped, sautéed
2 tbsp cornstarch
½ tsp salt
1 tsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper

Broth ingredients:
White paste (4 clove garlic, 6 pc shallot, 3 pc candlenut)
2 pc red tomato, sliced
5 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tsp nutmeg powder
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp beef stock powder
700 ml water
2 pc celery, optional

Others:
Carrot
Green bean
Rice
Fried shallot

Steps:
1. Slice the meat and remove the silver skin.
2. Add the beef, salt, stock powder, and pepper into the Beaba Babycook Neo Terracotta. Grind.
3. Mix the breadcrumbs with water. Let it soak for a moment.
4. Transfer the meat to a bowl. Add the breadcrumbs, onion, egg, and cornstarch. Mix well.
5. Heat some oil. Shape the meat into balls and pan-sear until browned. Set aside.
6. In the same pan, sauté the white paste until fragrant. Then, add tomato, celery, sweet soy sauce, beef powder, nutmeg powder, and pepper. Mix well.
7. Add the meatballs in. Cook for about 10 minutes on medium heat.
8. Slice the carrot and green beans, then steam them with Beaba Babycook Neo Terracotta until cooked.
9. For complementary feeding, steam rice, carrot, green bean, and meatballs. Then, blend to your preference.
10. Braised Meatballs are ready to serve.

URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hjFHRSwmb9s

Chili Crab Stick Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
12 pc crab stick
2 tsp instant Gulai paste
1 pc egg
1.5 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp chili sauce
300 ml water
1.5 tbsp cornstarch
½ pc onion
2 clove garlic
2 pc red chili
4 pc Thai chili
1-2 tsp sugar
½ tsp stock powder / MSG
Oil, as needed

Others:
Rice

Steps:
1. Slice the onion, garlic, red chili, and red Thai chili.
2. Halve the crab sticks. Heat some oil and fry them until crisp. Set aside.
3. Set aside some of the oil, then sauté the onion.
4. Add garlic. Stir, then add red chili and Thai chili. Sauté until fragrant.
5. Add the Gulai paste, oyster sauce, chili sauce, sugar, and MSG. Stir well.
6. Mix the cornstarch with water and add it into the pan. Stir until the sauce thickens.
7. Lightly beat the egg. Pour into the pan slowly while stirring.
8. Add the crab sticks in and cook for a moment.
9. Chili Crab Stick is ready to serve.

URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OClNXFPdFKg

Nugget Balado Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients:
1 pack Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget
150 g / 30 pc curly red chili
15 pc red Thai chili
6 clove garlic
15 pc shallot
1 pc shrimp paste
4 pc kaffir lime leaf
5 tbsp oil
50 ml water
⅓ tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
½ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer

Others:
Kaffir lime
Rice

Steps:
