2. Add garlic, shrimp paste, Thai chili, and curly chili into a food processor and blend.
3. Heat the oil. Sauté the shallots until fragrant and crisp. Add the blended spices. Stir.
4. Add the kaffir lime leaf. Sauté until fragrant, then add water, salt, sugar, and flavor enhancer. Stir.
5. Add Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget into an air fryer. Cook at 180°C for 8 minutes.
6. Add the Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget into the Sambal Balado and mix.

Title: Ala KFC! Resep POPCORN CHICKEN: Dijamin Nagih!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oD0w-qxHzVI

Popcorn Chicken Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
500 g chicken breast fillet
4 clove garlic
¼ pc onion
100 ml milk
¾ tsp salt
¾ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
¼ tsp pepper
½ tbsb mixed herbs
1 tsp paprika powder
1 tsp vinegar
2 tbsp chili sauce
1 pc egg
6 tbsp dry coat

Dry Coat ingredients:
300 g all-purpose flour
2 tsp paprika powder
1 tbsp garlic powder, optional
100 g cornstarch
1 tbsp baking powder
1 tsp salt
½ tsp pepper

Condiment:
Chili sauce

Steps:
1. Pat the chicken dry, then slice it into thumb-sized strips. Place in a bowl.
2. Slice the garlic and onion, then blend with milk.
3. Add the mixture to the chicken, then add salt, stock powder, pepper, mixed herbs, paprika powder, vinegar, chili sauce, and egg. Mix well and marinate for 15-30 minutes.
4. For the dry coating, combine the flour, cornstarch, garlic powder, paprika powder, baking powder, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
5. Add 6 tbsp of the dry coat mix into the chicken and mix well.
6. Add the chicken into the dry coat one by one and coat evenly.
7. Heat the oil. Fry the chicken until golden brown on medium-low heat.
8. Popcorn Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Krispi! Resep BAKWAN ALA JEPANG [Kakiage Sosis]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CUMAFHWVZAo

Sausage Kakiage Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
1 pc carrot
1 pc onion
50 g horenzo
14 pc Kanzler Beef Cocktail Sausage

Dry Coat ingredients:
70 g all-purpose flour
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper

Wet Batter ingredients:
120 g all-purpose flour
15 g cornstarch
1 pc egg yolk
300 ml ice water

Tempura Dipping Sauce (Tentsuyu) ingredients:
4 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp mirin
2 tbsp sugar
5 g konbu
3 tbsp bonito
300 ml water

Others:
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Heat the pan. Add mirin and cook for a moment. Then, add soy sauce, sugar, water, and konbu. Bring to a boil.
2. Add bonito flakes. Turn the heat off and set aside.
3. Slice the carrot into matchsticks. Slice the onion and horenzo. Transfer to a bowl.
4. Slice Kanzler Beef Cocktail Sausages. Add into the bowl, then add flour, salt, pepper. Mix well.
5. In a separate bowl, combine ice water, egg yolk, flour, and cornstarch. Mix well.
6. Prepare a bowl. Get some of the veggie mix and pour some of the wet batter. Mix well.
7. Add it to hot oil. Push the sliced veggies into one and fry until crispy. Set aside.
8. Sausage Kakiage is ready to serve.

Title: Luar Garing, Dalam Lembut! Resep EGG CHICKEN ROLL ALA HOKBEN
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ShLeN8usfg8

Egg Chicken Roll Recipe (yield 6-7 rolls)

Ingredients:
600 g chicken thigh
7 clove minced garlic
3 tbsp fried shallot
2 tbsp cornstarch
1 pc egg white
120 g cold water / ice cube
2 tbsp sesame oil
1.5 tsp salt
1.5 tbsp sugar
2 tsp chicken powder
½ tsp pepper
¾ tsp nutmeg / five-spice powder
1-2 slice white bread, small
50 ml water

Rissole Skin ingredients:
2 pc egg
80 g all-purpose flour
40 g cornstarch
250 ml water
2 tbsp oil
¾ tsp salt
½ tsp stock powder / MSG
Yellow food coloring, optional

Others:
Fortune Oil
Fortune Premium Rice
Salad dressing (https://youtu.be/9KXKkUvY9x0)

Steps:
1. For the skin, combine the flour, cornstarch, egg, water, and oil. Mix well, then add a little bit of yellow food coloring. Stir.
2. Add salt and stock powder. Mix well.
3. Heat the pan on low heat. Pour the batter and even it out. Cook through and set aside.
4. Pat the chicken dry. Add it into the food processor along with the salt, stock powder, and sugar. Blend until sticky.
5. Add minced garlic and fried shallots. Blend, then add pepper, nutmeg powder, sesame oil, and ice cubes. Blend it again.
6. Add egg white and cornstarch. Blend until it’s mixed evenly.
7. Dice the bread. Mix it with water, then add into the food processor and blend.
8. Prepare the Egg Roll skin. Spread the meat dough, roll, and seal the skin with the flour mixture.
9. Steam the Egg Chicken Rolls for 20 minutes. Set aside, then slice.
10. Heat Fortune Oil, then fry the Egg Chicken Rolls until golden brown.
11. Egg Chicken Rolls are ready to serve.

Title: Resep KUE MOCHI WIJEN ISI KACANG: Khas Semarang, Disukai Semua!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RkZ6jSsJShk

Semarang Mochi Recipe (yield 24-26 pcs)

Original filling ingredients:
90 g fried peanuts, crushed
35 g sugar
50 ml water
¼ tsp salt

Chocolate filling ingredients:
75 g toasted almond, crushed
4 tbsp Indomilk Swiss Choco Condensed Milk
35 g sugar
¼ tsp salt

Mochi dough ingredients:
160 g glutinous rice flour
40 g tapioca flour
80 g sugar
2 tsp oil
280 g water
½ tsp salt
½ tbsp banana essence

Others:
Toasted sesame seed
Cornstarch

Steps:
1. For the Original filling, bring water, sugar, and salt to a boil. Then, add the crushed peanuts and cook on medium-low heat while stirring until it comes together. Let cool.
2. For the Chocolate filling, add the almonds, salt, sugar, and Indomilk Swiss Choco Condensed Milk. Cook on medium-low heat while stirring until it comes together. Let cool.
3. After they cool, shape the fillings into balls using a 1-tsp measuring spoon.
4. In a bowl, combine glutinous rice flour, tapioca flour, sugar, salt, oil, banana essence, and water. Mix well.
5. Pour into the pan and cover with aluminum foil. Steam for 30 minutes.
6. Get the dough out of the pan and knead until it comes together, then divide into two parts.
7. Sprinkle it with cornstarch. Shape into a long cylinder and slice.
8. Flatten the sides by pinching the dough. Add the filling in, seal, and shape into balls.
9. Coat with toasted sesame seeds evenly.
10. Semarang Mochi is ready to serve.

Title: Crunchy Asam Manis Gurih! Resep SALAD ALA HOKBEN: Favorit Anak & Keluarga!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9KXKkUvY9x0

Salad à la HokBen Recipe (yield 6-7 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pc carrots, large
1 pc white radish
5 sheet cabbage

Pickling Liquid ingredients:
3-4 tbsp vinegar
8 tbsp sugar
2 tsp salt
200 ml water

Mayo Dressing ingredients:
8 tbsp mayonnaise
1 tbsp condensed milk
1-2 tbsp ketchup
1 tsp mustard, optional
¼ tsp salt
Pepper, to taste

Steps:
1. Shave the carrots or slice them into matchsticks. Slice the radish diagonally and chop it lengthwise. Transfer to a bowl.
2. Cook the sugar, vinegar, salt, and water until the sugar dissolves. Pour into the carrots and radish. Mix well and chill.
3. Slice the cabbage thinly and soak in cold water.
4. Combine mayo, ketchup, condensed milk, mustard, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
5. Arrange the salad on the plate.
6. Salad à la HokBen is ready to serve with the Mayo Dressing.

Yoshinoya Rice with Rice Cooker Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Yoshinoya Sambal Korek Bawang
Yoshinoya Onsen Egg

Steps:

Green Chili Stir-Fry Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g Tanjung green chili
150 g habanero
3-5 pc bay leaf
3-5 pc lime leaf
2 thumb galangal, pounded
25 g palm sugar
½ tbsp sweet soy sauce
½ tsp salt
½ tsp stock powder / MSG
400-500 ml water

Blended Spices ingredients:
7 clove garlic
13 pc shallot
5 pc candlenut, toasted
20 pc green Thai chili

Rice

3. Slit the Tanjung chili. Add it into the pan with the habanero, palm sugar, and water.

Title: Resep SIOMAY AYAM Ekonomis: Gurih, Kenyal, Nagih [Murah Bukan Murahan!]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3W5IvLTiWuw

Chicken Shumai Recipe (yield 28-30 pcs)

Dough ingredients:
500 g chicken thigh fillet
90 g chayote (after squeezing the water out)
2 tsp salt
2 tbsp sugar
2 tsp stock powder / MSG
½ tsp pepper
1 pc egg white
2 tbsp fish sauce
1 tbsp minced garlic
3 pc green onion
3 tbsp oil
100-150 ml ice cube / cold water
220 g tapioca flour
40 g all-purpose flour

Peanut Sauce ingredients:
100 g fried peanut
5 clove garlic
7 pc shallot
10 pc curly red chili
3 pc candlenut
2 pc Thai chili
80 ml oil
80 g palm sugar
3 tbsp tamarind water
3 pc lime leaf
550 ml water
3 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp rice flour
1 tsp salt

Others:
Lime leaf

Steps:
1. Grate the chayote finely and squeeze the water out.
2. Slice the green onions finely. Heat the oil and sauté for a moment. Set aside.
3. In a food processor, add half of the chicken thigh along with the minced garlic, salt, sugar, stock powder, and pepper. Blend until smooth and sticky.
4. Add the rest of the chicken in with ice cubes, egg white, and fish sauce. Blend again and transfer into a bowl.
5. Add the grated chayote, green onion and its oil, flour, and tapioca flour. Mix well.
6. Brush the steamer with oil. Shape the dough into balls with a spoon and place in the steamer.
7. Tidy up the shape with forks. Pull the sides upwards, then steam for 20 minutes.
8. For the Sauce, slice the garlic and shallots. Pound the candlenuts, slice the Thai chili and curly red chili.
9. Heat the oil. Sauté the shallots, garlic, and candlenuts. Cook for a moment, then add Thai chili and curly red chili.
10. Transfer into the blender. Add peanuts and some water, then blend until smooth. Return to the pan and cook.
11. Add lime leaf and palm sugar. Stir, then add water, tamarind water, chili sauce, and salt. Bring to a boil.
12. Dilute the rice water and add it into the sauce. Mix well.
13. Chicken Shumai is ready to serve.

Mango Sago Recipe (yield 10-12 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g ripe Harum Manis mango, sliced

400 ml milk
50-100 ml mango syrup 
Ice cube, as needed

Jelly ingredients:
7.5 g plain jelly powder
3 tbsp sugar
4 tbsp Kapal Api Krim Kafe
300 ml water

Topping:
Pearl sago
Nata de coco
Pomelo

Steps:

2. Get the jelly out of the mold and slice lengthwise.
3. Blend the mango with milk until smooth. Add Kapal Api Krim Kafe and blend again.
4. Transfer the slurry to a bowl, then add mango syrup and stir.
5. Add the jelly, pearl sago, pomelo, nata de coco, and ice cubes. Mix well.

Tomato Sambal Recipe (yield 2 jars @250ml)

Title: Menu Spesial Lebaran! Resep OPOR AYAM SUSU: Gurih Berempah!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OVwtItVYl-0

Milky Chicken Opor Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
1 pc broiler chicken @800 g
1.5 tsp salt
1 pc lime

Blended Spices ingredients:
7 clove garlic
10 pc shallot
4 pc candlenut, toasted
¾ tsp coriander, toasted
½ tsp cumin, toasted
2 cm ginger
30 ml water

Others:
2 pc lemongrass, pounded
1 pc lime leaf
3 pc bay leaf
3 pc cardamom
½ pc nutmeg
5 cm galangal, sliced and pounded
500 ml water
½ tsp salt
½ tbsp sugar
1 tsp stock powder
70 g Anchor Unsalted Butter
50 ml Anchor Cooking Cream
300 ml Anchor Full Cream Milk

Steps:
1. Pat the chicken dry with paper towels. Chop it into 10 pieces.
2. Marinate the chicken with lime juice and salt. Mix well and marinate for 30 minutes.
3. Blend the candlenuts, shallots, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, and a bit of water until smooth.
4. For the Clarified Butter, heat Anchor Unsalted Butter on low heat until it melts and becomes foamy. Then, strain.
5. Sauté the blended spices. Cook for a moment, then add the melted butter.
6. Add pepper, galangal, lemongrass, bay leaf, lime leaf, crushed cardamom, and nutmeg. Mix well, then add the chicken in. Cook until browned.
7. Add water, salt, sugar, and stock powder. Cover the pan and cook for 10-15 minutes.
8. Add Anchor Cooking Cream and Anchor Full Cream Milk. Cook for a moment. 
9. Chicken Opor is ready to serve.

Title: Resep PINEAPPLE DESSERT: Juara MasterChef Indonesia S9 [feat. Cheryl]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LrGSPbQrsp0

Deconstructed Tropical Dessert Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ginger Jelly ingredients:
150 g water
4 cm ginger
50 g sugar
1.5 g agar powder

Caramelized Pineapple ingredients:
1 pc honey pineapple
Cinnamon powder, as needed
5 tbsp caster sugar

Coconut Crumble ingredients:
85 g cake flour
50 g butter
25 g desiccated coconut
50 g sugar
Salt, as needed

Whipped Lime Yogurt ingredients:
150 ml whipping cream
1 pc lime
25 g greek yogurt
25 g icing sugar

Steps:
1. Heat water, sugar, grated ginger, and bring to a boil. Add agar powder and stir. Pour into a bowl. Chill, then slice into cubes.
2. For the Coconut Crumble, melt the butter. In another bowl, combine flour, sugar, and desiccated coconut. Mix well.
3. Add the melted butter in slowly while stirring. Add a bit of salt, then cook again until golden brown. Set aside.
4. Combine whipping cream, greek yogurt, and sifted icing sugar. Whisk until fluffy, then add lime zest and lime juice. Mix well.
5. Add the cream into a piping bag with a nozzle attached.
6. Slice the pineapple and add cinnamon powder. Mix well.
7. Arrange the pineapple on a heat-proof pan. Sprinkle caster sugar on all sides, then torch it. Cube some of the pineapple and set aside.
8. Assemble the Crumble, Whipped Cream, Pineapple, and Jelly in a glass or a dessert plate.
9. Deconstructed Tropical Dessert is ready to serve.

Title: Lembut & Wangi! Resep SATE AYAM KHAS SENAYAN: Meresap Sampai Ke Tusuk Satenya!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=e5-WcIiO_rQ

“Sate Khas Senayan” Chicken Satay Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
600 g chicken thigh fillet
3 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
1 tsp coriander
6 cm galangal, sliced
5 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 pc lime
1 tsp salt
1 tsp stock powder / MSG
¼ tsp pepper
300 ml water

Sauce ingredients:
120 g fried peanuts
3 clove garlic, sliced
5 pc shallot, sliced
4 pc red curly chili, sliced
50 g palm sugar
3 pc lime leaf
500 ml water
2 tbsp sweet soy sauce
¼ tsp salt
Oil for frying

Add-ons:
Sliced shallot
Boiled red Thai chili
Ketupat
Kaffir lime

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken into long strips. Set aside in a bowl.
2. Blend the shallots, garlic, galangal, and coriander with water until smooth. Add into the chicken.
3. Add sweet soy sauce, salt, stock powder, pepper, and lime juice. Stir evenly, then cover with plastic wrap and marinate in the fridge overnight.
4. For the sauce, heat some oil and sauté the curly chili, garlic, and shallots. Set aside.
5. Blend the peanuts, water, and sautéed ingredients until smooth, then cook it again.
6. Add palm sugar, lime leaf, sweet soy sauce, and salt. Cook on low heat while stirring until it thickens.
7. Skewer the meat. Heat the pan and add a bit of margarine.
8. Add the Satay into the pan. Cook until both sides are browned. Lower the heat, then cover the pan and let it cook.
9. “Sate Khas Senayan” Chicken Satay is ready to serve with Thai chili, kaffir lime, Ketupat, and sliced shallots on the side.

Title: Istimewa! Resep TAHU BAKSO Khas Semarang
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uNFw6cwR4cg

Semarang Stuffed Tofu Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients:
900 g silken white tofu
340 g chicken thigh fillet + 30 g skin
250 g ground beef
5-6 clove garlic
3 tbsp fried shallots
150 g tapioca flour
2 pc egg white
60 gr cold water / ice cube
1 tbsp salt
1 tbsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
2 tbsp sugar
¾ tsp pepper

Others:
Fortune Oi
Fortune Premium Rice

Add-ons:
Green Thai chili

Steps:
1. Heat Fortune oil, then add tofu and fry until crisp. Set aside.
2. Cut up the chicken skin. Add into the food processor along with chicken fillet, beef, garlic, salt, sugar, stock powder, and pepper. Blend until smooth and sticky.
3. Add the ice cubes in. Blend, then add the egg whites and fried shallots. Blend again.
4. Add the tapioca flour. Blend until the dough comes together, then transfer into a piping bag.
5. Scrape some tofu out, then pipe the dough into the tofu. Use a fork to make it neat. Repeat until finished.
6. Steam the Stuffed Tofu for 20 minutes until cooked.
7. Stuffed Tofu is ready to serve

Title: 100% Sukses! Resep KUE NASTAR 3.0: Gurih & Lembut Istimewa! [Cocok Untuk Lebaran]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bFHuLWbZWP4

Pineapple Tarts Recipe (yield 120-130 pcs)

Pineapple Tart Dough ingredients:
270 g all-purpose flour
110 g cornstarch
125 g Anchor Tinned Salted Butter or Anchor Salted Butter
125 g Anchor Unsalted Butter 
100 g powdered milk
110 g icing sugar
2 pc egg yolk
½ tsp salt
75 g Anchor Cheddar Cheese, grated

Pineapple Jam ingredients:
750 g grated pineapple
160 g sugar
5 pc clove
1 tbsp Anchor Tinned Salted Butter or Anchor Salted Butter
1 tbsp Anchor Unsalted Butter

Egg Wash ingredients:
2 pc egg yolk
1 tbsp oil
1 tbsp Anchor Full Cream Milk

Steps:
1. Heat the pan. Add the pineapple, sugar, and clove. Cook until the juice is reduced, then add Anchor Unsalted Butter and Anchor Tinned Salted Butter. Cook again until the jam comes together and becomes sticky.
2. Transfer to a bowl and let cool.
3. Shape the jam into balls using a measuring spoon (¼ tsp) or 3 g each. Store in the fridge.
4. For the dough, mix Anchor Unsalted Butter and Anchor Tinned Salted Butter. Then, add icing sugar and whisk until pale and fluffy.
5. Add the egg yolks one by one, then add salt and mix.
6. Sift in powdered milk, cornstarch, and flour. Mix with a spatula.
7. Add Anchor Cheddar Cheese. Mix well until the dough comes together and shape into balls using a measuring spoon (1 tsp) or 6-7 g each.
8. Add the pineapple jam. Shape into balls and arrange on a tray lined with baking paper.
9. Bake at 130°C-135°C for 15-18 minutes.
10. For the egg wash, mix the yolks with oil and Anchor Full Cream Milk. Mix well.
11. Get the tarts out and brush them with the egg wash evenly. Bake them again for 8-10 minutes.
12. The Pineapple Tarts are ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Resep AYAM KEMANGI PEDAS Khas Sunda [Resep Buka Puasa]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vQK7p3lb6JQ

Spicy Lemon Basil Chicken Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
1 kg broiler, sliced into 12 pieces
1 pc lime
1 tsp salt

Other ingredients:
2 pc lemongrass, pounded
3 pc bay leaf
7 pc lime leaf
2 pc green onion, sliced
1 pc tomato, sliced
10-15 pc red Thai chili
50 g lemon basil
1 thumb ginger, pounded
⅓ tsp salt
1.5 tbsp sugar
½ tbsp stock powder
600 ml water

Blended Spices ingredients:
5 clove garlic
8 pc shallot
5 pc candlenut
1 thumb turmeric
10-15 pc red Thai chili
2 thumb aromatic ginger
Oil, as needed

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with lime juice and salt. Stir and marinate for a few moments.
2. Pound the candlenuts. Slice the garlic, shallot, turmeric, and aromatic ginger. Add into the blender.
3. Add Thai chili and some oil, then blend until smooth. Then, sauté until oily.
4. Add lemongrass, ginger, bay leaf, and lime leaf. Cook until fragrant and browned.
5. Add the chicken in. Cook for a moment until a bit browned, then add water.
6. Season with salt, sugar, and stock powder. Stir, then braise for 15-20 minutes.
7. Add tomato, green onions, and Thai chili. Stir and cook for a moment.
8. Add lemon basil. Stir well, then turn the heat off.
9. Spicy Lemon Basil Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Resep ROLADE TAHU: Luar Garing Dalam Lembut! [Stok Lauk Sahur / Berbuka]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_FvPzU5t1Jo

Tofu Roulade Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Tofu Mix recipe:
600 g firm tofu
1 pc egg
1 pc onion, chopped and sautéed
3 tbsp all-purpose flour
3 tbsp cornstarch
3-4 clove garlic, minced
½ tbsp chicken powder
½ tsp salt
1.5 tbsp sugar
2 tsp sesame oil, optional

Roulade Skin ingredients:
2 pc egg
80 g all-purpose flour
40 g cornstarch
250 ml water
2 tbsp oil
¾ tsp salt
½ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
Yellow food coloring, as needed, optional

Others:
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. For the skin, combine flour, cornstarch, eggs, water, and oil. Mix well, then add some yellow food coloring. Mix well.
2. Add salt and stock powder. Mix well.
3. Heat the pan. Pour the batter in and even it out. Cook through and set aside.
4. In a food processor, add tofu, egg, minced garlic, cornstarch, flour, salt, stock power, and sugar. Blend smoothly.
5. Add the onions and mix well.
6. Add the tofu mix on the skin and roll.
7. Steam for 20 minutes. Set aside.
8. Slice and fry the Roulade until golden brown.
9. Tofu Roulade is ready to serve.

Title: Praktis! Resep ICE CREAM COOKIE SANDWICH: Kesukaan Anak-Anak
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6WqNKq2OevY

Cookie Ice Cream Sandwich Recipe (yield 16-20 pcs)

Ingredient:
Good Time Double Choc
Good Time Rainbow

Pastry Cream ingredients:
150 ml milk
50 ml coconut milk
1 pc egg yolk
40 g sugar
1 tsp vanilla extract
¼ tsp salt
15 g cornstarch
1 tbsp butter

Other ingredients:
170 ml whipping cream
Pandan extract, as needed
Yellow food coloring, optional

Topping:
Gumpaste

Steps:
1. Combine egg yolk, cornstarch, sugar, salt, and a bit of milk. Mix well.
2. Heat the pan. Add the rest of the milk and the coconut milk. Cook until simmering, then add into the yolk mixture. Stir slowly.
3. Cook it again, then add vanilla extract. Cook until it thickens, then add butter. Mix well.
4. Transfer to a bowl. Cover with plastic wrap until it touches the surface of the cream. Chill in the fridge.
5. Whip the cream to a medium peak. In a separate bowl, mix the pastry cream until soft.
6. Add the whipping cream to the pastry cream. Mix well with a spatula.
7. Divide into 2 parts. Add pandan flavoring and some yellow food coloring to one bowl. Mix well, then transfer into piping bags.
8. Prepare a baking pan and arrange Good Time Double Choc and Good Time Rainbow. Pipe the cream on the biscuit and top it with another Good Time biscuit.
9. Add the gumpaste topping and cover with plastic wrap. Chill in the freezer.

Title: Gurih Renyah! Resep BAKWAN SAYUR Lengkap Dengan SAMBAL KACANG
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tVCaK158ar8

Indonesian Vegetable Fritters (Bakwan Sayur) Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
4 pc cabbage
80 g beansprouts
1-2 pc carrot, peeled
2-3 pc green onion
4 pc celery
250 g all-purpose flour
50 g cornstarch
50 g rice flour
1 tsp baking powder, optional
100 ml coconut milk
2 tsp salt
1 tbsp stock powder
1 tbsp sugar
330 ml water

Peanut Sambal ingredients:
3 clove garlic, sliced
3 pc shallot, sliced
6 pc red curly chili, sliced
6 pc Thai chili, sliced
80 g fried peanut
3 pc lime leaf
500 ml water
1 tbsp vinegar
50 g palm sugar
1 tsp salt
1-2 tbsp sugar
¼ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer

Steps:
1. Heat some oil. Sauté the garlic, shallots, curly chili, and Thai chili until they wilt. Add lime leaf and cook until browned.
2. Blend the peanuts, water, and sautéed ingredients until smooth. Cook it again.
3. Add palm sugar, vinegar, salt, sugar, and stock powder. Bring to a boil and set aside.
4. Slice the cabbage, green onion, and celery. Shave the carrots and place in a bowl.
5. Add beansprouts, flour, rice flour, cornstarch, baking powder, salt, stock powder, and sugar. Mix well.
6. Add coconut milk and water. Mix well.
7. Heat the oil and fry the Fritters until golden brown.
8. Vegetable Fritters are ready to serve with Peanut Sambal on the side.

Title: 10 Menit Jadi! Resep SUP KRIM AYAM JAGUNG
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ePdaj_kYBoA

Chicken & Corn Cream Soup Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
250 g chicken breast fillet
2 clove garlic
½ tsp mixed herbs, optional
1 tsp mustard, optional
1 tsp salt
½ tbsp sugar
1 tsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper
Lime

Soup ingredients:
1 pc onion, chopped
3 tbsp Anchor Salted Butter
3-4 tbsp all-purpose flour
750 ml water
2 pc celery, optional
1 cup shelled corn
1 tsp chicken powder
133 g Anchor Cooking Cream

Add-ons:
Soft baguette

Steps:
1. Pat the chicken dry with a paper towel. Slice thinly and place in a bowl.
2. Marinate with salt, stock powder, sugar, pepper, minced garlic, a bit of lime juice, mustard, and mixed herbs. Mix well.
3. Heat some oil. Add the chicken and cook until a bit browned. Set aside and dice.
4. In the same pan, sauté the onion until fragrant. Stir, then add Anchor Salted Butter and flour. Stir well.
5. Add water. Stir, then add chicken, corn, celery, and chicken powder. Stir well.
6. Add Anchor Cooking Cream and cook shortly.
7. Chicken & Corn Cream Soup is ready to serve with a baguette on the side.

Title: Resep AYAM BAKAR BUMBU RUJAK: Empuk Meresap! [Cocok Untuk Sahur]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bgHf8ix0qnY

Rujak Grilled Chicken Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Marinating ingredients:
1 pc broiler chicken @800 g
1 pc lime
½ tsp salt
½ tsp pepper

Blended spices ingredients:
6 clove garlic
10 pc shallot
5 pc candlenut, toasted
2 cm ginger, sliced
3 cm turmeric, sliced
4 cm galangal, sliced
3 sachet shrimp paste
Oil

Other spices:
11 pc red chili
12 pc red curly chili
6 pc red Thai chili
2 pc red tomato

Others:
2 pc lemongrass
3 pc bay leaf
4 pc lime leaf
2 tbsp palm sugar, shaved
2-4 tbsp tamarind water
100 ml coconut milk
300 ml water
½ tsp salt
1-2 tbsp sugar
1 tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer

Add-ons:
Cucumber
Lemon basil
Kaffir lime

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken into 6 parts, then marinate with lime juice, salt, and pepper. Mix well and marinate for 30 minutes,
2. Blend the garlic, shallots, candlenuts, turmeric, ginger, galangal, shrimp paste, and oil until smooth.
3. For the chili, boil the red chili and red curly chili for 5 minutes. Rinse with water.
4. Blend the tomato, then add red chili, red curly chili, and Thai chili. Blend to a rough texture and set aside.
5. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant, then add lemongrass, bay leaf, and lime leaf. Sauté until the oil seeps out.
6. Add the blended chili in. Stir evenly, then add the chicken in and mix.
7. Add the tamarind water, palm sugar, coconut milk, and water. Mix well.
8. Add salt, sugar, and stock powder. Stir, then braise for 25-30 minutes on medium-low heat.
9. Add the chicken into the air fryer. Grill at 200°C for 10 minutes.
10. Add the chicken back into the spices and stir.
11. Rujak Grilled Chicken is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Gurih Nikmat! Resep BUBUR SUMSUM, Jelly Pandan dan Oat: Cocok Untuk Takjil & Keluarga.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2rlLK51t9m0

Indonesian Sweet Rice Porridge Recipe (yield 7 servings)

Pandan Jelly ingredients:
650 ml pandan juice (6 pc pandan leaf + 6 pc suji leaf)
10 g jelly powder
50 g sugar

Sweet Rice Porridge ingredients:
300 ml instant coconut milk
450 ml water
30 g rice flour
15 g tapioca flour
2 pc pandan leaf
½ tsp salt

Brown Sugar Granola ingredients:
50 g butter
80 g palm sugar
2 tbsp water
¼ tsp salt
1.5 cup Quaker Rolled Oats
½ cup raisin
1 cup sliced almond

Add-ons:
Palm sugar syrup, optional

Steps:
1. Add pandan juice, jelly powder, and sugar into the pan. Mix well and cook until boiling, then strain.
2. Pour into a glass and chill.
3. For the Granola, heat a pan on low heat. Add Quaker Rolled Oats and sliced almonds. Toast until lightly browned.
4. Add raisins. Cook for a moment until browned. Set aside.
5. Add palm sugar and water. Stir, then add butter and salt. Stir well.
6. Add the oat mixture. Cook for a moment, then transfer to a pan lined with baking paper. Let it cool down.
7. For the Sweet Rice Porridge, add water, coconut milk, tapioca flour, rice flour, and salt. Stir well, then add pandan leaf. Turn the heat on and cook until it thickens while stirring.
8. Add Sweet Rice Porridge into the glass with Pandan Jelly. Add Granola and Palm Sugar Syrup as toppings.

Title: Istimewa! Resep SAYAP AYAM GORENG OSENG BAWANG: Dijamin Nambah! [Resep Chicken Wing]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=T0bTgYbAV8o

Fried Chicken Wings with Shallot Stir-Fry Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Marinating ingredients:
10 pc chicken wing
5 clove garlic, minced
1 pc egg
1 tbsp vinegar / lemon juice
1 tsp baking powder, optional
6 tbsp tapioca flour
2 tsp stock powder
1 tsp salt
½ tbsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
2 sachet shrimp paste

Shallot Stir-Fry ingredients:
100 g shallot, small, whole
3 clove garlic, minced
2 pc green onion
15 pc red Thai chili
10 pc green Thai chili
50 ml water
1 tbsp oyster sauce
¼ tsp salt
½ tbsp sugar
¼ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
Fortune Premium Rice

Steps:
1. Halve the wings, then marinate with minced garlic, egg, tapioca flour, vinegar, baking powder, chicken powder, salt, sugar, and pepper. Mix well.
2. Roast the shrimp paste. Crumble it, then add into the chicken while straining. Mix well and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
3. Heat Fortune Oil, then fry the wings until browned. Set aside.
4. Slice the green onions, red Thai chili, and green Thai chili in the size of the shallots.
5. Heat some Fortune Oil. Stir-fry the minced garlic for a moment, then add the shallots and the white part of the green onions. Cook until fragrant.
6. Add water, oyster sauce, salt, sugar, and stock powder. Cook for a moment, then add red Thai chili, green Thai chili, and the rest of the green onions. Stir well.
7. Fried Chicken Wings with Shallot Stir-Fry is ready to serve.

Title: 100% Sukses Gurih! Resep SERABI SOLO Lembut & Lentur: Cocok Untuk Takjil.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tckxD5TmAsc

Serabi Solo Recipe (yield 20-23 pcs)

Batter ingredients:
200 ml coconut milk
450 ml water
1 tsp salt
2 pc pandan leaf
75 g sugar
1 pc egg
185 g rice flour
75 g tapioca flour
¾ tsp instant yeast

Coconut Sauce ingredients:
200 ml coconut milk
100 ml water
1 tsp salt
2 pc pandan leaf
1 tbsp cocoa powder
2 tbsp hot water
45-60 ml Indomilk Plain Condensed Milk
45-60 ml Indomilk Swiss Choco Condensed Milk

Topping:
Chocolate rice
Grated cheese

Steps:
1. Bring water, coconut milk, pandan leaf, and salt to a boil for 2 minutes, then transfer to a bowl. Let it cool until warm and discard the pandan leaf.
2. Add rice flour, tapioca flour, egg, sugar, and yeast. Mix well, then cover with plastic wrap and proof for 30 minutes.
3. For the Coconut Sauce, bring coconut milk, water, pandan leaf, and salt to a boil. Then, split into 2 bowls.
4. Add Indomilk Plain Condensed Milk and Indomilk Swiss Choco Condensed Milk into each bowl.
5. Dilute cocoa powder with hot water and mix well. Add it into the Chocolate Coconut Sauce and mix well.
6. Heat the pan. Pour the Serabi batter. Swirl the pan, then add 2-3 tbsp of each of the Coconut Sauce. Cook thoroughly.
7. For the White Serabi, add Indomilk Plain Condensed Milk and grated cheese as toppings. For the Chocolate Serabi, add the Indomilk Swiss Choco Condensed Milk and chocolate rice as toppings.
8. Place the Serabi on a banana leaf and roll.
9. Serabi Solo is ready to serve.

Title: Kriuk Meresap! Resep AYAM GORENG KOREA [Ala Richeese]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9MJykVmQyhY

Korean Flying Chicken Recipe (yield 12 servings)

Brining ingredients:
2 pc broiler chicken @800 g
2.5 tbsp lime juice
3 tbsp salt
4 tbsp sugar
6 clove garlic, pounded
700 ml water

Dry Coat ingredients:
115 g all-purpose flour
130 g cornstarch
¾ tbsp garlic powder
¾ tbsp onion powder
1 tbsp chicken powder
1 tsp salt
½ tsp pepper
2 tsp baking powder, optional

Wet Batter ingredients:
300 ml water
200 g dry coat

Spicy Powder ingredients:
1.5 tbsp smoked paprika powder
½ tbsp fine chili powder
½ tbsp sugar, powdered
½ tsp salt
½ tsp chicken powder

Other ingredients:
Fortune Oil
Fortune Premium Rice Grains

Steps:
1. Halve the chicken and butterfly it. In a bowl, combine salt, sugar, water, pounded garlic, and lime juice. Mix well.
2. Add the chicken in. Cover with plastic wrap and keep in the fridge for 24 hours.
3. Combine flour, cornstarch, garlic powder, onion powder, chicken powder, salt, pepper, and baking powder. Mix well.
4. For the wet batter, combine some of the dry coat with water. Mix well.
5. Pat the chicken dry with paper towels. Coat with the dry coat and dip into the wet batter evenly.
6. Heat Fortune Oil on medium heat. Add the chicken in and fry until browned for 13-15 minutes. Set aside.
7. For the sprinkles, combine the smoked paprika powder, chili powder, salt, sugar, and chicken powder. Mix well.
8. Korean Flying Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Resep PEPES AYAM KEMANGI: Empuk Berempah!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hPeXeP5HmZM

Chicken Basil Pepes Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Marinating ingredients:
1 pc rooster @600 g, sliced into 4 pieces
1 pc lime
1 tsp salt
½ tsp pepper

Blended spices ingredients:
8 clove garlic
12 pc shallot
7 pc candlenut
8 pc red curly chili
5 cm turmeric, sliced
6 cm galangal, sliced
Oil

Other ingredients:
8 pc red Thai chili
4 pc bay leaf
2 pc lemongrass, sliced diagonally
1 pc red tomato, sliced
60 g lemon basil
2 pc green onion, sliced
½ tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
1 tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
Banana leaf to wrap

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with lime juice, salt, and pepper. Mix well and let it marinate.
2. Blend the galangal, turmeric, candlenuts, garlic, shallot, and chili with oil until smooth.
3. Sauté the blended spices on medium heat until brownish and fragrant. Add oil if needed, then turn the heat off.
4. Once the spices are warm or cooled down, add chicken, salt, sugar, and stock powder. Mix well.
5. Add green onions and lemon basil. Mix well.
6. Prepare the banana leaves. Add bay leaf, lemongrass, chicken with the spices, Thai chili, and tomato. Wrap and secure with a toothpick.
7. Steam for 40 minutes.
8. Chicken Pepes is ready to serve.

Title: Cukup 15 menit! Resep MIE KUAH AYAM LABU SIAM : Praktis & Ekonomis.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=B6OBHxvIs18

Chicken & Chayote Noodle Soup Recipe (yield 6-7 servings)

Marinating ingredients:
300 g chicken breast fillet
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp salt
Lime

Other ingredients:
5 clove garlic
9 pc shallot
2 pc green onion, sliced
1 pc celery, sliced
1 pc tomato, sliced
1.2 L water
430 g chayote, small
½ tbsp chicken powder
½ tbsp salt
1.5 tbsp sugar
Fresh noodles
Oil

Condiments:
Thai chili Sambal
Chili sauce
Lime
Boiled egg

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with lime juice, salt, and pepper. Mix well and let marinate.
2. Slice the chayote into sticks. Rinse with water.
3. Slice the shallots and garlic thinly. Heat some oil. Add the shallots and cook for a moment on high heat.
4. Lower the heat and add garlic. Fry a bit until yellowed. Set aside.
5. In the same pan, add the chicken. Pan-sear until a bit browned, then add water, chicken powder, salt, sugar, and some of the fried shallots. Cook until the chicken is done.
6. Add tomato and chayote. Cook until soft, then add green onion and celery.
7. Remove the chicken and shred it, then add it back into the pan.
8. Heat some water and boil the noodles. Set aside.
9. Add the noodles into a bowl and pour the soup in.
10. Chicken & Chayote Noodle Soup is ready to be served with Thai chili Sambal, chili sauce, boiled egg, lime juice, and fried shallots on the side.

Batter-Fried Tempeh Recipe (yield 18-20 pieces)

Ingredients:
Tempeh, thinly sliced

Batter ingredients:
250 g all-purpose flour
30 g rice flour
60 gr cornstarch
1 tsp baking powder, optional
5 clove garlic, minced
1 tsp turmeric, grated
1 tsp coriander powder
3 pc green onion, large
2 pc celery, large

500 ml water

Condiment:
Sweet Soy Sambal (https://youtu.be/zQSrxcR-_jA)

Title: 10 Menit Jadi! Resep NASI GORENG TELUR: Dijamin Nambah! [Golden Fried Rice]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i6yHVLgrELQ

Golden Fried Rice Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
3 pc Omega egg
350 g cooked white rice
3 clove garlic
2 pc green onion, medium-sized
½ pc corn
1 tbsp soy sauce
½ tsp fish sauce
¼ tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
¼ tsp pepper
Oil to fry
 
Steps:
1. Chop the garlic, slice the green onions, and shell the corn by slicing. Set aside.
2. Separate the yolks from the whites. Mix the rice into the yolks and stir well.
3. Heat some oil and add the egg whites. Stir until fragrant, then add garlic and the white part of green onions. Stir well.
4. Add the rice in. Stir, then add soy sauce and fish sauce. Stir well.
5. Add sugar, salt, and stock powder. Stir well.
6. Add corn and the rest of the green onions. Stir.
7. Golden Fried Rice is ready to serve.

Title: Gurih Nagih! Resep FRENCH TOAST WITH COFFEE CUSTARD: Luar Kering Dalem Lembut!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fnwC-C8annY

French Toast with Coffee Custard Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Ingredients:
3 slice white bread
112 ml milk
2 pc egg
¼ tsp salt
1 tsp vanilla extract
Sugar
Butter

Coffee Custard ingredients:
200 ml milk
80 ml coffee concentrate
3-4 tbsp palm sugar
1 pc egg
5 tbsp Kapal Api Krim Kafe
2 tbsp cornstarch
2 tbsp butter
⅛ tsp salt

Coffee Concentrate ingredients:
3 tbsp Kapal Api Spesial Coffee
100 ml water

Topping:
Whipped cream

Steps:
1. Boil some water. Add Kapal Api Coffee, then brew and strain.
2. Transfer to a pan. Add milk and Kapal Api Krim Kafe. Stir and simmer.
3. In a separate bowl, combine egg, cornstarch, palm sugar, and salt. Mix well, then pour the coffee mixture in while stirring.
4. Return to the pan and cook until it thickens, then add butter. Mix well and pour into a bowl and cover with plastic wrap.
5. In a container, combine eggs, milk, salt, and vanilla extract. Mix well, then soak both sides of the bread.
6. Heat the pan on medium heat. Add butter, then toast each side of the bread for 4 minutes or until browned.
7. Sprinkle sugar on all sides of the bread. Add more butter, then set the bread aside.
8. Pour the Coffee Custard and add the whipped cream topping.
9. French Toast with Coffee Custard is ready to serve.

Title: RESEP SALAD KHAS JEPANG PRAKTIS! [Gurih, Asam, Segar]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kJLVqdk0i2c

Japanese Soba Salad Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ponzu Dressing ingredients (with store-bought Ponzu):
40 ml rice vinegar
140 ml ponzu
40 g water
40 g Hillary Farm Manuka Honey / sugar (not in ml)
80 ml sesame oil
2 cm ginger, peeled and sliced
¼ tsp mushroom stock powder, optional
Sesame seeds, as needed

Ponzu Dressing ingredients (with soy sauce):
90 ml soy sauce (heat, then add 3 g katsuobushi and 3 g kombu, infuse for 15 minutes, then strain)
40-50 ml lime juice / yuzu juice
35 ml rice vinegar
40 g water
40 g Hillary Farm Manuka Honey / sugar (not in ml)
80 ml sesame oil
2 cm ginger, peeled and sliced
1 - 2 clove garlic
¼ tsp mushroom stock powder, optional
Toasted sesame seeds, as needed

Salad ingredients:
Organic green lettuce
Iceberg lettuce
Edamame
Cherry tomato
Japanese cucumber
Buckwheat soba
Wakame
Onion
Carrot
Spring onion

Others:
Toasted sesame seeds as topping

Steps:
1. Blend the Ponzu, sesame oil, rice vinegar, garlic, ginger, water, and Hillary Farm Manuka Honey until smooth. Transfer to a bowl, then add mushroom stock powder and a bit of sesame seeds. Mix well.
2. Boil some water. Add the soba and cook for 6-7 minutes. Rinse with cold water, then add some ice cubes in. Drain the water once the ice cubes are melted.
3. Soak the wakame in mineral water. Drain and slice.
4. Slice the vegetables to your preference. Soak the sliced onion in ice water.
5. Arrange the salad in a bowl, then pour the Ponzu dressing.
6. Japanese Soba Salad is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Mantap! Resep PAI AYAM JAMUR Khas Eropa [Chicken & Mushroom Pie]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KdHs5Hd0IAw

Chicken Mushroom Pie Recipe (yield 9-10 servings)

Ingredients:
Puff pastry

Marinating ingredients:
1 pair chicken breast fillet @450g
1 tbsp oil
2 tsp mustard
1 tbsp lemon juice
1 tsp paprika powder
3 tbsp all-purpose flour
1 tsp salt
½ tbsp sugar
¼ tsp black pepper

Mushroom Sauce ingredients:
450 g mushroom (Shiitake, Champignon, Portobello, and Brown Shimeji)
7 clove garlic
10 pc shallot
3 tbsp butter
150 ml cream
1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
250 ml water
2 tsp chicken powder
¼ tsp pepper
Thyme, as needed
Oil for sautéing

Steps:
1. Pat the chicken dry with a paper towel. Dice and place it in a bowl.
2. Marinate the chicken with lemon juice, mustard, paprika powder, salt, sugar, black pepper, flour, and oil. Stir well and cover with plastic wrap. Marinate for at least 1 hour.
3. Chop the mushroom. Mince the garlic and shallots. Set aside.
4. Heat some oil. Sauté the mushroom until cooked. Set aside.
5. In the same pan, add the chicken, butter, garlic, and shallots. Stir well.
6. Add the mushroom, Worcestershire sauce, cream, water, chicken powder, pepper, and thyme. Stir well and let cool.
7. Dust the puff pastry with flour. Cut into a circle, 28-cm in diameter, for the base. Brush with the egg wash.
8. Cut the puff pastry lengthwise. Make a lattice pattern with a roller cutter and paste on top of the circular puff pastry.
9. For the edges of the pan, cut the puff pastry into bands. Push it onto the pan so it sticks well, then brush it with the egg wash.
10. Cover the pie with the puff pastry, then brush it with the egg wash.
11. Bake it at 200°C for 20 minutes.
12. Chicken Mushroom Pie is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Cukup 1 Wajan! Resep GRILLED CHICKEN WITH MUSHROOM SAUCE [Menu Valentine]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TcYCcXxMLfU

Grilled Chicken with Mushroom Sauce Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
1 pair chicken breast
2 tbsp oil
2 tsp minced garlic / garlic powder
1 tbsp mustard
1 tbsp lemon juice / Worcestershire sauce
1 tsp paprika powder
¾ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
¼ tsp black pepper

Mushroom Sauce ingredients:
2 pc Shiitake
10 pc Champignon
4 clove garlic, minced
5 pc shallot, minced
Thyme, as needed
2 tbsp butter
150 ml cream
200 ml water
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper

Add-ons:
1 pc potato, boiled and sliced
½ pack baby green beans, blanched
3 clove garlic, minced
4 tbsp butter
Parsley, chop
Lemon

Steps:
1. Pat the chicken dry with a paper towel. Pound with a rolling pin to flatten.
2. Marinate the chicken with lemon juice, oil, garlic, mustard, paprika powder, salt, sugar, and black pepper. Mix well.
3. Cover with plastic wrap and marinate for at least 1 hour at room temperature.
4. For the Sauce, chop the Shiitake and Champignon. Set aside.
5. Blanch the green beans with a bit salt & sugar, rinse with cold water. Set aside.
6. Heat some oil. Add the chicken in. Sear on one side first, then flip.
7. Add the potato and green beans. Cook until lightly browned, then add garlic and some of the butter. Stir.
8. Add parsley and a bit of lemon juice. Cook properly, then remove the potato and green beans from the pan.
9. Add the rest of the butter, then baste the chicken. Set aside.
10. In the same pan, sauté the mushroom until it’s cooked. Then, add garlic, shallots, and thyme. Cook until fragrant.
11. Add cream, water, salt, sugar, and pepper. Stir well. Add butter
12. Grilled Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Gurih Manis Nikmat! Resep AYAM GORENG MENTEGA [Dijamin Nambah]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lGvbzHJJ3QM

Soy Butter Fried Chicken (yield 4-5 serving)

Marinating ingredients:
4 pc whole broiler chicken thigh
1 pc lime
1 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp cornstarch
½ tsp salt
½ tsp pepper
1 tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer

Sauce ingredients:
3 clove garlic, pounded
½ pc onion, sliced
4-5 tbsp margarine / butter
3 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp sweet soy sauce
½ tbsp chili sauce / tomato sauce
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp chicken powder
Oil to sauté, as needed
Water, as needed

Others:
Kaffir lime

Steps:
1. Chop each of the chicken thighs into 4 parts. Marinate with lime, soy sauce, stock powder, salt, and pepper. Cover with plastic wrap and marinate for 30 minutes at room temperature.
2. Heat the oil and fry the chicken on high heat until crisp. Set aside.
3. Heat some oil. Sauté the garlic until fragrant and browned, then add margarine and onion. Sauté for a moment.
4. Add Worcestershire sauce, oyster sauce, sweet soy sauce, chili sauce, sugar, and stock powder. Stir well.
5. Add the fried chicken and water, as needed. Cook for a moment.
6. Soy Butter Fried Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Anak & Suami Suka! Resep ICE CREAM CAKE Istimewa: Cocok Untuk Ulang Tahun!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0AyOkWvb7YE

Ice Cream Cake Recipe (18-cm or 7” pan for 8-9 servings)

Ingredients:
1 kg vanilla ice cream
2 pack Good Time Double Choc

Chocolate Cake ingredients:
135 g all-purpose flour
135 g sugar
45 g cocoa powder
¾ tsp baking powder
½ tsp baking soda
½ tsp salt
1 pc egg
170 g milk
½ tbsp vinegar
65 ml espresso
60 g oil
1 tsp vanilla extract

Frosting ingredients:
500 g whipping cream
150 g powdered sugar
50 g cocoa powder

Steps:
1. Mix the milk with vinegar. Stir and transfer to a bowl.
2. Add the egg, oil, coffee, vanilla extract, cocoa powder, sugar, baking soda, baking powder, salt, and flour. Mix well with a mixer.
3. Pour into a pan lined with baking paper. Bake at 175°C-180°C for 40-45 minutes.
4. Once it cools down, de-pan the cake and put it in the freezer.
5. Slice the top of the cake and set it aside for decor.
6. Prepare a pan and baking paper. Make a band from the baking paper and line the bottom and sides, too.
7. Add Good Time Double Choc into a plastic bag and pound it with a rolling pin. Place in a bowl.
8. Add vanilla ice cream. Mix well, then add it into the pan evenly. Place in the freezer.
9. For the frosting, whip the cream, powdered sugar, and cocoa powder.
10. To assemble, spread the frosting on the cake evenly. Place the ice cream layer on top of the cake. Cover with the frosting and decorate to your liking.
11. Sprinkle Good Time Double Choc crumbs and the leftover cake crumbs.
12. Ice Cream Cake is ready to serve.

Rosé Spaghetti Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:

Pietro Coricelli Olive Pomace Oil, as needed
Pietro Coricelli Extra Virgin Olive Oil, as needed

9 pc shallot, chopped
3 tbsp tomato paste 
1 tbsp chili flakes

100 ml cooking cream
½ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar

Parmesan

Others:
Basil, sliced

Steps:

5. Add cream, salt, sugar, and pepper. Stir.

Others:

Topping, to taste

Title: Resep AYAM GORENG OAT LIMA RASA : Krispi Tetap Juicy! [Five Spices Chicken]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rgiGc9SlyV8

Five-Spice Oat Chicken Recipe (yield 7-8 servings)

Ingredients:
3 pc chicken thigh fillet, large
5 clove garlic, minced
3 cm ginger, grated + 1 tbsp water
1 tbsp five-spice powder
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 pc egg
5 tbsp cornstarch
1 tsp salt
2 tsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp sugar

Dry Coat:
9 tbsp Quaker Rolled Oats
9 tbsp cornstarch
9 tbsp Quaker Rolled Oats, ground

Sprinkles ingredients:
15 clove garlic, minced
3 pc red curly chili, sliced
3 pc red Thai chili, sliced
2 pc pandan leaf, sliced
2 sprig curry leaf
4 tbsp Quaker Rolled Oats
1 tbsp powdered milk
1 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp butter

Steps:
1. Pat the chicken dry with paper towels. Slice it thinly and pound with the knife.
2. Place it in a bowl. Marinate with egg, soy sauce, Worcestershire sauce, five-spice powder, salt, stock powder, sugar, pepper, minced garlic, ginger liquid, and cornstarch. Mix evenly.
3. Cover with plastic wrap and marinate for at least 1 hour.
4. Combine cornstarch with whole rolled oats and ground rolled oats.
5. Coat the chicken in the rolled oats mix. Coat evenly while massaging the chicken. Let it rest for 3-5 minutes.
6. Heat the oil and fry the chicken until browned and cooked. Set aside.
7. If using an air fryer, brush both sides of the chicken with oil and fry at 185°C for 20 - 25 minutes.
8. Heat some oil and sauté the garlic on medium heat until fragrant.
9. Add pandan leaf, Thai chili, red chili, Quaker Rolled Oats, curry leaf, butter, powdered milk, chicken powder, sugar, and pepper. Cook on low heat until a bit browned.
10. Five-Spice Oat Fried Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Resep UDANG LAPIS HAM KEJU Ala Resto Chinese Jadul: BIKIN NAGIH!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=u-DWW8DIQdA

Ham & Cheese Shrimp Roll Recipe (yield 10 pieces)

Ingredients:
10 pc shrimp, peeled, tail intact
Smoked beef / bacon / ham
Anchor Cheddar Cheese Slices
Spring onion, sliced in the size of the shrimp

Dough ingredients:
200 g chicken thigh fillet with skin, chopped
200 g shrimp, roughly chopped
2-3 pc shitake mushroom, soaked in warm water
1 tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
1 tsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper
1-2 tbsp cornstarch
4 clove garlic, minced
1 tbsp ginger liquid
½ pc egg white
1 tsp sesame oil

Coating:
2 pc egg, whisked
Cornstarch

Soy Butter Sauce ingredients:
2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp cooking wine, optional
65 g Anchor Unsalted Butter
½ tbsp sugar

Steps:
1. In a bowl, mix chicken, shrimp, salt, pepper, stock powder, and sugar. Stir until sticky for 5-8 minutes.
2. Squeeze the soaked Shiitake. Chop and add into the dough.
3. Add garlic, ginger water, egg white, sesame oil, and cornstarch. Mix evenly.
4. Halve the Anchor Cheddar Cheese Slices and smoked beef. Slice the bottom of the shrimp.
5. Stack the smoked beef, cheese, shrimp, and green onions, then roll.
6. Wrap the shrimp with the dough. Coat it with cornstarch and wrap it evenly while shaping.
7. Dip the shrimp into the egg, then coat with cornstarch. Fry on medium heat until slightly yellowed. Set aside and let cool.
8. Fry the shrimp once more in hot oil for 30 seconds. Set aside.
9. For the sauce, combine Worcestershire sauce, soy sauce, cooking wine, and sugar.
10. Heat the pan. Add Anchor Unsalted Butter and the sauce mix. Cook for a moment, then transfer to a bowl.
11. Ham & Cheese Shrimp Roll is ready to serve with Soy Butter Sauce on the side.

Title: Gurih & Crispy! Resep POTATO WEDGES: Tanpa Digoreng! [Bisa Pakai Air Fryer]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VaFOkhmB6X8

Potato Wedges Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
3-4 pc potato

Dry coating ingredients:
60 g all-purpose flour
60 g cornstarch
2 tsp mixed herbs
2 tsp paprika powder
½ tsp curry powder
2 tsp garlic powder
1 tsp salt
1 tsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper

Wet coating ingredients:
2 pc egg
⅓ tsp salt
½ tsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper

Steps:
1. Slice the potatoes into wedges. Rinse them with water, then steam for 15 minutes until soft.
2. In a bowl, combine flour, cornstarch, mixed herbs, paprika powder, curry powder, garlic powder, salt, stock powder, and pepper. Mix well.
3. Whisk the egg with salt, stock powder, and pepper.
4. Roll the potatoes into the dry coat, the egg, then the dry coat.
5. Place them in the air fryer and cook at 180℃ for 15 minutes.
6. Brush them with oil and cook them again at 200℃ for 10 minutes.
7. Potato Wedges are ready to serve.

Title: Sehat Segar Crunchy! Resep ASIAN SALAD [Yu Sheng Khas IMLEK]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j4Sf2r-ED7c

Yu Sheng Recipe (yield 7-8 servings)

Cured Salmon ingredients:
250 g salmon
1 tbsp salt
2 tbsp sugar

Ingredients:
1 pc radish, medium
1 pc carrot
1 pc Japanese cucumber
1 pc purple yam, medium
2 pc green onion
1 pc red bell pepper
100 g unripe mango
2 pc pomelo
5 pc wonton wrapper
30 g roasted cashew, chop

Asian Dressing ingredients:
3-4 tbsp plum sauce / bangkok sambal
2.5 tbsp sesame oil
4 - 5 tbsp rice vinegar
4.5 tsp sugar
1.5 tbsp ginger liquid
1.5 tbsp garlic liquid
⅜ tsp salt
⅜ tsp stock powder

Steps:
1. Skin the salmon, then sprinkle salt and sugar on the entire surface. Cover with plastic wrap and cure in the fridge for 1-2 hours.
2. Rinse the salmon with water. Pat dry with a paper towel and slice it thinly.
3. Slice the radish, carrot, cucumber, red bell pepper, and green onions thinly and soak in ice water.
4. Slice the unripe mango, purple yam, and wonton wrappers thinly.
5. Heat some oil and stir-fry the purple yam until cooked and shiny.
6. Heat some oil and fry the wonton wrappers on medium heat until lightly browned. Set aside.
7. For the dressing, mix the plum sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, sugar, ginger liquid, garlic liquid, salt, and stock powder. Stir well.
8. Arrange the veggies on the plate. Add dressing and stir.
9. Yu Sheng is ready to serve.

Title: Gurih Segar! Resep TOM YUM SPAGHETTI
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4fJM0Ux2AA8

Tom Yum Spaghetti Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
Spaghetti
200-300 g shrimp
3 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
5 pc lime leaf
3 pc red Thai chili
1 pc red chili
2 tbsp Filippo Berio Tomato Pesto
2-3 tbsp tom yum paste (https://youtu.be/YW1ABCvBDt8) 
300 ml shrimp stock
1 pc red tomato
Filippo Berio Pure Olive Oil
Salt, sugar, pepper, to taste (optional)

Others:
Cilantro
Grated parmesan
Lime
Filippo Berio Extra Virgin Olive Oil

Steps:
1. Slice the garlic, shallots, red chili, Thai chili, and lime leaves.
2. Bring water to a boil and add spaghetti. Cook for 6-7 minutes.
3. Heat some Filippo Berio Pure Olive Oil. Add the shrimp in and cook shortly until cooked. Set aside.
4. In the same pan, sauté the shallots and garlic until fragrant. Add Thai chili, red chili, and lime leaves. Stir well.
5. Chop the tomato and add it in the pan. Stir.
6. Add the tom yum paste and Filippo Berio Tomato Pesto. Stir and add the shrimp stock.
7. Add the spaghetti and some pasta water. Add salt, sugar, and pepper, to taste. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
8. Add the shrimp, cilantro, and grated parmesan in. Stir.
9. Transfer to a plate and finish with some Filippo Berio Extra Virgin Olive Oil and lime juice.
10. Tom Yum Spaghetti is ready to serve.

Title: Istimewa! Resep DODOL WIJEN: Lembut & Tahan Lama! [Khas Imlek]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7WfzNeGIJ4k

Sesame Dodol Recipe (yield 6 pcs)

Ingredients:
265 g BOLA Deli Glutinous Rice Flour
800 ml thick coconut milk
350 g palm sugar, shaved
50 ml coconut oil or vegetable oil
60 g sugar
½ tsp salt
3 pc pandan leaf
½ tsp vanilla powder

Topping:
Toasted sesame seeds

Wrapping:
Plastic
Nylon twine

Steps:
1. Combine the coconut milk, palm sugar, white sugar, salt, vanilla powder, coconut oil, and pandan leaves. Stir and cook on medium heat for 5-10 minutes. Strain.
2. Pour the warm, not boiling, liquid into BOLA Deli Glutinous Rice Flour slowly while stirring.
3. Cook it again on low heat while stirring until thickened. Lower the heat and cook until the Dodol becomes shiny for 30-35 minutes.
4. Transfer the Dodol into heat-proof bowls lined with banana leaves.
5. Cover the surface of the Dodol with plastic wrap. Poke holes using a satay skewer, then steam for 90 minutes.
6. Chill the Dodol for 8 hours or overnight.
7. Once chilled, slice the Dodol into 3 parts with a knife brushed with oil.
8. Coat with the sesame seeds evenly.
9. Wrap with plastic and tie the ends with the nylon twill.
10. Sesame Dodol is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Praktis Favorit! Resep SUP IKAN KEMANGI: Gurih & Segar
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P-gqFCiSSPY

Lemon Basil Fish Soup Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
1 pc tilapia @700g
2 clove garlic, sliced
7 pc shallot, sliced
4 slice ginger, pounded
2 pc red tomato, sliced
9 pc red Thai chili, optional
2 pc green onion, sliced
2 pc celery, sliced
40 g lemon basil
Lime
1 L water
½ pc onion, sliced
¼ tsp pepper
¾ tsp flavor enhancer
½ tbsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
Oil to sauté

Steps:
1. Rub the fish with salt. Let it sit for 2 minutes, then rinse with running water.
2. Pat the fish dry with paper towels / a cloth, then slice.
3. Heat some oil. Add shallots and garlic and sauté until fragrant.
4. Add the onion and ginger. Sauté for a moment, then add water, tomatoes, green onions, and celery. Bring to a boil.
5. Add the fish,Thai chili, salt, sugar, pepper, and flavor enhancer. Cook for a moment, then add the lemon basil. Turn the heat off.
6. Lemon Basil Fish Soup is ready to serve.

Title: 100% Sukses! Resep ROTI SUBWAY SOFT BAGUETTE: Empuk Lembut!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0W3jRsZTQdE

Subway Bread Recipe (yield: 6 pieces)

Ingredients A:
8 g instant yeast
30 g sugar
300 g cold water
250 g bread flour
200 g all-purpose flour

Ingredients B:
50 g butter
8 g salt

Topping (optional):
Parmesan
Grated cheese
Mixed herbs

Steps:
1. Combine flour, sugar, and yeast in a mixer bowl and mix evenly.
2. Add cold water slowly. Mix until the dough is half-elastic, then add salt and butter. Mix again until it’s elastic.
3. Cover with plastic wrap and proof for 60-90 minutes.
4. Weigh each dough to 135 g or 6 pieces, then shape into a ball.
5. Flatten the dough with a rolling pin. Shape into a rectangle, then roll it from the top. Seal the seams.
6. Combine parmesan and mixed herbs. Mix evenly.
7. Brush the dough with water, then roll it into the mixed herbs mixture. Transfer to a pan lined with baking paper.
8. Cover with plastic wrap and proof for 60 minutes.
9. After the dough rises, slit the top with a knife or a razor.
10. Sprinkle grated cheese on top and bake at 175℃ for 20 minutes.
11. Subway Bread is ready to serve.

Title: Ekonomis Pakai Tepung Beras! Resep KUE PANDAN KUKUS / Apem Lembut Tahan Lama
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ois1p4gmh_I

Steamed Pandan Cake Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Ingredients A:
60 ml coconut milk
400 ml water
15 g BOLA Deli Rice Flour
¼ tsp salt
Pandan essence, to taste
Yellow food coloring, to taste
Brown food coloring, to taste

Ingredients B:
130 g BOLA Deli Rice Flour
30 g flour
130 g sugar
1 tsp yeast
½ tsp baking powder

Coconut Sauce ingredients:
350 ml coconut water
150 ml coconut milk
85 g palm sugar, shaved
2 pc pandan leaf
100 g coconut flesh
4 tbsp BOLA Deli Cornstarch
¼ tsp salt
2 tbsp sugar

Steps:
1. Combine coconut milk, water, pandan essence, yellow food coloring, and brown food coloring. Mix well, then add BOLA Deli Rice Flour and salt. Stir and cook until it thickens.
2. Transfer it to a bowl. Let it cool down until lukewarm.
3. Add sugar and stir. Then, add BOLA Deli Rice Flour. Mix well.
4. Add flour. Stir, then add the yeast and baking powder. Mix well, cover with plastic wrap, and rest for 1 hour.
5. Prepare the steamer and a heatproof pan brushed with oil. Steam for 35 minutes. Once it’s cooled down, remove from the pan.
6. For the Coconut Sauce, combine the coconut water, coconut milk, palm sugar, pandan leaves, and BOLA Deli Cornstarch. Stir while it’s still cold, then cook on medium heat until it thickens.
7. Add the coconut flesh, salt, and sugar in. Stir.
8. Steamed Pandan Cake is ready to serve with Coconut Sauce on the side.

Title: Cara Meresap Sampai Dalam! Resep AYAM BAKAR KECAP TEFLON
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2f-VPej0yeI

Sweet Soy Grilled Chicken Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Chicken marinade ingredients:
2 pc whole chicken, sliced into 4 pieces
2 pc lime
1 tsp salt
1 tsp stock powder
8 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tbsp tamarind water, optional

Blended Spices ingredients:
8 clove garlic
10 pc shallot
4 pc candlenut
6 cm turmeric
6 cm galangal
3 pc red large chili / 8 pc red curly chili
1 tsp toasted coriander
1 sachet shrimp paste
Oil, as needed

Others:
2 pc lemongrass, sliced, pounded
4 pc bay leaf
1 tbsp margarine
½ tsp pepper
1 tsp stock powder
½ tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
4 tbsp sweet soy sauce
700 ml water

Grill Sauce ingredients:
Braising liquid
2 tbsp margarine

Sides:
Rice
Eggplant, sliced
Shallot Sambal (https://youtu.be/6vv6enFEVc4) 
Lemon basil
Fried shallots

Steps:
1. Add salt and lime juice, as needed, into the chicken and mix well. Let it rest for 5-10 minutes, then rinse and drain.
2. Add sweet soy sauce, tamarind water, salt, and stock powder. Mix well and cover with plastic wrap. Marinate for 3-4 hours or overnight in the fridge.
3. Blend the garlic, shallots, candlenuts, galangal, turmeric, coriander, shrimp paste, red chili, and some oil. Then, sauté until it’s half-cooked.
4. Add lemongrass, bay leaves, pepper, and margarine. Sauté until cooked, then add the chicken in and stir.
5. Add water, sweet soy sauce, salt, stock powder, and sugar. Cook until the liquid is absorbed on medium heat for 25 minutes. Set aside.
6. Transfer the braising liquid into a bowl and stir it with margarine.
7. Heat the pan. Add the chicken in and brush with the grill sauce. Grill until cooked.
8. For cooking in an oven or an air fryer, brush the chicken and eggplant with the grill sauce and grill at 170°C for 15 minutes.
9. Sweet Soy Grilled Chicken is ready to serve with the sides.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Resep SOSIS BAKAR 3 BAHAN! Lengkap Dengan Cheesy Mashed Potato & Onion Gravy: [Menu Tahun Baru]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zuWx0qBeTn8

Grilled BBQ Sausage Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients:
Kanzler Cheese Cocktail
Kanzler Beef Cocktail
Kanzler Frankfurter Cocktail
Margarine
BBQ Sauce (https://youtu.be/MrsaBWQX890)

Onion Gravy Sauce ingredients:
2 pc onion, sliced
3 clove garlic, minced
4 pc shallot, minced
2 tbsp all-purpose flour
3 tbsp butter
2 pc bay leaf
400 ml beef stock (water + beef stock powder)

Cheesy Mashed Potato ingredients:
2 pc potato, medium-sized
3 tbsp butter
200 ml milk
100 g mozzarella, grated
50 g parmesan, grated

Others:
Peas, optional

Steps:
1. Slice the potatoes. Boil with some salt until softened, then mash with a strainer.
2. Cook the potato on medium heat. Add milk and butter. Mix evenly.
3. Add some of the parmesan and mozzarella. Stir, then transfer to a heatproof bowl.
4. Sprinkle the rest of the cheeses as topping. Bake at 180℃ for 12-15 minutes.
5. Heat some oil. Sauté the minced shallots and garlic until fragrant.
6. Lower the heat. Add the onions. Cook until browned, then add butter and flour. Stir.
7. Add bay leaves and beef stock. Bring to a boil and cook until it thickens a bit.
8. Skewer the Kanzler sausages on iron skewers. Heat the grill plate and brush it with margarine.
9. Brush the Kanzler sausages with margarine. Grill until a bit browned, then brush with the BBQ sauce.
10. Grilled BBQ Sausage is ready to serve.

Title: Resep BROKOLI PANGGANG KEJU Favorit Anak-anak! [Cheesy Baked Broccoli]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aOHPzPh0-Qw

Baked Broccoli & Cheese Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g potato, diced, boiled
4 pc broccoli

Cheese Sauce ingredients:
3 tbsp butter
3 tbsp all-purpose flour
400 ml milk
20 g parmesan cheese
35 g mozzarella cheese
½ tsp salt
⅓ tsp pepper
1 pc egg

Garlic Butter ingredients:
3 tbsp butter
5 clove garlic, minced
½ tsp dried parsley
½ tsp salt
⅓ tsp pepper

Toppings:
Parmesan cheese
Mozzarella cheese

Steps:
1. Slice the broccoli. Soak in salted water for 5 minutes.
2. Rinse twice, then steam for 6-8 minutes.
3. For the Cheese Sauce, heat the pan and add butter and flour. Cook until yellowed and fragrant.
4. Add milk. Mix well, then add parmesan, mozzarella, salt, and pepper. Stir and transfer to a bowl.
5. Once it cools, add the egg in and mix well.
6. For the Garlic Butter, combine the butter, garlic, parsley, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
7. Prepare a heatproof bowl. Arrange the potatoes, broccoli, Cheese Sauce, and Garlic Butter. Sprinkle cheese on top.
8. Bake on Grill mode for 30 minutes at 160℃.
9. Baked Broccoli & Cheese is ready to serve.

Title: TANPA Cetakan! Resep STRAWBERRY THUMBPRINT COOKIES [Kue Kering Tahun Baru & Lebaran]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lJhpmtjaLFA

Strawberry Thumbprint Cookies Recipe (yield 80 pieces)

Ingredients:
80 g Anchor Tinned Salted Butter
80 g Anchor Unsalted Butter
100 g icing sugar
1 pc egg yolk
245 g cake flour
20 g cornstarch
½ tsp baking powder
⅛ tsp salt
2 tbsp corn syrup / honey / condensed milk

Others:
Strawberry jam, as needed
Icing sugar for topping

Steps:
1. Whip Anchor Tinned Salted Butter & Anchor Unsalted Butter until they pale and expand a bit.
2. Add icing sugar. Mix well, then add egg yolk, salt, and condensed milk. Mix well.
3. Add sifted cornstarch, baking powder, and flour. Mix with a spatula.
4. Cover with plastic wrap and chill in the fridge for 10 minutes.
5. Get 1 tsp or 6 grams of dough. Shape flatly.
6. Press the center with a measuring spoon coated with cornstarch or flour. Then, fill with the strawberry jam.
7. Bake at 150℃ for 17-20 minutes.
8. Get the cookies out of the oven and sprinkle icing sugar on top.
9. Strawberry Thumbprint Cookies are ready to serve.

Title: 100% SUKSES LEMBUT! Resep CHIFFON DONAT [Gluten Free]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qSivbBTIwFk

Chiffon Donuts Recipe (12 pcs)

Ingredients A:
8 pc egg yolk
85 ml oil
90 ml water
40 ml coconut milk
½ tsp salt
150 g Ladang Lima Cassava Flour or 185 g all-purpose flour
6 g baking powder
2 tsp vanilla extract

Ingredients B:
8 pc egg white
120 g sugar

Nougat ingredients:
80 g toasted cashew
75 g sugar
3 tbsp water
¼ tsp salt

Buttercream ingredients:
160 g roombutter
45 g icing sugar
30 g condensed milk

Toppings:
Grated cheese
Chocolate rice

Steps:
1. Combine the egg yolk, oil, coconut milk, water, vanilla extract, and salt. Mix, then add sifted Ladang Lima Cassava Flour and baking powder. Mix well.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites. Add the sugar bit by bit until the bird-beak stage is reached.
3. Mix the meringue into the yolk batter bit by bit. Fold it in slowly.
4. Pour the batter into the pan until ⅓ full. Even out the surface by swirling a satay skewer.
5. Dip the skewer into condensed milk and add the slits. Bake for 30-35 minutes at 160-165℃.
6. For the Cashew Nougat, cook the sugar and water until it browns without stirring. Add the cashew and salt in. Transfer to a baking paper.
7. Once it’s cooled down, crush the nougat with a knife or a food processor.
8. For the buttercream, whip the roombutter until it pales. Add icing sugar and condensed milk. Mix and transfer to a piping bag.
9. Remove the Chiffon out of the oven and flip it upside down. Let it cool, then demold.
10. Spread the buttercream and add the cheese, chocolate rice, and cashew nougat.
11. Chiffon Donuts are ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Resep SEAFOOD SAUS PADANG Vol. 2 By Devina Hermawan.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jYAo-UmbLGk

Seafood with Padang Sauce (yield 6-7 servings)

Ingredients:
350 g shrimp, deveined
250 g squid, slice
1 kg crab
2 pc corn, sliced, boiled

Squid marinating ingredients:
1 tsp baking soda
1 tbsp vinegar
1 tsp salt

Blended Spices ingredients:
10 clove garlic
10 pc shallot
8 pc red Thai chili
Oil, as needed

Others:
3 pc green onions, sliced
3 thumb ginger
6 tbsp oyster sauce
6 tbsp tomato sauce
6 tbsp chili sauce
2 tbsp fish sauce
1 tbsp seasoning sauce
800 ml water
3 pc bay leaf
4 pc lime leaf
1 pc onion, sliced
1.5 tbsp margarine
1 tbsp sugar
½ tbsp stock powder
2 tbsp cornstarch

Others:
Rice

Steps:
1. Slice the squid and marinate it with baking soda, vinegar, and salt. Marinate for 10 minutes, then rinse.
2. Devein the shrimp and trim the sharp parts. Rinse.
3. Blend the garlic, shallots, Thai chili, and oil. Sauté until fragrant.
4. Add the pounded ginger, bay leaves, and lime leaves. Sautè through until fragrant.
5. Add fish sauce, seasoning sauce, oyster sauce, tomato sauce, chili sauce, white part of green onions, and onions. Stir.
6. Add a mix of water and cornstarch. Stir, then add sugar, stock powder, and margarine.
7. Add the crab in and cover the pan to cook.
8. Heat some oil. Flash fry the squid and shrimp for 30-60 seconds. Set aside.
9. Add the corn, the rest of the green onions, as well as the fried squid and shrimp. Bring to a boil, then turn the heat off.
10. Seafood with Padang Sauce is ready to serve with rice on the side.

Title: Resep DAGING GULUNG SAYURAN [Beef Enoki & Vegetables Roll]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xd6OxiGxpkE

Beef Enoki & Vegetable Rolls Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g sliced beef
1 pack enoki mushroom
60 g baby green bean
4 pc baby corn, sliced
3 clove garlic
1 pc spring onion, sliced
1 tbsp cornstarch

Sauce ingredients:
1 tbsp dried shrimp, soaked in hot water
3 clove garlic
1.5 tbsp soy sauce
1.5 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp cooking wine (optional)
1 tsp sesame oil
2 tbsp chili oil
100 ml water
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp flavor enhancer

Others:
1 tbsp lime
Sesame seeds

Steps:
1. Prepare 2-3 pieces of beef slice for one roll. Arrange the baby green beans, baby corn, and enoki on top, then roll.
2. Sprinkle it with cornstarch and smear it on evenly.
3. Chop the dried shrimp and mince the garlic.
4. Heat some oil. Add the rolls and cook until a bit browned on all sides. Transfer to a plate.
5. In the same pan, heat some oil and sauté the garlic and dried shrimp until fragrant.
6. Add soy sauce, oyster sauce, cooking wine, sesame oil, chili oil, water, sugar, and flavor enhancer. Stir.
7. Add the Beef Rolls in and lime juice.
8. Beef Enoki & Vegetable Rolls are ready to serve.

Title: Gurih Mantap! Resep SATE DAGING SHASHLIK: Rusia Rasa Lokal! [Menu Tahun Baru]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2-SJP2RQp6I

Shashlik Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Shashlik ingredients:
350 g beef fillet
1 pc onion, small, sliced
2 clove garlic, sliced
1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp oil
1 tsp mixed herbs
A bit of lime juice

Others:
Beef bacon / smoked beef, optional, diced
1 pc onion, diced
1 pc red bell pepper, diced
1 pc green bell pepper, diced

Sweet Sour BBQ Sauce ingredients:
3 clove garlic, minced
5 pc shallot, minced
1 tbsp margarine
7 tbsp tomato sauce
2.5 tbsp chili sauce
2 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp vinegar
3 tbsp honey / sugar
150 ml water
½ tsp stock powder

Steps:
1. Cut the beef into long slices. Marinate with onion, garlic, soy sauce, Worcestershire sauce, mixed herbs, lime juice, stock powder, pepper, and oil. Mix well and cover with plastic wrap and press down. Marinate for 15-30 minutes.
2. For the sauce, heat the oil. Add the minced shallots and garlic in. Sauté until fragrant, then add margarine. Stir.
3. Add tomato sauce, chili sauce, oyster sauce, Worcestershire sauce, vinegar, honey, water, and stock powder. Stir.
4. Fold the beef bacon inside the beef fillet and skewer them in with red bell pepper, onion, beef, green bell pepper, onion, and beef.
5. Heat the grill. Grill the Shashlik until they’re cooked evenly on all sides. Then, brush the sauce on and grill for a moment.
6. Shashlik is ready to serve with the sauce on the side.

Cheese Keciput Recipe (yield 4-5 servings) @500 g

Ingredients:
200 g BOLA Deli Glutinous Rice Flour
2 tbsp BOLA Deli Cornstarch
35 g BOLA Deli Icing Sugar
½ tsp baking powder
½ tsp baking soda
¾ tsp salt
2 pc egg yolk
125 ml coconut milk
35 g margarine
25 g cheddar cheese, grated
25 g parmesan cheese, grated

Others:
Sesame seeds
Water, as needed

Steps:
1. Combine BOLA Deli Glutinous Rice Flour, BOLA Deli Cornstarch, BOLA Deli Icing Sugar, and margarine. Mix well.
2. Add salt, baking powder, baking soda, and cheese. Mix well, then add the yolks and coconut milk. Mix evenly.
3. Mix the sesame seeds with a bit of water.
4. Shape the dough into small balls and coat with the sesame seeds. Round the dough until the sesame seeds stick well.
5. Heat the oil on low heat and fry the Keciput until browned. Drain.

Title: Cukup Pakai Teflon! Resep IKAN KEMBUNG BAKAR SAMBAL COLO-COLO
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YwC7mB8glkE

Colo-Colo Grilled Fish Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Fish marinade ingredients:
6 pc chub mackerel fish
3 clove garlic, minced
½ tsp coriander powder
½ tsp turmeric powder
2 pc lime
1 tsp pepper
1.5 tsp salt
1 tsp flavor enhancer
1 tsp sugar

Colo-Colo Sambal:
100 g green tomato, diced
100 g red tomato, diced
50 g shallot, slice
25 g red Thai chili
25 gr green Thai chili
10 g lemon basil, soaked in cold water and sliced
4 pc kaffir lime / lime
50 ml oil
2 tsp sugar
¾ tsp salt
¼ tsp flavor enhancer

Others:
4 pc bay leaf
Banana leaf
Sweet soy sauce
Salt to sprinkle on the fish

Steps:
1. For the marinade, combine the minced garlic, salt, pepper, flavor enhancer, coriander powder, turmeric powder, sugar, and lime juice. Mix well.
2. Slice the fish and add the marinade in. Cover with plastic wrap and marinate for 10-15 minutes.
3. For the Sambal, roughly grind the red Thai chili, green Thai chili, salt, sugar, and flavor enhancer.
4. Add shallots, green tomato, and red tomato. Stir, then add kaffir lime and lemon basil.
5. Heat some oil and pour into the Sambal. Mix well.
6. Heat the pan. Sprinkle the fish with salt and place it on the pan. Add bay leaves.
7. Cover with the banana leaf and grill for 4-6 minutes.
8. Sprinkle the fish with salt and flip. Cover it again with the banana leaf and let it finish cooking.
9. Colo-Colo Grilled Fish is ready to serve with the Sambal on the side.

Title: 100% Sukses! Resep CRUNCHY CHOCOLATE LAVA CAKE: Bahan Minimarket Rasa Premium!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_2Slci4_LJY

Chocolate Lava Cake Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
100 g butter
150 g dark chocolate, chopped
2 pc egg
1 pc egg yolk
40 g sugar
3 tbsp all-purpose flour
¼ tsp salt
1 tbsp cocoa powder
1 pack Good Time Double Choc

To spread:
Butter
Cocoa powder

Steps:
1. Heat the oven at 180-185℃.
2. Heat the butter until it’s foamy and dark yellow, then pour into the dark chocolate. Mix evenly.
3. In a separate bowl, add eggs and sugar. Whisk until the sugar dissolves and the color pales.
4. Add sifted flour, cocoa powder, and salt. Pour in the melted chocolate and mix evenly.
5. Add Good Time Double Choc into a plastic bag and crush into little pieces.
6. Brush the ramekins with butter and coat with cocoa powder evenly.
7. Mix half of the crushed Good Time Double Choc into the batter.
8. Pour the Lava Cake batter into the ramekins, then sprinkle Good Time Double Choc on top.
9. Bake for 10-12 minutes.
10. Chocolate Lava Cake is ready to serve.

Title: Resep NASI SIRAM AYAM JAMUR Ala Chinese Resto
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lczmThFDn8o

Chicken Mushroom Rice Recipe (yield 1-2 servings)

Ingredients:
2 cup Leon Thai Jasmine Rice
2.5 cup water
1 pc egg
2-3 tbsp oil
½ tbsp fish sauce
1 pc green onion, sliced

Marinated Chicken ingredients:
120 g chicken thigh fillet
½ tbsp tapioca flour
4 slice ginger
¼ tsp stock powder
¼ tsp salt
⅛ tsp pepper
1 tbsp cooking wine, optional

Chicken Mushroom Stir-Fry ingredients:
3 clove garlic, pounded
½ pc onion
1 pc green onion, sliced
1 pc carrot, sliced
2 pc baby corn, sliced
40 g cauliflower, sliced
3 pc champignon / straw mushroom, sliced

Sauce ingredients:
1 tbsp soy sauce
½ tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp fish sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
½ tbsp tapioca flour
½ tbsp sugar
⅛ tsp pepper
¼ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
300 ml water + ½ tbsp chicken powder 

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken and marinate with ginger, cooking wine, tapioca flour, salt, pepper, and stock powder. Mix and let it rest.
2. Cook Leon Thai Jasmine Rice with a rice cooker, then let it cool.
3. Blanch the sliced carrots, baby corn, and cauliflower. Drain.
4. Heat some oil. Stir fry the white part of green onion until fragrant, then add the egg in. Stir.
5. Add the rice and fish sauce. Cook for a moment, then transfer to a bowl.
6. For the sauce, mix the stock with soy sauce, oyster sauce, fish sauce, sesame oil, and tapioca flour. Stir, then add sugar, pepper, and flavor enhancer. Mix well.
7. Heat some oil and stir fry the garlic until fragrant. Then, add the chicken and mushroom. Cook until browned.
8. Add the veggies, onion, and green onions. Stir.
9. Add the sauce mix. Cook for a moment, then pour over rice.
10. Chicken Mushroom Rice is ready to serve.

Original Spread ingredients:

Sweet Chili Spread ingredients:

Chili powder, to taste

Sausage Potato Pizza Recipe (one 28-cm pan)

Ingredients:
650 g potato, peeled, soaked in water
30 g all-purpose flour
50 g cornstarch
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
Oil, as needed

Topping ingredients:
Kanzler Cheese Cocktail
60 g BBQ sauce / pizza sauce
½ pc onion, sliced
1 pc red tomato, sliced
Oil for stir-frying

Others:
Mozzarella cheese
Dried parsley

Steps:
1. Grate the potato then squeeze dry.
2. Add salt, pepper, flour, and cornstarch. Mix well.
3. Heat the oil. Add the potato mix in. Even it out and cook for 7-8 minutes on medium-low heat until crisp.
4. Add some oil to make it extra crisp, then flip.
5. For the topping, heat some oil and sauté the onion until fragrant.
6. Add Kanzler Cheese Cocktail. Stir.
7. Add the sauce onto the pizza. Spread it evenly, then add tomato, sautéed onion, sausages, and mozzarella cheese. Cook again until the cheese melts.
8. Sprinkle dried parsley on top.
9. Potato Pizza is ready to serve.

Title: Kenyal Lembut! Resep KUE BERAS MIPAN: Jajanan Jadul Tetap Disukai!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CQsWFc0fh50

Mipan Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients A:
110 g BOLA Deli Rice Flour
50 g BOLA Deli Tapioca Flour
100 ml water, room temperature
½ tsp salt
2 tsp oil

Ingredients B:
10 g lye water
500 ml water

Palm Sugar Sauce ingredients:
80 g palm sugar, shaved
50 ml water
1 tbsp white sugar

Garlic Oil ingredients:
8 clove garlic, minced
50 ml oil

Add-ons:
Soy sauce

Others:
Oil to grease

Serving:
2 tbsp Palm Sugar Sauce
1 tbsp Garlic Oil
1 tbsp soy sauce

Steps:
1. For Ingredients A, combine BOLA Deli Rice Flour, BOLA Deli Tapioca Flour, salt, oil, and water. Mix evenly.
2. Heat the water on high heat until hot, then lower the heat and add the lye water.
3. Add the rice flour mix and cook on low heat until it thickens while stirring. Transfer to a bowl and stir again.
4. Heat the heatproof mold with the steamer. Remove from the steamer and brush with oil.
5. Pour the Mipan batter into the bowl. Steam for 20-30 minutes.
6. Rest the Mipan for 5 minutes before removing it from the mold.
7. For the Palm Sugar Sauce, combine the palm sugar, white sugar, and water. Bring to a boil, then strain. Let cool.
8. For the Garlic Oil, heat the oil and add the garlic in. Cook on low heat until yellowed.
9. Mipan is ready to serve with Palm Sugar Sauce, Garlic Oil, and soy sauce.
