Title: JANGAN Pakai Tepung! Resep KULIT AYAM GORENG KRISPI: Lengkap Dengan Sausnya!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qNq4uXis984

Crispy Fried Chicken Skin Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g - 1 kg chicken skin
10 clove garlic
5 cm turmeric
5 pc bay leaf
4 cm ginger
1 pc lemongrass
1.5 tsp salt
2 tsp chicken powder
2 tbsp sugar
1 tbsp vinegar
1 L water
60 g coconut milk, optional
½ tsp pepper
Oil for frying

Sauce ingredients:
1.5 tbsp tomato sauce
3 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp sugar
100 ml water
1 tsp vinegar

Steps:
1. Mash the garlic and turmeric with some chicken powder in a stone bowl.
2. Heat the oil. Sauté the mashed spices until fragrant, then add lemongrass, ginger, and bay leaves. Stir.
3. Season with pepper. Cook until fragrant, then add water, coconut milk, vinegar, the rest of the chicken powder, salt, and sugar. Stir.
4. Add the rinsed chicken skin. Cook for 15 minutes. Drain and let cool.
5. Heat the oil. Fry the chicken skin on low heat until browned. Set aside.
6. For the sauce, combine tomato sauce, chili sauce, sugar, water, and vinegar. Bring to a boil while stirring.
7. Crispy Fried Chicken Skin is ready to serve with the sauce on the side.

Title: Rendam Telur Biar Empuk! Resep NASI GORENG OAT: Gurih Tetap Sehat.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5JNqlTRk3mI

Oat Fried Rice Recipe (yield 1-2 servings)

Ingredients:
70 g Quaker Rolled Oats
3 pc egg
120 g red rice

Blended Spices ingredients:
4 pc shallot, sliced
3 clove garlic, sliced
2 pc candlenut
Grapeseed oil, as needed

Add-ons ingredients:
1 pc green onion, sliced
5 pc beef meatball, sliced
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
½ tbsp fish sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 pc bok choy, sliced
2 pc red chili, sliced
Pepper, to taste

Steps:
1. Mix the Quaker Rolled Oats with eggs. Stir and cover with plastic wrap. Let soak for 45-60 minutes.
2. Blend the garlic, shallots, candlenuts, and oil until smooth.
3. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant. Add the rolled oats and cook until crisp.
4. Add the white part of the green onions and meatballs. Stir.
5. Add fish sauce, sweet soy sauce, and rice. Stir.
6. Season with pepper. Add the red chili, the rest of the green onions, bok choy. Stir.
7. Oat Fried Rice is ready to serve.

Title: Kaldu Udang Rahasianya! Resep TOM YUM GOONG: Sup Asam Pedas Khas Thailand [100% Bahan Lokal]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YW1ABCvBDt8

Tom Yum Goong Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Blended Spices ingredients:
12 pc shallot
8 clove garlic
10 pc dried chili, soaked in hot water
8 pc red curly chili
2 sachet shrimp paste
2 pc lemongrass, sliced
4 cm galangal, sliced
Oil, as needed
Water, as needed

Aromatics ingredients:
2 pc lemongrass, pounded
50 g galangal, sliced
10 pc kaffir lime leaf
6 pc cilantro

Filling ingredients:
500 g shrimp, with shell
100 g oyster mushroom, shredded
200 g straw mushroom, sliced
100 ml lime juice
200-250 ml evaporated milk
1 pc tomato, sliced
15 pc red Thai chili
4 tbsp fish sauce
1 tsp salt
7 tbsp sugar
2 tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
2 L water

Others:
2 cup Leon Thai Jasmine Rice
2.5 cup water

Steps:
1. Peel, devein, and rinse the shrimp cleanly.
2. Heat some oil. Sauté the shrimp shells until fragrant and crisp. Add water and cook for 10 minutes.
3. Rinse Leon Thai Jasmine Rice cleanly. Add water and cook in a rice cooker.
4. Blend the white part of the lemongrass, the galangal, shallots, garlic, shrimp paste, curly chili, and dried chili with oil and water as needed. Blend until smooth.
5. Sauté the blended spices on medium heat until fragrant. Set aside.
6. Strain the shrimp stock. Add lemongrass, galangal, tomato, lime leaves, mushroom, and the blended spices. Stir.
7. Add fish sauce, salt, sugar, flavor enhancer, Thai chili, and lime juice. Cook for 3 minutes.
8. Add water if needed.
9. Add the shrimp and cilantro. Turn the heat off, then add evaporated milk. Stir.
10. Tom Yum Goong is ready to serve with Leon Thai Jasmine Rice on the side.

Title: Empuk Berempah! Resep TONGSENG SAPI Gulai [Menu Idul Adha]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=En61fH58CBM

Beef Tongseng Recipe (yield 7-8 servings)

Blended Spices ingredients:
8 clove garlic
10 pc shallot
4 pc candlenut
50 g red curly chili
5 cm turmeric
2 cm ginger
4 cm galangal
1 tsp toasted coriander
1 tsp toasted cumin
Oil, as needed

Gulai ingredients:
500 g beef shank / ribs / chicken / mixed, sliced
2 pc bay leaf
2 pc lemongrass, pounded
Turmeric leaf / curry leaf (optional)
5 pc lime leaf
1 pc nutmeg, pounded
3 pc clove
2 pc star anise
5 pc cardamom
5 cm cinnamon
1 pc asam kandis / tamarind (optional)
1 L water
100 ml coconut milk
1 tsp salt
⅓ tsp pepper
1-2 tsp beef powder / flavor enhancer
1 tsp sugar

Sliced ingredients:
150 g beef fillet, optional, sliced
1 tbsp margarine
5 pc shallot, sliced
½ pc onion, sliced
1 pc red tomato, sliced
2 pc green onion, sliced
100 g cabbage, sliced
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
½ tbsp oyster sauce
7 pc Thai chili, sliced
Seasonings, to taste

Steps:
1. Blend the shallots, garlic, candlenuts, turmeric, ginger, galangal, red curly chili, coriander, cumin, and a bit of oil until smooth.
2. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant. Add the lemongrass, bay leaf, lime leaf, nutmeg, clove, star anise, cardamom, cinnamon, and asam kandis. Stir.
3. Season with salt, pepper, flavor enhancer, sliced beef shank, and water. Pressure cook for 30 minutes.
4. Once tender, add coconut milk and sugar. Stir.
5. Heat the pan. Add margarine and stir. Add onion and shallots. Sauté until fragrant.
6. Add the meat, Thai chili, and green onions. Stir, then add the cabbage, Gulai broth, sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, and seasonings, to taste.
7. Beef Tongseng is ready to serve.

Title: 100% Renyah & Mengkilat! Resep PAI BUAH SEGAR GURIH Kualitas Hotel [Mini Fruit Pie]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=chJTZ_BVqDQ

Fruit Pie Recipe (yield 25-28 pieces)

Ingredients:
260 g all-purpose flour
80 g icing sugar
125 g cold butter, diced
2 pc egg yolk
¾ tsp salt

Pastry Cream:
450 ml full cream milk
80 g sugar
4 pc egg yolk
25 g all-purpose flour
20 g cornstarch
35 g butter
1-2 tsp vanilla extract
½ tsp salt

Other ingredients:
Kiwi, sliced
Strawberry, sliced
Grape, sliced
Canned orange, sliced
Plain jelly to brush

Steps:
1. For the pastry cream, heat the milk. In a separate bowl, mix the egg yolks, sugar, vanilla extract, cornstarch, flour, and salt. Mix well.
2. Pour the milk into the yolk mix while stirring, then cook it again on medium-low heat until it thickens.
3. Add butter. Mix well, then transfer to a bowl. Cover with plastic wrap. Chill in the fridge for at least 2 hours.
4. Once chilled, mix the cream with a mixer and transfer into a piping bag.
5. For the pie crust, mix the sifted flour, icing sugar, and salt. Stir.
6. Add butter and stir until it’s mixed. Add egg yolks and mix well.
7. Brush the pie tins with oil. Fill the tins with the dough. Even it out and stab the base of the pie with a fork.
8. Bake at 170℃ for 20 minutes.
9. Get the pie crust out of the tins. Fill it with the pastry cream and top with fruits.
10. Brush it with plain jelly.
11. Fruit Pie is ready to serve.

Title: TANPA Oven! Resep PAI COKELAT MINI [NO BAKE Choco Pie]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RySZLKCxaGA

No-Bake Chocolate Pie Recipe (yield: 10 pcs)

Pie Crust ingredients:
200 g Good Time Classic
70 g melted butter

Filling ingredients:
12 g all-purpose flour
30 g butter
210 ml milk
7 g chocolate powder
80 g compound chocolate (½ milk + ½ dark), chopped
50 g white condensed milk
⅕ tsp salt

Others:
Dark chocolate, chop & melt

Steps:
1. For the pie crust, grind Good Time Classic with a food processor. Set aside a little bit for topping.
2. Transfer to a bowl, then add melted butter and mix evenly.
3. Prepare the pie tins. Add the crust in, press it in and even it out.
4. Cover with plastic wrap. Place in the freezer for 20-30 minutes until they set.
5. For the filling, heat the milk, condensed milk, and sifted chocolate powder and flour. Cook on medium heat while stirring until it’s simmering.
6. Add salt, chocolate, and butter. Stir well, then turn the heat off.
7. Get the pie crust out of the tins, then pour the chocolate filling in. Cover with plastic wrap and chill in the fridge for 2-3 hours.
8. Add melted dark chocolate and Good Time Classic as the toppings.
9. No-Bake Chocolate Pie is ready to serve.

Title: Resep AYAM RICA-RICA KEMANGI Pedas Gurih Ala Devina Hermawan
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mSwwXJuBzZQ

Chicken Rica-Rica Recipe (untuk 6-7 porsi)

Ingredients:
1 kg ayam nanas / free-range chicken / broiler
2 pc lime
2 tsp salt
1 tsp chicken powder
½ tsp pepper

Blended Spices ingredients:
8 clove garlic
7 pc shallot, sliced
6 pc candlenut
5 cm ginger
5 cm turmeric
50 g red curly chili, sliced
70 g red bird’s eye chili, sliced
50 ml oil

Other ingredients:
13 pc red bird’s eye chili
40 g lemon basil
2 pc green onion, sliced
3 pc bay leaf
2 pc lemongrass, pounded
1 pc pandan leaf, optional
5 pc lime leaf
1 tsp salt
1 - 1.5 tbsp sugar
1 tsp chicken powder

Other:
Rice

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with lime, salt, chicken powder, and pepper. Mix well and cover with plastic wrap. Rest for 1-2 hours.
2. Blend the candlenuts, garlic, ginger, turmeric, and oil until smooth. Add shallots, red bird’s eye chili, and curly chili. Blend again.
3. Heat some oil. Add the chicken and cook until browned. Set aside.
4. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant. Add lemongrass, bay leaves, and lime leaves. Stir.
5. Add the chicken, water, salt, sugar, chicken powder, and pandan leaves. Cook on high heat for 15-20 minutes.
6. Add bird’s eye chili, green onions, and lemon basil. Stir.
7. Chicken Rica-Rica is ready to serve.

Title: Resep TAHU ISI SAYURAN PEDAS Air Fryer: Irit Minyak & Lebih Sehat.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ra4pPmFiiXk

Spicy Tofu Recipe (yield: 10 pcs)

Ingredients:
10 pc yellow tofu
100 g beansprout
100 g carrot, sliced into matchsticks
100 g cabbage, sliced
7 pc red bird’s eye chili
15 pc curly chili
3 pc shallot
2 clove garlic
1 pc green onion, sliced
½ tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
½ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
2 tbsp tapioca flour

Batter ingredients:
8 tbsp all-purpose flour
3 tbsp cornstarch
1 tsp baking powder
1.5 tsp chicken powder
125 ml water
2 tbsp oil
¼ tsp turmeric powder
¼ tsp paprika powder
2 clove garlic, minced

Steps:
1. Place the tofu in the air fryer. Cook at 175-180°C for 10 minutes per side. Set aside, then scoop out the inside.
2. Blend the shallots, garlic, some of the bird’s eye chili, red chili, and some oil until smooth.
3. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant. Add green onion and carrot. Cook for a moment, then add cabbage and beansprouts. Stir.
4. Season with salt, sugar, pepper, and flavor enhancer. Mix well.
5. Transfer to a bowl. Add sliced bird’s eye chili, then cover with plastic wrap. Let cool.
6. After the filling has cooled, add tapioca flour. Mix well, then transfer the filling into a piping bag.
7. Fill the tofu with the vegetable filling.
8. Prepare a bowl. Combine flour, cornstarch, chicken powder, paprika powder, turmeric powder, and baking powder. Mix well.
9. Add water, oil, and garlic. Mix well.
10. Heat the pan. Dip the tofu into the batter. Pan-sear the tofu until a crust or a brownish layer is formed.
11. Place the tofu in the air fryer. Cook for 8 minutes at 180°C, then flip and cook again for 7 minutes.
12. Spicy Tofu is ready to serve.

Title: Resep SERABI TEMPE PEDAS: 100% Empuk Berongga! [Bebas Gluten]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EthmCxdQzs0

Spicy Serabi Recipe (yield 6-8 servings)

Batter ingredients:
300 ml instant coconut milk (thick)
500 ml hot water
450 g BOLA Deli Rice Flour
30 g sugar
¾ tsp yeast
1 tsp salt

Tempeh ingredients:
180 g tempeh
3 pc red curly chili
5 pc shallot
4 clove garlic
2 cm aromatic ginger
5 pc red bird’s eye chili
2 fistful lemon basil, sliced
70 ml water
½ tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
Oil

Other ingredients:
Red bird’s eye chili, sliced

Steps:
1. For the batter, combine the coconut milk, hot water, salt, BOLA Deli Rice Flour, and sugar in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Add the yeast in. Mix well, then cover the bowl with plastic wrap. Rest for 40-60 minutes.
3. Pinch the tempeh into chunks and fry until golden. Set aside.
4. Blend the shallots, garlic, aromatic ginger, curly chili, bird’s eye chili, and oil until smooth.
5. Sautè the blended spices until fragrant. Add the tempeh in and mix well.
6. Add water, salt, sugar, and flavor enhancer. Stir, then add the lemon basil in.
7. Heat the mold pan on medium-low heat. Pour the Serabi batter in. Cover the pan until they’re half-cooked, then add the topping and sliced bird’s eye chili. Continue cooking.
8. Spicy Tempeh Serabi is ready to serve.

Title: Tips SUP AYAM Kolagen Kental & Gurih: Resep BIJIN HOTPOT / NABE [Sup Kecantikan & Awet Muda]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2gpjoX-hXpY

Collagen Soup Hotpot Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Soup ingredients:
500 g chicken feet
500 g chicken carcass
½ pc onion, sliced
5 cm ginger, sliced
6 L water

Other ingredients:
Shimeji mushroom
Enoki mushroom
White Shimeji mushroom
Crown daisy
Green onion, sliced
Silk tofu
Carrot, sliced into flowers (optional)
Radish, sliced
Sliced beef

Chicken Meatball ingredients:
250 g ground chicken
¾ tsp salt
1.5 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
¼ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
2 tsp garlic liquid
1 tsp ginger liquid
2 tsp cornstarch
1 tbsp egg white

Dipping Sauce:
Ponzu or soy sauce + lime
Red bird’s eye chili, sliced
White part of green onions, sliced
Garlic, minced
Radish, grated

Steps:
1. For the soup, boil the water and add the chicken feet and chicken carcass. Cook for a bit, then rinse.
2. Bring water to a boil once more. Add the chicken feet and carcass with onion and ginger. Cook for 60 minutes on high heat.
3. Lower the heat. Boil the feet and carcass for 4 hours. Add water if necessary.
4. Turn the heat up and continue cooking for 15-20 minutes, then strain.
5. Transfer the soup into a bottle. Keep in the fridge overnight until it turns into jelly.
6. For the Meatballs, prepare a bowl. Combine the chicken, salt, sugar, pepper, and stock powder. Mix until sticky.
7. Add ginger liquid, garlic liquid, and egg white. Stir and add cornstarch in. Mix well.
8. Arrange the vegetables and sliced beef on a plate. Shape the meatballs.
9. For the dipping sauce, combine all the ingredients and stir.
10. Heat the pan. Add the collagen soup and reheat.
11. Add the vegetables, sliced beef, and chicken meatballs.
12. Collagen Nabe is ready to serve with the dipping sauce on the side.

URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OGtn3u23Yjw

Aceh Noodles Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Blended Spices ingredients:
7-8 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
3 pc candlenut
8 pc red curly chili
5 pc dried chili, soaked in warm water
5 cm ginger
½ tsp whole white pepper or ¼ tsp pepper
1 sachet shrimp paste, optional
Oil

Stir-fried ingredients:
3 pc shallot, sliced
1 pc green onion, sliced
½ pc celery, sliced
½ pc tomato, medium
1 tbsp curry powder
5 pc shrimp, small, with shell
2 pair gizzard and liver, boiled, sliced
3 pc squid, sliced
1 pc egg
200 g fresh egg noodles
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tsp fish sauce
1-2 tsp beef powder
500 ml water
Cabbage, sliced
Beansprout

Shallot Pickle ingredients:
9 pc shallot, sliced
½ tbsp vinegar
½ tsp sugar
⅓ tsp salt

Condiments:
Kaffir lime
Green bird’s eye chili
Cucumber
Emping
Fried peanuts

Steps:
1. Blend the garlic, shallots, candlenuts, white pepper, ginger, shrimp paste, curly chili, and dried chili with some oil until smooth. Then, sauté until fragrant. Set aside.

3. Heat the oil. Add the gizzards and liver, sauté until fragrant. Then, add the shrimp and squid. Cook until the liquid is reduced a bit.
4. Add the egg and stir. Then, add the shallots, green onions, tomato, and blended spices. Mix well.
5. Add sweet soy sauce, fish sauce, and curry powder. Mix well.
6. Add water and beef powder. Stir, then add celery and the noodles. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
7. Add the cabbage and beansprouts. Cook for a bit.
8. Aceh Noodle is ready to serve.

Other ingredients:

3 tbsp mayonnaise

Black pepper, to taste

Title: Anti Kempis! Resep ONDE-ONDE MANIS TELUR ASIN Ala Resto Dim Sum: Kopong & Garing!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PNW4vGwc7Lo

Salted Egg Sesame Ball Recipe (yield 10 pcs)

Sesame Ball Dough ingredients:
40 g potato, steamed
50 g sugar
145 g BOLA Deli Glutinous Rice Flour
90 g hot water
10 g oil
¼ tsp salt

Salted Egg Filling:
65 g margarine, room temperature
25 g BOLA Deli Cornstarch
60 g BOLA Deli Icing Sugar
25 g powdered sugar
3 pc salted egg yolk, steamed, mashed
¼ tsp salt
1 tsp vanilla extract
BOLA Deli Cornstarch to coat

Coating ingredients:
Sesame seed
100 g water
1-2 tbsp BOLA Deli Cornstarch

Others:
Oil to fry

Steps:
1. For the filling, combine margarine, salted egg, powdered milk, salt, BOLA Deli Cornstarch, BOLA Deli Icing Sugar, and vanilla extract. Mix well.
2. Cover with a plastic wrap and place in the refrigerator for at least 3 hours.
2. Slice the filling into 10 parts. Coat with BOLA Deli Cornstarch and shape into balls.
4. Place the filling into the freezer for 20-30 minutes.
5. For the Sesame Ball dough, combine BOLA Deli Glutinous Rice Flour, sugar, potato, oil, and salt. Mix well.
6. Add hot water and knead until it comes together. Cover with plastic wrap and rest for 15-30 minutes.
7. Knead the dough and shape into a cylinder. Slice into 10 parts or 30 g each.
8. Shape the dough into a bowl. Add the Salted Egg filling, then wrap and seal slowly.
9. Mix water with cornstarch, then dip the Sesame Balls in it and coat with the sesame seeds.
10. Heat the oil. Fry the Sesame Balls on low heat for 8 minutes while stirring slowly.
11. Once they’re expanded, increase the heat to medium. Fry until golden brown and set aside.
12. Salted Egg Sesame Balls are ready to serve.

Title: Favorit Keluarga! Resep PASTEL TUTUP KHAS INGGRIS [Shepherd’s / Cottage Pie, Pai Daging Cincang]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=o-4Qs7qga0M

Shepherd's Pie Recipe (yield 7-8 servings)

Mashed Potato ingredients:
850 g potato
2 tbsp butter
1 pc egg yolk
150 ml milk
80 g Parmesan cheese
¾ tsp salt
¼ tsp white pepper

Filling ingredients:
450 g ground beef
3 pc beef bacon / smoked beef, sliced
1 pc onion, large, diced
5 clove garlic, minced
1-2 tbsp all-purpose flour
50 ml white cooking wine / red wine / wine (optional)
1 pc red tomato, boiled, peeled, chopped
300 ml water
60 g carrot, diced
70 g pea
1 pc celery
½ tbsp rosemary / mixed herbs
½ tbsp paprika powder
2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
3 tbsp tomato sauce
½ tsp stock powder
¾ tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper

Steps:
1. Slice the potatoes. Boil until soft, then mash with a strainer.
2. Heat the pan. Add the potatoes, butter, grated cheese, salt, white pepper, and milk. Mix well.
3. Heat some oil. Add the smoked beef and onion. Cook until fragrant.
4. Add the garlic and ground beef. Stir, then add carrot and tomato. Mix well.
5. Add the rosemary, celery, paprika powder, cooking wine, Worcestershire sauce, and tomato sauce. Mix well.
6. Add flour in. Mix, then add water, salt, sugar, pepper, and stock powder. Stir.
7. Add the peas in. Cook for a moment until the water is reduced.
8. Add the cooked potato on top of the meat. Even it out and create a pattern with a fork.
9. Mix the yolk with a bit of milk and brush on top of the potato.
10. Add grated cheese on top, then bake at 190°C for 15-18 minutes.
11. Rest for 30-60 minutes before serving.

Title: 100% Sukses! Resep CHIFFON KEJU GURIH: Wangi, Anti Kempis & Anti Retak.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gpjLlXvqwz0

Cheese Chiffon Cake Recipe (yields 8 pieces of 10 cm pan)

Ingredients A:
9 pc egg yolk (1 pc egg = 50 g)
65 g sugar
50 g condensed milk
100 ml oil
75 ml milk
60 ml water
210 g all-purpose / cake flour
10 g baking powder
1 tsp salt
1 tbsp vanilla extract

Ingredients B:
9 pc egg white (1 pc egg = 50 g)
130 g sugar
¾ tsp cream of tartar or 2 tsp lemon juice, optional

Topping:
Cheese

Steps:
1. For Ingredients A, combine the egg yolks, condensed milk, vanilla extract, oil, milk, and water. Mix with a balloon whisk, then add sugar and mix again.
2. Add sifted flour, baking powder, and salt. Mix well.
3. For Ingredients B, beat the egg whites with some of the sugar and cream of tartar with a mixer. Add the rest of the sugar and beat until the birdbeak stage.
4. Add some of the egg white batter into the yolk batter. Mix, then add it into the egg white batter and stir.
5. Pour the batter into the pan. Fill it with cheese, then pour the batter again until it’s 70-80% full.
6. Sprinkle the grated cheese on top and bake at 155°C - 160°C for 35-40 minutes.
7. Get the cake out of the oven and turn it upside down. Let it cool, then get it out of the pan.
8. Cheese Chiffon Cake is ready to serve.

Title: Makan Dengan Kulitnya! Resep UDANG CABAI GARAM: 100% Gurih Renyah! [Ala Resto]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dDPKZLtqyME

Spicy Salt & Pepper Shrimp Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Shrimp ingredients:
500 g whole shrimp with shell
1-2 tbsp egg white
1 tsp baking powder
¾ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
6 tbsp cornstarch
2 tsp vinegar
½ tsp Chinese five-spice powder, optional
Oil for frying

Spicy Salt & Pepper Seasoning ingredients:
10-12 clove garlic, minced
2-4 pc shallot, sliced
1 pc green onion, sliced
3 pc red curly chili, sliced
4 pc red bird’s eye chili, sliced
⅓ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
½ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
½ tsp sugar
½ tbsp oyster sauce
Oil to sauté

Steps:
1. Trim the shrimp’s head area, legs, and devein it.
2. Marinate with egg whites, baking powder, vinegar, salt, pepper, cornstarch, and Chinese five-spice powder. Mix well and marinate for 10-15 minutes.
3. Heat the oil. Fry the shrimp on high heat for 1 minute. Set aside and let it rest for a moment, then fry it again for a few seconds. Set aside.
4. Heat some oil and fry the garlic until golden. Set aside.
5. Sauté the shallots, green onions, bird’s eye chili, red chili, salt, pepper, sugar, and oyster sauce. Stir, then add the fried shrimp. Mix well.
6. Sprinkle the fried garlic on top.
7. Spicy Salt & Pepper Shrimp is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Empuk Tahan Lama! Resep ROTI GORENG ISI RAGOUT: Luar Garing Dalem Empuk.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3PCC0T67dBk

Fried Ragout Buns Recipe (11 pcs)

Ingredients:
275 g bread flour
30 g sugar
2 tbsp powdered milk
5 g yeast
2 pc egg yolk
145 ml milk, cold
50 g butter / margarine
½ tsp salt

Ragout ingredients:
3 tbsp all-purpose flour
3 tbsp butter
½ pc onion, small diced
2 clove garlic, minced
1 pc green onion, sliced
1 pc celery, sliced
100 g shelled corn
180 g chicken luncheon / spam / sausage
50 g carrot, small diced and boiled
50 g green bean, small diced and boiled
350 ml milk
A pinch nutmeg powder
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
½ tsp sugar

Other ingredients:
2 pc egg white
Breadcrumbs
Fortune Oil for frying

Steps:
1. For the dough, combine the flour, sugar, powdered milk, and yeast. Mix with the mixer, then add milk and egg yolks. Mix evenly.
2. Add the butter and salt. Mix again until elastic for 15-20 minutes at medium-high speed.
3. After it’s elastic, round the dough into a ball and cover it with a plastic wrap. Rest for 45-60 minutes.
4. For the filling, heat some oil and sauté the onion and garlic. Stir, then add the green onions in. Mix evenly.
5. Add the chicken luncheon, shelled corn, green beans, carrot, celery, and a bit of nutmeg powder. Mix well.
6. Add butter and flour. Stir, then add milk, salt, pepper, and sugar. Cook until it thickens, then let cool.
7. Punch the dough and weigh to 40-42 g each. Shape into a ball and cover with a plastic wrap. Rest for 5-15 minutes.
8. Flatten the dough with a rolling pin and fill. Shape into a ball once more. Repeat for all the dough.
9. Cover with a plastic wrap again. Rest for 15-25 minutes.
10. Once it’s risen, dip the bun into the egg whites then the breadcrumbs.
11. Heat the Fortune Oil and fry the buns until browned. Set aside.
12. The Fried Buns are ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Pedas Mantap! Resep NUGGET GEPREK SAMBAL PECAK: Kombinasinya Cocok Banget!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_2y6zOXLzHs

Nugget Geprek Recipe (yield: 8-10 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pack Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget
130 g green bird’s eye chili
1 pc tomato, sliced
60 g shallot
1 clove garlic, optional
1 tsp salt
1 tsp flavor enhancer
2 tsp sugar
2-3 tbsp oil

Other ingredients:
Rice
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Prepare a stone bowl. Add the garlic, salt, flavor enhancer, and sugar. Mash.
2. Add half of the shallots. Mash, then add the bird’s eye chili bit by bit. Mash again.
3. Add the sliced tomato in and mash.
4. Heat some oil. Slice the remaining shallots, then fry until half-crisp. Add into the Sambal and mix.
5. Heat oil on high heat and fry Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget for 3 minutes. Drain.
6. Transfer the Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget into the stone bowl, then mash with the Sambal.
7. Nugget Geprek Sambal Pecak is ready to serve.

Title: HANYA 6 BAHAN! Resep BOLEN PISANG LILIT Legit Rasanya
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Xr3Z6cXNsWM

Banana Twist Pastry Recipe (6 pcs)

Ingredients:
100 g sugar
300 ml water
1-2 tbsp Wijsman butter
6 pc pisang raja / saba / plantain
⅓ tsp salt
Danish pastry
Cheese
Chocolate rice
Yolks for egg wash

Steps:
1. Heat the pan. Add sugar and water, and boil until the sugar is dissolved. Then, add the banana and salt, and cook until it thickens.
2. Add the butter. Flip the bananas and cook on both sides. Let it cool.
3. After it’s cooled down, halve the banana and fill it with grated cheese or chocolate rice.
4. Dust the danish pastry with flour and roll it with a rolling pin.
5. Slice into 6 strips, then twist it around the banana.
6. Brush with the egg wash. Sprinkle with chocolate rice and grated cheese.
7. Bake with an air fryer for 10-12 minutes at 170°C-180°C.
8. Banana Twist Pastry is ready to serve.

Title: Istimewa! Resep KUE BUGIS MANDI TARO [Kue Putri Mandi]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qWlgHA3IECg

Taro Bugis Mandi Recipe (30 pcs)

Dough ingredients:
275 g BOLA Deli Glutinous Rice Flour
125 g taro, steamed and mashed
125 ml boiling water
2 tbsp vanilla powdered milk
130-140 ml instant coconut milk
Taro paste, to taste

Filling ingredients:
200 g freshly grated coconut
150 g sugar
½ tsp salt
½ tsp vanilla extract, colorless
2 pc pandan leaf

Coconut Sauce ingredients:
200 g instant coconut milk
200 g water
20 g BOLA Deli Cornstarch
2 pc pandan leaf
½ tsp salt

Steps:
1. For the filling, heat the pan and add water, pandan leaves, sugar, and vanilla extract. Stir until the sugar is dissolved, then add grated coconut and salt. Cook until the water is reduced.
2. Once it’s cooled, shape into balls.
3. For the Bugs dough, steam the taro and mash. Strain to a smooth paste.
4. In a separate bowl, add BOLA Deli Glutinous Rice Flour and powdered milk. Stir, then pour the hot water in. Mix well.
5. Add the taro, taro paste, and coconut milk slowly. Mix until the dough comes together.
6. Shape the dough into cylinders. Divide and shape into balls.
7. Flatten the dough and fill it. Seal the dough and shape it into a ball again. Steam until cooked.
8. For the Coconut Sauce, combine the coconut milk, salt, BOLA Deli Cornstarch, and pandan leaves. Cook until thickened.
9. Divide the sauce into two. Add taro paste, to taste, into one of them and mix.
10. Prepare a cup or a bowl. Add the Bugis Mandi and Coconut Sauce in.
11. Bugis Mandi is ready to serve.

Title: Sehat Praktis! Resep SAMGYETANG: Sup Ayam Ginseng Khas Korea
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ijUDZ4N7OmM

Samgyetang Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pc whole chicken, small (@500-600 g)
8-10 tbsp white glutinous rice, soaked
6 clove garlic
2 pc jujube
1 tsp Cheong Kwan Jang Korean Red Ginseng & Honey Paste
1.5 L stock
300 ml glutinous rice soaking water

Stock ingredients:
1 pc whole chicken, chop into small cuts
2 L water

Dipping Sauce:
1.5 tsp salt
1 tsp pepper
2 tbsp sesame oil
2 tsp toasted sesame seeds

Others:
Green onions
Jujube

Steps:
1. Wash the glutinous rice and soak for 2 hours. Drain and collect the water.
2. For the chicken stock, bring the chopped chicken to a boil. Remove the water and rinse, then cook in the pressure cooker for 1 hour. Drain and collect the water.
3. Clean the chicken and pat dry with a clean cloth or paper towels. Trim the fatty parts.
4. Fill the chicken with the glutinous rice, then add jujube, garlic, glutinous rice, and Cheong Kwan Jang Korean Red Ginseng & Honey Paste.
5. Prepare the pot and add the spices, the chicken, glutinous rice soaking water, and chicken stock. Boil on a medium-high heat for 60 minutes.
6. Plate the chicken into a stone bowl with the soup. Add green onions and jujube. Cook it again for a moment.
7. In a separate bowl, mix the salt, pepper, sesame seeds, and sesame oil. Mix well.
8. Samgyetang is ready to serve.

Title: Resep WAFFLE: Luar Garing Dalem Fluffy Empuk Kopong!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=f9nreJYZ0R4

Waffle Recipe (yield: 6-7 pcs)

Ingredients:
120 g cake flour
17 g cornstarch
3 g yeast
½ tsp salt
½ tsp baking powder
250 ml milk
60 g Wijsman
½ pc egg
½ tsp vanilla extract
1.5 tbsp powdered milk

Steps:
1. Heat the milk in the microwave. Add butter and stir until the butter melts.
2. Transfer to a large bowl. Add vanilla extract, salt, baking powder, egg, and yeast. Stir.
3. Add cornstarch, powdered milk, and flour. Mix and cover with plastic wrap. Rest for 60-90 minutes.
4. Heat the waffle maker. Pour the batter in and cook on low heat until browned.
5. The Waffle is ready to serve.

Title: 100% Sukses! Resep DONAT MINI Empuk, Lembut, Tahan Lama [Tanpa Mixer & Ulen]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ETGFOr9o2ME

Mini Donut Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
70 ml milk
90 ml water
50 g butter
¼ tsp salt
½ tbsp sugar
75 g all-purpose flour
2 pc egg
½ tsp baking powder

Filling:
Cherries & Berries Preserve
Lemon Curd
Strawberry Preserve with Champagne

Others:
30 g sugar
Cinnamon powder, to taste

Steps:
1. For the dough, heat water, milk, and butter. Stir, then add salt and sugar. Bring to a boil.
2. Add flour and cook on low heat while stirring, then transfer to a bowl. Let cool.
3. Once it’s cooled, add baking powder and eggs one by one while stirring. Once mixed evenly, transfer to a piping bag.
4. Heat the oil and fry the donuts on low heat for 8 - 10 minutes. Drain.
5. Coat with the sugar and cinnamon powder mix evenly. Fill with cherries & berries preserve, lemon curd, and strawberry preserve with champagne.
6. Mini Donut is ready to serve.

Title: Resep BAKSO GORENG AYAM UDANG: Garing Kopong Daleman Empuk!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Id1ll8EMhfA

Bakso Goreng Recipe (yield 12 pcs)

Fragrant Chicken Oil ingredients (or use oil + ready-made fried shallots):
70 g chicken skin
3 tbsp water
3 tbsp Fortune Oil
6-7 pc shallot, large, sliced
1 tbsp dried shrimp, soaked in warm water

Dough ingredients:
250 g chicken thigh fillet
150 g shrimp, chopped
4 clove garlic, minced
½ tsp pepper
1 tsp salt
2 tsp mushroom stock powder
½ tbsp sugar
2.5 tsp baking powder
1 tbsp fish sauce
1-2 tbsp oil
1 pc egg
70 g cold water / shaved ice
100 g tapioca flour
25 g all-purpose flour
25 g rice flour

Others:
Fortune Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Heat the pan. Add water and chicken skin. Boil until the water is reduced, then cut the chicken skin.
2. Add the shallots, dried shrimp, and Fortune oil. Cook until they’re crisp, then separate the oil with the chicken skin mix.
3. To make the dough, blend the chicken fillet, chicken skin mix, salt, sugar, mushroom stock powder, pepper, baking powder, and garlic until smooth.
4. Add the egg in and blend again, then transfer to a bowl.
5. Add the shrimp in. Mix well, then add fish sauce, cold water bit by bit, and fragrant chicken oil. Mix well.
6. Add the tapioca flour, rice flour, and all-purpose flour. Mix well.
7. Heat the Fortune Oil. Shape the dough into balls with an ice cream scoop, then fry on low heat for 15-20 minutes until yellowish brown. Then, turn the heat up to medium heat and continue frying for 20-30 minutes. Set aside.
8. Bakso Goreng is ready to serve.

Title: Anti Benyek! Resep NASI GURIH UBI UNGU Rice Cooker : Pulen, Wangi, Praktis !
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rfTyl0bA0H4

Ube Savory Rice Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
225 g rice
320 ml water
2 tbsp coconut milk
½ tbsp margarine
2 tbsp oil
4 pc shallot
2 clove garlic
2 cm ginger, sliced
1 pc lemongrass, sliced
1 pc pandan leaf, sliced
1 pc kaffir lime leaf
½ tsp salt
½ tsp flavor enhancer / chicken powder
¼ tsp pepper
35 gr ube, sliced into matchsticks

Steps:
1. Blend the garlic, shallots, and oil until smooth. Sauté until fragrant.
2. Add the lemongrass, ginger, and pepper. Stir, then add the pandan leaf and lime leaf. Stir for a moment, then turn the heat off.
3. Add the rice and water into the rice cooker. Then, add the ube, blended spices, coconut milk, salt, flavor enhancer, and margarine. Cook thoroughly.
4. Ube Savory Rice is ready to serve.

Title: TANPA Oven! Resep KLAPPERTAART Gurih, Wangi, Lembut.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jUiISBFGzTs

Klappertaart Recipe (yield 4-6 servings)

Ingredients:
250 ml coconut water
250 ml milk
3 pc egg yolk
30 g all-purpose flour
15 g glutinous rice flour / cornstarch
20-30 g sugar
¼ tsp salt
1 tsp vanilla extract
50 g condensed milk
85 g butter

Filling & Topping ingredients:
70 g kenari nuts, toasted
60 g raisin
30 ml rum
30 ml water
300 g coconut
Cinnamon powder
Vicenzovo Ladyfinger
Coconut water to dip the ladyfinger

Meringue, optional
3 pc egg whites
90 g sugar
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp cream of tartar

Steps:
1. Soak the raisins with rum and water. Stir.
2. Heat the milk and coconut water. In a separate bowl, mix the egg yolks, condensed milk, sugar, vanilla extract, salt, flour, and glutinous rice flour.
3. Pour the coconut water mix into the yolk mix slowly while stirring. Cook again until thickens.
4. Add the coconut, kenari nuts, raisins, and butter. Stir.
5. Dip Vicenzovo Ladyfinger into coconut water. Arrange in a bowl and pour the custard in.
6. For the meringue, prepare boiling water and a stainless bowl. Add egg whites and sugar in. Stir until the sugar is dissolved and the egg whites become hot. Remove from heat.
7. Add salt and cream of tartar, then beat with a mixer until it expands. Transfer to a piping bag.
8. Pipe the meringue onto the Klappertaart, then torch it.
9. Add the rest of the kenari nuts, raisins, and dust with cinnamon powder on top.
10. Chill in the fridge for at least 2 hours before consuming.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Resep DONAT KEPANG Ketan Salju: Kenyal, Manis, Gurih! [MURAH Bukan Murahan]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CLyAAC3HGrI

Glutinous Rice Kue Kepang Recipe (yield: 18-20 pcs)

Ingredients:
150 ml water
60 ml thick coconut milk
175 g BOLA Deli Glutinous Rice Flour
68 g all-purpose flour
1 tsp baking powder
½ tsp salt

Other ingredients:
100 g sugar
2-3 tbsp water
2 pc pandan leaf, sliced

Steps:
1. Mix BOLA Deli Glutinous Rice Flour with flour, baking powder, and salt. Stir, then add water and coconut milk. Knead until the dough comes together.
2. Shape the dough into a long cylinder and slice. Get a piece of dough, roll into a long cylinder, connect the ends, then twist it slowly. Repeat for all the dough.
3. Heat the oil and fry Kue Kepang on medium-high heat until golden brown. Set aside.
4. Heat the pan. Add sugar and water, then cook until the sugar is dissolved and thickens. Add the Kue Kepang and pandan leaves in. Stir until the sugar crystallizes
5. Kue Kepang is ready to serve.

Title: TANPA Cetakan! Resep KUE AWUG / KUE PUTU: Empuk, Gurih, Manis!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kHKsBzAWEp0

Awug / Ombus-ombus Tapanuli Recipe (yield 14 pcs)

Ingredients:
200 g rice flour
250 g grated coconut
50 g glutinous rice flour
50 ml water
1 tsp salt
½ tsp vanilla powder
160 g palm sugar
Banana leaf
5 pc pandan leaf

Steps:
1. Steam the rice flour with a piece of pandan leaf for 20-25 minutes.
2. Once it cools, mix in the glutinous rice flour and stir. Then, add the grated coconut in and mix well.
3. Mix water, salt, and vanilla powder evenly, then add into the flour mix and stir.
4. Prepare the banana leaves and a small cup. Cut the leaves into the size of the cup.
5. Add the flour mix, then the palm sugar, and cover with the flour mix. Pack it in, then unmold onto the banana leaf.
6. Heat the steamer and add pandan leaves into the water. Steam the Awug for 10 minutes.
7. Tear the banana leaves lengthwise. Shape it into a cone, then add the flour mix until ¾ full, fill it with palm sugar, and cover with more flour mix. Pack it in, fold the leaf close, and secure with a toothpick.
8. Steam for 15 minutes.
9. The dish is ready to serve.

URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mcz32Ou_lUs

Fried Misua Recipe (yield 25 pcs)

Blended Spices ingredients:
5 clove garlic
7 pc shallot
1 tsp whole white pepper
Oil

Fried Misua ingredients:
Kanzler Cheese Cocktail, halve and make a cross
200 g misua
1 pc carrot, shred
1 pc green onion, sliced
1 pc celery, sliced
150 g shredded chicken
2 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
½ tbsp flavor enhancer
1.2 L water

Others:

Oil for frying
All-purpose flour

Condiments:
Green bird’s eye chili

Steps:
1. Blend the shallots, garlic, white pepper, and oil.
2. Sauté until fragrant. Then, add green onions, celery, and shredded chicken. Stir-fry shortly, then add the carrot, oyster sauce, water, and misua. Mix well.
3. Season with salt, sugar, and flavor enhancer. Cook until the water is absorbed, then transfer to a mold lined with baking paper.
4. Add Kanzler Cheese Cocktail into the Misua, then let cool at room temperature or in the fridge.
5. Slice the Misua, then coat with flour and dip in the eggs.

Thailand Es Merah Delima Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
3 pc jackfruit, peel and slice
30 g coconut
100 g tapioca flour
30 g canned water chestnuts, slice into small cubes
10 drop red food coloring
Water to boil
Shaved ice
Tapioca flour

Coconut Cream ingredients:
130 ml coconut milk
Salt, to taste
1 pc pandan leaf

Sugar Syrup ingredients:
100 g sugar
250 ml water

Steps:

Title: Resep AYAM TIM JAHE: Gurihnya Meresap! [Pek Cam Kee]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-vFXoKF4Bi8

Steamed Ginger Chicken (yield 6-7 servings)

Marinating ingredients:
1 pc free-range chicken
2 tsp salt
1 tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer, optional
1 tbsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
1 pc green onions
1-2 thumb ginger, sliced
1 tbsp white cooking wine / sake, optional

Garlic Ginger Oil ingredients:
93 g garlic, minced
70 g ginger, grated
½ tbsp sesame oil
60 ml oil

Condiments:
Soy sauce
Red chili, thinly sliced
Large green onion, thinly sliced
Cilantro
Cucumber, peeled and sliced

Steps:
1. Pat the chicken dry. Mix the salt, sugar, stock powder, pepper with cooking wine and stir.
2. Marinate the chicken starting from the cavity. Add the green onions and ginger into the cavity.
3. Wrap the chicken with baking paper, then wrap again with aluminum foil. Steam for 60-80 minutes on high heat.
4. For the Garlic Ginger Oil, heat the oil and add the garlic in. Cook until fragrant, then lower the heat and add the ginger in. Cook until reduced.
5. Turn the heat off. Add sesame oil in and mix well.
6. Get the chicken out of the steamer. Set aside the chicken juice in a bowl, then slice the chicken.
7. Add soy sauce to the chicken juice. Stir.
8. Ginger Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Pasti Nambah! Resep NASI LIWET & OSENG CUMI CABAI GENDOT [Khas Sunda]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lxLxZGUtxSY

Sundanese Nasi Liwet Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Nasi Liwet ingredients:
375 g rice
500 ml water
12 pc shallot
3 pc lemongrass, pounded
3-5 pc bay leaf
2 pc red chili
10 pc red bird’s eye chili
2 tbsp Blue Band Rice Mix Chicken flavor
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
30 g bitter bean, halved, optional

Salted Squid Habanero Stir Fry ingredients:
100 g salted squid, boiled
3 clove garlic, sliced
8 pc shallot, sliced
3 pc habanero, sliced
2 pc tomatillo, sliced
10 pc red bird’s eye chili, sliced
40 g bitter bean, halved, optional
100 ml water
¼ tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp flavor enhancer

Roasted Keciwis ingredients:
6 pc keciwis, halved
1 tbsp Blue Band Serbaguna
¼ tsp pepper
50 ml water

Condiments:
Tomato Sambal (https://youtu.be/j9a9EB0pGTo)

Steps:
1. For the Nasi Liwet, sauté the shallots, lemongrass, bay leaves, red chili, bird’s eye chili, and bitter beans until fragrant.
2. Add the rice and water into the rice cooker. Add the sautéd ingredients in with Blue Band Rice Mix in Chicken flavor, salt, and pepper. Cook until done.
3. For the Salted Squid Habanero Stir Fry, sauté the garlic and shallots. Stir, then add the squid in and cook until crisp.
4. Add the habanero, bird’s eye chili, tomatillo, and bitter beans in. Stir and add water, salt, sugar, and flavor enhancer.
5. For the Roasted Keciwis, add the sliced keciwis into the pan. Add water and cook until reduced.
6. Add pepper and Blue Band Serbaguna, roast until browned.
7. Nasi Liwet is ready to serve.

Title: Resep STEAK CAFE DE PARIS & KENTANG GORENG SHOESTRING: Spesial Perpaduan Garlic & Butter!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sb-3f5118XU

Café de Paris Steak Recipe (yield 2-4 servings)

Ingredients:
Tenderloin steak

Butter ingredients:
200 g butter, room temperature
½ tsp salt
½ tsp black pepper
1 tsp sugar
8 pc parsley, finely chopped
1 sprig rosemary, finely chopped
1 pc spring onion, finely chopped
2 pc shallot, finely chopped
8 pc garlic, large, minced
½ tbsp mustard
Whole lemon, zest
1 tbsp lemon juice
10 g anchovies
½ tsp paprika powder
½ tsp curry powder

Other ingredients:
1 pc potato, jumbo size
2 tsp salt
1 tbsp vinegar
100 ml cream
Watercress

Steps:
1. For the Fries, slice the potato thinly to 3-4 mm, rinse, and soak in water and vinegar for at least 30 minutes. Rinse twice and pat dry.
2. Heat some oil. Fry the potato on low heat for 15 minutes and set aside. Fry it again on high heat until cooked. Set aside.
3. For the Café de Paris butter, prepare a bowl and add minced garlic, shallots, lemon zest, rosemary, parsley, spring onions, lemon juice, anchovies, curry powder, paprika powder, and mustard. Mix.
4. Add salt, black pepper, and sugar. Mix well and rest for 2 minutes. Add the butter in and stir.
5. Transfer onto a plastic wrap and roll to a cylinder. Chill in the fridge or freezer.
6. Get the butter out of the fridge and slice. To make the sauce, heat the pan and add some of the sliced butter in and the cream. Mix well.
7. For the steak, pat it dry with a paper towel. Season with salt, black pepper, and oil, to taste.
8. Grill the steak with Tefal OptiGrill+ to medium well. For the second steak, cook it to rare or to taste.
9. Café de Paris Steak is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Resep AYAM GORENG Favorit Keluarga: 5 Bahan Saja, Rasa Bintang 5!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j9a9EB0pGTo

5-Ingredient Fried Chicken Recipe (yield: 6-7 servings)

Ingredients:
1 pc whole broiler
2 tbsp rice vinegar / 1 tbsp regular vinegar
8 clove garlic, minced
9.5 tbsp tapioca flour
1-2 tbsp chicken powder

Tomato Sambal:
12 pc shallot, halved
2-3 pc tomato, sliced
20 pc red bird’s eye chili, halved
1 tbsp sugar
¾ tsp salt
½ tsp flavor enhancer
Oil for stir-frying
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Chop the chicken into 14 pieces. Marinate it with minced garlic, chicken powder, vinegar, and tapioca flour. Mix and cover with a plastic wrap. Marinate for at least 30 minutes.
2. Heat the oil and fry the chicken on high heat first, then lower to medium-low heat until browned. Set aside.
3. For the Sambal, heat the oil and stir-fry the shallots and bird’s eye chili until fragrant and soft. Transfer to a stone bowl. Season with salt, sugar, and flavor enhancer. Mash.
4. In the same pan, stir-fry the tomatoes until soft. Then, mash with the shallots and bird’s eye chili. Sauté until oily.
5. Fried Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Gurih Pedas! Resep MIE AYAM RICA: Bikin Nagih!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qoeqpxKI2jk

Rica Chicken Noodles Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Fragrant Chicken Oil ingredients:
60-80 pc chicken skin
10 clove garlic, skin-on, pounded
5 pc shallot, skin-on, pounded
150 ml oil
Water

Rica Chicken ingredients:
300 g chicken thigh fillet, skin-on
6 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
1-2 cm ginger
4 pc dried chili or 2 tsp chili powder
10 pc bird’s eye chili
3 tbsp water
2 tbsp oil
2 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp sugar
½ tsp flavor enhancer
¼ tsp pepper
½ tbsp fish sauce, optional
60-100 ml water

Others:
Egg noodles
Choy sum, boiled
Green onion, sliced
Fried shallots

Plating per serving (100 g noodles):
Egg noodles
1.5 tbsp fragrant chicken oil
1-2 tsp soy sauce (depends on the brand)
½ tsp fish sauce, optional
⅛ tsp flavor enhancer
⅛ tsp pepper

Steps:
1. For the fragrant chicken oil, boil some water and add the chicken skin in. Cook on medium heat until the water is reduced, then slice.
2. Add oil, garlic, and shallots. Cook on low heat until crisp.
3. For the chicken, marinate it with chili sauce, fish sauce, oyster sauce, soy sauce, flavor enhancer, sugar, and pepper. Cover with a plastic wrap and marinate for 10-15 minutes.
4. Blend the garlic, shallots, ginger, bird’s eye chili, dried chili, oil, and a bit of water.
5. Sauté until oily, then add the chicken in. Add water and cook until it’s a bit reduced.
6. Cook the egg noodles and drain.
7. Prepare a bowl. Add the fragrant chicken oil, soy sauce, fish sauce, flavor enhancer, pepper, and noodles. Stir and add the Rica Chicken and choy sum toppings.
8. Rica Chicken Noodles is ready to serve.

Title: Resep SOTO BETAWI Kuah & Oseng Versi Praktis [Menu IdulAdha]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=p2beC43hF1Q

Soto Betawi Recipe (yield 8-9 servings)

Ingredients:
1 kg beef shank
500 g beef tendons, optional
2 L water
100 ml coconut milk
50 g evaporated milk
1 tbsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
1 tbsp beef stock
½ tbsp flavor enhancer / mushroom stock powder

Blended Spices:
8-10 clove garlic
15 pc shallot
6 pc candlenut
2 cm turmeric
2 cm ginger
1 tsp coriander
½ tsp cumin
1 tsp whole white pepper
Oil

Spices:
2-3 slice galangal
2 pc lemongrass, pounded
3 pc bay leaf
5 pc lime leaf
5 pc cardamom
5 pc clove
1 pc cinnamon
1 pc star anise

Add-ons:
1-2 pc potato, large
2-3 pc tomato, sliced
1 pc green onions, sliced
2-3 pc celery, sliced
Fried shallots
Bird’s eye chili, boiled
Kaffir lime
Oil for frying

Stir-Fried Soto ingredients:
Soto Betawi meat and broth
10 pc shallot, small
1 pc tomato
25 g green bird’s eye chili
1 pc green onion
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp ghee / margarine
Seasoning, to taste

Steps:
1. For the blended spices, blend the candlenuts, garlic, shallots, ginger, turmeric, cumin, coriander, and white pepper with oil until smooth.
2. Sauté the blended spices until oily and fragrant. Then, add the lemongrass, galangal, bay leaves, lime leaves, cardamom, cinnamon, clove, and star anise. Stir.
3. Add the sliced tendons and beef shank. Season with salt, sugar, and beef stock. Stir.
4. Add water, green onions, and celery. Pressure cook for 45 minutes, then add the coconut milk, evaporated milk, and flavor enhancer. Stir.
5. Slice the potatoes and fry until cooked. Set aside.
6. For the Stir-Fried Soto, heat the pan and add ghee. Sauté the green onions, tomatoes, shallots, and bird’s eye chili until fragrant, then add the meat, oyster sauce, sweet soy sauce, and seasoning, to taste. Stir.
7. Soto Betawi is ready to serve.

Title: 100% Sukses! Resep MARTABAK MANIS TEFLON Rumahan [Terang Bulan] V.2
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RErQc10w2kw

Pizza Martabak Recipe (two 22-cm/8-inch or 24-cm/9” pan for 4-6 servings each)

Ingredients 1:
225 g all-purpose flour
20 g cornstarch
20 g sugar
1 pc egg
¾ tsp baking powder
250 ml water

Ingredients 2:
50 ml water
¾ tsp baking soda

Others:
Sugar, as needed

Toppings:
Butter / Wijsman
Indomilk White Condensed Milk
Indomilk Chocolate Condensed Milk
Chocolate rice
Cashew
Grated cheese
Compound chocolate
Chocolate biscuit
Banana, sliced
Cream cheese
Shelled sweet corn

6 topping variations:
Milk Cheese
Triple Chocolate
Chocolate Cashew
Corn Milk Cheese
Chocolate Biscuit
Banana Cheese

Steps:
1. For the Martabak batter, combine the flour, cornstarch, sugar, and water. Mix with a mixer for 6-7 minutes.
2. Add the egg and baking powder in. Mix and let it rest for at least 1 hour.
3. Combine the baking soda with water, then add into the batter and mix well.
4. Heat the teflon on medium-low heat. Pour the batter in and swirl the pan so the batter sticks to the sides.
5. Wait until the bubbles rise, then sprinkle sugar on top.
6. Once the bubbles burst, place the lid on the pan. Cook until the top is not sticky.
7. Once it’s cooked, spread the butter on the entire surface and slice into 6 parts.
8. Add the Indomilk White Condensed Milk, Indomilk Chocolate Condensed Milk, and other toppings.
9. Martabak is ready to serve.

Title: Gurih Merdeka! Resep TAHU BAKSO AYAM & KORNET [Edisi HUT Kemerdekaan RI]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cjEpV9Uz5C8

Red&White Meatloaf Tofu Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
6 pc white tofu

Meatloaf Dough:
270 g chicken thigh fillet with skin
80 g corned beef / shrimp
2 tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
½ tbsp pepper
1 tsp flavor enhancer
1 pc egg white, large
1-2 clove garlic, large
3 pc shallot, medium
120 g sago flour
70 g beetroot, ground
1 pc green onion, thinly sliced
2 tbsp oil
80 ml cold water
55 g carrot, grated
2-3 drop yellow food coloring
2-3 drop red food coloring

Others:
Oil for frying
All-purpose flour to dust

Condiments:
Bangkok sauce

Steps:
1. Slice the tofu into three parts. Scrape out the center.
2. Blend the chicken thighs, corned beef, sugar, salt, flavor enhancer, and pepper. Add the garlic, shallots, and tofu leftovers. Blend.
3. Add the egg whites, cold water, beetroots, sago flour, food coloring, carrots, and green onions. Mix well.
4. Dust the tofu with flour, then add the dough to the tofu. Steam for 10 minutes on medium heat.
5. Heat some oil and fry the steamed tofu.
6. Red&White Meatball Tofu is ready to serve with Bangkok sauce on the side.

Title: Meresap TANPA Ungkep! Resep AYAM GORENG KRISPI & Sambal Pencit Mangga [Segar Gurih]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=T2ShDrXt5wg

Crispy Chicken with Mango Sambal Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Marinating ingredients:
2 pc whole chicken, halved
2 tsp salt per 1 kg of chicken
2 tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer per 1 kg of chicken
5 clove garlic + 3 tbsp water
2 tbsp vinegar
½ tsp pepper
2 tbsp cornstarch

Sambal ingredients:
25 pc red bird’s eye chili
15 pc red curly chili
6 pc shallot, halve
3 clove garlic, halve
1 pc tomato, sliced
2 sachet shrimp paste
300 g half-ripe mango, peeled and grated
½ tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
Oil to sauté

Others:
Kaffir lime
Vinegar to brush the chicken
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with garlic, flavor enhancer, salt, pepper, vinegar, and cornstarch. Mix well and cover with plastic wrap. Marinate for 1-2 hours in the fridge.
2. Get the chicken out of the fridge. Fry it at room temperature.
3. For the first method, bring water to a boil and pour the hot water onto the chicken.
4. Pat dry with a paper towel, then brush the chicken with vinegar. Fry until golden brown and set aside.
5. For the second method, fry the chicken directly until golden brown for about 15 minutes. Set aside.
6. For the Sambal, sauté the shallots, garlic, red curly chili, and bird’s eye chili. Cook until they’re a bit dry and wilted, then add shrimp paste and tomato.
7. Transfer to a mortar & pestle. Season with salt and sugar. Grind, then add the grated mango. Mix well.
8. Crispy Chicken with Mango Sambal is ready to serve.

Title: Gurih Manis! Resep NASI BAKMOY: Sop Ekonomis Pakai TAHU! [Cocok Untuk Keluarga]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lvLM3_um4_Y

Beef Bakmoy Rice Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g beef fillet
3 L water
2-3 tbsp Royco Beef Stock Powder
1 pc green onion
Salt, to taste
Sugar, to taste
Pepper, to taste

Filling:
500 g white tofu
5 pc boiled egg

Blended Spices:
6-7 clove garlic
8-10 pc shallot
6 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
350 ml water
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp Royco Beef Stock Powder

Add-ons:
Bird’s eye chili
Kaffir lime
Fried shallots
Celery
Rice

Others:
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Boil the water. Add the meat, green onions, and Royco Beef Stock Powder in. Cook until the meat is tender.
2. Slice the meat into small dice.
3. Dice the tofu, then fry until crisp outside. Set aside.
4. Blend the garlic and shallots with a bit of oil. Sauté on medium heat until reduced and fragrant.
5. Add the meat and tofu in. Turn the heat up, then add sweet soy sauce, soy sauce, oyster sauce, Royco Beef Stock Powder, water, boiled eggs, and pepper. Stir and cook until the sauce is reduced.
6. For the broth, season with sugar, salt, and pepper. Stir.
7. Bakmoy Rice is ready to serve.

Title: Kenyal, Lembut & Ekonomis! Resep BAKSO AYAM KEJU : Cocok Untuk Jualan.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9-LfuaEP0rs

Chicken Meatballs with Cheese filling Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g chicken thigh fillet
250 g chicken breast fillet
2.5 tsp salt
4 tsp sugar
2 tsp chicken powder / flavor enhancer
½ tsp pepper
6 clove garlic, minced
4 tbsp fried shallot
80 g egg whites
50 g tapioca flour
8 g baking powder
300 ml ice water

Filling:
MEG Slice Melt 

Chicken Oil:
75 g chicken skin
5 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
Water

Condiments:
25 g dried chili
2-3 tbsp oil
Kaffir lime

Meatball Broth:
Water
Salt, to taste
Sugar, to taste
Flavor enhancer, to taste

Steps:
1. Add the chicken, salt, sugar, flavor enhancer, and pepper into the food processor. Blend until sticky, then add garlic. Blend until smooth and sticky.
2. Add the baking powder, egg whites, tapioca flour, and fried shallots in. Blend, then add ice water bit by bit. Blend thoroughly.
3. Transfer to a bowl. Cover with plastic wrap and keep in the fridge.
4. Get the dough out of the fridge. Shape it into balls and fill with MEG Slice Melt.
5. Heat the water. Add the meatballs in and cook on low heat thoroughly.
6. For the Chicken Oil, boil the chicken skin with a bit of water. Slice, then cook until the water is reduced a bit.
7. Blend the shallots and garlic with a bit of oil until smooth. Add to the chicken skin and cook on medium-low heat.
8. For the dried chili, heat some oil and pour into the dried chili. Stir.
9. For the broth, boil some water. Then, add salt, flavor enhancer, and sugar. Add the meatballs into the broth.
10. Meatballs are ready to serve with chicken oil, dried chili, and kaffir lime on the side.

Title: Murah Bukan Murahan! Resep STEAK GYUKATSU: Lengkap Dengan Sausnya! [Bahan Lokal]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sL6xDdzz5Ps

Gyukatsu Recipe (yield 1-2 servings)

Marinating ingredients:
300 g wagyu / wagyu meltique sirloin
1 pc egg
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp black pepper
All-purpose flour
Panko

Japanese BBQ Sauce:
150 g tomato sauce
1 tbsp chili sauce
70 g onion, chopped
2-3 clove garlic, minced
30 ml pineapple juice
30 ml orange juice
2 tbsp oil
100 ml water
½ tsp flavor enhancer
½ tsp sugar

Negi Shio:
5 pc green onion (more white than green), sliced
⅓ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
¼ tps flavor enhancer
1 tbsp mirin
1-2 tsp lemon juice
2 tbsp sesame oil
1 tbsp vegetable oil

Others:
Cabbage, sliced and soaked in ice water
Japanese cucumber, sliced
Cherry tomato
Rice

Steps:
1. For the BBQ Sauce, heat the oil. Sauté the onion and garlic until fragrant, then add tomato sauce, chili sauce, pineapple juice, orange juice, and water. Stir.
2. Add flavor enhancer and sugar. Mix well.
3. For the Negi Shio, mix the green onions, salt, pepper, flavor enhancer, mirin, and lemon juice. Mix well.
4. Heat the sesame oil and vegetable oil. Pour it into the green onion mix and stir.
5. Pat the meat dry. Season with a bit of salt and black pepper, then coat with flour evenly.
6. Dip the meat into the beaten egg, then into the breadcrumbs.
7. Heat the oil and fry the meat until golden brown. Drain and slice.
8. Heat the pan. Cook the raw part of the meat on both sides.
9. Gyukatsu is ready to serve.

Title: 50 Ribu BERLIMA! Resep NASI AYAM TORI SOBORO: Versi Jepang & Versi Indonesia.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tGV7tttXKjs

Tori Soboro Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Japanese-style Soboro:
200 g ground chicken thigh
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp palm sugar
1.5 tbsp mirin / cooking wine / apple juice
1 clove garlic, minced
1 cm grated ginger + 1 tbsp water
½ tsp dashi powder / stock powder / flavor enhancer
3-4 tbsp water

Indonesian-style Soboro:
200 g ground chicken thigh
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp fish sauce
½ tbsp sugar
½ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
5 clove garlic, minced
6 pc red bird’s eye chili
3-4 tbsp water
1 tsp dark soy sauce

Eggs ingredients:
4 pc egg
1 tsp soy sauce
2 tsp sugar
1 sdt dashi / stock powder

Green Beans Goma-Ae:
200 g green bean
500 ml water
1 tbsp sugar
1 tsp salt
2 tsp soy sauce
1 tsp sugar
2 tbsp ground toasted sesame

Others:
Rice

Steps:
1. For the Japanese-style, mix the chicken with soy sauce, sugar, dashi powder, ginger liquid, and garlic. Stir and marinate for a couple minutes.
2. Add the mirin and water in. Stir and cook on medium-low heat while stirring until the sauces are absorbed.
3. For the Indonesian-style, mix the chicken with soy sauce, oyster sauce, sugar, and flavor enhancer. Stir and marinate for a couple minutes.
4. Heat the oil. Sauté the garlic and bird’s eye chili until fragrant. Add the chicken and dark soy sauce in and cook through.
5. For the Green Beans Goma-Ae, boil the green beans with salt and sugar for 2-3 minutes. Rinse with cold water and slice.
6. Grind the toasted sesame, then add sugar and soy sauce. Grind again, then add into the green beans.
7. Beat the eggs. Add soy sauce, dashi powder, and sugar. Stir.
8. Heat the oil. Cook the eggs while stirring slowly until they’re cooked.
9. Tori Soboro is ready to serve.

Title: Resep AYAM GORENG JEPANG: Bahan Lokal, Kualitas Resto! [Chicken Nanban]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kiLG8LfrdM4

Chicken Nanban Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Marinating ingredients:
1 kg chicken thigh fillet, skin-on
3 clove garlic, minced
2 cm ginger + 1 tbsp water, strained
2 tbsp soy sauce
2 tsp chicken powder
1 pc egg
2 tbsp Lily Seasoned Flour
½ tbsp sugar
¼ tsp white pepper

Coating:
200 g Lily Seasoned Flour (dry coat)
200 g Lily Seasoned Flour (wet batter)
200 ml water

Nanban Sauce:
4 tbsp soy sauce
3 tbsp mirin 2 tbsp apple juice
3 tbsp palm sugar
1.5 tbsp rice wine vinegar or 1 tbsp white vinegar
2 tbsp katsuobushi (bonito flakes, optional)
½ tbsp dried wakame, optional
150 ml water
2 slice ginger

Japanese Tartar Sauce:
3 pc egg (boiled for 8 minutes), sliced
8 tbsp mayonnaise
1.5 tbsp rice wine vinegar or 1 tbsp white vinegar
2 tsp honey / condensed milk / sugar
1 tsp dashi powder / stock powder
¼ tsp white pepper
1 pc green onion, small, finely chopped

Others:
Cabbage, sliced, soaked in cold water
Rice

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with garlic, ginger liquid, soy sauce, chicken powder, and egg.
2. Add sugar and Lily Seasoned flour. Stir and cover with plastic wrap. Marinate for at least 1 hour.
3. For the sauce, heat the pan and add soy sauce, palm sugar, vinegar, mirin, water, and wakame. Bring to a boil and add katsuobushi and ginger. Cook for a moment, strain, and transfer to a bowl.
4. For the Tartar Sauce, mix the boiled eggs, green onions, honey, vinegar, dashi, mayonnaise, and white pepper.
5. For the wet batter, mix the Lily Seasoned Flour with water. Mix well.
6. Coat the chicken with the dry coat, then dip it into the wet batter.
7. Heat the oil and fry the chicken until golden brown. Drain the oil.
8. Chicken Nanban is ready to serve.

Title: TANPA Mixer, Empuk Seharian! Resep PANADA SOSIS PEDAS: Cakep, Mulus, Anti Kempes.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zcvDpgxglgs

Sausage Panada Recipe (12 pcs)

Dough ingredients:
15 g sugar
6 g yeast
100 ml lukewarm water
300 g all-purpose flour
30 g thick coconut milk
25 g butter / margarine, melted
1 pc egg
½ tsp salt

Filling:
Kanzler Cheese Cocktail Sausage, sliced

Sambal ingredients:
21 pc shallot
7 clove garlic
3 pc lime leaf
45 pc red bird’s eye chili
1 pc green onion, sliced
50 ml water
½ tsp sugar
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp flavor enhancer
1 tbsp chili sauce

Others:
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. For the Sambal, blend the garlic, shallots, red bird’s eye chili, and lime leaves. Sauté until fragrant.
2. Add the green onions, water, sugar, salt, and flavor enhancer in. Stir, add chili sauce in, and mix.
3. For the dough, add the sugar and yeast into lukewarm water. Cover with plastic wrap.
4. After the yeast blooms, add the coconut milk, egg, and butter. Mix well.
5. In a separate bowl, combine the flour and salt. Pour the yeast mix in and stir.
6. Knead the dough until it comes together for about 3-5 minutes. Cover with plastic wrap and rest for 10 minutes.
7. Flatten the dough into a rectangle. Roll, then rest for 5 minutes. Repeat this step twice.
8. Flatten the dough, then roll lengthwise. Slice into 12 pieces.
9. Flatten the dough with a rolling pin. Add the Sambal and Kanzler Cheese Cocktail Sausage. Fold and seal the dough.
10. Heat the oil and fry the Panada on medium heat until browned. Drain.
11. Panada is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Resep SUP AYAM Favorit Satu Keluarga: Sehat Tetap Gurih.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IzsIZ4CwyXs

Chicken Soup Recipe (yield: 8-10 servings)

Ingredients:
900 g chicken drumstick, sliced
10 pc shallot, sliced
3 clove garlic, pounded
300 g carrot, sliced
300 g potato, sliced
200 g cabbage, sliced
2 pc green onion, sliced
6 pc celery, sliced
2 pc red tomato, sliced
1 pc nutmeg
4 pc cardamom
½ tsp white pepper
2-3 tbsp Masako Kaldu Spesial Rasa Ayam
2-3 L water
2-3 tbsp oil

Others:
Fried shallots
Kaffir lime

Steps:
1. Heat some oil. Add the shallots and fry on medium-low heat.
2. Set aside some of the fried shallots. Then, stir in the garlic and white pepper.
3. Add the white part of the green onions. Turn the heat up, then add the chicken and stir-fry until browned.
4. Add some water and bring to a boil, then lower the heat.
5. Add the potatoes and carrots. Stir, then add the nutmeg and cardamom.
6. Add Masako Chicken Powder. Stir, then add the tomato, green onions, celery, and cabbage. Cook for about 5 minutes.
7. Masako Chicken Soup is ready to serve with fried shallots and kaffir lime on the side.

Title: 100% Sukses! Resep ADONAN CROFFLE Bikin Sendiri: Wangi, Gurih, Empuk [TIDAK Pakai Puff Pastry]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=djpowhiRqzM

Croffle Recipe (12 pcs)

Ingredients:
200 ml lukewarm milk
6 g yeast
3 tbsp sugar
290 g bread flour
½ tsp salt
150 g butter, room temperature

Others:
Sugar

Steps:
1. Add the yeast and sugar into the milk. Stir and cover with plastic wrap. Let it sit for 5-10 minutes.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the flour and salt. Stir, then add the yeast mixture. Knead the dough until it comes together for 5 minutes.
3. Rub the bowl with a bit of oil and place the dough inside. Cover and proof for 1 hour.
4. Prepare a cutting board or a working surface and dust with flour. Roll the dough into a rectangle.
5. Spread the butter evenly. Slice into four parts, stack, and fold the dough.
6. Place in the freezer for 45 minutes.
7. Get the dough out of the freezer. Flatten lengthwise and slice into 10 triangles.
8. For each dough, halve the bottom part, pull the dough, then roll. Repeat for all the dough.
9. Rest the dough for 15-20 minutes until they rise.
10. Brush it with water, then roll it in sugar.
11. Heat the Croffle maker. Add the dough and cook until browned.
12. The Croffle is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: CUKUP Pakai Wajan! Resep AYAM BAKAR TALIWANG Khas Lombok: Lengkap Dengan Sambal Beberuk Terong.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Iw_KY_HiQWo

Taliwang Grilled Chicken (yield: 5-6 servings)

Marinating ingredients:
1.2 kg whole chicken / fillet
40 g coconut milk
2 pc kaffir lime
1.5 tsp salt
½ tsp pepper

Blended Spices:
5 clove garlic
8 pc shallot
5 pc candlenut
4 pc red chili
15 pc red bird’s eye chili
15 g dried chili (soaked in warm water)
5 cm aromatic ginger
1 pc tomato, sliced
2 sachet shrimp paste, roasted
Oil

Others:
50 ml coconut milk
250 ml water
1 tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
1 tsp flavor enhancer

Eggplant Beberuk Sambal ingredients:
5 pc eggplant, sliced
10 pc red bird’s eye chili
5 pc shallot
3 pc kaffir lime
1 pc shrimp paste, roasted
2 pc red tomato, sliced
¾ tsp salt
1 - 1.5 tsp sugar

Steps:
1. Butterfly the chicken and press it in the middle.
2. Marinate the chicken with salt, pepper, and kaffir lime on both sides. Add the coconut milk in and spread it evenly.
3. Cover with plastic wrap and marinate for 1 hour at room temperature or overnight in the fridge.
4. Blend the spices with a bit of oil. Sauté until the oil seeps out.
5. Add the water, coconut milk, sugar, salt, and flavor enhancer. Cook for a bit and stir, then set aside a little bit for the dipping sauce.
6. For the Eggplant Beberuk Sambal, grind the bird’s eye chili, shrimp paste, salt, and sugar. Add the tomatoes in and grind until smooth.
7. Add the shallots and eggplant. Mash again, then add lime juice. Mix well.
8. Heat the pan on high heat. Add the chicken in and grill until half-cooked.
9. Dip the chicken into the sauce and grill again. Repeat this step so the chicken is dipped twice.
10. Taliwang Grilled Chicken is ready to serve with the Sambal on the side.

Title: Resep SUP DAGING SAYURAN Lengkap Dengan Saus Pedas Segar! [Mille-Feuille Hotpot Korea]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fehBbEB6gVI

Mille-Feuille Nabe Recipe (yield: 6-7 servings)

Ingredients:
300 g sliced beef
1 pc white cabbage
1 pack bok choy
1 pc onion
2 cm ginger
150 g shimeji mushroom

Broth:
1 L water
2 tbsp Royco Beef Stock Powder
100 ml evaporated milk

Dipping Sauce:
40 g green bird’s eye chili
20 g red curly chili / red bird’s eye chili
40 g garlic
3 tbsp oil
½ tbsp sesame seeds
3 tbsp sugar
3 tbsp lime juice / 1.5 tbsp vinegar
4 tbsp fish sauce

Steps:
1. Arrange the cabbage, sliced beef, bok choy, sliced beef, cabbage, sliced beef, bok choy, and so on. Stack (meat on top, vegetable on the bottom) and slice.
2. Add the onion and leftover vegetables into the pan and arrange the mille-feuille and shimeji mushroom on the center.
3. For the broth, combine water with Royco Beef Stock Powder. Pour into the pan.
4. Add the ginger in and bring to a boil. Then, add the evaporated milk in.
5. For the sauce, blend the garlic, green bird’s eye chili, and curly chili. Transfer to a bowl.
6. Heat some oil and pour the hot oil onto the chopped ingredients. Stir.
7. Add the fish sauce, lime juice, sesame seeds, and sugar in. Mix well.
8. Mille-Feuille Nabe is ready to serve with the dipping sauce on the side.

Title: Resep SATE KAMBING 5 BAHAN dan Sambal Taichan
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GiHeBMG3vnY

Teflon Goat Satay Recipe (yield: 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g goat meat, slice lengthwise
1-2 tbsp curry powder
10 clove garlic
45 pc bird’s eye chili
1 pc lime
2 tsp chicken powder
¼ tsp sugar
3 tbsp water
A pinch of salt for the meat
⅛ tsp salt for the Sambal
Oil

Steps:
1. Grind the garlic with half of the chicken powder. Then, add the bird’s eye chili in and mash.
2. Set aside some of the chili, then add the mashed ingredients to the sliced meat and stir.
3. Add the curry powder, salt, the rest of the chicken powder, and ½ of the lime juice. Mix evenly and marinate for 10 minutes.
4. After 10 minutes, add a bit of oil to the meat and skewer all of them.
5. Heat some oil on medium heat and pan-sear the Satay until half-cooked. Flip, increase the heat, and cook thoroughly.
6. For the fried Satay, heat the oil and fry the Satay until they’re done. Drain.
7. For the Sambal, add sugar and salt to the mashed chili. Mix.
8. Heat some oil and pour the hot oil into the Sambal.
9. Add lime juice and water. Mix well.
10. Goat Satay is ready to serve.

Spicy Carbonara Ramyeon Recipe (yield: 1-2 servings)

Ingredients:
1-2 serving Ang’s Popomie 2 mm Ramen Noodles

Spicy Oil:
3-4 tbsp oil
6 pc bird’s eye chili
3-5 clove garlic
1 tsp smoked paprika powder
2 pc green onion, finely sliced 
1 tsp curry powder
3 tbsp creamer

Spicy Sauce:
1 tbsp gochujang
1 tbsp chili sauce
1 cube chicken powder
1 tsp sesame oil
1 tsp soy sauce
1 tsp fish sauce
1 tbsp dried parsley
1 tsp sesame seeds
1 tsp sugar
1 tsp flavor enhancer
4-5 tbsp water

Others:
Egg yolk
Chicken luncheon, diced
Spring onions, sliced
Egg
Sesame oil
Nori, thinly sliced

Steps:

3. Add the soy sauce, sesame oil, fish sauce, gochujang, chili sauce, chicken powder, parsley, sesame seeds, creamer, and water in. Mix well.
4. Add the flavor enhancer and sugar in. Mix well.
5. For the topping, whisk the egg. Add the chicken luncheon in and fry to golden brown.
6. Cook Ang’s Popomie Ramen Noodles per instructions on the packaging.
7. Prepare a bowl. Add the Spicy Sauce and the cooked noodles in. Mix well.

Title: Gurih Berlapis! Resep OKONOMIYAKI Ala Hiroshima [Martabak Telur Jepang, Bahan Lokal]

Okonomiyaki Recipe (yield: 1-2 servings)

Ingredients:
3 tbsp Bakwan flour / seasoned flour
4 tbsp water
4 pc white cabbage leaf, sliced
1 pc egg
1 pc cooked instant fried noodles, seasoning and oil
90 g sliced beef
1 pc green onion, sliced

Sauce:
1.5 tbsp soy sauce / kombu tsuyu
2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp tomato sauce
1 tbsp honey / Bangkok sambal
⅓ tsp garlic powder
¼ tsp ginger powder, optional

Topping:
Mayonnaise
Aonori

Steps:
1. For the sauce, combine all the ingredients and mix.
2. For the batter, mix the flour with water evenly.
3. Heat the pan and add some oil. Add the batter and flatten to a circle.
4. Add the cabbage in and a bit more batter. Then, add instant noodles seasoning, green onions, sliced beef, and aonori.
5. Flip the Okonomiyaki. Cook the noodles on the side, then add the sauce and instant noodles seasoning. Stir.
6. Lift the Okonomiyaki. Drag the noodles to the center of the pan and stack the Okonomiyaki on top.
7. Flip the Okonomiyaki. Add the egg in and flip again. Cook until fragrant and a bit crisp.
8. Add the sauce in with mayo, aonori, and green onion toppings.
9. The Okonomiyaki is ready to serve.

Title: Garing Kopong! Resep CIRENG KRISPI MONTOK Tahan Lama [Sausnya Istimewa]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=L3P4Vzb9rGw

Cireng Recipe (yield: 12 pcs)

Dough:
250 ml water
5 tbsp tapioca flour
2-3 clove garlic, minced
1-2 pc green onions, sliced
2 tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper

Additional flour for the dough:
150 g tapioca flour
    
Dry Coat:
100 g tapioca flour

Vinegar Sambal:
250 ml water
8 pc red bird’s eye chili, boiled
3 pc red chili, boiled
2-3 clove garlic
2 tbsp white vinegar
3 tbsp sugar
¼ tsp salt

Rujak Sambal:
1 clove garlic
8 pc bird’s eye chili
2 cm aromatic ginger
1 sachet shrimp paste, roasted
1 pc palm sugar
4 tbsp tamarind water

Steps:
1. Add water, tapioca flour, garlic, green onions, salt, flavor enhancer, and pepper into a pan and stir. Heat the pan, then cook until thick and sticky.
2. Add the dough into the additional flour and knead until the dough comes together. Divide into 12 pieces.
3. Coat with the dry flour evenly and rest for 10 minutes.
4. Heat the oil. Fry the Cireng on high heat until half-cooked. Drain and let it rest for a moment, then fry it again until it changes color a little bit. Set aside.
5. For the Vinegar Sambal, boil the bird’s eye chili, red chili, and garlic. Then, add the vinegar, water, sugar, salt, and flavor enhancer in. Stir and blend until smooth.
6. For the Rujak Sambal, mash the garlic, aromatic ginger, and salt. Then, add the shrimp paste, bird’s eye chili, palm sugar, and tamarind water. Mix well.
7. Cireng is ready to serve with Vinegar Sambal and Rujak Sambal on the side.

Title: Resep HOTTEOK Original, Keju & Ayam Pedas: 100% Bahan Lokal [Crispy Pancake Korea]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JDJROonlNxI

Hotteok Recipe (yield: 12 pcs)

Ingredients:
120 g BOLA Deli glutinous rice flour
280 g all-purpose flour
8 g instant yeast
50 ml milk
250 ml water
1 tsp salt
1 tsp baking powder
30 ml oil

Filling (Original):
75 g brown sugar
40 g toasted cashew, finely chopped
25 g toasted black sesame seed, ground
8 g cinnamon powder
30 g butter
1 g salt
4 g vanilla extract

Filling (Cheese):
35 g BOLA Deli powdered sugar
100 g mozzarella, grated
10 g white sesame, toasted

Filling (Spicy Chicken):
250 g chicken breast, boiled/steamed, shredded
3 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
1-2 pc red chili, large
10 pc bird’s eye chili
6 pc kaffir lime leaf
½ tsp salt
2 tbsp sugar
½ tsp flavor enhancer
Oil

Steps:
1. For the dough, combine BOLA Deli glutinous rice flour, flour, salt, and baking powder. Mix, then add the yeast in. Mix again.
2. Add the milk, water, and oil in. Mix and cover with plastic wrap. Rest for 90-180 minutes.
3. For the Original filling, combine the brown sugar, cashew, ground toasted sesame seeds, cinnamon, and salt. Stir, then add the butter and vanilla extract. Mix well.
4. For the Cheese filling, mix BOLA Deli powdered sugar, mozzarella, and sesame seeds.
5. For the Spicy Chicken filling, blend the garlic, shallots, bird’s eye chili, large red chili, and kaffir lime leaves with a bit of oil. Sauté until fragrant.
6. Add the chicken, salt, sugar, flavor enhancer, and a bit of water in. Cook until reduced.
7. Prepare oil in a bowl. Rub both hands with oil and grab some of the dough. Thin it out and fill, then seal.
8. Heat the pan with oil in it. Fry the Hotteok on medium heat.
9. After the dough expands a bit, flip and press. Fry until browned and drain.
10. Hotteok is ready to serve.

Title: Krispi Tahan Lama! Resep KENTANG GORENG HOME-MADE: Truffle & Seaweed Mayo Ala Cafe [Bisa Frozen]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HSGGGSOebh0

Homemade French Fries Recipes (yield: 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pc potato, large 
1 tbsp salt
Water
70 g cornstarch
Fortune Cooking Oil

Original French Fries (Seaweed Mayo):
100 g mayonnaise
5 g aonori seaweed
Salt, to taste

Truffle Fries:
1 tsp parmesan
1 tsp smoked paprika powder
1 tbsp truffle oil
Parsley, chopped
Black pepper, to taste
Salt, to taste

Steps:
1. Peel and slice the potatoes.
2. Soak it in water and salt for 30 minutes.
3. Rinse until the water is clear.
4. Bring water to a boil and cook the potatoes for 5-6 minutes. Let it cool a bit.
5. Prepare baking paper. Arrange the potatoes on it and coat with cornstarch. Mix well.
6. Heat Fortune Cooking Oil and fry the potatoes on high heat for 1 minute. Then, lower the heat and fry for 5 minutes. Remove and drain.
7. After it cools, fry the fries again until golden brown. Drain, transfer to a bowl, and season it with salt.
8. For the Seaweed Mayo, mix the mayonnaise with aonori seaweed. Mix well.
9. For the Truffle Fries, transfer the fries to a bowl and add salt, parmesan, smoked paprika powder, black pepper, truffle oil, and parsley. Mix well.
10. Homemade French Fries are ready to serve.

Title: 100% Sukses TANPA Oven! Resep CHOCOLATE LAVA CAKE: Lembut & Legit.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_1j2TKXvedw

Chocolate Lava Cake Recipe (yield: 6 pcs)

Ingredients:
100 g butter
150 g dark chocolate, chopped
2 pc egg
1 pc egg yolk
40 g sugar
3 tbsp all-purpose flour
¼ tsp salt
1 tbsp cocoa powder

Coating ingredients:
Butter
Cocoa powder

Steps:
1. Melt the butter and pour onto the chopped chocolate. Stir.
2. Whisk the eggs and sugar until it pales and the sugar is dissolved.
3. Add the flour and cocoa powder in. Mix well.
4. Add the cooled chocolate mix. Mix well.
5. Brush the cups with butter and coat with cocoa powder, then pour the batter in halfway. Cover with aluminum foil.
6. Heat the pan and fill it halfway with water.
7. Add the Lava Cake into the pan and boil on low heat for 10 minutes.
8. Slide the Lava Cake out of the mold and it’s ready to serve.
