Title: Resep BOLU GULUNG PISANG KARAMEL: Lembut & Lentur [Metode Choux Sponge Cake]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=e8gzai_UVGQ

Banana Caramel Roll Cake Recipe (yield: 10 pcs)

Banana Cream Custard:
190 ml Vegemil Banana Soy Drink or milk + banana essence
1 pc egg
40 g condensed milk
20 g cornstarch
⅓ tsp salt
20 g unsalted butter
100 ml whipping cream

Choux Sponge Cake (ingredients A):
100 ml Vegemil Banana Soy Drink or milk
70 g sugar
2 tbsp water
40 g butter
50 g all-purpose flour
4 pc egg yolk
½ tsp salt

Choux Sponge Cake (ingredients B):
4 pc egg white
75 g sugar
½ tsp cream of tartar

Steps:
1. For the Banana Cream Custard, heat the Vegemil Banana Soy Drink.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the egg, cornstarch, salt, and condensed milk. Mix well.
3. Pour the simmering Vegemil Banana Soy Drink into the bowl. Mix well, then return to the pan. Cook while stirring.
4. Add the butter in. Cook until thickens. Transfer to a bowl and cover with a plastic wrap. Let cool.
5. Once the custard cools, whip the cream until fluffy and a bit firm. Mix into the custard bit by bit while stirring.
6. For the Caramel Choux Sponge Cake, heat the pan and add water and sugar. Cook until browned, then add Vegemil Banana Soy Drink, salt, butter, and flour. Mix well.
7. Transfer to a bowl. Mix and let cool.
8. Add the yolks one by one. Mix well.
9. For the meringue, beat the egg whites and cream of tartar. Add the sugar incrementally. Beat to a bird’s beak consistency.
10. Get a bit of the meringue and mix with the yolk batter. Mix well, then return to the meringue bowl and stir.
11. Rub the baking pan with oil and line with baking paper. Pour the batter in and even out.
12. Bake at 165°C for 10 minutes.
13. Remove from the oven and let cool, then sprinkle icing sugar on.
14. Prepare a sheet of baking paper and flip the sponge cake on top of it. Spread the Banana Cream Custard on, roll, and slice.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Resep DIMSUM MENTAI & NORI Ala Resto: Kenyal, Gurih, Pedas! [100% Sukses]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MD415VEADPo

Dim Sum Mentai Recipe (yield: 4-5 servings)

Marinating ingredients (optional step):
100 g chicken thigh, small-diced
80 g peeled shrimp, small-diced
1 tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp baking powder

Shumai Dough ingredients:
150 g ground chicken thigh

Title: Resep BANANA ROLL PISANG GULUNG: Wangi Lembut Manis! [Khas Bandung]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=g71BqMR9-Yo

Banana Roll Cake Recipe (yield: 13 pcs)

Pandan Sponge Cake:
4 pc egg
55 g sugar
1 tsp SP
60 g all-purpose flour
15 g Haan cornstarch
50 ml oil
¼ tsp salt
1 tsp Pandan extract
Yellow food coloring
Brown food coloring

Mocha Cream:
100 g Haan Wippy Cream
200 ml cold water
2 tbsp cocoa powder
1 tsp mocha / coffee extract
⅛ tsp salt

Banana:
3 pc plantain / Latundan banana
130 ml oil
50 ge margarine
250 ml water
100 gr sugar
3 pc pandan leaf

Add-ons:
Colatta Dark Compound, melted
Milk chocolate rice

Steps:
1. Beat the eggs, SP, and sugar until it expands. Then, add the pandan extract and yellow and brown food colorings.
2. Add the salt, Haan cornstarch, and flour in. Mix again on low speed, then add oil in and mix well.
3. Prepare a pan lined with baking paper. Pour the batter in and even it out.
4. Bake the sponge cake at 165°C for 10 minutes.
5. Remove from the oven. Place baking paper on top and flip the cake. Then, peel the baking paper off.
6. Roll the sponge cake from both sides before filling.
7. Prepare a pan. Heat the oil and margarine, then fry the banana until browned.
8. Prepare a saucepan. Add water, sugar, and pandan leaves in. Bring to a boil.
9. Add the fried bananas into the sugar syrup, then add a bit of the margarine mix. Boil until soft.
10. For the Mocha Cream, add Haan Wippy Cream, cocoa powder, and mocha extract into a bowl with cold water. Mix, then add salt in and mix until fluffy.
11. Roll and shape the banana with baking paper.
12. Slice the sponge cake into two, then spread the mocha cream evenly.
13. Add the chocolate rice and banana, then roll. Slice into several pieces and dip both sides into melted chocolate.

Title: Kulit BENING, Udang Crunchy! Resep HAKAU UDANG Ala Resto Dimsum [100% Sukses]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bEtJRfWX8tU

Har Gow Recipe (yield: 26-28 pcs)

Marinating ingredients:
1 tbsp baking powder
2 tsp sugar
1 tsp salt

Filling:
350 g shrimp, peeled, sliced
84 g canned bamboo shoots / water chestnut, thinly sliced
3 tbsp vegetable oil
1 tbsp ginger liquid
½ tbsp garlic liquid
1¼ tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp flavor enhancer
½ tsp sesame oil
1 tsp egg white
½ tbsp sago flour

Skin:
80 g tapioca flour
120 g tang mien flour
175 g boiling water
2.5 tbsp oil
½ tsp salt

Steps:
1. Prepare a bowl and add the shrimp, salt, and sugar in. Mix well and rest for 5-10 minutes. Then, rinse with water and drain.
2. Once the shrimp is dry, add more salt and sugar. Stir until sticky, then add the pepper, sesame oil, vegetable oil, ginger liquid, garlic liquid, flavor enhancer, and bamboo shoots. Mix well.
3. Add the egg whites and flour. Stir, then cover with plastic wrap and chill in the fridge.
4. For the skin, mix the tang mien flour and tapioca flour. Stir, then set aside some flour in a separate bowl.
5. Add boiling water, oil, and salt in. Mix well and transfer to a cutting board. Knead the dough with the flour that was set aside until elastic. Cover with plastic wrap and rest for 10-20 minutes.
6. Get a third of the dough and roll into a long cylinder. Slice into several pieces @13g.
7. Rub some oil onto a clean cloth. Thin out the dough with an oiled cleaver. Press the dough in a circular manner to the left and right.
8. For the rolling pin method, roll the sides of the dough. Trim with a ring cutter.
9. Place the filling at the center of the skin, then fold and shape.
10. Steam the Har Gow with Tefal Ultra Compact Food Steamer for 7-8 minutes.
11. Har Gow is ready to serve.

Title: Resep DENDENG BATOKOK BALADO Dua Varian: Basah & Kering! [Menu IdulAdha]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lGPMYSL2XzE

Dendeng Batokok Recipe (yield: 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
1 kg beef, silverside
15 clove garlic, pounded, minced
6 pc candlenut
1 pc lemongrass, sliced
2 slice galangal
2 pc bay leaf
800 ml coconut water
½ tbsp salt
1 tsp flavor enhancer

Sambal Balado:
8 pc large red chili, sliced
20 pc curly chili, sliced in two
8 pc bird’s eye chili, sliced, optional
15-18 pc shallot, pounded
½ tsp salt
½ tsp flavor enhancer
Lime / asam kandis, optional

Steps:
1. Slice the meat thinly. Then, chop the candlenuts and garlic finely.
2. Heat some oil and sauté the garlic and candlenuts. Stir, then add the lemongrass, galangal, and bay leaves. Sauté until fragrant.
3. Add the meat, coconut water, salt, flavor enhancer, and pepper in. Cook for 1 hour until the meat is tender.
4. For the Sambal, heat some oil and sauté the red chili, curly chili, bird’s eye chili, and shallots. Stir, then add a bit of the meat braising liquid, salt, and flavor enhancer. Cook until the oil seeps out.
5. Remove the meat, then flatten and pound until thin.
6. For the grilled version, heat the pan and add a bit of the braising liquid. Add the meat in and cook until the liquid is reduced, then grill until browned.
7. For the fried version, heat some oil and fry until browned and crisp.
8. Transfer to a plate and top with the Sambal. Add lime juice.
9. Dendeng Batokok is ready to serve.

Garlic Fried Rice Recipe (yield: 1-2 servings)

Ingredients:

1-2 serving rice
1-2 pc egg
¼ pc onion, diced into ½-cm squares
1-2 pc green onion, sliced
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp butter
1 tsp stock powder / dashi powder
¼ tsp pepper
2 tsp sugar
½ tbsp flour
½ pc carrot, diced into 3-mm squares
⅙ pc red bell pepper, diced

Steps:
1. Slice the garlic. Coat with a little bit of flour and fry until golden. Set aside.
2. Heat the pan again. Add the eggs in and stir, then add the onion, carrots, bell peppers, and green onions. Mix well.
3. Add the rice in and stir. Then, add the soy sauce, dashi powder, sugar, pepper, and butter in. Mix well.
4. For the green onion garnish, rinse with cold water.
5. Serve the Garlic Fried Rice with fried garlic and green onions.

Title: Kenyal Lembut! Resep MOCHI JEPANG ISI COKELAT: 100% Bahan Lokal!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2IktyIC9ih8

Mochi with Chocolate Filling Recipe (yield: 13 pcs)

Mochi Dough:
300 g glutinous rice flour
50 g oil
250 g water
3 g tutti frutti extract
2 g vanilla powder / vanilla extract
2 g salt
140 g white condensed milk

Filling:
40 g flour
30 g butter
140 g water
140 g milk
20 g cocoa powder
115 g compound milk chocolate, chopped
100 g white condensed milk
⅓ tsp salt

Coating:
100 g tapioca flour, toasted
Pandan leaf

Steps:
1. For the chocolate filling, prepare a pan. Add the butter and flour in and cook.
2. Add the water, milk, salt, condensed milk, and cocoa powder in. Mix well.
3. Turn the heat off. Add the compound milk chocolate in and mix well.
4. Transfer into a bowl. Cover with plastic wrap and chill in the fridge.
5. For the Mochi dough, prepare a bowl and add the glutinous rice flour, condensed milk, salt, tutti frutti extract, oil, vanilla powder, and water in. Mix well.
6. Transfer to a heat proof pan. Cover with aluminum foil and steam for 35-40 minutes.
7. For the coating, toast the tapioca flour with pandan leaf until fragrant.
8. Get the chocolate filling out of the fridge. Scoop it out with an ice cream scoop until half full. Shape into balls and coat with the flour.
9. Remove the mochi from the steamer. Knead the dough. Shape it into a long cylinder and divide into 13 pieces.
10. Thin out the Mochi, add the chocolate filling in, and shape into balls again. Coat the surface with a bit of the toasted tapioca flour.

Title: Resep BEBEK GORENG KRISPI SAMBAL HITAM: Luar Garing Dalam Empuk!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PXMS0Vv9xrY

Crispy Fried Duck Recipe (yield: 8 servings)

Braising ingredients:
2 pc duck
1 tbsp salt
1 tbsp flavor enhancer
1.5 L water
4 sachet shrimp paste, toasted
50 g toasted coconut paste
35 g palm sugar, sliced

Blended Spices:
10 clove garlic
2 pc turmeric, medium
1 tbsp coriander
30 ml Fortune Cooking Oil

Sliced ingredients:
20 pc candlenut
15 pc shallot
5 pc galangal, thumb-sized, finely sliced
1 pc ginger, thumb-sized, sliced
2 pc aromatic ginger, large, optional

Other ingredients:
3 pc lemongrass
5 pc bay leaf
5 pc kaffir lime leaf

Black Sambal:
8 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
5 pc red chili, large
25 pc red bird’s eye chili
1-2 pc kluwek, optional
200 ml duck braising liquid
1 tsp flavor enhancer
⅓ tsp salt
2 tbsp duck braising spices
200 ml water
20 g palm sugar

Condiments:
Fortune Premium Rice
Peeled cucumber
Lemon basil

Steps:
1. For the basic spices, blend the coriander, aromatic ginger, and turmeric with Fortune Cooking Oil. Then, add the garlic, ginger, galangal, candlenuts, and shallots. Sauté until the oil seeps out.
2. Add the lemongrass, bay leaves, and kaffir lime leaves in. Stir, then add the duck, water, palm sugar, shrimp paste, salt, flavor enhancer, and toasted coconut paste. Cook for 15-20 minutes on high heat, then lower the heat and continue cooking for 20-30 minutes on medium heat.
3. Set the duck aside. Strain the braising liquid and spices.
4. Rest the duck for 15-20 minutes before frying.
5. For the Sambal, blend the shallots, garlic, bird’s eye chili, kluwek, red chili, and duck braising liquid. Cook until the oil seeps out.
6. Add the palm sugar, duck braising spices, flavor enhancer, salt, and water in. Cook until the Sambal changes color.
7. Fry the duck with Fortune Cooking Oil until browned. Then, fry the braising spices until crisp and set aside.
8. Fried Duck is ready to serve with Fortune Premium Rice, lemon basil, Sambal, and cucumber as the condiments.

Title: Resep SOSIS HOMEMADE TANPA PENGAWET: Gurih Kenyal Ga Kalah Sama Sosis Premium!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ys2Y2YHfqVs

Homemade Sausage Recipe (12 pcs)

Ingredients:
250 g ground chicken thigh
150 g fatty ground beef
1.5 tsp salt
1.5 tbsp sugar
5 g baking powder
120 g cold water / shaved ice
1 pc egg white
4 tbsp sago flour / cornstarch
4 tbsp aromatic oil / cooking oil
1 tbsp mustard

Seasoning and Spices (or premixed sausage seasoning mix):
1.5 tsp smoke powder or ½ tsp liquid smoke, optional
½ tbsp garlic powder
½ tbsp onion powder
⅓ tsp dried oregano
⅓ tsp nutmeg powder
⅓ tsp dried marjoram / thyme / basil

Topping:
44 g mild cheddar cheese

Steps:
1. Add the ground chicken and beef into a bowl. Add the sugar and salt in and mix with a mixer until stringy and sticky.
2. Add the spices in, mustard, egg white, baking powder, oil, and sago flour. Mix well.
3. Add the water in. Mix again thoroughly, and cover the bowl with a plastic wrap. Place in the fridge for 20 minutes.
4. Get the bowl out of the fridge and divide the dough into two parts.
5. Add the cheese topping into one of the dough. Mix well. Then, transfer the dough into a piping bag.
6. Prepare 18-cm long sausage casings. Pipe the dough into the sausage casings.
7. Evenly distribute the dough and press it with a finger.
8. Tie the sausage with a twine from the middle to the sides into six parts. Punch the surface with a needle.
9. Steam the sausage with Tefal Ultra Compact Food Steamer for 15-20 minutes.
10. Remove the sausage from the steamer and let them cool. Then, cut the links off.
11. For grilled sausages, score the surface of the sausages. Heat some oil and grill the sausage until browned.

Title: 100% Sukses! Resep ROTIBOY ROTI’O PAPPAROTI: Garing Gurih Istimewa! [Coffee Bun]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fvk18ZEYiRg

Coffee Bun Recipe (8-9 pcs)

Bun Dough (sponge/starter):
200 g bread flour
150 ml water
3 gr yeast
45 gr sugar

Dough:
135 g all-purpose flour
20 g powdered milk
3 g yeast
1 pc egg
40 ml milk
45 g butter
4 g salt

Coffee Topping:
5 g instant coffee
2 tbsp hot water
75 g butter
100 g sugar
1 pc egg
75 g all purpose flour
1 tsp coffee extract

Filling:
90 g salted butter

Steps:
1. For the starter, prepare a bowl and combine the flour, yeast, and sugar. Mix well, then add the water bit by bit while stirring. Cover with a plastic wrap and proof for 2-3 hours.
2. For the dough, add the flour, powdered milk, and yeast into Ecohome Noble Stand Mixer. Then, add the milk and egg in. Mix well.
3. Add the starter in and mix again with Ecohome Noble Stand Mixer. Add the butter and salt in. Mix for 15-17 minutes until the dough is really elastic.
4. Transfer the dough onto an oiled work surface. Portion to 70 g each, shape it into balls, and cover with a plastic wrap. Rest for 15 minutes.
5. Flatten the dough a little bit and add the salted butter filling on top. Shape it into a ball and arrange on a baking pan. Cover with plastic wrap and rest for 30 minutes.
6. For the topping, add the butter and sugar and mix with Ecohome Noble Stand Mixer until it pales.
7. Add the egg, instant coffee, and coffee extract in. Mix well, then add the four in. Mix again.
8. Pipe the topping onto the bun until it covers half of the bun.
9. Bake at 170°C-175°C for 15 minutes with Ecohome Platinum Electric Oven.
10. Once they’re done, let the buns cool before slicing.

Tomato Noodles Recipe (yield: 4 servings)

Tomato Fried Noodles:
2 pack instant noodles
3 clove garlic, grated
3 pc red tomato, sliced
7 pc red bird’s eye chili, sliced
1.5 tbsp chili sauce
2 tbsp tomato sauce
2 pc egg
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 pc green onion, sliced
1 tsp chicken powder (add more if not using instant noodle)

Tomato Noodle Soup:
2 pack instant noodles
3 clove garlic, grated
5 pc bird’s eye chili
3 pc red tomato
1-2 tbsp chili sauce
2 tbsp tomato sauce
2 pc egg
1 pc green onion
½ pc lime
400 ml water
1 tsp chicken powder (if not using instant noodle)

Condiments:
Fried shallots

Steps:
1. Peel the tomatoes and slice thinly.
2. Prepare two pans and heat some oil.
3. Add the garlic in and sauté until fragrant. Then, add the tomatoes in and stir.
4. Add the water in. Lower the heat and cook until the tomatoes soften.
5. For the Fried Noodles, add sliced bird’s eye chili in. Stir and set it to the side.
6. Add the eggs and a bit of oil in. Stir.
7. Add the oyster sauce, tomato sauce, chili sauce, green onion, and boiled instant fried noodles in. Add a bit of water and stir.
8. Add the instant noodle seasoning without the sweet soy sauce.
9. For the Noodle Soup, add the water into the pan. Then, add the green onions, red bird’s eye chili, instant noodles, tomato sauce, chili sauce, instant noodles seasoning, and eggs. Cook properly and stir.
10. Serve the noodles with fried shallots and lime juice for the Noodle Soup.

Title: Resep SPAGHETTI BOLOGNAISE: Bahan LOKAL Kualitas Resto.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=J-9p4Y0ZxAs

Spaghetti Bolognese Recipe (yield: 2 servings)

Ingredients:
200 g spaghetti

Bolognese:
120 g onion, chopped
5 clove garlic, minced
100 g carrot, chopped
3 pc celery / 4 tbsp chopped celery
400 g ground meat (chicken / beef / mixed)
80 g corned beef (optional)
5 pc tomato / 500 ml tomato juice
6 tbsp tomato sauce
1-2 tbsp tomato paste (optional)
1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
100 ml apple juice (optional)
100 ml milk
3 pc bay leaf
1-2 tsp stock powder
1-2 tsp salt
½ tsp pepper
200 ml water

Condiments:
2 pc half-boiled egg
Chopped parsley
Parmesan
Olive oil

Steps:
1. For the tomato juice, score the bottom of the tomatoes in an X shape. Boil for a moment, then peel the skin off and blend smoothly.
2. For the Bolognese sauce, heat some oil and sauté the corned beef until half-crisp. Then, add the onions in and sauté until browned.
3. Add the ground meat in and stir-fry until browned. Then, add the garlic, carrots, and celery in and cook until golden brown.
4. Add the apple juice, Worcestershire sauce, tomato juice, tomato sauce, milk, tomato paste, and water.
5. Add the bay leaves in. Season with stock powder, salt, and pepper. Then, place the lid on and cook on low heat for 20-30 minutes.
6. Prepare boiling water and cook the spaghetti for 5 minutes or to the desired doneness.
7. Heat some oil. Pour the Bolognese sauce in as needed and add the boiled spaghetti. Add a bit of the pasta water and cook until the sauce is absorbed.
8. Serve the Spaghetti Bolognese with half-boiled eggs, parsley, parmesan, black pepper, and olive oil as the condiments.

Title: Resep JAMUR GORENG KRISPI: Renyah TAHAN Lama! [Cocok Untuk Anak & Keluarga]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OTPtx8WmJDw

Crispy Mushroom Recipe (yield: 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
300 g oyster mushroom

Wet Batter (or use ready-made flour):
½ tbsp minced garlic / garlic powder
½ tbsp minced shallot
5 tbsp flour
1 tbsp cornstarch
1 pc egg
1.5 tsp baking powder
½ tsp salt
1 tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
50 ml water

Dry Coat:
120 g flour
50 g cornstarch
½ tbsp garlic powder
1 tsp paprika powder
½ tsp salt
⅛ tsp pepper

Condiment:
Chili sauce

Steps:
1. Sprinkle some salt onto the mushroom and massage.
2. Rinse with water, then squeeze it dry to remove the water content.
3. Prepare a clean cloth. Stretch out the mushroom on top, then cover with another cloth and press it dry.
4. For the wet batter, combine all the ingredients together. Add water in and mix well.
5. For the dry coat, combine all the ingredients together. Mix well.
6. Dip the mushroom into the wet batter, then coat with the dry coat. Repeat until finished.
7. Heat the oil and fry the mushroom until golden brown. Then, lower the heat and fry it again until crispy. Drain and set aside.
8. Serve the mushroom with chili sauce.

Title: Resep KEKIAN / HEKENG AYAM UDANG: Luar Garing Dalam Empuk! [Bisa Frozen]

Chicken & Shrimp Kekian Recipe (yield: 6-7 servings)

Ingredients:
300 g ground chicken thigh
150 g shrimp, peeled and roughly chopped
50 g chicken fat / ground chicken skin
1 tsp salt
3 tbsp sugar
1 tsp pepper
1 tsp flavor enhancer
1 tsp ngohiong powder (optional)
50 ml cold water
3-4 clove garlic, minced
4-8 pc small green onion, white parts only, finely chopped
90 g tapioca flour
40 g rice flour
1 pc egg white
2 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tsp sesame oil
40 ml hot oil
Tofu skin

Steps:
1. Heat the oil and pour into the green onions.
2. For the dough, add the chicken and the shrimp into a bowl. Add half of the sugar and salt. Stir until stringy and pales.
3. Add the chicken fat in. Stir well.
4. Add the green onions, egg white, garlic, tapioca flour, rice flour, sesame oil, oyster sauce, ngohiong powder, flavor enhancer, sugar, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
5. Add the cold water in. Mix again.
6. Wipe the tofu skin clean and cut into 6 parts.
7. Add 3-4 tbsp of dough on top of the tofu skin and roll.
8. Steam with Tefal UltraCompact Food Steamer for 30 minutes.
9. After it’s cooked, let the Kekian out of the steamer. Then, fry it whole Tefal Natural Force Wokpan until golden brown and slice.

Lamongan Chicken Soto Recipe (yield 9-10 servings)

Ingredients:

Oil
6 pc chicken wings
4 pc green onion
4 pc lemongrass
10 pc bay leaf
10 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 tbsp salt
½ tsp pepper
½ tsp sugar
1 tsp flavor enhancer
1 tsp chicken powder

Cabbage, boiled and sliced
Egg, boiled and halved

Koya Powder:

Fried garlic

Title: TETAP Garing! Resep AYAM ASAM MANIS: Sweet & Sour Chicken Ala Resto Chinese.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BfdfuApJAI0

Sweet & Sour Chicken Recipe (yield: 4-5 servings)

Marinade:
300 g chicken fillet
2 tbsp garlic liquid
1-2 tbsp ginger liquid
1 tbsp Cap Menjangan Soy Sauce
2 tbsp oil
2 tsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper
30 g cornstarch / tapioca

Wet batter:
9 tbsp flour
30 g cornstarch / tapioca
1 tsp baking powder
¼ tsp salt
130 ml water

Sauce:
150 ml water
4-5 tbsp Cap Menjangan Tomato Sauce
60 g sugar
1-3 slice lemon
3-4 tbsp rice wine vinegar or 1-2 tbsp table vinegar
1 tbsp cornstarch

Condiments:
1 pc red chili, large
½ pc green bell pepper
½ pc onion
50 g pineapple, diced

Steps:
1. Dice the chicken.
2. Marinate it with stock powder, pepper, garlic liquid, ginger liquid, cornstarch, and Cap Menjangan Soy Sauce. Mix evenly.
3. Add the oil in. Stir evenly and rest for at least 10 minutes.
4. For the wet batter, combine all the dry ingredients. Add some salt and water bit by bit. Mix well.
5. Add the chicken into the wet batter. Mix well.
6. Heat some oil and fry the chicken on high heat until half-cooked. Set aside and rest for about 5 minutes.
7. Fry the chicken again until golden brown. Set aside.
8. For the sauce, combine the sugar, vinegar, Cap Menjangan Tomato Sauce, and water.
9. Add the cornstarch in to thicken the sauce. Mix once more.
10. Add the sauce mixture into the pan. Add the lemon in and bring to a boil.
11. Add the onion, green bell pepper, red chili, and diced pineapple in. Mix well.
12. Add the chicken into the sauce. Cook for a bit.
13. Sweet & Sour Chicken is ready to serve.

3 Rendang Creations Recipe (yield: 4 servings)

Rendang Spring Rolls:
100 g rendang, sliced into small pieces
½ pc onion
40 g dried glass noodles, soaked
50 g carrot, boiled
50 g green beans, boiled
80 g potato, boiled
Green onion
Lumpia / spring roll / rissole skin
1 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
½ tsp flavor enhancer
Fortune Oil

Wet batter:
40 g flour
1 pc egg

Others:
Green bird’s eye chili

Rice Cooker Rendang Rice:
300 g Fortune Premium Rice
5-6 tbsp rendang, sliced into small pieces
400 ml water
6 pc whole shallot
25 g fried shallot
2 pc bay leaf
6 pc whole bird’s eye chili
1 tsp chicken / beef powder
1 tbsp margarine
1 tsp salt
½ tsp pepper

Rendang Omelette:
6 pc duck / chicken egg
4 tbsp rendang, sliced into small pieces
10 pc shallot, sliced
2 pc Kaffir lime leaf, sliced
6 pc bird’s eye chili, chopped / mashed
2 pc red chili, chopped / mashed
3 pc green onion, sliced
1 pc celery, sliced
1 pc turmeric leaf, sliced
4-5 tbsp all-purpose flour
1 tbsp cornstarch
¼ tsp pepper
½ tsp flavor enhancer
½ tsp salt
Fortune Oil

Steps:

5. Add some salt, pepper, and flavor enhancer. Sauté for a bit, then set aside.
6. Prepare the spring roll skin. Add the rendang, green onion, and sautéd vegetables.
7. Fold the spring rolls and dip into the wet batter.
8. Heat the pan. Fry the spring rolls until golden brown. Set aside.
9. Serve with green bird’s eye chili on the side.
10. For the Rendang Omelette, prepare the eggs.
11. Add the rendang and other ingredients in. Mix well.
12. Season with flavor enhancer and salt.
13. Heat the pan. Fry the omelette until the structure is formed.
14. Then, lower the heat. Flip the omelette and fry in a larger pan until it’s cooked.
15. Rendang Omelette is ready to serve.

Title: Praktis, Hemat 70%! Resep BEEF PEPPER RICE & SAUS HONEY GARLIC: Ala Pepper Lunch.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2O87dnrDWCo

Beef Pepper Rice Recipe (yield: 2 servings)

Ingredients:
1-2 serving rice
200 g Meat The Boss US Flank Beef
Canned corn as needed
1 pc green onion
80 g butter
Cracked black pepper as needed

Sauce:
½ pc onion
10 clove garlic
3 slice ginger
4 tbsp oil
80 ml soy sauce
150 ml water
80 ml mirin / apple juice
30 ml cooking wine, optional
60 ml honey
1 tsp dashi powder / chicken powder
¼ tsp sesame oil
Sugar, to taste

Steps:
1. Blend the garlic, onion, and oil until smooth.
2. Sauté the blended spices. Add the ginger in and cook until fragrant.
3. Add the cooking wine, mirin, soy sauce, and honey in. Then, add the water, dashi powder, and sugar in. Stir well.
4. Add the sesame oil in. Cook on low heat for 5 - 10 minutes.
5. Slice the Meat The Boss US Flank Beef into 2 mm thickness.
6. Prepare a nonstick pan. Without heating the pan, add some oil in.
7. Mold the rice with a small bowl. Toast it until a crust is formed.
8. Add butter, corn, black pepper, and green onions on top of the rice.
9. Add the beef in around the rice. Cook on high heat.
10. Once the beef is half-cooked, add the sauce and 1 tbsp of butter in.
11. Add the sauce on top of the meat. Stir and cook through, then transfer to a plate.
12. Beef Pepper Rice is ready to serve.

Title: 100% ANTI Sobek! Resep RISOLES MAYO Keju: Luar Krispi Dalam Gurih!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UHH3ucvAqGA

Rissole with Smoked Beef & Cheese Recipe (7 pcs)

Mayo Sauce ingredients:
12 tbsp mayonnaise
3 tbsp condensed milk / honey
1.5 tbsp mustard
1 tbsp chili sauce (optional)
¼ tsp pepper
1-2 tbsp milk

Filling:
7 slice beef bacon/ham/bacon
45 g cheese
2 pc boiled egg, sliced
1 pc green onion, sliced (optional)

Rissole Skin ingredients:
125 g flour
1 tbsp cornstarch
130 ml water
200 ml milk
½ tsp salt
2 tbsp oil
1 pc egg

Coating:
Egg
Breadcrumbs (panko)

Steps:
1. For the skin, combine all the ingredients and stir with a balloon whisk.
2. Heat the pan on low to medium heat. Wait until the pan is hot.
3. Pour the Rissole skin batter in. Swirl to even the spread.
4. Cook for a bit. Release the skin from the pan with a spatula and transfer to a plate.
5. For the sauce, combine the mayonnaise with condensed milk, mustard, chili sauce, and pepper. Stir.
6. Add the milk in. Mix evenly.
7. Prepare the Rissole skin. Add the smoked beef, boiled egg, green onions, mayo sauce, and cheese.
8. Fold the skin. Dip it in the egg then the breadcrumbs to coat.
9. Heat some oil and fry the Rissole until golden brown. Set aside.
10. Mayo Rissole with Smoked Beef & Cheese is ready to serve.

Title: Daging Murah TETAP Enak! Resep BLACK PEPPER STEAK Ala Resto Steakhouse.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aeBQnY816YM

Beef Steak Recipe (yield: 2-4 servings)

Local Steak:
200 g sirloin
1 pc egg yolk
1 tbsp flour
½ tsp salt
1-2 tbsp black pepper
½ tbsp cornstarch
3 clove garlic, skin-on and pounded
1-2 sprig rosemary
3 tbsp butter

Wagyu:
200-350 g steak (rib-eye)
3 clove garlic, skin on and pounded
½ tsp salt
1 tbsp black pepper
1-2 sprig rosemary
3 tbsp butter

Sauce: 
1-2 tbsp steak sauce / BBQ sauce (https://youtu.be/MrsaBWQX890)
1 tbsp tomato sauce
500 ml beef stock (water + beef stock cubes)
½ tbsp soy sauce
5 pc shallot
Black pepper, to taste
100 ml cream
15 ml cooking wine / sake / cognac / apple juice

Steps:
1. For the local steak, pound the sirloin from two directions and pummel it.
2. Rub with egg yolk evenly.
3. Add the black pepper, salt, flour, and cornstarch.
4. For the sauce, combine the stock with the steak sauce, tomato sauce, and soy sauce. Mix well.
5. For the Wagyu, pat dry with a paper towel and marinate the steak with salt and black pepper. Press it in evenly.
6. Heat Tefal Natura Force Fry Pan with a bit of oil.
7. Sear the steak for 2-3 minutes, then flip.
8. Add the garlic, rosemary, and butter in. Baste the steak.
9. After it’s cooked, rest it for 5-10 minutes.
10. For the local steak, pan-sear the steak until crisp, then flip.
11. Add the garlic, rosemary, and butter in. Baste the steak.
12. After it’s cooked, rest it for 5-10 minutes.
13. Slice the shallots and sauté in the same pan.
14. Add the black pepper, cooking wine, and the sauce in. Cook for 2-3 minutes on high heat.
15.Add the cream and butter in. Stir well.
16. Slice the steak after it cools down.
17. Serve the steak with the sauce.

Cheese Crazy Fried Rice Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Blended spices:

Oil, as needed

Fried Rice ingredients:
250 g rice

¼ tsp pepper

½ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer

Stir-fry ingredients:
2 tbsp blended spices

1 pc green onion, sliced
5 pc bird’s eye chili, sliced

½ tbsp chili sauce
½ tbsp tomato sauce
½ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
¼ tsp pepper
1-2 pc choy sum, sliced

Others:

Title: Versi VEGETARIAN! Resep RENDANG JAMUR & OPOR BOLA TAHU [Rp 50 Ribu Buat Berenam]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j12Wlhd_XzM

Mushroom Rendang & Tofu Balls Opor Recipe

Mushroom Rendang (yield 3-5 servings):
500 g oyster mushroom
1 tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
4-5 tbsp flour
1 pack Sasa Rendang Seasoning
500 ml water
Oil

Tofu Balls Opor (yield 4-6 servings):
500 g white tofu
1 clove garlic, grated
1 pc green onions
1 pack Sasa Opor Seasoning
2 tbsp flour
¼ tbsp pepper
¾ tbsp flavor enhancer
⅓ tsp salt
½ tbsp sugar
500 ml water
1 pc carrot, sliced
6 pc green beans, sliced
Oil
Fried shallots

Steps:
1. Add salt as needed into the mushroom and massage.
2. Rinse with water and squeeze the water out completely.
3. Add the flour in and shape into rendang,
4. Then, coat the mushroom with the rest of the flour.
5. Heat the pan with oil as needed, then fry the mushroom until golden brown.
6. Add the water in and Sasa Rendang Seasoning. Cook on low heat until the seasoning is absorbed well.
7. For the Tofu Balls Opor, mash the white tofu.
8. Add the flavor enhancer, salt, garlic, sugar, and pepper in.
9. Heat some oil. In a separate bowl, pour the hot oil into the green onions.
10. Add the green onions with the tofu mixture. Mix well.
11. Shape the tofu into balls.
12. Fry the tofu balls on medium heat until browned.
13. Bring water to a boil and add the carrots and green beans in.
14. Add Sasa Opor Seasoning in. Bring to a boil, then add the tofu balls in.
15. Serve with fried shallots as the garnish.

Title: Resep NASI AYAM MANDHI Rice Cooker: 100% Versi Lokal [Menu Lebaran]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d5G_zozSCMI

Chicken Mandhi Recipe (yield: 4-6 servings)

Blended Spices:
10 clove garlic
½ pc onion
1 thumb ginger
50 ml oil

Chicken:
1 pc whole chicken
3-4 tbsp blended spices
3 tbsp Rendang instant seasoning
4 tbsp plain yoghurt / coconut milk
½ tbsp salt
1 tsp flavor enhancer / stock powder
½ tsp pepper
1 tbsp oregano

Rice:
375 g local rice / 325 g basmati rice
500 ml plain stock / water
4 tbsp blended spices
3 tbsp Rendang instant seasoning
2 tbsp margarine / ghee
2 tsp chicken powder
1 pc lime zest or 3-5 pc Kaffir lime leaf
3 pc bay leaf
1 tsp cumin powder, optional
5-6 pc cardamom, optional
¾ tsp salt
½ tsp pepper

Sambal:
15 pc bird’s eye chili
3 clove garlic, sliced
6 pc shallot, sliced
Oil
Salt
Flavor enhancer

Condiments:
Cucumber, peeled and sliced
Large green chili
Onion, sliced
Lime, sliced

Steps:
1. Blend the spices.
2. For the rice, sauté the blended spices.
3. Peel the lime zest, avoiding the inner part.
4. Add the rice, sautéd blended spices, Rendang seasoning, cumin, chicken powder, cardamom, bay leaves, lime zest, margarine, salt, pepper, and stock.
5. For the chicken, halve it and marinate with all the ingredients and oregano.
6. Slice the chicken so the marinate gets absorbed quickly. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Grill the chicken with Tefal Air Fryer Easy Fry EY-702 on 180°C for 15-20 minutes.
8. After 20 minutes, remove the chicken and brush with oil. Grill again at 160°C for 8 minutes.
9. For the Sambal, sauté the ingredients until cooked. Season with salt and flavor enhancer, then pour the water in and cook until it’s reduced.
10. For the condiments, grill the chili with a bit of oil until browned.
11. Serve Chicken Mandhi with chicken, chili, onion, lime, and Sambal on the side.

Gai Lan Two Ways Recipe (yield: 2 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g Greenville Gai Lan

Oyster Sauce for Gai Lan stems and leaves:
1 pc green onion, sliced
2 clove garlic, pounded
1 tbsp cooking wine, optional
250 ml stock or water + stock powder
2 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tsp sugar
1 tsp sesame oil
2 tsp soy sauce
½ tbsp cornstarch

Salt & Pepper for Gai Lan leaves:
10 clove garlic, minced
8 pc bird’s eye chili, sliced
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp powdered sugar
¼ tsp flavor enhancer

Others:
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Rinse the Greenville Gai Lan thoroughly. Separate the stems and the leaves.
2. Halve the stems.
3. Slice half of the leaves for the Salt & Pepper version.
4. For the Oyster Sauce Gai Lan, boil the Gai Lan with a bit of salt for 1-2 minutes. Drain and set on the plate.
5. Heat some oil. Sauté the green onions until fragrant, then add minced garlic in.
6. Deglaze the pan with cooking wine.
7. Add stock, oyster sauce, sugar, soy sauce, sesame oil, and diluted cornstarch in. Cook until the sauce thickens.
8. Pour the oyster sauce on top of the boiled gai lan.

Title: Resep BROWNIES COKLAT PUTIH Blondies: Lembut & Wangi Apel! [100% Sukses]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WYqlxRNHHPU

Apple Blondies White Brownies Recipe (1 pan, size 22 x 22 cm / 8.6 x 8.6”)

Blondies Batter:
3 pc egg
100 g white sugar
50 g palm sugar
1 tsp vanilla extract
120 g butter (made into brown butter)
125 g Whittaker’s White Chocolate
7 g baking powder
110 g all-purpose flour
1 tsp salt

Apple Filling:
200 g Envy Apple
1 tbsp butter
¼ tsp cinnamon powder

Others:
Envy Apple, sliced

Steps:
1. Peel and slice the Envy Apples.
2. Melt the butter, then add the sliced apple and cinnamon powder in. Cook until it softens.
3. To make the brown butter, melt the butter until it’s browned. Transfer to a bowl and add Whittaker’s White Chocolate. Mix well until the chocolate melts.
4. Beat the eggs and sugar until it expands with a mixer.
5. Add the palm sugar, brown butter, vanilla extract, and salt into the batter. Mix well.
6. Sift the baking powder and flour in. Mix with spatula.
7. Add the sautéd apples in. Mix well.
8. Pour the batter into a 22 x 22 cm (8.6x8.6”) pan lined with baking paper. Garnish with sliced Envy Apples on top.
9. Bake in the oven at 180°C for 30 - 40 minutes.
10. Once it cools down, remove the Blondies from the pan.

Title: Resep TAHU KIPAS ISI Ala Resto Seafood: Garingnya Tahan Lama!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NIMm9GZXBIE

Seafood Tofu Recipe (15 pcs)

Ingredients:
15 pc yellow tofu, fried
150 g peeled shrimp, chopped
100 g squid, diced
100 g carrot, grated
100 g wood ear mushroom, sliced
50 g green beans, sliced
3 pc green onion, sliced
5-6 clove garlic, minced
½ pc onion, chopped
2 pc celery, chopped (optional)
1.5 tbsp tapioca flour / cornstarch
1 tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
½ tsp flavor enhancer / stock powder
½ tsp pepper
½ tbsp oyster sauce
½ tsp sesame oil

Wet Batter:
150 g flour
50 g cornstarch
1 tsp baking powder, optional
325 g water
½ tbsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
⅓ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper

Others:
Bird’s eye chili
Bangkok chili sauce
Fortune oil for frying
Warm rice

Steps:
1. Sauté the onion and green onions until browned. Add the garlic in, then sauté until fragrant and add the celery in.
2. Add the shrimp and squid. Stir.
3. Add the vegetables in. Season with salt, sugar, pepper, stock powder, oyster sauce, and sesame oil.
4. Turn the heat off, then add the cornstarch/tapioca flour. Mix well.
5. Combine all the wet batter ingredients. Mix well.
6. Make a hole on one side of the tofu and remove some of the insides with a small spoon.
7. Fill the tofu with the stir-fried filling with a spoon or a piping bag.
8. Dip the tofu into the wet batter.
9. Fry the tofu with heated Fortune oil until golden brown. Set aside.
10. Serve the Seafood Tofu with bird’s eye chili, Bangkok chili sauce, and rice on the side.

Title: REBUS Dulu, 100% Krispi TAHAN Lama! Resep KULIT AYAM KRISPI Saus Mentega [100% Sukses]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=06SiADa2fLI

Butter Soy Crispy Skin Recipe (yield: 1-2 servings)

Ingredients:
350 g chicken skin
1 tbsp salt
½ tsp pepper
1 pc egg
80 g all-purpose flour
35 g cornstarch
1.5 tsp garlic powder
¾ tsp baking powder

Butter Soy sauce:
2 clove garlic, sliced
½ pc onion
6 pc bird’s eye chili, chopped (optional)
1 tbsp margarine / butter
9 tbsp Bango sweet soy sauce
2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp tomato sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
3 tbsp water
1 tbsp sugar

Steps:
1. Cook the chicken skin in boiling water. Add salt and pepper, and boil for 3-5 minutes.
2. Drain the skin and rinse under running water.
3. Heat some oil in the pan.
4. Meanwhile, whisk the egg with some salt.
5. For the dry coat, combine the flour, cornstarch, garlic powder, and baking powder. Mix well.
6. Add the chicken skin into the egg, then coat with the dry coat.
7. Fry the chicken skin on medium-high heat. After it’s half-cooked, lower the heat and fry until golden brown. Set aside.
8. For the Butter Soy sauce, add some oil and sauté the garlic and onion until fragrant.
9. Add the Worcestershire sauce, oyster sauce, and Bango sweet soy sauce. Let it cook.
10. Add the tomato sauce and water. Stir.
11. Add the drained chicken skin into the Butter Soy sauce. Stir.
12. Butter Soy Crispy Chicken Skin is ready to serve.

Vietnamese Beef Pho Recipe

Broth (8-10 servings):
500 g beef ribs / bones
500 g large-cut meat
100 g gravel / tendon, optional
5 L water
1 tbsp salt
4-5 tbsp fish sauce
20-30 g rock sugar / white sugar
½ tbsp stock powder
½ tsp pepper

Spices:
2 pc onion, sliced
5 cm ginger
2 tbsp coriander
5 pc cardamom
4 pc star anise
2 pc cinnamon
3 pc clove

Condiments (for 2 servings):
100 g thinly sliced beef, raw
2 pack Skinny Pasta Fettuccine Shape
½ pc onion, sliced
1 pc green onion, sliced
Cilantro
Basil
Mint
Green chili, sliced
Red chili, sliced
Lime
Fresh beansprouts
Hoisin sauce
Sriracha / chili sauce

Steps:
1. Boil the ribs and gravel for 5-10 minutes. Remove the water and fat, then rinse under running water.
2. Toast the spices until browned. Set aside.
3. Toast the onion and ginger. Set aside.
4. Add the bones / ribs, meat, gravel, toasted spices, onion, ginger, water, pepper, and salt into the pressure cooker and cook for 1 hour.
5. Once it’s done, remove the fat on the broth’s surface.
6. Set aside the meat and gravel. Strain the broth.
7. Add the rock sugar, stock powder, and fish sauce in. Mix well.
8. Add the sliced meat and gravel. Bring the broth to a boil.
9. Soak the onion, basil, green onion, mint, and cilantro in cold water.
10. Rinse the Fettuccine-shaped Skinny Pasta under running water. Cook for a moment in boiling water.
11. Assemble the Fettuccine-shaped Skinny Pasta, sliced beef, and onion. Pour the boiling hot broth in. Serve with beansprouts, basil, mint, green onions, cilantro, lime, red chili, green chili, Hoisin Sauce, and Sriracha on the side.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: TANPA Mixer! Resep CHEESE CAKE LOTUS BISCOFF: Gurih & Ringan Di Mulut.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=themARPG3C0

Lotus Biscoff Cheesecake (7” pan)

Base:
120 g Lotus Biscoff Biscuit, grind
60 g melted butter
  
Cheesecake (all ingredients at room temperature):
425 g cream cheese
110-130 g condensed milk
120 ml cream or milk
1 pc egg
2 pc egg yolk
½ tbsp all-purpose flour
1 tsp vanilla extract
¼ tsp salt

Others:
Lotus Biscoff Crunchy Spread
Lotus Biscoff Biscuit

Steps:
1. Stir the cream cheese with a spatula to soften.
2. Add the condensed milk, cream, and vanilla extract in. Mix well.
3. Add the eggs one by one. Mix well.
4. Add the salt and flour in. Stir with a balloon whisk.
5. Combine the ground biscuit with melted butter. Mix well.
6. Prepare a baking pan lined with baking paper.
7. Brush the baking paper with oil or butter.
8. Add the base into the pan. Level it out.
9. Add the cheesecake batter into the pan. Level the surface.
10. Cover with aluminum foil.
11. Bake the cheesecake with Tefal Air Fryer Easy Fry EY-401 at 160°C for 60-90 minutes.
12. Uncover the aluminum foil, then bake again for 10 minutes.
13. Cool the cheesecake inside the fridge for at least 4 hours or overnight before removing it from the pan.
14. After the cheesecake is chilled, remove it from the pan and remove the baking paper.
15. Heat the Lotus Biscoff Crunchy Spread Crunchy with a microwave for 20 seconds.
16. Spread on top of the cheesecake evenly.
17. Serve the Cheesecake with the toppings and crushed Lotus Biscoff Biscuit.

Title: Resep UDANG GORENG RAMBUTAN: Menu Dimsum PALING Renyah.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=irD5MhuSgs0

Fried Shrimp Balls Recipe (12 pcs)

Ingredients:
200 g ground chicken / ground shrimp
200 g peeled shrimp, deveined
1 tsp salt
1 tsp baking powder
1 tbsp ginger liquid, optional
½ pc egg white
1 tbsp sago
1 clove garlic, grated
1 tbsp onion, grated
¾ tbsp oyster sauce
2 tsp soy sauce
1 tbsp sugar
1 tsp stock powder
1 tsp sesame oil
1 pack wonton skin, sliced

Wet batter:
5 tbsp seasoned flour
100 ml water

Others:
Oil for frying
Bangkok chili sauce

Steps:
1. Marinate the peeled shrimp with salt and baking powder. Let it sit for 5 minutes, then rinsed under running water for 3-5 minutes until it pales in color.
2. Pat the shrimp dry with paper towels, then chop.
3. Combine the chopped shrimp with ground chicken, salt, and sugar. Mix until sticky.
4. Add the other ingredients in. Mix well.
5. Combine the wet batter ingredients. Mix well.
6. Slice the wonton skin thinly. Slice into 2-3 parts.
7. Shape the dough into balls with hands / spoons. Dip into the wet batter.
8. Roll the dough onto the wonton skin. Press lightly so the wonton skin sticks.
9. Fry until golden brown. Set aside.
10. Serve Fried Shrimp Balls with Bangkok chili sauce on the side.

Title: TANPA Oven / Mixer! Resep ROTI MARYAM 100% Sukses! [Bisa Frozen Food]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MwCa7Xk-U8g

Roti Canai Recipe (yield: 6 pcs)

Ingredients:
280 g bread flour
1 tsp baking powder
½ tsp salt
½ tbsp sugar
2 tbsp margarine
120 ml milk
1 pc egg
100 ml oil
Condensed milk
Butter

Steps:
1. Combine the flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar. Mix well.
2. Mix the egg and milk. Pour slowly into the flour mix while stirring, then knead until the dough comes together.
3. Add the margarine in. Knead until the surface is smooth.
4. Rest for 15-30 minutes, covered.
5. Divide the dough into 6 even pieces.
6. Shape the dough into a ball and soak in oil for at least 4 hours at room temperature.
7. Flatten the dough with a rolling pin. Rub the surface with oil / margarine.
8. Dust both sides with flour, then fold as if you’re making a fan origami.
9. Roll the dough into a circle and tuck the tip underneath. Rest again for 15-30 minutes.
10. Flatten the dough slowly with hands, then flatten with a rolling pin.
11. Fry the dough using a nonstick pan on medium-low heat until browned.
12. Place the Roti Canai on a clean tea towel and press it gently.
13. Serve the Roti Canai with butter and condensed milk as toppings.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Krispi TANPA Digoreng! Resep CHICKEN WINGS KOREA [Lebih Sehat, 100% Bahan Lokal]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RS3Q60AhyjM

Korean Chicken Wings Recipe (yield: 16 pcs)

Ingredients:
8 pc chicken wings, halved
1 tsp salt
½ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
½ tsp pepper
3 clove garlic, grated
2 cm ginger, grated
1 tsp vinegar
¾ tsp baking powder
2 tbsp cornstarch
1 tbsp vegetable oil
½ tbsp sesame oil

Coating:
100 g cornstarch

Sauce:
½ tbsp gochujang
1 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp honey
1 tbsp sugar
2 tbsp butter
½ tsp vinegar (optional)

Others:
Sesame seeds
Green onions

Iced Shaved Cucumber (yield: 3 cups):
350 g cucumber, peeled
6 tbsp lime juice
9 tbsp melon syrup
6 tbsp simple syrup
300 ml water
Ice cubes

Steps:
1. Halve the wings and remove the tip.
2. Marinate the wings with all the marinade ingredients. Stir and make sure all the marinade coats the wings evenly. Rest for 30 minutes at room temperature or 1-2 hours in the fridge. Add vegetable oil and sesame oil. Mix well.
3. Coat the entire surface of the marinated wings with cornstarch evenly. Fry in the air fryer for 15 minutes at 200°C.
4. After 7-8 minutes, flip the wings and brush them with oil. Continue cooking until the wings are cooked through.
5. For the Spicy Sauce, cook all the ingredients until the sugar is dissolved.
6. Add the fried wings into the sauce and stir.
7. Fry the wings once more in the air fryer for 5 minutes at 200°C.
8. Serve the Chicken Wings sprinkled with sesame seeds and sliced green onions.
9. For the Iced Shaved Cucumbers, remove the seeds and shave the cucumbers. Soak in cold mineral water.
10. Add the cucumbers, simple syrup, melon syrup, lime juice, and ice cubes into a glass.
11. Serve the Iced Shaved Cucumbers with a lime garnish.

Title: Resep AYAM UNGKEP GORENG LENGKUAS & Sambal Bawang [Bisa Frozen Food]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RFNcUvBhKQI

Galangal Fried Chicken Recipe (yield: 8 pieces)

Ingredients:
2 pc rooster, chopped
1 L coconut water
1.5 tsp salt
1 tsp chicken stock powder / flavor enhancer
½ tsp pepper
200 g galangal
250 ml water

Blended spices:
3 pc lemongrass, pounded
5 pc bay leaf
10 pc candlenut
10 clove garlic
10 pc shallot
2 tsp coriander
50 ml oil
8 g shrimp paste (optional)

Others:
Sambal Bawang
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Slice the galangal along the grains. Blend with water, not too smoothly.
2. Add the shallots, garlic, candlenuts, coriander, and oil into the blender. Blend until smooth.
3. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant on low heat until half-reduced, then add the lemongrass and bay leaves. Sauté until it’s cooked through.
4. Add the shrimp paste and coconut water in. Stir.
5. Add the galangal in. Cook it through.
6. Add the chicken in. Season with salt, flavor enhancer, and pepper. Stir and cook on medium heat until the water is reduced by half.
7. Remove the chicken, bay leaves, and lemongrass from the pot.
8. Reduce the braising liquid on high heat until the water is almost completely reduced. Lower the heat and reduce completely while stirring.
9. After oil seeps out of the reduced liquid, turn the heat off and set aside.
10. Fry the chicken and braising dregs until browned. Set aside.
11. Serve the fried chicken with Sambal Bawang on the side.

Title: Sahur / Buka Praktis! Resep BIHUN GORENG Ala Solaria [100% Bahan Lokal]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=berUsRXaeO8

Practical! Fried Bee Hoon ala Solaria Recipe [Suhoor Menu]

Fried Bee Hoon is a practical dish you can make at home. The bouncy and soft vermicelli with various toppings can be served for kids and adults.

Fried Bee Hoon ala Solaria Recipe (yield: 1-2 servings)

Ingredients:
120 g vermicelli, soaked in cold water
2 pc egg
4 pc beef meatball, sliced
50 g chicken fillet, sliced
2 pair liver and gizzard, boiled and sliced
50 g choy sum, sliced
3 pc cabbage leaf, sliced
1 pc green onion, sliced
3 pc shallot, grated
3 pc garlic, grated
1 tbsp Cap Menjangan 150 soy sauce
1-2 tbsp Menjangan Cap Brambang sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp sesame oil, optional
1 tsp Worcestershire sauce, optional
¼ tsp pepper
½ tsp flavor enhancer
150 ml water
Oil, for frying
Fried shallots

Steps:
1. Heat the pan with high heat. Pour the oil in and add the eggs in. Stir, and add the shallots and garlic. Stir-fry until fragrant.
2. Add the liver and gizzard, chicken, and meatballs in. Stir.
3. Add the vermicelli in. Add the Cap Menjangan 150 soy sauce, Menjangan Cap Brambang sweet soy sauce, sesame oil, and Worcestershire sauce. Mix well.
4. Add some water and season with pepper and flavor enhancer. Cook until the water is reduced.
5. Add the green onions, choy sum, and cabbage. Stir, then turn the heat off.
6. Plate and serve with fried shallots on top.

Title: Resep CHICKEN MUSHROOM BAKED RICE: Gurih Tetap Sehat! [MPASI Cocok]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pg2UpO_-bUc

Chicken Mushroom Creamy Baked Rice Recipe (yield: 1 pan)

Creamy Chicken Mushroom:
¼ pc onion
8 pc champignon mushroom
Oil for frying
1 tbsp flour
2 clove garlic, sliced
200 g chicken fillet
1 tsp mustard
300 ml milk
1 pc egg yolk
3 tbsp parmesan
2 tbsp butter
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp sugar

Rice Pilaf:
150 ml rice
175 ml stock
1 tbsp butter
½ tsp oregano
3 pc cherry tomato
¼ tsp garlic powder
¼ tsp onion powder

Others:
50 g mozzarella
25 g parmesan
3 pc sausage, sliced

Steps:
1. Add the onion and mushroom into the Beaba Babycook Solo Lychee. Blend until smooth.
2. Heat some oil and sauté the mushroom mix until fragrant. Then, add the garlic in.
3. Chop the chicken fillet using the Beaba Babycook Solo Lychee. Sauté until fragrant.
4. Add the butter and flour on the edge of the pan, then add mustard and milk. Stir.
5. Season with salt, sugar, and pepper. Mix well and cook until thickens. Then, turn the heat off.
6. Add the parmesan and egg yolk. Mix well.
7. Add all the Rice Pilaf ingredients into the Beaba Pasta Rice-Cooker. Then, place it into the Beaba Babycook Solo Lychee that has been filled with water. Let it cook.
8. Prepare a heat proof pan. Place the Rice Pilaf on the bottom, followed by sausages on top and the creamy mushroom sauce. Sprinkle with mozzarella and parmesan on top.
9. Bake at 180-200°C for 10-15 minutes.
10. Serve the Creamy Baked Rice with chopped parsley on top.

Title: Awet TANPA Pengawet! Resep SAMBAL BAWANG Ala Bu Rudy Surabaya.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6vv6enFEVc4

Sambal Bawang Recipe (yield: 1 jar)

Ingredients:
6 clove garlic (skin-on)
150-200 ml oil
150 g shallots, pounded
150 g bird’s eye chili
8 g shrimp paste (optional)
50 ml water
1 tsp salt
1 tsp sugar (optional)
¾ tsp MSG

Others:
Warm Rice
Crackers

Steps:
1. Heat some oil and stir-fry the pounded garlic until browned on medium heat. Set aside the garlic.
2. Add the shallots and bird’s eye chili into the food processor. Chop, not too finely, or to the desired consistency.
3. Add the blended spices into the oil. Add the shrimp paste in, then cook on low heat.
4. Season with salt, sugar, and MSG. Stir.
5. Add a bit of water, then cook the Sambal on low heat until the water is completely reduced.
6. After it cools down, transfer the Sambal into an airtight container.

Title: Resep AYAM GORENG SERUNDENG KEMIRI. [Empuk dan Gurih]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nmiT4EU4skY

Serundeng Fried Chicken Recipe (yield: 8 pcs)

Ingredients:
2 pc rooster
2 tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
2 tsp chicken stock powder
½ tsp pepper
1500 ml water
100 g grated fresh coconut

Blended spices:
2 pc lemongrass, pounded
4 pc bay leaf
2 slice galangal, pounded
5 cm turmeric
2-3 pc red chili, seed removed
30 pc candlenut
8 clove garlic
12 pc shallot
50 ml oil

Add-ons:
Shrimp Paste Sambal
Cucumber, sliced
Warm rice

Others:
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Blend the candlenuts roughly. Set aside.
2. Add the shallots, garlic, red chili, turmeric, and oil into the blender. Blend smoothly.
3. Sauté the blended spices and the candlenuts until fragrant. Add the lemongrass, bay leaves and galangal in. Continue cooking.
4. Add the water in. Bring to a boil.
5. Add the grated coconut. Season with salt, sugar, flavor enhancer, and pepper. Stir.
6. Add the chicken in. Put the lid on and cook on medium-low heat until the water is half-reduced.
7. Set the chicken, bay leaves, lemongrass, and galangal aside.
8. Reduce the broth on high heat until the water is almost gone. Then, reduce the heat and cook until dry while stirring.
9. After the coconut releases oil, turn the heat off and set aside.
10. Fry the Serundeng until golden brown on medium heat.
11. Chop the chicken into 4 pieces. Fry until browned and set aside.
12. Serve the fried chicken with Serundeng, warm rice, Shrimp Paste Sambal, and cucumbers.

Title: Resep LAYERED BEEF KATSU: 100% Bahan Lokal! [Daging Sapi Gulung Goreng Jepang]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NibBdOqtfEE

100% Local Ingredients! Layered Beef Katsu ala Japanese Restaurant Recipe

Layered Beef Katsu is one of Japan’s signature dishes. The rolled thinly-sliced beef is coated with crispy batter. It’s even more complete when served with warm rice, salad, and Katsu sauce.

Layered Beef Katsu Recipe (yield: 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g thinly sliced beef
3 clove garlic, chopped
Salt
Pepper
2 pc curly red chili, sliced
50 g breadcrumbs / panko (coarse)
4 tbsp butter
Flour

Wet Batter:
100 g flour
50 ml milk
1 pc egg
Salt
1 tsp pepper
½ - ¾ tsp chicken powder
2-3 tbsp water

Katsu Sauce:
4 tbsp tomato sauce
3 tbsp worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp apple puree
2 tbsp pineapple puree
1 tbsp sugar
½ tbsp vinegar, optional
2 slice ginger, optional
1 clove garlic, optional

Others:
Katsu Sauce
5 pc cabbage, sliced
Goma-dare (https://youtu.be/DNS_n0V3xDc)
Toasted sesame seeds
Warm rice
Green onions, sliced

Steps:
1. Assemble the sliced beef on top of a plastic wrap. Season with salt and pepper. Add garlic, sliced chili, butter, and pepper on the left, then roll it.
2. Sprinkle the surface with flour.
3. Combine all the wet batter ingredients and mix well.
4. Dip the rolled beef into the wet batter, then coat with breadcrumbs.
5. Prepare hot oil and fry until golden brown on medium-low heat.
6. For the Katsu sauce, combine all the ingredients and bring to a boil. Cook until thickened.
7. Serve the Layered Beef Katsu with Katsu sauce, sliced cabbage, goma dare, sliced green onions, toasted sesame seeds, and warm rice on the side.

Title: Lembut, Gurih, Manis! Resep IGA BAKAR KECAP Kualitas Restoran.

Tender and Juicy! Restaurant-Quality Grilled Sweet Soy Ribs Recipe

Other than soups, beef ribs can also be grilled or roasted. The ribs are cooked in sauce for a long time so they’re tender and the sauce gets absorbed perfectly when they’re grilled.

Grilled Sweet Soy Ribs Recipe (yield: 8-10 servings)

Pressure-cooking ingredients:
2000 g beef ribs
1300 ml water
5 pc bay leaf
5 pc Kaffir lime leaf
5 cm ginger, sliced
1 pc galangal, large, sliced

Sweet Soy Grilling Sauce:

Title: Resep ES KRIM LEGENDARIS: Lembut TIDAK Berkristal! [100% Sukses]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9z6FXJMxjYg

Legendary Ice Cream Bar Recipe

Who has never heard of this legendary ice cream? Viennetta ice cream was first produced in the 80s. This ice cream with its classic shape and flavor is best consumed when you’re relaxing. To make it even more special, I’m adding a coffee flavor using Baileys The Original Irish Cream. The taste blends super well!

Viennetta Ice Cream Recipe (yield: 1 pan)

Coffee Flavor:
300 ml whipping cream
50 g condensed milk
80 ml milk
1 pc egg yolk
2 tbsp cornstarch
100 ml Baileys The Original Irish Cream
A pinch of salt, optional
1 tbsp cocoa powder, optional

Vanilla Ice Cream:
300 ml whipping cream
120 g condensed milk
2 tsp vanilla extract
A pinch of salt, optional

Others:
Dark chocolate compound, melted
Cocoa powder

Steps:
1. Combine the condensed milk, vanilla extract, salt, and cream (cold) and whip until firm and expanded. Transfer into a plastic bag and keep in the fridge.
2. Combine the cornstarch, yolk, salt, and condensed milk. Mix well.
3. Bring the milk to a boil in a pan. Pour into the yolk mixture while stirring.
4. Put it back in the pan and cook until thickened while stirring. Turn the heat off.
5. Add the Baileys The Original Irish Cream in. Mix well, strain, and wrap in plastic. Keep in the fridge.
6. Whip the cream and mix with the cooled custard. Mix well and add cocoa powder. Transfer to a plastic bag / piping bag.
7. Add the melted chocolate into a piping bag.
8. Prepare a pan / container lined with baking paper and pipe the Vanilla ice cream to the bottom of the pan. Pipe the melted chocolate on top, then create a pattern with a chopstick.
9. Pipe the Coffee ice cream with a flat piping tip (optional) in a wave pattern. Then, pipe the melted chocolate on top.
10. Sprinkle some cocoa powder on top. Repeat steps no. 8 and no. 9.
11. Decorate the top surface to your preference.
12. Freeze the ice cream for at least 4-5 hours in the freezer.

Title: LENTUR & ANTI Sobek! Resep Kulit Dimsum / Siomay: DUA Bahan Cukup [100% Sukses]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MxkTHBTS3L0

Two Ingredients Only! Tearproof Dim Sum & Shumai Wrapper Recipe

To make dim sum, you’ll need an elastic wrapper. Other than buying them in a supermarket, you can also make dim sum wrappers yourself at home. With only two main ingredients, flour and warm water, you can make bouncy and elastic dim sum wrappers.

Dim Sum & Shumai Wrappers Recipe (16-20 pcs)

Shumai Wrapper:
135 g all-purpose protein
70 g warm water
¾ tsp salt

Dim Sum Wrapper:
120 g all-purpose protein
65 g warm water
½ tsp salt
15-20 drop dark yellow food coloring

Others:
Cornstarch / tapioca

Steps:
1. For Shumai Wrapper, dilute the salt in water and pour into the flour. Mix with chopsticks.
2. Knead by hand only until the dough comes together. Wrap with plastic wrap and rest for at least 1 hour.
3. For Dim Sum Wrapper, dilute the salt and yellow food coloring in water and pour into the flour. Mix with chopsticks.
4. Knead by hand only until the dough comes together. Wrap with plastic wrap and rest for at least 1 hour.
5. Divide each dough into four. Dust with cornstarch/tapioca.
6. If using a rolling pin, roll the dough lengthwise and divide into 16-20 pieces per dough. Round it up, flatten, and roll in a back-and-forth motion while rotating the dough.
7. If using a pasta roller, flatten the dough divided by four with a rolling pin. Then, roll manually using the thickest setting and continue to the thinnest setting or the one before.
8. Dust each layer of dough with cornstarch. Stretch it slowly to get a uniform size, then shape with a ring cutter or a bowl (adjust the size to your needs).
9. Dust each layer with cornstarch so they don’t stick.
10. Shumai and Dim Sum wrappers are ready to use or kept in an airtight container in the fridge/freezer.

Title: Bisa TANPA Mesin! Resep KULIT PANGSIT Rebus / Goreng [100% Sukses]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=D7UzJG9ZArE

Wonton Wrappers Recipe (16-20 pcs)

Boiled Wonton Wrappers:
135 g all-purpose flour
70 g water
¾ tsp salt

Fried Wonton Wrappers:
170 g all-purpose flour
100 g beaten egg
¾ tsp salt
¼ tsp flavor enhancer / stock powder

Others:
Cornstarch / tapioca flour

Steps:
1. For the Boiled Wontons, dilute the salt in water and mix with flour. Stir using chopsticks.
2. Knead with hand only until the dough comes together. Wrap with plastic and rest for at least 1 hour.
3. For the Fried Wontons, dilute the salt and flavor enhancer in the beaten eggs, then mix with the flour. Stir using chopsticks.
4. Knead with hand only until the dough comes together. Wrap with plastic and rest for at least 1 hour.
5. Divide each dough into four. Coat with cornstarch / tapioca flour
6. If using a rolling pin, divide each part of the dough into 16-20 cuts. Shape into circles and roll in a back-and-forth motion while rotating the dough.
7. If using a manual roller, flatten the four parts of dough with a rolling pin. Then, roll it with the machine at the thickest setting. Continue to roll until the thinnest setting / the setting before the thinnest.
8. Dust each layer with cornstarch and adjust the shape so it’s uniform (by pulling gently), then cut the dough into ±11x11cm (4”x4”) or as necessary.
9. For the Boiled Wontons, cut the dough with a ring cutter (10cm in diameter).
10. The wonton wrappers are ready to use or to be stored in an airtight container in the fridge / freezer.

Title: Resep MIE SETAN: Pedasnya GURIH Mantap! [Praktis Pakai Mie Instan]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=65qRug6oeUc

Spicy Food Lovers Must Try It! Fire Noodles

Fire Noodles are so called due to its spicy flavor. The spicy and savory flavor combo can become a creative option for the regular instant noodles. Spicy food lovers must try this!

Fire Noodles Recipe (yield: 2 servings)

Fried Noodles:
3 pack instant noodles
2 pc egg

Spicy Oil:
10 pc bird’s eye chili, chopped
2 pc green onions, chopped
1 clove garlic, chopped
3 pc Kaffir lime leaf, midrib removed and sliced (optional)
2 tbsp chili powder
2 tsp oyster sauce
3 pack instant noodle seasoning / chicken powder
3 tbsp oil
1 tsp sesame oil (optional)
2 pack instant noodle fragrant oil
3 pack instant noodle chili sauce

Condiments:
1 pc green onion, sliced
3 pack instant noodle fried shallots

Steps:
1. For the noodles, boil it in boiling water until half-cooked. Then, add the eggs in and stir. Cook until done and drain.
2. Add bird’s eye chili, garlic, green onions, and Kaffir lime leaves (optional) into the bowl. Pour the hot oil in.
3. Add chili sauce, instant noodle seasoning, instant noodle chili sauce, instant noodle fragrant oil, sesame oil, chili powder, and oyster sauce. Mix well.
4. Add the boiled noodles and eggs. Mix thoroughly.
5. Serve Fire Noodles with fried shallots and green onions as toppings.

Title: Tiga RESEP TELUR Pelengkap Rice Bowl & Mie: Onsen Egg, Ramen Egg (Ajitsuke Tamago), Scrambled Egg.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SlCJpAttt6E

Three EGG RECIPES for Rice Bowls & Noodles! [100% Success!]

This time, I’m making 3 types of eggs you can use as a topping for various dishes. They’re Onsen Tamago, Ramen Egg, and Scrambled Eggs. They’re definitely practical, easy, and inexpensive.

3 Egg Toppings Recipe

Onsen Tamago:
4 pc egg
1 L boiling water
250 ml water

Ramen Egg (65 ml glass volume):
6 pc egg
1-2 glass soy sauce
6 glass water
1-2 glass sugar
2 glass mirin / apple juice
1 tsp chicken powder / dashi

Scrambled Eggs:
2 pc egg
2 tbsp oil
Salt
Black pepper

Steps:
1. For the Onsen Tamago, prepare boiling water and turn the heat off. Pour 250 ml of room temp water.
2. Put the room temp egg in one by one. Place the lid on.
3. For a half-boiled yolk, soak for 17-18 minutes. Otherwise, soak for 30-60 minutes.
4. For the Ramen Egg, boil the eggs for 6.5 minutes in boiling water. Stir gently. Once it’s cooked, rinse with running water. Peel the eggs.
5. Heat the mirin and light the surface on fire. Wait until the fire is out to burn the alcohol off (optional).
6. Add water, sugar, chicken powder/dashi, and soy sauce. Bring to a boil and let cool.
7. Add the eggs into a jug. Soak with the cooled marinade and cover with plastic wrap. Keep in the fridge overnight.
8. For the Scrambled Eggs, heat some oil and turn the heat off. Pour lightly beaten eggs in.
9. Stir and shape into a rectangle. Turn the stove on low heat and cook for 1 minute.
10. Serve on a serving plate and sprinkle with salt and black pepper, to taste.

Title: Pedas Gurih! Resep RAMEN TANPA KUAH Ala Abura Soba [Khas Jepang, Bahan Praktis]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ou1rCnAa37o

Spicy Naked Ramen ala Abura Soba Recipe [Japanese Signature]

Abura Soba or Oil Noodles is one of Japan’s signature dishes. This time, I’m making a spicy version. The bouncy noodles and savory spicy seasonings make this dish super mouthwatering!

Spicy Naked Ramen Recipe (yield: 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
3-4 serving noodles / soba
100 g Shimeji mushroom
8 pc sausages, sliced
3-4 pc Onsen Egg
1 pc green onion, sliced
12 sheet nori
McCormick® Black Pepper

Ramen Seasoning:
4 tbsp soy sauce / kombu tsuyu
3 tbsp black vinegar / 2 tbsp rice wine vinegar
1 tbsp sugar
1 tbsp chicken powder / dashi
3 tbsp water

Fragrant Oil:
2 pc green onion, chopped
3-4 clove garlic, grated
3 tbsp S&B Nanami Togarashi
2 tbsp S&B La-Yu Chili Oil
1 tbsp toasted sesame seeds (optional)
120 ml oil

Steps:
1. For the Ramen seasoning, mix all the ingredients and bring to a boil.
2. For the Fragrant Oil, combine the green onions, garlic, S&B Nanami Togarashi, and sesame seeds. Then, pour hot oil on top.
3. Add S&B La-Yu Chili Oil. Mix well.
4. Stir-fry the sausages and mushroom with some oil until browned. Set aside.
5. Prepare boiling water and boil noodles / soba until done. Set aside.
6. Drain and plate the noodles in a bowl. Add 3-4 tbsp of Ramen seasoning and 1-2 tbsp of fragrant oil. Mix well.
7. Top with sausages, mushroom, green onions, nori, Onsen Egg, and McCormick® Black Pepper.
8. Spicy Naked Ramen is ready to serve.

Title: Gurih MANTAP! Resep KWETIAU GORENG Ala Thailand [Pad Thai] & Resep Thai Tea.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2xAz3dNUZoY

Pad Thai & Thai Tea Recipe (yield: 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
2-3 serving KAF Rice Stick Kway Teow
3 pc white tofu, slice lengthwise
15 pc peeled shrimp
5 clove garlic, chopped
6 pc shallot, sliced
2 tsp dried shrimp, soaked
20 g chives
60 g beansprouts
2 pc egg
2 tsp paprika powder
50 ml water
Salt

Pad Thai Sauce:
4 tbsp Tiparos fish sauce
4-5 tbsp palm sugar / sugar
1 tbsp Healthy boys oyster sauce
½ tbsp Golden Mountain soy sauce / seasoning sauce
7 tbsp water + 75 g tamarind, strain
1 tbsp chili sauce / Golden Mountain sriracha

Condiments:
Spring onions
Sugar
Fried peanuts, crushed
Lime
Chili flakes
Beansprouts

Thai Tea:
60 g ChaTramue Thai Tea
1 L water
350 ml evaporated milk
Simple syrup (100 g sugar + 100 g water)
Ice cubes

Steps:
1. Soak KAF Stick Rice Kway Teow in cold water for 15-20 minutes.
2. Soak the dried shrimp, pat dry, and chop.
3. Combine all the Pad Thai sauce ingredients. Bring to a boil.
4. Stir-fry the tofu until it is browned and skin is formed. Add the shallots, dried shrimp, garlic, and pepper in. Mix well.
5. Add the KAF Stick Rice Kway Teow and paprika powder.
6. Pour the Pad Thai sauce in. Mix well and add some water in.
7. Add the shrimp and egg. Mix well.
8. Add the beansprouts and chives in. Cook for a bit, then turn the heat off.
9. Serve Pad Thai with sugar, lime, spring onions, peanuts, beansprouts, and chili flakes as condiments.
10. For the Thai Tea, bring water to a boil and pour into the jug with ChaTramue Thai Tea leaves. Mix well. Let it seep for 3-5 minutes and strain (or boil the tea with the water).
11. Add ice cubes until the glass is ⅔ full. Add 150 ml of the thai tea concentrate, 20-30 ml of simple syrup, and 50 ml of evaporated milk. Mix well.
12. Thai Tea is ready to serve.

Title: Empuk TETAP KRISPI Krenyes! Resep CUMI GORENG TEPUNG [Resep Calamari Crispy]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lXeOP5YFNWw

100% Soft, Not Chewy: Long-lasting Crispy Fried Calamari Recipe!

Fried Calamari is many people’s favorite dish thanks to its crispy texture and savory taste. Other than a snack, this dish is also great to be eaten with rice. Children will love it!

Fried Calamari Recipe (yield: 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
300 g squid
1 tsp salt
1 tsp baking powder

Wet Batter:
⅓ pc egg white
5 tbsp / 40 g all-purpose flour
5 tbsp / 40 g cornstarch / tapioca flour
½ tbsp garlic powder / 2 clove grated garlic
1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce / soy sauce + lime
1 tsp paprika powder / chili powder (optional)
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp mushroom stock powder / flavor enhancer

Dry Coating:
120 g all-purpose flour
50 g cornstarch
1 tsp baking powder
2 tsp paprika powder (optional)

Others:
Oil for frying
Lime / lemon
Chili sauce

Steps:
1. Rinse the squid thoroughly, then slice it into rings / rectangles, to your preference.
2. Spread out the head and don’t let it tear.
3. Add the baking powder and salt into the squid. Mix until it gets foamy, then let it rest for 20-30 minutes.
4. After 20-30 minutes, rinse the squid thoroughly and set aside.
5. Combine the squid with all the wet batter ingredients and mix well.
6. Combine all the dry coating ingredients and mix well.
7. Coat the squid one by one with the dry coating until all surfaces are evenly coated.
8. Heat some oil and fry the squid on high heat for 1-2 minutes. Set aside.
9. Serve the Fried Calamari with chili sauce and lime / lemon on the side.

Title: Kenyal TETAP Gurih! Resep Bakso Ikan KHAS SINGAPURA [100% Sukses, Tanpa Pengenyal]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vz-_F-WKTw4

Bouncy and Smooth! NO Preservatives & Whitening Fish Meatballs Recipe

Meatball is many Indonesians’ favorite. There are a lot of meatball types, one of which is fish meatballs. It’s made of fish, flour, and spices. The most important thing is to use fresh fish to create high-quality meatballs.

Fish Meatballs Recipe (45-50 pcs @20-25 g) 

Ingredients:
1000 g Spanish Mackerel fish flesh
2-½ tsp baking powder
7-½ tbsp sago flour
1 tsp onion powder
1 pc egg white
1 tbsp salt
1-½ tbsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
1 tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
280-300 ml cold water
Ice cubes + water to soak

Steps:
1. Scrape the fish flesh with a spoon from the tail forward in one direction.
2. Get the scraped flesh into the food processor. Add sugar and salt in, then grind to a paste.
3. Transfer the fish paste to a bowl and mix with a paddle attachment. Add baking powder, cornstarch / sago flour, egg white, pepper, and flavor enhancer in.
4. Add cold water in bit by bit until the dough becomes firm and shiny. Plop a bit of the dough in cold water. If it floats, it’s ready to use.
5. Use a spoon or hands to shape the dough. Plop the shaped dough in cold water.
6. Soak the meatballs in ice water until they firm up. To adjust the shape, do it gently with your hands.
7. Prepare boiling water and cook the meatballs until they float on medium-low heat ±5-7 minutes.
8. Rinse the meatballs with clean water.
9. Meatballs can be stored or further processed to your preference.

Title: 100% SUKSES LEMBUT! Resep CHIFFON CAKE Pandan [Gluten Free]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UEACjpKxtZ4

Foolproof GLUTEN FREE Recipe! Pandan Chiffon Cake

Chiffon Cake has a light, moist, and fluffy texture. This time, I’m making a Pandan flavor with gluten-free flour. Kids and families will definitely love it!

GLUTEN FREE Chiffon Cake Recipe (one 8” / 20 cm pan) 

Pandan juice:
130 ml water
25 g Suji leaf
25 g Pandan leaf

Chiffon Batter:
6 pc egg yolk
65 ml oil
100 ml Pandan juice
30 ml coconut milk (or cream / condensed milk)
½ tsp salt
130 g Ladang Lima Cassava Flour / 140 g all-purpose protein
6 g baking powder
6 pc egg whites
100 g sugar
½ tsp cream of tartar / 1 tbsp lemon juice

Topping:
300 ml whipping cream
Pandan essence
Fruits, to taste

Steps:
1. Blend the pandan and suji leaves with water. Strain and measure to 100 ml of pandan juice for the batter.
2. Mix the yolks, Pandan juice, oil, and coconut milk evenly.
3. Add salt, baking powder, and Ladang Lima Cassava Flour to the batter. Mix only until it’s incorporated.
4. Add the egg whites and cream of tartar to the mixing bowl and beat with a mixer. Add the sugar incrementally in 3-4 parts, then beat to the bird beak stage.
5. Pour ¼ of the egg white batter into the yolk batter. Mix well, then combine the rest of the egg white batter bit by bit with a spatula unidirectionally. Do not overmix.
6. Pour the batter into a 8” Chiffon pan.
7. Bake at 150°C for a total of 55-60 minutes. At minute 15, slit the surface with a knife. Then, bake it again until it’s fully cooked.
8. After the cake is done, remove from the oven and flip the pan. Let it cool for 1 hour.
9. After it’s cooled, unmold the cake.
10. Chiffon Pandan Cake is ready to serve with whipping cream and fruits, to taste.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Resep MIE GORENG Tek-Tek Khas Abang-Abang [Mie Goreng Jawa]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6sdlhjRE2u0

Javanese Fried Noodles are known for its particular flavor. Using spices and sweet soy sauce makes this dish taste sweeter.

Javanese Fried Noodles Recipe (yield: 1-2 servings)

Ingredients:
150 g fresh noodles (weigh before boiling)
3 pc choy sum, sliced
3 pc white cabbage, sliced
1 pc green onions, sliced
1 pc celery, sliced
5 pc bird’s eye chili, chopped
3 pc beef meatballs, sliced
2 pc egg

Spices:
3 clove garlic, grated
3 pc shallot, sliced
1 pc candlenut
2 g shrimp paste
2-3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tsp soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp chili sauce
¼ tsp pepper
½ tbsp sugar
1 tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer

Others:
Fried shallots

Steps:
1. Boil the noodles. Rinse with running water and add some oil. Stir and set aside.
2. Blend the shallots, garlic, candlenut, shrimp paste, and a bit of oil to a paste.
3. Sauté the spices until fragrant. Set it to the side.
4. Add a bit of oil. Add the eggs in and stir.
5. Add the meatballs and the white part of green onions in. Sauté until fragrant.
6. Add the chili sauce, sweet soy sauce, soy sauce, and oyster sauce in. Add the noodles in and stir.
7. Season with pepper, sugar, stock powder / flavor enhancer. Mix evenly and cook at high heat.
8. Add the vegetables in. Add a bit of water if it gets too dry, then turn the heat off.
9. Serve the Javanese Fried Noodles with fried shallots.

Title: Resep BAKMIE GORENG Ala Chinese Resto: Bumbunya PALING Penting!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=46CsR1Ma0EA

The Secret is the Seasoning! Fried Noodles a la Chinese Restaurants Recipe

There are so many varieties of noodles, one of which is Fried Noodles. This time, I’m making Fried Noodles a la Chinese Restaurants that’ll definitely tickle your palate.

Fried Noodles a la Chinese Restaurants Recipe (yield: 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
150 g fresh noodles (pre-boiled weight, 300 g after boiled)
100 g beansprout
1 bunch chives / small green onions / green onions
½ pc jicama, sliced
4 pc beef meatballs, sliced
100 g chicken fillet, sliced
12 pc peeled shrimp
2 pc egg

Seasoning:
5 clove garlic, grated
3 pc shallot, sliced
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp fish sauce
2 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tsp Worcestershire sauce (optional)
1 tbsp cooking wine (optional)
½  tbsp sesame oil (optional)
¼ tsp pepper
½ tbsp sugar
1 tsp flavor enhancer / stock powder

Steps:
1. Boil the noodles and rinse with running water. Add a bit of oil. Mix evenly and set aside.
2. Heat some oil and sauté the chicken until half-cooked, then add the shrimp and the cooking wine in. Cook for a moment and set aside.
3. In the same pan, heat some oil. Add the eggs in and stir. Add the garlic and shallots in and sauté until fragrant.
4. Add the chicken, shrimp, meatballs, and jicama in. Then, add the soy sauce, sweet soy sauce, fish sauce, oyster sauce, and Worcestershire sauce. Mix well.
5. Add the noodles in. Season with pepper, sugar, and flavor enhancer / stock powder. Cook at high heat until everything is evenly mixed.
6. Add the beansprouts, chives, and sesame oil. Mix well and turn the heat off.
7. Special Fried Noodles is ready to serve.
