Title: Resep SIOMAY DOS Goreng: TANPA Ikan & Ayam! Kenyal, Gurih, Pakai Sambal Makin Mantap!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9X_QWTNY8mA

Indonesia Shumai comes in many forms, starting with the filling: chicken, fish, shrimp, etc. This time, I’m making Fried Shumai without meat in the filling, wrapped in wonton skin.

Dos Fried Shumai Recipe (24 pcs)

Dos Shumai Dough:
150 g all-purpose protein
50 g rice flour
500 ml water
40 ml hot oil
3 clove garlic, grated
1 pc green onion, sliced
2 tbsp oyster sauce
3 tbsp fish sauce
1 tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
2 tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
2 pc egg whites
100 g sago flour
Fried wonton wrapper

Dipping Sambal:
4 clove garlic
15 pc red bird’s eye chili
2 pc red chili
4-5 tbsp vinegar
3 tbsp sugar
200 ml water
Salt
Stock powder / flavor enhancer

Steps:
1. Cook the water, rice flour, and all-purpose flour. Keep stirring until the dough comes together. Set aside to cool.
2. Pour hot oil onto the green onions. Add the garlic in and mix well.
3. Add the fish sauce, oyster sauce, salt, sugar, pepper, and stock powder / flavor enhancer. Mix well.
4. Add the egg whites and sago flour in. Mix well.
5. After the cooked flour cools down, mix with the green onion mix evenly.
6. Prepare the wonton wrappers. Fill with 1.5 tbsp of dough and spread it evenly. Fold with both hands and repeat until the dough is finished.
7. Prepare hot oil and fry the Shumai on medium-low heat until golden brown.
8. For the Dipping Sambal, blend the garlic, half of the bird’s eye chili, and water until smooth.
9. Add the rest of the bird’s eye chili and red chili. Blend roughly.
10. Add the vinegar and sugar, then cook the Sambal until the water is reduced. Season if needed.
11. Serve the Dos Fried Shumai with the Dipping Sambal.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: TANPA Cetakan! Resep Kastengel Premium: RENYAH & GURIH [100% Sukses!]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5mn4EnP9Kvw

100% Success! Crunchy, Savory Kastengel Recipe [Foolproof]

Kastengel Recipe (80-100 pcs)

Ingredients:
90 g Wijsman
90 g unsalted butter
10 g powdered sugar
2 pc egg yolk (large)
50 g grated Parmesan cheese
50 g grated Edam cheese
50 g cornstarch
200 g pastry flour
4-8 g baking powder (optional preference)
3-4 g sea salt (or 1-2 g refined salt)
10 g powdered milk

Topping:
1 pc egg yolk
½ tbsp milk
Yellow food coloring, as needed
Grated cheddar / parmesan cheese, as needed

Steps:
1. Beat the Wijsman, butter, and powdered sugar until pale and expanded.
2. Add the yolk in one by one. Mix again for a moment.
3. Combine the flour, cornstarch, baking powder, salt, and powdered milk. Mix evenly and sift into the butter mix. Fold with spatula, only until the dough is well-incorporated.
4. Add the grated Edam and Parmesan cheese. Mix with hands.
5. If using grated Cheddar, keep the grated Cheddar in the fridge for 2-3 days, unopened, to let it dry.
6. Roll the dough to a thickness of ±0.5 cm. Slice the dough to a length of 5 cm or to your preference.
7. Brush with the egg wash and milk and sprinkle with grated cheese. Then, push the cheese in with a scraper / spatula so it sticks.
8. Slice the dough as wide as ±1 cm or to your preference. Make sure the size and width are uniform.
9. Transfer the sliced dough to a tray with a baking paper on. Space them evenly and bake at 140°C for 40-50 minutes, depending on the size.
10. After they cool down, store the Kastengel in an airtight container.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Resep Ayam Geprek Jadi JUMBO: Lebih Krispi, Gurih, Pedas!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vLtyXxyUSjQ

Crispy, Savory, Spicy! XXL Chicken Geprek Recipe

Chicken Geprek is a favorite of many people in Indonesia. It comes in many varieties. This time, I’m making a crispy XXL Chicken with spicy Geprek Sambal.

XXL Chicken Geprek Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
1 pair chicken breast fillet
Water, as needed
1 pack Kobe Tepung Bumbu Putih (Kobe White Seasoned Flour)

Geprek Sambal:
20 pc red bird’s eye chili
3-4 clove garlic
2 g shrimp paste, roasted
50-80 ml hot oil
½ tsp salt
¾ tsp flavor enhancer

Others:
Rice
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Halve the breast fillet and slice each into three continuous sections. Cover with a plastic wrap and pound with a rolling pin.
2. Soak the chicken in water, as needed.
3. Prepare the Kobe White Seasoned Flour in a large bowl. Coat the wet chicken with the flour evenly. (The flour should be dry. Do not mix with water)
4. Prepare hot oil. Lower the heat, then fry the chicken until golden brown.
5. For the Geprek Sambal, mash garlic, shrimp paste, and salt until smooth on a stone bowl. Add the bird’s eye chili and flavor enhancer. Mash to the desired texture, then pour the hot oil in. Stir.
6. Mash the fried chicken with Sambal.
7. Serve XXL Chicken Geprek with rice.

Title: DIREBUS Supaya Renyah! Resep TERI KRISPI Tahan Lama.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8h3NmyTBpbw

Long-Lastingly Crispy! Crispy Anchovies Recipe

Aside from its delicious taste, anchovies also contain high nutritions. This time, I’m making Crispy Anchovies that’s great to be consumed with rice, noodles, and other dishes.

Crispy Anchovies Recipe (yield 200 g)

Ingredients:
200 g Medan anchovy
1 tsp flavor enhancer
1 tbsp vinegar
50 g rice flour
50 g tapioca flour
1 tsp baking powder

Others:
5 clove garlic, thinly sliced
5 pc Kaffir lime leaf, sliced
10 pc bird’s eye chili, sliced
¼ tsp flavor enhancer
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Boil the anchovies with water, flavor enhancer, and vinegar for 5-7 minutes. Set aside.
2. Mix the rice flour, tapioca flour, and baking powder. Add the anchovies in and coat evenly.
3. Sift the excess flour and fry the anchovies in hot oil on medium heat until a quarter of the way to crispy. Then, lower the heat and cook for ±15 minutes.
4. Combine the bird’s eye chili, garlic, and flavor enhancer. Then, coat with flour and add to the pan with the half-crisp anchovies.
5. Add lime leaves. Fry until crispy and set aside.
6. Add flavor enhancer or flavorings, to taste.
7. Crispy Anchovies is ready to serve or be kept in an airtight container.

Title: Tips Pasti Lembut & Mulus! Resep OMELET TELUR JAMUR Ala Hotel [Bahan Rumahan]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LrzLVsw-eZk

Tips on Making Soft, Fluffy Omelette! Mushroom Omelette Recipe

Omelette comes in many shapes and forms. This time, I’m making an omelette filled with mushroom and cheese. Kids and family will love it!

Mushroom Omelette Recipe (yield 1 serving)

Ingredients:
3-4 pc egg
6 pc champignon mushroom, sliced
¼ pc onion, sliced
1-2 tbsp butter (optional)
1 tbsp chopped parsley
3 tbsp mozzarella cheese
1 tbsp parmesan cheese
1 tsp chili powder
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
1-2 tbsp milk (optional)

Condiments:
1 fistful rocket
4 pc cherry tomato, sliced
1 tbsp balsamic vinegar
2 tbsp olive oil
Salt
Black pepper
Chives, sliced

Steps:
1. Heat some oil and sauté mushroom until fragrant. Add the onion in and sauté until fragrant. Season with salt, pepper, and add the butter in. Set aside.
2. Lightly beat the eggs and milk.
3. Heat some oil. Make sure the pan is hot, then lower the heat, pour the eggs in, and stir.
4. After it’s half-cooked, add the mushroom filling at the center. Add the mozzarella and parmesan, chopped parsley, pepper, and chili powder. Fold and flip the omelette.
5. For the salad, soak the rocket in ice water. Set aside and mix with cherry tomatoes. Dress with the olive oil, balsamic vinegar, salt, and black pepper. Toss well.
6. Serve the Mushroom Omelette with sliced chives and salad as condiments.

Title: Resep SEBLAK KWETIAU: Kenyal Kenyal Pedas Nampol!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w5GFqbmdOrE

Seblak Kway Teow Recipe: Bouncy Bouncy Spicy Yummy!

Seblak is a signature Bandung dish. Seblak filling is identical with soaked Krupuk but this time, I’m replacing that with Kway Teow. It’s spicy and savory, completed with tender Chicken Feet. It’s definitely mouthwatering.

Seblak Kway Teow Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
1-½ serving fresh Kway Teow
4 pc beef meatball, sliced
2 pc egg
2 pc green onion, sliced diagonally
1 fistful water spinach
1 fistful lemon basil (optional)
10 pc red bird’s eye chili, sliced
2 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce (optional)
1-2 tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
1 tsp pepper
2 tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
1 L water

Chicken feet:
200 g chicken feet
2 L water
2 tbsp vinegar
1 tsp salt

Blended spices:
6 pc shallot
6 clove garlic
3 pc candlenut
4 g shrimp paste
3-4 pc aromatic ginger
8 pc red bird’s eye chili
1 tsp whole white pepper
1 tbsp chili powder
75 ml oil

Steps:
1. Boil the chicken feet with water, salt, and vinegar until cooked and tender for ±30-50 minutes.
2. Blend all the spices and sauté on medium heat. Add the white part of green onion and cook until fragrant.
3. Add the meatballs and sliced bird’s eye chili. Cook until reduced, then add the water in.
4. Season with chili sauce, oyster sauce, salt, sugar, pepper, and stock powder / flavor enhancer.
5. Add the egg as you stir. Add the boiled chicken feet and kway teow, then place the lid on and cook until done.
6. Add the green part of the green onion, water spinach, and lemon basil. Stir and turn the heat off.
7. Seblak Kway Teow is ready to serve.

Title: Dijamin Nambah! Resep Nasi Goreng Cabai Hijau Ala Restoran Solaria [Versi Praktis]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hJ-ScoYOiAs

You’ll Get Hooked! Green Chili Fried Rice Recipe

This time, I’m making Green Chili Fried Rice with braised beef as the topping. It can be a great option for your daily menu.

Green Chili Fried Rice Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
2 serving rice
1 pc egg
100 g braised beef, sliced (https://youtu.be/3dADkm6MlTY)

Blended Spices:
5 pc shallots
5 clove garlic
1 pc candlenut
4 gr shrimp paste
1 pc tomato
2 pc green chili
75 ml oil

Sliced ingredients:
2 pc green chili, chopped
30 gr green bird’s eye chili, chopped
1 pc green onion, sliced
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1-1.5 tbsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
¾ tsp flavor enhancer
¾ tsp salt

Condiments:
2 pc green chili, sliced
2 tbsp fried shallots

Steps:
1. Blend the spices and sauté until it becomes oily. Set it aside and add the egg in. Stir, and add the chopped green chili and bird’s eye chili. Cook until fragrant.
2. Add the green onions and sliced braised beef. Stir well.
3. Add the rice in and season with oyster sauce, sugar, salt, pepper, and stock powder / flavor enhancer. Stir well.

Title: PRAKTIS Kualitas HOTEL! Resep Puding Karamel [Cocok Untuk Anak]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w--JKHK5Roo

Soft and Melts in Your Mouth! Caramel Pudding Recipe

Caramel Pudding Recipe (yield 5 cups)

Caramel:
80 g sugar
50 g water

Pudding:
2 pc egg yolk
500 ml Ultra Milk Full Cream
40-45 g sugar
¼ tsp salt
1 g agar powder
5-6 g jelly powder
¼ tsp vanilla extract

Steps:
1. Heat the sugar and water. Do not stir and cook to light brown until it is caramelized.
2. Pour the caramel into the pudding mold.
3. Add 3-4 tbsp of water to the rest of the caramel in the pan, then cook until the caramel and the water are incorporated.
4. Beat eggs with a balloon whisk. Set aside.
5. Bring the milk, agar powder, jelly powder, salt, and sugar to a boil.
6. Pour the milk bit by bit into the beaten eggs. Keep stirring.
7. Add vanilla extract and bring the pudding to a simmer once more.
8. Pour the pudding into the molds.
9. Let it set.
10. De-mold the pudding.
11. Caramel Pudding is ready to serve with caramel sauce poured on top.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Empuk Pedas Wangi! Resep Daging Cabai Hijau Kualitas Restoran.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3dADkm6MlTY

Tender & Spicy! Green Chili Beef Recipe [ala Restaurant]

Beef can be made into a variety of dishes. One of which is Green Chili Beef. The tender beef texture is great combined with the spicy and savory green chili sambal. It’s even better to serve this with warm rice.

Green Chili Beef (yield: 6 servings)

Ingredients:
600 g beef shank

Blended Spices:
6 pc shallots
10 clove garlic
2 pc candlenut
4 cm galangal
2 cm turmeric
3 cm ginger
100 ml oil
 
Other ingredients:
6 pc bay leaf
1 pc lemongrass, pounded
100 g palm sugar
2 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tsp salt
2 tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
1 tsp pepper
±1500 ml water

Green Chili Sambal:
5-6 pc shallot
10 clove garlic
1-2 pc / 4-8 g shrimp paste
100 ml oil
2 pc green tomato
20 pc green bird’s eye chili, chopped
8 pc green chili, chopped
4 pc habanero, chopped
1-2 tsp salt
¾ tbsp sugar
¾ tsp flavor enhancer
¼ tsp pepper

Others:
8-10 pc green bird’s eye chili, sliced

Steps:
1. Blend the spices and sauté with bay leaves and lemongrass until reduced.
2. Add the beef in and cook until it’s browned. Stir well, then add water, sweet soy sauce, palm sugar, salt, pepper, and stock powder / flavor enhancer. Cook until tender for ±1 hour. If the braising liquid is reduced, add more water as necessary.
3. After the beef is tender, set aside and let it cool. Then, slice the beef thinly.
4. For the Green Chili, blend the shallots, garlic, shrimp paste, green tomato, and oil until smooth.
5. Sautè the blended spices until half-reduced. Then, add the chopped green chili and sauté until reduced with low heat while stirring.
6. Add the sliced beef. Season with sugar, salt, pepper, and flavor enhancer.
7. Add the sliced bird’s eye chili, to taste. Turn the heat off and plate.
8. Green Chili Beef is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Soft and Fluffy! Chicken Mushroom Steamed Buns Recipe

Steamed buns (Bakpao in Indonesian) comes from Hokkian language, Bak (meaning meat) and Pao (meaning wrapped). So, Bakpao is buns with meat filling. This Chinese dish is widely available in Indonesia with various fillings.

Title: Minyak SEDIKIT Saja! Resep Fu Yung Hai Sayuran [Kualitas Restoran]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BYomVFlluMY

Practical and Tasty! Egg Foo Young ala Restaurant Recipe [Vegetable Egg Foo Young]

Eggs are one of the most easily sourced ingredients and they’re quite inexpensive. Egg Foo Young can be an option for your family at home. The filling can be adjusted to your preference, too.

Egg Foo Young Recipe (yield: 2-3 serving)

Ingredients:
3 pc egg
¼ pc onion, sliced
1 clove garlic, minced
1 pc green onion, chopped
1 tbsp oil
3 tbsp cornstarch
5 pc Champignon mushroom, chopped
2 pc cabbage leaf, sliced
½ pc carrots, chopped
½ tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp flavor enhancer
¼ tsp pepper

Gravy Sauce:
1 block instant chicken stock
1 block instant beef stock
1 tsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp soy sauce
¾ tbsp sugar
1-2 tbsp cornstarch
½ tbsp butter
400 ml water

Others:
2 pc cabbage leaf, sliced
1 pc green onion, sliced
5 pc bird’s eye chili, sliced

Steps:
1. Beat the egg with minced garlic. Add the green onion, onion, mushroom, cabbage, and carrot, then season with pepper, salt, sugar, and flavor enhancer. Next, add the cornstarch in and mix well.
2. Heat a nonstick pan with a bit of oil. Pour the necessary amount of batter in and cook on both sides until browned. Set aside.
3. For the gravy sauce, combine all the ingredients save for the butter.
4. Cook the sauce until thickened, then add the butter in and turn the heat off.
5. Arrange the sliced cabbage, green onion, and bird’s eye chili at the bottom of the plate. Place the Egg Foo Young on top and pour the gravy sauce in. Garnish with green onions.
6. Egg Foo Young is ready to serve.

Title: Praktis Praktis Nikmat! Resep Roti Piza & Roti Tuna Pedas [feat. Willgoz]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=n7sl09uD9q8

Transfiguring a Bread into a Pizza! Recipe ala Willgoz

Are you tired of eating bread? Try making it like these. It’s great for breakfast or as a snack as you relax with family at home.

Bread Pizza and Tuna Melt Toast (yield: 2 servings)

Bread Pizza:
2 slice bread, diced
2 pc egg
1 tbsp butter
2 clove garlic, minced
2 tbsp tomato sauce
2 tbsp mayonnaise
40 g easy melt cheddar cheese
5 pc salami
4 pc champignon mushroom, sliced
1 tbsp chopped parsley
Salt, pepper, flavor enhancer to taste

Tuna Melt Toast:
2 slice bread
¼ can tuna
1 tbsp mayonnaise
1 pc cheese slice
1 pc green onion, sliced
1 tbsp chili sauce

Steps:
1. For the Bread Pizza, melt the butter and add the minced garlic. Cook slowly on low heat.
2. Place the bread, ½ of the egg, butter, and cooked garlic in a bowl. Let it soak.
3. Heat a bit of oil and sauté the mushroom until browned. Season with salt, pepper, and flavor enhancer to taste. Then, add the salami.
4. Pour the bread mix into the pan. Cook on low heat until the bottom part is browned.
5. Flip the pizza. Add the beaten egg and cook again on low heat.
6. Brush the top with tomato sauce and add sautéd mushroom, mayonnaise, grated cheese, and salami. Place the lid on and cook until the cheese melts or use a torch.
7. Remove from the pan and slice into 4 slices.
8. For the Tuna Melt Toast, grab one slice of bread and place the tuna, mayonnaise, green onion, and chili sauce. Top with the other slice of bread.
9. Heat the pan and add a bit of oil. Sear the bread on medium heat until both sides are browned.
10. Remove the bread and slice into 4 slices.
11. Bread Pizza and Tuna Melt Toast are ready to serve.

Title: TUJUH Menit Jadi! Resep Ayam Kemangi Pad Kra Pao [ASLI Dari Thailand]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rkKCJyLmiog

Aromatic and Savory! Thai Chicken Basil Recipe [Pad Kra Pao]

Thai Chicken Basil or Pad Kra Pao has a unique flavor profile. It is a combination of chicken with savory sauces and a lovely aroma from basil / lemon basil. It’s tasty with warm rice and fried egg.

Thai Chicken Basil Recipe (yield: 2-3 serving)

Ingredients:
250 g ground chicken thigh
6 clove garlic, chopped
10 pc green bird’s eye chili, chopped
4 pc curly red chili, sliced
80 g lemon basil / 2 fistful basil
4 tbsp oil

Optional ingredient:
12 pc small shallot

Sauces:
1-½ tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp dark soy sauce
1-½ tbsp fish sauce
2 tbsp sugar
1 tsp mushroom stock powder

Others:
1 lime
Warm rice
Egg

Steps:
1. Heat some oil and sauté the chopped garlic and bird’s eye chili until fragrant. Add the chicken in and stir.
2. Add the oyster sauce, dark soy sauce, fish sauce, sugar, mushroom stock powder, red chili, and shallots. Stir.
3. Add the lemon basil in. Turn the heat off and stir.
4. For the condiment, fry the egg over easy or to your preference.
5. Serve Thai Chicken Basil with warm rice, fried egg, and lime juice to finish.

Title: Bikin Nagih! Resep TAHU Telur Asin [Khas IRVINS Salted Egg Singapura].
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yrbh2_HId8I

Creamy! Salted Egg Tofu a la Irvins Salted Egg Recipe

Food seasoned with salted egg is loved by many people. It’s mostly paired with chicken in a rice bowl. This time, I’m making a budget-friendly version using tofu with flavors that’s on par with restaurants.

Salted Egg Tofu Recipe (yield: 2-3 serving)

Ingredients:
2 pc large white tofu, diced
1 pc egg
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp flavor enhancer
¼ tsp pepper
100 g cornstarch

Salted Egg Sauce:
2 clove garlic, minced
5-8 pc bird’s eye chili, sliced
2 pc salted egg yolk, steamed
16 pc curry leaf
2 tbsp oil
4 tbsp evaporated milk
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp flavor enhancer
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp butter

Others:
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Break an egg in a bowl and season with salt, pepper, and flavor enhancer. Beat the egg and add the diced tofu in. Mix well.
2. Drain the egg and coat with the cornstarch until the surface is well-coated. Let it sit for 1 minute so the cornstarch sticks well.
3. Fry the tofu in hot oil until golden. Set aside. To make it extra crispy, fry it once more.
4. To make the Salted Egg sauce, heat some oil and add the salted egg yolk and mash it. Cook until frothy.
5. Add the garlic, bird’s eye chili, and curry leaves in. Cook until yellowed, then add butter and evaporated milk. Cook for a bit.
6. Add the fried tofu in. Season with salt, pepper, and flavor enhancer.
7. Salted Egg Tofu is ready to serve.

Title: Resep Ayam Goreng Rempah TANPA Ungkep: Gurih Sampai Ke Tulang!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_BwxOkFGnfc

Herb Fried Chicken Recipe NO Braising: Savory to the Bones!

Chicken is an easy ingredient to cook into various dishes, one of which is Herb Fried Chicken. The tender meat and herb-y spices are the best to be enjoyed with warm rice.

Herb Fried Chicken Recipe (10 pcs)

Ingredients:
10 pc chicken drumstick
1 tbsp vinegar
1 tbsp coconut milk
2 tsp salt
1 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp pepper

Blended Herbs & Spices:
2 pc lemongrass
4 cm ginger
3 pc Kaffir lime leaf
2 cm turmeric
2 tsp toasted coriander
2 tsp cumin
5 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
1 pc large red chili
150 ml water

Coating:
1 pc egg
2-3 tbsp cornstarch
2-3 tbsp rice flour

Others:
Oil for frying

Langkah:
1. Add the herbs and spices to a blender. Blend until smooth.
2. Strain and squeeze the blended spices. Pour into a bowl with the chicken inside. Add coconut milk, vinegar, salt, chicken powder, and pepper. Mix well and marinate at room temperature for 1-2 hours or overnight in the fridge.
3. Combine the egg, cornstarch, and rice flour. Mix well and add the chicken with the marinating liquid in. Stir.
4. Prepare the oil for frying. Fry the chicken at medium heat. Mix the coating liquid and water (1:1) and pour in ½ - 1 ladleful of the mix into the pan. Stir and repeat the process 2-3 times. Fry until golden and lower the heat. Fry until golden brown and set aside.
5. Herb Fried Chicken is ready to serve with Sambal Bilis or other preferred sambal.

Title: Dijamin KRISPI & Empuk! Resep Fried Chicken Ala Devina [100% Sukses, Tepung Nempel]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P4mnaAiSNXs

It turns out the key to making a good Fried Chicken is the coating and the cooking process. The most important thing is to use quality marinade and flour coatings. The long marination process will make the marinade get absorbed optimally into the chicken.

Fried Chicken Recipe (10 pcs)

Blended spices:
10 clove garlic
1 pc onion
150 ml water

Marinated Chicken:
1 pc chicken
4 tbsp blended spices
8 tbsp thick coconut milk
2 tbsp rice wine vinegar or 1 tbsp white vinegar
1 tbsp chicken powder
2 tsp salt
2 tbsp sugar
½ tbsp pepper
1 tbsp Italian mixed herbs

Dry Coating:
300 g all-purpose flour
100 g cornstarch
2 tbsp baking powder
½ tbsp pepper
1 tbsp salt
1 tbsp paprika powder (optional)
1 tbsp chicken powder

Wet Batter:
6 tbsp dry coating
2 tbsp blended spices
150 ml water

Others:
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Blend the onion, garlic, and water until smooth. Set aside.
2. Clean the chicken and chop into 8-10 slices.
3. Blend the Italian mixed herbs to a finer texture. Set aside.
4. Combine all the marinade ingredients. Mix well, then add the chicken in. Cover with plastic wrap and marinate for at least 1-2 hours at room temperature or overnight in the fridge.
5. Combine all the dry coating ingredients. Set aside.
6. For the wet batter, take 6 tbsp of the dry coating and combine with the blended spices and water. Mix well.
7. Drain the marinating liquid from the chicken. Dip the chicken into the wet batter and roll in the dry coating. Make sure there are no clumps in the dry coating.
8. Wiggle the chicken as you’re adding it into the hot oil. Fry for a moment on medium heat until they’re golden, then lower the heat and fry until golden brown.
9. Fried Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Minyak HARUS Panas! Rahasia Resep Ikan Tim Ala Restoran Hong Kong.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h-DPyHoDJUM

Hong Kong Steamed Fish Recipe ala Restaurant

Hong Kong Steamed fish is usually made using a grouper steamed with a special sauce and soy sauce. The soft fish is paired with the savoriness and fragrance of the Hong Kong-style sauce.

Hong Kong Steamed Fish Recipe (yield: 2 servings)

Ingredients:
1 pc grouper (±500 g)
1 pc ginger, sliced
2 pc green onion, sliced

Sauce:
70 ml soy sauce
350 ml water
3-4 tbsp sugar
½ tbsp Royco Mushroom-flavored Stock
30 ml sake
2 pc green onion, sliced
1 pc cilantro root and stem

Hot oil:
70 ml oil
1 pc ginger, sliced

Garnish:
1 pc ginger, sliced
3 pc green onion, sliced
1 pc red chili, sliced
2 pc cilantro leaf

Steps:
1. For the garnish, soak the sliced green onion and red chili in cold water. Place in the fridge.
2. For the sauce, sauté the green onion and cilantro root with a bit of oil. Deglaze the pan with sake and cook for a bit. Then, add the water, soy sauce, sugar, and Royco’s Mushroom-flavored Stock. Bring to a boil.
3. Clean in the fish. Pat dry with tissue and slice both sides of the fish. Prepare a heatproof plate. Add the green onion and ginger to the plate and place the fish on top.
4. Prepare a pot with boiling water. Place a heatproof bowl at the base and place the plate on top. Steam the fish for 5-7 minutes or depending on the size.
5. For the ginger oil, cook the ginger in oil until it browns and becomes crisp.
6. Add the green onion at the base of the plate. Add the fish and pour the sauce on. Garnish with the green onion, chili, and ginger. Pour the hot oil on and garnish with cilantro leaves.
7. Hong Kong Steamed Fish is ready to serve.

Title: 100% SUKSES! Resep Roti Sisir Lembut Berserat [Metode Sponge & Dough]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=c6Lsd-hjyQA

100% Success! Soft, Fluffy Pull-Apart Bread Recipe [Sponge & Dough Method]

Pull-Apart Bread Recipe (for two 5 x 10 inch pans)

Sponge / starter:
200 g bread flour
150 g water
5 g yeast
55 g sugar

Dough:
175 g bread flour
30 g powdered milk
3 g yeast
3 pc egg yolk
45 g milk
45 g butter
5 g salt
Yellow food coloring (optional)

Spread:
100 g powdered sugar
100 g margarine

Egg wash:
1 pc egg yolk
1 tbsp water

Others:
2 tbsp melted butter

Steps:
1. For the sponge/starter, combine all the ingredients well with chopsticks. Rest in a bowl covered with plastic wrap for 1-2 hours.
2. Combine the flour, powdered milk, and yeast. Knead with hands until incorporated.
3. Add the milk and egg yolk. Knead until incorporated.
4. Add the sponge/starter. Knead with hands until a dough is formed.
5. Add the butter, salt, and yellow food coloring in. Knead. If the dough is too sticky, rub the hands and working surface with oil. Continue to knead until the dough becomes elastic (window pane stage).
6. Divide the dough into 20 pieces, ±32-33 g each. Round the dough to balls.
7. Flatten the dough with a rolling pin. Roll and seal the edges, then arrange the dough inside the baking pan (10 pieces in each pan). Or, flatten the dough and fold it in two and arrange inside the baking pan. Rest for 45-60 minutes or until the dough has risen. Cover with a clean cloth.
8. Mix the yolk and water. Brush the egg wash onto the dough’s surface.
9. Bake at 180°C for 20-25 minutes.
10. Remove the bread from the pan and let it cool on the cooling rack. Brush with melted butter.
11. Mix the margarine and powdered sugar evenly.
12. Slice the bread and spread the margarine and powdered sugar mix. You can also add grated cheese.
13. Pull-Apart Bread is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: KRIUK Tapi EMPUK! Resep Tahu Goreng Bawang Lengkap Dengan Saus Cocolnya [Tanpa Terigu]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zQSrxcR-_jA

CRUNCHY but SOFT! Garlic & Shallots Fried Tofu Recipe with Dipping Sauce [No Flour]

Tofu can be prepared in many ways, one of which is Garlic & Shallots Fried Tofu. This simple dish is best eaten while it’s still hot and dipped into the soy sauce sambal. Delicious and budget-friendly!

Garlic & Shallots Fried Tofu Recipe (yield: 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
6 pc yellow tofu, sliced
1 tsp salt
1 tsp flavor enhancer
300 ml water
3 tbsp cornstarch
10 clove garlic, pounded
10 pc shallot, pounded
Oil for frying

Sweet Soy Sambal:
8 pc bird’s eye chili, sliced
1 clove garlic, large, sliced
2 tbsp oil
1 tbsp palm sugar
4 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 pc Kaffir lime

Steps:
1. Halve the tofu and soak in water, salt, and flavor enhancer in a bowl.
2. Add the pounded shallots, garlic, and cornstarch. Mix well.
3. While the tofu is soaking, make the Sweet Soy Sambal. Add the bird’s eye chili and garlic in a bowl. Heat some oil and pour into the bowl. Mix well.
4. Add the palm sugar, sweet soy sauce, and soy sauce in. Add lime juice and mix well.
5. Heat some oil and fry the tofu. Halfway through, add the pounded garlic and shallots in. Stir.
6. Pour one ladleful of the marinating water. Stir and repeat the process 3-5 times.
7. Fry the tofu, garlic, and shallots until golden brown. Set aside.
8. Serve the Garlic & Shallots Tofu with the Sweet Soy Sambal.

Title: Empuk! Resep Chicken Teriyaki Ala Yoshinoya [100% Bahan Lokal]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O8hTeSwyA4s

Chicken Teriyaki Recipe (yield: 3 serving)

Ingredients:
3 pc chicken thigh fillet, skin-on
½ tbsp cornstarch
10 tbsp Teriyaki sauce
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper

Teriyaki Sauce:
1 tsp grated garlic + 2 tbsp water (use the liquid only)
1 tbsp grated ginger + 2 tbsp water (use the liquid only)
60 ml soy sauce
5 tbsp palm sugar
120 ml water / stock
35 ml apple juice

Finishing:
1 tbsp cornstarch
½ tbsp butter (optional)

Others:
6 pc baby corn, sliced
12 pc green beans, sliced
2 pc carrot, sliced
2 clove garlic, sliced
Sugar, salt, pepper, to taste
3 serving rice

Steps:
1. For the Teriyaki sauce, combine all the ingredients until the sugar is dissolved. Set aside.
2. Marinate the chicken with the Teriyaki sauce, cornstarch, salt, and pepper. Marinate for 1-2 hours at room temperature or overnight in the fridge.
3. Heat some water for boiling. Add some salt and boil the carrots for 1-2 minutes, then add the green beans and baby corn. Boil all veggies until cooked and rinse with running water.
4. Heat some oil and sauté the garlic until fragrant. Add the boiled veggies and add a bit of water. Season with sugar, salt, and pepper. Cook until reduced and set aside.
5. Heat the pan. Pan-sear the marinated chicken (skin-side down) on medium heat. Cook until both sides are browned, then add some water and steam the chicken until it’s perfectly cooked and the water reduced. Set aside and slice.
6. For the remaining Teriyaki sauce, pour into the pan and add cornstarch diluted with water as needed. Bring to a boil and add the butter in. Mix well.
7. Prepare rice in a bowl and add the veggies and the chicken. Pour the Teriyaki sauce on top.
8. Teriyaki Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Resep Ayam Chashu: SANGAT Cocok Dimakan Dengan Mie, Ramen Atau Nasi (Rice Bowl)
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=piO8bhiWRTM

Chicken Chashu (2 pcs)

Ingredients:
6 pc skin-on chicken thigh fillet
Linen string
1 pc whole garlic, halved
½ pc onion, sliced
2 pc green onion, sliced
½ pc ginger, sliced
4 tbsp oil
800 ml water
50 ml soy sauce
50 ml mirin / apple juice
2 pc dried Shiitake mushroom
2 pc konbu / 2 tbsp fish sauce
Flavor enhancer
½ tsp pepper
3 tbsp sugar

Others:
6 pc egg
Infused oil
Green onion, sliced thinly and soak in an ice bath
Rice
Chili powder

Steps:
1. Prepare 6 pieces of linen strings. Place 3 thigh fillets on top and slowly roll them. Tie all six strings together.
2. Heat some oil and add garlic, ginger, onion, and green onions. Sauté until browned, then add the chicken in and sear all the surfaces until browned. Deglaze the pan with apple juice / mirin.
3. Pour some water in with dried Shiitake into a pan. Season with soy sauce, fish sauce, pepper, sugar, and flavor enhancer. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat and cook until the water is reduced. Soak the chicken for 3 hours to overnight and make sure the entire surface is submerged.
4. You can also add boiled eggs, added when the broth is cooled down, and soak overnight.
5. The next day, remove the chicken and eggs. Re-heat the broth.
6. Remove the linen strings. Cut the Chashu into slightly thick slices while it’s still cold. Then, pan-sear or torch the Chashu until browned. Serve with infused oil on top.
7. Prepare rice and place the Chashu on top with the infused oil and broth. Garnish with sliced green onions and chili powder, to taste.
8. Chicken Chashu is ready to serve.

Title: 100% Bahan Lokal! Resep Ramen Halal Tori Paitan Ala Marugame Udon.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Kd1W_WNYcMk

Tori Paitan Ramen Recipe (yield: 4-6 servings)

Ingredients:
4-6 serving noodles

Broth (for 2-3 L):
1 kg chicken wings, chopped
1 pc ginger, sliced
1 pc onion, sliced
1 pc whole garlic, halved
3 pc green onions, sliced
4 pc dried Shiitake
1 tbsp black pepper & white pepper, crushed
2 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp fish sauce
1 tbsp sugar
2-4 tsp salt
Water

Savory Infused Oil:
100 ml oil
10 clove garlic
10 pc shallots
3 tbsp soy sauce
2 tsp flavor enhancer / stock powder

Topping:
6 slice Chicken Chashu
50 g wood ear mushroom, boiled and sliced
1 pc spring onion, sliced
3 pc Ramen Egg, halved
1 pack nori
Chili powder

Steps:
1. For the broth, heat some oil and sauté ginger, garlic, onion, and green onions. Cook until fragrant and add the chopped chicken wings, crushed black pepper and white pepper. Cook until browned.
2. Add the water and dried Shiitake in, cook until the chicken and the bones are soft for ±3-4 hours on medium heat or 1-2 hours with a pressure cooker. If the water is reduced, add more as necessary.
3. After the chicken and the bones are soft, remove the Shiitake, garlic, onion, and ginger and blend the broth (not too finely) and strain. You can add more water to the dregs and strain it again. Bring the broth to a boil and season with fish sauce, soy sauce, sugar, and salt.
4. For the infused oil, finely chop the shallots and garlic with a chopper. Heat some oil and sauté both of them on medium low heat until yellowed. Then, add the soy sauce and flavor enhancer. Set aside.
5. Prepare boiling water and boil the noodles. Transfer to a bowl and pour the broth in. Add the Chicken Chashu, Ramen Egg, wood ear mushroom, nori, and infused oil on top. Add chili powder, to taste.
6. Tori Paitan Ramen is ready to serve.

Title: Murah Bukan Murahan! Resep English Breakfast: PRAKTIS LENGKAP Ala Hotel.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MNCiWjapsa8

A Complete Hotel Breakfast: English Breakfast Recipe

English Breakfast is a complete breakfast dish from England. It usually consists of eggs, sausages, meat, beans, and vegetables. This nutritious and complete dish can be an alternative for your breakfast.

English Breakfast Recipe (yield: 2 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pc bread
Hormel Smoked Honey Maple Ham
Hormel Honey Cured Bacon
3 pc egg
2 tbsp butter
1 pc beef tomato, sliced
100 g straight cut french fries, chopped
½ pc onion, sliced
4 pc champignon mushroom, sliced
Salt
50 ml black pepper

Others:
3 clove garlic
Fresh thyme
Green onions, sliced

Steps:
1. Pan-sear the Hormel Smoked Honey Maple Ham with a nonstick pan slightly until browned. Set aside.
2. Toast the bread until browned or to your liking.
3. Pan-sear the Honey Cured Bacon to the preferred doneness.
4. In the same pan, pan-sear the beef tomato and mushroom. Season with salt and black pepper. Set aside.
5. Sauté the onion until fragrant. Add the potato, garlic, thyme, and bacon in. Season with salt and black pepper, to taste. Set aside.
6. Lightly beat the eggs. Heat the pan and add some oil, then pour the eggs in with butter. Turn the heat off and stir the eggs. Set aside.
7. Place the ham, bacon, toast, pan-seared tomato and mushroom, potato stir-fry, and scrambled eggs on a plate. Garnish with green onions and thyme.
8. English Breakfast is ready to serve.

Definitely Addictive! Chicken Wings ala Wingstop Recipe

Title: Semua PASTI Suka! Resep Nasi Goreng Ala Restoran Solaria [Versi Praktis]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Js9FXCkn798

Practical! Fried Rice a la Restaurant Recipe

Fried Rice is the favorite of many Indonesians as it’s easy to make and fulfilling. This time, I’m making Seafood Fried Rice with a style that is similar to Solaria.

Seafood Fried Rice Recipe (2 portions)

Ingredients:
2 serving rice
2 pc egg
4 pc fish ball, sliced
50 g chicken, diced
6 pc shrimp, peeled
3 pc shallots, grated
2 clove garlic, grated
2 pc green onions, sliced
1 pc red chili
½ tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp fish sauce
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
½ - 1 tbsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
Flavor enhancer
½ tbsp margarine
Oil for sautéing

Steps:
1. Heat the wok with high heat. Pour the oil in and sauté the chicken and shrimp. Stir, then add the fish balls. Cook for a bit and set aside.
2. In the same wok with high heat, pour some oil and scramble the eggs until crisp and the oil foamy. Then, add the shallots and garlic in. Sauté until fragrant.
3. Add the fish sauce, fish balls, shrimp, chicken, chili, and green onions in. Sauté for a bit.
4. Add the rice in with fish sauce, sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, sugar, pepper, oyster sauce, and flavor enhancers. Stir well.
5. Add the green part of green onions and margarine. Mix well and turn the heat off.
6. Transfer to a serving plate. Fried rice is ready to serve.

Title: 5 Menit Cukup! Resep MIE GODOG Praktis, Pakai Terasi Makin MANTAP.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xOKO2wNJkQ0

Done in 5 Minutes! Javanese Noodle Soup Recipe, Practical and Warms the Gut

Javanese Noodle Soup is commonly found in Central Java and Yogyakarta. This savory dish, complete with vegetables and other toppings, is best served hot.

Javanese Noodle Soup Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
2 serving fresh noodles, parboiled
50 g boiled chicken, shredded
50 g kekian, sliced
2 pc egg
5 sheet cabbage, sliced
1 pc tomato, sliced
5 stalk choy sum, sliced
5 pc bird’s eye chili, sliced
½ tbsp sugar
½ tsp salt
½ tsp pepper
Flavor enhancer

Blended Spices:
3 pc shallots
2 clove garlic
1 pc candlenut
3 g shrimp paste
20 ml oil

Stock:
700 ml hot water
3 blocks instant chicken stock

Pickles:
1-2 pc cucumber, remove the core and slice
5 pc bird’s eye chili
2 tbsp sugar
2 tbsp rice wine vinegar / 1 tbsp white vinegar
½ tsp salt

Condiments:
Fried shallots

Steps:
1.  Blend all the spices. Set aside.
2. Heat some oi. Fry the eggs until crisp. Set aside.
3. In the same pan, sauté the blended spices until reduced and fragrant. Add the shredded chicken and kekian. Stir and add the tomato, bird’s eye chili, and chicken stock. Bring to a boil.
4. Add the scrambled eggs and season with sugar, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil once more.
5. Add the parboiled noodles, cabbage, and choy sum. Cook for a moment and turn the heat off.
6. For the pickles, combine the sugar, salt, and vinegar. Stir until they’re dissolved and add the cucumber and boiled bird’s eye chili. Mix well.
7. Transfer to a serving plate, topped with pickles and fried shallots.
8. Javanese Noodle Soup is ready to serve.

Title: TANPA MIXER! Resep Lava Cake Oreo [100% Sukses, Kualitas Restoran]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fSDyqTD07aY

Oreo Lava Cake Recipe (6 pcs)

Cake Batter:
90 g Oreo biscuits, crush and strain
150 g all-purpose flour
20 g cocoa powder
2 tsp baking powder
½ tsp salt
100 g butter, room-temp
150 g sugar
½ tsp vanilla extract
1 pc egg
50 ml milk
3 tsp black food coloring (me: charcoal powder)

Filling:
Oreo filling
100 g cream cheese, room temp
25 g icing sugar
40 ml milk
¼ tsp salt

Steps:
1. Whip the butter and sugar with a balloon whisk until it expands. Then, add the egg and mix evenly.
2. Add the milk and vanilla extract. Mix evenly.
3. Combine and strain the baking powder, salt, and flour. Add into the butter mix.
4. Add the Oreo powder, charcoal powder, and cocoa powder. Stir with a spatula only until they are well-incorporated into the batter. If the dough is too soft, place in the fridge for 10-15 minutes so it’s easier to shape.
5. For the filling, mix the cream cheese, icing sugar, salt, and Oreo filling with a spatula. Then, add the milk and mix well. Keep in the freezer. You can also use a mixer and whip the filling until it expands, but you’d need more milk (±10-20 ml).
6. Prepare the ramekins. Brush the surface with butter and sprinkle with cocoa powder.
7. Pour the dough into the ramekin and make a crater. At its center, place the cream cheese filling and level it out. Add a bit of the cake dough and place it on top to cover the filling evenly (total cake height is ¾ of the ramekin).
8. Bake the Oreo Lava Cake at 180°C for 10-12 minutes, depending on its size.
9. Take the Oreo Lava Cake out of the oven. Turn it over and remove the ramekin.
10. Oreo Lava Cake is ready to serve with icing sugar, Oreo Ice Cream, and Oreo biscuits as the condiments.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: TANPA Mesin! Resep Oreo Ice Cream Ala McDonald’s [3 Bahan, 100% Sukses]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fxxEIz0Jasw

NO Machine! Oreo Ice Cream a la McDonald’s [3 Ingredients, 100% Success]

Oreo Ice Cream is a variety of ice cream we can make at home. It tastes good, creamy, savory, and sweet. It’s great for kids and families.

Oreo Ice Cream Recipe (yield 12 servings)

Ingredients:
500 ml whipping cream / 150 g whip cream powder + 350 ml cold milk / cold water
150 ml condensed milk
1 pack Oreo (133 g pack)
½ tsp salt (optional)
50 g chocolate, chopped (optional)

Steps:
1. Combine the condensed milk, cream, and salt. Whip with a mixer until it thickens and leaves a track but not too stiff.
2. Pound the Oreos with a rolling pin.
3. Mix the Oreos and the chopped chocolate evenly.
4. Transfer the dough into a piping bag. Flatten, seal the edge, and keep in the freezer.
5. Chill the ice cream in the freezer for 3-4 hours. Every 30-60 minutes, massage the ice cream and return to the freezer. Repeat this process 2-3 times.
6. Transfer the ice cream into a container. Chill in the freezer thoroughly.
7. Scoop the ice cream into a glass.
8. Oreo Ice Cream is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: TANPA KENTANG! Resep Kroket Keju Meleleh Ala Brulee Bomb Nagita [Bitterballen]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wpoEhIXIvjQ

No Potatoes! Melted Cheese Croquettes a la Nagita’s Brulee Bomb

Brulee Bomb is a dish that went viral recently. It’s a type of Cheese Croquette, dipped in chili and cheese sauce. Croquette is a potato-based dish that is coated in breadcrumbs and fried. It’s crispy outside with melted cheese inside. It’s great to be served as a snack for kids and families.

Brulee Bomb Recipe (20-24 pcs)

Filling:
½ pc onion, grated
2 pc chicken sausage, sliced
5 pc Champignon mushroom, sliced
4 tbsp parmesan
50 g mozzarella, diced

Brulee Roux:
3 tbsp butter
1 tbsp olive oil / cooking oil
65 g all-purpose flour
¼ tsp nutmeg
½ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
225 ml milk
225 ml fresh cream

Coating:
2 pc egg
100 g all-purpose flour
80 ml susu
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
150 g bread crumbs

Condiments:
Cheese sauce
Dried chili

Steps:
1. Heat the pan and sauté the mushroom with olive oil / cooking oil until fragrant. Add the grated onion and sausage in. Sauté the mix until it browns. Set aside.
2. Melt the butter. Add the flour in and mix well.
3. Pour the milk and cream in while stirring. Season with sugar, salt, pepper, and nutmeg. Cook until it thickens.
4. Add the sauteed mushroom and parmesan. Mix well and set aside to cool.
5. After the mix cools down, add the mozzarella cheese. Stir and transfer into a tray.
6. For the coating, combine the eggs, milk, flour, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
7. After the mix has set, wet your hands and shape it into balls. Roll the balls in flour and dip into the wet batter until the surface is perfectly coated. Roll the coated Croquette balls into the breadcrumbs until they are fully coated. Repeat until the Brulee mix is finished.
8. Heat some oil and fry the Brulee Bomb until golden brown.
9. The Brulee Bomb is ready to serve with Cheese Sauce and dried chili.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Resep Kepiting Mentega: Bisa Ganti Udang / Kerang [Caramelized Butter Crab]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=N6y88WsbA6Y

Dungeness Crab Recipe: Caramelized Butter Crab [or with Prawns / Clams]

Crab is many people’s favorite seafood. The delicious crab meat is tasty, even more so when paired with a caramelized butter sauce. It tastes savory with garlic and shallots aroma. This dish can become a luxurious menu for your family at home.

Caramelized Butter Crab Recipe

Ingredients:
1 pc mud crab, 800-900 g
5 cm ginger, sliced
2 stalk green onions

Spice blend:
¼ pc onion
5 clove garlic
Oil, as needed

Butter Sauce:
100 g butter
20 clove garlic
20 pc shallots
4 pc spring onion bulbs
½ tbsp steak sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp oregano
1 tbsp parsley, chopped
½ tbsp chili flakes
50 ml apple juice / white wine / sake
1 tbsp sugar
½ - 1 tsp salt
½ tsp pepper
1 pc lime

Steps:
1. Kill the crab by striking / piercing the posterior area. Brush and clean under running water.
2. Cut the crab. Remove the gills and set aside the crab mustard.
3. Prepare a pan. Pour some water in along with ginger and green onions. Place the crab on top of the aromatics and steam for 7 minutes (depending on the size).
4. After the crab is cooked, cover it with a cloth and pound the shell.
5. Blend the onion, garlic, and oil until smooth.
6. Heat some oil. Sauté the spice blend until fragrant. Add the spring onion bulbs, shallots, and garlic. Cook until they’re browned.
7. Add the crab mustard with apple juice. Cook for a bit, then add the butter in with the oyster sauce, steak sauce, oregano, chili flakes, and parsley.
8. Season with sugar, salt, and pepper. Mix well, then add the crab and cook until the water is reduced.
9. Transfer onto a serving plate. Add some lime juice and chopped parsley as the garnish.
10. Caramelized Butter Crab is ready to serve.

This recipe is a bit different, where I’ll be using bread dough to create a crisp exterior and soft, melted filling using sweet potatoes and mozzarella cheese.

Title: 4 Menit Jadi! Resep Telur Tomat Praktis Sehat [Wajib Dicoba]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W-VmqpiXhDU

Done in 4 Minutes! Healthy, Practical Tomato Scrambled Eggs Recipe

Tomato Scrambled Eggs is a Chinese dish. It’s a scrambled egg paired with fresh tomatoes and a mix of tomato sauce with other sauces. It’s very practical and easy to make.

Tomato Scrambled Eggs Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
5 pc egg, whisked
2 pc tomato, sliced
½ pc onion, sliced
3 clove garlic, pounded
1 pc green onions, slice to ±3 cm
3 tbsp tomato sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
½ tbsp oyster sauce
80 ml water
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp flavor enhancer
½ tbsp sugar
Oil, as needed

Steps:
1. Combine water, tomato sauce, soy sauce, oyster sauce, pepper, flavor enhancer, and sugar in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Heat the pan on high heat. Add quite a bit of oil. After the oil is heated, turn the heat off and add the eggs in. Stir for a bit and set aside.
3. Heat some oil. Sauté the garlic and onion until fragrant. Then, add the tomatoes and the white part of the green onion. Cook for a bit.
4. Pour the sauce and the eggs in. Mix well.
5. Add the green part of the green onions. Stir and turn the heat off.
6. Tomato Scrambled Eggs is ready to serve.

Title: Resep Nasi Goreng Ala Hong Kong: Dijamin Wangi! [Yang Chow]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HDOHOtCx048

Here’s the Key Recipe to Super-Aromatic Hong Kong Fried Rice!

Fried Rice is the favorite meal of many people. There are many variations to fried rice, one of which is Hong Kong Fried Rice. Unlike the regular Indonesian fried rice, Hong Kong Fried Rice is marked by its white color. It’s simple to make and, of course, tasty! You can enjoy this dish for breakfast, lunch, or dinner.

Hong Kong Fried Rice Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
2 serving rice
3 pc shallots, diced
¼ pc onion, diced
1 pc green onion, slice to 1 cm thick
2 pc eggs
Corn shelled from ¼ cob
½ pc carrot, diced (parboiled)
1 pc small chayote, diced
1 pc sausage, diced
1 serving roasted chicken, diced
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp fish sauce
½ - 1 tsp sesame oil (optional)
¾ tsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
1 tsp flavor enhancer
Oil to stir fry

Steps:
1. Heat some oil and sauté the shallots, onion, and the white part of green onions. Once they’re cooked, add the eggs on the side of the wok. Stir.
2. Add the corn, carrot, chayote, sausage, and roasted chicken. Sauté for a bit.
3. Add the soy sauce, fish sauce, rice, sugar, pepper, and flavor enhancer. Mix well.
4. Add the green part of green onion and sesame oil. Mix well, then turn the heat off.
5. Hong Kong Fried Rice is ready to serve.

Title: Resep Ayam Kecap: Lengkap Dengan Tahu, Telur, Ati, Ceker [Empuk Manis]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=isewupLcXG0

Sweet, Savory, Tender! Sweet Soy Chicken Recipe [Complete with Tofu, Eggs, Liver, Chicken Feet]

Sweet Soy chicken is a simple dish many people often cook. It’s called Sweet Soy Chicken because it uses thick, intense sweet soy sauce to darken the color of the dish. The combination of savory, sweet, and spicy flavor will be loved by your entire family.

Sweet Soy Chicken (yield 4-6 serving)

Ingredients:
1 pc whole chicken, chopped into 12 pieces
250 g chicken feet
4 pc egg, boiled
4 pc white tofu
4 pair liver and gizzard, parboiled
5 clove garlic, pounded
5 pc shallot, pounded
2 pc aromatic ginger, pounded
5 cm ginger, pounded
1 pc tomato, cut into 4 slices
2 pc curly red chili
2 tsp Ngohiong powder
6 tbsp sweet soy sauce
6 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp Worcestershire sauce
2 tbsp dark soy sauce (optional)
1 L water

Steps:
1. Heat some oil and sauté the shallots, garlic, aromatic ginger, and ginger until fragrant. Add the curly red chili and tomato in. Cook until fragrant.
2. Add the chicken in. Cook until they brown, then add Ngohiong powder, soy sauce, sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, Worcestershire sauce, dark soy sauce, and water. Bring to a boil.
3. Add the liver, gizzard, chicken feet, eggs, and tofu. Stir gently and cook on medium heat for ±30 minutes until the sauce thickens and is absorbed well.
4. Transfer to a serving plate.
5. Sweet Soy Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Empuk, Meresap, Tahan Lama! Resep Rendang Daging Khas Padang
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GNfRXKsvG04

Tender, Saturated in Spices: Padang Meat Rendang Recipe [Long Shelf Life]

Rendang is a world-famous signature Indonesian dish. This dish originates from Padang, West Sumatra. This spicy meat dish is cooked with various seasonings and spices.

Rendang Recipe (12 pcs)

Ingredients:
600 g beef shank, sliced
5 clove garlic
7 pc shallots
5 pc candlenuts
8 pc curly red chili
2 pc red chili
3 cm ginger
80 ml coconut oil
2 stalk lemongrass, slice and pound
1 pc galangal, slice and pound
5 pc Kaffir lime leaf
2 pc turmeric leaf
1 pc pandan leaf
3 pc bay leaf
500 ml water
500 ml thick coconut milk

Dry Seasonings:
1 tbsp coriander powder
2 tsp white pepper powder
2 tsp cumin powder
¼ tsp cinnamon powder
1 tsp nutmeg powder
1 tsp star anise powder
1 tsp cardamom powder
1 tsp clove powder
1 tsp chili powder

Others:
½ tbsp salt
2 tsp sugar
1 tsp mushroom stock powder

Steps:
1. Blend the shallots, garlic, candlenuts, red chili, curly red chili, and ginger with the coconut oil.
2. Mix the meat with the dry seasonings evenly. Massage the meat so the seasonings are absorbed well. Alternatively, add some salt and marinate the meat overnight.
3. Heat the pan and sauté the spice blend. Add the lemongrass, galangal, bay leaves, Kaffir lime leaves, turmeric leaves, and pandan leaf in. Don’t let it get too reduced, then add the marinated meat in until it’s well-toasted. Then, add the coconut milk and water. Mix well.
4. Season with salt, sugar, and mushroom stock powder. Bring to a boil on medium heat, then lower the heat and cover the pan. Stir once in a while and cook until the sauce is reduced.
5. When the water is almost fully reduced, cook the Rendang on low heat. Keep stirring until it is completely reduced and until the sauce sticks onto the meat.
6. Rendang is ready to serve or to keep in an airtight container in the fridge.

Title: 100% Jadi! Resep Apple Crumble [Tanpa Oven]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZQG8vWxLwTM

100% Success! Apple Crumble Recipe [No Oven]

Apple Crumble is an English dessert. This dish’s main ingredients are apples and biscuit crumbs. It’s a combination of sweet and tart apples with something crunchy and savory. Adding a scoop of vanilla ice cream makes the dish even more complete.

Apple Crumble Recipe (yield 6-8 servings)

Apple Filling:
5 pc large Granny Smith apples / 6 pc small ones
90 g sugar
40 g butter
1-½ tbsp all-purpose flour
1 tsp cinnamon powder
½ - 1 pc lemon
50 g golden raisin

Crumble:
130 g palm sugar
125 g melted butter
125 g all-purpose protein
65 g oatmeal
1 tsp cinnamon powder
½ - ¾ tsp salt
½ tsp baking powder
35 g almond slice

Condiments:
Vanilla ice cream
Mint

Steps:
1. For the Crumble, combine butter, cinnamon powder, salt, baking powder, and palm sugar.
2. Add the flour and oatmeal. Stir and keep in the fridge.
3. Peel and dice the apples or slice them to your preference. Soak in salted water.
4. Drain the apples. Combine with butter, flour, sugar, cinnamon powder, lemon juice, and raisins. Mix well and add into the rice cooker. Level out the surface.
5. Sprinkle half of the crumble on top. Cook with the rice cooking mode.
6. Toast the rest of the crumble with the almond slice on a nonstick pan. Use medium-high heat until the crumble is half-crisp, then lower to low heat and keep stirring until it becomes truly crispy.
7. Serve the Apple Crumble on a plate. Sprinkle the toasted crumble and place a scoop of Vanilla ice cream and mint on top.
8. Apple Crumble is ready to serve.

Title: Wangi Gurih! Resep Nasi Telur Ceplok Ala Devina [Anak Kos Masuk]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XFQtxBZmv14

Aromatic and Savory: Fried Eggs and Rice Recipe [Great for Singles]

Fried eggs are an inexpensive dish that’s easy to cook. A dish that was trending a while ago is Pontianak Egg Rice. It’s a dish that combines rice, fried eggs, and a sweet soy sauce with sesame oil aroma. Practical, inexpensive, tasty, and filling!

Aromatic Fried Egg and Rice Recipe (yield 1 serving)

Ingredients:
1 serving warm rice
2 pc eggs

Sauce:
5 clove garlic, chopped
2 pc curly red chili, chopped
5 pc bird’s eye chili, chopped
1 stalk green onion, chopped
1 tsp chili powder
1 tbsp Lee Kum Kee Sesame Oil
1 tbsp Lee Kum Kee Oyster Sauce
1 tbsp Lee Kum Kee Soy Sauce
4 tbsp water
1 tbsp sugar

Steps:
1. Fry the eggs sunny side up or to your preference.
2. Sauté the garlic, curly red chili, bird’s eye chili, and green onions with some oil until fragrant. Add the sesame oil, oyster sauce, soy sauce, sugar, and water into the pan. Mix well. Turn the heat off and add chili powder. Stir.
3. Add the fried eggs on top of warm rice and pour the sauce on.

Title: Seenak Pasta Restoran! Resep Mie Aglio E Olio [Iya Betul, Pakai Mie]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UL_QqRmawGs

As Good As Pasta in Restaurants! Aglio e Olio Noodles Recipe: Yes, with Noodles.

Normally served with pasta, this Aglio e Olio dish is paired with noodles. You can use any noodle type you want. Aglio means garlic and Olio means oil. This Aglio e Olio Noodles become even more special thanks to the Garlic Crumbs topping that adds a crunchy texture.

Aglio e Olio Noodles Recipe (yield: 2 servings)

Ingredients:
2 serving fresh noodles

Garlic Oil:
10 clove garlic, chopped
6 pc bird’s eye chili, chopped
2 tbsp chili flakes
50 ml oil

Garlic Crumbs:
6 clove garlic, sliced
2 tbsp butter
6 tbsp bread crumbs

Others:
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp sugar
¼ tsp mushroom stock powder
1 tbsp soy sauce
Parsley, chopped

Steps:
1. Fry the garlic until half-crisp. Add the bird’s eye chili and chili flakes in and cook until they’re crispy. Set aside.
2. Sauté the garlic until half-crisp. Remove the excess oil and add butter, bread crumbs, salt, and pepper in. Cook until they’re crispy. Set aside.
3. Boil the noodles with sufficient water until it’s cooked.
4. In a big bowl, add sugar, salt, pepper, mushroom stock powder, soy sauce, garlic oil, and hot noodles. Stir well.
5. Transfer to a serving plate and sprinkle with the Garlic Crumbs and chopped parsley.
6. Aglio e Olio Noodles is ready to serve.

Title: Garing & Lembut: Resep Ayam Kung Pao [Kualitas Restoran]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ksDq2kwYjNs

Crisp & Tender: Restaurant-Quality Kung Pao Chicken Recipe

Kung Pao Chicken is a spicy Chinese food with chicken as the main ingredient. The flavor is a combination of tender chicken, crunchy nuts, and Szechuan-style spicy and savory sauce.

Kung Pao Chicken Recipe (yield 2 serving)

Ingredients:
300 g chicken thigh fillet, diced
1/2 tbsp cooking wine / apple juice
2 tsp cornstarch
1 tbsp egg white
2 tsp soy sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
1/2 tsp white pepper
10-15 pc large dried chili, cut to 1cm pieces
2 cm large ginger, thinly sliced
6 clove garlic, thick slices
1-2 pc large green onions, slice to 1cm pieces
50 g fried peanuts

Sauce:
2 tbsp oyster sauce
3 tbsp dark soy sauce
2-3 tbsp rice vinegar
2 tbsp sugar
2 tsp cornstarch
75 ml chicken stock / water
MSG, opsional

Steps:
1. Combine the cooking wine, white pepper, egg white, cornstarch, soy sauce, and sesame oil with the chicken. Mix well and marinate for 15 mins.
2. For the sauce, combine all the ingredients in a bowl. Mix well.
3. Heat the pan and add quite a bit of oil. Fry the chicken on high heat until half-cooked, then remove the excess oil if necessary.
4. Add the dried chili. Cook until the chicken browns, then add the ginger, the white part of green onions, and garlic. Cook for a bit.
5. Add the sauce mix and cook until the sauce thickens. Then, add the green part of the green onions and fried peanuts. Mix well and turn the heat off.
6. Kung Pao Chicken is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: TANPA Mesin! Resep Soft Serve Ice Cream SUPER LEMBUT! [Cukup DUA Bahan]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Pm1-EpTYuKI

Soft Ice Cream Ovomaltine

Many people love Ice Cream. There are so many types of ice cream sold out there. There are sticks, scoops, and soft serve ice cream. This time, I’m making a soft serve ice cream in Vanilla and Chocolate flavor. It has a soft texture, made of simple ingredients, and you won’t need an ice cream machine to make it.

Soft Serve Ice Cream Recipe (yield: 12 servings)

Vanilla Ice Cream:
300 ml whipping cream
160 ml condensed milk
½ tsp salt

Chocolate Ovomaltine Ice Cream:
300 ml whipping cream
80 ml condensed milk
½ tsp salt
80 gr Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream
4 tbsp cocoa powder

Others:
Ice cream cone

Steps:
1. Mix all the Vanilla Ice Cream ingredients. Mix with a mixer until thickens and not too firm.
2. Mix all the Ovomaltine Chocolate Ice Cream ingredients. Mix with a mixer until thickens and not too firm.
3. Add the ice cream into a piping bag. Seal the opening or make a knot and chill in the freezer.
4. Chill the ice cream in the freezer for 3-4 hours. Every 30-60 minutes, massage the ice cream and return to the freezer.
5. Cut the tip of the piping bag and pipe the ice cream into the wafer cone in a circular motion.
6. Or, after 3-4 hours of chilling, transfer the ice cream into a container. Chill it again and serve by scooping the ice cream.

Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream is available at Ranch market, Farmers market, Foodhall, Lion Superindo, Giant, Kem Chick, Grand lucky, Indomaret, many leading supermarkets, and grocery shops.

Title: Pedas Gurih! Resep Sambal Terasi Tahan Lama TANPA Pengawet.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=S4497kelQxY

Spicy and Savory: Shrimp Paste Sambal Recipe, Long Shelf Life, No Preservatives!

Some Indonesians feel a dish is not complete without Sambal. One of the most popular Sambal is Shrimp Paste Sambal. This Sambal is made of chili and shrimp paste, and it has a unique flavor profile. It’s a great condiment for rice and other main dishes.

Shrimp Paste Sambal Recipe (yield 1 cup)

Ingredients:
10 clove garlic, sliced
15 pc shallots, sliced
5 pc candlenut, pounded
15 pc bird’s eye chili
20 g dried chili, soaked in warm water or 10-15 red chili
1 pc tomato
6 pc shrimp paste
1 stalk lemongrass
2 pc bay leaf
100 ml oil
150 ml water
1 tsp salt
4 tbsp palm sugar
½ tsp flavor enhancers

Steps:
1. Heat some oi. Add the shallots, garlic, and candlenuts. Sauté until half-cooked.
2. Add the shrimp paste in and stir.
3. Add the bird’s eye chili and dried chili. Sauté for a bit and blend to the desired smoothness.
4. Sauté the Sambal again with bay leaves and lemongrass until fragrant and the oil seeps out from the Sambal. Add some water and season with palm sugar, salt, and flavor enhancer.
5. Cook on medium heat until the water evaporates or until the oil seeps out from the Sambal once again.
6. The Shrimp Paste Sambal is ready to serve or stored in an airtight jar.

Title: 4 Bahan, Anti Sobek! Resep Kulit Tortila / Kulit Kebab [100% Sukses]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eA1j3Ge0SFQ

Only 4 Ingredients! Tearproof Tortilla Skin Recipe [Kebab Wrap]

Tortilla is a flatbread made of various flour, such as regular flour, wheat flour, corn flour, etc. Tortilla is usually used to wrap Mexican dishes like taco, burrito, or fajitas. It can also be used as a Kebab Wrap. This time, I’m making a flexible, soft, and rollable Tortilla Skin.

Tortilla Skin Recipe (12 pcs)

Ingredients:
500 g all-purpose flour
135 ml Cimory Squeeze Yogurt Original
30 ml oil
170 ml warm water
1 tsp baking powder
1 tsp salt

Steps:
1. Combine the all-purpose flour, salt, and baking powder. Mix with chopsticks.
2. Add the Cimory Squeeze Yoghurt Original, oil, and warm water. Mix with the chopsticks until a dough is formed.
3. After the dough comes together, knead for 1-2 minutes.
4. Rest the dough for at least 1-2 hours while covered with a plastic wrap.
5. After resting, portion and weigh the dough into 12 even pieces, about 70 g each, and shape into balls.
6. Sprinkle the cutting board and the rolling pin with flour. Roll the dough to a circle with a ± 20 cm diameter.
7. Heat a non-stick pan. Cook the tortilla until bubbles pop up and the skin browns. Bake the other side until bubbles pop up and the skin browns or to the preferred doneness.
8. Keep the tortilla skin covered with a clean cloth dampened with water / moistened so the tortilla doesn’t dry out.

Title: TANPA Ragi & Ulen! Resep Odading Garing Tapi Lembut [100% Sukses]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j2EfVuwJFiI

Crispy-but-Soft Odading Recipe [No Yeast & No Knead]

Odading is a snack food from Bandung that's quite viral recently. Also known as fried bread, gembukan, pillow bread, or bolang-baling, Odading's shape is similar to pillows. It has a sweet flavor and is also soft. My Odading recipe is a bit different. It's quite simple as I don't use yeast and I don't knead or proof the dough. This snack is suitable to be consumed with coffee or tea.

Odading Recipe (yield 24 pcs)

Ingredients:
280 g all-purpose flour
1-1/4 tsp baking powder
1/2 tsp baking soda
1 pc egg
110 g milk
20 ml oil
4-1/2 tbsp sugar
1/2 tsp salt
1 tbsp powdered milk
20 g white sesame seeds
Cooking oil, as needed

Steps:
1. Combine the milk, sugar, and egg. Mix until the sugar is dissolved, then add the oil in.
2. Combine the flour, powdered milk, salt, baking soda, and baking powder in a bowl. Stir with chopsticks and pour the wet ingredients in slowly while stirring with the chopsticks until a dough is formed.
3. Knead the dough by hands until the surface is smooth, not until elastic. Rest at room temp for 2 hours, covered by plastic wrap or a clean cloth. Then, rest overnight in the fridge.
4. Rub the cutting board, the rolling pin, and both hands with oil. Roll the dough lengthwise to a 1-cm thickness. Spray some water on the surface and sprinkle the sesame seeds. Roll the dough once more to ±0.5-cm thick and slice it to ±4 x 6 cm big or to your liking.
5. Heat the oil on medium heat. Add the Odading in and swirl them around so they expand. Fry until golden brown.
6. Odading is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Pedas Gurih: Resep Chapaguri Ramdon Ala Film Korea Parasite
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mF916VbkGiY

Spicy, Sweet, Savory: Chapaguri Ramdon ala Parasite Movie Recipe

One of the dishes trending lately is the Ramdon in Parasite movie. Ramdon or ramen udon's real name is Chapaguri, a marriage between two instant noodles, Chapagetti and Neoguri. Chapagetti is a jjajang noodle (black bean sauce), while Neoguri is a soup noodle with spicy seafood aroma. The union between these two noodles result in a savory, sweet, and spicy flavor. This dish is great to accompany you watching Korean dramas.

Chapaguri Recipe (yield 1 serving)

Ingredients:
1 pack Nongshim Chapagetti
1 pack Nongshim Neoguri

Topping:
2 clove garlic, sliced
3 pc bird's eye chili, sliced
180 g sliced beef
1/2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
1 tsp sugar
1/4 tsp pepper
2 pc cheddar slices

Steps:
1. Boil some water and boil the Nongshim Chapagetti and Nongshim Neoguri until half-cooked. Remove the excess water if necessary.
2. Marinate the beef with soy sauce, sesame oil, sugar, and pepper.
3. Heat the pan with some oil and sauté the garlic and chili. Then, add the marinated beef and cook well.
4. Add the Nongshim Chapagetti and Nongshim Neoguri seasoning into the pot. Mix well and cook until the seasoning is absorbed.
5. Add the beef and cheddar toppings. Put the lid on and turn the heat off.
6. Chapaguri is ready to serve.

Title: Renyah TETAP Lumer! Resep CHOCOLATE COOKIES Ala Amerika [100% Bahan Lokal]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=46BpX8Qmzyw

Crunchy Outside with Melted Chocolate Inside: Chocolate Cookies Recipe

Cookies are one of many people's favorite snacks. There are so many shapes and variants to cookies. This time, I'm making chocolate cookies filled with Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream and chocolate chips topping. It has a crunchy exterior and a soft center, a great combination to accompany your coffee time.

Chocolate Cookies Recipe (20 pcs)

Ingredients:
200 g butter
150 g sugar
130 g palm sugar
1 tsp vanilla extract
1 pc egg
280 g all-purpose flour
5 g salt
1/2 tsp baking powder
1/4 tsp baking soda
150 g choco chips
10 tbsp Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream

Steps:
1. Combine butter, sugar, and palm sugar in a bowl. Beat with a mixer on high speed for 1-2 minutes.
2. Add the egg and vanilla extract. Beat on high speed. If the dough gets too soft, place it in the fridge or freezer so the butter firms up before beating it again until the mix expands.
3. Add the sifted flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Beat just until the dough is mixed well.
4. Add the choco chips in. Stir with a spatula.
5. Prepare a tray lined with baking paper. Place a scoop of the dough on top and leave some distance in between.
6. Make a crater in the middle of the cookie dough using a spoon.
7. Add the Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream into a piping bag. Pipe into the crater and shape the dough to cover the chocolate spread. Sprinkle a bit of salt on top or add more choco chips for the topping.
8. Bake at 185°C for 15 minutes.
9. Chocolate Cookies are ready to serve or kept in an airtight container after they cool.

Title: Garing Empuk: Resep Bakwan Sayur Korea [Yachaejeon]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LtHLTej-J2U

Crispy and Soft: Korean Pancake Recipe [Yachaejeon]

Jeon is a pancake dish from Korea. Jeon's naming system corresponds to the elements used in the dish, just like the recipe I'm sharing today. Yachaejeon is a jeon made of various vegetables mixed in a batter. This dish can be enjoyed as a snack or a side dish.

Korean Pancake Recipe (yield: 1 pcs)

Ingredients:
50 g chives, cut into long slices
1 pc potato, cut into long slices
1 pc carrot, cut into long slices
1-2 stalk green onions, cut into long slices
1 pc onion, sliced
2 pc red chili, slice diagonally
4 pc kani stick, slice diagonally

Batter:
8 tbsp flour
4 tbsp cornstarch
1 pc egg
200 ml water
2 tsp chicken powder / flavor enhancers
1/2 tsp salt
1/2 tsp pepper

Dipping sauce:
1 clove garlic, minced
1-2 curly red chili, sliced
2 tbsp fish sauce
3 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp sesame oil
3 tbsp water
2 tbsp rice wine vinegar
2.5 tbsp sugar
1 stalk green onions, sliced
1 tsp sesame seeds

Steps:
1. Prepare the chives, potato, carrot, green onions, onion, and kani sticks. Combine in a bowl and mix well.
2. Combine all the batter ingredients and mix with the veggies. Mix well.
3. Heat the pan and add some oil, then pour all the batter in. Place sliced chili on top. Cook on medium heat.
4. After the bottom is crispy, flip the pancake and add a bit more oil. Let it cook.
5. For the dipping sauce, combine all the ingredients and mix well.
6. Slice the Korean Pancake to your liking and serve with the dipping sauce.

Title: Resep Saus Barbecue: Cocok Untuk Berbagai Hidangan! [Kualitas Resto]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MrsaBWQX890

Barbecue Sauce Recipe: Great for Various Dishes

Barbecue or BBQ Sauce is one of the most popular sauces. It's usually served to complement meat and grilled seafood dishes. There are many kinds of Barbecue Sauce. This time, I'm sharing my version of Barbecue Sauce. This sauce is suitable to be paired with various dishes.

Barbecue Sauce (yield: 1 jar)

Basic Barbecue Sauce ingredients:
500 g tomato sauce
80 g palm sugar
2-3 tbsp vinegar
50 ml apple juice
50 ml water
1 tbsp paprika powder
1 tbsp chili powder (optional)
2 tsp mustard powder
1 tsp white pepper
1/2 tbsp onion powder
1/2 tbsp garlic powder
2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1/2 - 1 tbsp liquid smoke (optional)

Barbecue Sauce:
1 tbsp butter
3 clove garlic, minced
1/4 pc onion, chopped
1 tsp beef stock powder
15 tbsp Basic Barbecue Sauce
100 ml water

Steps:
1. Combine all the basic Barbecue Sauce ingredients into a pan. Mix well.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Store in a container / a jar or use to make Barbecue Sauce right away.
4. For the Barbecue Sauce, heat the butter and sauté the onion and garlic until fragrant. Then, add the Barbecue Sauce in, water, and beef stock powder.
5. Cook the Barbecue Sauce until it's reduced or to the desired consistency.

Title: TANPA Telur & Mesin: Resep Mie Kenyal [100% Sukses, Bikin Sendiri]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SR7EDVIuifw

NO Eggs & Machine: Bouncy Noodles Recipe [100% Success]

Noodles are something kids and adults alike love. This time, I'll share an eggless noodle recipe using an easy method that doesn't require a machine. It's more budget-friendly and healthy! This noodle can be used for a number of dishes, such as Fried Noodles, Seafood Noodles, etc.

Noodles Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
450 g all-purpose flour
200 ml water
2 tsp salt
1.5 tbsp oil
Cornstarch, as needed

Steps:
1. Combine all the ingredients until it forms a well-merged dough. Let it rest for 2 hours, covered by plastic wrap or a clean cloth.
2. The dough can be kneaded once in a while and rested for 20-30 minutes. Repeat this step 2-3 times until the dough becomes elastic.
3. Sprinkle the cutting board with cornstarch and roll the dough using a rolling pin to a 1/2 cm thickness.
4. Sprinkle the entire dough surface with cornstarch. Then, fold and slice the dough with a knife to the desired thickness.
5. The noodle is ready to use.

Title: Pengganti Opor! Resep Sayur Lodeh Sarden [Gurih Sehat]

Easy and Budget-Friendly: Sayur Lodeh with Sardines Recipe [Complete]

Sayur Lodeh is considered a favorite menu for many people. Though it is quite simple, the flavor is very mouthwatering. Sayur Lodeh usually consists of many types of vegetables. This recipe is a bit different as I added some sardines. It makes the dish even more flavorful and practical.

Sayur Lodeh with Sardines Recipe (yield: 10 servings)

Ingredients:
1 can Yamato Sardines

Blended Spice:
5 clove garlic, pounded
5 pc shallots, pounded

Contents:

50 g Melinjo
1 pc Chayote, diced
5 pc green chili, sliced
1 pack vermicelli, soaked in hot water
150 ml coconut milk
1200 ml water
1 tbsp salt
2 tbsp sugar
1 tsp pepper

Steps:
1. Dry the sardines on a paper towel. Heat the oil and sprinkle a bit of flour so it won't splash too much and fry the sardines until they're crisp. Set aside.
2. Blend the spices with a bit of oil, then sauté with the galangal and bay leaves until fragrant and reduced. Then, add some water.
3. Add the carrot, long bean, corn, eggplant, tempeh, melinjo, melinjo leaves, chayote, and green chili. Boil until they're soft and cooked.
4. Add the fried sardines and coconut milk. Season with sugar, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
5. Add the vermicelli in and turn the heat off.
6. Sayur Lodeh with Sardines is ready to serv

--------------------------------------------------
