Title: Nikmat! Resep MIE KUAH PEDAS KOREA Jjampong [100% Bahan Lokal]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9Z3_18mqig4

Annyeong! Jjampong Recipe [Korean Seafood Noodle Soup]

Jjampong is a spicy seafood noodle soup that is popular in Korean dramas. The name Jjampong comes from the Japanese word for "mix". The trademark of Jjampong is the variety of seafood used and the mouthwatering spicy red broth.

Korean Seafood Noodle Soup Recipe (yield: 2 servings)

Ingredients:
2 servings noodles

Stock:
200 g prawn shells and heads
5 clove garlic
5 pc shallots
1 tsp whole white pepper
1 L water

Elements:
1 pc squid
6 pc prawns
50 g sliced beef
5 pc Chinese cabbage, sliced
1 pc carrot, sliced
2 stalk green onions, sliced
1 pc onion, sliced
6 pc Champignon mushroom, halved

Seasoning:
3 clove garlic, minced
1 tbsp chili powder
1 tbsp chili sauce
1 tsp chicken stock powder
1 tbsp fish sauce
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 L water
Sugar, salt to taste

Garnish:
Green chili, sliced
Green onions, sliced
Kimchi

Steps:
1. Heat some oil. Add the prawns, garlic, shallots, and pepper. Fry to a crisp and until the oil turns red. Then, add the water in.
2. Blend the prawn stock and strain.
3. Sauté the minced garlic and onion with a bit of oil. Add the carrots, water, and stock.
4. Add the fish sauce, soy sauce, and chili powder. Mix well.
5. Clean the squid, then slice diagonally but not all the way down. Then, cut into squares.
6. Add the prawns, squid, beef, and vegetables into the soup. Season with sugar and salt. Bring to a boil and cook until all the elements are cooked.
7. Boil some water and cook the noodles for 2-3 minutes, depending on its thickness.
8. Plate the noodles and pour the Jjampong soup in, along with the toppings. Serve with sliced green chili, sliced green onions, and kimchi as garnish.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Gurih Pedas Sambal Embe! Resep Udang Goreng Bawang [Khas Bali]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M9FDV73j9Qo

Spicy and Savory: Fried Shallots Shrimp Recipe [Bali’s Sambal Embe]

Shrimp is a seafood that's easy to prepare. This time, I'm making a dish with Balinese flavors, called Fried Shallots Shrimp. It's inspired from a Balinese Sambal, Sambal Embe. The combination of spiciness and the savoriness of fried shallots makes this dish great to be savored with rice.

Fried Shallots Shrimp (yield: 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g shrimp, medium size
1/2 tsp salt
1/2 tsp pepper
1/2 tsp flavor enhancers
2 tbsp tamarind juice
1 tbsp cornstarch

Sambal Embe:
8 clove garlic, thinly sliced
10 pc shallots, sliced
10-15 pc bird's eye chili, sliced
2 pc shrimp paste
1-2 pc Kaffir lime
1/2 tsp salt
1/4 tsp flavor enhancers
1/2 tsp powdered sugar (optional)
Oil, as needed
Rice

Steps:
1. Slice half of the shrimp's head. Slice the back, don't let it detach, and devein.
2. Marinate the shrimp with tamarind juice, salt, pepper, flavor enhancers, and cornstarch. Let it sit until the seasoning is absorbed.
3. For the Sambal Embe, fry the shallots on medium heat until half-dry. Then, add the garlic and fry it for a moment. Then, add the bird's eye chili and fry until everything is a bit dry. Don't let it burn. Set aside.
4. Fry the shrimp paste for a bit. Set aside.
5. Crumble the shrimp paste and add to the shallots, garlic, and chili. Season with salt, flavor enhancers, and powdered sugar. Then, mix well.
6. Fry the shrimp to golden brown. Set aside
7. After the shrimp cools, fry it again on high heat for 5-10 seconds to make the shell crispy.
8. Mix the shrimp with Sambal Embe. Add the lime juice.
9. Serve Fried Shallots Shrimp with warm rice.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Lembut TANPA Oven! Resep Milk Bath Cake Dessert Box [Khas Meksiko]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YJZ5ej5L1s4

Super-Fluffy with No Oven! Milk Bath Cake Dessert Box Recipe [Mexican Style]

Milk Bath Cake or Tres Leches Cake is one of the signature Mexican desserts. It's a soft and moist butter cake bathed in milk. It's sweet and decadent, making this dessert box into people's favorite.

Milk Bath Cake Recipe (for one 8" x 4" pan)

Steamed Sponge ingredients:
3 pc egg
60 g sugar
1/2 tsp SP (emulsifier)
65 g all-purpose flour
1/2 tsp salt
1/4 tsp baking powder
2 tsp cornstarch
15 g powdered milk
45 g melted butter
1/2 tsp Vanilla extract

Milk Bath ingredients:
50 g creamer
50 g condensed milk
250 ml water

Garnish:
Whipped Cream

Steps:
1. For the steamed sponge, whip the eggs, sugar, and SP until expanded with a mixer.
2. Add sifted flour, salt, powdered milk, baking powder, and cornstarch into the egg mix. Stir gently.
3. Add the melted butter and Vanilla extract. Mix well.
4. Prepare an 8" x 4" pan and line with baking paper. Pour the batter in and steam for 25 minutes. After the cake is cooked, remove the baking paper at the bottom.
5. For the Milk Bath, combine the creamer, water, and condensed milk. Mix well.
6. Prepare a box / a jar. Cut the sponge according to the container's size and assemble inside the box / jar.
7. Pierce the sponge and pour the Milk Bath in. Top with whipped cream and garnish with grated steamed sponge.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Resep PUDING BUSA Yoghurt: Bisa Pakai Bunga Atau Buah [100% Sukses!]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sdIKM8PXBUk

Soft and Melts in Your Mouth: Yogurt Foam Pudding Recipe

Foam Pudding is a pudding made with whipped egg whites that has a foamy texture. This dish is a great snack for your family as it's practical, yummy, and healthy. Both kids and adults will love it!

Yogurt Foam Pudding Recipe (yields one 9" pan)

First layer ingredients:
350 ml water
50 g sugar
12 g jelly powder
Edible flower (blue-pea, great dianthus, phlox)
5 pc strawberry

Second layer ingredients:
2 pc Cimory Strawberry Yogurt 
1 pc Cimory Original Yogurt
100 g milk
50 g sugar
15 g jelly powder
2 pc egg whites
1/4 tsp vanilla powder

Third layer ingredients:
500 g milk
60 g sugar
15 g jelly powder
2 pc egg whites
1/4 vanilla powder
Food coloring

Steps:
1. For the first layer, combine all the ingredients and bring to a boil.
2. Pour a bit of the clear jelly and arrange the edible flowers and strawberries. Let it set halfway and pour the rest of the jelly on top.
3. For the second layer, mix yogurt, milk, sugar, and jelly powder. Bring to a boil.
4. Whip the egg whites and vanilla with a mixer until stiff. Pour the hot pudding while stirring constantly. Pour on top of the first layer.
5. For the third layer, mix the milk, sugar, and jelly powder. Bring to a boil.
6. Whip the egg whites and vanilla with a mixer until stiff. Pour the hot pudding while stirring constantly. Add food coloring to taste and mix well. Pour on top of the second layer.
7. Wait until the pudding cools down and put in the fridge.
8. Make sure all the layers have set before removing the mold.

Title: Anak-Anak Pasti Suka! Resep Creamy Pasta
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qo4dCxpOubA

Kids'll Love it! Creamy Pasta Recipe [Spaghetti Carbonara]

There are so many variations of this Italian dish, one of them being Creamy Pasta. This time, I'm sharing a family-favorite Creamy Mushroom Spaghetti recipe. The pasta with the creamy sauce made of milk, cheese, and egg yolk is savory and sweet, suitable for kids.

Creamy Pasta Recipe (yield: 2 servings)

Ingredients:
120 g Spaghetti No.10
10 pc Champignon mushroom, sliced
2 pc smoked beef, sliced

Creamy Sauce:
1/4 pc onion, chopped
3 pc garlic, minced
1/4 tsp nutmeg
1/2 tsp pepper
1/2 tbsp flour
100-200 ml water
80 ml cream
1 tbsp butter
1 tbsp Parmesan
1 tbsp cheese spread
1 pc egg yolk
1/2 tsp salt
1 tsp sugar

Steps:
1. Boil the spaghetti until 3/4 cooked for ±5-6 minutes. Set aside.
2. Heat the pan and sauté the mushroom with a bit of oil until fragrant. Add the onion, garlic, and smoked beef. Sauté until fragrant.
3. Add the pepper, nutmeg, and flour. Cook until fragrant.
4. Add in the water and spaghetti. Season with salt and sugar. Cook until the water is a bit reduced, then add the cream in and cook until it's well-absorbed.
5. Add the butter, Parmesan, and cheese spread in. Mix well and turn off the heat.
6. Add the yolk in. Mix well.
7. Serve the Creamy Pasta garnished with Parmesan.

Title: Ekonomis! Resep Tiramisu Kualitas Hotel! [Bahan Lokal, Tanpa Mascarpone & Cream Cheese]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pa3AZPX9idk

No Mascarpone: Palm Sugar Café Latte Tiramisu Recipe [Dessert Box]

Tiramisu Cake Recipe. Tiramisu is a dessert from Italy. This cake usually consists of mascarpone, chocolate, and coffee layers. This time, I'm making it simpler yet special by using easy-to-get ingredients. The creamy and savory pastry cream flavor meets the fragrant coffee and the sweetness of palm sugar makes this dish great to be consumed as a snack with your loved ones.

Palm Sugar Café Latte Tiramisu Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Pastry Cream ingredients:
125 ml coconut milk
125 ml milk
4 pc Pandan leaves
1 pc egg
15 g cornstarch
25 g sugar
1 tsp Vanilla extract
1/2 tsp salt
60 g butter

Additional ingredients:
150 ml whipped cream (pre-whipped)

Condiments:
Roma Kelapa biscuits / ladyfingers / egg drops
80 g coffee concentrate (Espresso)
35 g palm sugar
5 g cocoa powder
Whipped cream (for garnish)

Steps:
1. For the pastry cream, combine the egg, sugar, cornstarch, salt, and Vanilla extract. Mix well.
2. Bring the coconut milk, milk, and Pandan leaves to a boil. Add half of the mixture to the egg mix. Stir well and put back to the pan as you strain them. Keep stirring on low heat until the mix thickens.
3. After turning the heat off, add the butter in and mix until it dissolves. Transfer to a bowl and cover with a plastic wrap.
4. Mix the espresso with the palm sugar until the sugar dissolves.
5. Whip the cream until it firms up. Combine with the cooled down pastry cream. Mix well.
6. Dip 5 pieces of Roma Kelapa biscuits into the coffee and place on the bottom of the container. Pack it up with a spoon. Pour the pastry cream to fill 1/3 of the container, then dip 5 more pieces of Roma Kelapa biscuits and place them on top of the cream. Pour more pastry cream to fill 2/3 of the container.
7. Prepare some whipped cream inside a piping bag equipped with a round tip. Pipe the cream to your liking and sprinkle the surface with some sifted cocoa powder.
8. Tiramisu can be served immediately or kept in the fridge for 2-3 hours to set.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: 100% PASTI Fluffy! Resep Pancake Jepang Selembut Kapas [Bahan Lokal]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OVawMk2_UjA

Soft Like Cotton: Japanese Fluffy Pancakes Recipe

Fluffy pancakes are pancakes with a sponge-like texture that is soft and airy. It's quite easy to make. The key is in the egg whites that are beaten until they expand and stiff. Fluffy Pancakes will taste even better when served with Ovomaltine sauce and strawberry slices.

Creamer Whipped Cream Recipe: https://youtu.be/5z2q3B8lgy0

Fluffy Pancakes Recipe (6 pcs)

Pancake Batter ingredients:
2 pc egg yolks
75 g milk
20 g oil
85 g all-purpose flour
1 tsp baking powder
1/4 tsp vanilla extract
3 pc egg whites
30 g sugar
1 tsp vinegar

Ovomaltine Sauce:
150 ml whipped cream
3 tbsp Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream
1-2 tbsp milk

Garnish:
6 pc strawberries
1 tbsp cocoa powder

Steps:
1. Whisk the yolks, milk, oil, and vanilla extract. Mix well.
2. Add the sifted flour and baking powder in. Mix well.
3. Whisk the egg whites, vinegar, and sugar until stiff. When it's inverted, it should look like a bird's beak.
4. Pour 1/3 of the whites mix to the yolks mix. Stir well. Add the rest of the whites and mix well.
5. Heat a nonstick pan. Brush with a bit of oil. Cook at low heat.
6. Pour 2-3 scoops of batter. Place the lid on and cook for 2-4 minutes.
7. Flip the pancakes. Place the lid on once more and cook for 2-4 minutes, depending on the heat and the pancake's thickness.
8. Whip some cream with a mixer until it's a bit firm. Add the Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream and milk. Whip it again until it's mixed well.
9. Serve the pancakes with the Ovomaltine sauce. Garnish with cocoa powder and strawberry slices.

Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream is available at Ranch market, Farmers market, Foodhall, Lion Superindo, Giant, Kem Chick, Grand lucky, Indomaret, many leading supermarkets, and grocery shops.

Title: Krispi, Manis, Gurih! Resep Ayam Goreng Madu Korea [Bahan Lokal, Kualitas Restoran]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KnKp7ls6BP0

Crispy, Savory, Sweet: Korean Honey Chicken Recipe (Popcorn Chicken)

Korean Honey Chicken is a popular South Korean dish. The battered chicken is coated with a sweet and savory honey sauce. This is a great dish to be served as a main dish or as a snack.

Korean Honey Chicken Recipe (yield 3-4 serving)

Ingredients:
200 g chicken thigh fillet, diced
1 tsp minced garlic
1/2 tsp grated ginger
1 pc egg
2 tbsp cornstarch
1 tsp sesame oil
2 tbsp coconut milk
1/2 tsp salt
1/2 tsp sugar
1/4 tsp pepper
1/4 tsp flavor enhancers / mushroom stock powder

Dry Coating:
1 cup all-purpose flour
2 tbsp cornstarch

Sauce:
2 tbsp soy sauce
4 tbsp honey
1 tbsp palm sugar
2 tbsp sesame oil
2 tbsp oil
2 tsp minced garlic
3 tsp sesame seeds

Garnish:
1 stalk green onions, sliced

Steps:
1. Mix the chicken with all the marinating ingredients. Marinate for at least 30 minutes to let the liquid get absorbed.
2. Combine the flour and cornstarch.
3. Dip the chicken into the dry coating until evenly coated and fry until golden brown.
4. For the sauce, sauté the garlic with oil and add all the other ingredients. Cook until it thickens.
5. Add the chicken in. Stir well.
6. Korean Honey Chicken is ready to serve with sliced green onions as the garnish.

Title: TANPA Tobiko! Resep Nasi Telur Mentai Ala Jepang [Praktis, Cocok Untuk Keluarga]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JP1IPyBvbO8

Simple without Tobiko: Egg Mentai Rice Recipe [Japanese-Style]

Egg Mentai Rice Recipe. Mentai or Mentaiko is a Japanese ingredient made of pollock roe. This ingredient is quite popular in Indonesia, such as for Salmon Mentai, Chicken Mentai, Dim Sum Mentai, etc. This time, I'm sharing the recipe for a simple Egg Mentai Rice with ingredients you'll find in your kitchen.

Salmon Mentai Rice Recipe: https://youtu.be/Gd7de7ryRi8

Egg Mentai Rice Recipe (yield: 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
6 pc eggs

Mentai Sauce:
6 tbsp mayonnaise
1 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp tomato sauce
1/2 clove garlic, minced
1 tsp onion, chopped
1 tbsp rice wine vinegar / 1 tsp regular vinegar
2 tsp sugar
1 tsp mushroom stock powder / dashi
1 tsp chili powder

Garnish:
Nori, shredded
Sesame seeds
Green onions, sliced
Rice

Steps:
1. Making the Mentai sauce, combine the onion, garlic, vinegar, sugar, and mushroom stock powder. Mix well and marinate for 5 minutes, then add the rest of the ingredients. Stir.
2. Lightly whisk the eggs. Heat some oil and pour the eggs into the pan. Turn the heat off and keep stirring.
3. Place the egg on top of the rice and pour the Mentai sauce on top.
4. Torch the Mentai sauce until it browns.
5. Serve the Egg Mentai Rice with nori, green onions, and sesame seeds.

Title: Resep Whip Cream! [Tanpa SP, Tanpa Mixer, 100% Sukses]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5z2q3B8lgy0

NO Mixer, in Just ONE Minute! Whipped Cream Recipe [100% Success]

Whipped cream is one of the creams that have a high milk fat content. There are 3 types of whipped cream normally available in the market: powder, liquid, and spray. This time, I’m sharing how you can make whipped cream using creamer. You can use this to decorate cakes or drinks.

Creamer Whipped Cream Recipe (yield: 1 bowl)

Ingredients:
150 g creamer
75 ml cold water
30 g powdered sugar
10 tbsp lemon juice

Steps:
1. Combine the creamer, powdered sugar, and cold water. Mix well.
2. Add the lemon juice slowly until the mix thickens, then mix with a balloon whisk until firm.
3. Whipped Cream is ready to use.

Title: Imut Mini! Resep Garlic Bread Sosis: Nikmat Istimewa! [Cocok Untuk Keluarga]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=llf_alNr0z8

Mini Garlic Sausage Bread Recipe. You can create various dishes with sausages. This time, I'm making Mini Garlic Sausage Bread using puff pastry and fragrant garlic sauce. This dish can be served as a breakfast menu, school lunchbox, or snacks for a relaxing time at home.

Mini Garlic Sausage Bread Recipe (±30 pcs)

Ingredients:
1 sheet puff pastry (22 x 22 cm)
1 pack Kanzler Beef Cocktail Sausages
2 tbsp mustard
100 g mozzarella cheese
1 pc egg
Salt, pepper, to taste

Spread ingredients:
100 g melted butter
35 g minced garlic
20 g condensed milk
15 g honey
1 tbsp chopped parsley
1 pc egg
1/2 tsp salt
1/4 tsp pepper

Steps:
1. Sprinkle some flour on the cutting board. Roll the puff pastry to about 30 x 30 cm large. Cut into 30 pieces of 5x6 cm.
2. Pipe the mustard at the center of the puff pastry. Sprinkle with mozzarella cheese, salt, and pepper. Place the sausage on top. Brush the egg wash on one side to glue.
3. Wrap the puff pastry around the sausage. Press the edges so it doesn't get loose.
4. Arrange the sausages in a lined baking pan / ring cutter. You can also bake them individually without a pan.
5. For the spread, combine the melted butter, garlic, parsley, condensed milk, honey, salt, pepper, and egg. Mix well.
6. Brush the spread on top. For the individual Garlic Sausage Bread, bake at 180°C for 15 minutes. For the ones in the baking pan, bake for 15 minutes. Then, brush the spread on top once more. You can also add chopped parsley. Next, bake it again for 10 minutes and remove the pan / ring cutter. Bake it again for 10-12 minutes to crisp up the edges.
7. Mini Garlic Sausage Bread is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Resep Rica-Rica Khas Manado [Sarden Kaleng, Kualitas Restoran]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VL-7VIneFlY

Manado's Sardines Rica-Rica Recipe

Rica-Rica Sambal is a Manadonese dish that can be combined with various proteins. This time, I'm using Yamato Sardines. The signature spicy flavor and lemon basil aroma mixed with fried sardines will enhance the dish's texture and taste.

Sardines Rica-Rica Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients:
2 cans Yamato Sardines
250 ml oil

Rica-Rica ingredients:
5 clove garlic
3 pc candlenuts
8 pc shallots
10 pc bird's eye chili
8-12 pc large red chili
2 cm ginger
2 cm turmeric
1 pc lemongrass
100 ml oil
50 ml water
15 lemon basil
1 pc scallions
1 pc bay leaf
8 pc Kaffir lime leaves
2 pc pandan leaves
1 pc turmeric leaves
1/2 tsp salt
1/4 tsp pepper
1 tsp sugar
1/2 tsp mushroom stock powder

Steps:
1. Pat dry the sardines with a paper towel. Keep the sauce for later.
2. Heat the oil. Sprinkle some flour so the oil doesn't splash out. Add the sardines and fry until dry. Set aside.
3. Fry the shallots, garlic, and candlenuts. Add to the food processor and blend to a fine paste.
4. Fry the chili, bird's eye chili, turmeric, ginger, and lemongrass. Add to the food processor and blend. The texture shouldn't be too fine.
5. Sauté the spice mix with bay leaf, Kaffir lime leaves, pandan leaves, and turmeric leaf until fragrant.
6. Add the fried sardines. Add some water and a bit of the sardines sauce. Mix well.
7. Season with salt, pepper, sugar, and mushroom stock powder.
8. Add the lemon basil and scallions in. Turn the heat off.
9. Sardines Rica-Rica is ready to serve.

Title: Modal Jempol! Resep Kue Kering Coklat Khas Swedia [Tanpa Cetakan]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ScV0-9LXZHA

Thumbprint Cookies Recipe

Hallongrotta a.k.a. Thumbprint Cookies is a Swedish cookie that is shaped using the thumb and filled with fruit jams. Here, I'm making something a bit different using Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream filling. The savory butter and the sweetness and crunchiness of Ovomaltine make a great combination.

Thumbprint Cookies Recipe (yield 1 jar ±50 pieces)

Cookie dough ingredients:
125 g butter
60 g powdered sugar
1 pc egg yolk
150 g pastry flour
50 g cornstarch
50 g powdered milk
1/2 tsp salt
1 tsp vanilla extract

Filling ingredients:
5 tbsp Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream
5 tbsp milk

Steps:
1. Mix the butter, powdered sugar, powdered milk, cornstarch, yolk, vanilla extract, and salt using a spatula until well-incorporated.
2. Add the flour in. Stir until the dough is merged. Do not over-mix.
3. Sprinkle the cutting board with cornstarch. Roll the dough and cut it up evenly. Make a ball and arrange on top of a pan lined with baking paper.
4. Push the dough with a spoon or your thumb. Bake at 150°C for 10 minutes.
5. Push the dough again to form a crater. Bake once more for 10 minutes.
6. For the filling, mix the Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream and milk. Mix well. Transfer to a piping bag.
7. If you'll bake the filling, half-bake the cookies and fill it with the Ovomaltine mix. Bake it again at 100°C for 5-10 minutes until it's browned.
8. If you won't bake the filling, fill the fully-baked cookies with the Ovomaltine mix.
9. Serve with powdered sugar sprinkled on top.

Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream is available at Ranch market, Farmers market, Foodhall, Lion Superindo, Giant, Kem Chick, Grand lucky, Indomaret, many leading supermarkets, and grocery shops.

Title: Layak Jual! Resep Sambal Cumi Balado [Kualitas Restoran]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TK35PKPtlLc

Spicy and Addictive! Squid Sambal Recipe

Aside from its delicious flavor, squid contains lots of nutrients, starting from vitamins to minerals that are important for our body. This time, I'm making a Squid Sambal using salted squid. The bouncy and soft texture of the squid is combined with the spiciness and savoriness of the Sambal. It's a great dish for spicy food lovers. I got all of these fresh ingredients from HappyFresh #FreshlyHandpicked.

Squid Sambal Recipe (yield: 2 jars)

Ingredients:
300 g salted squid
5 pc Kaffir lime leaves
1 stalk lemongrass
2 pc bay leaves
5 clove garlic
10 pc shallots
50 ml oil
2 pc shrimp paste
30 pc bird's eye chili
8 pc red chili, large
1 tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
1 tsp flavor enhancers
1 pc limau lime

Steps:
1. Soak the squid with hot water. Set aside. Slice the squid and rinse to clean.
2. Heat a bit of oil. Sauté the squid and place the lid on to prevent the oil from splattering. Cook until the squid changes color. Remove and set aside.
3. For the spice mix, blend the shallots, garlic, and oil together to a paste.
4. For the chopped spices, add the red chili, bird's eye chili, and shrimp paste to a food processor. Chop finely.
5. Heat the pan where you fried the squid. Sauté the spice mix, lemongrass, Kaffir lime leaves, and bay leaves until fragrant. Add the chopped spices and sauté until fragrant on medium heat.
6. Season with sugar, salt, flavor enhancers, and limau lime. Mix well.
8. Squid Sambal can be stored for 1 week in a sterilized jar or vacuumed plastic bag.

Title: Istimewa, ANTI Kempes! Resep Bolu Marmer Premium Turunan Keluarga [100% Sukses]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ec_kkMyaCZg

Soft, Family-Favorite Marble Cake Recipe

Old-school sponge cakes is unique due to the brown-colored motives or pattern when they're sliced. The rich texture and fragrant aroma mixed with the right amount of sweetness is great to be eaten with tea or coffee.

Marble Cake Recipe

Ingredients:
70 g margarine
70 g butter
70 g Wijsman / Hollman
6 pc yolks
60 g powdered sugar
140 g all-purpose protein
30 g powdered milk
4 g baking powder
4 pc egg whites
120 g powdered sugar
5 g chocolate powder

Steps:
1. Whip the butter, margarine, Wijsman, and powdered sugar until they expand. Add the yolk in one by one. Whip it again until it expands and pale in color.
2. Add the sifted flour, powdered milk, and baking powder in. Stir in one direction using a balloon whisk or spatula.
3. Whip the egg whites as you add the powdered sugar bit by bit. Whip until the whites form a bird's beak shape.
4. Mix the whites mixture into the butter mixture bit by bit until it's evenly mixed. Do not over-mix.
5. Pour half of the batter into a buttered and floured pan. Even it out.
6. Mix a quarter of the batter with chocolate powder. Mix well and pour on top of the yellow batter.
7. Pour the rest of the yellow batter on top of the chocolate one. Swirl with a chopstick.
8. Bake at 180°C for 35-40 minutes.
9. Make sure the cake is cooled down before removing it from the pan.

Title: Iris Miring! Resep Sate Maranggi Empuk TANPA Pengempuk [Idul Adha]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kt-m1eqohME

Slice it Diagonally! Tender Maranggi Satay Recipe with NO Tenderizer [Eid al-Adha]

Maranggi Satay is most commonly found in Purwakarta area. This Sundanese dish is made of sliced beef and marinated with a special grilling sauce. It tastes even better when it's served with rice cakes or Timbel rice.

Maranggi Satay (yield: 12 skewers)

Ingredients:
300 g tenderloin

The spices:
6 clove garlic
10 pc shallots
3 cm galangal, sliced
2 tsp coriander, roasted
3 tbsp tamarind juice
4 tbsp "Sedaap Kedelai Hitam Special" sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp brown sugar
1 tsp salt
1 tsp pepper
1/2 tsp mushroom stock powder

Tomato Sambal:
2 pc tomatoes
5 pc red bird's eye chili
15 pc green bird's eye chili
1 clove garlic
3 pc shallots
2 pc Kaffir lime
1/2 tsp salt
1 tsp sugar

Steps:
1. Cut the beef into long slices to about a forefinger wide. Cut in the direction of the grain.
2. Blend all the spices to a paste. Add to the beef and mix well. Marinate the beef for at least 1-2 hours.
3. After 2 hours, skewer the meat on a pre-soaked skewer using a zigzag pattern.
4. Heat up the griller. Brush a bit of oil or beef fat. Grill both sides of the satay and baste with the marinating sauce once in a while. Adjust the doneness to your liking.
5. For the Tomato Sambal, mash the garlic with salt to a paste. Add the red and green bird's eye chili. Mash to a fine paste, then add sliced tomatoes. Season with sugar and Kaffir lime juice. Mix well.
6. Serve Maranggi Satay with Tomato Sambal, sliced shallots, Kaffir lime, and sweet soy sauce.

Title: 100% Lurus Krispi! Resep Tempura Udang Marugame [Bahan Lokal]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dzqRjFxD0MA

Tempura Moriawase ala Japanese Restaurants Recipe

Tempura is one of the most popular Japanese dishes. This time, I'm sharing a recipe for Tempura Moriawase that's composed of shrimp and vegetables. The key to making a crispy Tempura is to make the right batter. It's guaranteed to be crispy as long as you pay attention to the step-by-step!

Tempura Moriawase Recipe (30 pcs)

Tempura ingredients:
10 tbsp pastry flour
25-30 tbsp cold water
1 tsp vinegar
1/4 tsp baking soda
8 pc shrimp, peeled
1/2 onion, sliced
6 pcs Horenso
1/4 pc Kabocha, sliced
1 pc eggplant, slice to a fan

Tentsuyu ingredients:
3 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp apple juice
5 tbsp water
1/2 tbsp sugar

Condiments:
1 stalk scallions, sliced
3 cm ginger, grated
1/2 pc radish, grated

Steps:
1. For the batter, combine the vinegar and baking soda until it bubbles. Add to the water and flour mixture. Stir well.
2. Cut the peeled shrimp. Massage the shrimp to straighten it up. Season with a bit of salt.
3. Place the shrimp and all the vegetables save for the Horenso on a cutting board. Sprinkle both sides with flour.
4. Heat the oil. Dip each ingredient into the batter and fry in the hot oil until golden brown. Remove and set aside.
4. For the Tentsuyu, combine the soy sauce, apple juice, water, and sugar. Mix well.
5. Serve the Tempura with the Tentsuyu, sliced scallions, grated ginger, and grated radish as condiments.

Title: TANPA Oven, Rice Cooker Saja! Resep Bolu Keju Castella Cake [Kue Ulang Tahun]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=K-e1AGTwpWk

NO Oven, Only with a Rice Cooker! Naturally Soft Cheese Sponge Cake Recipe [Castella Cake]

Castella Cake or kasutera is a type of sponge cake that is very popular in Japan. This cake is quite easy to make as it doesn't need emulsifier like SP, TBM, or Ovalet. The difference here is I'm using a rice cooker to bake the cake. The soft and porous cake texture is complemented with the sweet whipped cream and savory cheese. It's great to accompany your coffee or tea.

Castella Cake Recipe (for a 6" pan)

Ingredients:
4 pc egg yolks
40 g sugar
40 ml oil
60 ml milk
85 g all-purpose flour
4 pc egg whites
60 g sugar
1/2 tsp salt
1 tsp Vanilla extract
2.5 tsp baking powder (optional)
2 pc sliced cheese

Frosting ingredients:
150 ml whipped cream
25 g sugar
200 g Cheddar cheese

Steps:
1. Whisk the yolks, sugar, oil, milk, salt, and Vanilla extract. Mix well.
2. Add the sifted flour and baking powder (optional) in bit by bit. Mix well.
3. Whip the whites until foamy. Add the sugar in two increments. Whip until when lifted, the egg whites form a bird's beak.
4. Pour 1/4 of the whites into the yolk mixture. Mix well and combine with the rest of the whites. Mix well.
5. Pour the batter into the rice cooker pan that has been rubbed with butter and flour.
6. Add the sliced cheese into the batter. Don't let it touch the base.
7. Cook with the rice cooker for 40 minutes.
8. When it's done, remove the pan and turn it over on a cooling rack.
9. Whip the whipped cream with sugar until it's firm and add into a piping bag.
10. After the cake cools, slice it into two even parts. Pipe the whipped cream evenly on the first layer and even it out using a spatula. Place the second layer on top and pipe the whipped cream again evenly on the entire cake's surface. Even it out using a spatula.
11. Add the grated cheese until it covers the entire cake.
12. Castella Cake is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Resep Niku Udon Ala Marugame [100% Bahan Lokal]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=g7SCMI_ul20

Niku Udon Recipe a la Marugame [100% Local Ingredients]

This signature Japanese noodle dish has two main points, the noodle and the soup. It's usually served with various toppings. This time, I'm trying to duplicate Marugame's Niku Udon.

Udon Recipe: https://youtu.be/IVjeK4VYs_w

Niku Udon Recipe (yield: 3-4 serving)

Ingredient:
3-4 serving Udon

Meat:
400 g Sukiyaki beef
2 tbsp apple juice
4 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp sugar
½ tbsp sesame oil

Soup:
8 pc shallots
1 whole garlic
3 cm ginger, pounded
16 tbsp apple juice
12 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp anchovies, roasted
2-3 L water
Salt, to taste
2-3 tbsp sugar
2 tbsp chicken stock powder

Tenkasu:
5 tbsp pastry flour
12-15 tbsp cold water
½ tsp vinegar
⅕ tsp baking soda
Oil

Condiments:
5 pc bird's eye chili, sliced
1 pc scallion, sliced

Steps:
1. Marinate the beef with apple juice, sesame oil, soy sauce, and sugar.
2. Sauté the beef until it's cooked and browned.
3. For the Tenkasu, combine the vinegar and baking soda until bubbling. Combine with the water and flour. Mix well.
4. Heat some oil and fry the batter on medium heat until golden brown.
5. For the soup, rinse the shallots and garlic, skin-on. Halve and add to the boiling water. Add scallions, ginger, anchovies, apple juice, and soy sauce. Mix well.
6. Season with sugar, salt, and chicken stock powder. Bring to a boil.
7. Boil the cooked Udon for a bit in the soup. Remove and transfer to a serving bowl.
8. Add the sautéed beef into the soup. Cook for a bit.
9. Serve the Udon with the beef, the soup, the Tenkasu, as well as the sliced bird's eye chili and sliced scallions.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Resep BAKCANG AYAM & CARA MEMBUNGKUS Bentuk Piramid Sempurna.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ghVCvNGfKEM

Chicken Bakcang Recipe & How to Make The Perfect Pyramid Shape.

Bakcang, also known as Zongzi, is a Chinese traditional dish made of rice with various fillings. We celebrate the Peh Cun festival on every sixth day of the fifth month in the Chinese calendar, where every family makes and eats Bakcang together. This dish is quite unique due to its triangular pyramid shape, wrapped with bamboo leaves and tied with a string.

Bakcang Recipe (10 pcs)

Ingredients:
2 cups rice
3 cups water
1 tsp salt
5 pc shallots, mashed
5 clove garlic, mashed
250 g chicken thigh fillet, chopped
100 g Shiitake mushroom
3 pc scallions
3 tbsp oyster sauce
3 tbsp soy sauce
12 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp mushroom stock powder
3 tbsp fried shallots
400 ml water
10 pc bird's eye chili
50 ml oil

Others:
20 pc Bakcang leaves
Raffia strings or bamboo ropes

Steps:
1. Rinse the rice. Add some water and salt. Cook until half-cooked.
2. Heat some oil. Sauté the mushroom until it dries and changes color.
3. Add the mashed shallots and garlic in. Sauté until fragrant.
4. Add the chopped scallions. Cook for a bit.
5. Add the chicken in. Stir.
6. Add some water. Season with sweet soy sauce, soy sauce, oyster sauce, and mushroom stock powder. Cook until the water is reduced and the sauces are absorbed well.
7. Add fried shallots. Mix well.
8. Boil the Bakcang leaves for a bit so they're easy to shape.
9. Prepare two pieces of Bakcang leaves. Arrange in a different direction, then make a conical shape. Fill with 2-3 tbsp of rice. Create a basin and add the chicken filling. Add 1 bird's eye chili and cover with 2 tbsp of rice. Pack the rice in.
10. Fold the Bakcang leaves. Make sure it won't leak and tie it with the Raffia string.
11. Prepare some water for boiling and add the Bakcang in. Make sure they're completely submerged and cover the pan. Boil for 1-2 hours. Let cool.
12. Bakcang is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Resep Udon Ala Marugame: Bahan Lokal Rasa Otentik [Tanpa Mesin]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IVjeK4VYs_w

Udon Recipe a la Marugame: Local Ingredients, Authentic Flavor [No Machine]

Udon Recipe a la Marugame. Udon is one of the most popular noodles from Japan. The differences between Udon and other noodles are its thickness and the type of flour used. To enjoy Udon, you can cook it into several varieties of dishes. Some are served with a hot broth, some are served cold.

Udon Recipe (3-4 serving)

Ingredients:
300 g all-purpose flour (me: Hong Kong flour / Pao flour)
140 g water
20 g salt
Cornstarch (to sprinkle on the dough)

Steps:
1. Dissolve the salt in the water.
2. Combine the water and sifted Hong Kong flour with chopsticks. Mix well. Press with hands so the flour is well-incorporated.
3. Transfer to a plastic bag. Flatten the dough with a rolling pin. Use your body weight to make it easier. You can also use the stepping method, where you wrap the dough in plastic, cover it with cloth, wear clean socks to make it more hygienic, and step on the dough with your heels. After the dough is flattened, roll it and flatten it again. Repeat for 5 -6 times until the dough becomes smooth.
4. Rest the dough for 10-15 minutes.
5. Flatten the dough once more. Make a ball and rest the dough for at least 2 hours.
6. Sprinkle the cutting board with cornstarch. Place the dough on top and sprinkle it with a bit of cornstarch. Flatten the dough using a rolling pin. After it's flattened, roll the dough with the rolling pin while pressing it down. Flatten to a thickness of 3 mm.
7. Fold the dough and sprinkle each layer with cornstarch to keep it from sticking. Slice the dough lengthwise. Adjust the thickness to your liking.
8. Prepare the boiling water. Boil the Udon for 15-20 minutes, depending on the thickness.
9. After it's cooked, remove from the water and rinse with cold water. Udon is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Murah Bukan Murahan! Resep Dimsum Ayam Istimewa: HALAL Gurih Kenyal [Rp 1.000]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Y6CPyuQ1jAU

Cheap, Not Shabby! Special Chicken Dim Sum Recipe: Tasty and Bouncy [IDR1.000]

Chili Oil Recipe: https://youtu.be/lNJimSmQLYw

Chicken and Shrimp Shumai Recipe (15-20 pcs)

Shumai Filling ingredients:
200 g chicken thigh fillet
50 g chicken skin
50 g peeled shrimp (interchangeable with chicken)
2 clove garlic
1 pc egg whites
9 tbsp sago flour
1/2 tbsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
1/2 tsp pepper
1/4 tsp mushroom stock powder
3 tbsp ice cubes
2 tsp oyster sauce
2 tsp sesame oil
2 tsp soy sauce
50 g shredded carrots
15-20 Shumai wrappers

Dipping Sauce ingredients:
2 clove garlic
1 pc shallots
3 bird's eye chili
1 pc medium-sized red chili
6 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp vinegar
150 ml water
2 tbsp cooking oil
2 tsp sugar
1/2 tsp mushroom stock powder

Steps:
1. Add half of the chicken, garlic, sago flour, egg whites, oyster sauce, soy sauce, sesame oil, pepper, salt, sugar, mushroom stock powder, and ice cubes into the food processor. Blend into a smooth consistency.
2. Add the rest of the chicken and the shrimp in. Blend for a bit.
3. Transfer to a bowl. Add half of the shredded carrots. Mix well.
4. Grab a Dim Sum wrapper. Add 2 tbsp of filling and wrap it. Add some shredded carrot on top.
5. Steam the Shumai for 15 - 20 minutes.
6. For the dipping sauce, mince the garlic, bird's eye chili, and shallots. Sauté until fragrant, then add some water.
7. Add the chili sauce, vinegar, sugar, and mushroom stock powder in. Bring to a boil.
8. Shumai is ready to serve.

Title: VIRAL Resep Pangsit Goreng Le Gino: Bumbunya PALING Penting!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lN1-fRpw3cQ

VIRAL Fried Dumplings a la Le Gino Recipe

Fried Dumplings Recipe

Filling ingredients (for 40 pcs):
1 pack dumpling wrappers
300 g chicken thigh fillet
20 g dried shrimp, soak in water
4 clove minced garlic
2 tbsp sago flour
3 tbsp ginger liquid
2 tsp sesame oil
4 tsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp sugar
1 tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom stock powder

Dried shrimp spice mix (for 250 g):
16 clove garlic
12 pc candlenuts
20 g dried shrimp, soak in water
1 pc shrimp paste
125 ml oil

Other ingredients (for 2 servings):
2 pc egg
3 pc shallots, sliced
2 clove garlic, minced
1 pc leeks, sliced
25 g bean sprouts
50 g cabbage, sliced
5 pc beef meatball, sliced
75 g chicken thigh fillet, sliced
3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp soy sauce
1/2 tsp salt
1/4 tsp mushroom stock powder
1/4 tsp pepper

Steps:
1. For the dried shrimp spice mix, chop the garlic and candlenuts and add to the blender with oil, shrimp paste, and dried shrimp. Blend to a paste. Sauté until fragrant and the color browns.
2. For the filling, blend all ingredients until smooth with a food processor.
3. Get one dumpling wrapper and place 1 tsp of filling. Brush some water on the skin and fold into a triangle. Fold the edges together and glue it on with water.
4. Boil water in a fairly large quantity and boil the dumplings until they float to the top.
5. Sauté the shallots and garlic. Add the eggs in and cook until they're fragrant. Add in the chicken, meatballs, dumplings, oyster sauce, soy sauce, and sweet soy sauce. Mix well.
6. Add 2 tbsp of the dried shrimp spice mix. Season with salt, pepper, and mushroom stock powder. Mix well.
7. Add the cabbage, bean sprouts, bok choy, and leeks in. Cook for a moment.
8. Fried Dumplings are ready to serve.

Title: Modal GARPU! Resep Churros Mini: Lebih Enak Pakai Susu! [Anak Kos Masuk]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yFIcHZmbBzI

Only with a Fork, No Piping Tip. Crispy, Soft Mini Churros Recipe!

A Churros is a snack food from Spain and Portugal. This hit snack is made of Choux Pastry dough that consists of flour, water, eggs, and butter. This time, I'm sharing a Mini Churros recipe with crispy outer texture yet soft inside. It tastes even better with an Ovomaltine sauce.

Mini Churros Recipe

Ingredients:
120 g flour
50 g butter
180 ml water
20 g sugar
1/2 tsp salt
1 pc egg
250 ml oil
50 ml plain milk
2 tbsp Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream

Steps:
1. Heat the water, butter, sugar, and salt. Bring to a boil.
2. Add the flour in. Cook in low heat and keep stirring until a non-sticky dough is formed.
3. Let the dough cool, then add the egg in. Stir until they're well-incorporated.
4. Transfer the dough into a piping bag with a tip installed.
5. You can also shape the dough with a for. Take the dough, make a long roll, and slice into small, even bits. Press the dough with the fork, roll it, and stick it together with a chopstick.
6. Heat some oil. Pipe a 3-cm (about 1") dough and cut it with scissors. Repeat until all the dough is finished.
7. Fry until golden brown.
8. For the Ovomaltine sauce, combine the milk with the Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream. Mix well.
9. Mini Churros are ready to serve with the Ovomaltine sauce or made into cereals by adding some milk.

Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream is available at Ranch market, Farmers market, Foodhall, Lion Superindo, Giant, Kem Chick, Grand lucky, Indomaret, many leading supermarkets, and grocery shops.

Title: TANPA Cream Cheese! Resep Garlic Bread Korea: Garing Tapi Lembut [100% Sukses]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HRBV_i9YcWE

WITHOUT Cream Cheese! Korean Garlic Bread Recipe: Crisp yet Soft [100% Success]

This South Korean street food is a bread with cream cheese topping and garlic sauce poured on top. This recipe is a bit different as I paired the bread with Cheese Bechamel topping. It goes along well with the crunchy and soft bread texture.

Korean Cheesy Garlic Bread Recipe (4 pcs)

Bread dough ingredients:
220 ml water
200 g high-protein flour (bread flour)
125 g medium-protein flour  (all purpose flour)
2 tsp sugar
1 tsp salt
1 tsp yeast

Title: Jangan Digoreng! Resep Saus Mentega Untuk Udang Atau Hidangan Lainnya: Top Ala Restoran.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=g5LwHQ5e-5c

Top a la Restaurant: Soy Butter Sauce Recipe for Shrimp and Other Dishes

Shrimp is one of people's favorite ingredients as it cooks quickly and the flavor is tasty. Unlike Fried Shrimp with Soy Butter Sauce, I only pan-sear the shrimp in this recipe instead of frying them. Pan-searing is a cooking technique that uses high temperature (with a pan) to give a crunchy texture to the flesh' surface (beef, poultry, or fish). A great moment to serve this dish is when you're hanging out and eating together with family.

Sautéed Shrimp with Soy Butter Sauce Recipe (for 1-2 servings)

Ingredients:
200 g peeled shrimp
1 pc onion
3 pc shallots, mashed
2 clove garlic, mashed
1 pc leeks
1 inch ginger
5 pc bird's eye chili
1 pc tomato
4 tbsp margarine
2 tbsp Lombok Gandaria sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp Lombok Gandaria soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp tomato sauce
2 tsp Worcestershire sauce

Steps:
1. Rinse the shrimp and devein.
2. Slice the onion, bird's eye chili, and leeks.
3. Remove the tomato seeds and dice.
4. Melt the margarine and sauté the shrimp until half cooked. Set aside.
5. Wait until the water in the margarine evaporates. Add the sliced onion, bird's eye chili, the white part of the leeks, tomato, mashed shallots, mashed garlic, and pounded ginger. Sauté until fragrant.
6. Add the Lombok Gandaria sweet soy sauce, Lombok Gandaria soy sauce, oyster sauce, tomato sauce, and Worcestershire sauce.
7. Add the shrimp and the green part of the leeks. Cook until the sauces are absorbed well.
8. Sautéed Shrimp with Soy Butter Sauce is ready to serve.

Title: Resep Pizza TEFLON Hanya 7 Menit! [Tanpa Ulen, Tanpa Proofing, Garing, Empuk, Ala Pizza Hut]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2HoRrouivlI

TEFLON Pizza Recipe, Only 7 Minutes! [No Kneading, Crispy, Fluffy, a la Pizza Hut]

Pizza is one of the most popular Italian dishes. This circular and flat bread is usually topped with tomato sauce and cheese. This time, I'm modifying it a bit using two types of baking methods: with an oven and with a Teflon. The topping is Yamato Sardines which has a nice flavor without any fishy smell. This Sardines Pizza can be your favorite new snack at home.

Teflon Pizza Recipe (for 2 pans / 6 servings)

Dough ingredients:
135 ml warm water
7 g yeast
7 g sugar
3/4 tsp salt
1.5 tbsp olive oil
1 tbsp honey
250 g medium-protein flour

Topping ingredients:
3 clove garlic, sliced
1 pc shallots, sliced
100 g shiitake mushroom, sliced
2 tbsp oil
1 can Yamato Sardines
10 pc bird's eye chili, sliced
2 tbsp chili sauce
4 tbsp tomato sauce

Other ingredients:
120 g grated mozzarella cheese
2 pc black olive
2 tbsp olive oil

Steps:
1. Mix warm water, yeast, and sugar evenly. Let it bloom.
2. Add the salt, honey, and olive oil in. Mix well.
3. Add the flour. Mix until well-incorporated.
4. Rub some oil on the board or the table. Divide the dough into two equal parts and flatten with a rolling pin to match the pan's diameter.
5. For the pizza’s topping, sauté the garlic, onion, and mushroom until fragrant. Add the Yamato Sardines, bird’s eye chili, chili sauce, and tomato sauce. Cook until thickens.
6. Turn the Teflon on medium heat. Add some oil and cook one side of the pizza until it's cooked.
7. Flip the pizza and add the sardines and mozzarella toppings. Place the lid on and cook on medium heat until the pizza is cooked.
8. For oven-baked pizza, brush the pizza pan with some oil and place the pizza dough on top. Place the sardines, mozzarella, onion, and black olive toppings. Add a bit of olive oil. Bake at 220°C for 8-12 minutes.

Title: 100% Sukses! Resep Cinnamon Roll [Resep Roti Kayu Manis, Bisa Ulen Tangan]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y2QoV4LQGB4

100% Success! Soft Inside and Out Cinnamon Roll Recipe [Cream Cheese, Hand Knead OK]

Cinnamon Roll is a classic American pastry that's very popular. The strong scent of cinnamon is the characteristic of this dish. The soft bread combined with the sugar filling and cream cheese frosting make Cinnamon Roll even more flavorful. It's great to snack on with coffee or tea.

Cinnamon Roll Recipe (12 pcs)

Dough ingredients:
250 g medium-protein flour
100 g high-protein flour
30 g sugar
30 g brown sugar
3 g salt
50 g melted butter
7 g yeast
180 ml milk
1 pc egg
1 tsp vanilla extract

Filling ingredients:
75 g butter
125 g brown sugar
1 tbsp cinnamon powder
1 tbsp cornstarch
1 tsp salt

Frosting ingredients:
100 g cream cheese
40 g icing sugar
1 tsp vanilla extract
3 tbsp milk

Steps:
1. Combine all the dough ingredients into a bowl and mix with a mixer under medium speed until it becomes elastic.
2. Move the dough to an oiled work surface.
3. Cover the dough with a bowl and let it rest for 20-30 minutes.
4. Press the dough to remove the air bubbles. Flatten with a rolling pin to a thickness of 1/2 cm.
5. To make the filling, combine butter, cornstarch, salt, and cinnamon powder. Mix well.
6. Spread the butter filling on the dough and sprinkle evenly with the brown sugar.
7. Roll the dough. Divide into 12 even pieces.
8. Arrange the dough in a buttered pan. Cover with a clean cloth and let it rest to rise up to 30-50% its size for about 15-20 minutes.
9. Heat the oven to 180°C. Once the dough has risen, bake it for 20-25 minutes.
10. To make the frosting, combine the cream cheese, icing sugar, vanilla extract, and milk. Mix well and transfer to a piping bag.
11. Remove the Cinnamon Rolls from the pan and let it cool on a cooling rack to maintain the crispy texture.
12. Pour the frosting on top. Cinnamon Rolls are ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Satu Gigit TIGA Tekstur! Resep Fudgy Cookie Brownies [Tanpa Mixer]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qiIwpt51QXY

3 Textures in 1 Bite. No-Mixer Fudgy Cookie Brownies Recipe

This Cookie Brownies is a great dessert for those of you who love cookies and brownies. It's a combination of two types of cakes in one pan. The soft, sticky, and firm cookie brownies texture with the biscuit crumble make this dessert even more decadent. It's great for snacks and to be served with milk, tea, or coffee.

Fudgy Cookie Brownies Recipe (12 pcs)

Cookie Dough ingredients:
50 g regular sugar
82 g brown sugar
1/2 tsp salt
57 g melted butter
1 pc egg
1 tsp vanilla extract
100 g medium-protein flour
1/2 tsp baking soda
75 g chocolate chips

Brownies Batter ingredients:
77 g melted butter
87 g regular sugar
2 pc eggs
1 tsp vanilla extract
25 g cocoa powder
53 g medium-protein flour
1/4 tsp salt
1/4 tsp baking powder
30 g Roma Kelapa biscuit

Crumble ingredients:
60 g Roma Kelapa biscuit
20 g melted butter

Steps:
1. For the brownies batter, whisk the sugar, melted butter, and eggs. Mix well.
2. Add the cocoa powder, flour, vanilla extract, and baking powder. Mix well.
3. Add the crumbled Roma Kelapa biscuits. Mix well.
4. For the Cookie Dough, whisk the regular sugar, brown sugar, and eggs. Mix well.
5. Add the baking soda, vanilla extract, salt, and flour. Mix well.
6. Add the chocolate chips. Mix well and transfer to a piping bag.
7. For the crumble, crumble the Roma Kelapa biscuit. Add the melted butter in and mix well. 
8. Heat the oven to 180°C.
9. Line a 8" x 4" baking pan with a baking paper. Pour the brownies batter in and even out the surface.
10. Pipe the cookie dough as the second layer and sprinkle the crumble on top.
11. Bake for 30-35 minutes.
12. Wait until the cake has cooled down completely before removing it from the pan.
13. Serve the Fudgy Cookie Brownies with ice cream.

Title: 5 Menit Jadi! Resep Nasi Telur Hong Kong: Gurih & Ekonomis [Egg Chiffon Rice]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QTCC8iyUrOs

Done in 5 Minutes! Hong Kong Egg Rice Recipe: Nutritious & Budget-Friendly [Egg Chiffon Rice]

Hong Kong Egg Rice recipe. This menu is inspired by Hong Kong's Char Siu Scrambled Egg, but I modified it a bit. Here, I'm using eggs and sausages as the main ingredients, as well as rice with gravy sauce poured on top. This simple dish can be a special menu for you.

Chicken Charsiu Recipe: https://youtu.be/xxS8yFMmhF8
Chili Oil Recipe: https://youtu.be/lNJimSmQLYw

Hong Kong Egg Rice Recipe (for 1 servings)

Ingredients:
1 serving rice
2 pc eggs
1 pc sausage
3 pc shallots
4 pc bird's eye chili
1/2 tsp salt
1/4 tsp pepper
3 tbsp cooking oil
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp soy sauce
2 tsp chicken stock powder
1 tbsp cornstarch
200 ml water
1 tsp sugar
2 tsp margarine
1 pc leek
Chili oil (optional)

Steps:
1. Slice the shallots and bird's eye chili.
2. Thinly slice the sausage, lengthwise.
3. Heat the oil and sauté the shallots, bird's eye chili, and sausage until fragrant.
4. Season with salt and pepper. Turn the heat off.
5. Lightly whisk the egg and pour into the sautéed sausage while the pan is still hot. Cook until the egg is half-done or to your liking.
6. Prepare the rice and place the egg on top.
7. For the gravy, combine water, cornstarch, oyster sauce, soy sauce, chicken stock powder, and sugar into a bowl. Mix well.
8. Heat the pan and pour the sauce mix. Stir well.
9. Add the margarine and cook until sauce thickens.
10. Pour the gravy on top of the egg. Serve with sliced leeks and chili oil.

Title: Pilihan Tepungnya! Rahasia Resep Donat Bomboloni: 100% Sukses, Anti Kempes, Empuk.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uPan-uUCFOk

Flour Choice! The Secret to The Softest, Collapse-Proof Bombolone Donut, 100% Success.

These days, there are so many donut variations. From donut holes, mini donuts, donuts with fillings, potato donuts, banana donuts, etc. This time, I'm sharing a soft and airy bomboloni donut recipe. This delicious fried donut will be even more yummy with Ovomaltine Custard filling inside. It's great to be consumed with coffee or tea.

Bomboloni Donuts Recipe

Dough ingredients:
325 g medium-protein flour
75 g high-protein flour
50 g brown sugar
3 g salt
50 g butter
7 g yeast
150 ml milk
2 pc eggs
1 tsp vanilla extract

Custard Filling ingredients:
250 ml milk
250 ml cream
80 g sugar
3 egg yolks
1 whole egg
30 g cornstarch
1 tsp salt
50 g butter
1 tsp vanilla extract
100 g Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream

Other ingredients:
200 g brown sugar for topping
Cooking oil for frying

Steps:
1. Combine the medium-protein flour, high-protein flour, yeast, and brown sugar. Mix well.
2. Add the milk and eggs. Mix with mixer until they form a dough.
3. Add the butter and salt. Mix until elastic.
4. Let the dough rest for 30 minutes to rise.
5. Roll the dough to 1 cm thickness and shape with a cutter.
6. Rest the dough again for 30 minutes to rise.
7. To make the custard filling, heat the milk, sugar, salt, and vanilla extract.
8. Combine the egg and cornstarch. Mix well and strain.
9. Add a bit of the boiling milk into the egg. Mix well and return to the milk pan to cook.
10. Cook with low heat and keep stirring until thickens.
11. Store in a bowl and cover the surface with plastic wrap.
12. After the custard cools, set aside some of it and add the Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream.
13. Heat some oil on low heat and fry the donuts until golden brown.
14. Make a hole on the donut and fill with custard using a piping bag. Bomboloni Donuts are ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: 5 Menit, Anti Kempes! Resep Donat Kentang Krispi Dan Lembut [100% Sukses]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DE__PKsXju4

5 Minutes, Soft, Stays Fluffy! Potato Donut Recipe (Turn it into Kkwabaegi, Korean Twisted Donut)

Donuts are one of many people's favorite snacks. This time, I'm sharing a soft and airy potato donut recipe. The proofing process is the key here to make a perfectly-risen donut dough. As long as you pay attention to the steps, you won't fail in making this donut.

Potato Donut Recipe (10 pcs)

Original Potato Donut ingredients:
250 g medium-protein flour
100 g potatoes, mashed
35 g sugar
100 ml water / milk
6 g yeast
30 g melted margarine (or unsalted butter + salt)
1 egg yolk
1/4 tsp baking powder
2 tbsp powdered milk

Pandan Potato Donut ingredients:
260 g medium-protein flour
100 g potatoes, mashed
35 g sugar
100 ml water / milk
6 g yeast
30 g melted margarine (or unsalted butter + salt)
1 egg yolk
1/4 tsp baking powder
2 tsp Pandan essence

Other ingredients:
200 g icing sugar
500 ml cooking oil

Steps:
1. Combine the flour, yeast, sugar, baking powder, and powdered milk. (For the Pandan dough, skip the powdered milk) Mix well.
2. Add the mashed potatoes. Keep stirring with chopsticks until you get a sandy texture.
3. Combine the yolk, water, and melted margarine. (For the Pandan dough, add the Pandan essence). Mix well.
4. Combine the wet and dry ingredients. Mix well. Place in a bowl and cover with plastic wrap. Let it rest for 30 minutes.
5. Knead the dough for a bit and rest for 5-10 minutes.
6. Apply some oil to the board and rolling pin. Roll the dough. Make sure the surface is even and shape with the donut cutter.
7. Let the donuts rest for 20 minutes or until they have risen.
8. Heat the oil in low heat and fry the donuts until golden brown. For the Pandan donuts, fry them slowly with low heat.
9. Drain the oil.
10. Roll the cooled donuts in icing sugar. Potato Donuts are ready to serve.

Title: Tips Memotong & Memasak Lobster, Terbelah Sempurna [TIPS&TRICKS]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Bps7PMFrvIg

How to Cut and Clean Lobsters [TIPS & TRICKS]

Lobsters are a family of large crustaceans that is quite expensive, but it contains so many nutrients. The most difficult parts to clean on a lobster is its head and tail. This time, I'm sharing the tips & tricks on how to clean and cut lobsters easily.

How to cut lobsters:
1. Wash the lobster cleanly.
2. Boil the lobster in boiling water for 10-12 minutes.
3. Remove the lobster and soak in ice water to stop the cooking process.
4. Rinse the lobster.
5. Cut the lobster's head. Use a dish towel or a glove to hold the lobster. Make sure the knife you use is strong and sharp enough to cut through the lobster.
6. The lobster is ready to use.

Title: Bisa TANPA Mixer! Resep Cheesecake 4 Bahan Ter-LEGIT [Anak Kos Masuk]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bv80pR5Htyg

Only 4 Ingredients, No Oven No Mixer. Melt-in-Your-Mouth Cheesecake Recipe

Cheesecake is a dessert with cheese as its main ingredients. This time, I'm sharing a super easy cheesecake recipe, no oven needed. There are two parts to this recipe: the crust, made with biscuits, and the filling, made with cream cheese. The combination of sweet, tart, and savory flavor with the soft cheesecake texture will definitely make you come back for seconds.

Cheesecake Recipe (for 6 servings)

Ingredients:
300 g cream cheese
60 g butter
75 g condensed milk
2 tsp vanilla beans / essence (optional)
1 tbsp lime juice (optional)

Crust ingredients:
30 pc Roma Kelapa biscuits
75 g margarine / butter

Garnish:
Toasted coconut
Whipped cream

Steps:
1. Crush the Roma Kelapa biscuits to a fine crumb. Combine with the margarine / butter and mix well.
2. Add the biscuit mix into the mold. Even it out and press until firm. Cool in the fridge for ±15 minutes.
3. Whisk the cream cheese until it's soft. Add the condensed milk, salt, lime juice, and vanilla. Mix well.
4. Add the cheesecake batter into the mold. Cool in the fridge for 6-12 hours or in the freezer for 1 hour until it's set.
5. Garnish with toasted coconut and whipped cream. Cheesecake is ready to serve.

Just Mix It! Korean Fried Rice with Egg Blanket Recipe

Bokkeumbap (볶음밥) or Korean Fried Rice is a bit different to Indonesian fried rice. The cooking method is quite unique -- you mix the rice and the egg first before cooking. Even though it's just rice and eggs, the taste is delicious. In Korea, it is usually served with kimchi (salted and fermented vegetables)

Ramen Indomie Recipe: https://youtu.be/PVFcZVGgPyI

Korean Fried Rice Recipe

Ingredients:
1-2 serving rice
1 egg
2-5 tbsp garlic chili or instant shrimp paste @sambaluhe
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp margarine
1 red chili
1-2 habanero
1 leeks
3 shallots
salt, pepper, sugar to taste
cooking oil as needed

Egg Chiffon ingredients:
2 pc eggs

Garnish:
Leeks, sliced

Steps:
1. Mix the rice with the egg, squid sambal, soy sauce, and sweet soy sauce. Mix well.
2. Heat the pan and add a bit of oil. Add in the shallots, leeks, and chili. Sauté until fragrant.
3. Add the rice mix and stir until the rice is dry and not sticky.
4. Season with salt, pepper, sugar, and flavor enhancer.
5. Add in the margarine and wait until it melts. Mix well.
6. Mold the fried rice with a small bowl.
7. To make the Egg Chiffon, whisk the egg and fry it until half-cooked while keep stirring it to the center.
8. Place the Egg Chiffon on top of the fried rice and garnish it with the leeks.

Title: Cuma Modal PANCI. Resep Puding Tiramisu 4 Lapis: Bawahnya Paling Nagih! [Anak Kos Masuk]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fqPBlYV8cds

Just One Pot. 4-Layer Tiramisu Pudding Recipe

Pudding is one of people's favorite desserts. This time, I'm sharing a 4-layer Tiramisu Pudding recipe using easy-to-get ingredients and several simple steps. The coffee aroma as well as the sweetness, savoriness, and texture will make you come back for more. You can also make this to replace a birthday cake.

Tiramisu Pudding Recipe

Coffee Pudding ingredients:
8 sachet Tora Cafe Milky Latte
900 ml water
2 tbsp / 30 g jelly powder
3 tsp rum essence

Cream Cheese Pudding ingredients:
200 g cream cheese
650 ml milk
1 egg yolk
6-7 tbsp / 80-100 g sugar
1.5 tbsp / 22 g jelly powder
2 tsp vanilla extract

Other ingredients:
Roma Marie Gold as needed
1 sachet Tora Cafe Choco Latte
Chocolate powder (optional)
Whipped cream (optional)

Steps:
1. Prepare 2 pans. Bring the water and milk to a boil.
2. Combine the cream cheese with sugar and egg yolk. Mix using a whisk.
3. Add a bit of the boiled milk. Mix well.
4. Add the jelly powder and vanilla extract. Mix well.
5. Add half of the milk into the cream cheese mix and return to pan. Mix well.
6. Add the Tora Cafe Milky Latte into the boiled water. Mix well.
7. Add the jelly powder in. Mix well.
8. Turn off the heat and add the rum essence.
9. Prepare a mold and pour the first layer: the cream cheese pudding. Wait until it sets.
10. Pour the second layer: the cream cheese and coffee pudding. Wait until it sets.
11. Pour the third layer: the coffee pudding. Wait until it sets.
12. Pour the fourth layer: the coffee pudding with Tora Cafe Choco Latte. Add the Marie biscuits on top and pour in the rest of the pudding. Keep in the fridge to set.
13. Garnish with whipped cream and chocolate powder. Tiramisu Pudding is ready to serve.

Title: Bongkar Resep FRAPPUCCINO Bertekstur Salju: Jangan Kebanyakan Susunya!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YvrTYesJRhU

Not Too Much Milk! The Secret of Snowy Frappuccino Recipe

Frappuccino is a drink made of coffee and ice, blended until they're frothy. There are lots of ways you can enjoy Frappuccino. One of them is by making a mocha Frappuccino with the ingredients you have at home. The mix of espresso with milk, blended together with whipped cream on top and Ovomaltine sauce make this drink even more yummy. It feels like we're hanging out at a coffee shop!

Ovomaltine Frappuccino Recipe

Ingredients:
2-3 shots espresso
2-3 tbsp palm sugar
1 cup milk
2 cups ice cubes
Whipped Cream

Ovomaltine Sauce ingredients:
4 tbsp Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream
4 tbsp milk

Steps:
1. Combine the espresso, milk, sugar, and ice cubes. Blend until it forms a slushy.
2. For the topping, combine the Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream with milk. Mix well until you reach a sauce-like consistency.
3. Prepare a glass. Pour the Ovomaltine sauce to the edges and the center.
4. Pour the Frappuccino into the glass.

Title: 100% Bahan Lokal. Rahasia Resep Sundubu Jjigae Itaewon Class: Cuka! (Sup Tahu Korea)
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z3PuKaI6huI

100% Local Ingredients. Itaewon Class Sundubu Jjigae Recipe’s Secret: Vinegar!

Sundubu Jjigae (순두부찌개) or spicy tofu soup is one of South Korea's most popular dishes. This time, I'm sharing a Sundubu Jjigae recipe using local ingredients, but the flavor is close to the original. This soup is quite complete, as it's complemented by not only tofu but also beef, cabbage, egg, and assorted seafood.

Ramen Indomie Recipe: https://youtu.be/PVFcZVGgPyI

Sundubu Jjigae Recipe (yields 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
2 blocks large silk tofu
3 pc eggs
1L chicken stock
100 g beef
4 pc medium prawns
1 pc squid
6 pc anchovies
3 pc cabbage leaf, sliced
1 stalk leeks, sliced
1/2 pc onion, sliced
Cooking oil for sautéing

Paste ingredients:
2-4 clove garlic, grated
5 tbsp chili sauce
3 tbsp fish sauce
1 tbsp sesame oil
2 tbsp chili powder
2 tbsp vinegar
2 tbsp tauco

Steps:
1. Make the paste. Combine the chili sauce, fish sauce, vinegar, sesame oil, tauco, garlic, and chili powder. Mix well.
2. Heat the pan. Sauté the onion and leeks until fragrant.
3. Add the squid, beef, anchovies, prawns, and the paste while stirring.
4. Add the cabbage and chicken stock. Cook until the broth is reduced by 20%.
5. Add tofu to a different pan. Pour in the broth and the other contents. Bring to a boil and break the tofu apart.
6. Place the egg in the middle of the soup, cover the pan, and wait.
7. Garnish with leeks. Sundubu Jjigae is ready to serve.

Title: Resep Udang Mayones Krispi TETAP Kenyal Ala Resto: Potongannya Harus Lebar!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=s-qYV70uLrE

Crispy & Bouncy Mayonnaise Shrimp a la Restaurant Recipe: The Trick is Wide Cuts!

Mayonnaise Shrimp is one of the favorites in Chinese or seafood restaurants. The shrimp is coated with flour, fried until crisp, and mixed with a fresh mayonnaise sauce. As it turns out, this restaurant menu is very easy to make if you know the tips & tricks. It's great as a snack food or as a main dish for kids and family at home.

Indomie Ramen Recipe: https://youtu.be/PVFcZVGgPyI
How to peel shrimp: https://youtu.be/_j6IN7fAas8
Ebi Furai Recipe: https://youtu.be/f-PlPtWxSsI
Cereal Prawns Recipe: https://youtu.be/xDyoLvgWqhc
Prawns in Singapore Sauce Recipe: https://youtu.be/P3GuDIigDwU

Mayonnaise Shrimp Recipe

Ingredients:
300 g shrimp, grade 25, peeled
1/2 tsp grated ginger
1 egg white
150 g cornstarch
Salt, pepper, to taste
Cooking oil as needed

Dynamite Mayo ingredients:
6 tbsp mayonnaise
2 tbsp condensed milk
1.5 tbsp honey
2 tbsp lime juice
1/4 tsp salt

Additional ingredients for the Dynamite Mayo:
1-2 tbsp chili sauce
1/2 clove grated garlic

Other ingredients:
Fried corn-based vermicelli
Black sesame seeds
Leeks

Steps:
1. Butterfly the shrimp.
2. Add the grated ginger, baking soda, egg white, salt, pepper, and a bit of cornstarch. Mix well and let it rest for 10-15 minutes at room temperature.
3. To make the Original Dynamite Mayo, combine the mayonnaise, lime juice, condensed milk, and honey. Mix well and add a bit of salt.
4. To make the Spicy Dynamite Mayo, add the chili sauce and garlic. Mix well.
5. After the shrimp is finished marinating, coat them with cornstarch. Mix well until all the surface is coated and sift the excess off.
6. Fry the shrimp until cooked. Drain and set aside.
7. Mix the fried shrimp with the Dynamite Mayo. Mix well.
8. Prepare the fried vermicelli and garnish with the black sesame seeds and leeks. Mayonnaise Shrimp is ready to serve.

Title: Renyah! Resep Jagung Krispi 3 Rasa: Anak, Keluarga, Semua Suka.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gS8dzcynAb4

Yummy, Savory Snack Food. 3-Flavors Crispy Corn Recipe

Crispy Corn is one of my favorite snacks at home. The ingredients are simple and, of course, it tastes great. This time, I'll be sharing a recipe for Crispy Corn in 3 flavors: Sweet Butter, Garlic, and Spicy. It's a great snack food to accompany you as you're watching TV, working from home, and hanging out with your family at home.

Salt & Pepper Tofu Recipe: https://youtu.be/y6eRAgaqi7I
Crispy Enoki Recipe: https://youtu.be/pGV54BolkjE

Crispy Corn Recipe

Ingredients:
2 pc corn
1 egg white
200 g cornstarch
Salt, pepper to taste
Cooking oil as needed

Sweet Butter flavor:
Butter
Powdered sugar

Garlic Lime flavor:
Garlic, sliced
Kaffir lime leaves, remove the stem and slice lengthwise
Powdered sugar
Mushroom stock powder

Spicy flavor:
Chili powder
Mushroom stock powder
Powdered sugar
Salt

Steps:
1. Rinse the corn and cut it off the cob. Add to a bowl.
2. Add the egg white and season with salt and pepper. Mix well.
3. To make the wet coating, add 3 tbsp of cornstarch. Mix well.
4. Add the corn to the dry cornstarch. Make sure the corn is well-coated and not lumpy. Let it rest for 5 minutes.
5. Before frying, sift the excess flour off.
6. With medium-low heat, fry the corn as you gently stir them until golden brown. Drain the excess oil.
7. To make the Sweet Butter version, add the butter and powdered sugar while the Crispy Corn is still hot. Mix well.
8. To make the Garlic Lime version, coat the Kaffir lime leaves and garlic with the remaining cornstarch. Sift the excess and fry until crispy. Add the Crispy Corn to the fried Kaffir lime leaves and garlic. Season with mushroom stock and powdered sugar. Mix well.
9. To make the Spicy version, add the Crispy Corn with mushroom stock powder, powdered sugar, chili powder, and salt. Mix well.
10. Crispy Corn is ready to serve.

Title: 100% Gurih Menyegarkan! Resep Es Santan Mangga Hong Kong [Bahan Lokal]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qzm0xfeifvk

Minimart Ingredients! People's Favorite Hong Kong Mango Sago and Italian Sorbet Recipe by Vita Pudding

Mango Pomelo Sago is a classic Hong Kong dessert based on mango fruit. This time, I'm substituting the mango with Vita Pudding Mango with real mango flavor and free of preservatives. Serve it with the sweet and refreshing Mango Sorbet. This dessert is great for Eid al-Fitr with your family at home.

Mango Sago & Mango Sorbet Recipe

Mango Sago ingredients:
2 pcs Vita Pudding Mango
50 g sago pearls, boiled
1/2 pomelo
150 ml coconut milk
4 tbsp creamer
60 ml mango syrup
Ice cubes as needed

Mango Sorbet ingredients:
3 pcs Vita Pudding Mango
3 tbsp mango syrup
3 tbsp creamer

Steps:
1. To make the Mango Sago, peel the pomelo and shred the flesh.
2. Prepare a bowl. Add the coconut milk, creamer, and mango syrup. Mix well.
3. Add the sago pearls, pomelo, and Vita Pudding Mango slices. Stir.
4. To make the Mango Sorbet, blend the frozen Vita Pudding Mango with mango syrup and creamer until the consistency is soft and thick.
5. Prepare some ice cubes. Mango Sago and Mango Sorbet are ready to serve.

Title: Sarapan Praktis. Resep Roti Sosis Tiga Rasa: Berasa Keliling Dunia! (Semua Bahan Lokal).
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=b-pPhGefZ1s

Hot Dog Recipes from THREE Countries: US, Japan, and Thai. All with Local Ingredients!

Hot Dog Recipe

Ingredients:
3 slice white bread
Kanzler Beef Cocktail Sausages
Kanzler Bockwurst Sausages
Butter, as needed

American Stye:
1/4 pc onion, sautéed
2 tbsp Red Cheddar cheese
2 tbsp Mozzarella cheese
1 tbsp mustard
1 tbsp tomato sauce (optional)
1 tbsp mayonnaise

Japanese Style:
Katsu coating (flour, egg, breadcrumbs)
1 tbsp sweet Teriyaki sauce
1/4 pc onion, sautéed
1 tbsp mayonnaise
1 sachet seaweed
1 stalk spring onions

Thai Style:
1/2 cucumber
1/2 carrot
2 tbsp Bangkok sauce
2 tbsp mayonnaise
1 tsp fish sauce
1 tsp rice vinegar
Coriander leaves, as needed

Steps:
1. Boil the Kanzler Bockwurst Sausage.
2. Make the Katsu coating. Whisk the egg and season with salt and pepper.
3. Coat the Kanzler Beef Cocktail Sausage with flour, egg, and breadcrumbs. Repeat it once to make it even more crispy.
4. Fry until golden brown.
5. Prepare the white bread by trimming the edges. Flatten with a rolling pin.
6. To make the US Style, sprinkle the bread with some grated Mozzarella and Red Cheddar cheese. Spread some mustard and place the boiled sausage on top. Add some sautéed onions. Roll the bread.
7. To make the Japanese Style, place nori on top of the bread and spread with mayonnaise. Add the Teriyaki sauce, Sausage Katsu, and sautéed onions. Roll the bread.
8. To make the Thai Style, add the salad to the bread. Add the boiled sausage and coriander leaves. Roll the bread.
9. Heat the pan and add some butter. Grill the hot dog until the bread browns.
10. Add some toppings and garnishes, to taste. Hot Dog is ready to serve.

Steps for making salad:
1. Shred the cucumber and carrot.
2. Soak in ice water for a bit. Drain.
3. Add vinegar, Bangkok sauce, fish sauce, and mayonnaise. Mix well.

Title: Praktis, Lengkap: Resep Ketupat Sayur Bakso, Menu Lebaran Wajib!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_nojIMe8bA4

Complete, Practical Eid al-Fitr Menu. Indonesian Rice Cake with Veggies and Meatballs.

Ketupat Sayur (Indonesian Rice Cake with Veggies) is a signature dish from Betawi. It has a distinct yellow coconut milk broth with chayotes, tofu, and egg. This recipe is a bit different because I'm adding meatballs to the mix. Of course, it makes the dish even more complete and suitable for breakfast, Suhoor, Iftar, and other family gatherings.

Ketupat Sayur Bakso (Indonesian Rice Cake with Veggies and Meatballs) Recipe

Ketupat (Rice Cake) ingredients:
1 cup rice
3 cups water

Spice blend ingredients:
5 clove garlic, sliced
8 pc shallots
3 pc candlenuts
5 cm turmeric
3 cm ginger, sliced
4 cm galangal, sliced
1-2 stalk lemongrass, sliced
5 pc curly red chili, sliced
2 tsp coriander
Cooking oil as needed

Other ingredients:
250 g Sumber Selera beef meatballs
4 pc fried tofu
3 pc small chayotes, sliced lengthwise
10 pc curly green chili
Bird's eye chili, to taste
5 pc bay leaves
Boiled egg, to taste
250 ml instant coconut milk
Water as needed
Salt, sugar, flavor enhancers, and pepper as needed

Topping:
Fried shallots
Emping
Crackers, etc

Steps:
1. Blend the spices.
2. Sauté the spice paste until reduced and fragrant.
3. Add water and bring to a boil.
4. Add the chayotes, carrots, chili, tofu, and bay leaves.
5. Season with salt, sugar, flavor enhancers, and pepper.
6. Add the Sumber Selera meatballs that have been cut into a plus at the top.
7. Add the boiled eggs.
8. Add coconut milk and mix well.
9. Serve with ketupat / lontong and sprinkle with fried shallots.

Steps to making ketupat (rice cake):
1. Rinse the rice. Make sure to drain the water completely.
2. Add the rice and the water into the rice cooker. Cook until done.
3. Mash the rice with a hand blender.
4. Mold in a square container or use banana leaves.
5. Let it rest for 3-4 hours.
6. The rice cake is ready to use.

Title: 2 Menit Jadi! Resep Kue Coklat Ovomaltine (Juga Bisa Jadi Kue Kering / Cookies)
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7VTHSaxRAYk

Only in 2 Minutes: Easy-yet-Intense Chocolate Ovomaltine Mug Cake Recipe!

Mug Cake is a very practical cake to make. All you need to do is to combine all the ingredients into a mug, stir, and put it in the microwave. You need less than 3 minutes, and you'll get a simple yet decadent dessert. However, there are some tips & tricks you need to follow to make this cake even more special!

Ovomaltine Sweet Roll Recipe: https://youtu.be/lSpW8_n7HWM

Caramel Pisang Ijo Recipe: https://youtu.be/OrHy0XWUWfk

Ovomaltine Microwave Mug Cake Recipe

Ingredients:
1 tbsp medium-protein flour
4 tbsp palm sugar / white sugar
1 egg
1 tbsp cocoa powder
3 tbsp cooking oil
1 tbsp Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream and other fillings, to taste
Powdered sugar for garnish
Salt (optional)

Steps:
1. Prepare a mug / heat proof glass. Add the flour, sugar, and cocoa powder. If you like, you can add a bit of salt. Mix well.
2. Add the egg and cooking oil. Mix well.
3. Add the Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream. Mix well.
4. Add a bit of Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream at the center for the filling.
5. Cook in the microwave for 1 - 1.5 minutes.
6. After it's cooked, sprinkle with powdered sugar on top.
7. Ovomaltine Microwave Mug Cake is ready to serve.

Title: Krispi, Tahan Lama, Praktis! Resep Jamur Enoki Rp 7,000 Untuk 8 Porsi [Cocok Untuk Anak]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pGV54BolkjE

Super Crunchy. Crispy Enoki Mushroom Recipe

Enoki or enokitake (榎) is a type of mushroom that's frequently used in Japanese and Korean cuisine. The shape is quite unique. They're small with slim, long stems. This time, I'm sharing a Crispy Enoki Mushroom recipe that's perfect as both a snack and a side dish. The ingredients are inexpensive and the methods are easy, too. Your children would love to have these as their meal's condiments.

Crispy Enoki Recipe

Ingredients:
1 pack Enoki mushroom
1 egg
Salt, pepper, mushroom stock powder / flavor enhancers, to taste

Flour coating mix:
150 g all-purpose flour
150 g cornstarch
1 tbsp garlic powder

Topping:
5 clove garlic
10 pc bird's eye chili
1-2 stalk leeks
Powdered sugar
Chili powder
The remaining flour coating mix

Steps:
1. Remove the Enoki's roots. Rinse and squeeze the water out completely. Pat dry with a paper towel.
2. Prepare a bowl. Add the egg, mushroom stock powder, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
3. Make the flour coating mix. Combine the flour and cornstarch (ratio 1:1). Add the garlic powder and mix well.
4. Add the Enoki to the egg and make sure they're coated evenly. Separate the stems so they don't lump together.
5. Add the Enoki to the flour coating mix bit by bit to prevent lumps.
6. Before frying, sift the excess flour from the Enoki.
7. Fry the Enoki at high heat until crispy. Don't forget to stir so they don't stick together.
8. Slice the garlic, bird's eye chili, and leeks. Add them into the flour coating mix. Sift the excess and dry until crispy.
9. Combine the fried Enoki, garlic, bird's eye chili, and leeks.
10. Season with salt, powdered sugar, mushroom stock powder, and chili powder.
11. Crispy Enoki Mushroom is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Tips Memotong Udang Beragam Varian Hidangan [TIPS&TRICKS]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_j6IN7fAas8

How to Clean and Peel Shrimp [TIPS & TRICKS]

Shrimp is a part of the seafood family that is blessed with delicious flavor and loved by many. Not just tasty, shrimp also contains lots of nutrients. Perhaps it's not as easy as it looks, but there are several special tricks you must do to peel shrimp cleanly without affecting its appearance.

How to peel shrimp:
1. Rinse the shrimp.
2. Detach the head.
3. Remove the legs with scissors.
4. Remove the shell.
5. Remove the tail.
6. Use a toothpick to remove the sand vein on the shrimp's back.
7. The shrimp is ready to use.

How to butterfly shrimp:
1. Rinse the shrimp and drain the excess water.
2. Remove the legs with scissors.
3. Make a slit at the back until you get a butterfly shape.
4. Rinse and pat dry.
5. The shrimp is ready to use.

How to make Tempura-style shrimp:
1. Rinse the shrimp.
2. Detach the head.
3. Remove the legs with scissors.
4. Remove the shell.
5. Make several cuts at the bottom section.
6. Massage the shrimp. Push and straighten until you hear the sound.
7. Trim the tail.
8. The shrimp is ready to use.
