Title: Praktis Pakai Rice Cooker! Resep Nasi Kebuli Ayam (Opsi Daging Ayam)
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W41czK5q1yM

Middle-Eastern Signature Dish: Rice Cooker Chicken Indonesian Pilaf Recipe

Nasi Kebuli (Indonesian Pilaf) is one of the signature dishes from Middle East. The characteristic of this dish is its strong spice flavor as it is cooked with lamb, lamb stock, and lamb milk. I'm sharing a recipe that is using chicken and rice cooker, yet still delicious. The spices' aroma and the savory rice is so perfect for your family.

Rice Cooker Chicken Nasi Kebuli (Indonesian Pilaf) Recipe

Ingredients:
600 g long-grain rice
50 ml Greenfields milk
450 ml water
2 tbsp tomato paste
1 tbsp stock powder
500 g chicken thigh fillet
5 cloves
12 cardamom
1/2 nutmeg
1 cinnamon
3 bay leaves
Raisins, to taste
Fried shallots, to taste

Kebuli Ingredients:
100 ml Greenfields milk
2 tbsp Ghee / margarine / butter
2-3 tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar

Spice Blend Ingredients:
6 clove garlic
10 shallots
1 small onion
1.5 inch ginger
5 pc curly green chili
3 pc curly red chili
1-2 tsp coriander
1-2 tsp cumin
1-2 tsp white pepper
1 lemongrass
50 ml cooking oil

Vinegar Sambal Ingredients:
6 pc red curly red chili
8-15 pc bird's eye chili
2 clove garlic
1 tbsp vinegar
1 tbsp sugar
1/2 tsp salt
4 tbsp water

Garnish:
Cucumber
Emping

Steps:
1. Blend the spices and sauté until fragrant and reduced.
2. Add the Ghee. Mix well.
3. Add the Greenfields milk. Mix well.
4. Season with salt and sugar. Mix well.
5. Add half the spice blend into the chicken and mix well. Keep the rest to mix with the cooked rice.
6. Add the rice, water, milk, clove, cardamom, nutmeg, cinnamon, bay leaves, seasoned chicken, tomato paste, and stock powder into the rice cooker. Remember, do not stir. Turn on the rice cooker and let them cook.
7. Make the Vinegar Sambal. Mash the red chili, bird's eye chili, garlic, salt, and sugar. After they are mashed, add vinegar and water. Mix well.
8. After the rice is cooked, set the chicken aside. Add the rest of the spice blend into the rice.
9. Add raisins and fried shallots. Mix well.
10. Fry the chicken or serve them as is.
11. Rice Cooker Chicken Nasi Kebuli is ready to serve with Vinegar Sambal, Emping, and cucumber.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: 100% Sukses! Resep MARTABAK MANIS TEFLON Rumahan [Terang Bulan] V.1
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ui7lXa4uqI0

The Secret to 100% Success! Home Cook’s Teflon Sweet Martabak (Indonesian Pancake) Recipe

Do you often fail or end up making dense Sweet Martabak (Indonesian Pancake)? There are some tips and tricks behind it! In this video, I’m sharing the secret of making sweet martabak with the Teflon you have at home. Follow the steps and you’re guaranteed 100% success.

Sweet Teflon Martabak Recipe

Ingredients 1:
225 g medium-protein flour
20 g cornstarch / Tang Mien flour / tapioca flour
30 g sugar
250 ml water
1 egg
3/4 tsp baking powder

Ingredients 2:
50 ml water
3/4 tsp baking soda
2 tsp Pandan / Vanilla essence, to taste
Sugar as needed

Toppings (to your preference):
Butter / margarine
Condensed milk
Cheese
Toasted sesame seeds

Steps:
1. Make the Martabak batter. Combine flour, cornstarch, sugar, and water. Mix with mixer until all ingredients are well-incorporated.
2. Add the egg and baking powder. Mix well.
3. Let the batter rest for at least 1 hour.
4. Divide the batter into two, for Vanilla and Pandan flavors.
5. Place the Teflon on medium heat.
6. For the Vanilla-flavored batter, combine the baking soda with water and mix well. For the Pandan-flavored batter, combine the baking soda, water, and Pandan essence and mix well.
7. Add the baking soda mix and Vanilla essence to the first batter and mix well. Add the baking soda mix and Pandan essence to the second batter and mix well.
8. Pour the Vanilla-flavored batter to the Teflon. Swivel the pan so the batter sticks to the edges of the Teflon.
9. Wait until the bubbles rise. Then, lower the heat.
10. Sprinkle some sugar on top to help the bubbles burst.
11. After the surface is covered with holes, cover the pan and let it cook until the surface is not sticky anymore.
12. Pour the Pandan-flavored batter to the Teflon. Cook just like the first batter.
13. After the Martabak is cooked, spread some butter on the entire surface right away.
14. Cut the Martabak into two.
15. Top with grated cheese, sesame seeds, and condensed milk.
16. Stack the Martabak on top of one another and cut into several pieces.
17. Sweet Martabak is ready to serve.

Title: Anak Juga Suka! Resep Pasta Tuna Ala Resto, Cukup Dengan Rice Cooker.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6dV9incUsuU

Now Everyone Can Cook. Rice Cooker Pasta ala Restaurant Recipe

Pasta is a pretty popular Italian dish in the world. There are many different kinds of pasta, such as spaghetti, farfalle, penne, fusilli, dan linguine. Different types of pasta require different processing methods. This time, I'm sharing a quick, practical, and delicious pasta recipe. Bouncy spaghetti meets Indonesian spices, it's perfect for both Iftar and Suhoor.

Garlic Oil Recipe: https://youtu.be/1WZF2s-7D_4 

Rice Cooker Pasta Recipe

Ingredients:
225 g spaghetti or other types of pasta
700 ml water
1 can of tuna
1 large onion / 2 small onions
1 stalk lemongrass
10 Kaffir lime leaves
1.5 whole garlic
2 tomatoes
Bird's eye chili to taste
70 ml olive oil / vegetable oil
1 egg yolk
Salt, pepper, sugar, flavor enhancers to taste

Steps:
1. Slice the onions thinly.
2. Slice the tomatoes to your preference.
3. Cut the lemongrass into two parts and pound.
4. Break the spaghetti into two and add into the rice cooker.
5. Add the onions, tomatoes, tuna, lemongrass, and Kaffir lime leaves into the rice cooker.
6. Add the water and cook until the pasta is done.
7. Mince the garlic and sauté.
8. After the garlic browns, add the bird's eye chili slices and sauté for a bit. Set aside.
9. Add the Garlic Oil and bird's eye chili into the cooked pasta.
10. Season with salt, garlic, sugar, and flavor enhancers.
11. Add the yolk and mix well.
12. Rice Cooker Pasta is ready to serve.

Title: Empuk, Anti-Kempes. Resep Roti Sobek TANPA Oven (Isi Ovomaltine).
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lSpW8_n7HWM

Soft and Pillowy. NO OVEN Ovomaltine Sweet Rolls Teflon Recipe

Bread can be a great snack for a relaxing time together. This time, I'm sharing a sweet roll recipe using Teflon. Even though it's not baked in the oven, the bread's texture is still soft and pillowy. Add to that, I'm using a melted filling of Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream. It's great for both kids and adults.

Ovomaltine Sweet Roll Recipe

Ingredients for 1 recipe:
220 g high-protein flour
30 g medium-protein flour
50 g sugar
4 g yeast
70 ml milk
30 ml water
2 egg yolks
50 g butter
3 g salt
Water

Ingredients for 1.5 times recipe:
320 g high-protein flour
50 g medium-protein flour
60 g sugar
6 g yeast
110 ml milk
50 ml water
3 egg yolks
70 g butter
4 g salt
Water

Filling:
Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream

Steps:
1. Prepare the dry ingredients. Combine the flour, sugar, and yeast. Mix well.
2. Prepare the wet ingredients. Combine the yolks, water, and milk. Mix well.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the bread machine / mixer. Make a hole at the center and pour in the wet ingredients. Turn on the machine and wait for the dough to be processed.
4. If the dough has been incorporated well, add the butter and salt. Knead once more with the machine until it reaches the windowpane stage.
5. Proof the dough for 30-60 minutes to rise.
6. Divide the dough into 15 pieces by using a scale to divide them evenly.
7. Shape the dough into balls.
8. Cover the dough with a plastic wrap so they don't dry out.
9. Roll the dough and fill with Ovomaltine. Re-shape them into a ball.
10. Prepare the Teflon and line with baking paper.
11. Place the dough in the pan and cover. Bake on medium heat until the bread has risen and cooked on both sides.
12. Ovomaltine Sweet Rolls are ready to serve.

Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream is available at Ranch market, Farmers market, Foodhall, Lion Superindo, Giant, Kem Chick, Grand lucky, Indomaret, many leading supermarkets, and grocery shops.

Don't forget to check @OVOMALTINE_INDONESIA Instagram

Title: 5 Menit Jadi! Resep Roti Telur Lipat Korea [Pakai Cabe Makin Maknyus]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5QjHERWrvVA

5 Minutes Ready: Folded Egg Sandwich Recipe Korean Style, Suitable for Family Breakfast. 

This Egg Sandwich recipe is very practical with a variety of toppings such as vegetables, sausage, smoked beef, eggs, cheese and chili (optional). Of course, this dish is nutritious and filling for Suhoor, suitable for the whole family. 

Folded Egg Sandwich Recipe

Ingredients:
1 slice bread
1 egg
1 tbsp water

Topping ingredients (custom):
Sausage
Shallots
Bird's eye chili
Sambal Bangkok
Mozzarella cheese
Salt, pepper, sugar
Cooking oil

Steps:
1. Slice the sausage, shallots, and bird's eye chili. Sauté until fragrant and season with salt, pepper, and sugar.
2. Whisk the egg after adding some water in. Pour into the Teflon evenly.
3. Slice the bread into halves and place on top of the egg. Put some space between the bread.
4. Cook at medium heat. After the egg is cooked, flip it over.
5. Add the sautéd toppings, mozzarella cheese, and Sambal Bangkok on top of the egg.
6. Fold the edges in according to the bread's width. Fold the bread to create a sandwich.
7. Cook both sides of the bread until they're dry and browned.
8. Folded Egg Sandwich is ready to serve.

Title: Tanpa Dikukus! Resep Es Pisang Ijo Karamel Anti Gagal.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OrHy0XWUWfk

Don’t Steam, Use Pan Instead. Caramel Green Banana Crepe Recipe.

One of Indonesia's signature Takjil is Es Pisang Ijo (Green Banana Crepe). This recipe is a bit different because I'm pairing Es Pisang Ijo with the sweet and decadent caramel sauce. It's sweet, savory, and fresh thanks to the marriage of banana, Bubur Sumsum (Sweet Coconut Rice Pudding), and caramel sauce.

Caramel Pisang Ijo Recipe

Pisang Ijo Skin ingredients:
125 g medium-protein flour
25 g tapioca flour / cornstarch
1 egg
200 ml milk
50 ml pandan juice / water
Pandan extract to taste
1/2 tsp salt

Bubur Sumsum ingredients:
40 g rice flour
10 g glutinous rice flour / 10 g tapioca flour
250 ml milk
250 ml coconut milk
3-5 pandan leaves
Salt to taste

Caramel sauce:
100 g palm sugar
50 g sugar
50 g butter
1 tbsp cornstarch
250 ml milk

Other ingredients:
Pisang raja / pisang nangka / other sweet banana variety, boiled
Shaved ice
Pandan leaf for garnish

Steps:
1. Make the Pisang Ijo skin. Combine flour, tapioca flour, egg, milk, pandan juice, pandan extract, and salt. Mix well until no lumps can be found.
2. Heat the pan and dip into the batter. Cook (don't let it dry out) and set aside.
3. Fill with banana and roll.
4. Make the Bubur Sumsum. Combine the rice flour, glutinous rice flour, milk, coconut milk, salt, and pandan leaves. Cook at medium heat while stirring until it thickens and cooks.
5. Make the caramel sauce. Combine palm sugar, sugar, butter, cornstarch, and milk. Mix well and cook at medium heat until it thickens.
6. Slice the Pisang Ijo.
7. Prepare the plate. Arrange the Bubur Sumsum at the bottom, followed by shaved ice, Pisang Ijo, and pour the caramel sauce on top. Garnish with the pandan leaf.
8. Es Pisang Ijo is ready to serve.

Title: 10 Menit Jadi! Resep Tempe Katsu: Pengganti Chicken Katsu Yang Lebih Murah.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GGy6t_CftnU

Have Tempeh at Home? Just Make Tempeh Katsu!

Chicken Katsu is popular not only in Japan but throughout the world. This time, I'm substituting the hero ingredient from chicken to Tempeh. It's definitely more budget-friendly. The crispy outer layer is perfected by the mouthwatering Spicy and Sour sauce (you may also use Tonkatsu Sauce).

Tempeh Katsu with Spicy and Sour Sauce Recipe

Wet batter ingredients:
1 egg
2 clove garlic
3 tbsp coconut milk
4-5 tbsp flour
Salt, sugar, stock powder to taste

Spicy and Sour sauce ingredients:
2 tbsp margarine / olive oil
2 tbsp barbecue / tomato sauce
1 tbsp sesame oil
2 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp chili sauce
1/2 onion
2 clove garlic
Bird's eye chili to taste
Sugar, salt, vinegar to taste
Water as needed
Cornstarch (optional)

Other ingredients:
1 tempeh
150 g bread crumbs
Cooking oil as needed

Steps:
1. Slice the Tempeh to 2 x 2 x 3 cm size and flatten.
2. Make the wet batter. Mash the garlic into a paste and season with a bit of salt. Add to a bowl.
3. Add the egg, flour, pepper, and salt. Mix well.
4. Coat the Tempeh with the wet batter and roll it into the bread crumbs. Make sure the Tempeh is well-coated.
5. Fry the Tempeh until golden brown.
6. Make the Spicy and Sour sauce. Slice the onion, bird's eye chili, and pound the garlic. Add them into a bowl.
7. Add the barbecue sauce, oyster sauce, Worcestershire sauce, chili sauce, and sesame oil. Mix well. Add some cornstarch if needed.
8. Sauté the onion and garlic until they brown.
9. Add the bird's eye chili and the sauce mix made earlier.
10. Add some water and sugar to taste.
11. Add a bit of vinegar. Cook until the sauce thickens.
12. Tempeh Katsu with Spicy and Sour Sauce is ready to serve.

Title: 3 Telur, 5 Menit Jadi. Resep Fluffy Omelette Souffle Eropa.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=olUQsFuhG9U

3 Eggs, Ready in 5 Minutes. European Fluffy Omelette Recipe.

Eggs are a favorite breakfast menu almost anywhere in the world. One of the most popular egg dishes is Omelette. This time, I’m sharing a “Fluffy Omelette / Soufflé Omelette” recipe. You just need 3 eggs! (The cheese is optional, ok?)

Fluffy Omelette Recipe

Ingredients:
3 eggs
Salt, sugar, pepper to taste
Mozzarella cheese to taste
Cooking oil as needed

Steps:
1. Separate the yolks and egg whites into two different containers.
2. Add a bit of sugar to the egg whites and whip until fluffy, but not too stiff. You can use a hand mixer or a whisk.
3. Whisk the egg yolks evenly.
4. Add the egg whites into the yolks bit by bit. Fold in gently.
5. Heat the pan. Use low / medium heat, and add some oil.
6. Fry the eggs and cover the pan. Cook until the bottom side browns.
7. Season with salt, pepper. Add the mozzarella cheese.
8. Cook for a bit and fold the omelette.
9. Fluffy Omelette is ready to serve.

Title: Mie Nyemek BonCabe: Resep Sahur Praktis Pecinta Pedas. Malaysia Sila Cuba.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Wovc6iGYm3g

Instant Noodle Mee Jawa: Simple Spicy Spicy Food Lover's Suhoor Recipe. Malaysia Sila Cuba.

Javanese Noodle (Mie Nyemek), a.k.a Mee Jawa in Malaysia, is a stir-fry noodle with a bit of soup with concentrated flavor, different to a noodle soup. This time, I'm using Bon Cabe instant noodles to make Mie Nyemek. The prep is simple, but the flavor is just as good as those in Javanese noodle shops.

Instant Noodle Mee Jawa Recipe

Spice paste ingredients:
3 cloves garlic
5 shallots
2 candlenuts

Other ingredients:
2 packs BonCabe Noodles
2 eggs
1 stalk leeks
1 stalk celery
2 sheets cabbage
1/2 large tomato
Salt, pepper to taste
Chili sauce to taste
Water as needed
Cooking oil as needed

Steps:
1. Blend the garlic, shallots, and candlenuts into a paste.
2. Chop the cabbage, tomatoes, leeks, and celery.
3. Sauté the spice paste until fragrant and set aside.
4. In the same pan, add some oil and add in the eggs.
5. Add in the tomatoes and sauté until half-cooked.
6. Add some water.
7. Add in the BonCabe Noodle. Cook to your preference.
8. Add in the cabbage, leeks, celery, BonCabe Noodle seasoning, and the sautéed spice paste.
9. Add some chili sauce.
10. Season with salt and sugar. Mix well.
11. Plate and sprinkle with BonCabe topping and fried shallots.

Title: Mantap! Resep Kangkung Dua Rasa: KRISPI & Garlic Ala Resto Chinese.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lG9O5wVPwf0

Water Spinach Two Ways ala Chinese Restaurant

Water Spinach Two Ways Recipe

Ingredients:
300 g / 2 bundles water spinach
Cooking oil as needed

Crispy Water Spinach spices:
6 cloves garlic, minced
8 shallots, minced
3 curly red chili, sliced
Bird's eye chili to taste, sliced
1 stalk leeks, sliced
Salt, sugar, pepper, flavor enhancers / stock powder to taste

Oyster Sauce Water Spinach spices:
4 cloves garlic, minced
1 tbsp oyster sauce
100 ml water
1 tbsp cornstarch
1.5 tsp sugar
1/2 tsp flavor enhancers / stock powder
1/4 tsp pepper

Steps:
1. Wash the water spinach thoroughly and dry completely.
2. Separate the leaves and stems.
3. Boil the stems for a bit with sugar and salt. Drain and rinse with cold water.
4. Sauté garlic until fragrant and golden. Set aside.
5. To make the oyster sauce mix, heat up a pan and add water and oyster sauce.
6. Season with sugar, pepper, and flavor enhancers.
7. Add in the sautéed garlic.
8. Add cornstarch and stir until thickens. Set aside.
9. Slice the stems lengthwise. Fry until they're crispy. Drain and set aside.
10. To make the crispy version's sauce, sauté shallots, leeks, curly red chili, and bird's eye chili until fragrant.
11. Season with sugar, salt, pepper, and flavor enhancers.
12. Add in the sautéed garlic. Stir and set aside.
13. Add in the crispy leaves and stir.
14. Add in the boiled stems into the oyster sauce mix and stir.
15. Water Spinach Two Ways is ready to serve.

Title: Tips Kupas Bawang TUJUH KALI Lebih Cepat! [TIPS&TRICKS]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ju8AKJCUh5k

How to Flash-Peeling Shallots Seven Times FASTER [Tips & Tricks]

Almost all Asian, especially Indonesian, dishes use shallots as an ingredient. However, preparing shallots can be troublesome. This time, I'm sharing the tips on peeling shallots SEVEN TIMES faster and much easier.

Method 1:
1. Rinse the shallots until clean and set aside.
2. Soak in hot water for 3-5 minutes.
3. Rinse with cool water so the shallots won't cook.
4. Cut both ends of the shallots (the top and the base) with a sharp knife.
5. Peel the skin slowly.
6. The shallots are ready to use.

Method 2:
1. Rinse the shallots until clean and set aside.
2. Cut both ends of the shallots (the top and the base) with a sharp knife.
3. Halve the shallots.
4. Peel the skin slowly.
5. The shallots are ready to use.

Title: Rebus Telur Cara Jepang! Resep Ramen Egg Pelengkap Mie.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CoKPfur8DkQ

Boil Egg the Japanese Way! Ramen Egg Recipe: Best for Instant Noodle Topping

Ramen Egg or Ajitsuke Tamago (味付け卵) is a marinated soft-boiled egg characterized by firm egg whites and soft, runny yolk. The KEY components are soy sauce, mirin, and sugar. The marinade will be perfectly infused into the whites and yolk.

Ramen Egg / Ajitsuke Tamago Recipe

Marinade Ingredients:
Soy Sauce : Mirin : Water : Sugar = 1 : 2 : 6 : 2
(Measure with a small glass, a tablespoon, or a small bowl, as appropriate)
Dashi powder / chicken powder, to taste

Other ingredients:
Eggs (as needed)
Ice cubes

Steps:
1. Prepare a saucepan and boil some water
2. Add the mirin and soy sauce
3. Add water and sugar
4. Season with the dashi powder, bring to a boil
5. Boil the eggs for 7 minutes
6. Transfer the eggs to an ice bath and let it rest
7. Peel the eggs gently
8. Add the eggs into a jar / closed container
9. Pour in the marinade
10. Keep in the fridge overnight
11. Remove the egg and cut to halves
12. Ramen Egg is ready to serve

Title: Resep Telur Dadar Spanyol: 100% Bahan Lokal.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AmYmJ7UM7OE

Spanish Omelette Recipe: 100% Your Local Ingredients.

Spanish Omelette or Spanish Tortilla is an egg dish from Spain. It's usually enjoyed as tapas (snack food) or as a breakfast menu. The main ingredients are eggs, potatoes, and onions. You can also add paprika, sausage, meat, mushroom, or grated cheese. It's super filling and nutritious, too!

Spanish Omelette Recipe

Ingredients:
4 eggs
2 onions, medium size
2 potatoes, medium size
Salt and pepper, to taste
Cooking oil as needed

Steps:
1. Cut the onions into large slices.
2. Slice the potatoes more thinly than the onions.
3. Fry the onions until soft and fragrant.
4. Add in the potatoes, fry until browned.
5. Drain in a bowl and let cool.
6. Add in the eggs. Mix well.
7. Season with salt and pepper. Let it rest for 10 minutes.
8. Prepare a pan with a bit of oil. Fry the eggs until cooked and golden brown.
9. Spanish Omelette is ready to serve.

Title: Rp 3.300 Jadi Dessert Hotel Bintang 5. Resep Coffee Mousse TANPA Whipped Cream.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fuwOi4wuoAw

Five-Star Hotel's Dessert for Less Than a Dollar! Coffee Mousse Recipe No Whipped Cream.

This time, I'm sharing a recipe on how to make a 5-star hotel sumptuous dessert with only instant coffee and several other budget-friendly ingredients. In French, mousse means foam. This is a dish that has been meticulously processed so it has a soft, airy texture, mixed with a folding method, and then set.

Coffee Mousse Recipe

Pastry Cream (Vla) Ingredients:
5-6 sachets Tora Cafe Milky Latte
375 ml milk
1 egg
2 egg yolks
25 g cornstarch
40 g butter
1/5 tsp salt

Italian Meringue Ingredients:
2 egg whites
120 g sugar
40 ml water
Cream of tartar (optional)

Biscuit Ingredients:
1 pack Egg Drop cookies / other biscuits to your liking
1 sachet Tora Cafe Choco Latte
Water as needed

Steps:
1. Make pastry cream by first heating the milk.
2. Add Tora Cafe Milky Latte, eggs, and cornstarch into a bowl. Mix thoroughly.
3. Add the heated milk bit by bit while stirring
4. Pour to a pan and cook on heat. Keep stirring until the pastry cream thickens.
5. Add butter and salt. Mix well.
6. Transfer to a container. Cover with baking paper / plastic. Let cool.
7. To make the Italian meringue, heat some water and sugar at 118°C - 121°C. Cook until it becomes a sugar syrup.
8. Beat the egg whites and add the sugar syrup bit by bit as you beat them to a stiff peak. Let cool.
9. Make the Tora Cafe Choco Latte and pour to a container containing the Egg Drop cookies. Soak until the chocolate drink is absorbed well by the cookies.
10. Combine the meringue and the pastry cream. Mix well.
11. Leave a bit of the meringue for the topping. Place in a piping bag.
12. Arrange the soaked Egg Drop cookies in a glass or other container.
13. Add the mousse.
14. Top with meringue.
15. Keep in the fridge or serve.

Title: Ramen Dari Indomie! Resep Ramen Jepang Hakata-Style
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PVFcZVGgPyI

Turning Instant Noodle Into Ramen: Hakata-Style Japanese Ramen

Ramen is one of the most popular Japanese dish. It's usually made with thin noodles and broth, but this recipe doesn't require hours of cooking time like regular ramen. This menu is inspired from Hakata Ramen, but it uses milk instead of bone broth.

Indomie Ramen Recipe

Broth Ingredients (1 serving):
250-300 ml water
1 large garlic
1 large shallots
1 inch ginger
30-50 ml evaporated milk
1 stalk green onions (bottom part)

Other ingredients:
Chicken-flavor soup-based instant noodles
Green onions (leaf part)
Sugar & pepper, to taste

Toppings:
Ramen egg, halved
Boiled corn
Boiled Wood Ear mushroom, sliced thinly

Ramen Steps:
1. Make the broth. Prepare a saucepan filled with water and bring to a boil.
2. Halve the ginger, garlic, and shallots. Add them to the water.
3. Slice the bottom part of the green onions. Add them to the water.
4. Cook for 5-10 minutes
5. Cook the instant noodles. Boil some water and add the noodle. Cook to your liking.
6. Add the instant noodle seasoning to a bowl. Pour in some broth and mix well.
7. Add some evaporated milk. Season with sugar and pepper
8. Add the cooked noodles.
9. Add mushroom, corn, and ramen egg.
10. Garnish with green onions.
11. Ramen Indomie is ready to serve.

Green Onion Garnish Steps:
1. Use the leafy part of the green onion.
2. Slice into three parts.
3. Slice thinly lengthwise.
4. Soak in an ice bath and let them rest for a few minutes until they curl.
5. Garnish is ready to use.

Title: 5 Timun 1 Ikan Jadi Resep Sup Ikan Singapura: Gurih Tapi Sehat Untuk Keluarga.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_WmOpjW7qMI

5 Cucumbers 1 Fish, Cook ‘Em With Milk! Singaporean Fish Soup Recipe, Tasty But Healthy.

Usually, we cook Dory by frying them. As it turns out, you can create other dishes from Dory, like this Singaporean Fish Soup. The main ingredients are white fish, cucumbers, milk, and some spices. Just like the ones in Singapore, this soup consists of fried fish and boiled fish. Both the texture and the flavor will make your taste-buds explode. Of course, this dish is healthy and nutritious! Perfect for your family at home.

Singaporean Fish Soup Recipe

Marinade:
2 slices Dory
1 tbsp sesame oil
1 tsp salt
1 tsp pepper

Batter:
2 eggs
3.5 tbsp medium-protein flour
1 tsp salt
1/2 tsp pepper

Other ingredients:
5 cloves garlic
5 medium-sized cucumber
2 4" ginger
2 leeks
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp fish sauce
80-100 ml evaporated milk
2-3 tsp salt
1/2 tsp pepper
1 tbsp sugar
Flavor enhancers to taste

Steps:
1. Slice Dory slightly thinly and put into a bowl.
2. Season with salt, pepper, and sesame oil. Mix well and let sit until marinade is absorbed.
3. Peel the cucumbers and slice diagonally.
4. Slice the ginger thinly.
5. Pound the garlic and peel.
6. Chop the leeks.
7. Heat the pan, add a bit of oil and sauté garlic until browned.
8. Add the cucumber and cook for a bit.
9. Boil some water. Add the sautéed garlic and cucumber into the water.
10. Make the batter. Beat the eggs, then add flour, salt, and pepper.
11. Coat half the fish with the batter and fry until golden brown.
12. Season the broth with salt, pepper, sugar, flavor enhancers, and fish sauce.
13. Add leeks and ginger.
14. Put the raw fish in one-by-one.
15. Add the evaporated milk and cook until the fish is done.
16. Singaporean Fish Soup is ready to serve.

Title: Selalu Laku Dicari! Resep Chili Oil Ala Chinese Resto, Cocok Untuk Dim Sum & Gorengan.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lNJimSmQLYw

Best Paired with Fried Foods. Chili Oil Recipe àla Chinese Restaurant.

Chili oil is a signature condiment in Sichuan, China, Korea, or other East Asian countries. The main ingredient is dried chili. It's typically used for Asian dishes such as ramen, dim-sum, Peking duck, sautéed vegetables and nearly all Chinese-style dishes. It adds fragrance and enhances the flavor of a dish!

Chili Oil Recipe

Ingredients:
250 g cooking oil
60 g dried chili
25 g garlic
25 g shallots
25 g dried shrimp
1 tsp salt
1/2 tsp sugar
1/2 tsp flavor enhancers
2 tbsp soy sauce

Steps:
1. Crush the dried chili with blender / food processor, set aside.
2. Puree the shallots, garlic, and cooking oil until fine.
3. Add the pre-soaked dried shrimp, blend shortly.
4. Sauté the fine mix until cooked and fragrant, season with salt, sugar, and flavor enhancers before the water content in the mix is evaporated.
5. Add crushed chili and cook until the oil turns red.
6. Add soy sauce and let it cook a bit more.
7. Store Chili Oil in a sterilized glass jar.

Title: Ditumis Gini, Jadi Nambah 3x! Resep Telur Kemangi ala Thai. Praktis!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=I2-BO2J6XyQ

Must Try, You WILL Be Hooked! Spicy Thai Basil Fried Eggs Recipe.

Inspired by a Thai dish called Pad Krapow or Thai Basil Chicken, this time I'm modifying this dish by using eggs instead of ground chicken. The marriage of the chili's spiciness and the lemon basil's fragrance is GUARANTEED to intensify this egg dish's flavor. This dish is ideal to be paired with warm rice.

Lemon Basil Fried Eggs Recipe

Ingredients:
10 eggs
2 tbsp minced garlic
A fistful of peeled shallots
20 red / green / mixed bird's eye chili
4 curly red chili
2 Habaneros
50 g lemon basil
4 tbsp fish sauce
4 tbsp oyster sauce
3 tsp sugar
2 tbsp water
Flavor enhancers to taste
Cooking oil to sauté and fry the eggs

Steps:
1. Heat the pan, fry the over well and sunny side up eggs. Remove and set aside.
2. Chop the bird's eye chili, curly chili, and Habanero to your preference.
3. Sauté the shallots until fragrant.
4. Add all of the chopped chili and garlic.
5. Season with fish sauce, oyster sauce, sugar, and flavor enhancers
6. Add the lemon basil, cook until they wilt.
7. Add a bit of water, mix well.
8. Combine the lemon basil mix with the fried eggs.
9. Lemon Basil Fried Eggs is ready to serve.

Title: Nasi Sarden Rice Cooker! Resep Sahur Praktis, 30 Ribu Kenyang Sekeluarga
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TFiJaZmrFGY

Budget-Friendly Food, Only Rice Cooker Needed! Sardine Rice Recipe.

It turns out you can elevate this budget-friendly food to be even more delicious with only rice cooker! This recipe was inspired from Nasi Liwet, a very rich-in-flavor Indonesian food. I combine rice, canned sardines, spices, and herbs to enhance the flavor. It's good and suitable for Suhoor and Iftar as it is simple yet tasty.

Sardines Rice Recipe

Ingredients:
1 canned ABC sardines in tomato flavor (425 g)
500 ml rice
500 ml water
6 cloves garlic
8 shallots
6-8 slices ginger
4-6 slices galangal
1 stalk lemongrass
2 tomatoes
Bird's eye chili, to taste
Petai, to taste
2 tbsp butter / margarine
1 tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
1/2 tsp pepper
Flavor enhancers, to taste

Steps:
1. Slice the ginger and galangal
2. Slice the garlic and shallots thinly
3. Cut the lemongrass into 3 parts and pound
4. Put the rice and water into the rice cooker
5. Add ginger, galangal, garlic, shallots, bird's eye chili, tomatoes, and petai
6. Place the sardines on top with a little bit of the tomato sauce
7. Season with salt, sugar, pepper, and flavor enhancers
8. Add margarine
9. Cook until the rice is done
10. After it's done, remove the inedible herbs and several sardines to plate whole
11. Add the remaining sardines' sauce and mix well
12. Plate and place the whole sardines on top

Title: Sambal Dabu Dabu ANTI Gagal! Resep Ikan Dori Praktis Cocok Untuk Sahur.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PiWZxo6H91U

Got Tomato? Cook It Like This! Dabu-Dabu Sambal Recipe From Manado, Indonesia

Dabu-Dabu Sambal is one of the most popular sambal creations from Manado, North Sulawesi. This Sambal is quite unique because the ingredients are not blended but sliced into small pieces. The spiciness and tartness of this Sambal match well with grilled fish, fried fish, and other seafood dishes. Your passion in cooking is just not complete if you haven’t tried to maks this Dabu-Dabu Sambal.

Dory with Dabu-Dabu Sambal Recipe

Dabu-Dabu Sambal ingredients:
2 red tomatoes
2 green tomatoes
5 shallots
5-10 bird's eye chili
2 limes
1 tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
1/4 tsp mushroom stock powder
50 ml cooking oil

Other ingredients:
2 Dory fillets
2 tbsp flour
2 tbsp cooking oil

Steps:
1. Dry the Dory with paper towel and sprinkle with flour.
2. Heat the oil and pan-sear both sides of the fish until cooked.
3. Dice the red and green tomatoes, core removed. Slice the shallots and bird’s eye chili and add them into a bowl.
4. Season with salt, sugar, mushroom stock, lime, and pour hot oil into the mixture. Mix well.
5. Serve the Dory with Dabu-Dabu Sambal on top.

Title: Tidak Digoreng, Cukup Pakai Rice Cooker! Resep Nasi Ayam Favorit Singapura
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nbNWA4rF_8Y

No Fry, Only Rice Cooker. Savory and Healthy Chicken Rice Recipe

Hainanese Chicken Rice is a popular dish in Malaysian and Singaporean foods. Simple but delicious, this Hainanese Chicken Rice's main ingredients are rice and chicken, marinated with ginger, garlic, and sesame oil. This menu is very suitable for Suhoor or Iftar, or as a healthy yet delicious menu for families.

Steamed Chicken Rice Recipe

Chicken marinade ingredients:
1 whole chicken
3 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp cooking wine
1 tbsp sesame oil
4 tsp salt
1 tsp pepper
1 tsp flavor enhancers
2 tbsp sliced ginger
3 tbsp tapioca flour

Other ingredients:
800 ml / 650 g rice
800 ml water
5 tbsp cooking oil
1 whole garlic
2 leeks

Steps:
1. Chop the chicken into little pieces, set aside in a bowl
2. Mince the garlic
3. Heat the oil, sauté the garlic until it turns golden
4. Slice the ginger into matchsticks. Add to the chicken.
5. Add tapioca flour, oyster sauce, salt, flavor enhancers, and pepper. Mix well and marinate for 15-30 minutes
6. Add rice and water into the rice cooker
7. Add the garlic oil
8. Add marinated chicken on top, do not stir. Cook chicken rice until done.
9. Chop the leeks and mix well with rice.
10. Steamed Chicken Rice is ready to serve

Title: Rahasianya di Marinasinya! Resep Chicken Wings Ala Pizza Hut
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qUQijzlToRs

The Secret is the Marination! Chicken Wings Recipe àla Pizza Hut

Spicy Chicken Wings is one of most customers' favorite menus when dining at Pizza Hut. The cooking methods are simple, as long as the recipe and marinade composition are well-made. The ingredients are also easy to find--they're healthier and more budget-friendly for families. The union of spicy, sweet, and juicy chicken flavor is so compatible with warm rice or french fries.

Spicy Chicken Wings Recipe

Ingredients:
6 pcs chicken wings
3 pcs grated garlic
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1.5 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp barbecue sauce
1.5 tbsp Cap Ibu Jari Hot & Sweet Chili
2 tbsp honey
1 tsp mushroom stock powder
1/2 tsp pepper
2 tbsp cooking oil

Steps:
1. Split the chicken wings into 3 parts, remove the tips and rinse.
2. Marinate the chicken wings with grated garlic, sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, Cap Ibu Jari Hot & Sweet Chili, barbecue sauce, honey, mushroom stock powder, and pepper. Mix well.
3. Marinate for at least 2 hours at room temp / at least 8 hours in the fridge so the marinade is absorbed well.
4. After marinating the wings, add cooking oil and mix well.
5. Prepare a wire baking rack and a tray. Place the chicken on top so the marinade can drip off. You can also use aluminum foil.
6. Roast in the oven at 220°C for 10 minutes.
7. After 10 minutes, remove from the oven and coat with leftover marinade. Roast the wings once more at 180°C for 5-10 minutes.
8. After the wings turn golden brown, remove from the oven and serve.

Title: Resep Sambal Hainan Khas Singapura: Harus Pakai Jahe!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zsl3ViTx2bU

Add Ginger! The Secret of Hainanese Sambal àla Singaporean Restaurant Recipe

Hainanese Chicken Rice Sambal is usually made of blended chili, garlic, and ginger. The savory chicken married with this Hainanese sambal is the key to the signature flavor profile of Hainanese Chicken Rice, the favorite, authentic dish in South East Asian countries, especially Singapore and Malaysia.

Hainanese Chicken Recipe: https://youtu.be/nbNWA4rF_8Y

Hainanese Chicken Rice Sambal Recipe

Ingredients:
12 curly chili
3 bird's eye chili (to taste)
3 cm ginger
1 whole garlic, small
50 ml cooking oil
2 tbsp sesame oil
1.5 tbsp rice vinegar or 3/4 tbsp white vinegar
1-2 tbsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
Flavor enhancers to taste
Water

Steps:
1. Peel the garlic, add to the food processor.
2. Peel the ginger, slice thinly, add to the food processor.
3. Chop the chili, add to the food processor.
4. Add the bird's eye chili, cooking oil, and sesame oil. Blend with the food processor.
5. Sauté the spices until fragrant and well-cooked.
6. Add water and season with salt, sugar, flavor enhancers, and rice vinegar.
7. Store the sambal in airtight containers, such as glass jars.
8. Hainanese Chicken Rice Sambal is ready to serve.

Title: Bahan Minimarket, 100% Jadi. Resep Dalgona Oreo & Regal Tanpa Ovalet (SP) Tanpa Whip Cream.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y5_LXquy8Vo

Mini-Market Ingredients, 100% Done. Oreo & Regal Dalgona Recipe: No Ovalette (SP) No Whipped Cream.

Have you watched and tried my "3 Minutes, 100% Success and No Mixer" Dalgona Coffee Recipe? This time, I'm sharing a recipe to make a version of that Dalgona drink with these biscuits as ingredients: Oreo and Regal. This recipe *DOES NOT REQUIRE* Whipped cream, Ovalet, and Eggs. Happy cooking!

Find "3 Minutes 100% Success Dalgona Coffee Recipe" here:
https://youtu.be/hLGumMcyfKU

OREO Dalgona Recipe

Ingredients:
100 g instant coconut milk
1 tbsp sugar
6 pc Oreos, remove the cream center
Milk
Ice cubes
Espresso (optional)

Steps:
1. Make the foam. Whip the coconut milk with a mixer until it expands
2. Smash the Oreos and strain them to eliminate large crumbs
3. Combine the foam with Oreo powder, mix thoroughly
4. Prepare a glass, add ice cubes and milk
5. Add the foam and sprinkle Oreo powder on top
6. Oreo Dalgona is ready to serve

REGAL Dalgona Recipe

Ingredients:
100 g instant coconut milk
1 tbsp sugar
3 pc Regal biscuits
Milk
Ice cubes
Espresso (optional)

Steps:
1. Make the foam. Whip the coconut milk with a mixer until it expands
2. Smash the Oreos and strain them to eliminate large crumbs
3. Combine the foam with Regal powder, mix thoroughly
4. Prepare a glass, add ice cubes and milk
5. Add the foam and sprinkle Oreo powder on top
6. Oreo Dalgona is ready to serve

Title: Jangan Didadar! Resep Telur Camilan Satu Keluarga Suka.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jbcv73hjUxY

Don't Make an Omelet! Try This Snack Recipe Loved by Families

Martabak Telur Recipe, easy and practical using spring roll skin. Martabak itself has an Arabic origin. In Arabic, martabak means "folded food".

Martabak Telur Recipe

Ingredients:
6 sheets spring roll skins
4 eggs
4 leeks
1 carrot
3 Shiitake mushrooms
2 tbsp flour
1 tsp curry powder
1 tsp salt
½ tsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
½ tsp flavor enhancer
5 chili
1 clove garlic
1 lime
50 ml sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp fried shallots
20 ml cooking oil

Steps:
1. Peel the carrot and cut into a small dice
2. Chop the leeks
3. Remove the Shiitake's stem and cut into a small dice
4. Combine all ingredients in a bowl, season with salt, sugar, pepper, flavor enhancers, curry powder, and eggs. Mix thoroughly
5. Add chopped chili to taste
6. Heat a non-stick pan with a diameter matching the spring roll skin. Add a bit of oil and place one sheet of spring roll skin in it.
7. Pour the egg filling on top, then cover with another sheet of spring roll skin.
8. Flip the Martabak. If the pan is too dry, add a bit of oil. Let it cook thoroughly.
9. For the sweet soy sambal, mash garlic, chili, salt, and stock powder into a paste
10. Add sweet soy sauce and fried shallots. Mix well
11. Martabak Telur is ready to serve with sweet soy sambal

Title: Rebus Ayam Cukup 2 Menit Saja! Resep Soto Favorit Anak Dan Keluarga
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8dCT79FVLJY

Boils Chicken in Only 2 Minutes! Kids and Family's Favorite Soup Recipe

The characteristics of Soto Bandung (one of Indonesia's favorite soup) are its clear broth and the use of radish and beef. But the Soto I'm making uses chicken without any fried soy beans topping. It's definitely delicious and fresh, suitable for rainy seasons like it is now.

Sliced Chicken Soto Recipe

Ingredients:
600 g chicken breast fillet
1 radish
1 leeks
8 cloves shallots
8 cloves garlic
4 bay leaves
10 Kaffir lime leaves
1 lemongrass
4 tsp salt
1-2 tbsp sugar
1 tsp ground white pepper
1-2 tsp flavor enhancer
1.5L water
2 celery
5 Kaffir lime
50 g fried shallots
20 ml oil

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken breast
2. Peel and dice the radish
3. Blend shallots, garlic, and oil to a paste
4. Sauté the paste. Add pounded lemongrass, Kaffir lime leaves, and bay leaves. Sauté until fragrant.
5. Boil some water. Add radish.
6. Add a little bit of the boiled water to the sautéed spice paste, mix, and empty the pan into the radish pot.
7. Season with salt, sugar, pepper, and flavor enhancer. Add chopped leeks and bring to a boil.
8. Add chicken, bring to a boil once more.
9. Chop the celery and prepare the Kaffir lime.
10. Serve the Soto with celery and fried shallots garnish and Kaffir lime juice.

100% SUCCESS in Only 3 Minutes! Brown Sugar Dalgona Coffee Recipe.

Only 3 minutes and no mixers needed! Foolproof Brown Sugar Dalgona Coffee Recipe. This foamy Dalgona coffee drink is currently trending in South Korea. This coffee drink is interesting because the foam topping is dark and it is very easy to make when you know the tips and tricks.

Brown Sugar Dalgona Coffee Recipe

Dalgona ingredients:
2 tbsp instant coffee powder (SEDIMENT-FREE)
2 tbsp white / brown sugar
2-3 tbsp warm water

Other ingredients:
Plain milk
Evaporated milk / coconut milk
Ice cubes

Steps:
1. Make the foam. Combine coffee, sugar, and water in a shallow bowl. Mix with a small strainer until the color turns pale for 3.5 minutes
2. Add ice cubes, plain milk, and evaporated milk into a glass. Place the foam ontop

Title: Panggang Dua Kali! Rahasia Resep Brownies Ala Starbucks [Atas Garing Daleman Empuk, 100% Sukses]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jA85gKSY2nI

Bake it Twice! The Secret to Brownies a la Starbucks Recipe

Bake it Twice! The Secret to Brownies a la Starbucks Recipe. There are two ways you can make brownies: steamed and baked. Each has a different flavor. Steamed brownies are softer in texture and a bit moist, while baked brownies are crunchy on the outside but soft on the inside. This time, I'm sharing an oven-baked brownies recipe.

Chocolate Espresso Brownies Recipe

Ingredients:
3 eggs
200 g sugar
50 g brown sugar
1 tsp vanilla extract
140 g butter
110 g dark compound chocolate
1/2 tbsp espresso powder
45 g cocoa powder
7 g baking powder
65 g flour all purpose
1 tsp salt

Steps:
1. Melt the butter and set aside. Add the compound chocolate, 1/4 of the cocoa powder and espresso powder. Stir until the chocolate is melted.
2. Whip the eggs and sugar until fluffy for 7-10 minutes using a mixer.
3. Add the brown sugar, melted butter, vanilla extract and chocolate mixture into the batter. Mix well.
4. Add the baking powder, sifted flour, the rest of the cocoa powder, and salt. Fold in with spatula.
5. Add the batter into the baking pan and sprinkle with chocolate shavings on top.
6. Bake in the oven at 180°C for 20 minutes (upper and lower heat).
7. Remove the brownies from the oven. Push down with spatula and let it rest for 10 minutes.
8. Bake once more at the same temperature for 20 minutes.
9. Chocolate Espresso Brownies is ready to serve.

URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w7LEXktHVek

Don't Fry 'Em! Simply Add 5 Eggs. Addictive Eggs and Tofu Stir Fry Recipe

Don't Fry 'Em! Simply Add 5 Eggs. This Eggs and Tofu Stir Fry recipe is a practical and budget-friendly food. The ingredients are almost always available in any home-chef's kitchen. This dish can be enjoyed with kids and the entire family as it is healthy and nutritious. Don't forget to serve it with warm rice and Garlic Oil to add a punch to its flavor and make you want more!

Eggs and Tofu Stir Fry Recipe

Ingredients:
400 g white tofu
4 eggs
3-4 sliced bird's eye chili
3 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp Garlic Oil (link: https://youtu.be/1WZF2s-7D_4)
4.5 tbsp sweet soy sauce
4 tbsp cooking oil

Steps:
1. Dice the tofu and put them in a bowl.
2. Lightly beat the eggs and add to the tofu.
3. Heat some oil, put the eggs and tofu in. Cook until browned.
4. Add the bird's eye chili.
5. Season with Garlic Oil, soy sauce, and sweet soy sauce.
6. Cook until all sauces are absorbed well.
7. Eggs and Tofu Stir Fry is ready to serve.

Title: Kari Gurih: Resep Egg Korma Gulai Telur Istimewa (Khas India)
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=87YiDQi39t0

Savory Curry: Egg Korma Special Egg Curry Recipe (Indian-style)

IFTAR MENU. Egg Korma or Egg Curry is an Indian dish with a curry sauce that's full of spices and savory flavors. This time, I'm sharing my version of Egg Korma. It's a very simple curry dish to cook for your family at home.

Egg Korma Recipe

Spice Blend ingredients:
6 clove garlic
10 pc shallots
2 cm ginger
2 cm turmeric
3 pc candlenuts
3 pc curly red chili
1/2 tsp coriander
1/2 tsp cumin
1/2 tsp cardamom powder
1/2 tsp cinnamon powder
5 pc cloves
Oil, as needed
Sugar, salt, pepper, flavor enhancers / mushroom stock powder, to taste

Other ingredients:
6 pc eggs
240 ml water / broth
50 ml coconut milk / almond milk / Greek Yogurt
Cold water, as needed

Garnish:
5 pc shallots (for fried shallots)
3 pc red radish, slice thinly
50 g cashews, roughly chopped
Coriander leaves, as needed

Steps:
1. Blend the spices with oil but the cloves.
2. Make the fried shallots. Slice the shallots thinly. Heat some oil and fry the shallots on medium heat until golden.
3. Heat the oil. Sauté the spice blend until fragrant and browns.
4. Add some water, then add the cloves.
5. Add the coconut oil bit by bit. Adjust the thickness to your liking.
6. Season with sugar, salt, pepper, and flavor enhancers / mushroom stock powder.
7. Boil some water and boil the eggs for 5.5 minutes.
8. After 5.5 minutes, remove the eggs and dunk them into the ice bath.
9. Prepare a plate of warm rice. Place the eggs on top and pour the curry sauce.
10. Garnish with fried shallots, red radish, cashew, and coriander leaves.
11. Egg Korma is ready to serve.

Title: Resep Udang Rebus Sambal. Hidangan Laut Anti Amis: Pakai Nanas Jadi Segar!
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hmyxYRwAHzk

Pineapple Makes it Fresh! Non-Fishy Seafood Sambal Recipe a la Restaurant

Seafood is best consumed with an accompanying sauce like a dipping sauce. This time, I'm sharing a recipe for a dipping Sambal for seafood using fresh pineapples just like the ones served in restaurants. The combination of the spicy, tart, sweet, and umami flavor will abate the seafood's sharp fragrance. It's great for shrimp, fish, squid, crab, and other seafood.

Seafood Dipping Sambal Recipe

Ingredients:
200 g shrimp
1 pc ginger, pounded
1 stalk leeks, cut in 2" increments
150 ml Cap Ibu Jari chili sauce
3 clove garlic, grated
1 inch grated ginger, add a bit of water
3 tbsp tomato sauce
8 tbsp grated pineapple
2 pc lime
Ice water as needed

Steps:
1. Boil the water and add pounded ginger, sugar, salt, and leeks.
2. After the leeks wilt, add the shrimp and boil for 2-3 minutes. Drain and dip in the ice bath for a bit.
3. For the Sambal, combine the Cap Ibu Jari chili sauce, grated garlic, ginger liquid, tomato sauce, grated pineapple, and lime juice. Mix well.
4. The boiled shrimp is ready to serve with the dipping Sambal.

Title: Pasti Nambah! Resep Nasi Daun Jeruk Feat. Ade MasterChef Indonesia [Ngobrol Santai]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wv0HoisrjoM

Lime Rice, Sambal Korek, and Popcorn Chicken Recipe

Lime Rice ingredients:
1 cup rice
10 pc Kaffir lime leaf
6 clove garlic
2 tbsp butter
10 ml oil
¼ tsp mushroom stock powder

Sambal Korek ingredients:
5 pc red bird’s eye chili
6 pc shallots
1 clove garlic
20 ml oil
½ tsp salt
½ tsp sugar
¼ tsp mushroom stock powder / MSG

Popcorn Chicken Ingredients:
250 g chicken thigh fillet
1 tbsp oil
1 tsp shallot powder
1 tsp garlic powder
½ tsp paprika powder
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
200 g flour
1 tsp shallot powder
1 tsp garlic powder
½ tsp paprika powder
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
250 ml water
250 ml oil

Steps:
1. For the Sambal, grind the shallots, garlic, bird’s eye chili, sugar, salt, and mushroom stock powder until smooth, then pour hot oil on it.
2. Slice the Kaffir lime leaves thinly. Remove the midrib.
3. Mince the garlic finely.
4. For the Lime Rice, heat some oil and sauté the garlic until fragrant. Then, add the lime leaves.
5. Remove from heat. Add the butter in and mix well.
6. Add the rice in. Add the mushroom stock powder and mix well.
7. For the Popcorn Chicken, chop the chicken into small pieces and transfer to a bowl.
8. Add the oil, shallots powder, paprika powder, salt, and pepper. Let it rest for 15 minutes.
9. For the batter, combine the flour with shallots powder, garlic powder, paprika powder, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
10. Add the chicken to the batter and strain.
11. Dip them into a bowl containing water. Remove and dip into the batter once more.
12. Heat some oil. Fry the chicken until golden brown.
13. Assemble the Lime Rice, Popcorn Chicken, and Sambal Korek in a bowl.

Title: Resep Pastel Tutup Menu Sahur Feat. Firhan MasterChef Indonesia [Ngobrol Santai]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ATKnvizMcTk

Pastel Tutup Recipe, Suhoor Menu Feat. Firhan MasterChef Indonesia [Relaxed Chat]

SUHOOR MENU Pastel Tutup Recipe by MasterChef Firhan: easy to make and DELICIOUS! This is a Halal dish, suitable for adults and kids. Other than the positive reviews from the three judges, this menu led Firhan to win the “Stop and Go Challenge” at Gallery 6 on January 18, 2020.

Pastel Tutup Recipe

Ingredients:
750 g potato, steamed
¼ tsp nutmeg powder
¼ tsp pepper
100 g cheddar cheese
50 ml milk
80 g butter
200 g ground beef
1 pc onion
4 clove garlic
1 pc carrot
1 pc corn
1 pc green onion
¼ tsp nutmeg powder
½ tsp mushroom stock powder
Sugar, to taste
20 ml oil
Parsley, as needed
1 pc egg yolk

Steps:
1. Chop the garlic and onion.
2. Slice the white part of the green onion thinly.
3. Shell the corn and brunoise the carrot.
4. Heat some oil and sauté the onion and garlic until fragrant.
5. Add the beef and nutmeg in.
6. Add the corn and carrot in. Cook until they’re done.
7. Add some water and season with sugar, salt, and pepper.
8. Add the green onion in. Stir well.
9. Mash the potatoes. Add butter, milk, salt, nutmeg powder, and ⅓ of the grated cheddar cheese in. Mix well.
10. Place ½ of the potato mix in a heatproof pan. Level the surface.
11. Add the sautéd vegetables and even it out. Add some grated cheese on top.
12. Add the rest of the potato and level the surface. Brush with the egg wash and sprinkle with grated cheese.
13. Bake at 180°C for 15 minutes, then raise the temperature to 200°C and bake again for 15 minutes.
14. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with some chopped parsley.
15. Pastel Tutup is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Resep Juara MasterChef Indonesia S6: Mie Domba! [Feat. Eric Herjanto]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h19p0v2wSyA

MasterChef Indonesia Winner's Recipe feat. Eric Herjanto

Eric Herjanto, the winner of MasterChef Indonesia, shares the noodle recipe that won him the MasterChef title: "Xi'an Biang Biang Lamb Noodles." Biang Biang Noodles is one of the main dishes in Xi'an city. It's usually cooked with lamb or beef as the majority of the population is Muslim. Biang Biang Noodles itself is one of the signature dishes of Shaanxi province in Northern China.

Xi’An Biang Biang Lamb Noodles Recipe

Noodles ingredients:
(yield 1-2 servings)
1 cup bread flour
1 pc egg
2 pc egg yolks
Salt, to taste

Other ingredients:
2 stalk green onions, the white part
1 pc red chili, sliced
3 clove garlic, minced
1 pc cabbage, sliced
2 pc wood ear mushroom, sliced
Chili powder, to taste
150 g lamb leg, sliced
1-2 serving noodle
2 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp black vinegar
2 tbsp sesame oil
2 tsp coriander, toasted, grind
1 tsp cumin, toasted, grind
Oil for sautéing
Salt, sugar, flavor enhancers, to taste
Additional green onions and sesame seeds for garnish

Steps for making the Noodles:
1. Mix all the ingredients. Knead until elastic.
2. Rest for 1-2 hours.
3. Flatten and cut the noodles to your preference.

Steps for making Xi’An Biang Biang Lamb Noodles:
1. Mix the lamb with ground coriander and cumin.
2. Boil the noodles for 3 minutes. Set aside.
3. Sauté the green onions and chili until fragrant. Add the garlic in.
4. Add the lamb and sauté until it's cooked.
5. Add the wood ear mushroom and chili powder.
6. Add the oyster sauce, black vinegar, and sesame oil.
7. Season with salt, sugar, and flavor enhancer.
8. Add the noodle and cabbage. Mix well.
9. Garnish with the scallions and sesame seeds.
10. Xi’An Biang Biang Lamb Noodles is ready to serve.

Title: Top Ala Restoran: Resep Saus Padang Untuk Cumi Dan Seafood Lainnya
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Gq4ISe5cL8Y

Best Restaurant-Quality Dish: Padang Sauce Recipe for Squid and Other Seafood

Squid with Padang Sauce is one of the most popular menus in a seafood restaurant. This time, I'm sharing a recipe for my version of Squid with Padang Sauce with a spicy and tart flavor that's rich in spices. Other than squid, Padang Sauce is also compatible with shrimp, crabs, clams, fish, and other types of seafood. In this video, I'm also sharing several tips on the correct way of cleaning fresh squid.

Squid with Padang Sauce Recipe

Spice blend ingredients:
7 shallots
4 garlic
6 curly chili
2 tbsp cooking oil

Other ingredients:
750 g fresh squid
1/2 tsp salt
1 tbsp baking soda
1 stalk lemongrass, pounded
3 Kaffir lime leaves
1 ginger, pounded
2 tbsp tomato sauce
2 tbsp Cap Ibu Jari chili sauce
2 tbsp oyster sauce
100 ml water
2 tbsp tamarind water
1 chili, sliced
1 leeks, sliced
1 onion, sliced
1 tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
1/2 tsp pepper

Steps:
1. Detach the squid's head from the body. Remove all the dirt and cuttlebones. Rinse well and cut into 1-2 cm increments, depending on the size.
2. Soak the squid with baking soda, salt, and water for 15-20 minutes.
3. Remove the soaking liquid, rinse well, and drain the squid.
4. Prepare the spice blend. Combine the curly chili, shallots, garlic, and blend with the cooking oil until it becomes a paste.
5. Sauté the spice blend. Add onion, chili, pounded lemongrass that's been tied into a knot, Kaffir lime leaves, and pounded ginger.
6. Add in the water, tomato sauce, oyster sauce, tamarind water, and Cap Ibu Jari chili sauce. Mix well.
7. In a different pan, flash fry the squid. Make sure the oil is hot.
8. Add the squid into the sauce. Season with salt, sugar, and pepper.
9. Add in the leeks and cook for a bit.
10. Squid with Padang Sauce is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Resep Kari Ayam Mentega Ala Resto: Khas India.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vrIZXEIMmro

Indian Signature Dish: Butter Chicken Curry a la Restaurant Recipe

Butter Chicken is one of the most popular curries in Indian restaurants. The characteristic of this dish is the many spices it uses. Marinated chicken chunks plus creamy curry sauce make Butter Chicken even more delicious. This is really a must-try!

Butter Chicken Recipe

Marinade ingredients:
400 g chicken thigh fillet, cut to about an inch
2 clove garlic, grated
80 ml coconut milk
1 inch ginger, grated
1 tsp paprika
1 tsp turmeric powder
1 tsp salt
1/2 tsp pepper

Sauce ingredients:
3 tbsp Ghee / clarified butter
1 pc onion
1 pc tomato
2 clove garlic
1 inch ginger
3 tbsp tomato paste
100 ml coconut milk
300 ml water
1/2 tsp coriander
1/2 tsp cumin
1/2 tsp cardamom
1/4 tsp cinnamon
1/4 tsp nutmeg
2 cloves
1 star anise
1 bay leaf
1/4 tsp fenugreek
Salt, sugar, flavor enhancers to taste

Steps:
1. Combine the chicken with the marinade and let it rest for at least 15 minutes.
2. Pan-sear the marinated chicken on high heat until half cooked. Set aside.
3. In the same pan, sauté the onion, pounded garlic, and grated ginger.
4. Add the Ghee / clarified butter.
5. After they wilt, add in the tomato.
6. Add the coriander, cardamom, cumin, fenugreek, nutmeg, and cinnamon.
7. Sauté until everything wilts, then add the water and tomato paste in. Bring to a boil.
8. Blend the sautéed spices. After blending, cook the spice mix once more.
9. Add the chicken.
10. Add the bay leaf, star anise, and cloves.
11. Season with salt and sugar.
12. Add the coconut milk bit by bit. Cook until the sauce thickens and the chicken is well-cooked.
11. Butter Chicken is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Garing, Gurih, ANTI SOBEK: Resep Risol Mayo Semua Umur Suka
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wBtJWTv85xQ

Crispy, Melted, TEAR-PROOF: Shrimp Mayo Rissole Recipe

Rissole is one of the most popular snacks that is loved by everyone, starting from kids to adults. This time, I'm sharing a recipe for a variation of Rissole, called Shrimp Mayo Rissole that has a savory flavor profile. In this video, I'm also sharing various tips to make soft, tear-proof Rissole skin. This dish is great for breakfast or snacks.

Shrimp Mayo Rissole Recipe

Filling ingredients:
12 tbsp mayonnaise
5 tbsp condensed milk
3 tbsp Cap Ibu Jari chili sauce
1/2 tsp salt
1/2 tsp pepper

Rissole Skin ingredients:
125 g all-purpose flour
50 ml water
200 ml milk
1 tsp salt
1 egg

Other ingredients:
200 g peeled shrimp, halved
3 boiled eggs, sliced to 6 pieces
500 g breadcrumbs
2 eggs

Steps:
1. For the Rissole skin, combine the flour, egg, salt, water, and milk. Mix well until it's free of lumps.
2. Prepare a pan to make the skin. Heat the pan and dip into the batter. Let the skin cook (not until it's dry) and remove from heat. Repeat until the batter is all cooked.
3. For the filling, combine mayonnaise, condensed milk, Cap Ibu Jari chili sauce, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
4. Rinse the peeled shrimp and halve.
5. Prepare the egg. Lightly whisk.
6. Take the Rissole skin and fill with the mayo fillings, shrimp, and boiled egg. Fold.
7. Dip the Rissole into the egg and coat with breadcrumbs evenly.
8. Prepare a pan with hot oil and fry until golden brown.
9. Shrimp Mayo Rissole is ready to serve.

Title: Resep Ayam Woku Pedas Maknyus: Khas Manado.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sxCxXUICb-c

Manadonese Food: Spicy Woku Chicken Recipe

Woku Chicken is a signature dish from Manado, North Sulawesi. The characteristic of this dish is its spicy yellow broth with aromatics, such as Kaffir lime leaves, lemon basil, Pandan leaves, and lemongrass, which give the dish its distinct flavor and aroma. This dish is great to spice up your daily diet.

Woku Chicken Recipe

Spice blend:
3-4 stalk lemongrass, sliced
5 clove garlic
12 shallots
1 inch ginger, sliced
2 inch turmeric, sliced
4 pc red chili, sliced
6 pc bird's eye chili
2 pc candlenuts

Other ingredients:
1 whole broiler chicken, chop into 12-14 pieces
2 stalk lemongrass, pounded
15 pc Kaffir lime leaves
1 pc turmeric leaves (optional) 
1-2 pc tomatoes, sliced
3 pc Pandan leaves, sliced
4-5 pc leeks, sliced
250 g lemon basil
400 ml water
1 small Key lime
Sugar, salt, pepper, flavor enhancers / mushroom stock powder, to taste
Cooking oil as needed

Steps:
1. Finely chop the spices with a food processor until the texture is a bit chunky.
2. Heat the pan and add the oil.
3. Sauté the spice blend, Kaffir lime leaves, and pounded lemongrass until cooked and fragrant.
4. Add in the tomatoes, cook until they wilt.
5. Add in the chicken. Stir.
6. Add the water. Season with sugar, salt, pepper, and flavor enhancers / mushroom stock powder.
7. Add the Pandan leaves. Cook until the broth is reduced and the chicken is done.
8. Add in the leeks, lemon basil, and lime juice. Mix well.
9. Woku Chicken is ready to serve.

Title: Resep Tim Ayam Cincang Telur Asin: Khas Hong Kong.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1sfwfjQozP4

Steamed Minced Chicken with Salted Egg Recipe: Hong Kong Style.

This Chicken-Side-Up is great if you’re bored with oily dishes or dishes that contain coconut milk. This dish is very practical to make with simple and easy-to-find ingredients. It tastes great with soft chicken and crunchy jicama textures. You can serve this for your family at home, from kids to adults.

Chicken-Side-Up Recipe

Ingredients:
500 g chicken thigh fillet
2 clove garlic
1 pc jicama
4 pc smoked chicken
1 pc egg whites
2 tbsp sago flour
1 tbsp fish sauce
6 tbsp water
3 tbsp oil
2 pc raw salted egg yolk
¾ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
3 tsp sugar
½ tsp mushroom stock powder
Salt for the jicama, to taste

Optional:
Ginger liquid
Sesame oil

Steps:
1. Chop the smoked chicken into small dice.
2. Peel the jicama and chop into small dice. Transfer to a bowl. Add some salt and massage the jicama until some white liquid is released. Rince the jicama thoroughly, drain, and set aside.
3. Roughly mince the chicken and add grated garlic, jicama, smoked chicken, fish sauce, sago flour, salt, pepper, sugar, mushroom stock powder, egg whites, water, and oil. Mix well.
4. Add the dough into an aluminum cup. Create a crater at the center and place the salted egg yolk on top.
5. Steam for 15-20 minutes.
6. Chicken-Side-Up is ready to serve.

Title: Resep Mochi Rasa Susu, Pandan & Milo [Bahan Lokal Rasa Jepang]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4xT8yvt0ZJ0

Japanese Mochi, Local Ingredients: Mochi Recipe in Milk, Pandan, and Milo Flavors

Milk Mochi is a Japanese snack made of glutinous rice flour. This recipe is a bit different as I'm making a Milk Mochi without filling in 3 different flavors: Original (Milk), Pandan, and Milo, coated with ground peanuts and Milo powder. The soft and bouncy texture makes this snack suitable for a relaxing time.

Milk Mochi Recipe

Mochi Dough ingredients:
150 g glutinous rice flour
225 ml milk
25 g sugar
1 tsp salt
25 ml oil
50 g Milo powder
1/2 tsp Pandan essence

Coating ingredients:
100 g peanuts, baked / roasted until browned
25 g sugar

Steps:
1. Combine the glutinous rice powder, milk, sugar, salt, and oil in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Steam the dough for about 20-25 minutes.
3. As the dough is being cooked, grind the roasted peanuts and sugar with a blender.
4. Set aside the steamed dough. Shape into balls using two spoons while the dough is still warm and coat with the ground peanuts and Milo Powder until the mochi is evenly coated.
5. Milk Mochi is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1WZF2s-7D_4

Bitterless, Aromatic! Garlic Oil Recipe without Preservative

Garlic Oil is commonly used for as a mixture of cooking ingredients. Added on soup, stir-fried, fried rice, pasta, noodles, even for various Chinese food. A simple way to enhance aroma and flavor. Garlic Oil can hold up to 4 weeks at room temperature.

Garlic Oil Recipe

Ingredients:
8 cloves garlic, finely chopped

Salt, own's preferences

Steps:
1. Heat oil on low heat
2. Add garlic & ginger, cook until turns yellow not burnt
3. Add a pinch of salt

Title: Praktis Dengan Teflon: Resep Ayam Panggang Madu Ala Restoran [Charsiu]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xxS8yFMmhF8

Easy with Teflon: Honey Roasted Chicken a la Restaurant Recipe

Honey Roasted Chicken a.k.a. Char Siu Chicken is known for its oriental flavors as it uses ingredients like red yeast rice, five-spice, and sesame oil. This time, I'm sharing a Chinese-style dish, the red Honey Roasted Chicken. Here, I'm using red yeast rice to reproduce the red color and to add some aroma to the dish. This special dish is great to be enjoyed for Chinese New Year with your family.

Garlic Oil Recipe: https://youtu.be/1WZF2s-7D_4

Honey Roasted Chicken Recipe

Ingredients:
500 g chicken thigh fillet
10 clove garlic
1 inch ginger
2 tsp five-spice powder
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
2 tbsp Chinese cooking wine
2 tbsp honey
1 tbsp red yeast rice

Others:
Cooking oil as needed
Water as needed
Cornstarch as needed
Sugar, salt, and flavor enhancers / mushroom stock powder to taste
Garlic Oil
Coriander leaves (for garnish)

Steps:
1. Blend the garlic and ginger, strain the residue.
2. Add the garlic and ginger liquid back to the blender with red yeast rice, honey, cooking wine, oyster sauce, and five-spice powder. Blend.
3. Add the marinating liquid to the chicken. Marinate for 3 - 8 hours.
4. Drain the chicken from the marinating liquid or pat dry with a paper towel. Rub with oil.
5. Roast the chicken in the oven at 210°C for about 7 minutes, then rub with the marinating liquid and roast it again for 5 minutes.
6. If using Teflon, heat the pan on medium heat. Add a bit of oil and pan-sear the chicken until the surface is dry and it's cooked inside without burning.
7. To make the sauce, heat the pan. Add some water and the marinating liquid. Bring to a boil. Season with sugar, salt, and flavor enhancers / mushroom stock powder. Add the cornstarch mix bit by bit until the sauce thickens.
8. Serve Honey Roasted Chicken with rice, the marinating sauce, and Garlic Oil.

Title: Spesial, Empuk, Lembut. Resep Nastar Terenak Turunan Keluarga! [100% Sukses, Lumer Di Mulut]
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7JgCJFZENUM

Pineapple Tarts Recipe

Tart Dough Ingredients:
250-280 g all-purpose flour
100 g cornstarch
125 g Wijsman butter
125 g margarine
110 g powdered milk
110 g powdered sugar
2 egg yolks
75 g grated cheese

Pineapple Jam Ingredients:
750 g grated pineapple
150 g sugar
5 cloves
1 tbsp Wijsman butter
1 tbsp margarine

Egg Wash Ingredients:
3 egg yolks
2 tbsp plain milk
1 tbsp cooking oil

Steps:
1. To make the filling, cook the grated pineapple, clove, and sugar until reduced. Add the butter and margarine, and cook until thickens.
2. For the tart dough, mix the butter, margarine, and powdered sugar. Add the egg yolks and mix well.
3. Add the flour, cornstarch, and powdered milk.
4. Add the grated cheese. Mix thoroughly and knead.
5. Take and flatten about 5 g of dough.
6. Fill with the pineapple jam, cover, and roll into a ball.
7. Bake at 140°C for 30 to 35 minutes.
8. Do the egg wash on the tart's surface with yolks, milk, and oil mix.
9. Bake once more for 10-15 minutes.
10. Pineapple Tarts are ready to serve.

Special, Decadent, Soft. The Best Pineapple Tarts Recipe Passed Down for Generations!

Pineapple Tarts are a snack you usually find served on special events like Chinese New Year. The name "Nastar" (Pineapple Tarts in Indonesian) is derived from Dutch's ananas, which means pineapple and tart, as in tart cakes. This time, I'm sharing a classic Pineapple Tarts recipe using PREMIUM ingredients that will make these tarts SOFTER and more DECADENT.

Title: Resep Udang Saus Singapore Pedas Gurih: Khas Singapore.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P3GuDIigDwU

Singapore Signature Dish: Spicy and Savory Prawns with Singapore Sauce Recipe

Prawns with Singapore Sauce can be a good menu choice for your family at home. The flavor is a bit different to other prawn dishes. This dish is flavorful as it uses various spices like ginger, galangal, bay leaf, and other ingredients. It's not only delicious but also easy to make.

Prawns with Singapore Sauce Recipe

Ingredients:
200 g prawns
100 g cornstarch
Salt, pepper to taste
Cooking oil for frying

Spice Blend ingredients:
2-5 pc red chili (remove the seeds)
5-6 shallots
5-6 garlic
1 inch ginger
1 stalk lemongrass (the inner white part)
Cooking oil as needed

Singapore Sauce ingredients:
2 slice galangal
2 pc Kaffir lime leaves
1 pc bay leaf
1/2 pc onion
2 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp tomato sauce
1.5 tbsp oyster sauce
4 tbsp evaporated milk
1 pc egg
450 ml boiling water
Cornstarch as needed (to thicken the sauce)

Optional:
1/2 tbsp fish sauce
1 tsp sesame oil

Steps:
1. Blend all the spices together.
2. Coat the prawns with cornstarch.
3. Fry the prawns. Make sure the oil is hot and fry it for a bit, not until the prawns are crisp.
4. Sauté the spice blend and add a bit of oil.
5. After the spices release some oil, add the galangal, bay leaf, and Kaffir lime leaves. Cook until reduced.
6. Add the onion and sauté until fragrant.
7. Add boiling water.
8. Add the chili sauce, tomato sauce, and oyster sauce.
9. Season with salt, sugar, and mushroom stock powder / MSG to taste.
10. Add the evaporated milk.
11. Add the cornstarch mix.
12. Add the egg that's been whisked with a bit of water. Stir gently.
13. Cook until the sauce thickens.
14. Add the prawns.
15. Prawn with Singapore Sauce is ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Hanya 6 Bahan: Resep Daging Bistik Goreng Saus Mentega
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_7VCpeABkD8

Only 6 Ingredients: Fried Steak in Butter Sauce

This time, I'm sharing one of restaurant dish recipe: Fried Steak in Butter Sauce. The ingredients are easy to get and you don't need a lot of time to cook it. In this video, I'm also giving you a tip about velveting, a technique to make meat become softer when cooked.

Fried Steak in Butter Sauce Recipe

Beef marinade ingredients:
200 g beef
2 clove garlic, grated
2 tbsp cornstarch
1 tbsp cooking oil
Water, as needed
Salt, pepper, mushroom stock powder / flavor enhancers, to taste

Sauce ingredients:
3 tbsp margarine
5 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1/2 onion, sliced
2 clove garlic, pounded

Cooking oil for frying

Steps:

Beef:
1. Slice the beef.
2. Add salt, pepper, garlic, oil, cornstarch, and a bit of water. Mix well and let it rest.
3. Before frying, coat the beef with cornstarch to make it more crispy. Fry the beef in really hot oil for a bit until the meat is cooked.

Sauce:
1. Add the margarine.
2. Add the garlic and onion. Sauté until fragrant.
3. Add the tomato sauce, sweet soy sauce, and Worcestershire sauce.
4. Add salt, pepper, and mushroom stock powder / flavor enhancers, to taste.
5. Bring to a boil.
6. Pour the sauce on top of the fried beef.
7. Fried Steak in Butter Sauce is ready to serve.

Title: Resep Sambal Matah Gurih Anti Gagal: Khas Bali.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2l43lXBBJo0

Quintessential Bali: Foolproof Sambal Matah Recipe

Sambal Matah is a signature Balinese dish, served to complement dishes like fried chicken, grilled fish, or Betutu chicken. "Matah" itself means "raw". Sambal Matah is made from raw ingredients that exude the unique aroma of spices, such as lemongrass and Kaffir lime leaves. This time, I'm sharing a recipe for my version of Sambal Matah.

Sambal Matah Recipe

Ingredients:
6 Kaffir lime leaves (large size)
10-20 bird's eye chili
25 shallots
2 garlic
7 g shrimp paste
2 stalk lemongrass
1.5 tsp mushroom /chicken stock powder / MSG
50 ml coconut oil
1/2 tsp salt
1.5 tsp sugar
1.5 slice key lime / kaffir lime / regular lime

Steps:
1. Slice the lemongrass, Kaffir lime leaves, shallots, garlic, and shrimp paste thinly.
2. Heat the coconut oil.
3. Combine all the sliced ingredients.
4. Season with salt, mushroom stock powder, and sugar.
5. Mix well and let it rest to enhance the shallots and garlic aroma.
6. Add the shrimp paste.
7. Pour the hot oil into the rest of the ingredients.
8. Add lime juice and mix well.
9. Sambal matah is ready to serve. (Serve with warm rice and pulled chicken)

Title: Kulit Garing Tapi Daging Lembut. Resep Salmon Steak Crispy Skin.
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=x1GnFAJEUOI

Crispy Skin, Juicy Flesh. Crispy Skin Salmon Steak Recipe

This time, I'm sharing a recipe and tips to make Salmon Steak with super crispy skin but juicy inside. It's so simple to make! This Salmon Steak is paired with the fresh and tasty Creamy Lemon Sauce. This recipe is suitable for people on a diet.

Salmon Steak Recipe

Ingredients:
Salmon
Salt
Cooking oil
Creamy Lemon Sauce (Find the recipe here: https://youtu.be/OK30kkqHRAc)

Garnish:
Broccoli
Dill
Lemon

Steps:
1. Cut the salmon into several slices (4-5 cm thickness). Pat dry with a paper towel.
2. Coat with salt and oil (both sides).
3. Heat the pan. Add cooking oil as necessary.
4. Add the salmon in, skin down. Cook until the skin is crispy. (If the salmon releases oil, remove the excess)
5. After the skin becomes crispy, flip the salmon and cook the other side for a bit (about 1 minute).
6. Serve with Creamy Lemon Sauce.

Title: Asli Resep Restoran: Resep Udang Goreng Sereal
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xDyoLvgWqhc

Real Restaurant Recipe: Cereal Prawns Recipe

This is a unique combination of prawns and cereal. This time, I'm sharing a recipe for Cereal Prawns or Cereal Butter Prawns that is practical and easy to make. It's one of those dishes that I personally won't get bored of due to the crispy texture from the cereal, the umami from the butter, and the sweetness and tender feel of the prawns. It's great for family meals.

Cereal Prawns Recipe

Shrimp Marinade ingredients:
14 small prawns, slice the back and leave the tail and head
1/2 tsp baking soda
1 egg white
100 g cornstarch
Salt, pepper, to taste

Sautéed ingredients:
2 tbsp butter
1 clove garlic, minced
1-4 pc bird's eye chili
1-2 pc curry leaves
1 yolk
5-6 tbsp Nestum cereal / plain, instant oatmeal
1 tbsp powdered milk
Sugar, salt, mushroom stock powder / MSG to taste

Steps:
1. Peel the prawn's shell and slice the back. Add to a bowl.
2. Add the egg white, baking soda, sugar, salt, pepper, and mushroom stock powder. Mix thoroughly.
3. Let it rest for 10-20 minutes in the fridge.
4. Coat the prawns with flour.
5. Fry it for a bit (not until crispy) and set aside.
6. Sauté the butter.
7. Add the egg yolk that has been mixed with 1 tbsp of water / milk. Add slowly while stirring.
8. Add the garlic and sauté until fragrant.
9. Add the sliced bird's eye chili and curry leaves. Cook until dry.
10. Add the Nestum cereal.
11. Season with salt, sugar, and pepper.
12. Add the powdered milk.
13. Add the fried prawns and mix evenly.
14. Cereal Prawns are ready to serve.

--------------------------------------------------

Title: Cocok Untuk Anak & Suami: Resep Roti Goreng Mayo Keju Gurih Praktis Super Garing
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GmpvtVaQSxY

Great for Kids & Family: Mayo Cheese Fried Bread Recipe, Savory, Practical, Super Crispy

This particular dish usually uses rissole skin, but this time I’m sharing a Rissole Mayo recipe using bread. This Mayo Fried Bread is soft inside and crispy outside. The filling used are ham, cheese, boiled egg, and other ingredients as well as mayonnaise sauce. It’s great and practical for your family’s breakfast at home.

Topics
00:36 : persiapan bahan (prepping the ingredients)
01:57 : mulai menggoreng (frying the bread)
02:04 : hidangan siap dan tahap plating (the dish is ready to plate and serve)

Mayo Cheese Fried Bread Recipe

Ingredients:
10 pc bread (no crust)
2 pc eggs
100 g breadcrumbs
Oil for frying

Mayo Filling:
10 tbsp mayonnaise
4 tbsp Yummy PeranChiz Cheddar Cheese, grated
2-3 tbsp condensed milk
4 tbsp ham / bacon, chopped (optional)
Salt, pepper to taste

Topping:
Ham / Bacon
Sausage
Kani stick
Boiled egg
Corn
Etc., to your liking

Steps:
1. Make the Mayo filling. Combine the mayonnaise, condensed milk, chopped ham / bacon, and grated cheese. Season with salt and pepper. Mix well.
2. Flatten the bread.
3. Fill with the toppings to your liking.
4. Brush the edges of the bread with the beaten egg. Fold and glue together.
5. Dip the bread into the egg and coat with the breadcrumbs.
6. Fry until golden brown.
7. Mayo Cheese Fried Bread is ready to serve.

Title: Kriuk Kriuk Pedas: Resep Tahu Cabai Garam
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y6eRAgaqi7I

Hot and Crunchy: Salt and Pepper Tofu Recipe

This tofu dish is a fan-favorite because it's great to be eaten with rice or served as a snack. The softness of silk tofu meets the chili, salt, and garlic make the dish even more mouthwatering, especially during rainy seasons like now. Give it a try!

Salt and Pepper Tofu Recipe

Ingredients:
10 white silk tofu, small size
10 minced garlic
10 minced shallots
100-200 g cornstarch
2 stalk green onion, sliced
5-10 bird's eye chili, to taste
Salt, sugar, and mushroom stock powder, to taste (mushroom stock powder can be substituted with chicken or beef stock powder or MSG)
Cooking oil as needed

Steps:
1. Slice the tofu into several pieces and soak in salt water.
2. Coat the tofu with cornstarch.
3. Rest for 2-3 minutes and fry until they're crispy.
4. Sauté the garlic until crispy and set aside.
5. Sauté the shallots until they wilt and fragrant.
6. Add the green onions and bird's eye chili.
7. Season with sugar, salt, and mushroom stock powder, to taste.
8. Add the fried tofu in.
9. Add the crispy garlic and mix well with all the spices.
10. Salt and Pepper Tofu is ready to serve.

Title: Rahasia Udang Jadi Lurus Besar Krispi: Resep Udang Ebi Furai Ala Hokben
URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=f-PlPtWxSsI

The SECRET of Straight, Big, Crispy Shrimp: Ebi Furai Recipe àla Restaurant

Ebi Furai (not to be mistaken with Ebi Tempura) is a popular dish from Japan. If we go to a Japanese restaurant, this particular menu is always present, especially in a bento. The bouncy shrimp covered with crispy skin is one of family's favorite menu.

Tartar Sauce Recipe : https://youtu.be/l23X1oIv7As

Ebi Furai Recipe

Ingredients:

8 shrimp (graded at 30-40 pieces per kilogram)
Flour, bread crumbs as needed
Oil to fry

Wet batter:
2 tbsp flour
1/2 egg
50 ml plain milk / cream / coconut milk
Salt, pepper, mushroom stock / flavor enhancers to taste
Grated garlic as needed

Steps:
1. Peel the shrimp, de-vein, and rinse.
2. Make cuts on the underside of the shrimp (about 1/2 cm away), not too deep.
3. Push the back of the shrimp with fingers in a massaging motion until the shrimp becomes straight and flat
4. Make the wet batter. Add flour, egg, cream, garlic, pepper, and mushroom stock. Mix well.
5. Coat the batter with flour, then the wet batter, then the bread crumbs.
6. Fry the shrimp until golden brown
7. Serve Ebi Furai with Tartar Sauce
